chapters.title: Chapter 1601
chapters.body:
Chapter 1601

Chapter 1601

C.1601

Shua!

There was a moment of silence.

Everyone was shocked and stunned.

What did he just… Shout?

Xiaorou?

Is this called Yurou fairy?

This… Is this crazy?

What’s his status? How dare you call fairy Yurou so?

Wait, no!

All of a sudden, the crowd’s eyelids jumped.

This guy seems to have said at the beginning that he came to find his wife, and his wife is among the people in Tianmen. Is it possible that the wife mentioned in this guy’s mouth is Yurou fairy?

what the fuck!

This melon is a little big

Countless monks in Hecheng, including those of the three sects present, opened their mouths and were full of surprise.

The many immortal kings and the strong ones in Tianmen were also stunned.

Then anger!

This man is so bold!

I dare to shout this title in front of so many people. It’s obviously humiliating Yurou fairy and Tianmen

Die!

He must die!

The Dharma protector immediately shouted angrily, “the thief wants to die, and I will tear your mouth!”

Voice down!

With a bang, the big Dharma protector’s sleeve robe waved, controlled the sword in the hands of the Three Dharma protectors, and swept straight towards the deficient mouth!

In the distance,

Fairy Yurou, who witnessed this scene on the city tower, was also a little distracted at this time.

Her ears seemed to still echo the sound of “xiaorou”, with a sense of deja vu, but she could not remember where she had heard it.

It seems that there is no memory at all, just an illusion.

But she knew very well that she could not have an illusion.

Her beautiful eyes were shining and thoughtful.

At the same time, the sword controlled by the Dharma protector crossed the sky and swept in front of Xu Xu.

Xu lacked “too late” to avoid. He was only slightly on one side of his body and was pierced by the light of the sword.

Bang!

A violent energy erupted from the sword.

Xu Ke was suddenly blown away, like a broken kite flying backward, spraying blood from his mouth.

Unexpectedly, in Hecheng, the monks surrounded by the onlookers burst into an uproar.

Although this result has long been expected, all the time, flowers are breaking their cognition and constantly challenging the strong.

But now, seeing that he was easily hit so hard by the immortal powerful, everyone was frightened.

Flowers are so powerful that I didn’t expect to be so small in front of xianzun.

Xianzun is a strong man. It’s really terrible!

“I’m afraid this blow was enough to kill him!”

“I saw it just now. The sword runs through huawuduan’s chest.”

“It seems to be going to end…”

“Huh? No, why are the flowers still lying on the ground spraying blood? ”

As they talked, they suddenly felt something was wrong.

Has this blood been spraying too long?

From just now until now, it’s sprayed all over the floor.

Are you dead?

“Wait, look at the ground. His blood seems to spray quite… How to say, it’s very beautiful!” At this time, someone exclaimed.

Everyone’s eyes swept away. Xu Que’s mouth was still spraying a large amount of blood mist. Well, he still didn’t die.

But after his blood fog fell on the ground, it was very symmetrical and clear, and slowly formed a huge red love pattern.

?

Everyone present looked confused.

But everyone didn’t think much about it. They just thought it was a coincidence.

The key is that this guy’s vitality is too strong.

The angry sword of the immortal respected strong man runs through his chest and can persist until now.

But… Looking at his state, it seems that he is at the end of his strength.

“Xiaorou!”

Suddenly, Xu Ke called out again.

At this time, the voice has been very weak, weak, but people feel exhausted.

He seemed to be wasting his last life, exhausting his last strength, just to shout that name.

Xiaorou!

This moment.

Unexpectedly, there was a sudden silence in Hecheng.

In the eyes of the public, there was more compassion than shock!

Some shook their heads and sighed, some couldn’t bear to close their eyes, some confessed, some hid haw

At the moment, they all believe that the boy may really have a deep affection for the “xiaorou” girl in his mouth!

However, why is it Yurou fairy?

Isn’t xiaocang Xiaoya Xiaotao good? Why is it xiaorou? Which one does this name represent? Are you qualified to covet At this time, Xu que no longer spurts blood, but his breath is already weak to the extreme and dying Ignorant ants! ” The Dharma protector shook his head indifferently. He felt that Xu lacked’s vitality was disappearing and seemed to be dying. He couldn’t help but snort coldly Vulnerable! ” With that, she waved her sleeve robe, and the sharp sword instantly returned to the Three Dharma protectors, and turned to go away. But at this time, Xu que suddenly got up from the ground Well? ” The big Dharma protector’s body was frozen for a moment. With her powerful divine sense, how could she not know that guy’s action. Actually… Can you get up? No, it’s impossible! It’s so bad that you have to swallow your breath. My calculation is very accurate. When I just turned around and took the first step, he just died. Why can you get up Xiaorou… “At the same time, Xu Duan stood up with his hands supporting the ground, pointed to the wound on his body, and tried to squeeze out a smile on his face:” xiaorou, look, my clothes are broken. “???” The crowd was confused in an instant. You’re dying, the wound is bleeding, but you’re concerned that your clothes are broken Xiaorou, you said you would make me new clothes. Have you forgotten? ” At this time, Xu Xu said again. The crowd was stunned again. No one will make complaints about what this time. Although they didn’t know whether there was any past between this flower and that xiaorou, they didn’t know what happened. But at the moment, looking at the flowers, many people just feel flustered. Uncomfortable New clothes… “Not far away, Yurou Fairy on the tower was also absent-minded and whispered. She felt deja vu again, but she still couldn’t remember anything, and she didn’t even have any memory clues to track Ignorant ants, don’t stop! ” At the same time, the Dharma protector shouted angrily again and rushed directly to Xu que Bang! ” This time, a solid palm suddenly fell on Xu que. Half of his arms turned into a blood mist in an instant! The body flew out again, and the breath seemed to be weak again. As usual, he began to spit blood… With a dull bang, he fell to the ground. He’s dying. It’s just a faint breath. But he’s still spitting blood The blood fog rushed into the air and slowly fell on the ground. Coincidentally, the position of this spill happened to be next to the huge red love pattern just now. The new blood mist spilled down and gathered into another new red love pattern again. Two red hearts, close together. Ah, that’s love! (*? ‘? `? *) First change!]

chapters.title: Chapter 1602
chapters.body:
Chapter 1602

Chapter 1602

C.1602

“What do these two pictures mean?”

“And two as like as two peas, closely together… I understand, this is a metaphor for him and…”

“This…”

The crowd looked and vaguely understood something.

This is no coincidence at all!

Where is coincidence that as like as two peas can be used to spray blood and spray two identical patterns?

The key is that the two patterns are close together, and the directivity is too obvious.

If we have to say that this is a coincidence, we can only say that this person and that xiaorou are a natural coincidence!

And all this, many black robed people in Tianmen didn’t see it!

No matter how stupid, I can already see that the guy is clearly teasing them!

Under the pretext of bleeding from injury, is it to draw these two patterns?

Nima, how dare you?

Several immortal Dharma protectors were even more furious!

They didn’t even see that a big Luo Jinxian was playing with them!

In particular, as a big Dharma protector who personally wanted to end Xu deficiency, it was completely unbearable at this time.

“Shameless man, I will tear you to pieces!”

She let out an angry cry.

A vast immortal yuan condensed on her, and the overwhelming momentum instantly made everyone’s scalp numb and suffocated.

“Boom!”

With the roar of the Dharma protector, the immortal yuan force, like a waterfall, ran through the void, suddenly appeared in front of Xu Ke, turned into a violent force and fell on his chest.

Xu que was hit and flew again, like a broken kite, with blood gushing from his mouth.

But this time, the blood no longer turned into a blood mist, but a blood column flew out and formed a parabola in the air.

Then, as soon as the blood “snapped” fell on the ground, it happened to be a straight line even straighter than the steel straight man.

Straight line, perfect through the two love on the ground!

Whoosh!

At the same time, under everyone’s attention, Xu Ke landed smoothly this time.

With a slight frown and a trace of dissatisfaction, he waved his fist and hammered it hard into his chest.

“Poof!” Poof! ”

In an instant, another two mouthfuls of blood gushed out and landed at the head of the straight line. In a disguised form, two strokes were added to the head of the straight line, turning the straight line into an arrow line!

“Xiaorou!”

Xu que shouted again. While appreciating his paintings, he clapped his hands with satisfaction: “come and see, I love your shape even when I am beaten and injured! But… ”

“But why are you so hard hearted that you don’t even give me a chance to meet?”

I’m NIMA!

Ouch, sleeping trough!

This operation… No, it makes my waist flash!

The blood from being beaten and injured is the shape of loving you?

What kind of broken love talk is this?

And

Aren’t you dying just now?

Why are you so angry and shouting here, and still in the mood to say something?

People suddenly realized that something was wrong.

This guy’s not hurt?

Then he has just been at a disadvantage and was beaten to spit blood. Did he pretend?

This

No, it’s absolutely impossible!

He must be trying to hide the tragedy of his being beaten by such strange behavior!

Otherwise, in the face of such a group of fairy king xianzun, how dare he do so?

If he had such strength, wouldn’t he just solve this group of people directly?

Why bother!

Or… This guy is simply humiliating those Tianmen strongmen?

“Presumptuous! You… You are presumptuous! ”

The great Dharma protector of xianzun realm is a little incoherent because of Xu’s lack of Qi at the moment!

Xu que raised his head slowly!

The metal sheet evolved into armor again!

But this time, even his head was covered by armor!

He holds the king forcing staff in his hand. His momentum is dignified and arrogant!

Slowly lift the king forcing staff in your hand and wave it towards the front!

In an instant, a hurricane blew, and the blood on the ground rose with it. In the middle of the air, an arrow pierced the heart again!

“Perfect!” Xu Xu smiled.

“You… You!” The Dharma protector choked directly at his words: “kill him! Kill him! ”

To this extent, Xu Ke is actually coming to a dead end!

There are a few immortal zuns left. He really can’t pull off their masks, otherwise he wouldn’t use this bad policy!

I thought such a romantic operation would certainly awaken xiaorou!

But the result is obviously unsatisfactory Xiaorou! Can I see you, even once! ” Xu que shouted: “even if it’s just one side, I’ll leave immediately after seeing me. Don’t disturb me any more. A gentleman’s word is irretrievable!” When they heard this, they couldn’t help looking at it! He’s so strong, one man fighting four! But why do you feel that this young man is a little pathetic at this time? Can’t a one-sided request be met? Is it so humble to lick a dog Suddenly, the surrounding wind is no longer noisy, as if in silence for Xu que. Looking at the man not far away, the feather fairy was distracted again. She has always been indifferent. At this moment, there was an impulsive idea! A thought of running to the man! He! Yurou fairy’s out of focus eyes flashed high light again and stared at the man tightly. Who the hell is he! Why do you look at him with such strong ups and downs in your Tao heart. Is he important to me At this time, Xu que has met those immortal zuns again, and the four-color fire flashing in his hand! A breath of despair spread in his hands… The immortal kings of Tianmen could not help frowning slightly! Here! This boy still has such a killing move However, the woman in white, who had been watching the battle in the city tower not far away, looked at the flame, and her heart became more and more violent. Confusion, boredom, fear… Countless negative emotions began to erode Yurou’s heart. She has the five element chaotic body. After she embarked on the road of cultivation, she did not encounter any bottlenecks and demons. Moreover, with the help of the master, she condensed a dirt free heart that did not touch worldly things. But now, why do you have these negative emotions? She desperately suppressed those negative emotions, but found that the more suppressed, the more uncomfortable she was! Xianyuanzhou’s first genius, Yurou fairy! At this moment, he curled up in the corner of the tower like a helpless little girl, shivering. She wanted to know what could affect her clean heart. Is it human? Or something? Or some strange energy At this time, Xu Ke was still shouting at the other end of the battlefield Xiaorou! I’m Xu Ke! Have you really forgotten? ” That year, we first met in Panshan village! ” That year, I took your belly pocket in the wrong hand… Let’s not mention it! ” And Pang Bao, do you remember that big fool? And tianwuzong, do you remember those hypocritical immortals? ” I said, anyone who dares to bully you, I will make him pay the price! ” Yes! It’s all my fault. If I wasn’t so conceited at that time, there would be no accident in Panshan village, and you wouldn’t… “even if you kill me, I’d like to, but can you lift the mask and let me see you!” At this moment, Xu que was crying hysterically, making his words more powerless. He can’t help but really get into the play. But the inner feelings are real and can’t be hidden. All along, his heart is full of deep guilt for xiaorou! At the moment, he wants to wake up xiaorou with memories, even to attract her to show up. But I didn’t expect the tragedy of Panshan village that year to reappear in my mind. Xiaorou died in his arms Xu que! ” At the same time, the feather soft fairy in the corner of the city tower whispered the name The second is to deliver it.

chapters.title: Chapter 1603
chapters.body:
Chapter 1603

Chapter 1603

C.1603

The feather fairy’s eyes flashed and seemed to fall into memory.

She knew she had died and was reshaped.

When I opened my eyes, I saw a group of beautiful sisters for the first time.

Sister Qiuyun, sister Qiuyun, sister linger

They were led by the shiqingxuan sister, who occasionally called her Zixia fairy. They lived in a secret place together. Later, it seemed that there was a great enemy invading. The Qingxuan sister urged an ancient array to take them to xianyuanzhou to find a force called Weiwu sect.

However, shortly after their arrival, they were summoned by the four heavenly gates to meet the four immortal emperors. One of them accepted her as her own disciple and gave her the name of Yurou fairy. Later, she kept closed and meditated hard, and gradually lost contact with those sisters.

But now, she finally recalled that during her time with her sisters, they told her a lot of her past that she had no impression of

The master once said that these past would hinder her from practicing and seeking Tao, and sealed all the past.

“Xiaorou, don’t you have any impression? Xu Wei did everything he could to revive you! ”

“Strange, why don’t you remember him.”

“He slaughtered all over the hell gate for you, and broke into tianwu sect to fight baby and become a friar with the territory of jiedan…”

“He walked through the five yuan country for you and made countless enemies, but he is still fearless. He is always flirting… No, he seems to have converged recently.”

“Hum, the boy is afraid sometimes. Can his little body support so many?”

“Mrs. ya, don’t drive. It scares little rou. She just woke up. She may not know what happened.”

“Xiaorou, don’t be afraid. In the future, we are all a family. Xu Ke asked us to take good care of you.”

Boom!

Recalling this, the feather fairy’s mind was like a roar.

Her eyes recovered their clarity and calmness, and she looked at the figure in the battlefield in an instant.

Xu Ke!

I see. He is Xu Ke mentioned many times by several sisters.

The man who once ran around for me, made countless enemies, and finally helped me reshape my flesh.

But… How can these memories affect my heart?

The master sealed up these memories, which seemed to make a mountain out of a molehill.

The feather fairy looked thoughtful and puzzled.

Now even if she recalls the short time memory in the past, she doesn’t feel the influence of Tao heart.

The only man who really makes his heart rise and fall is the man named Xu Ke.

No, master, you shouldn’t do that!

If you want to be really strong, you should not escape, but face it.

They all say that I reshape my body and lose my soul, so I lose my past memory.

The master said it was a good thing.

No dirt, no dust, no past, but forget your feelings. Only one heart to seek the Tao can get the Tao.

But… I don’t think so.

Thinking of this, the feather fairy has restored her former calm and stood up slowly.

She wants to replenish the spirit, recall all the past, and face all the past.

This is the real way to seek the Tao, and even preach the Tao!

Blindly avoiding can not achieve a strong Tao heart.

Therefore, even if the master did not allow it, she still wanted to do it.

The key to all this is the man named Xu Ke.

“I should show up and talk to him. Maybe this person can help me find the lost soul. After all, he reshaped my flesh, but…” fairy Yurou whispered to herself.

But now she is only a small separation. The noumenon has long been closed again and walks in xianyuanzhou with separation. In order not to be disturbed by the complexity of the secular world, the noumenon also cuts off the communication with the divine consciousness of the separation.

This means that the noumenon does not know the past he recalls, including everything he understands.

Unless you wait for the body to pass, or

Wake her up!

The separation of the feather fairy is no different from the noumenon.

She is her and has the right to make all choices.

Now, she decided to wake up the closed ontology and synchronize all this with the ontology.

Whew!

The feather soft fairy immediately waved her hand, and a talisman appeared between her fingers. The talisman was engraved with dense talisman marks, emitting a faint light, but it looked brilliant.

She urged Xian Yuanli to sacrifice this talisman to awaken the noumenon.

“Pa!”

Suddenly, an inexplicable force suddenly appeared from the talisman, erasing all the talisman marks on the talisman.

The whole talisman turned into ashes and annihilated on the spot.

“Yurou!” At the same time, a majestic voice sounded in her mind. Feather soft fairy could not help but be surprised: “master, you…” she was a little stunned. She didn’t think of her master. She hid a wisp of divine consciousness in this talisman Yurou, your body is now at the key of breakthrough. Why are you so anxious to wake it up? ” At this time, a golden awn appeared in the rune and turned into a virtual shadow. It was a woman in a golden robe. She was elegant and shining, but her face was always invisible. It was vague, like a mirror, like a water moon, like truth and fantasy Master, there are some changes in Hecheng. I want noumenon to deal with them. ” The feather fairy looked calm and whispered Really? ” Yes! ” Yurou, you know that being a teacher doesn’t like others to lie, especially you. ” A deep voice came out of the empty shadow of the golden robed woman, with a more serious tone. The feather fairy sighed in her heart. It seems that the master already knows everything. She raised her head and looked at the empty shadow of the golden robed woman: “master, after the period when you helped me ban, now I have recalled that I think the really powerful Taoist heart should…” stop. ” The empty shadow of the golden robed woman shouted in a deep voice, with a trace of anger. The feather soft fairy was stunned. Is this still the master in your mind? Why so irritable Yurou, it’s very important for you to cultivate into the imperial realm as soon as possible. You must maintain a clean heart and don’t have any thoughts about looking for past memories, so you’re separated… “Before you finish, Xu Ying suddenly raised his hand and moved forward a little. A golden light came out in an instant and swept into the eyebrows of the feather soft fairy. The split body of the feather fairy burst in an instant and was covered with dense cracks Master, why are you She looked surprised and unbelievable. For the first time in so many years, I feel that this master is so strange, so cold and merciless. In order not to let the noumenon know everything, it directly destroys itself! Whoosh! A gust of breeze blew, and the body of the feather fairy disintegrated. There was a look of consternation on her face, which slowly turned into dust and dissipated in the wind between heaven and earth I’ve worked hard for many years as a teacher. How can you understand? Pursue a strong Tao heart? Joke… “The empty shadow of the golden robed woman was indifferent. Looking at the separation of fairy Yurou, a faint cold laughter came out. The virtual shadow turned slowly, and his eyes fell on Xu Que in the battlefield. The gurgling killing intention slowly spread. Unfortunately, this is just a small wisp of her mind. She has exhausted her strength to destroy Yurou’s separation. At the moment, even if she wants to kill Xu Wei by hand, she is powerless. Finally, she turned into a golden awn again and slowly faded out okay? This is… “At the same time, Xu Que in the battlefield seemed to feel something, and his eyes suddenly swept the position of the rear city building. When the feather fairy’s separation dissipated, it revealed a wisp of breath again, which disappeared in a flash. But this time, Xu que caught it and identified the direction. It was the tower of Hecheng in the rear It turned out that Xiao Rou was hiding there, not among these people in black robes. ” Xu Ke’s eyes brightened and a smile appeared on his face Far away, in the gate of heaven. A group of immortals knelt down in front of a gold robed woman with a vague figure Wudu domain! Qingzhou! Kill Xu que! ” The woman’s meaning was simply horrified, but her voice was like God’s will, deeply imprinted in the minds of everyone present and indelible. This is an imperial order, which cannot be disobeyed or erased Yes! ” Without any hesitation, many immortals kowtowed to the ground and responded in unison First watch, fourth watch tonight! Come on, give me the ticket!]

chapters.title: Chapter 1604
chapters.body:
Chapter 1604

Chapter 1604

C.1604

“Xiaorou!”

On the battlefield, Xu que shouted in the direction of Jinghe city.

He was sure that it was definitely xiaorou’s breath. Although it flashed away, it was accompanied by a wave of emptiness. It was likely that she left!

But it may also be other changes. In fact, it did not leave.

So this wave still has a play!

Whoosh!

He shook his body and turned into a virtual shadow. He directly shook off the immortal kings behind him and rushed to the city tower of unexpectedly Hecheng!

“Xiaorou, I know you’re right here. Come out and see me, will you?”

“Xiaorou, I just want to meet you. Why don’t you even agree to this little request?”

“How I want to meet you and see your recent changes. I don’t talk about the past anymore. I just greet you. I just say a word to you…”

“Long time no see!”

The low and sad song echoed in all directions, full of vicissitudes and helplessness, but it makes people feel affectionate.

Many people are moved by it.

This guy is so affectionate. Maybe that xiaorou… Even if it’s really Yurou fairy, what can I do if I come out to see him now?

No matter what happened in the past, people begged so much that they sang even songs. How can they be cruel and refuse to give them a chance to see each other?

Moreover, people sing in their songs. They just meet and see if there has been any change recently. They don’t talk about the past. They just greet each other, and then say that they have not seen each other for a long time.

Why not grant him such a simple, small and humble wish?

Unexpectedly, all the people in Hecheng couldn’t help standing here.

When they saw Xu que plundering towards Jinghe city all the way, as soon as the song fell, they secretly took out a black stick from their crotch. They immediately stared straight and twitched fiercely at the corners of their mouths.

Promise a fart!

Fairy Yurou, don’t come out!

I knew there must be no good idea about this product.

Don’t think we don’t know that this black stick can knock people unconscious.

Before knocking out Yongxing fairy king, now you still want to knock out Yurou fairy?

Is this what people can do?

What a dog!

“Presumptuous, don’t disturb fairy Yurou!”

At this time, a group of strong Tianmen black robes in the rear chased up one after another.

Xu que pulled the speed to the extreme and ignored the strong Immortal King and immortal statue who pursued behind him. All the Dharma formulas behind him bombarded him and were avoided.

If you can’t avoid it, you’ll get hurt. The system’s automatic recovery function is directly opened to the limit.

However, when he spared the whole crane city!

But I didn’t feel any smell of xiaorou anymore. Only when I was close to the city tower, there was a faint smell left.

Xu que fell on the tower and was stunned. He couldn’t help but feel a sense of loss in his eyes.

Xiaorou left.

She really left and refused to see one side?

Have you forgotten me so thoroughly?

He stood where he was and couldn’t help smiling on his face. He just looked bitter and lonely.

“Kill!”

At the same time, many powerful immortal kings and immortals who came after them immediately launched killing moves.

This guy is distracted now. It’s a good chance to make a move.

They don’t believe it. This guy Xu Kui can really resist so many heavy attacks!

People, there should always be a limit.

Boom!

All kinds of Dharma formulas or mysteries permeate the sky in an instant.

There is only one goal!

Xu Ke!

Unexpectedly, he city was in a mess, and many monks who were watching were scared to flee!

What happened to the battlefield outside the city just now?

This will hit the city, and there are so many xianzun levels to participate in the fight. How terrible is the destructive power?

Even if one is careless and the killing moves are a little crooked, they can kill them in an instant!

However, at this time, Xu que had stopped in place and remained motionless.

Facing the dense killing moves behind him, he sighed slowly.

“Really, when I’m easy to bully?”

“Xiaorou is not here, and there is no xiaorou among you. How dare you come?”

“Just want to die, don’t you?”

“OK, come on, come on…”

Xu que whispered, then a touch of madness began to appear in his eyes, and the smile on his face gradually became strange.

“Righteousness! Seal the magic Sutra! ”

He burst into a violent drink.

Boom!

A powerful momentum broke out all over and rose into the sky.

chapters.title: Chapter 1605
chapters.body:
Chapter 1605

Chapter 1605

C.1605

“This… How is this possible?”

“How could he have such strength!”

“That! That’s a fairy King’s peak! ”

“It seems… Easier than killing each other?”

“It’s terrible. How much strength does this guy hide?”

Countless people in the audience were shocked and unbelievable.

Many strong people in Tianmen are also shocked.

This guy was so strong before, but he actually hid his strength. Now is his real strength?

Weird, scary, is this really Da Luo Jinxian?

This is definitely not a normal person!

“Forced King fist!”

Boom!

At the same time, Xu que roared and made another move.

The void became distorted in an instant, and a vast golden fist shadow appeared and condensed in the mid air, and suddenly hit the pile of fairy kings and strong ones.

“No, get out!”

As soon as the big Dharma protector’s face changed, he immediately shouted to the fairy kings.

As immortals, they have unfathomable strength and are not afraid of this fist.

But she obviously felt that such a punch full of majestic rhyme could not be taken by those fairy kings.

However, no matter how fast she reacted, she didn’t even have time to use the magic formula to protect the fairy kings.

Bang! Bang! Bang!

Before the golden fist shadow arrived, the Immortal King and strong man exploded in mid air one after another.

The sound went on and on.

Unknowingly, I thought it was setting off firecrackers!

In just ten breath time, ten fairy kings died in Xu Wei’s hands!

This sudden terrorist killing caught everyone present by surprise.

There was a dead silence.

At the same time, Xu que exchanged a bottle of Wahaha from the system mall and poured it into his mouth.

The heroic action makes people want to praise their good drinking capacity.

He raised his hand to wipe the milk stains on his mouth, as if he were drunk and laughed wildly.

“Kill one person in ten steps, and don’t stay for thousands of miles!”

A clear and shocking voice resounded through the surrounding area.

Everyone was stunned!

Kill one person in ten steps? A thousand miles away?

eldest brother! You just killed ten people in ten steps!

And it’s the peak of ten fairy kings!

When the Dharma protector saw this scene, he was furious and his eyes were about to crack!

Ten fairy kings were killed like this?

“Kill! Kill him! ”

She gave a shrill cry and almost lost her mind.

“It’s so noisy. Just know that the blind chicken is shouting. You can come up and move yourself!” Xu que took the time to turn back and scold, and then continued to catch the remaining fairy kings.

“You…” the great Dharma protector almost took a breath of old blood gas and was almost spiraled into the sky.

Isn’t this seat just going to come up and do it yourself now? But don’t run!

She doesn’t want to speak any more. She keeps using killing moves and continues to kill Xu que!

However, no matter how she chased, including the encirclement and killing with several other xianzun strongmen, Xu lacked skillfully avoided and broke through.

The king forcing fist with terrible momentum and majestic Taoist rhyme came out one after another like endless consumption.

In an instant, the only few fairy kings could not escape death under the protection of the strong immortal, and they all died miserably in the air.

Xu Qian finished the harvest and stopped his body immediately.

He could clearly feel that he was about to lose his support.

Zheng Qi Feng Mo Jing is very powerful. Even the weakened version can’t be compared with any other Dharma formula.

However, this thing extremely consumes immortal yuan power and divine soul power. Even if the system automatically restores the function to make up for it at any time, it can’t make ends meet.

If you continue to entangle with these immortal giants, maybe in a few years, er Gouzi will contact Duan Jiude and come to dig his own grave!

Therefore, make a quick decision. If you can kill one more, you have to find a chance to slip away even if you can’t.

Whoosh!

Xu’s eyes suddenly swept to the great Dharma protector.

Just now, it was the most fun!

And if the old woman hadn’t wasted her time here, she might have seen xiaorou long ago!

I don’t know how big the Dharma protector is, but you’re dead.

At the same time, the Dharma protector’s eyes were right on Xu Duan, and his body shook inexplicably.

She felt a huge killing intention, which directly affected her Taoist heart.

How is this possible?

Just a big Luo Jinxian, where can such terrible hostility come from?

Isn’t it used to be an embryo killer?

“Great Dharma protector, be careful!”

The Dharma protector suddenly regained his consciousness, but he was a little confused.

Xu Kuangming is right in front of him, staring at himself. Why be careful?

Wait, this

“No!”

The Dharma protector suddenly changed his face and suddenly turned around.

She noticed that there was a faint smell behind her, which was clearly Xu Duan.

In other words, just looking at yourself is just a separate body, in order to attract your attention and want to sneak from behind!

“Hum, what a treacherous trick, but what? In front of real strength, everything… ”

The Dharma protector turned and looked at the sudden appearance of Xu Ke and sneered.

However, before he finished speaking, he only heard a dull sound of “Dong”.

The big Dharma protector was in a whirl in front of him. Then it seemed as if it was dark and he closed his eyes!

At this time, Xu Weicai, who had just looked at her, walked out of her back with a small black stick in his hand and said with a smile: “what is everything in front of real strength? You say it, you say it? Aren’t you very talkative? ”

Xu que said this while kicking the Dharma protector.

The poor Dharma protector was unconscious and unresponsive.

“Stop!” Several other xianzun strong men rushed over one after another to try to rescue!

Suddenly, several wisps of flame burst out of Xu Que’s hand, and the restless energy stunned several people at the same time.

“Want to save people? Come on, come and die if you dare. ”

Xu que looked at them with a smile.

Several xianzun strong men unexpectedly stopped their pace at the same time.

At this moment, they no longer dare to underestimate this man.

It’s horrible!

You can kill the Immortal King with one stick and knock out the great Dharma protector of the immortal territory.

You know, the great Dharma protector’s strength is far above them, but in the face of this guy, he was knocked unconscious by a stick.

And the flame

The eyes and pupils of several immortal giants couldn’t help shrinking.

Xu que unexpectedly calls out a separate body and is helping him rub the flames in his palm into balls

No, it’s a lotus!

A charming six color fire lotus, blooming with bright light, was born in his hands!

“From now on, you should all remember my name. I’m… Xu Ke of fried heaven Gang!”

Xu Xu re introduced himself and told his real name.

The enchanting fire lotus in his hand became more and more manic.

In the mad devil state, with the bonus of murder book, the six color fire lotus has become very strange. Even Xu que is difficult to estimate its power.

However, if this blow continues, he believes that even the immortal realm will die!

Unfortunately, I can only come once. I’m in a bad state. It’s almost drained.

“When things are over, brush your clothes and hide your skills and fame! Good bye, Tianmen! I’ll play suona at your place next time! ” At the same time, he threw out the last sentence of the comatose to Xu falian.

“No!”

“Stop!”

Several Tianmen immortal strong men suddenly reacted and exclaimed.

Boom!

The fire lotus fell on the Dharma protector without hindrance, shivered and bloomed petals.

Flame, blast!

Just like a manic flame dragon, it opened the huge mouth of the abyss and swallowed everything. The flame instantly filled the four directions and rose into the sky, forming a huge mushroom cloud.

The breath of the great Dharma protector dissipated between heaven and earth in an instant.

And Xu’s figure, accompanied by a wave of emptiness, faded and disappeared in front of everyone with a smile!

Unexpectedly, there was only a sea of fire in Hecheng and the blood stains left by the fairy kings.

Several Tianmen immortals and strong men looked at this scene blankly, looking distracted and unbelievable.

Just big Luo Jinxian!

With one’s own strength, he killed dozens of fairy kings first, and then directly blew up the most powerful fairy Dharma protector in front of them!

Finally, leave unharmed!

Fried sky Gang Xu Ke is so terrible!

All the monks who escaped from Jinghe City stood in the same place.

When things are over, brush your clothes and hide your skills and fame?

Before he left, this guy clearly made a special self introduction. Can he still hide his merit and reputation?

I’m afraid that after today, the name of fried heaven Gang Xu Ke will gradually become famous in xianyuanzhou!

And before he left, he clearly said that he would go to Tianmen to play suona!

That means a lot!

This means that his affair with Tianmen is not over.

It was Tianmen who suffered heavy casualties. This should have been said by Tianmen, but he took the initiative to say it.

Fried heaven Gang!

The man said that there were countless more daring and powerful talents than him.

How scary would it be if this group of people appeared together?

No, I can’t think about it anymore. It’s terrible. You’ll have nightmares Third watch!]

Chapter 1606

Chapter 1606

C.1606

“Hoo!”

Tens of thousands of miles away from Hecheng.

A cave was carved out of a mountain forest.

After dropping several arrays, Xu Ke quickly sat on the ground, took a deep breath and began to recover.

Although the Zhengqi seal magic Sutra has been a weakened version, it has been in this state for a long time and is a little difficult to carry.

In particular, he finally gathered the six color fire lotus and attracted several fairy symbols to escape. It was completely overloaded and his body was almost hollowed out. At this moment, even if xiaorou appeared in front of him, he didn’t even have the strength to take off his pants.

“System, your automatic recovery function should evolve. It’s too slow for me!”

Xu Que recovered the wounds while he was able to make complaints about the system.

The system didn’t want to talk to him and didn’t even give a response.

“System, you have changed. You will patiently explain what I said before. Are you tired of being together for a long time now? Tired? Itchy? Want to cheat? ”

“Ding, host…”

“Don’t explain, I won’t listen, I won’t listen!”

Xu Wei directly interrupted the response of the system and cheaply switched the system interface to the personal information bar.

Nowadays, it is more and more difficult to upgrade this realm. The amount of experience required is extremely huge. There are billions of intermediate experience, which is comparable to countless shuangs!

However, when he came out of the memory world with the full version of Zhengqi seal magic Sutra, he killed a large number of immortal kings and powerful ones.

But the dog system is not human and has no settlement experience.

On the contrary, it is the later killing of the mutual inquiry and the strong of Tianmen. The experience is neat.

“System, what were my experiences after I came out of the memory world? There are so many immortal kings and immortals. You have to make up some experience and give it back to me? Don’t let me not mention it. You just take it as if it’s nothing. ”

“Ding, because the system was dormant and did not collect relevant data, some data was lost and the system could not recover.” The system responded very quickly this time, as if it was ready for Xu Xu to ask at any time.

“Data loss?”

After hearing this, Xu que was not sleepy at once. He said excitedly, “I’m good at it. Just ask me, and you helped me recover my memory. I tell you, at that time, my hands started and fell, my hands started and fell, and my hands started and fell again. At least millions of immortal statues… Cough, hundreds of thousands of immortal statues and tens of millions of immortal kings died in my hands.”

“Really, I didn’t lie to you. If you don’t believe it, you can watch the playback, count the number of people, and then send me experience.”

“Ding, through the judgment of the credit investigation system, it is detected that the host’s credit is very poor, and the system firmly sits at the top of the dishonesty list. The system refuses to accept any data provided by the host description.”

“You… You talk nonsense, you mess around and pretend to be a compulsive person. How can you describe it as dishonesty? It’s all designed to pretend to force people to deliberately concave out. I thought you knew me very well and could understand my heart. I didn’t expect that we were just a transaction. ”

The system chooses silence again.

Xu Wei finally chose to give up. He was also aware of the operation of the system. It must be impossible to get back that batch of experience.

However, the trip to Hecheng has gained a lot of experience.

Now it’s not far from fairyland.

Careful calculation, it is almost 100 million intermediate experience value!

“Who is the power of the fried heaven Gang?”

“Where did this sudden force come from?”

“It’s terrible. I feel that soon, Qingzhou will be turned upside down by them!”

“Qingzhou? No, that flower is perfect. He went to other cities to make trouble so soon? ” A man of three sects who had just escaped from Jinghe City heard that the people in the city were talking and talking, and he couldn’t help but be frightened.

“No shortage of flowers? I haven’t heard of anything. We’re talking about the king of Wuwei and Duan Jiude! ”

“Didn’t you just talk about the sky bombing Gang? How… ”

“It’s King Wei Wu and Duan Jiude of the fried heaven gang. Half a month ago, they planed the ancestral grave of the owner of hailincheng city. It’s really gratifying!”

“Ten days ago, I seemed to have wandered around the Wudu branch of Tianmen. I heard that they also took a lot of immortal tools.”

The three disciples were shocked when they heard this.

Good guy, what the flowers say is true?

The rest of the bombers are bolder and more troublesome than him?

“Tao you!” At this time, someone patted the three disciples on the shoulder and said curiously, “the flowers you just mentioned are perfect. Is it also the person of the fried heaven sect?”

“Yes!”

The three disciples nodded immediately.

Now it has been far away from Jinghe City, and has quit three cases. There is no need to worry about speaking.

He immediately shook out everything Xu lacked had done in Jinghe city.

Moreover, it was also mentioned that there was a Hua wuvacancy, whose real name was Qiao Feng and Xu vacancy. He guessed that huawuduan might be a code name. After listening to what he said, everyone was dumbfounded. It can’t be true? No big Luo Jinxian can really be so strong, right? Kill Immortal King, kill immortal Zun? And against Tianmen? Both the leader of Hailin City and the three clans of Jinghe city are the forces under Tianmen, which is referred to as the running dog of Tianmen for short. At the front foot, two bombers of the tianbang Gang just came out to fight against the city master of Hailin City. Now another bomber, Xu que, came out to kill the people of the three sects first and then the strong ones of Tianmen. Is there a deep blood feud between the Tianmen sect and the Tianmen sect Taoist friend, you’re not lying to us, are you? I don’t think your words are credible. How can a great Luo Jinxian be so powerful? ” It was questioned What I said is absolutely true. If you don’t believe it, wait. Unexpectedly, there will be news from Hecheng soon. ” The three disciples vowed: “I witnessed with my own eyes that Xu que easily killed dozens of fairy kings under the siege of many Tianmen strongmen, and then killed a fairy strongman directly under the joint siege of four immortals, and finally left unharmed!” When they heard this, they couldn’t help but doubt it. After all, this man has a point. If it is true, the news will spread soon. He doesn’t need to make up false things here That’s it? ” Suddenly, an old man nearby gave a strange cold hum, shook his head and said, “this Xu lack is just like this.” oh Why did you say that, elder? ” The three disciples were stunned, arched their hands and asked. The old man stroked his beard unfathomably and said with a light smile: “you don’t know. The elder Duan Jiude is our model. You know, he can kill seven in and seven out in Hailin City with a dog!” Elder, you can’t say that. Is Duan Jiude carrying an ordinary dog? That’s King Weiwu. I’ve heard that he has such a record only by relying on that dog! ” Hearing this, the old man frowned! fuck! Old man, I rely on two dogs to have such a record? Shit, it must be two dogs spreading around outside. It’s shameless Nonsense. What do you know? ” The old man immediately stood up and shouted: “ladies and gentlemen, I was on the scene at that time, witnessed the war with my own eyes, and heard me talk to you carefully…” [the fourth watch was delivered. “As soon as master Duan Jiude appeared, before he spoke, he made countless people want to kneel down and worship. He was heroic and graceful, leading the dog on the left, holding the lack on the right, and wearing a brocade hat and mink fur…”

In the inn, the old man’s mouth foamed and talked wildly.

Finally, in the exclamation of all the people, the old man turned his back and left with satisfaction.

No one cared where the old man went. Everyone’s concerns were completely attracted by the bombers. They talked and talked.

After walking around several alleys, the old man walked out of the seaside city, and then his figure gradually faded and disappeared.

A moment later, he appeared in a hill forest.

Although the concealment here is not high, it is better to extend in all directions and can run away at any time.

“How about teacher Duan? Is there anyone singing the name of God in Hailin City? ” Suddenly, a big dog jumped out and stood in front of the old man!

“Sleeping trough, two dogs, are you dead? You should be glad that I stopped in time, or you are a dead dog now. ” The old man was startled and shouted abuse.

At the same time, he lifted off the human skin mask on his face and said, “hailincheng can’t go back for the time being.”

“Why? Why is that? Isn’t it just digging his ancestral grave? It’s so stingy! ”

After being shocked, er Gouzi was very angry and said, “if Xu Kuang was here, would they dare to be so arrogant?”

He has begun to Miss Xu’s absence.

When they came out of the void passage of Tianzhou, they fell directly on the hailincheng!

Although Er Gouzi is a bit of a dog, no matter how he treats a dog, he is also a noble dog!

When the leader of Hailin City was on a parade, his eyes were as sharp as a torch. He was so excited that he threatened Duan Jiude to hand over the pet

The results are obvious.

While Duan Jiude was thinking about what price to open, two dogs jumped up angrily. One dog kicked the Lord of Hailin City’s knee, tore off a piece of leg meat, threw it into Duan Jiude’s hand, and then turned around and ran away.

Duan Jiude was almost scared to pee at that time. He hurriedly threw away his leg meat, but accidentally threw it into a family’s pigsty.

This increasingly stimulates the Lord of Hailin City.

The mighty Immortal King, who has ever suffered such humiliation?

Unfortunately, no matter how he chased after him, Leng lost the man and dog.

Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude later felt more and more angry. After boasting about each other, the two goods went to the city Lord’s ancestral grave hand in hand.

As a result, I happened to meet people from Tianmen to work in hailincheng. The city master of hailincheng also belongs to Tianmen. After a complaint, the people from Tianmen also gave a face-saving order to hunt down Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude.

Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude felt bad, so they chose to hide.

But it’s not the way to hide all the time, so Duan Jiude went into the city. He wanted to find out how many strong people in Tianmen wanted to chase them, but unexpectedly he got the news of Xu vacancy.

At the moment, hearing the mention of Er Gouzi, Duan Jiude said faintly, “that boy really came.”

“What? Xu Xu’s little… My brother is here too? Where is it? Let him come and meet the God! ” Two dogs immediately excited way.

“Oh, ignorance, do you think if that boy really comes, will he clean up others first or you first?” Duan Jiude touched his beard, shook his head and smiled.

“What do you mean?” Two dogs were stunned.

“Grass, have you forgotten? If it hadn’t been for you, old man, I would have rushed up to help him deal with those fairy kings, but you ran away ahead of time and took me with you. This account… ”

“Lying trough, Duan Jiude, can you order Bilian? Ben shenzun just went to call people and was accidentally sucked in. On the contrary, you dare to secretly put a talisman on Ben shenzun? ”

“Oh, old man, I had expected you to run, so the next talisman is on you. When you run, I’ll catch you and come back to ask for guilt. I didn’t expect you to be so cunning that you came directly to xianyuanzhou, which especially bothered the old man!”

“Shit, you say, you say that God’s foot is dry and breaks your knee. Believe it or not?”

“I’m NIMA, come on, you think I’m afraid of you?”

“You say that.”

“Come on!”

“Say it first. If you say this, God will do you!”

“You come first. If you dare to come, old man, I dare say!”

“You first!”

“You first!”

A man and a dog had a crazy quarrel. They were very excited and looked at the top.

Seeing that there was going to be a big battle about changing the color of the wind and cloud, I was stunned. I quarreled for a long time and didn’t mean to start at all.

It’s BB, it’s fun!

“All right, stop arguing. The key to the problem now is how to meet Xu Xu and deceive him not to fight us.” Duan Jiude ended the quarrel First of all… Oh, didn’t Ben shenzun just say that. Spread the news and let him meet Ben shenzun. I’m sure he won’t do anything to make friends with him. ” The two dogs smiled softly Are you sure? ” Duan Jiude’s eyes narrowed. Er Gouzi hesitated and thought about it. The picture of Xu missing patting his brain again and again flashed in his mind. That really hurts Forget it, I’m not sure. ” Two dogs shook their heads reluctantly, “what can you do?” In my opinion, the old man, or we won’t let him come to see us. Will we be more sincere if we take the initiative to find him? ” Oh? ” Two big eyes of Er Gouzi suddenly lit up: “that’s reasonable!” But as soon as the voice fell, his eyes looked at the direction of hailincheng and said, “but there is still a prohibition in the old grave that has not been broken. There must be a treasure in it. If you leave here… Are you willing to?” Unwilling. ” Duan Jiude sighed So we still have to find a way to get the boy over, or we’ll be watched by others and dig first as soon as we leave. ” Er Gouzi looked worried. Duan Jiude almost wanted to give it a fist after listening to it. There are great forces behind the city Lord of Hailin City. Who dares to dig the tomb of his ancestors? Yes, only extraordinary people like me dare Eh, Mr. Duan, Ben shenzun thought of a great idea. ” At this time, er Gouzi said excitedly. Duan Jiude was also excited: “great, tell me, old man, I can rule it out.” Row you a chicken row. ” The second dog scolded, “don’t you have a portrait of your master Zixia fairy? The God has a way to extract a wisp of her breath from the portrait and forge her voice breath to make a note… “En?” Duan jiudeton was shocked: “teacher Ergou, when did you realize it?” Shit, Ben shenzun… “Ah, ah, er Gou teacher is really smart. This is a clever plan, old man. I think it’s OK.” Seeing that two dogs are about to spit, Duan Jiude is busy and cheap, smiling and playing around. After all, he can’t fake like two dogs You know! ” The two dogs immediately roared with arrogance and full of expectation: “when brother Duan comes, the small prohibition will be like a small film, which will break at the touch of one touch!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1608
chapters.body:
Chapter 1608

Chapter 1608

C.1608

It’s getting brighter!

After a night’s recuperation, Xu que has recovered to his peak. He left the cave in high spirits and sped forward all the way.

His goal now is very clear. Since xiaorou belongs to the Tianmen force, he will specially inquire about the Tianmen news.

After all, I just came to xianyuanzhou this time. I have almost no other information except some knowledge of jinghecheng.

However, Tianmen seems very unusual.

According to the description of Zixia fairy in those years, xiaorou was recruited as a disciple by an Immortal Emperor, which is enough to prove that Tianmen is a strong person with immortal empire!

Immortal Emperor!

What level is that?

Even Tianzhou hasn’t had an Immortal Emperor for so many years. It can be imagined how difficult the realm of Immortal Emperor is.

If you can reach that realm, it must be a terrible and powerful existence, which can not be underestimated.

Therefore, we must be careful this time, so that the Immortal Emperor won’t talk about martial virtue and do it himself, which will be a big trouble.

Moreover, Jiang Hongyan has not heard from them so far. When asking for Tianmen news, they can also ask whether they have heard from them.

Xu que wanted to come here and stopped immediately.

He immediately exchanged a fairy disguised puppet from the system mall, changed himself, turned into another face, and his breath changed completely.

He put on a clean light blue coat, rolled up his hair and inserted a hairpin at will.

With a slender cigarette in his mouth and two round immortal crystals in one hand, his eyebrows are three-thirds uninhibited, three-thirds debauchery and four-quarters coquettish.

A wandering Ranger image came.

He galloped all the way until the city began to appear in front of him. He was about to stop and explore a wave with divine knowledge.

Whoosh!

Suddenly, several purple lights and shadows swept over the sky and spread in all directions.

“Our fried heaven sect master Qing Xuan came to avenge his beloved disciple Jiude. If you don’t kneel down and surrender, don’t blame us…”

The sound drifted away with the purple light and shadow.

Xu Wei stopped in place and twitched at the corners of his mouth.

Zixia fairy teacher Qingxuan?

How could my xuan’er speak in this tone?

Shit, this is a despicable means of counterfeiting. You can see that it was caused by two goods, er Gouzi and Duan Jiude!

But Shi Qingxuan is just the level of fairyland. They pretend to be her voice to frighten people in a city?

“No!”

Xu Wei thought carefully and immediately guessed the intentions of Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude.

Nima made so much noise that she clearly came for herself.

These two goods want to use this wave to send messages to themselves and ask for support.

“It seems that the news of Hecheng spread very quickly. These two goods must have received the wind, and most of them have caused great events. Otherwise, it is impossible to ask for help in this way.”

Xu Duan raised his mouth slightly.

This is because I’m afraid I won’t help, so I deliberately discredit Shi Qingxuan and pull hatred, so that I have to come out to solve those potential enemies?

Oh, innocence!

I Xu Ke acted wildly and unruly all my life. I never cared about children and women. How could I provoke these unnecessary things for the sake of a woman?

Xiaoer dog and xiaojiude, you are wrong… Shit.

I’m going to kill you two bastards!

Can’t you learn from me if you make trouble all day? Be a low-key, modest, mature and serious person?

Xu que rushed directly to the seaside city with anger.

His arrival did not attract anyone’s attention.

Xu Xu also knew that he was disguised as such and could not be seen. He swaggered directly into the city gate.

He even knew there was no need to inquire about anything.

With the style of those two goods, there is no need to inquire at all. As long as they enter the city, those gossip people can publicize them for them.

Sure enough, Xu Qian passed a tea shop near the street. Before he sat down, there was a voice of discussion.

After a little listening, Xu que sneered again and again.

If you guessed right, those two second goods are in trouble.

Planed the ancestral grave of the Lord of Hailin City?

Good guy, what hatred is this? Is it so cruel?

I don’t know who I learned from. It’s too bad.

Xu que shook his head again and again, occasionally joined those commentators, strongly criticized and seriously protested against the bad behavior of Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude.

But soon, Xu Ke felt wrong.

In the style of those two guys, they stole a big tomb and must have slipped away. How can they squat in this place and ask for help?

Something’s wrong, something must be wrong!

The two goods either couldn’t get hold of the tomb or were trapped inside.

And the tomb that can make both goods difficult, maybe there are really some big treasures in it Well, if I don’t know about it, it’s enough. Now that I know it, I have the obligation to stand up and stop all this. In order not to let the treasures in the tomb fall into the hands of those two despicable guys, I have to go to rescue excavation! ” Xu que wiped the saliva accidentally flowing out of the corner of his mouth. Zhengqi lingran turned around and his eyes swept away. In order not to attract the thief’s attention, we must not expose traces or contact the two evil thieves during this trip. Can’t you swallow it alone? Bah, no, I went to save the treasures in the tomb. Soon, Xu que came to the tomb. After sneaking around for a few times, I can roughly understand the external structure of the mausoleum. It’s really a big tomb. This Feng Shui pattern looks not simple. No wonder future generations can become city masters! However, at this time, the guard outside the tomb was strict, and Xu que did not act rashly. He has been wandering around without exposing his breath and trace. Until nightfall, I changed into a night clothes. Although it is of no use to immortals, the Jianghu rules still say that if you act at night, you have to wear night clothes. Professional matters must speak of professionalism! Soon, Xu que called out the system and easily found a place suitable for digging the tomb cave. He felt it with a light and familiar way. However, after two rounds inside, Xu que found that there was nothing special at all, and… Empty? Is this a small tomb? This wave was cheated? Isn’t it a fake tomb? Xu que frowned and hurriedly turned to leave. Suddenly, my mind flashed Madder! I almost let two dogs fool me! ” He suddenly snorted and quickly swept into the depths of the mausoleum. After careful exploration, he really found that there were two forbidden arrays in place! This familiar breath and familiar array pattern are definitely Er Gouzi’s handwriting Play with me, it’s far from it! ” Xu que sneered and waved his hand to break the two prohibitions easily. At this time, a real forbidden array was revealed. Each pattern in the forbidden array exudes a powerful breath and glitters. Good guy, such a battle seems to be a big tomb Oh! ” At the same time, two dogs wandering outside the city suddenly screamed What are you yelling at? Ten thousand old dogs have no spring! ” Shit, the two prohibitions arranged by Ben shenzun have been cracked, and they are broken in seconds. If Ben shenzun hadn’t been vigilant, he would have hardly noticed it! ” Two dogs scolded. Duan Jiude was stunned: “is that boy coming?” It’s definitely him. No one except him can be so familiar with the prohibition of God. ” The second dog son said, quickly rushed to the city and scolded: “this boy is not kind. He wants to eat alone. We have to hurry up, otherwise he can’t even eat hot shit!” Grass, two dog teacher, can you use words more politely

C.1609

At night.

meanwhile.

“Cao, you two old Yin compare, playing with the indiscriminate means of poisoning? Do you want to be shameless? ”

Xu que immediately shouted abuse, but did not avoid it.

With his current physical strength of the holy body, he is not afraid of poison powder at all. The key is that he has a constitution that is inviolable to all poisons long before he achieves the holy body.

“Hahaha, boy, even if I arrived early, you would ambush. After all, it’s too young… Alas!” Duan Jiude’s arrogant laughter just came from another corner, and soon turned into a scream.

Xu Kuan smiled and saw that on the ground of the Dharma array just arranged, a head suddenly appeared, which was Duan Jiude.

“Brother Kuang, there’s something to discuss. Let me go first. I can explain this to the old man.” Duan Jiude immediately licked a smiling face and said very dogleg.

Xu que narrowed his eyes slightly and said with a smile: “Lao Duan, if I were you, I would not move. There are hundreds of trapped killing arrays in this array. If you try to crack it, the trapped killing array will be started and strangle all targets. If you want to step back, the poison in the array will flow into the pit. ”

“Grass, you shouldn’t be a man. At that time, the old man didn’t run first in Tianzhou. It was the counsellor of Er Gouzi who ran first, implicating the old man. I was taken away. You saw it with your own eyes.” Duan Jiude scolded angrily.

“Lying in the trough, Duan Jiude, don’t talk nonsense. Ben shenzun was… Oh, I’m sorry, brother Ke. Ben shenzun was wrong. Don’t pinch there!”

Two dogs came out from behind Xu Kuang, but Xu Kuang held his fate by the throat and carried it in the air. No matter how hard he kicked his legs, he just couldn’t reach Xu Kuang.

“Play sneak attack with me? It’s tender! ” Xu que took two dogs and went to the Dharma array.

If you don’t lock up these two goods first, how can you swallow them alone

okay?

incorrect!

Xu Wei suddenly realized something. As soon as his face changed, he suddenly threw the two dogs in his hand to the ground!

Bang!

The two dogs, who were still alive and struggling, turned into a fog and dissipated.

Xu que glances at Duan Jiude who is stuck in the Dharma array.

Duan Jiude blinked and smiled awkwardly: “old man, I promise by my character that I am not separated!”

“Grass!”

Xu que cursed and hurried the Dharma array.

With a bang, Duan Jiude was instantly crushed by the array and turned into a spiritual fog.

“Er Gouzi Duan Jiude, you two want to die, don’t you?”

Xu que immediately shouted in a deep voice. His body flashed and swept towards the forbidden road that had been broken.

Through the gap, I saw that the figure of a man and a dog had appeared inside.

However… At this time, the situation of these two goods is not optimistic. They are completely fixed in place, motionless, unable to speak, and can only stare. Their eyes rotate rapidly towards Xu deficient, as if they were asking for help.

“Oh, isn’t this teacher Er Gou and teacher Duan? Is separation fun? It’s all the rest of Ben’s game. ” Xu que smiled strangely. When he cracked the ban, he specially left a hand to prevent these two goods. Unexpectedly, it was really useful. Facts have proved that Duan Jiude, like Er Gouzi, is a real dog! Xu Xu said, and he untied part of the ban. This part is the key, otherwise I can’t go in. However, er Gouzi and Duan Jiude, who entered in advance, were completely included in the prohibition by Xu Que and integrated with the prohibition. At the moment, he untied some of the prohibitions. Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude still couldn’t move freely, and only their heads could move a little, which also meant that they could speak… “Brother short, listen to Ben shenzun’s explanation. This is a misunderstanding. It’s all the idea of old Duan. Ben shenzun’s resentment…” fart, brother short, don’t listen to the nonsense of the dog, Don’t you know who I am, old man? Only it can think of such a bad idea. ” Tut tut…… “Xu que shook his head again and again, stepped over the prohibition gap and entered it, looking at the two goods with a look of disgust and contempt. In fact, these two guys are not bad. Barely speaking, they are good everywhere. Unfortunately, they have a long mouth Brother Ke, don’t tut. Let go of me, old man. I’ve made a big discovery. ” Duan Jiude said in an urgent voice. Xu Wei ignored it and began to look at the real tomb on the innermost floor. But… I’m disappointed. There’s nothing in it. It’s empty, but there’s a deep and dark tomb path in the middle. I can’t see what’s in it. Obviously, this is still the entrance to the mausoleum, and the treasure may have to go deeper Come on, you two swear by your demons that as long as you are willing to go in first and promise not to take anything in it, I can let you go. ” Xu Que’s eyes looked at Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude again. Er Gouzi opened his eyes in an instant and couldn’t believe it: “brother Ke, what are you talking about? Brother, don’t you believe in God? ” Yes, with the old man’s character of willing to shed blood for my brother, do you think it’s necessary to swear by demons? ” Duan Jiude also attached a voice channel Necessary! ” Xu Que and ER Gouzi responded at the same time. Duan Jiude was stunned for half a second and looked at Er Gouzi bitterly: “grass!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1610
chapters.body:
Chapter 1610

Chapter 1610

C.1610

“Teacher Duan, civilization, pay attention to civilization!” The second dog stressed with a straight face.

“Which end are you on?” Duan Jiude was so angry that he wanted to shoot two dogs to death, but he couldn’t move now.

“What, which end? My God has always been on the side of brother lack. Is it difficult for you to be opposite to brother lack? ” The second dog son said, his face changed greatly and said in a surprised voice, “good guy, I don’t know. I mistakenly got on the thief ship.”

“I’m NIMA, you…” Duan Jiude was angry and wanted to spit.

“Come on, you two stop acting and move under my nose. Do you really think I can’t see it?”

Xu Shiwei shook his head and stopped the two two goods from abusing each other.

Since he entered the tomb, er Gouzi and Duan Jiude have secretly worked together to break the prohibition and tried to escape.

Xu que couldn’t see what was in the tomb path. He just felt very strange and couldn’t feel anything. He broke in alone. I’m afraid he made wedding clothes for ER Gouzi and Duan Jiude.

Fortunately, he was too lazy to stop it.

Seeing that the trick had been exposed, er Gouzi and Duan Jiude were not embarrassed at all. They smiled and said, “brother Ke misunderstood. We just know you can see it, so we didn’t sneak.”

Bang!

As soon as the voice fell, the empty space burst with a dull sound.

Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude broke away from the control of prohibition at the same time and plundered them out.

“Whoosh!”

Xu que didn’t speak, so he took out the little black stick and held it in his hand.

“Cough, I’m short of brother. The treasure is at present. Otherwise, let him go. Let’s go in and find out first?” Duan Jiude winked.

“Yes!” Xu nodded and lengthened the black stick in his hand to make it more handy.

The second dog immediately widened his eyes: “brother lack, don’t do this. Ben shenzun is afraid. Put away the stick first.”

“This mausoleum is so strictly forbidden that there must be danger. I just take it out for self-defense. How can you be afraid? Is it difficult for you? ” Xu que stroked the little black stick and smiled.

“I’m right!”

Duan Jiude immediately retreated a few steps to answer the way. He was already holding a large bundle of Rune seal characters tightly in his hand and was throwing poison powder on it.

“I see. The God must be more vigilant!” Er Gouzi nodded suddenly. There was no big action on his hand, but he carved a pattern every step.

Two people and a dog go together and go to the tomb path. It seems that they are on guard against the unknown dangers ahead, but in fact they are on guard against each other!

“Well?”

Suddenly, two people and a dog seemed to find something and stopped at the same time.

“No wonder we haven’t been able to find out the situation inside. The prohibition is quite hidden.” Xu Ke also frowned slightly.

But this also means that the mausoleum may not be so simple. There may be some precious treasures in it.

However, even if it is a hidden prohibition, it can’t carry it for a moment in front of the “immoral dog”.

Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude are quite accomplished in this way, and each is good at it. Xu Ke combines their suggestions with his own rich and unique views on the forbidden array.

Finally, it used 100000 points to install the force value and cracked the prohibition by the system.

“Sleeping trough! “I’m a cow!”

“It’s worthy of my brother. It’s just a ban. It’s broken in an instant!”

After all, I don’t know what else is behind. In case there are more powerful prohibitions, they have to rely on Xu Ke.

“The basic skills are not six.” Xu que waved his hand lightly.

Look straight ahead.

After the prohibition is broken, the front vision becomes clear, but it is still a channel.

But this time, a force of void came from the depths of the channel, as if the end connected another heaven and earth, and the fluctuation of void was very obvious.

“No, is there another world in here?”

“Could it be the way to Tianzhou?”

Two dogs and Duan Jiude were stunned. There was no reason why they couldn’t feel such an obvious force of emptiness.

The party also immediately became vigilant. Who knows if there will be any big men over there.

Who will it be more appropriate to delay time?

Two people and a dog’s eyes collided with each other.

“Hahaha, it’s just a little empty fluctuation. It’s a little fun.” Two dogs laughed immediately.

“Yes, I thought it was. It seems so.” Duan Jiude also stroked his beard, with an unfathomable face.

“It’s not that I blow with you two. I can hit several with one punch.” Xu Kui pointed to the depth of the channel and looked dismissive.

“Lack of brother, cow force!” Two dogs and Duan Jiude gave thumbs up at the same time.

“Well, among us, teacher Er Gou’s array attainments are the most superb, or…” Xu que suggested I agree. Then the two dog teacher will go first. The old man and I will raid the rear with brother Ke to prevent someone from sneaking from behind. ” Duan jiudangde cooperates Don’t, don’t, don’t. teacher Duan has countless magic weapons and means. Let’s go first! ” Two dogs immediately humiliated This is quite reasonable! ” Xu nodded and looked at Duan Jiude again. Duan Jiude smiled a little stiff: “don’t look at me like that, Mr. Xu and Mr. Ergou. My motto is that if you’re poor, you’ll be alone, and if you’re rich, you’ll help the world. Now there’s no magic weapon in your hand. Among us, Mr. Xu is the most powerful and has a lot of means. Why don’t Mr. Xu lead you away?” Alas! ” Xu que immediately sighed deeply: “what Mr. Duan said is reasonable, but they don’t know. I fought with several immortals in Hecheng. Although I won, I also left a secret wound. He was really powerless… Cough…” he suddenly coughed violently, hammered his fist on his chest, and was stunned to cough up a mouthful of blood on his hand Look at me, two teachers. I’m afraid I’ve lost my body. I can’t keep it together. Time is running out. ” Xu que said sadly. Duan Jiude: “…” Er Gouzi: “…” shit, are you playing so hard? Wolf out Eh? ” At this time, Duan Jiude was suddenly surprised: “it’s coming again. This feeling is coming again. It’s very strong!” Well? ” Xu Ke was slightly stunned, as if he felt something Boy, old man, I didn’t lie to you just outside. I did make a big discovery. When we first came in, we felt a strange smell, but it disappeared for a moment. Now the smell appears again. ” Duan Jiude said. Xu Xu didn’t respond, but he felt something strange in his heart. He also felt a strange smell, strange and familiar, even vaguely pulling him forward. It’s a little weird! Xu Wei frowned! I clearly came to xianyuanzhou for the first time. How can I have this feeling

chapters.title: Chapter 1611
chapters.body:
Chapter 1611

Chapter 1611

C.1611

“Lying trough!”

At this time, two dogs also barked.

“Ben shenzun also felt it. There’s something wrong with the breath!”

“Do you feel the same way?” Xu Ke was stunned and looked at Er Gouzi.

“What is this feeling?” Two dogs looked confused.

“Familiar, but not so familiar!”

“Oh, no!” Two dogs lightly shook his head, “Ben shenzun just sensed a little, and he didn’t have time to aftertaste it. The breath disappeared again.”

Xu que frowned.

Because at this moment, he can still feel the existence of the breath. Although it is not obvious, he is very sure that the breath seems to be guiding him forward.

Is it difficult… Is this a fantasy?

No, if it’s a fantasy, how can Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude have no influence.

“Steady hand!”

Xu que no longer thinks much. He immediately takes out the purple gold forcing King staff and reads it in his heart.

Whoosh!

A layer of metal pieces swept out of the king forcing staff in an instant.

“Dang!”

“Dang!”

Under the crisp metal impact sound, Xu que was wrapped in metal armor!

“Lying trough!”

“Fuck, fuck! I’m so handsome! ”

Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi immediately shouted and licked.

Xu que ignored the two goods and stared at the depths of the channel.

“Deng!”

A man and a dog look at each other!

“Do you want to follow?” The seal characters in Duan Jiude’s hands are shining!

“After tossing about for so long, if we don’t make something good, can we afford the sweat we worked hard before?”

The voice fell, and two dogs flew in after Xu que, but the array lines under his feet were still flashing.

Seeing this, Duan Jiude slowly darkened the seal characters in his hands. As soon as he swept his body, he also followed.

Xu Ke has also flown a long distance forward, but he has not found anything, and the surrounding environment seems to have no change.

Ordinary rock wall, ordinary gravel, ordinary light

Where’s the light?

Xu que was surprised and stopped suddenly.

At the same time, the surrounding environment suddenly changed greatly.

Originally a narrow channel, it gradually blurred.

A huge sky curtain appeared above his head, followed by his feet, and all around him turned into a night sky.

In the night, the stars are dotted, just like being in the sky!

But he could not feel the special spiritual power emitted by the stars, but the strange feeling in his heart became stronger and stronger!

“Brother Ke, what’s the situation? What is it, baby? ”

At this time, two dogs came from the rear and said in surprise.

“Oh, the second dog teacher didn’t leave?” Xu que said with a smile.

“What? What are you talking about? ” The second dog son immediately looked surprised: “brother, I’m worried about your safety. Naturally, I want to follow you to help.”

“Me too!” Duan Jiude also followed and shouted.

“Ha ha!”

Xu que gave a polite sneer.

These two bastards are worried about my safety?

You two are clearly the treasures in the tomb of greedy people, cheap!

“Ouch…”

Suddenly, two dogs roared up and shouted at the night sky.

“Two dogs, come on, you’re not a wolf!” Xu Wei hurriedly reminded.

“Fart, Ben shenzun is a wolf at the moment.”

The second dog son said angrily. At the same time, his face showed a dignified color and stepped back a few steps: “I remember that I have something important to do. Take a step first. Duan Jiude, you can continue to stroll with brother Kuan. If you see any treasure later, remember to tell me in a dream.”

With that, er Gouzi had urged the rune mark under his feet and turned around to run.

“Pa!”

A big hand suddenly pressed two dogs’ heads.

“Don’t talk nonsense. Tell me what you find, or I’ll throw you in.” Xu que erases the rune mark at the foot of Er Gouzi and drags the dog’s head.

“Ah… Brother Qian, let go. It hurts. Don’t try so hard!”

Two dogs immediately screamed and pretended to be thieves.

“Teacher Ergou, you’d better recruit. What did you find?” Duan Jiude also stepped forward, grabbed Er Gouzi’s tail and moved out a dog head guillotine.

“Grass, I don’t know what to say. It’s an intuition.”

Two dogs scolded and said, “just near here, Ben shenzun felt that smell again. There was really a familiar feeling of deja vu, which made Ben shenzun a little creepy.”

“Really? Why don’t I feel it? ” Duan Jiude is suspicious I also feel familiar, but not creepy. ” Xu Xu’s face was dignified, and there was a little doubt in his eyes Boy, let’s run quickly. At a glance, we know that there are not simple powers hiding here, and they can make our God’s dignity creepy. It must not be a good thing. ” At last, er Gouzi looked more at Xu. Without hesitation, Xu Xu immediately slapped and shouted, “what are you looking at?” The grass is so handsome that you can’t see it? ” Er Gouzi said confidently Write a book if you can speak. ” Xu que let go of the two dogs and looked around again. The appearance of the night sky made him feel that things were becoming more and more wrong. In addition, now Er Gouzi also felt that the breath was familiar. The difference is that Er Gouzi feels that the breath makes him creepy, but on his own side, he feels that the breath is leading him forward. So, what the hell is this? Xu Kui took a deep breath, slowly closed his eyes, turned his head quickly, turned his soul, and began to trace the source of this breath Duan Jiude, when you die, I want to think about whose breath this is. ” Two dogs kicked Duan Jiude open with one foot. They learned from Xu Ke with a model and closed their eyes tightly Grass, you two won’t be cheating the old man on me? ” Duan Jiude was stunned and couldn’t help wondering. Xu stood here quietly without any response. Duan Jiude thought for a moment and was about to say something more. Suddenly, Xu Que and ER Gouzi opened their eyes almost at the same time, with a trace of surprise and consternation Five elements mountain! ” One man and one dog shouted at the same time What? What is the five elements mountain? ” Duan Jiude was stunned again. Some didn’t react This breath comes from as like as two peas of five mountains. “No, it should be said that it is exactly the same as the smell of five rows of hills.” Xu Kushen said in a deep voice, and his heart was shocked. Unexpectedly, in such a distant place, I felt the breath of the creature at the foot of the five elements mountain. This is ridiculous Sleeping trough, won’t you? ” Duan Jiude was also frightened at this time. He has been wandering in the five elements mountain for many years. Naturally, he knows the secret of the five elements mountain. Once suppressed a creature. Later, Xu que said that the creature had run away. But now in this unfamiliar xianyuanzhou, there is the smell of that creature
