chapters.body:
Chapter 1612

Chapter 1612

C.1612

“Go, it’s not suitable to stay here for a long time!”

Duan Jiude thought for a moment and turned quickly to slip away.

“Pa!”

With a dull sound, a dark shadow flew out and instantly knocked Duan Jiude down.

“Shit, Ben shenzun was leaving just now. Do you have a share in holding down Ben shenzun? Now you want to run, no way. ” Two dogs pressed on Duan Jiude, bared their teeth and bit Duan Jiude’s arm.

“Come on, if this place is really related to the suppressed creatures in the five elements mountain, maybe…” Xu Wei shook his head, interrupted the farce of two second goods and said in a deep voice.

“Maybe what?” Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi turned to look at Xu que at the same time.

“There is a treasure!” Xu Ke smiled.

“Cut!” Two dogs and Duan Jiude disdain at the same time.

It’s a repressive creature at the foot of the five elements mountain. You can imagine how terrible it is. If you really want to meet it, you’ll die to take it out.

“Magic level treasure!” Xu que added.

Two dogs and Duan Jiude were stunned immediately.

God… Demon level?

“Oh, don’t you know about it? Oh, yes, after all, you didn’t get the inheritance of the creatures at the foot of the five elements mountain. ”

Xu Versailles said, “as far as I know, the creatures at the foot of the five elements mountain are suppressed after the war between gods and demons. What does it mean to be suppressed in that war?”

“That means that guy is very awesome. Shit, he can’t be killed before he has to be suppressed.” Duan Jiude said and wanted to run away again.

“Teacher Duan, why did you suddenly praise the God?” Two dogs are embarrassed.

It was also suppressed, but it was suppressed in the sword Tomb of the Jin Yuan state.

“Praise your sister, release me quickly, I want to go home!” Duan Jiude said angrily.

“Spicy chicken, you counselled?” Xu que immediately mocked.

“That is, the gods disdain to be with you!” Two dogs also sneered.

Pop!

Xu Ke slapped Er Gouzi on the head: “I’m talking about you. You secretly engraved transmission array patterns on Duan Jiude’s back. Don’t think I didn’t see it.”

“Sleeping trough! Er Gouzi, are you special or not human? Take me as an immortal crystal? ” Duan Jiude was quick eyed and scolded. He struggled frantically and threw two dogs off his back.

If Er Gouzi succeeds in this, as soon as the transmission array starts, his Duan Jiude will at least lose most of his accomplishments.

“You misunderstood. The God engraved the longevity array pattern to ensure that teacher Duan has a long life.” Er Gouzi still had the cheek to explain.

“Boom!”

Suddenly, there was a loud noise ahead.

Then the whole sky was distorted, and a bright light shrouded it, like the stars in the night sky scattering starlight, directly illuminating a road to the depths!

“Avenue of stars?” Xu missed the corner of his mouth.

“Sleeping trough, this thing is luring us in!” Two dogs and Duan Jiude were stunned, and their expressions became frightened.

This basically means that the other party already knows they are coming and takes the initiative to invite them in.

“How do you say, go or not?” Xu Xu looks at them.

“Go!” Two dogs and Duan Jiude shook their heads madly.

It’s for that creature to listen to. Shaking his head is for Xu Xu.

“In fact, don’t worry. I feel there is no danger ahead.” Xu Ke said faintly.

This is true, perhaps because he accepted the inheritance of the creature at the foot of the five elements mountain, and some of his senses are very sensitive.

Moreover, the system has not issued any warning, and there is no sense of danger, so this wave seems to work.

Xu que briefly described his grasp. Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi wavered.

“Why don’t we send one of them to test it first? In case of any danger, we can have a backup!” At this time, er Gouzi suggested.

The key is that it also emphasizes the word “human”, after all, it is not human.

“That makes sense!” Xu Que and Duan Jiude nodded at the same time.

They looked at each other!

The so-called ten thousand years at a glance, but so!

The moment their eyes collided, they reached a consensus.

Er Gouzi also suddenly realized something was wrong and immediately shouted, “wait a minute, Ben shenzun…”

Whoosh!

The next second, Xu Que and Duan Jiude took action at the same time. One person grabbed Er Gouzi’s front legs, and one person strangled Er Gouzi’s dog head and rushed to Xingguang Avenue!

“Lying trough, you two bitches, let go of my God.” Er Gouzi was frightened, struggled hard and scolded wildly.

However, this is of little use.

“Leave you!”

Xu Que and Duan Jiude shouted at the same time and directly threw Er Gouzi forward. Bang! With a dull noise in the virtual space, two dogs directly fell into the range of starlight and disappeared in an instant I’ll go. It’s really a transmission. ” Duan Jiude stared It seems that there is another world here. This should be the entrance. ” Xu nodded Will Er Gouzi be all right? Why don’t we withdraw first and come to worship it at this time next year? ” Duan Jiude is cheap It’s strange that there will be something wrong with its flesh, not to mention its means… “Xu que is very indifferent. Obviously, he can feel that Er Gouzi’s breath is very stable, healthy and full of vitality Oh! ” At the same time, two dogs howled from the avenue of stars: “brother lack, teacher Duan, help.” You see, it’s all right! ” Xu que shrugged Hey, hey, go! ” They looked at each other and smiled! Two dogs shouting for help? That just means it’s safe inside. If there is any danger in it, er Gouzi will definitely tell them calmly that it is safe and there are many treasures. Without hesitation, they immediately swept forward and crossed the place where the stars fell. Bang! There was another sound in the virtual space. Xu Que and Duan Jiude walked through the light curtain at the same time, vaguely feeling that they had pierced a layer of fresh-keeping film. Although there is a sense of hindrance, it is not an obstacle. Just use a little force, and it seems to bring people a sense of pleasure… “Shua!” The next second, with a strong pull, they appeared on a plain. This plain is not vast. With their current state, they are afraid that they can sweep to the end in an instant! And two dogs, at this time, are running wildly not far away. Look carefully, the goods are being chased by a pile of weak and ethereal souls Dog! Dog! ” Dog! Don’t run! ” A group of souls floated very fast, but they couldn’t catch up with the two dogs, but they kept chasing after them happily The second dog teacher is so interested! ” Duan Jiude sighed What a fart! Take out the talisman and suppress them! ” Two dogs roared as they ran, and their faces were very black Er Gouzi, what about you? These souls have no lethality at all. They can’t hurt you! ” Xu que rolled his eyes and counselled to the extent of two dogs. There was no one Grass! ” Two dogs immediately stopped and shouted, “I’m afraid of ghosts, but they didn’t hurt me at all; I’m not afraid of people, but people hurt me all over! ” Don’t listen to those messy things. Hurry up. These souls seem to have spiritual consciousness. Ask what clues there are. ” Xu que shouted Why? ” The second dog son said angrily, still remembering that Xu Que and Duan Jiude threw it in With this! ” Xu que said, taking out a bag of stinky tofu from his arms

chapters.title: Chapter 1613
chapters.body:
Chapter 1613

Chapter 1613

C.1613

After some bargaining, er Gouzi and Xu Weida reached an agreement.

One person and one dog shook hands friendly. In order to promote the development of the cause of cultivating immortals, Xu que paid a packet of half and three pieces of stinky tofu in exchange for two dogs to get information from those souls.

Those souls have no lethality. They are a special existence, just like an energy, carrying some spiritual knowledge, which is forever preserved in this small world.

They can’t hurt anyone, and no one can hurt them. To some extent, both sides actually belong to two worlds.

After Xu Que and Duan Jiude came in, they tried to communicate with them, but they ignored them. It can be said that they completely ignored them and were only willing to run after two dogs.

So in desperation, Xu Weicai asked Er Gouzi to ask.

Fortunately, er Gouzi took advantage and was willing to do things. He lay down and licked stinky tofu.

Those souls were also very excited and frantically kneaded the dog’s head.

Until a moment later, those souls slowly felt dull and left, and ER Gouzi came back refreshed.

It communicated with those souls and really asked something.

“Their memory is incomplete, but it was revealed that this is a special void world created by a demon after he punched out in the war between gods and demons.” Said the second dog.

“What else?” Xu Que and Duan Jiude asked at the same time.

They are not very interested in the origin of this space. What treasures are here is the key.

“What’s more, they don’t have the breath of the creatures of the five elements mountain. I didn’t ask anything about it. As for the treasures here…”

The two dogs pretended to be silent and hung up the appetites of Xu Kuan and Duan Jiude. Seeing that they were going to beat the dog, the goods hurriedly said: “they lack wisdom. They don’t know what the treasure is at all. When they ask where the treasure is, they frantically point to the God. Shit, the God is a treasure. Do you still use them to say that?”

“Cough Tui!” Xu Que and Duan Jiude spit directly on the ground.

Er Gouzi took out a piece of stinky tofu without skin and face and continued to put it in his mouth.

“Don’t eat it. It tastes too strong. Think about how to get out. This place where birds don’t shit…” Duan Jiude complained.

But before he finished, er Gouzi’s eyes suddenly lit up: “shit? Where is it? ”

Xu Kuyi pressed Er Gouzi’s head back and said in a deep voice, “I can feel that the breath is here. This place is so narrow. Where else can the breath be hidden?”

Two dogs and Duan Jiude were stunned when they heard the speech.

Then, er Gouzi immediately opened his belly and took out a Luoyang shovel.

Stealing tombs with this? Worthy of being two dogs.

Looking back at the nine days, the goods do not know when there is a golden sparkling shovel, and it is also the presence of the celestial organ.

One man and one dog looked at Xu Ke at the same time, and his face was full of anger and ostentation.

Xu Ke didn’t talk nonsense. He shook his head and rented several fully automatic aircraft… Excavators directly from the system mall.

“Shit!”

Two dogs and Duan Jiude turned black in an instant, scolded and directly attacked the ground.

Xu que took out a beach chair with a disdain on his face, and the whole man lay down, leisurely closing his eyes and refreshing himself.

Several full-automatic excavators also started to dig the ground at this time.

However, the party was busy for most of the day and almost lifted the whole plain to the sky, but they didn’t find anything.

“Can it be that the excavation is not deep enough?” Duan Jiude thought deeply. One hand was already on the excavator and pretended to rest.

Xu Xu didn’t bother to pay attention to their small actions. Anyway, the excavator is rented. As soon as the time comes, the system will take it back automatically.

“It seems that we are thinking in the wrong direction. When we just dug, I have been exploring the underground, but the lower it goes, the weaker the breath will be.” Xu Wei shook his head and stood up from his chair.

Brother Qian, can this soul cook? ” The second dog was surprised Drop! ” Xu Wei ignored it, squatted down and pressed the “soup” button on the rice cooker It’s soup! ” Er Gouzi suddenly realized. Old man, I just felt that my spirit was almost sucked out! ” Duan Jiude asked curiously Yes, yes, Ben shenzun also has this feeling! ” Two dogs are also busy. “…” Xu que suddenly took a puff from the corner of his mouth. But the soul seems… Something’s wrong.

“No, Uncle… I can feel the familiar smell on you.” The soul body was in a hurry and hurriedly explained.

“Because that’s blood thicker than water!” Xu que cried in tears.

“Uncle!” The soul’s voice trembled slightly and seemed to be moved.

Not far away, er Gouzi and Duan Jiude were stunned.

fuck!

This… This is OK?

Is there a pit in the soul’s brain? Is it so easy to be fooled and lame by the missing brother?

“Ga’er!”

At this time, er Gouzi suddenly drank and jumped out: “I’m your uncle. When the gods and Demons fought, my uncle was still the body of the ancient magic dragon, but in order to cooperate with your uncle to save you, he had to reincarnate seven times. Now he can reunite your spirit.”

“Uncle?” The man immediately frowned: “you… Seem to be a dog!”

“Presumptuous, I respect God… Uncle is a fierce wolf, not a dog!” Two dogs shouted.

The man’s soul body also looked at Er Gouzi again, but the more he looked, the more confused he became.

“Disciple! It’s hard to wait for you as a teacher! ”

At this time, Duan Jiude also shouted and rushed out, with pear blossoms and rain on his face.

“Master?” The man’s soul body was more confused in an instant!

Xu que stepped forward: “Ga’er, come and let uncle see… You’re thin!”

A flicker down!

The powerful “Ga’er” finally vaguely recognized his uncle, his uncle and his master. He looked very happy. He seemed to have just awakened and didn’t remember anything, but he was accompanied by his family and felt very warm Uncle, uncle, master, you have worked hard these years! ” Ga’er respectfully salutes two people and a dog Ga’er, don’t say that. You’ve suffered the most these years! ” Xu que shook his head and sighed: “in those days, you only wanted to fight and kill all day and didn’t find a class. Your uncle found a good job for you. You didn’t look at it. You had to go to the war between gods and demons. You were trapped here for so many years.” Uncle, I know I’m wrong! ” The soul man lowered his head with guilt. It felt that according to the past described by his uncle, he was really rebellious and shouldn’t have It’s all right, uncle Ga’er. It’s been so many years. Let’s not mention it! ” Er Gouzi stood up and begged for Ga’er’s rescue Yes, now it’s a great joy that Ga’er can reunite the gods and souls. Our efforts over the years have not been in vain. ” Duan Jiude was still touched by two lines of tears Well, since your uncle and your master plead for you, uncle can’t say anything. ” Xu nodded Thank you uncle, thank you uncle, thank you master, Ga’er will be obedient, progressive and hard-working in the future! ” Soul body man’s determined response Well, if you have such an attitude, you can rest assured. ” Ergouzi walked forward with a happy face and wanted to touch the man’s head. But I found that the other party was too tall to touch. But its claws had been stretched out. It was a little shameful not to touch it, so it had to jump suddenly. Pop! The dog’s paw instantly patted on the head of the soul Grass! ” This scene instantly startled Xu Que and Duan Jiude. Er Gouzi himself was a little confused. He accidentally tried too hard. Fortunately, the man’s soul didn’t feel any discomfort. He still said with gratitude: “Ga’er will not disappoint his family!” Good! ” Duan Jiude drank in a deep voice and gave a thumbs up Good! ” Two dogs also have models to learn Good! ” Xu Xu also nodded happily and continued: “by the way, Ga’er, do you still remember some Dharma formula memories? Or where the treasure is? ” Law? Treasure? ” The man’s soul seemed to frown and fall into meditation Yes, think about it! Because after uncle reincarnation and restoration, he only remembered the reunion of your God and soul. All the powerful Dharma formulas passed down in the family, including the place of treasure, were forgotten. In order to revive our bombing Gang, you must think about it carefully. ” Yes, my uncle has forgotten many ancient methods for you. You have to remember them for my uncle. ” The second dog’s eyes lit up and sighed Me too! ” Duan Jiude nodded Yes! ” Ga’er immediately respectfully said, “Ga’er will try to recall and not let his family down.” Well, well, Ga’er is sensible now. ” Xu que immediately praised him, took out the rice cooker and said affably, “but… Ga’er, now your soul has just reunited, and the magic gas is too strong. It’s very unsafe outside. Go back to uncle, the ultimate God of heaven and fortune, and have a baby for a while.” OK, thank you, uncle! ” The man’s soul is very obedient. His face is full of the expression of “how nice the family are”. He jumps into a streamer and drills into the rice cooker! Bang! Xu Guli put the lid on the pot, took out dozens of talismans and quickly photographed them for sealing. Then he was relieved. Raised his head and looked at Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi Hei hei… “Then, the wicked dog group laughed obscene on his face, and his smile gradually became abnormal

In the blink of an eye, I went back to the small world just now.

However, there was no echo around. The point is that this time there is no starlight at the exit, which means that you are directly trapped in this space. Xu Xu was stupid for an instant. You have a system that stores things in your place, but you can still be found? ” Xu Ke immediately called out the system interface and threw the pot crazily Ding, host personal behavior, do not rise to this system. ” The system prompts to sound up. Xu Ke was stunned. The meaning of “system” obviously means that there is no problem in system space. So it has nothing to do with carrying the soul? So… “That bead?” Xu Ke then reacted. Before he was inhaled here, he picked up a purple bead and input a little Xianyuan force to explore… But the transmission speed was too fast. He didn’t know whether the bead brought him in, and after he came in, the bead was not in his hand. Now that the reason for the soul body is ruled out, it can be sure that the purple bead is the ghost System, there are dog coins, I dare to Yin in front of you! Can you stand it? I can’t stand it. I quickly cracked this small broken space. Even the forced saint with the system wants to be trapped? It’s wishful thinking! ” Xu Ke found the system again. The system was silent for a moment before slowly responding: “Ding, it is detected that there is a small space opened up for manpower here. There will be a blind spot area in this kind of space. As long as you find the correct blind spot, the host can leave!” Blind spot? What does it look like? ” Ding, it’s estimated that it will take 5 million to find the blind spot. Do you want to find it? ” You don’t have to! ” Xu Xu directly shut down the system. Nima, five million dollars? What about local tyrants? Isn’t it just looking for a blind spot? I forced the first blind monk in the national costume of the holy hall, but I can’t find a blind spot? Xu que muttered, and his eyes have scanned in this small space

Unless

Boom!

When the light spot touches xianyuanli, it is like a dry firewood meets a fire and burns at one point.

Xu Ke nodded suddenly and said in a low voice: “it seems that the space not only has the power of space, but also contains the power of time. We were trapped inside for at least four or five hours, but outside it is only a moment!”

“Sleeping trough, is it so strong?”

Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi’s eyes immediately locked the purple bead, and the mouth drooled.

Xu que immediately smiled and gave in with great enthusiasm.

Then… “No, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no Two dogs shook their heads again and again Yes, it’s destined for you. I have no reason to rob you with the second dog teacher. ” Duan Jiude nodded The two teachers are so polite. I really don’t get used to it. ” Mr. Xu’s remark… Seems to be a deep misunderstanding between me and Mr. Ergou! ” Duan Jiude shook his head and sighed. But it was clear in my heart that the Purple Pearl was definitely not fun Brother Qian, just take it. Why should your family be so polite? ” Er Gouzi is also very good now. He is always humble Ah. ” Xu Xu didn’t say anything and gave a polite sneer. On the whole, this purple bead is also a treasure, and it has a time difference. It is a good place for closed door cultivation. Although she basically can’t use it, Hongyan has a fortune jade ultimatum. The time difference is more exaggerated than this, which is obviously more useless. But treasure, how can there be too much truth? I can’t use it with Hongyan. I’m afraid the environment can’t be cultivated? I’m afraid we have to find a way to repair it in the future. However, before the repair, this thing is not useless. This time he learned to be smart and couldn’t touch it with his hands. He was too rich in Xianyuan power. He missed a bit and opened the small world accidentally, which would waste time Huh? Brother Kuan, you…… “Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi were stunned when they saw Xu Kuan take away the purple beads. Isn’t there a problem with this thing? Dare you take it okay? Didn’t the two teachers just tell me to take it away? ” Xu que pretended to be surprised and said, “no, no, the two teachers won’t be the kind of people who like to go back on their word?” This God respects…… “two dogs immediately want to return to it. Xu Wei suddenly added, “I like to educate people and animals who go back on their word.” God is not that kind of wolf. ” Two dogs immediately turned their words As we all know, old man, I have always been a man of my word. ” Duan Jiude’s Old God is in the way, but his fingernails are almost pulled into the flesh seam of his palm. A man and a dog are filled with remorse. Shit, I was fooled by this boy. I knew I had just asked for the bead Boom! ” At this time, a sudden noise broke the silence What’s going on? ” Xu Ke was stunned. The second dog son’s face changed greatly: “lying in the trough, the God Zun just heard a dragon sing!”

C.1617

Two dogs excited way.

Xu scolded and chased.

But soon he noticed something was wrong. Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude didn’t disappear at once. The two goods fell down.

The passage in front of me was incomplete. There was a fracture in front of me. There was a vast abyss below. It was very dark and I couldn’t see my fingers.

Can this curse mark, combined with the strength of the other party, pose a great threat to yourself, which leads to the system issuing a danger warning?

“Clean it up. Be sure to clean it up.”

Xu Ke is busy responding to the system to clear the curse mark.

At the same time, he also explored his divine knowledge and scanned the flesh and soul of Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude.

Sure enough, the two goods didn’t escape. There was also an obscure curse mark in the spirit.

If the system did not help him find out and let him roughly clear the mark, it is estimated that he could not find the mark so easily.

“Brother Duan, what’s the matter?” Seeing Xu Que’s strange expression, er Gouzi couldn’t help asking.

“Alas!”

Xu Wei sighed deeply and said with pity: “teacher Er Gou, teacher Duan, there is good news and bad news. Which one do you want to listen to first?”

Two dogs and Duan jiudeton were stunned.

“This…” “brother short, you won’t really die soon, will you? Don’t. If you die, what about the treasures you’ve found over the years? ” Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi wailed What nonsense? It’s you two who will die soon. You check your spirits carefully. I’ve been cursed, and I’ve been recruited. ” Xu que said with a black face. When two dogs and Duan Jiude heard this, they looked frightened and hurriedly checked themselves. After a while Hold the grass! ” Nima, who did it? It’s so immoral to use such despicable means. ” Two dogs and Duan Jiude immediately shouted abuse. They found that this thing could not be removed. But Er Gouzi still had a good memory. He seemed to think of something. He looked at Xu Kuang and said, “brother Kuang, this is bad news, isn’t it? What’s the good news?” The good news is that my curse mark has been removed, but I can’t get yours. ” Xu que shrugged his shoulders and looked sympathetically at Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude. “…” Two teachers, it’s not urgent. Although my mark has been eliminated, I can’t bear it. ” Xu que said, his eyes have slowly swept to the direction of hailincheng Brother Ke, this wave is really unbearable. ” Fuck him! ” Two dogs and Duan Jiude are angry Do it, we must do it. The big experience of walking is not to take it for nothing! ” Xu lacked a smile on the corner of his mouth The sea faces the city. In a dusty old courtyard of the city Lord’s residence, a shriveled old man came out. There were only a few hairs left, and his eyes were deeply sunken, as if his eyes would fall at any time! When the old man stepped out of the chamber of secrets! A blood evil spirit soared into the air, as if there were countless innocent souls calling wantonly in the Hailin City This is… “A white haired Luo Xian’s voice trembled:” this is the old city Lord! ” His voice was not loud, but it clearly reached the ears of all the people in the city Lord’s house. Everyone’s face changed dramatically. Old city Lord? The old city Lord is still alive? How is this possible? It’s said that the old city owner has been sitting for thousands of years. How could he… Wait, is it true that the rumor is false? Everyone looked at each other, and their eyes were shocked. Thousands of years ago, they may have been children, and some may have just been born! But since they can remember, they know that there was once an extraordinary strong man in Hailin City, a talented strong man who stepped into the peak of the fairy king in just 500 years! I don’t know why, thousands of years ago, the old city Lord disappeared after the current city Lord stepped into the fairyland. Since then, it has been reported that the old city Lord has been seated, and the city Lord’s house has never refuted the rumor, which seems to be tacit. Unexpectedly, once the city Lord died today, the old city Lord who has disappeared for thousands of years appeared

chapters.title: Chapter 1622
chapters.body:
Chapter 1622

Chapter 1622

C.1622

Now!

A middle-aged man in the city Lord’s residence is leading a team of people in black, standing outside the secret room in great awe!

When the thin old man came out, the middle-aged man and the team of people in black knelt down together!

“See the Lord!” The party shouted in unison, their voices trembling.

The tide lowered his head slowly, looked down at the middle-aged man kneeling in front of him, and asked, “who killed my son?”

“The name of the city leader, the old master of Haitian sect, is bombed!” In the eyes of middle-aged men, Haixun doesn’t deserve to be the city master at all. Only the one in front of him is qualified to lead them.

“Fried heaven Gang? What forces? ”

The middle-aged man was stunned when he heard the speech: “if you go back to the city Lord, your subordinates don’t know. Now there are only two people and a dog. One of the teenagers is only the great Luojin fairyland, but he has the strength of the strong immortal in the first World War!”

“Da Luo Jinxian, can you fight immortal Zun?” Haichao shook his head and smiled: “now what pigs and dogs dare to call xianzun.”

After talking, he smiled and said in a cold voice, “that waste, unexpectedly died in the hands of the mole ants of the great Luo Jinxian!”

“Old city Lord, calm down!” The middle-aged man quickly kowtowed and shouted.

The tide didn’t reply and slowly looked up at the sky.

A moment later, he said faintly, “since I have passed the customs, let’s start that thing. I’m sure this time.”

Hearing this, the middle-aged man suddenly changed his face and felt a burst of ecstasy in his heart!

Is it finally going to start?

The precipitation of three generations of the city master’s family is finally going to take that step now!

We may have to witness the birth of a new Immortal Emperor!

Thinking of this, the middle-aged man’s body couldn’t help shaking with excitement. His face was filled with excitement and said loudly, “subordinate, obey!”

“Go!”

The tide waved his hand, indicating that everyone could retreat.

But now that Haixun is dead, he doesn’t want to wait!

Otherwise, there will be no one in the city near the sea, and some things will inevitably change.

“It’s only thousands of years. Why is the sea family so weak?”

The tide whispered, silently turned and walked towards the house, and the figure gradually faded and disappeared.

Soon, the middle-aged man quickly summoned thousands of people in black in the city Lord’s house.

Except that he is a fairy king, the other people in black are all strong men of the same color!

Night is falling!

The middle-aged man also took a team out of the back door and disappeared into the night.

Their purpose is to capture some Taiyi immortals back to the dungeon of the city master’s house!

With their cultivation, it is almost no difficulty, but what they do must be hidden, not to disturb the world, let alone reveal any information, so they can only do it secretly.

A few hours later, a large number of people in black returned, bringing a large number of Taiyi immortal friars, who were constantly sent to the dungeon.

“How many people?” The middle-aged man came from a distance, looked at one of the men in black and asked in a deep voice.

“Back to the housekeeper, there are three thousand!”

“Three thousand?” The middle-aged man was furious at the speech: “a group of waste.”

The man in black knelt down hurriedly and said in a trembling voice, “Sir, forgive me. I’ll pass it on now and let them speed up.”

“Since you know, don’t act quickly! Can you afford to keep the city Lord waiting? If you continue at your speed, when will you be able to gather up 100000? ”

The middle-aged man reprimanded in a deep voice, but suddenly he turned his head and looked back.

“Who?”

suddenly!

I only heard a “clang” sound from the street behind.

“Chase!”

The middle-aged man’s face sank and waved.

Their conversation was heard by outsiders!

“Yes, my Lord!”

Several people in black hurriedly responded and quickly chased towards the sound source!

At this time, the night is quiet in the street.

A friar is running around in a panic and running for his life.

Now he regretted it.

He just saw that the middle-aged man looked familiar and stayed there, but he didn’t expect to hear such a powerful message!

He knows very well that if he is caught now, he will die miserably on the spot!

Run!

You have to run!

However, he is just a big Luo Sanxian, but there are more than ten big Luo Jinxian behind him.

So he can only run madly in the roadway. Relying on this terrain, he has a chance to escape from death.

If you rise directly in the air, I’m afraid you will be caught up by the people behind you and killed directly.

However, after running for several blocks, he found that the people in black behind him were not thrown away, but getting closer and closer It’s over, it’s over. ” The monk’s heart was in a mess and extremely flustered. Strong anxiety and fear hit his heart. He rushed out of the alley and into the street, ready to shout for help. But suddenly there was a small sound of “Ding Ling clang” in my ear, as if someone was playing something. But the movement sounded like a straw to the friar Someone, someone around here! ” His face was full of ecstasy and he rushed towards the sound source. However, as soon as I passed the corner of the street, I saw that under the dark color, there was a strange combination of two people and a dog. They were secretly hiding outside a shop and making trouble. Take a closer look! good heavens! These two people and a dog are actually prying the door guard array of people’s shop. The key store… Seems to be the industry under the city master’s residence Teacher Duan, you can’t do this. It’s just a door guard array. How can you take a knife and cut it? This is a reckless man’s behavior. ” The dog muttered a curse You know something, old man. I’m trying to test whether the door guard array is hard enough to see with a knife. It shows that the level of the door guard array is not low. There must be good things in it! ” The wretched old man also scolded You are too unprofessional. I said it’s best to climb the window. You have to enter from the front door. It takes too much time to crack the door guard array. ” The young man frowned Ah, wait, brother Ke, it seems that someone has found us. ” Suddenly, the dog whispered and looked back. The friar reacted and was shocked. He was about to say something. Suddenly, the young man said in a too high voice: “good array. I didn’t expect to see such a wonderful array when walking around the city at night. Let’s watch it and see if we can learn anything.” The wretched old man next to him nodded deeply and said with emotion: “indeed, just observing it, I feel that the bottleneck of the array seems to be about to break through!” Yes, yes, this array is awesome. It’s really insightful. ” The dog replied with exaggerated expression. The friar was dumbfounded. Nima, do these two people and a dog treat themselves as fools? Who doesn’t know you’re stealing, but you can still open your eyes and tell lies. You can watch people’s door guard array and learn here in the middle of the night? Who are you kidding. No, it can’t be uncovered. Life matters right now. Thinking of this, the friar opened his mouth and cried sadly, “several Taoist friends, help!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1623
chapters.body:
Chapter 1623

Chapter 1623

C.1623

help?

In the middle of the night, what do you shout for help?

Smell speech, two people and a dog can’t help being stunned at the same time!

“Taoist friends, the people of the city Lord’s residence are chasing me. They…”

Said the friar anxiously.

Just before he finished, there was a sound of breaking the air in the rear. More than a dozen people in black suddenly appeared, murderous, and their eyes had been locked on several people present.

Lord’s mansion?

good heavens! What a coincidence!

Xu que, Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi suddenly had an evil smile on their faces.

There is a way to heaven. You don’t go. In the middle of the night, more than a dozen big Luo Jinxian little killers actually come to see their heads off?

“Kill them all!”

The man in black, who was led by him, only inquired about Xu’s accomplishments, ignored them and ordered directly.

Immediately, more than a dozen people in black set out together, offered killing moves and rushed to kill in an instant.

“Don’t move, it’s all mine!”

Xu Weisheng was afraid that ergouzi and Duan Jiude would rob the head. He immediately waved the Purple Gold King forcing staff. The whole person was like a shell and ejected in an instant.

“Bang! Bang! Bang! ”

Zijin forced Wang to turn into a dense shadow of the staff, covering the whole audience.

The group of people in black didn’t have time to respond at all. They even had the chance to scream. In an instant, they burst out under the shadow of the stick, turned into blood mist and rushed to the yellow spring one after another.

“This…”

The fleeing friar was stunned and completely stupid.

So many big Luo Jinxian, just… It’s gone?

It’s easier to kill than to cut vegetables!

“Tao you!”

At this time, Xu que had already put away his stick, glanced at the Friar and said with a smile: “why did the city Lord’s house chase you? What should you do to hurt God? If so, we have to take care of it. ”

“No, no, no, you misunderstood. I didn’t do anything harmful.”

The friar quickly waved his hand to explain, very nervous.

“You didn’t? What were you wandering about in the street in the middle of the night? Still being chased? ” Two dogs stared at the dog and jumped out.

“Young man, be lenient in confession and strict in resistance!” Duan Jiude also said coldly.

“Several Taoist friends, things are not what you think. I was only chased and killed when I was found accidentally. ”

The friar hurried.

“I was a little nervous at that time. I didn’t hear the details clearly, but I heard them say they wanted to arrest 100000 people, and it was still related to the old city Lord!”

“Oh? Old city Lord? ”

Xu que was stunned.

Just killed a city Lord. How did you get an old city Lord?

“Don’t you know? Today, the city master was killed by the bombers of tianbang. The old city master immediately appeared… Wait, are you just… “The friar just said and suddenly reacted.

what the fuck.

Isn’t the combination of two people and a dog the people of the fried heaven gang that everyone is preaching?

How dare these guys come back and pry the door of their shop in the middle of the night?

“It seems that the breath today is the old city Lord!” Er Gouzi didn’t bother to pay attention to the friar. At this time, he looked dignified. He was a strong enemy!

“The old man just died. How could he send his men out to catch people? And 100000? ” Duan Jiude was suspicious.

As soon as the friar heard this, he immediately said, “ladies and gentlemen, in fact, some people disappeared from time to time in our hailincheng city in the early years! But we didn’t care too much. After all, most of the scattered repairs in the city may be going out for experience or having an accident. It’s normal to lose the news. But tonight’s matter is no small matter. I’m afraid the disappearance of monks over the years has a close relationship with the city Lord’s house! ”

Speaking of this, the friar paused for a moment and said in a deep voice, “or it should be related to the old city Lord. It’s a transcendent existence who has stepped into the immortal realm thousands of years ago!”

Years of monks missing?

Good guy, the people in the city Lord’s residence are so vicious. It seems that we must do a big job in this trip to eliminate harm for the people!

Two people and a dog turned their heads at the same time, and their eyes were right together.

Then he swept his eyes to the gate guard array.

“Several Taoist friends, I’m afraid it’s not safe here. Let’s leave here first, spread the matter and find someone else to help!” Then the friar said.

“Ah, no hurry, no hurry!”

But Xu waved his hand and said righteously, “the city Lord’s house is full of evil. We can’t leave here. We must race against time and collect their criminal evidence first!”

“Yes, we’ve all inquired. This shop is the property of the city Lord’s residence. There must be a lot of criminal evidence hidden in it.” Duan Jiude nodded.

“Collect… Collect criminal evidence? Here? ” The Friar’s mouth twitched in an instant.

There are a lot of fairy crystal magic weapons in this shop, but where is the criminal evidence?

However, at the moment, he didn’t dare to say anything more. He could only nod his head and say, “OK, please… Hurry up.”

“ADA!”

The two dogs immediately gave a strange cry, jumped and kicked out directly. There was a pattern between the soles of their feet and kicked them hard on the door guard array.

Bang!

With a dull sound, the whole gate guard array broke instantly.

“Rush, look for evidence!”

Two people and a dog shouted together and rushed into the shop at the same time.

Then, in the monk’s surprised eyes, two people and a dog frantically swept all kinds of magic weapons on the counter. Countless dark spaces under the counter were smashed, and a large number of fairy crystals were taken away.

Even on a flat floor, after two dogs raised a board, they showed a prohibition barrier, which was easily broken. Then they grabbed a large number of storage rings from the ground and quickly put them away.

Half a quarter of an hour later, there was not even a door panel left in the shop of the city Lord’s residence.

The friar witnessed how a shop disappeared out of thin air, and the corners of his mouth twitched slightly.

Is this NIMA really collecting evidence? It looks like a skilled bandit!

That technique, that proficiency, it’s weird everywhere!

But it’s good. Now you’re finished with your things, can you go?

“Three, can we go now? Shall we inform the others first or… ”

Before he finished, he suddenly saw that the lines under the dog’s feet had flickered!

what the fuck!

The friar immediately widened his eyes and said in amazement, “what are you doing, three?”

“Taoist friend, the people in the city Lord’s residence are too cunning! There are no flaws here and no criminal evidence left. We’re going to look elsewhere. Go home and go to bed. ”

Two dogs said that and waved goodbye to the friar.

Then with a “whoosh”, the white light shone, and the figure of two people and a dog gradually turned into streamer and disappeared.

fuck!

These wicked guys.

Looking for evidence?

Look for a fart, it’s a gang of robbers! Shameless robber!

“I knew I shouldn’t believe these people. No, I blame the smelly woman. If it wasn’t for tracking where she settled, I wouldn’t meet the bad thing of the city Lord’s residence on the way. Now people and money are empty, and I’m in danger of killing myself and bad luck!”

While swearing, the friar hurried in one direction.

Anyway, he has to hurry out of town.

As for the bad news of the city Lord’s residence, when you leave the city, you will naturally have a way to spread it, but you can also sell the news at a good price. You’re afraid you won’t find a woman to play at that time?

“Hey, hey!”

Thinking of this, the monk’s face showed an ugly smile.

However, just as he had just rounded several streets, he suddenly trembled.

A terrible momentum locked him!

“No!”

The monk suddenly changed his face and ran away at a crazy speed.

This breath is so familiar that it is clearly the housekeeper of the city Lord’s residence!

The terrible existence of fairyland!

“It’s not easy to find a way to kill 16 of my men in Da Luojin fairyland. But do you think you can run away? ”

At this time, a cold voice sounded in his mind.

Followed by dozens of dark shadows, they suddenly fell in front of him.

The middle-aged housekeeper stared at him with cold eyes.

The friar trembled with fear on the spot and repeatedly waved his hand to explain: “no, your man is not me…”

“Chi!”

Before he finished, a sharp blade flickered past.

The Friar’s life was broken on the spot, and a blood mark appeared between his neck. The whole head slowly slipped down from his body and fell to the ground with a slap. The knife strength broke out and blew it into a blood mist.

“Dead waste!”

The housekeeper snorted coldly, waved his hand, and a pocket knife slid into the sleeve robe along the palm.

“Deal with the surrounding area and look for others. Once you find out, kill them! This matter must not be publicized! ”

“I’ll see!”

However, the next morning.

Many sea friars woke up or finished their training. They were surprised to find that there was an album called “sea tide stories” in their homes, inns and even streets and alleys.

Author: fried tianbang Fujian Yibo!
