chapters.title: Chapter 1624
chapters.body:
Chapter 1624

Chapter 1624

C.1624

“Have you heard? The disappearance of a large number of monks in Hailin City over the years seems to be related to the city master’s house! ”

“Taoist friend, did you read that picture album?”

“Yes, this album was painted by Uncle Fujian of the fried sky gang. It reveals countless past events related to the old city Lord!”

“What uncle Fujian, it’s Fujian Yibo!”

“Do you think the story in that album is true?”

“It seems true. The timeline is right. Think about it. Thousands of years ago, the old city Lord suddenly disappeared and was rumored to be sitting!”

“Yes, yes, but according to the picture album, the old city Lord lost money because of his cultivation of magic skills. Now he is catching people everywhere to refine oil and prepare to gain weight!”

“Isn’t it? Do you believe that? ”

“It doesn’t sound very reliable!”

“But as far as I know, some records are true!” Someone suddenly said mysteriously.

“What? Does this Taoist friend know anything? ”

The man smiled calmly: “that’s nature! In fact, the old city Lord met a woman practicing Meigong thousands of years ago! ”

Everyone was stunned when they heard the speech!

A woman who practices Meigong?

Looking at the surprised look on everyone’s face, the man continued, “yes, that’s what you think!”

“Brother, please tell us what we think!”

“It’s easy to have an accident if you can’t tell it in detail! I can only tell you that dry firewood and fire, beautiful women and strong men, vigorous fighting, long-term unconsciousness and squeezing adults. ”

“Isn’t it? The old city Lord is in such good health? ”

“Don’t you know something? The old city master was the first genius of Hailin City! Naturally, she is far more than ordinary people in this respect. Otherwise, why do you think that woman chose the old city master? ”

“You are wrong. The news I heard is that the old city Lord is different from ordinary people and is more interested in some men!”

“Fart, don’t talk nonsense if you don’t know. The old city Lord is a eunuch. Later, he didn’t know what strange skills he practiced, so he fell into such a field. He’s a poor man!”

“Sleeping trough, true or false?”

“Nonsense, otherwise, when he was famous, why did he suddenly pass the throne to his son, but he chose to shut up?”

“Wait, it doesn’t seem quite right, if he is a eunuch? Isn’t his son… ”

“Ladies and gentlemen, did you get the point wrong? Now we should not consider these problems? First find out why so many talents have disappeared in hailincheng in recent years. Yes. ”

Ah, this

exactly!

Although we don’t know the specific purpose of the city Lord’s residence, there seems to be something wrong with everyone’s situation now!

If all the monks who have been missing for so many years are captured by the city master’s residence, the current hailincheng… Is very dangerous!

Why gossip about the past of the old city master here?

However, some people did not take it seriously, just as a farce.

Some people think that this should be a rumor casually spread by people with old enemies of the old city owner. Otherwise, how could it evolve so many versions overnight?

Therefore, these “smart people” are unmoved and think that the city Lord’s house will eventually explain. At that time, any rumors will become jokes.

Rumors spread all over the city and soon spread to the city master’s residence.

When the housekeeper heard these rumors, he went mad in an instant.

Could someone else have heard them yesterday?

As the saying goes, there is no smoke without fire. They have been rampant in hailincheng for many years. If they want to spread rumors, it should not happen at this time.

If the old city Lord knows this

The housekeeper shivered coldly!

But he knew that such things could not be concealed!

After some hesitation, he reported the matter to the old city Lord Haichao!

The tide listened, but there was no response.

He was like an old man in the twilight, sitting in his seat. The breeze gently brushed his remaining strands of hair, but to outsiders, it seemed that the breeze could blow him down at any time.

However, the housekeeper knelt down in front of the tide, shivering all over, and the cold sweat swished down!

He could sense the anger of the old city Lord. He was afraid that if he dared to say more nonsense, he would have to die.

For a long time, the tide finally said slowly, “you waste! You can’t do this well! ”

While talking, the tide raised his hand, as if ready to directly bomb the waste in front of him.

But he seemed to think of something, and he didn’t wave his hand.

Until a moment later, he said slowly, “this is the end of the matter. I won’t pursue it anymore! Now there are millions of people in the city. It’s not difficult to catch 100000 people. Start closing the city immediately. Remember, if there are any mistakes again, don’t blame us for not thinking about the past! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1625
chapters.body:
Chapter 1625

Chapter 1625

C.1625

“Lord, we have something urgent to go out. You can’t block the city completely like this.”

“Yes, the rumor has nothing to do with us. Why should we be involved in what individuals do?”

“Closing the city is unfair to us!”

“We want to see the city Lord!”

“I’m a disciple of Liyun sect. The sect gate has an urgent call. Please open the gate and let me out!”

At this time, a large group of friars had gathered outside the city master’s house.

All kinds of noise came directly into the city Lord’s house and also into the ears of Haichao.

The middle-aged man, who is also the housekeeper of the city Lord’s house, knelt on the ground trembling and panicked!

Although he thought there would be such a scene before!

But I didn’t think that these people really dared to block up the city master’s house and shout. They were bold and didn’t know whether to live or die!

“Shut up these people. Don’t disturb our cleanliness. Don’t force us to directly wash the whole sea city.” The tide said, and a sense of erasure flashed in his eyes.

If he kills too many people in the city, he will kill all the people in the city.

But now, he only needs 100000 people, not one less or one more!

The housekeeper also understood what the old city Lord meant. For the time being, he thought of a way to reassure the city people!

This city is the original magic weapon of the old city Lord, not the real city, so the sea tide can be manipulated at will, and even the fairy king can’t leave here!

Otherwise, how could they stop so many friars with their little manpower of the city Lord’s residence?

“My subordinates know.”

The housekeeper hurried back.

Soon he walked out of the city master’s house with a group of people.

When they saw that someone came out to respond at last, the noise became louder!

“Housekeeper Liang! Open the skylight and tell the truth. What does the city Lord want to do? Why don’t you let us out of the city? ”

“Yes, why such a big battle to catch a rumor monger?”

“Many of us are not people near the city by the sea. We just come here to have a rest. You can seal the city, but you are not qualified to trap us here?”

Housekeeper Liang Feifan slowly raised his hand and pressed it down. The huge momentum swept out in an instant.

“Everybody, listen to me!”

He shouted.

The crowd was quiet for an instant.

Liang Feifan uttered a word, and the people widened their eyes in an instant.

Can NIMA bite back like this? Forced smear?

Who doesn’t know that two people and a dog came to the fried sky gang. Almost all of us are people with identity and origin. How can we even be the people of the fried sky Gang?

“Ha ha!”

At this time, someone sneered: “housekeeper Liang, is that the so-called rumor actually true? It’s a city closure. Who knows if you want to catch 100000… ”

Whoosh!

Before the man’s voice fell, he was suddenly pierced by a flash of light, which broke into a pile of flesh and blood on the spot.

“Hiss!”

Everyone at the scene immediately took a breath and kept silent.

No one expected that Liang Feifan would start so hard!

Dare you kill like this?

It’s not really going to tear your face, is it?

Many people began to feel uneasy and even regretted making trouble here.

“I can prove for the city Lord that everything you hear is a rumor! The reason why we closed the city is to find the originator and dig out the people of the fried heaven gang. As long as you don’t participate in it, it will be fine! ”

Hearing this, everyone sighed in their hearts!

Just to investigate the source of the rumor?

Then why kill?

However, they haven’t asked these words yet, but Liang Feifan lightly added: “the man just now must be one of the disseminators of this rumor, so he deserved his death! As for you, leave now, or you will not blame me for being ruthless! ”

When they heard this, they dared not make any more noise.

After all, housekeeper Liang is a real fairyland, and among them, the highest one is daluojin fairyland, which can’t resist at all.

To say a bad word, even if Liang Fanfan wants to kill them all, they are powerless to resist.

“Boom!”

However, just then, a deafening noise suddenly came from a distance.

Followed by a mushroom cloud rising slowly from the east of the city!

“Boom!”

Another loud noise!

There was also a thick smoke in the west of the city Bang! ” The south of the city blew up! The north of the city also blew up! The continuous explosion made everyone stunned! What’s going on? This is… Someone is attacking the city? The eyes of the people suddenly brightened. Since someone is attacking the city, if they can successfully destroy the prohibition mask, they may all have a chance to escape the Hailin City smoothly. As for Liang Feifan, he said that if he found the root of the rumor, he would let them go. Everyone didn’t believe a word. Life is safest only in your own hands. Listen to him fart? Shit! Shua! In an instant, a group of people rushed directly to the place where the explosion occurred in all directions At this time, the sea is outside the city. Xu que has already met with ER Gouzi Duan Jiude, and his face is a little strange Do you think there’s something wrong with the city? ” Xu que asked Yes, it doesn’t work at all. I always think it’s fried on cotton, but it’s not ineffective. The explosive is so powerful that it has added runes. ” The two dogs began to lick the dog again Seriously, the city looks like a magic weapon. ” Duan Jiude’s face was frozen. Xu Ke was stunned by this. Magic weapon? Sleeping trough, it seems to be true. When I detonated the explosive just now, I had this feeling. It seems that there is a very powerful power of Tao Yun. The key is that the gunpowder adds a lot of Rune power, which seems to be more destructive to magic weapons System, check this city quickly. Is it a magic weapon? ” Xu Wei hurriedly called out the system for investigation Ding, after detection, the object is a special object with precious value… “The system prompt sound came slowly Shit! ” Xu Que’s whole face turned black in an instant. A special magic weapon that can be turned into a city. The key is that it is also hidden. Thieves are strong. You can’t see it at all. It’s a magic weapon. It is estimated that this is not a top-grade immortal weapon. It must be a middle-grade immortal weapon, right? I was just blown up by Jiude and the dog? Look at those walls. They are badly bombed. If I had known, I would have touched it first and knocked on a stick or something, and then took the treasure away. It’s over! Now that it’s done like this, this wave of blood loss is obvious

chapters.title: Chapter 1626
chapters.body:
Chapter 1626

Chapter 1626

C.1626

“Presumptuous, who is it?”

At this time, the roar of the sea tide rang out in the city Lord’s residence, deafening and ringing all over the area.

How dare anyone blow up their own Hailin City?

If you only blow a hole, it will be convenient for people to escape!

But

That bastard blew up all the walls!

Leng is to blow up his life magic weapon!

In this way, it will take tens of thousands of lives to fill it.

Life is easy to find, but all this needs time to refine!

“Lord, if someone attacks the city, what shall we do?”

At the same time, Liang Feifan came in a hurry, knelt down in front of the sea tide and asked in a panic.

“What to do, what to do! You can’t use your head except this sentence? ” The sea tide shouted angrily and kicked the middle-aged man in front of him!

Fortunately, he only used a little Xianyuan force, otherwise Liang Feifan in the realm of fairy king has sealed the box now.

Liang Feifan, who was kicked off, was afraid to breathe. He knelt down quietly and waited for the judgment of the city Lord!

suddenly!

He took a deep breath when he heard the tide.

“That’s all! This is the end of the matter. I don’t care so much. If I fail this time and pass the news, I will have no chance in the future! ”

Voice down!

“Boom!”

The whole city began to shake violently!

The loud noise spread in all directions in an instant.

At the same time, Xu Duan and his party standing outside the city also stared.

“Sleeping trough, this thing… Took off?” Two dogs exclaimed.

The whole seafront city rose up completely and took off slowly!

“Cow force, it’s really a magic weapon!” Duan Jiude sighed and began to feel sorry.

They just blew up a magic weapon.

But I don’t know why. After thinking about it, it seems very exciting.

Inside the city.

Many monks also clearly felt that the sea city was taking off and the surrounding mountains were falling.

“What happened?”

“Who is controlling hailincheng?”

“Where is this taking us?”

People have begun to panic, thinking of all kinds of rumors, they feel more and more uneasy.

Whoosh!

At this time, a figure suddenly swept into the air and shouted, “the city guard listens to the order and catches 100000 creatures. There is no amnesty for those who resist!”

Liang Feifan has been approved by Haichao. There is no need to hide it!

Now we must prepare 100000 lives for sacrifice as soon as possible!

As long as the old city Lord can step into the realm of Immortal Emperor, everything is worth it!

Moreover, when he stepped into the realm of Immortal Emperor, all this was no longer a fault! But a new emperor Road, a kind of emperor road that can be copied!

He!

Emperor Haichao! Will be respected by thousands of people!

“Boom -!”

At the same time, the sea faces the center of the city!

With the city Lord’s mansion as the center, many houses and streets within a hundred miles have collapsed and the land is sunken!

A blood pool of evil spirit appears from the center of the ground!

In the middle of the blood pool, there was a thin little old man floating!

Even though he was not tall and strong, his momentum made the whole city shudder!

“What does the old city Lord want to do? 100000 lives, why so many lives? ”

A white haired old man sat on the ground, muttering to himself, and several people in black were coming towards him not far from him.

He didn’t want to escape any more and couldn’t struggle. He was just a Taiyi immortal. How could he escape from these big Luo immortals.

There was a sudden cry behind him

“My Lord! I know where there are people. I’ll take you. Can you let me go? ”

With a scream, the man was probably gone!

At this time, the sound of sea tide came from the blood pool, which rang through the whole hailincheng!

“This is a grand event of our family! It is also a grand event of the whole seaside city! It’s a great honor for us to step into the realm of Immortal Emperor! ”

“Don’t run away again! As long as we achieve the throne, we will not forget your efforts today! ”

“Ha ha ha!”

The roar of the sea tide spread throughout the city!

There was a ray of despair in the eyes of countless monks!

He! Is he going to step into the Immortal Emperor?

Xianzun peak?

No wonder!

No wonder they can’t break the ban of this city!

This is actually the pen of xianzun’s peak!

His so-called achievement of the Immortal Emperor should only rely on some strange secret method?

When the tide falls!

At the edge of that pool of blood, there were countless monks captured by them. Although their accomplishments were still there, they had no capital to resist in front of a large number of Luo Jinxian!

Standing by the blood pool, the monks couldn’t help shaking their legs!

They know that maybe that pool of blood will be their last place to belong!

The tide is floating over the blood pool!

A purple light slowly fell into the blood pool from the magic weapon!

In an instant! A stench came out!

The monks vomited again and again!

They are no strangers to the stench!

It’s the smell of rotten bodies!

People looked at the pool of blood

How many lives have been filled in here!

Moreover, what is more annoying than the stench is the strong evil spirit floating on the blood pool!

Just inhale a wisp, some friars with low accomplishments began to twitch!

Looking at this scene, Haichao was laughing: “your companions, parents and children may have made efforts for my road to becoming emperor! Are you going to let their efforts go in vain? ”

“Jump into the blood pool! Make this seat! With your relatives and friends! ”

“Madman! Madman! ” Someone shouted and wanted to stand up, but the next moment he was directly cut off by the big Luo Jinxian beside him!

“I don’t want it! I don’t want it! ”

“I don’t want to die…”

Since the city rose from the ground, the cry in the city has never dissipated

“This is the emperor’s order. Do you want to disobey it?”

“I fought with you!” Suddenly, a Taiyi immortal burst up: “since it is difficult to escape death after all, Chen should also take a cushion!”

“Bang!”

A Taiyi Jinxian explodes!

Although the movement is loud, it is still suppressed by those cries!

“Die! And die worthy! Ah! ”

“Boom!”

Several people burst their accomplishments in succession, but there was no fluctuation on Haichao’s face!

Now the whole city is under his control. He doesn’t care about a few lives!

The self explosion of several people also caused a small riot!

A middle-aged man saw that the guard in black stepped back!

His heart is cruel!

He grabbed a young man behind him with one hand, threw him out and shouted, “son! Take this opportunity! Go! ”

The young man didn’t react at all. He had been thrown hundreds of feet away!

When he looked back, he found that the man in black who had just stood behind them stepped out and was directly in his father’s chest! instantaneous! The middle-aged man burst a blood mist on his chest and his vitality was cut off.

“Father!” The young man shouted angrily!

But with his father’s instructions, he still gritted his teeth and left

However, when he just turned around, Liang Feifan suddenly stretched out a finger and pierced his eyebrows!

The young man fell.

And this riot also caused a trace of anger in Haichao’s heart!

At that moment, he clapped it with one hand!

A piece of land directly fell down below and became a place for thousands of people to bury their bones!

“What are you waiting for! As long as you are obedient, we only need 100000 people, gather 100000 people, and the rest can leave their lives! ”

Hearing the speech, the edge of the blood pool suddenly became silent!

Some people looked at the friars who were weaker than themselves and began to calculate in their hearts.

Some people hold their lover and whisper in her ear

“Old city Lord!” At this time, an old man stood up and looked at the tide on the blood pool: “I wish one life for one life. Please let my daughter go!”

When the voice fell, the old man jumped directly to the blood pool

However, as soon as he stepped out, he seemed to encounter some resistance. His body was suddenly shaken back a few steps and returned directly to his daughter.

“Dad! Don’t go… “The woman immediately hugged the old man’s arm and cried.

The old man looked confused. What had just pushed him back?

“Sir, don’t try to die. Introduce your daughter to me and I’ll keep you alive. How about it?”

Suddenly, a cheap voice came from the sky and rang through the square.

Everyone in the audience could not help trembling!

When I looked up, I saw two people and a dog lying on a roof, with an extremely bad smile on their faces and winking at everyone.

chapters.title: Chapter 1627
chapters.body:
Chapter 1627

Chapter 1627

C.1627

“Then… Who is that?”

“Wait, it seems that King Wei Wu and elder Duan Jiude are the people of the fried heaven Gang!”

“Who are the teenagers around them?”

“It seems that they killed the son of the old city Lord and spread rumors in the city. How dare they show up now?”

All the people’s comments were heard everywhere, which also attracted the attention of the sea tide!

“You killed my son?” The tide stared at them.

However, Xu que has determined his realm. Naturally, without fear, he directly stood up and shouted, “old miscellaneous Mao! It’s just the middle rank of xianzun. You dare to dream of stepping into the realm of Xiandi. Are you thinking of farting? ”

The sea tide sneered and didn’t answer Xu Ke at all!

Just a big Luo Jinxian is not worth seeing!

At the moment, the monks below finally felt Xu’s cultivation!

He is a great Luo Jinxian. Where does his courage come from!

At the moment when Xu que solved Tianmen xianzun, the old guy jumped out. Everyone’s attention fell on Haichao. Few people knew about Xu Que’s second killing of xianzun.

The hope they had just raised dissipated in an instant!

He dares to provoke the old city Lord! The old city Lord didn’t take him to heart, but Liang Feifan couldn’t turn a blind eye!

“Thief! Die! ” With a move in mind, Liang Feifan stepped out of the air and directly killed Xu que!

However!

Don’t wait for Xu Wei to do it!

“Boom!”

An explosion sounded! Floating in mid air, the sea suddenly shook the city!

The prohibition just repaired by the tide is broken again!

A giant warhead with a diameter of 20 inches drilled out of the ground. The target is Liang Feifan who is working towards Xu que!

“What is this!” Liang Feifan was stunned and stopped him directly!

“Boom!”

Suddenly!

The warhead exploded twice!

Directly push Liang Feifan into the air!

“Bang!” Another loud noise! A gorgeous fireworks exploded in the sky, but the smell

Everyone frowned slightly!

Two dogs grinned: “it’s worthy of adding the shell of God’s gold holy thing. It’s cow force!”

At the moment, Liang Feifan exudes a rotten stench, and still comes out of the stomach of a ten thousand year old dog, especially the smell of stinky tofu full fermentation

He noticed a foreign object at the corner of his mouth and instinctively stretched out his tongue

Seeing this scene, people couldn’t help exclaiming at the strength of the big man!

Anyone can see what just exploded, and he dares to lick it!

But at this time, someone in the crowd shouted, “the prohibition is broken! Run! ”

As soon as his voice fell, he found that his body began to twitch

It completely cut off its vitality before it had time to respond!

Everyone looked at the tide! If you can have such means, it must be the old city Lord!

At the moment, the tide is staring at the two people and a dog on the roof!

If they are just ordinary Luo Jinxian, they don’t have to care!

But now it seems that they are the people who have just broken their ban!

They have all appeared in Hailin City, but they can still use that kind of strange shells to break their prohibitions. We can see the means!

If you want to finish the sacrifice with peace of mind, you must first solve the two people and one dog!

“You have a lot of courage, this seat…”

“Ben, you’re paralyzed!” Xu que scolded angrily and forced Wang Quan to blow out directly!

The endless prestige will not make the onlookers below stunned!

How is that possible!

This kind of prestige is actually sent out by a big Luo Jinxian?

It’s the old city Lord. I’m afraid his power is just like this?

The sound of gas explosion resounded through the sky!

In a short ten breath time, Haichao and Xu que have fought for dozens of rounds!

“Is he really a great Luo Jinxian?”

Suddenly, someone remembered a thing!

“You say that this young man is not the one who helped Xu Kuang in the bombing of heaven in jinghecheng?”

When they heard this, everyone was stunned!

Why don’t they remember the name Xu Ke?

That’s the only one who has let Tianmen eat shriveled in so many years!

What kind of power is this bombing Gang!

He not only has experts like the mighty king and Duan Jiude, but also has a Tianjiao like Xu Ke.

This moment! Haichao finally faced up to the boy in front of him: “you’re very good!” Nonsense! ” Xu que not only responded to a sentence, but also responded to a full load of forced King fist, directly beating the tide away! However, this is also Xu Ke’s ability to lose his mind by relying on the sea tide. Otherwise, he doesn’t have this strength when he hasn’t opened the state of madness! But the onlookers below didn’t know about it and looked up at the sky with great surprise Can he blow the old city Lord away? How is that possible! ” Liang Feifan was afraid at this moment. He was a teenager who could share equally with the city Lord. He just wanted to fight? suddenly! Liang Feifan shook his head again! incorrect! The strength of that young man can at best be comparable to the peak of the fairy king! The reason why the old city Lord took his move was just because he was distracted. After thinking about it, Liang Feifan breathed a sigh of relief! But let him fight Xu Ke now, but he doesn’t have the courage! The sea tide that was knocked out gently swept the position of the fist: “it’s a little strong! But not yet! ” Xu que didn’t answer. He flew forward again and forced the king’s armor to cover him That’s a lot of bullshit! ” When I rushed to kill, I still didn’t forget to scold! Although Haichao has xianzun strength, he has to distract himself from controlling the whole hailincheng. At this time, he can only draw with Xu Xu. After more than a thousand rounds! They still haven’t decided the outcome! But obviously, the smell of the sea tide has begun to weaken… “If this goes on, maybe the boy can win!” I’m afraid the old city Lord has other means! ” Some people on both sides are optimistic, but more people hope Xu Ke can win, at least so that they can survive. If Xu Ke dies, they really have no hope Ha ha ha! ” At the moment, Haichao has been broken by Xu que, but he is still laughing wildly: “boy, do you think you have a winning ticket?” Xu kuyang raised his fist and snorted coldly, “there’s so much nonsense!” Boy, you’re proud! Can force me to this extent! ” When the voice fell, they saw the tide and grabbed it with their hands out of thin air! The evil Qi in the blood pool began to condense! All over the sky! Within three breath, it turned into a small red pill and fell into the hands of the sea tide! The tide held the pill and swallowed it! instantaneous! All Taiyi immortals could not move directly suppressed by a manic evil Qi, that is, Da Luoxian felt the dryness and heat in his chest, which was very uncomfortable! This breath How is that possible? He’s recovered now? ” More than recovery, his breath is a little stronger than before! ” At this moment, a wisp of hope just ignited by everyone was dashed again

chapters.title: Chapter 1628
chapters.body:
Chapter 1628

Chapter 1628

C.1628

“What the hell is going on!”

A friar shouted reluctantly, “are we destined to die at the hands of this demon today?”

“I’m afraid the boy will die here!”

Someone sighed deeply. He couldn’t help looking up at Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude, who were still calm on the roof, and was stunned.

“Why didn’t King Wei Wu and elder Duan Jiude help the young man? If they do it at the same time, they may still have a chance! ”

The voice of discussion below sounds like a pleasant note to the sea tide. Although these scattered repairs are useless, they still have a good eye!

When the tide returned to its heyday, the corner of his mouth was slightly raised and looked straight at Xu Xu: “boy, do you still think you have a chance?”

“Why? Without a chance, do you still want to accompany me to climb the mountain? ”

Xu que sneered and waved his fist to fight with him again!

“Boom!”

One punch!

The tide flew out again, but at this moment, the smell of Xu deficiency was relatively weakened!

Whoosh!

He waved his big hand and directly felt out a small black stick!

“That thing…”

Someone recognized the little black stick in Xu Que’s hand!

“Yes, that’s him. That stick is the treasure that young Xia Xu used to kill xianzun in Hecheng. ”

“Kill immortal Zun with one blow? Really? ”

“Of course. Haven’t you heard of Xu’s deeds in jinghecheng?”

“So, do we still have a chance?”

“This is nature! I believe in young Xia Xu! ” The man nodded confidently.

Boom!

At the same time, the tide recovered from the injury with the help of the blood pool again! And the breath has steadily improved a little!

Even at this moment, his originally thin body seemed to be a little mellow, and his bald head began to grow a few strands of black hair with a faint fragrance. It should be soft

“Boy! This seat with blood pool is immortal! How about you take this seat! ”

Haichao laughed, but his heart was filled with resentment against Xu que!

These two times with the help of blood pool recovery, I’m afraid it will fill tens of thousands of lives again!

But now he doesn’t care about these anymore. He just wants to kill the smelly boy in front of him!

Then sacrifice the monks of the whole seaside city!

He must be able to step into the realm of the Immortal Emperor!

And most of the people who were captured around were already cold in their hearts!

Is there really such a secret?

If the blood pool does not dry, the spirit will not die!

Well… If this is true, I’m afraid even young Xia Xu, who has the ultimate magic weapon, will lose?

And if there is a treasure that can kill xianzun in one blow, I’m afraid the consumption is also extremely terrible!

If you don’t succeed in one blow, what should you do, young Xia Xu?

At this moment, a breath of despair lingered in everyone’s mind!

Xu Ke doesn’t care what others think.

He just gently stroked the little black stick in his hand and said, “really?”

At this moment, the sea tide also stared at the black stick in Xu Que’s hand. He could feel a breath that frightened him!

What kind of treasure is that?

It was when he took over the control of Hailin City from his father that he didn’t feel such a breath!

Is the black stick in his hand more powerful than his own magic weapon?

Thought of here, the tide is even more excited!

It seems that today he will not only prove the Immortal Emperor, but also get a top-grade treasure!

“Boy, if your confidence comes from the treasure in your hand, this seat can tell you not to do meaningless delusions!”

“If you present the treasure in your hand, maybe this seat will consider sparing your life!”

The idea of the sea tide is the same as that of the onlookers below. No matter how powerful the magic weapon is, as long as he avoids a blow, the boy must have no play to sing!

“Are you finished?” The voice fell. Xu que shook his head and put away the little black stick in his hand!

Although this stick can knock your opponent unconscious without difference, you have to take it by surprise.

I’ve just tried it. It’s difficult to suppress each other in speed, and I don’t have time to show my separation, so it’s impossible to be surprised. I have to find another opportunity.

“Put it away? Then why do you fight this seat? ”

The tide mocked again.

“I’m afraid you don’t know enough about my strength!”

Xu que sneered, and the murderous spirit suddenly swept away, and the whole void suddenly twisted.

Bang!

He rushed straight forward and punched out in a towering momentum.

“A mole ant who doesn’t know what to do!”

The tide snorted coldly and shot at the same time.

The two fought together again! Suddenly! The sea tide suddenly felt a terrible breath condensing slowly on Xu Ke! The people who have been watching the war below also stared at Xu que with a surprised look on their face How powerful is this momentum! ” If you say that young Xia Xu is an immortal, I will believe it now! ” People are not blind! Although the young man above the sky is only a great Luo Jinxian, he has immortal power. What a talent! What a pity! Without that pool of blood, they believe that the tide will not be Xu’s opponent! But the world of immortals is so cruel! People only respect the strong! Respect only the facts! Even though the sea tide is ready to kill them, they still feel that the sea tide has a better chance of winning the war. When the tide sensed that momentum, it couldn’t help retreating a few steps Boy, your strength is recognized by this seat! If you like, we are willing to accept you as the closing disciple! When we succeed in preaching the Immortal Emperor, you are the Immortal Emperor’s biography! You can lead the emperor’s identity across xianyuanzhou! ” The tide is not afraid, but really takes a fancy to Xu’s lack of strength! Everyone was surprised at the speech, but they thought it was reasonable! With Xu’s lack of such talents, even the Immortal Emperor will look up, not to mention the tide that has not yet become the Immortal Emperor? And what Haichao said, he will have a chance to become emperor! That will be the most dazzling person in the younger generation! I’m afraid only fairy Yurou can compare with it? Such temptations! If they change, I’m afraid they can’t refuse! Especially now Xu que is at a disadvantage. As long as he agrees to this condition, he can not only save his life, but also become a biography of the Immortal Emperor! Therefore, everyone feels that their hope is completely extinct! But they didn’t notice! When the tide kept blowing there, six flames of different colors had been born on Xu’s hand! The dangerous smell just now came from the colorful flames in his hands! However, although this breath is extremely terrible, I’m afraid it can’t do much harm to the sea tide. Looking at Xu que, he still didn’t stop! The tide is completely angry! I put down my body to give him a chance, but this son doesn’t know how to cherish it Since I am so ignorant of good and evil, I will not cherish talent again! ” At the moment, the different colors of fire in Xu Que’s hands have been kneaded by him into a strange and charming fire lotus. The fire lotus is filled with the idea of killing, which is a bit stronger than before Young Xia Xu, I’m afraid I’m going to fight the tide! ” A monk sighed in a low voice Is this to take personal risks and find a way out for us? ” What can we do! You can let young Xia Xu do this… “He said, and he couldn’t help sobbing:” young Xia Xu! You will always live in our hearts! ” Live your brother-in-law, shut up if you can’t speak! ” However, at this time, Xu que suddenly turned his head and scolded, and suddenly threw out the fire lotus in his hand! But the fire lotus didn’t float to anyone, but directly fell to the blood pool in the middle of the city No! ” The sea tide just reacted at this time. His face changed in an instant and roared in horror Boom! ” With a deafening noise, the whole blood pool within a hundred miles of the pool exploded instantly, and all the blood evaporated wildly… In a few seconds, the whole blood pool dried up completely, leaving only an abyss Patter! ” At this time, Xu que dug his nose, directly popped up and hit the sea tide’s face full of absentmindedness and stupidity, and joked: “are you still crying? Huh? A broken blood pool. You haven’t finished yet. Can you play well now

chapters.title: Chapter 1629
chapters.body:
Chapter 1629

Chapter 1629

C.1629

At the moment, the whole audience was silent.

Everyone is stupid!

I don’t even know how to shout!

So the blood pool evaporated?

The blood pool that makes Haichao proud can make him step into the realm of Immortal Emperor, so it’s completely gone?

“We, are we saved?”

People can’t believe it. Up to now, they can’t believe it’s true to see this scene in front of them!

“It should be… Right?” Some people are stunned.

Originally, they had fallen into complete despair, but they didn’t expect such a dramatic result in the end.

“We are saved!”

Someone suddenly cheered and shouted!

But the next moment, his whole body suddenly collapsed and dissipated into a wisp of smoke in the world.

See! Everyone was stunned before they reacted!

Although the blood pool has been solved by young Xia Xu, there is a strong immortal in the field!

At this time, the tide was already furious.

The achievements of the three generations of the Haijia family, which took tens of thousands of years, were destroyed in this way!

“Ah!”

He roared and roared, and the horror of killing filled the whole audience, shaking countless monks coughing up blood.

“Old city Lord!”

Liang Feifan looked at the crazy old city owner and chattered.

He knows that the boy is definitely dead!

Now that the blood pool is destroyed, it means that the old city Lord’s dream of becoming emperor is broken. He doesn’t need to be distracted to control the prohibition of the city!

How could the young man be an opponent for the immortal Zun middle rank who made every effort?

“You… You…”

The sea tide was so angry that he trembled all over. He stretched out his hand and pointed at Xu que, but he was stunned that he didn’t scold a complete sentence!

The smell of the tide burst in an instant! Countless houses were crushed to powder by the smell of immortality!
