At this moment, people finally realized what is xianzun, and also felt what is xianzun’s anger and blood splashing hundreds of steps!

But now it seems that the strength of the tide is at least ten times stronger than before!

Whew!

When the sea tide roared, a streamer came out of his mouth. It solidified in mid air and turned into a sharp blade, which swept directly towards Xu Ke.

Xu que joked and smiled, his figure retreated, his fuzzy figure flashed and appeared not far away.

The next moment, his heart moved!

Black hair began to turn silver!

Two golden red lightning arcs twinkled in his eyes!

“This…”

“This momentum…”

People were stunned, as if they had an illusion!

Why do you feel that the momentum of the great Luo Jinxian is more surging than the sea tide?

However, the most shocking thing is the tide!

He never thought that the strength of a great Luo Jinxian could reach such a point!

But how could he be frightened by the momentum of a small Luo Jinxian!

Besides, his anger has already burned out his reason!

Even if he felt the strength of the great Luo Jinxian, he still didn’t think about it and rushed straight towards Xu Xu!

Xu que, who has entered the state of crazy devil, is full of hostility at the moment and directly welcomes him!

The full load of forced King’s fist blows out again and again!

The whole space was shaking!

In mid air, it even began to burst into void cracks, overflowing bursts of void wind blades.

“Ah…”

At this time, the tide raised the rung in front of him, but his two arms suddenly burst into ashes. The piercing pain made him cry out.

“Hiss!”

The whole audience took a breath in an instant.

This is the transition between the two.

But this seems to be the beginning?

Haichao City Lord… His arms are broken?

“Is this the peak state of young Xia Xu?” Someone said with a dull face.

“Gollum!” Someone swallowed a mouthful of saliva and his voice trembled: “should it be? But this… Is too strong? ”

“Just two punches! Just beat a Fairy Statue away? ”

“ADA!”

Third punch!

Xu Wei didn’t leave his hand. This time he directly rushed out with his fist, just like a sword shadow, running through the chest of the sea tide!

Feel the pain of the body and the gradual passage of vitality in the body!

The tide slowly regained a sense You… “He looked at Xu Ke blankly and opened his mouth to say something Stop talking. Villains die of talking too much. The more you talk, the faster you die, you know? ” Xu Xu said, calmly pulling his arm back from his chest, followed by his body and retreated quickly. Haichao lowered his head a little stiff and looked at his chest where he had broken a hole. I don’t know when a charming six color fire lotus has been put You are special… “He stared at Xu Kuang in a moment and looked at him in horror. Boom! The next moment, a terrible explosion sounded. There were ripples in the void, and the whole person and the spirit were swallowed up by the blazing flame That’s it? “Immortal statue middle level?” Xu Xu came back from thousands of miles away, sneering and mocking, whoosh! At this time, two figures rushed down the ground You two, stop it! ” Xu que looked down and shouted angrily. Just when Haichao was killed, he saw several special storage rings falling to the ground from a distance. The two dogs didn’t see anyone when they were fighting with Duan Jiude. It’s really quick to collect the booty now You dare to try my booty. I’ll sacrifice you two directly. ” Xu que warned. However, the second dog son looked up and shouted nervously, “brother lack, don’t think of the booty. There is a terrible existence coming!” What terror exists? Don’t you see that Ben forced saint to solve one? “Even if you come again…” Xu kuanniu said coarsely, revealing his divine sense Lying trough! ” Sure enough, several breaths are approaching rapidly. The key is that one of them seems to be dozens of times stronger than the sea tide, and the breath of the other two is no weaker than the sea tide. This NIMA… It’s hard to fix! Xu Que’s face coagulated immediately. These immortals are not easy to fight. The Zhengqi seal magic Sutra has reached its limit. Most of them still rely on psychological tactics to blow up his blood pool and confuse him. Otherwise, they can’t end the battle so easily. At this moment, there are two xianzun middle orders comparable to the sea tide, and the terrible smell is definitely the existence of xianzun high orders. Make a wool. Must slip! But this city… Xu Ke hesitated. This is a good baby Brother Ke, what else are you looking at? Run away! ” Er Gouzi has urged, and the transmission array has been engraved and started Alas, what a pity! ” Xu que sighed and stepped into the transmission array depicted by two dogs. Whoosh! With a white light, the party disappeared in an instant. But the next second, there was another flash of white light. Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude appeared in place again Finally succeeded in tricking that… “Two dogs just grinned. Suddenly a hand came over from behind and directly pressed its dog’s head What are you kidding? Huh? ” Xu’s voice directly frightened Er Gouzi’s legs and almost soaked his urine Well, brother Kuang, misunderstanding, this is definitely a misunderstanding. In a hurry, the God Zun engraved the transmission array wrong. ” The second dog son hurriedly explained. Duan Jiude looked up at the sky and looked as if it was none of his business. Xu que gave them a playful look, waved his hand and put away several storage rings that fell to the ground after the sea tide died. Sample, play this bad trick with me? too young too simple! Too young Let’s go! ” Xu Wei threw out an array disk himself, urged Wen Luo and stepped into it Brother Ke, wait for me! ” Two dogs and Duan Jiude hurriedly shouted to keep up and swept over. Then in the dull eyes of the people, the noisy two people and a dog really left

chapters.title: Chapter 1630
chapters.body:
Chapter 1630

Chapter 1630

C.1630

A moment later, the sea was outside the city. After a burst of distortion of the void, three men in black suddenly stepped out of it.

Seeing the sea city floating in the air and the blood spirit above, the three frowned and rushed to the sea city!

However, at this time, only a group of monks who survived the disaster were lying on the ground thinking about life in a daze.

The arrival of the three people in black immediately raised the hearts of the people who had just put down their voices.

The three did not have any nonsense. They grabbed someone and asked a little. They soon learned what had happened in Hailin City.

“So, that fried day helped Xu vacancy run away?”

The three suddenly looked cold.

They were ordered to hunt down Xu que, but they were a little late.

That guy just killed all the City owners of Hailin City, including the old city owner.

“My Lord! I’m the steward of the city Lord’s residence. The fried sky Gang deceived people so much that they…… ”

At this time, Liang Feifan rushed out and knelt in front of three men.

Liang Feifan was crushed to ashes by an invisible force before he could finish his words.

The eyes of the three men in black were cold.

Haichao wants to use some evil method to sprint into the immortal empire.

This secret is not a secret for Tianmen for a long time.

It’s just that the top wants to see if he can succeed, so it hasn’t paid any attention.

But now Haichao is dead, and hailincheng is subordinate to the forces under the administration of Tianmen. If they don’t make a statement and wait for the news to spread, it will have a significant impact on the reputation of Tianmen.

Liang Feifan, as the housekeeper of the Lord’s mansion of Hailin City, can just use it to open a knife.

“Six elders, what should I do now?” Then one of them asked.

The leading xianzun strongman frowned slightly and said in a deep voice: “Xu que appeared in Jinghe city before. A few days later, he came to the nearest Hailin City. It seems that he has a planned action!”

“You go to Yangyong city with Chengfeng, and I go to Rongtai City alone! Once met, there is no amnesty for killing! ”

“Yes!”

Ignoring other monks in Hailin City, the three turned into a virtual shadow again and swept away into the distance.

A few days later.

Rongtai City, which is closest to Hailin City, is already full of rumors about the tianbang sect.

“What are you doing with old rotten sesame seeds? I heard the latest news. They not only planed the ancestral grave of the city Lord Hailin, but also killed people!”

“More than that? It seems that they also directly bombed the city near the sea, and finally ran away in front of the three immortals of Tianmen! ”

“This time, Tianmen really lost its face!”

When people were discussing, the six elders also sat aside.

But he didn’t argue about anything. Now he just wants to get information about the bombers.

Only catch Xu deficiency back, then all rumors will be broken!

But he had been sitting in the restaurant all afternoon, but he heard a few things back and forth.

Someone mentioned fairy Yurou, but he secretly killed her!

Since then, it seems that someone has noticed something, and no one dares to mention it again!

Just as he was about to leave, someone suddenly said, “lying in the trough, it seems that something has happened to the fried heaven Gang again! The ancestral grave of Wen yunzong in Jiang zuocheng has been planed! ”

“That technique! That speed! Almost as like as two peas in Lincheng before. ”

“Isn’t it? People come from Tianmen. How dare they be so arrogant? ”

“Isn’t it? And according to the people of Jiang zuocheng, it seems that in addition to the dog named king Weiwu, there is also Duan Jiude and Xu Ke! ”

“This name really matches them!”

“What do you say?”

“Xu Ke, Duan Jiude, and a dog. Doesn’t that add up to a wicked dog? Look at what they did… ”

Hearing the speech, everyone suddenly realized it. Don’t say it. It’s really appropriate!

And when the six elders heard them talking about it, they just held a mouthful of old blood in their chest!

He listened to the description of those people and learned about Xu’s lack of combat power, and the two he led were also the middle rank of xianzun. For their safety, he let them come to yangyongcheng together and come here alone!

If he had separated the two people at that time, he might have caught Xu Ke now!

He clenched his fist tightly, clenched his teeth and whispered, “wicked dog!”

A few days later, the six elders finally rushed to Jiang zuocheng!

According to Xu Ke’s previous actions, they should stay here for a few days. They still have a great chance to catch up with them!

However, he had just arrived in Jiang zuocheng and heard the news of the accident in Rongtai city!

Six elders almost spit out a mouthful of old blood on the spot. He heard a helpless news. According to the calculation of time, it seemed that Xu Ke and his forefoot had just left Rongtai City, and they rushed to Rongtai city! And the other side. After hearing the news, the two middle-level strong immortals in Yangyong city had already hurried to Rongtai city to meet elder Liu. In their opinion, there are six elders in charge, and the wicked dog can’t run away! As a result, as soon as they arrived at Rongtai City, the news of being harmed by immoral dogs began to spread from Yangyong city! After the three immortals of Tianmen met, they stared and didn’t know what to say. This wave was fooled by Xu Que and them. It’s always a step slower every time, but there’s no way. This wicked dog is a dog. I can’t guess where they will make trouble next. So they can only catch up behind. Whether they come or not, they have to go and have a look. And these tens of days. The story of the wicked dog spread almost all over Qingzhou. Many cities were poisoned by him. The key is that people also slowly find a key point. It seems that all the cities involved in the accident are related to Tianmen. It seems that the three sects of Hecheng are all subordinate sects of Tianmen, while Hailin City seems to be under the private control of a big man of Tianmen… The meaning of this game is too obvious A few days later, the three immortals of Tianmen were sitting in a tea shop in Yangyong city Where did this wicked dog come from? Why haven’t you heard of them in Qingzhou before? ” Does your excellency mean that they come from other big states? ” No, I guess they’re from Outland! You should all have heard that there will be a Buddha Kingdom trial in the Buddha kingdom in the near future? The one that only opens once in ten thousand years! ” I’ve heard of this, but what does it have to do with immoral dogs? ” Where is the most chaotic in the seven regions of xianyuanzhou? Netherworld! Right? Think about the behavior style of immoral dogs… “Maybe they came from the nether world and passed Wudu. They didn’t know whether to live or die to find trouble in Tianmen.” With that, he couldn’t help taking a sip from his tea cup: “otherwise, do you think people from other regions dare to do so?” When hearing this, the six elders suddenly stood up and walked to the talking man: “do you mean they will go to the Buddha region to participate in the test?” The man nodded: “this possibility is great!” The sixth elder looked back at the other two immortal zuns. Then, the two stood up at the same time, walked out of the tea shop directly with elder Liu and marched towards the West After revision, I finally went through this part of the manuscript as a whole. It’s a little urgent. If there is a typo or bug, please point it out. I’ll revise it later. Unknowingly, it’s dawn. I’ll deliver it at ten o’clock first. When I wake up, I’ll see more changes and continue to explode! Finally, ask for monthly tickets and recommended tickets! Thank you!]

chapters.title: Chapter 1631
chapters.body:
Chapter 1631

Chapter 1631

C.1631

North of Wudu District, Liucheng.

Xu Que and Duan Jiude appeared outside the city gate.

At this time, they had left Qingzhou and rushed here directly.

There’s no special purpose. It’s just to bring disaster to several cities in Qingzhou… Bah, no, it’s all justified.

So Qingzhou was not worth staying, so he wandered to the north of Wudu district and happened to meet this Liucheng.

However, the combination of “immoral dogs” of the fried sky gang has spread far beyond Qingzhou and throughout Wudu.

However, if two people and a dog walk on the road, they will be forcibly stopped to check whether it is a rumored immoral dog!

Xu Xu naturally knows that the Tianmen gate is real. We should find them at all costs.

I simply went to Liucheng to inquire about the news. I didn’t take Er Gouzi with me. I threw him directly into a broken temple in the suburbs.

“Sure enough, the rumors of the world are untrue. We are clearly upholding chivalry and justice, but they discredit us and say that we are ‘immoral dogs’ to bring disaster to the world. Now, without two dogs, no one will point at us at all. ”

After Duan Jiude entered the city, his face was filled with a smile and sighed.

From entering the city to now, pedestrians come and go in the streets, but no one recognizes them anymore.

There were a few nuns who couldn’t help looking at Xu when they passed by.

After all, it is not common for Luo Jinxian to look so handsome and so young.

Xu que, as always, kept a high and cold attitude, turned a blind eye to the admiration of all women, and went straight ahead without squinting.

I Xu lacked one heart to the way, not to mention the already beautiful women. They can never be approached by women again.

“Boy, are you too realistic? These nuns are clearly interested in you. They are just ugly, fat and have more spots on their faces. You don’t even look at them? ” Duan Jiude could not help but make complaints about it.

“You can go!” Xu que stared.

“Look what you said. Isn’t it the same when you enter the room and turn off the light?” Duan Jiude shook his head.

Xu Ke was speechless in an instant. It’s still teacher Duan’s cow!

While chatting, they also unknowingly passed an inn and restaurant.

These places are often the best places to inquire about information.

However, before they took the initiative to go in and inquire about anything, the topic of discussion was already what they were interested in.

Without him.

The friars in the whole restaurant are discussing the bombing of the heaven Gang, and have different praise and criticism for the deeds of the wicked dog group.

Some people think they are good people, others think they are evil spirits. There are many rumors.

It was not until someone suddenly mentioned the “Buddha’s land test” that the topic was gradually taken away.

Xu Ke lost his interest in a moment. How much trouble it is to try something. It’s better to visit more cities. How fast and fierce it is to harvest the experience and force value!

“Taoist friend, what is the Buddhist trial?” At this time, Duan Jiude, who was nearby, came forward and asked on his own initiative.

When they looked around, they found that it was a strange face, but they didn’t feel strange.

The geographical location of Liucheng is just at the edge of Wudu region. Monks from other regions often pass here. Liucheng will be taken as a temporary foothold.

“Taoist friends are too ignorant, aren’t they? Don’t you even know about the Buddhist trial? This is a once-in-a-million-year event in xianyuanzhou. It is said that in that secret land, there is likely to be a chance to inherit the ancient Buddha. ”

“Alas, but with our strength, I’m afraid we can’t get in, let alone the inheritance of ancient Buddha.”

“It’s a pity. It’s said that the female elders of Taiyi sect will also go. It would be a good thing to see those beauties with their own eyes.”

“Huh?”

Xu que, who was not interested, suddenly stared straight.

Too easy?

Isn’t this Su Yunlan’s ancestral gate in Huoyuan state?

“Several Taoist friends, I wonder who created Taiyi sect? Who is the leader today? ”

Xu que immediately came forward and asked with an arched hand.

Hearing the sound, the people looked up and looked at Xu Ke, and scolded him. He was really handsome.

However, someone responded enthusiastically: “Taiyi sect was founded by several girls. The leader is Su Yunlan. She is good friends with several female elders in the sect.”

what the fuck!

Xu que was immediately excited.

After sparing such a long way, I heard about Su Yunlan and her.

“Alas, it’s rumored that they are all famous beauties in xianyuanzhou. Unfortunately, their strength is not strong. However, thanks to the protection of Tianmen, they were able to establish Taiyi sect and have a foothold in Wudu.”

Someone said with emotion, his face clearly showed envy.

Xu que was stunned.

Tianmen protects Su Yunlan and them?

The man laughed at the speech: “yes, to be exact, it should be the shelter of fairy Yurou. After all, that one was once the old friend between leader Su and elder Ji qiuya. The relationship is very close. Who dares to provoke Taiyi sect is equivalent to provoking fairy Yurou.”

“It may have been like this before, but in recent years, the feather fairy doesn’t seem to have been to too easy school.”

“I heard that fairy Yurou has been practicing in seclusion, so she has gradually stopped asking about Taiyi sect.”

“Yes, so it’s too easy. It’s a little difficult now.”

“Maybe they just want to find a way to live in the Buddhist realm?”

The people discussed one after another.

Xu Xu couldn’t help frowning as he listened.

Xiaorou used to be very close to Su Yunlan, but she stopped asking questions later?

No!

With xiaorou’s character, even if it is amnesia, it is impossible

No, it must be Tianmen people behind this!

It seems that this time I really have to go to the Buddhist realm for a trial. I happen to be reunited with Su Yunlan and them.

Thinking of this, Xu’s hands trembled with excitement.

Left hand: “we are finally free.”

Right hand: “yes, I’m so tired during this time!”

Not long after, Xu que left the tavern.

Duan Jiude didn’t follow and left. He still gathered in the crowd and boasted with everyone.

Xu que was too lazy to wait for him. He went straight out of the city and returned to the broken temple where Er Gouzi stayed.

As a result, Duan Jiude came back directly on a transmission array just after his front foot arrived.

“NIMA… There’s a conveyor array without me?” Xu que immediately scolded.

“Well, haven’t you been with the old man all the time?” Duan Jiude was stunned. He didn’t know when Xu Ke left.

“Boy, Duan Jiude, what delicious food did you two bring to our God?” At this time, two dogs jumped out of the corner and looked forward to it.

Until he saw Xu Que and Duan Jiude empty handed, er Gouzi realized that he was thinking of farting.

Expect these two people to go out and bring good food back?

Dream!

“Don’t be superficial. Let’s talk about business. There’s a Buddhist trial recently. You can do a wave of things. I heard there’s an ancient Buddha inheritance!”

Xu que made a brief comment, and also said that the task of this trip was to meet Su Yunlan and them in addition to fishing for treasures.

Two dogs and Duan Jiude immediately put their hands together and said solemnly, “it seems that the Buddha is destined for me!”

“However, if we are going to the Buddhist domain this time, we have to leave the last surprise for Tianmen?” Duan Jiude suddenly proposed a sentence.

Xu Que and ER Gouzi looked at each other.

“What does Mr. Xu think?” Obviously, er Gouzi also wants to do it.

Anyway, after running away, there is no need to be afraid of Tianmen’s pursuit.

Xu Wei hesitated for a moment. With their professionalism, he didn’t waste much time, so he nodded and agreed.

Only this time, they not only planed the ancestral grave of a sect belonging to Tianmen in Liucheng, but also left a little treasure.

I hope the dog can stay when we step on the door

When Xu Que and others left Liucheng for a long time, Tianmen immortal Zun hurried to come.

The patriarch of that sect is crying with the thigh of Tianmen immortal.

“My Lord, that wicked dog really deceives people too much!”

The six elders, who have been chasing since Hailin City, have lost their temper for a long time now. They just sigh: “another step late! It seems that the news they have received before is correct. They are really ready to go to the Buddhist region. ”

Then he said to the Chengfeng behind him, “report this to the elder and ask him to send reinforcements as soon as possible.”

“Yes!”

“My Lord, one more thing!”

At this time, the sect leader spoke again: “although our ancestral grave was planed this time, the wicked dog seemed to go in a hurry and didn’t notice a dark space hidden under my grandfather’s grave.”

“Dark grid?” Six elders were stunned when they heard the speech.

“Good!” The patriarch immediately took out an old secret script and presented it with both hands: “this dharma formula must be the most precious treasure left by my ancestors before it can be hidden under the dark grid.”

The sixth elder glanced at the cover of the script: “Zheng Qi seals the devil Sutra, such a strange Dharma formula name, are you sure it’s the treasure?”

“I’ll tell you, sir. I’m quite sure. Because the younger generation has tried, the cultivation bottleneck that had been stagnant for many years has been improved in just a few days. This is extraordinary. ” The patriarch said excitedly.

“If so, why did your ancestors hide it under the tomb but not leave it to your descendants? What’s more… Why don’t I know your ancestors had strong men? ” The six elders sneered with disdain Adults don’t know! ” The patriarch always lowered his head and explained: “I heard the elders of the clan mention that this ancestor was unlucky in his old age. He risked his death to rob a zhibora to continue his life, but in the end, he was too seriously injured to return to heaven. We thought our ancestors didn’t succeed, but now it seems that the younger ancestor should succeed. Unfortunately, he didn’t have time to practice… “Oh?” After hearing this, the six elders became a little interested and took over the book of Zhengqi sealing magic Scripture. After a little reading, the six elders’ eyes brightened in an instant. They were completely attracted by the content, and even couldn’t help trying to run the immortal yuan force in their body. A moment later, the six elders slowly closed the secret realm and threw it back to the patriarch. They said calmly, “this method is really good. Take a good understanding and practice. Maybe you will have a chance to enter our Tianmen in the future.” With that, the six elders turned and left directly Thank you, my Lord! ” The patriarch kowtowed and thanked them, and congratulated them on leaving. He held the book of righteousness sealing the devil Sutra tightly in his hand, and his heart was ecstatic. He knew that he had guessed correctly and was recognized by the six elders, which was enough to show that this formula was the best treasure. And he also noticed just now that while the six elders read the script, they also burned the whole Dharma formula with a jade slip. So the last sentence that the six elders said before leaving actually implied that he had made meritorious contributions to the Dharma and had a great chance to enter the gate of heaven in the future Wow, did the monthly ticket list fall from No. 2 to No. 3? I am embarrassed! It seems that we have to take it easy in the future. We can’t break out.] PS: recommend a new book of good friends I eat monsters in the town demon division this is a world full of monsters and dangers. At this point, the number of young demons crossing the town of Qin Pianli is the highest. Looking at strange painted skins, cunning fox demons, terrible snake spirits, and evil demons and ghosts pretending to be god Buddha… Qin Shaoyou salivated for food. Close the door and boil the water. Let’s have dinner today!]

chapters.title: Chapter 1632
chapters.body:
Chapter 1632

Chapter 1632

C.1632

Dozens of days later.

Xianyuanzhou Buddha region.

As the news of the trial in the Buddhist realm spread, monks from all regions rushed to come.

Although there are not many places, there are often many grand ceremonies or auctions before such secret places are held, and many treasures will appear in the market. If you are lucky, you may be able to pick up a leak.

When the friars from Wudu came to the Buddha region, they had to boast after tea, more or less passing on the deeds of the evil dogs of the fried sky gang.

When the six elders and Zuo Yue arrived at the Buddhist domain, almost everyone knew the deeds of the wicked dog.

Listening to the shocked appearance when they were talking, six elders and Zuo Yue were so angry that they clenched their teeth!

If I could arrive a step earlier in Liucheng, I would be able to stop Xu from missing them, but every time it was a little worse. It was really weird.

“How on earth did they do it?” Six elders are already on the edge of outbreak, gnashing their teeth.

Now I have just arrived at the Buddhist region, and the wicked dog seems to be missing. There is no movement at all.

At present, the Buddhist trial has not started, and I don’t know where the wicked dog will go first.

He has roughly two directions, one is the place where the auction will be held in the near future, and the other is the direction to the secret realm of Buddhism, but this makes the six elders fall into meditation.

Where should I go?

If you continue to let Zuo Yue go the same way with yourself, I’m afraid you’ll make a mistake again, and the wicked dog has successfully avoided a disaster.

But if you act separately, Zuo Yue’s strength

After thinking about it, the six elders had a choice.

He re recorded a copy of the book of righteousness sealing the devil and handed it to Zuo Yue.

“We’ll act separately during this trip. This secret method is extremely extraordinary. Take it back to good students for research. If you can cultivate it, you can at least have the strength of high-level immortal. In this way, you don’t have to be afraid of evil dogs.”

“Six elders, this…”

Zuo Yuexian was stunned.

The six elders passed on such a powerful secret method to themselves. It is clear that they value themselves very much and want to cultivate them into confidants!

Soon, his face was filled with joy and immediately shouted, “thank you, six elders!”

“There’s no need to talk about this between you and me. With such a secret skill, you and I act separately. Be sure to solve the wicked dogs before they enter the Buddha’s territory, otherwise they will also run into the Buddha’s territory. I’m afraid it will be difficult to find them again. ” The sixth elder waved his hand and said faintly.

“Zuo Yue understands!”

Zuo Yue immediately responded.

He soon separated from the six elders and swept directly in one direction.

A few days later, he took the transmission array in several ancient cities one after another, and also inquired about the news of immoral dogs.

The result was unexpected, which really let him find out some clues.

Someone pointed out a direction and claimed to have seen two people and a dog there.

Without hesitation, Zuo Yue immediately swept out of the ancient city and rushed directly over a mountain forest in the distance, looking straight in a direction.

In recent days, he has also been studying the set of “Zheng Qi Feng Mo Jing” given by the six elders. The secret method is extremely overbearing, but it is very easy to practice. It is really a rare treasure.

However, once this method is used, the consumption is extremely large, so he doesn’t dare to try it easily.

However, he basically knows the secret method and has full confidence. If he meets an unscrupulous dog and uses this method himself, he will be able to win the other party easily.

So this time, he plans to catch up in person. At that time, he will bring the wicked dog back to the six elders, which will certainly make the six elders happy. At that time, he may reward more precious treasures.

Thinking of this, Zuo Yue couldn’t help getting excited.

He touched out a jade slip, which recorded the topography of the Buddha domain and the distribution of cities.

At the moment, Zuo Yue has roughly judged where they are going according to the way and direction of the wicked dogs.

“Zhenyuan city!”

Zuo Yue whispered, and a cold smile appeared on her face.

A magnificent murderous spirit swept away in an instant, setting off a huge movement in the mountains and forests.

Countless spirit beasts in the mountains were scared to hide in the cave, for fear that the powerful existence in the sky would attack them!

However, after a while, the momentum suddenly disappeared.

The figure in the air has already turned into streamer and swept away into the distance.

The next day, Zhenyuan city.

Two people and a dog were walking on the street. When pedestrians saw them, their faces changed and they gave way directly.

“Sleeping trough, why are those people avoiding us?” Two dogs can’t help but wonder.

“What do you say?” Xu que replied unhappily.

Although the reputation of immoral dogs is well-known in Wudu region, it will not have a great impact in Buddha region. Recently, rumors about them have spread in several nearby cities.

Originally, Xu Que and Duan Jiude planned to let Er Gouzi hide again, but Er Gouzi quit this time. They had to follow him out, shouting that they would never be recognized as long as they changed their appearance.

As a result, the so-called easy look of this product is to find a colorful beach pants to wear, and tie a red cloak behind it, so as to be as coquettish as possible.

It’s obviously not easy.

But Xu Ke thought for a while and didn’t stop it after all.

Anyway, they have already arrived at the Buddha kingdom. It’s nothing to make a high profile. It’s uncertain that the news can let Su Yunlan know that they have come to xianyuanzhou.

“Right!” Xu que couldn’t help echoing.

“Really? The God is so low-key that he can’t stop the king’s arrogance? ” The two dogs listened with pride and pride.

The dog shook immediately after it.

Boom!

Suddenly, a violent momentum surged over the sky and swept over.

“Lying trough!” Duan Jiude immediately exclaimed.

Er Gouzi still has this skill?

“What happened?”

“Such a powerful momentum must at least be a strong man above the fairy king!”

Many monks in the city were also startled by this momentum and looked surprised.

“No, not two dogs!”

Xu Ke frowned, this breath… He had met it!

“Shit, it’s Tianmen again!”

Xu que immediately shouted abuse.

Two dogs and Duan Jiude were stunned, and immediately reacted.

“Sleeping trough! Dunima has run to the Buddha territory. Why are you still chasing? ”

“Crazy!”

The two dogs were swearing, and the light of array patterns had flickered under their feet.

“Fried heaven Gang wicked dog, this time we’ll see how you escape!”

Over the sky, there was a shock.

Zuo Yue’s figure appeared with a joking look: “Zhenyuan city has been completely blocked by me. Do you want to run? Just try! ”

Both men and dogs frown

“Miss brother! This guy robbed you of your lines! Can you stand it? Go up and fuck him! ” Two dogs urged.

Xu lacked a corner of his mouth and scolded, “fart! Ben Pusheng has always been amiable and gentle. How can he say such vulgar words! ”

The three of them are professionals. Taking advantage of the time to speak coquettish words, the two dogs never stop at their feet and madly outline the rune mark.

Although there is only one middle-level immortal and strong man, who knows where the other two are hiding. If they play ambush, pretend to be pigs and eat tigers, it will be a loss of blood!

“How about dog two?” Xu que asked.

“Shit, no, this goods really sealed the city. The God’s transmission array failed!” Two dogs scolded.

“Sleeping trough, what shall we do now?” Duan Jiude frowned.

“The city is really closed, which means that the other two immortals may not be here!”

Xu que said with a smile. He looked up at the domineering left moon in the sky, took out the king forcing staff, and covered himself with sheet metal battle armor.

“Kill him!” Xu que said faintly, and his body swept directly into the air.

When everyone saw this, their faces changed.

“Lying trough, does this guy want to fight the immortal realm?”

“Just a big Luo Jinxian, where’s the courage?”

“Your pattern is small. That’s Xu Ke among the immoral dogs! With his strength, he can really fight xianzun, or even crush him! ”

“But why did they just want to escape?”

“Naturally, I don’t want to be hurt. Wicked dogs are positive characters! Moral model! ” Someone answered.

When they heard the speech, they immediately turned around and looked at it, and their faces crossed in an instant.

Nima, it was the shameless old man Duan Jiude who answered.

“Oh!”

At this time, the left moon on the sky sneered.

After tracking for so long, they already know the wicked dog like the back of their hand!

As long as the space is closed, they will never escape!

However, Xu que, who is wearing a gold armor, is indeed as rumored and has the strength to compete with xianzun!

But this time… My Zuo Yue is no longer an ordinary immortal, but has high-level immortal strength. How can you fight with me?

Boom!

A manic breath filled the sky from Zuo Yue in an instant!

In an instant, his black hair vaguely appeared in strands of silver and white, and the magnificent magic spirit swept wantonly around his body

“Eh?”

Xu que immediately stopped and looked at Zuo Yue in amazement.

“Ah, this…”

Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi were stunned You’ll die! ” At the same time, Zuo Yue already felt that her breath was soaring wildly, her tone became colder, and her self-confidence continued to burst! Many monks in the city became agitated What a terrible momentum. What’s this formula? ” It’s terrible. It seems that there is still magic spirit around it! ” Can’t it be a magic secret? ” Many people exclaimed. At the same time, their legs trembled under the suppression of this manic atmosphere! What a powerful strength! I’m afraid it’s at least comparable to the high-level immortal Boom! ” A muffled noise broke out in the cloud space, and the left moon’s big hand pressed forward. The void collapsed and distorted instantly Ha ha ha, I can’t help it. It’s special… Absolutely! ” Two dogs suddenly laughed, lying on the ground and hammering the floor madly Er Gouzi, don’t laugh… Pooh ha ha ha! ” Duan Jiude began to drink and scold two dogs with a straight face. As a result, he couldn’t help laughing on the spot How interesting! ” Xu lacked a smile on the corner of his mouth Xu Ke, do you have the strength of the strong xianzun in World War I? Oh, come, come and fight! ” In mid air, Zuo Yue directly jokingly hooked her fingers towards Xu vacancy, which was completely provocative You? You’re not qualified! I can kill you with a mouthful of water! ” Xu que shook his head and smiled. After that, he really pulled his mouth, spit directly and crossed in front of Zuo Yue. Then, under the confused gaze of the people, Xu que suddenly stretched out his fingers and began to count down Five! ” Four! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1633
chapters.body:
Chapter 1633

Chapter 1633

C.1633

“Three!”

Xu’s voice became louder and louder.

In the mid air, Zuo Yue’s momentum became more and more fierce, and there was no doubt that he was joking and mocking on his face!

“Two!”

“Boy, I’ll meet your last wish. When you count to one, I’ll finish you!” Zuo Yue sneered.

In full view of the public, he wanted to show his strong spirit. Finally, he took the wicked dog and became famous all over the world.

“OK, keep your word, 1.99, 1.98…”

Xu que began to count to two decimal places.

“You’re looking for death!”

The smile on Zuo Yue’s face suddenly closed, and her murderous spirit turned directly into a virtual shadow to rush to Xu que.

“Are you in such a hurry to die? In fact, I didn’t mean to tease you. I just wanted to let the saliva fly for a while… Oh, it seems that the time has come! ”

Xu Xu said and smiled.

“When death comes, you’re still talking nonsense… What?”

Zuo Yuegang rushed to Xu Que’s body and was preparing to make a move, but Xian Yuanli in her body suddenly began to be manic and disorderly.

As soon as his face changed, he immediately wanted to control and guide, but he found that with this intervention, the immortal yuan force in his body completely ran away, rampaged and completely out of control!

“No!”

The left moon instantly showed a frightened look on her face and roared loudly.

At the next moment, with a loud bang, Zuo Yue’s whole body exploded directly, turned into a large blood mist, scattered from the air, and completely bid farewell to his miserable life.

The audience suddenly fell into a dead silence, silent, and the dropping of needles could be heard.

Everyone is stupid and confused.

This… How is this possible?

A middle-level immortal even burst out with the strength of a high-level immortal. As a result, he fell and his bones didn’t exist?

The key is that Xu Ke doesn’t seem to have shot, just a mouthful of saliva?

Let the saliva fly for a while?

Nima, kill xianzun Daneng directly after flying?

“Wuhu, take off!”

At the same time, er Gouzi and Duan Jiude seemed to have expected all this, raised their arms and shouted excitedly.

“Shudder, help us with what?”

“Brothers and sisters of the Buddha Kingdom, let’s give a grand introduction to Xu Kuang of the fried heaven Gang, who combines beauty and talent, pretends to force and slaps in the face, sprays immortal Zun at the mouth, kicks Immortal Emperor, and charms thousands of girls and women. Let’s shout his name, Xu…… Kuan!”

This also made people react quickly from the state of absence, but they were still shocked and unbelievable.

One mouthful of saliva, second kill xianzun?

Isn’t all this really a dream?

It’s so terrible!

Soon, the voices around became warm.

Xu que looked at the increase of the installation force value of the system interface. He couldn’t help laughing and waved his hand: “you don’t need to be surprised. It’s just basic operation. Just have a mouth!”

Base… Basic operation?

You call this basic operation? What if you do it carefully? Can’t you still fight the Immortal Emperor?

Don’t you have a mouth? Don’t we have a mouth?

Everyone took a hard blow at the corners of their mouths when they heard the speech. This goods is really too short.

“How did Xu que do it and why did he have such strong strength…”

“It seems that we all underestimated the Tianmen sect. Tianmen is really causing big trouble this time.”

“Yes! But now they are in our Buddha territory. I’m afraid we don’t have a peaceful life these days. ”

Some people are frightened, some are afraid, and some are worried.

The Buddha kingdom is always quiet and peaceful. This wicked dog just appeared and made such a big deal. It is estimated that the next Buddha kingdom will be in chaos.

A few days later, what happened in Zhenyuan city immediately spread wildly.

The name of the fried heaven sect, especially the “immoral dog” group, is famous in the whole Buddhist domain.

Today, the six elders who just arrived at an ancient city immediately heard that someone mentioned that the “immoral dog” combination appeared in Zhenyuan city as soon as they entered the city.

The six elders were immediately overjoyed.

Zhenyuan city?

Isn’t that the right direction for Zuo Yue to catch up?

It seems that Zuo Yue has succeeded in taking them down, otherwise the news of “wicked dog” will not reach here so soon.

Thinking of this, the six elders showed a gratifying smile on their face.

It seems that the set of “Zheng Qi Feng Mo Jing” is really extraordinary. Zuo Yue must have mastered a lot, otherwise he can’t win the wicked dog so quickly.

Just the next second, the words of those commentators did not go on in the direction he thought.

“It’s terrible!” Yes, Xu Ke almost didn’t do anything, just spit out, and the immortal powerful man died on the spot! ” You must have heard wrong. As far as I know, it was king Nawei who flew into the air and peed. He directly killed the Tianmen immortal. It is said that he had uremia. ” No, no, no, I was at the scene. I saw master Duan Jiude turn around and fart and kill the immortal. ” The voices of the people were clearly transmitted to the ears of the six elders. For a moment, he was a little confused. What… What are the rumors? Outrageous! There are still people scrambling to spread it, and others believe it? I am a strong man in Tianmen. Is it a spit, a bubble of urine, or even a fart… How unreasonable! The more the six elders listened, the more angry they became. They felt that they were going to have myocardial infarction, but he was a immortal. He couldn’t die of cerebral thrombosis for ten years. He was really wronged Shut up! ” The six elders immediately moved forward, and the powerful momentum of the high-level immortal statue crushed the people in an instant. There were only some big Luo immortals and Taiyi immortals. All of them knelt on the ground in an instant. Those who had slightly poor cultivation skills spurted blood from their mouths on the spot What are you talking about! ” Six elders asked coldly. The Taiyi immortals trembled in their legs and couldn’t say a complete word at all Sir, we… “We were just saying that a Tianmen immortal died at the hands of a wicked dog.” A big Luo Xian said tremblingly. He doesn’t know where. The great power in front of him should also be a man of Tianmen. It must be the news that made me so angry How did he die? ” He…… “the great Luo Jinxian was speechless for a moment. How can he answer that Say! ” The six elders shouted angrily. The big Luo Jinxian’s head shook on the spot, exploded into a mass of flesh and blood, and died on the spot. The rest of the people saw this and immediately trembled with fear Sir, spare your life! ” Sir, we just heard a rumor that the immortal was killed by Xu Duan’s move. We’re really not sure… “Several people trembled Not sure? ” The six elders snorted coldly and clapped out! Several people kneeling on the ground were killed in an instant! This killing also eased the anger of the six elders a little! He ignored the onlookers who were running away from him. He looked up coldly and looked in the direction of Zhenyuan City: “Zhenyuan City, there is only one way to the Buddha kingdom for trial…” the voice fell, and his body turned directly into a streamer and flew away in the direction he had just seen

chapters.title: Chapter 1634
chapters.body:
Chapter 1634

Chapter 1634

C.1634

At this moment, Xu Ke and his party have also left Zhenyuan city and went straight to the Buddhist testing ground.

But the journey is really far away. They and a dog belong to rich and noble bones who can’t bear hardships. They didn’t catch up for a few days. When they saw an ancient city, they immediately wanted to stop and have a rest.

But this time, er Gouzi was forced to stay outside the city by Xu Que and Duan Jiude.

With a dog, it really attracts attention.

After they entered the ancient city called “Chu’an city”, they soon knew that they had made the right decision.

Although there are some accidents, there are hundreds of thousands of miles between Chu’an city and Zhenyuan City, but their deeds in Zhenyuan city have been spread all over the world!

“Xu que of the fried heaven Gang is really terrible. He killed xianzun Daneng with one mouthful of saliva!”

“What’s this? I heard Xu kuyang said he wanted to rob fairy Yurou and go back to be the leader’s wife!”

“Sleeping trough, really? How dare he say that? ”

“This son is really our model!”

“Well, stop talking. It seems that the people from Tianmen have also come to Chu’an city.”

“I heard they came for the Buddha seal at the Marlborough auction this time.”

“Don’t worry too much. It’s said that there are two thousand Buddha prints flowing out of the Buddhist realm this time. We may still have a chance.”

Hearing this, Xu Que and Duan Jiude became interested in it.

Buddha seal?

What?

But someone from Tianmen is coming?

That’s a good thing!

Xu que immediately stepped forward and arched his hands and said, “ladies and gentlemen, what do you mean by the Buddha seal?”

Everyone in the gossip was stunned.

“What? You don’t even know the Buddha seal? ”

“What are you doing in Chu’an city?”

“Ha ha, Taoist friends, don’t make fun of us. The Buddha seal is the only certificate to enter the Buddha kingdom for trial. Who doesn’t know!”

Several people thought Xu Xu was joking. They shook their heads and smiled. They didn’t care too much.

Xu que brightened his eyes and immediately replied: “ha ha, it seems that you are also funny people. In fact, I want to ask when the auction of wanbaoge will start, I don’t know how many Buddha seals will be auctioned, and the price is about…”

“Tao you.” Before Xu lacked words, one of them interrupted him, shook his head and said, “these questions you asked are also what we want to know. If you are rich enough, you can go to Wanbao Pavilion and maybe learn a lot of news.”

“Good! Thank you very much. ”

Xu que slightly arched his hand to thank him. Without asking any more questions, he looked at Duan Jiude and went straight to the direction that the man pointed out.

Along the way, Xu Que and Duan Jiude were very steady and continued to listen to the auction of wanbaoge.

After this trip, I really gained a lot.

Recently, wanbaoge auctions a Buddha seal every day. Each Buddha seal will be scrambled by major forces at a high price.

Today’s auction is already the tenth Buddha seal, but more and more religious forces are participating in the auction, which also means that the competition is getting bigger and bigger.

“Teacher Duan, what does this wave say? How many fairy crystals did you bring? ”

“Not a piece!” Duan Jiude shook his head directly. “I didn’t lie to you. I really didn’t have a piece. I absorbed it all.”

Xu’s face is black. I believe you.

He was simply too lazy to talk nonsense. He stepped directly into the gate of the Wanbao Pavilion, and several clerks immediately welcomed him.

After Xu que made a simple “asset” proof, he was successfully brought into the venue of the auction immediately.

But the next moment, Duan Jiude also came in with the thief and sat down next to Xu Xu.

“Oh, Miss Duan, can you come in without Xianjing?” Xu que asked with a smile.

“That’s not true, old man. I reported the name of Tianmen, and they let me in immediately.” Duan Jiude said proudly.

“Yes, but how can I see that the people of Tianmen are welcomed in by the shopkeeper?”

Xu que said leisurely and looked not far away.

Under the warm and respectful guidance of the manager of wanbaoge, the party stepped into the auction venue.

“Elder martial sister, I’m from Tianmen.” At this time, a woman’s voice came from the front.

Xu que turned to see that the speaker was a young girl with a lovely appearance.

The woman called elder martial sister was wearing a long green dress and a purple and gold flowing cloud hairpin, which was immortal and moving.

She was also quite smart with several young girls next to her.

At this time, the green skirt woman frowned when she heard the younger martial sister’s words.

“This Buddha seal must be taken down by our Nixia gate, otherwise the next few Buddha seals will have no chance.” There was a worried look on her face.

When the voice fell, suddenly a sharp male voice sounded, as if a father-in-law was talking.

“I seem to hear some Taoist friends talking about our Tianmen gate. Ha ha, yes, we just came for the Buddha seal. Don’t say whether we are qualified or not. Even if we are qualified, do we have the courage to compete with our Tianmen gate?”

On the same day, the people at the door spoke, and none of them dared to answer. They just quietly watched a young man in white robe with a group of people in black robe enter the auction venue.

The girls clenched their fists tightly. They were afraid that they would pull the meat out of their hands with more force.

“Elder martial sister, they!”

The green skirt woman sighed: “it doesn’t matter. Although the Tianmen gate is powerful, it’s in the Wanbao Pavilion. Everything depends on the Xianjing in her hand!”

Hearing the elder martial sister’s words, the girl is more relaxed. Today, the elder martial master has taken out half of the immortal crystals in the family treasure house.

Even in the face of Tianmen, they have no fear in terms of financial resources!

When the young man of Tianmen sat down, the auction officially began!

The starting price has not been quoted yet. People in Tianmen have raised the auction board: “one million top-grade Xianjing!”

Time! Everyone present was bullied by the wealth of Tianmen.

The old man on the auction table glanced at the shopkeeper below and wanted to say that it was against the rules.

But the starting price given by wanbaoge is only 100000 best Xianjing.

But now Tianmen has offered ten times the price, so that the old people don’t know what to do.

After getting a sign from the shopkeeper, the old man tapped the auction hammer in his hand.

“Tianmen Liu Mengyi childe’s bid is valid!”

Xu que hesitates. Do you want to raise a price and play with one hand? Grab it after Tianmen takes a picture!

However, before Xu Ke spoke, the girl in the green skirt of the Nixia door standing next to him first offered: “1.1 million top-grade Xianjing!”

Hearing this, everyone’s attention was attracted. They wanted to see what dared to oppose Tianmen.

If the normal auction price is really followed, several Buddha seals have been sold at a high price of tens of millions, but now Tianmen has made a bid. Can they not give Tianmen face?

Looking at the faces of the people, Xu que couldn’t help laughing. He didn’t think that the Tianmen gate was so powerful not only in Wudu domain, but also in Buddha domain.

The most annoying thing is this kind of pretending to be strange. I don’t know the virtue of low-key humility at all!

The people thought that the Tianmen would be angry, but they didn’t want him to calmly quote the second price: “eleven million!”

At this moment, everyone was moved!

Is this Tianmen?

Ten times ten times up?

Hearing the price, the girl of the Nixia gate couldn’t help showing a embarrassed color on her face.

After struggling for a long time, she shouted, “11.1 million!”

“20 million!”

Liu Mengyi shouted out a price again!

This has almost called the price of the Buddha seal to heaven!

People couldn’t help but turn their eyes on the girl again.

As expected, the girl’s face was dusty and clenched her teeth

“20.1 million!”

“Ha ha…”

In the box of Tianmen came a burst of arrogant Laughter: “100000 plus? No shame? I Tianmen, bid 50 million! ”

Hearing the speech, the girl of the Nixia door sat down with her legs soft.

The master has emptied the sect. Half of the immortal crystals can’t take a Buddha seal. How can she go back and explain?

Now! Not only is Liu Mengyi a man of Tianmen, but no one dares to call up his price.

The tenth Buddha seal of the auction naturally fell into Tianmen’s hands.

When the people of wanbaoge handed over the Buddha seal to Liu Mengyi, he also spread his hand and showed it off to the people.

“It’s really cheap to get a Buddha seal with only 50 million immortal crystals.”

Several female disciples of the Nixia sect stared at the Buddha seal in his hand, unwilling but helpless.

“Elder martial sister, it’s all right! There are five more. I think we should be able to… ”

Before the little younger martial sister finished her words of relief, Liu Mengyi’s annoying voice sounded again: “after that, I want all the Buddha seals auctioned by wanbaoge!”

In an instant, everyone was completely stunned!

They have not been recognized by the Buddhist realm. The only possibility is to take a Buddha seal in Wanbao Pavilion and seek a chance to stand out for the sect!

But as soon as Liu Mengyi’s words came out, they suddenly felt that all their hopes were dashed!

Looking at the bitter color on the faces of the people, Liu Mengyi smiled more happily, throwing the Buddha seal in his hand and walking outside the Wanbao Pavilion.

Under the gaze of the crowd, Liu Mengyi, who had walked out of the gate of Wanbao Pavilion, suddenly fell

Several more Buddha seals fell out of him Oh! I’m really careless. If I lose these Buddhist seals, I’m afraid I’ll be lingchi executed by the elder? ” His acting is particularly poor! This is obviously for everyone to see! But they didn’t dare to utter a word, so they could only silently look at him and pretend to force him. Whoosh! However, just then, a black wind roared past… “No, be careful!” A strong immortal in Tianmen suddenly realized something and immediately shouted. Listen, almost at the same time! Liu Mengyi screamed and covered his left cheek. The next moment, the black wind roared away and disappeared directly Ah… Who, who beat me? ” Liu Mengyi stood there, still screaming. Then the people calmed down and looked around one after another. Liu Mengyi’s previous Buddhist seals and the storage ring he wore to hold Xianjing are all gone! There are even two black palm prints on his face! Everyone was stunned. At this time, in the direction of the disappearance of the black wind, there was a sound of cheap waves and Sao in the waves Thank you for the Buddha’s seal sent from the old fellow of Tianmen. I am grateful for your family on behalf of the gang.

chapters.title: Chapter 1635
chapters.body:
Chapter 1635

Chapter 1635

C.1635

Fried sky Gang?

Another big bang?

Everyone present was stunned.

Isn’t this fried heaven Gang too brave? This is completely connected with Tianmen?

Good guy, the fried sky Gang is really awesome. God forever!

“Elder martial sister, I seem to find that Tianmen disciple’s storage ring has also been robbed.” A female disciple of the Nixia gate whispered, “in this way, aren’t they…”

The woman in green dress is glad to hear the younger martial sister’s tone!

But thinking of Tianmen forces, the green skirt woman immediately stared at her younger martial sister and hinted that she should not talk nonsense again. Be careful that misfortune comes out of her mouth.

As for Liu Mengyi, at the moment, he has also reflected what happened. He is completely stunned in situ, and his body can’t help shaking.

He not only lost six Buddha seals, but also lost 500 million fairy crystals needed for the subsequent auction of Buddha seals!

Although this fairy crystal is not a bone breaking thing for Tianmen!

But those Buddhist seals

“Liu Mengyi, what you did, why did you take out the Buddha seal? Now how do you explain to the elder?” The xianzun strong man standing behind him shouted in a deep voice.

The scene just now happened so suddenly that it was too late when he reacted. The other party didn’t know what method to use, turned into a black wind, and then disappeared in an instant. A trace of Qi machine couldn’t be caught. He didn’t even know where to chase!

“Martial uncle! I… I didn’t mean to. I blame the fried sky gang. It was robbed by the fried sky gang. You know, he… They dare to flirt with fairy Yurou… ”

Liu Mengyi hurriedly explained, but unexpectedly, he made no choice of words and took fairy Yurou as an example.

At the moment, everyone present couldn’t help looking at Liu Mengyi.

The feather fairy was molested?

Sleeping trough, is this true?

Everyone’s eyes widened.

Originally, they were all hearsay about the fried heaven gang. Although they believed 70% or 80%, they didn’t believe that fairy Yurou was molested, but now

“Good guy, that thing is true.”

“The fried heaven Gang Xu Wei once said that fairy Yurou was his woman in Hecheng. It’s too brave…”

Someone just said half, immediately closed his mouth.

After all, it’s Yurou fairy, and there are so many strong people in Tianmen. If you talk nonsense, I’m afraid you’ll lose your life here.

At this time, Liu Mengyi also reflected that he had said the wrong thing, and his face was full of grievances and anxiety.

“Martial uncle! Help me! ” He looked at the immortal and strong man and begged in a low voice.

“Martial uncle…” Liu Meng kept up with him, posing very low, like a dog wagging its tail.

The crowd looked at the scene and wanted to laugh, but they didn’t dare to laugh. They had to try their best to hold it there.

If he didn’t show off his wealth and pretend blindly, he might not be targeted by the bombers!

Now you are in such a situation. It’s all your own sin!

Everyone quietly watched the Tianmen group leave until they couldn’t see the figure and feel the breath. They were relieved and began to talk freely.

“Hahaha, you can laugh. You almost suffocated me.”

“I’m afraid Liu Mengyi is a fool.”

“But the fried sky Gang is too brave, isn’t it? I dare to rob the Buddha seals of Tianmen in public. There are eight in total. I’m afraid Tianmen will not die with them this time. ”

“What is robbing the Buddha seal? Liu Mengyi also personally admitted that fairy Yurou was molested by the fried tianbang Xu que. If it gets out, I’m afraid… ”

Whew!

Before the words fell, suddenly a sword flashed!

The monks in the discussion were bleeding everywhere in an instant!

“Nonsense, those who insult our Tianmen will be killed without amnesty.”

A middle-aged man in a gray robe appeared in front of the crowd. It was the six elders who came late.

The power emanating from him oppressed the people present almost out of breath.

Everyone knelt down and trembled.

The six elders killed with great determination, glanced coldly at the people, then snorted coldly and turned away.

A moment later, Chu’an City, the stronghold of Tianmen.

“Bastard, get out.” As soon as the six elders stepped into the room, they immediately drank in a deep voice.

Liu Meng left his pants and rushed out in a very embarrassed way.

Bang, he knelt down on his knees and cried, “sixth martial uncle, I know I’m wrong. Please save Yi’er, I……”

“Pa!”

Six elders slapped him directly!

Liu Mengyi immediately closed his mouth and dared not speak again. He could only kneel on the ground and cry in a low voice.

… for a long time, the sixth elder sighed and threw a storage ring to him: “don’t lose these immortal crystals again. If you mess things up again…” sixth martial uncle, I’ll never be careless this time! ” Liu Mengyi took the storage ring in the hands of the six elders and kowtowed again and again Thank you, sixth martial uncle At the same time, Xu Que and Duan Jiude have changed their appearance and appeared outside the city Xu boy, what are you going to do with this Buddha seal? ” They had inquired about the details of the Buddha seal before. As a voucher for entering the Buddhist realm, one Buddha seal allows the holder to lead nine companions into it, which is equivalent to ten places for one Buddha seal to enter the secret realm. But now they are only two and a half people. It’s really a waste to take so many Buddhist seals Why don’t you sell it? ” Xu que hesitated. Duan Jiude shook his head: “it’s only tens of millions of fairy crystals. It’s too cheap.” That’s true, but… We can change the selling method! ” Xu Ke’s eyes narrowed slightly and smiled. Duan Jiude was stunned, then reacted, raised his eyebrows and praised, “it’s worthy of you!” So, half an hour later. Another big news came from Chu’an city! The fried heaven sect will sell 60 places for Buddha’s land trial! Each place will be sold at the price of 30 million Xianjing! After getting the news, Chu’an city really blew up! This is equivalent to selling six Buddha seals! As for where these six Buddha seals come from, who else in Chu’an city doesn’t know? If they dare to buy this quota now, it will be tantamount to opposing Tianmen. But if you don’t buy this place, do you still expect to take a Buddha seal in Wanbao pavilion? I’m afraid no one can rob Tianmen! Several female disciples of the Nixia sect are already discussing I decided to find fried sky to help buy places! ” The green skirt woman took off the jade pendant symbolizing the identity of the sect at her waist. After seeing the wealth of Tianmen, they no longer dare to look forward to Wanbao Pavilion Elder martial sister… “Needless to say!” With that, the green skirt woman stepped out of the stronghold of the Nixia gate. In Chu’an City, many small sects and families have made this choice! They’re gambling! As long as you can return safely from the Buddhist realm, you may not be able to compete with Tianmen, but you can find a real way out for the zongmen family. At that time, even Tianmen dare not easily move them Six elders, what are we going to do with those small sects? ” The six elders sneered: “it doesn’t hurt, as long as the wicked dog dares to show up! This seat will frustrate them! As for those small miscellaneous fish, don’t pay attention. ” My subordinates understand! ” After the man withdrew, two lightning arcs burst out in the eyes of the six elders! With such a secret! That’s the peak xianzun. He has the confidence to fight! Not to mention just two big Luo Jinxian! When the six elders urged Zheng Qi to seal the magic Sutra, Xu Ke sensed it! He raised his eyes and looked towards the Tianmen stronghold. He was not happy. Er Gouzi finally did a constructive thing. Xu Wei said with a smile, “two teachers, another great power of practicing the magic Sutra appears. Our situation may not be very good!” A thousand miles to send a head, the gift is light, and the affection is heavy! ” Two dogs sighed. Duan Jiude saw the bright light in Xu Que’s eyes and asked, “Xu boy, your eyes are a little dangerous.” Xu Kuan smiled and took out a rubbing of the book of righteous Qi sealing magic Scripture: “what kind of person does Mr. Duan think of me? I just want to find a successor for myself! ” Boy, if you don’t make it bigger, even if the Tianmen gate is stronger, you can’t cover the sky with one hand. There must be friction with other large gates. It’s better to… “As soon as the voice fell, er Gouzi tore up half of the book of Zhengqi sealing magic Sutra. See! Xu Que and Duan Jiude both brightened their eyes and praised in unison: “two dog teacher Tianzong wizards! Admiration! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1636
chapters.body:
Chapter 1636

Chapter 1636

C.1636

The matter that the Tianmen Buddha seal was taken by the Tiantian sect is making a lot of noise.

People are still feeling the madness of the tianbang. The storm in Chu’an city is rising again!

The dog of the fried sky Gang showed up!

And he broke into Tianmen stronghold in front of countless people, and was chased by the immortal of Tianmen to the gate of Wanfo Temple stronghold and killed!

After the news of Gouzi’s death spread, Wanfo temple was opposite to Tianmen.

“What’s going on?”

“It’s said that it’s a secret ancient book of Wanfo temple, which was stolen by the dog! On his deathbed, he tore apart half of the ancient secret law book and threw it on the face of Tianmen immortal. ”

“Are the bombers so brave? Previously, a Xu vacancy stole the Tianmen Buddha seal, and now a dog has provoked tens of thousands of Buddhist temples. ”

“It doesn’t matter if you get into trouble. The dog is dead! But now the gratitude and resentment between Tianmen and Wanfo temple is really terrible. ”

A group of people stood outside the Tianmen stronghold and watched three monks from xianzun come to ask for an explanation.

Tianmen and Wanfo temple are almost the same level of existence. Others will be afraid of Tianmen, but Wanfo temple is not afraid.

“Benefactor! Please return the half of the ancient books I sent! ” The three monks have a solemn appearance, which is somewhat similar to the ancient Buddha in the temple.

Hearing this, the six elders couldn’t help laughing!

These bald donkeys really stink!

You can really turn white into black!

“Joke! The so-called monks don’t lie. That’s how you keep the precepts? ”

Hearing this, Xu que immediately pointed to her and shouted, “this customer is insightful. Come and hand in the money. I’ll arrange it for you!”

At this time, the purple robed boy couldn’t help shouting, “who doesn’t have money!”

“It’s only 2000 places! It’s cheap. Do you want to think about it? ”

The chin they had just connected was startled off again and couldn’t be put back completely.

Listening to the words reported by his subordinates, Liu Meng left a powerful Immortal King who was almost fainted with anger!

“Deceive people too much! Deceive people too much! ” Liu Mengyi stamped his feet and roared, “the four elders will arrive in Chu’an city soon! At that time, I don’t think he will dare to be so arrogant! ”

When did they receive such an insult!

He can only bury his head in the sand like an ostrich and pretend that he can’t hear anything.

Seeing that there was no response, Xu que sighed: “Hey, I don’t know how to seize the opportunity! This is a 40% discount! Not even 40% off? Then borrow some Xianjing. The auction will start again. We have to shoot! ”

When everyone heard this, they almost gushed old blood.

I wipe, and this operation?

You borrowed it instead of buying it?

Are you serious? Will you pay it back?

“Tut tut Tut, the fried heaven Gang is really fearless. It’s clear that they play with the people of Tianmen to death!”

“But they are the first to bully Tianmen and dare not resist in tens of thousands of years!” Now they can be arrogant, but do you want to know how many immortals there are in Tianmen? ” Someone said. Everyone was stunned when they heard the speech! Yes, now they dare to be arrogant, but it’s because there are only fairy kings in Tianmen stronghold. I’m afraid it’s really hard to say if those immortals from Tianmen arrive. However, Xu que began to knock on the door crazily: “open the door, villagers, open the door!” Do you have the ability to open the door? ” Fellow villagers, we really just borrow Xianjing and don’t do anything else! ” Come on… “Bang! With a loud noise, the whole gate of Tianmen stronghold suddenly cracked and fell towards the inner courtyard what the fuck! What material is this! Not at all resistant to manufacturing! ” Xu Que make complaints about it. Immediately, he turned and looked at the people who were stunned. He shrugged his shoulders, looked innocent and said, “ah! Attention, everyone! This door is broken by itself. It has nothing to do with me! ” People: “…” is this the style of the immoral dog of the fried sky Gang? So aboveboard… Shameless Ah, fellow villagers, your door is broken, then we’ll come in! ” At this time, Xu Xu shouted again, and then walked in directly with Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi. People outside want to follow in, but they don’t have the courage. But before long, there was a scream from inside. As soon as they heard it, they knew it was Liu Mengyi’s voice. It’s so sad. What terrible torture has you experienced! Everyone couldn’t help feeling numb. Until a moment later, the scream stopped. Xu que came out with a boy whose face was swollen like a pig’s head. Although the young man’s appearance has changed greatly, everyone knows that he is indeed Liu Mengyi, who was very arrogant at the auction… Liu Mengyi is very depressed at the moment! He had never seen such a shameless person as an unscrupulous dog, nor had he expected that someone would dare to break into the Tianmen gate and empty it directly! Agreed to borrow only Xianjing? This is a bandit! Robber Ladies and gentlemen, everyone testify for us. When we went in, childe Liu was like this. I don’t know where he fell. Anyway, we didn’t fight! We are also worried that he will be in danger, so we can only take him with us to protect him! ” At this time, Xu que explained to the crowd with Liu Meng’s collar. People are speechless and make complaints about it. On the contrary, Liu Mengyi has the strength to speak. He raised his hand and said, “Xu… Childe Xu, no, Grandpa, you are my grandpa. I think I’m very safe. Don’t bother…” Wow! ” Before he finished, Xu que suddenly carried a large bag of unidentified objects and fell directly to Liu Mengyi’s head. Suddenly, a stench filled the air oh dear! I’m so sorry! How did this bag of stinky tofu juice leak? It’s careless! ” Xu que said with a look of “surprise” Whoosh! ” Next to him, er Gouzi stared at Liu Mengyi, his eyes twinkled, and his mouth couldn’t help drooling. Stinky tofu juice! So much stinky tofu juice is all the cream! ” Look, I’m right. Look at this dog. How cruel it is! ” Xu que then pulled Liu Mengyi back, pointed to ER Gouzi and said, “I just worried that childe Liu would be bitten by a dog, so I decided to protect him. But when it comes to protection… Childe Liu, we have to figure out the protection fee.” All of them immediately took a sharp blow from the corners of their mouths! Pour shit on people’s heads to lure a dog and force protection Ah! ” suddenly! A scream sounded! Er Gouzi had stretched out his tongue, licked Liu Mengyi’s sideburns, looked up and closed his eyes, showing an expression of enjoyment. Then he turned to look at Xu Kuang, frowned and complained, “brother Kuang, how can you waste so much? Stinky tofu tastes bad with scum. It’s not authentic anymore! ” On the third watch. Ask for recommended tickets, ask for monthly tickets!]

However! Right now! In Chu’an City, Xu Ke’s voice came to mind again: “I heard that the Taoist friends of Tianmen are coming again! Ben forced Sheng to have a business with you! ”

Many people in the city noticed when the four brothers came! That’s the middle level of three immortals and the high level of one immortals. You suddenly came to Chu’an city half a day ago and blew your stronghold into a pile of waste! ” With the virtue of helping others, we fried heaven Gang rescued your young master Liu Mengyi! Next to Zhou Ze, he threw his bangs in front of his forehead, frowned and said, “brother, you fool!”

Seeing the light full of wisdom, the blue haired fourth couldn’t help but stretch out his thumb and praise, “Your Excellency is really smart!”

If you let the fourth go on, they will lose their face!

However, even if he was suppressed by his two brothers, Zhou zelei said the last sentence: “besides, I bombed this stronghold. You must be lying!”

People choked again!

Sure enough, Tianmen is very smart!

This is NIMA!

All the onlookers finally saw what is thick and shameless!

“When we do business with the fried heaven Gang, we pay most attention to integrity. It’s not too much to exchange 200 Buddha seals for you, young master Liu?”

Xu Ke interprets the saying “the lion opens his mouth” incisively and exquisitely!

He asked for two hundred as soon as he spoke? I’m afraid it’s not crazy?

“Impossible!” Zhouming temple said bluntly! And the hand has begun to operate the spiritual power, which will start at any time!

His answer, of course, was expected by Xu Kuang: “they all said it was business. Don’t worry, just talk slowly! All right? Five, we only need five! This is a broken bone! If you don’t agree again, elder Duan can’t hold on to King Wei! ”

The four looked at each other when they heard the speech.

Why don’t you just promise him? The most important thing is to save the young master first. ” Zhou Ximen said.

“Ah! Only so! ” Zhouming Temple sighed heavily.

Did you fucking rob Tianmen again?

And did it succeed again?

The people stopped the boy in white and admired him very much!

For tens of thousands of years, only this young man has let Tianmen eat flat! And eat five or six times!

But there are so many immortals in Tianmen, but there is no way to take him!

Maybe one day in the future, he may turn fairy Yurou to be his guild leader’s wife.

“Good! We promise you! Where is our young master? ”

Xu que glanced at them and was moved to see the sincerity in their eyes!

My God? This is the first smooth business in so many years!

They are really smart brothers!

“Don’t worry! At that time, I will certainly leave a place for your young master. When you enter the Buddhist realm, you will naturally be able to see him! ”

“No!” Zhouming temple said decisively, “or we will give you the 200 million immortal crystals auctioned for the Buddha seal, and you will let our young master go!”

“As long as I want the Buddha seal, I’ll tear it if I don’t agree…” Xu Ke suddenly said: “I mean, even if I don’t agree, I don’t want to do this business!”

Everyone’s eyebrows beat violently!

Did he mean to tear up the ticket?

Zhou Ximen gently pulled down his elder brother’s sleeve and said, “elder brother, for the safety of the young master, come down first!”

“Good! Just as you say! ”

When the voice of Zhouming Temple fell, Xu que threw a jewelry box at them: “this is your young master’s thing. I’ll confirm it for you first!”

Zhou Ming Temple trembled his hands and opened the fist sized jewelry box, in which a circle of meat lay quietly

“What have you done to our young master?”

Smell it! People suddenly realized!

However, looking at the scale comparable to a hand grasping a cake, they finally understood why young master Liu had a father-in-law voice!

But Xu Wei said surprise?

When people think about it, they always feel that something is wrong

In the next few days, the four brothers would go to the Wanbao pavilion every day to take the Buddha seal and immediately send it to the place where Xu Ke settled.

Xu Kuan, as always, sold according to a quota of 50 million Xianjing, making a pot full of money The fifth day.
