I’d like to thank you for being busy for our business. Please don’t dislike this secret technique even if it’s a gift. ” Liu Mengyi, who was already naked all over, couldn’t help twitching when he heard this: “Grandpa Xu, I’m wrong! Please, let me go! ” This matter, er Gouzi walked in slowly, with stars and the sea in his eyes! As long as brother short comes to Liu Mengyi, he will have stinky tofu soup to taste. Xu que glared at him: “here you are! Do you look down on me! ” When Xu lacked such a drink, Liu Mengyi trembled and took the book of Zhengqi seal magic Scripture Brother Ke, how can you blow us up… “Er Gouzi! Shut up! If there is no brother Liu these days, how can we smoothly collect due labor remuneration? He is a comrade of our working class! Good things should naturally be shared with comrades! ” But! ” You go out! ” Xu que scolded fiercely, then turned to Liu Mengyi and said, “brother Liu, look first. After we accept the last Buddha seal, we will send you to your relatives safely.” Liu Yan was moved and left tears! He can finally leave these three demons! These days… As soon as he had a thought, he was frightened by the memory and fainted. When he woke up, he found himself lying on a soft bed with a beautiful woman guarding him. Seeing him awake, the woman shouted, “my Lord! Young master Liu is awake! ” Four figures appeared in front of the bed. Seeing the familiar faces of several people in Zhouming temple, Liu Meng left a moment of tears surging with the river breaking the dike Uncle Zhou! ” He howled and cried. Zhou Ming Temple patted Liu Mengyi on the back and said with relief: “young master, it’s all right, don’t cry!” I must kill Xu Ke! I must kill him! ” Liu Meng threw himself into the arms of Zhouming temple and shouted. He watched the young master grow up. When did he see him so wronged? It was also painful Young master, after entering the Buddhist realm, Zhou will avenge you with his own hands! ” After crying for a while, Liu Mengyi seemed to think of something. He took out the Zhengqi seal magic Sutra from his arms and said, “Uncle Zhou, this is what Xu lacked gave me. What do you say as a thank-you gift? I don’t trust him. Would you like to have a look first?” They gave it? ” Zhou Ming Temple was stunned. After taking over his hand, he looked through it a little, but his face soon changed. This… This is so wrong. This thing is real! The key is that everything described in it is an extremely mysterious but powerful secret method I can’t see through the fried heaven help. Although they don’t do things authentic, they are very particular about doing business! ” Zhouming Temple looked complex and couldn’t help sighing

chapters.title: Chapter 1640
chapters.body:
Chapter 1640

Chapter 1640

C.1640

For Liu Mengyi, the days when he was abducted by the bombers were inhuman and dark.

Even if he is a strong man in the fairyland, he will be awakened by nightmares from time to time in the middle of the night, and a cold sweat will burst out in the middle of his cultivation.

When I was fully awake, I found that my situation was safe, but I was still very afraid.

The dog’s tongue is terrible!

“Fried heaven Gang, Xu que, er Gouzi, Duan Jiude, I Liu Meng swear that if I have a chance in the future, I will tear you to pieces!”

The more frightened Liu Mengyi was, the more angry he became, and he was surprisingly angry.

In his hand, he held the book of righteousness sealing the devil Sutra.

The self-confidence of this anger mainly comes from his success in practicing this secret method during this period. He feels that this secret method is naturally tailored for himself.

This time, he was full of confidence, saw new hope and felt that he was going to rise!

Soon, time passed in a hurry.

The day when the trial of Buddha’s realm opens has already arrived!

The original bustling Chu’an city suddenly became a ghost city, with only a few pedestrians on the street.

All the religious gates that had stayed in Chu’an city either returned to their hometown without quota, or rushed to the entrance of the Buddhist realm in the northwest of Chu’an city overnight.

Xu lacked them, but they were not in a hurry. Now it was just past Chenshi, and there was an hour before noon.

Just hundreds of thousands of miles away, it’s time to pee!

Looking at the monks on their way peacefully, Xu que couldn’t help but sigh: “it’s worthy of a Buddhist trial. So many people scramble to go. Even if there are no places, they also want to join the fun.”

“Alas, it’s a trial, but it’s not a big fight!” Duan Jiude sighed.

“Brother Duan, Miss Duan, if you don’t go, you may not be able to kill.” Make complaints about two dogs.

Their eyes immediately swept to ER Gouzi. When they were preparing for the next move, an disharmonious voice suddenly came from behind.

“Xu Ke! I finally found you! ”

“Eh?”

When the wicked dog looked back at the same time, he saw a bald young man leading eight immortals and dozens of fairy kings.

“Sleeping trough! Isn’t this scum smelly tofu? I haven’t seen you for a day. How come so much has been wasted! ”

The second dog looked up and sniffed: “it’s a man who has been baptized by God. The smell of scum is much lighter!”

Hearing the word baptism, Liu Meng couldn’t help shivering!

That’s the dog!

He tortured himself for five days!

It was the darkest and most desperate day of his life!

Uncle Zhou! Kill them! ” Liu Mengyi immediately roared!

Whoosh!

In an instant, those immortal masters and strong immortal kings behind him moved one after another and were ready to fight!

“Xiao Liu! I’ve been trying my best to protect you for so many days, so I’ll treat us like this? ”

“You… You!” Er Gouzi’s words will directly leave Liu Meng in the realm of fairy king to faint!

“Young master! Are you okay? ” Zhouming Temple held Liu Mengyi and woke him up.

There are concerned about Liu Mengyi’s situation, while Xu Ke and they are discussing how to run.

The other side’s lineup is really not simple. High-level immortal Zun has come.

What’s more, the Buddha’s land trial is about to begin, so I don’t have time to play with these people here.

“Two dog teacher, hurry up!” Xu que urged.

Duan Jiude’s seal characters slowly turned into ashes, cracking the space blockade. The array patterns at the feet of Er Gouzi flickered, and he was already burning the transmission array!

“Brother Kuang, find a way to delay time!” Two dogs turned their heads.

Xu que didn’t answer, but glanced at Liu Meng: “brother Liu, we treat you like a parent-child, and we passed on to you the secret of the fried heaven sect! But you treat me like this. Xu is cold! ”

“Bastard!” After taking a nourishing pill, Liu Mengyi’s mental state recovered a little. Now he has broken away from the embrace of Zhouming temple and stood up!

Bang!

The next moment, his momentum and cultivation suddenly went crazy!

Fairy King medium level!

Fairy king high level!

Fairy King peak!

“Boom!”

The sound of gas explosion is everywhere in this wilderness!

Liu Mengyi’s eyes are full of two red insects!

The hair has turned silver!

The fairy kings who followed him were now stunned!

Is the majestic man in front of them still their young master?

When they saw this scene, Xu Que’s eyes couldn’t help showing a look of disappointment: “unexpectedly, you are so dishonest! I thought you could learn some virtues after learning from us for a few days. Hey… ”

Smell it! Liu Meng laughed!

“How! Let you die today under your own secret arts! ”

Next moment!

His eyes also burst out two golden and red lightning arcs, and his hair color turned silver white!

There are waves of air under your feet!

“Liu Mengyi! This is the secret of our fried heaven sect. Can’t I? ”

Liu Meng snorted coldly, “Uncle Zhou! You deal with the dog and the old man. I’ll kill him! ”

At the moment, Xu que threw a piece of stinky tofu at Liu Meng: “great smart, don’t move at this time! When more! ”

Tianmen people couldn’t help looking at Zhou Ze, and their faces were full of doubts.

Although Da Congming was in a state of ignorance, he instinctively raised his hand and smashed the stinky tofu that was about to hit Liu Meng’s face!

Suddenly an unbearable stench filled the air!

Xu Ke was also stunned and looked at Er Gouzi: “you’re paralyzed and mixed shit in my stinky tofu!”

“You know shit, stinky tofu without shit is not serious stinky tofu!”

Recalling the soup that used to be bath water for yourself every day a few days ago, it seems to be this thing!

Liu Meng was angry and shouted, “ah! Xu Xu, you and I will never die… ”

Bang!

As soon as his voice fell, the whole person suddenly exploded and annihilated on the spot!

“Young master!”

“Young hall leader!”

In an instant, many Tianmen strongmen on the scene stared and shouted.

They couldn’t believe that Liu Mengyi would die so suddenly under the eyes of himself and others.

“Poor!”

Xu que smiled calmly.

At the same time, er Gouzi’s transmission array has been set up, and Duan Jiude has successfully broken the prohibition of blocking space!

The transmission array instantly lights up bright white light.

“Comrade Da Congming, thank you for breaking the space ban for us! Remember to go back to the fried sky help often! Ladies and gentlemen, it’s fate to say goodbye! ”

When Xu Que’s voice fell, a light of array patterns flickered in the world, and the figure of wicked dog disappeared in front of the Tianmen people.

However, with great intelligence, he hasn’t responded yet. A group of Tianmen strongmen have surrounded him: “Zhou Ze, why did you betray Tianmen!”

Big smart looked stunned: “I didn’t! I am not! You’re talking nonsense! ”

“Oh! Explain this to the hall leader yourself! ” The voice fell, and several other immortal zuns shot at the same time.

“You… Well, you forced me!” Big smart roared.

Boom!

The towering Dharma was suddenly filled with the sky.

A moment later.

A transmission array of white light fell, and Xu lacked them to snatch out of the void. They had appeared at the entrance of the Buddhist realm!

At this time, more than ten thousand people had gathered in this vast wilderness. Xu lacked to look around, but he didn’t see Su Yunlan and them.

It was only a quarter of an hour before the Buddha kingdom was opened. The Buddha seal in his hand was burning

Suddenly a loud noise drifted away!

The plain began to shake!

People are nervous. They either hold weapons or hold runzhuan in their hands. As long as there is something wrong, they will evacuate immediately!

“What’s that…”

One exclaimed, attracting everyone’s attention!

At this moment, a looming bronze door suddenly appeared on the sky!

“Is that the entrance to the Buddhist realm?”

When the man’s voice fell, a light beam fell from the bronze gate and shone on the plain, and the Buddha seal in the hands of everyone turned into a streamer!

“Dang!”

A simple bell rang and swayed away on the wild plain. Everyone felt as if their hearts had been washed and exhaled a mouthful of turbidity!

“Sleeping trough! Before entering the Buddhist realm, Ben shenzun was blessed by the ancient Buddha. It seems that the Buddha really has fate with me! ”

“Xu que!” Suddenly! The voice of Zhouming temple came!

When the wicked dog looked back, the immortals in Tianmen were coming with knives

“Ladies and gentlemen, where are our smart comrades!” Xu Kui showed a nervous look!

Two dogs and Duan Jiude have run towards the beam of light.

Hearing the words “great wisdom”, Zhouming temple was even more angry! His silly brother was really turned out of heaven by the goods pit and ran away after killing several fairy kings!

He knows his younger brother’s temperament, that is, he is not clever, but he is absolutely loyal to Tianmen!

“I’ll kill you!” Zhouming Temple roared forward.

“Hey, are you stupid? Can you still get it? ”

With a smile and a sweep of his figure, Xu Kejian stepped into the light beam with the steps of Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude.

chapters.title: Chapter 1641
chapters.body:
Chapter 1641

Chapter 1641

C.1641

When entering the light beam, Xu que realized that his soul was going to be stripped from his body!

But that feeling is only for a moment

His attention was attracted by the picture in front of him!

Duan de has disappeared in front of him.

Under the light of that beam, Xu que seems to have experienced his life again.

But before he had time to aftertaste, all those pictures disappeared

“Missing brother!”

A call awakened Xu que from his absence. Two dogs and Duan Jiude were standing beside him.

“Brother Ke, did you notice a disgusting smell just now?” The second dog said, “just now Ben shenzun seemed to see himself in the first life, as if his secrets had been seen by someone!”

When Er Gouzi talked about it, Xu que was also aware of something and said, “if you come, you’ll be at ease. Find a chance to do him!”

Now they seem to be in a palace, but there is nothing else in the palace except a pile of lotus seats!

And Xu que also found that there are only more than a thousand of these lotus seats

At the same time, er Gouzi had taken out a fairy tool and pried a lotus seat in front of him, but he tossed for a while without moving half a minute.

Not long ago, there were many more people in the hall, but the person Xu lacked wanted was not among them.

“Yi!”

Suddenly!

Xu que noticed a burning sensation coming from his arm!

His body is at least comparable to the peak immortal statue, and can’t be affected by external forces!

How could

Xu que immediately lifted his sleeves and saw an eight petal lotus mark on his wrist!

The second dog son and Duan Jiude looked at each other and said in some surprise, “lying in the trough, brother lack, how can you get Mei ~ poison!”

“Mei, you are paralyzed. This is a lotus!” Xu que growled and asked the system to detect the source of the mark.

“Ding! Detection completed! This imprint is not harmful to the host! ”

“System, do you want to test again?” Anyway, it’s all foreign things. Xu Ke is still worried after all.

The system has not yet given the second test results, the ancient bell rings again, and then a voice of vicissitudes comes from the virtual space:

“The first level of Zen enlightenment in the Buddhist realm!”

“Everyone, if you enter the lotus seat, light the first lotus flower in 36 hours as customs clearance! Don’t fight with others halfway, or you will be expelled directly from the Buddhist realm! ”

Hearing the speech, they finally understood the function of the lotus mark on the wrist.

After announcing the rules, the voice disappeared, but there was still some Zen meaning in the hall.

Since the appearance of the bronze door, the trial of Buddha’s realm has been regarded as the real opening.

When the public fell on the lotus seat, Xu que looked at it again.

There are thousands of people, but only a thousand people.

Before that, it was said that there were two thousand Buddha seals. How could so many people come in?

Obviously, there should be other places for trial in the Buddhist realm.

If you want to find Su Yunlan and them, you have to break the pass.

Xu que shook his head helplessly. It seems that he will become a firefly in the night to illuminate the way for everyone.

When people sat in the lotus seat and began to understand Zen, Xu que also closed his eyes and began to communicate with the system.

“System, how do you do Zen meditation? Don’t you really let Ben force saint to sit there in a daze? ”

Xu Ke is quite famous for his self-knowledge. He can’t get the so-called perception of Buddhism and Zen. If the system doesn’t work, I’m afraid he can’t pass this level.

“Ding! Do you want to digitize? ”

“I don’t care. I can handle it, can’t I?”

After ten breaths of silence, the sound of the system sounded again: “Ding! Parsing! Converting! Numerical success! The host can exchange the load value for the lotus fit value. ”

Xu Xu found that there was a scale bar on the lotus petal at his wrist. Each petal was subdivided into ten parts. It takes 50000 to light up a small grid.

After seeing clearly, Xu que scolded: “lying in the trough! Profiteers! ”

Seeing Xu Kuang’s face changed greatly, er Gouzi asked, “brother Kuang? What’s the matter? ”

Although the monks in this hall have not seen Xu que, they can recognize the presence of Er Gouzi as a trademark.

“Nothing!” Xu Wei shook his head and looked at the monks!

The system pit him, he has no way, so he can only hope that these colleagues can give him some comfort.

After thinking about it, Xu que took out two black square boxes and put them next to his lotus seat.

With a “pop” sound, he pressed a black button with the word “play” written on it.

“It’s like the sun passing through the night and the dawn quietly across the horizon. Whose figure shuttles between reincarnation, and the road to the future is at your feet…”

what the fuck!

Some monks who had almost realized a bit of Zen thought were startled to wake up immediately when they heard the song.

What a song! My liver was almost broken.

Everyone’s eyes immediately swept away and looked at Xu que.

However, Xu Que’s eyes were closed, and he sat solemnly on the ground, as if he were absorbed in the Dharma.

The crowd burst out with a mouthful of old blood.

fuck!

Listen to the melody of this song, can you still focus on meditation?

Everyone frowned, but no one dared to say anything.

After all, the old man next to him and the dog are still sitting there. This is obviously the rumored “immoral dog” combination. It is famous. No one wants to offend them when he is a prominent bird.

Simply, everyone didn’t say anything. Take a deep breath, sit cross legged again, close your eyes and prepare to enter the enlightenment state.

But my ears are still echoing the song from the black box.

“A new storm has appeared!”

“How can we stand still!”

“Through time and space.”

“Do your best.”

“I will come to you…”

Fuck, fuck!

They opened their eyes again in an instant.

Nima, why does this broken song sound like blood boiling?

I really want to do a big job!

I really want to pursue light!

Shit!

So blood boiling, so restless

How can you calm down and enter the artistic conception of Wuchan?

“Alas!”

Finally, an old man couldn’t bear it anymore. He sighed, got up slowly, looked at Xu Que and said, “Taoist friend, what are you doing?”

“I’m meditating! What else can I do? ” Xu Ke immediately opened his eyes, sat on the lotus seat and picked up his nails: “you should also understand quickly! Don’t bother me! ”

Everyone was stunned when they heard the speech!

Don’t bother you?

You’re interrupting us, okay?

“Taoist friend, are you still unreasonable! Obviously, you somehow made a strange song to disturb our artistic conception. How can you say that we disturbed you? ” Someone immediately shouted angrily.

Xu que looked innocent: “I will cough if I don’t listen to this when I understand Zen!”

Everyone choked!

Can wuzen cough without listening to songs? Pull the calf!

And the song is too dynamic. How can you meditate and understand Zen?

But thinking that this is the cruel man of the fried heaven Gang, the monks dare not say too much, and they can’t say any threat words.

After hesitating again and again, a monk advised, “Taoist friend, why don’t you turn down your voice? So you can hear it without affecting my waiting? ”

Xu Wei resolutely refused: “no, no! If you turn down the volume, you won’t feel that way! ”

“Why don’t you change it? This is too noisy. ” A suggestion was made.

He sighed and said, “Hey, just now I realized Zen with the artistic conception of this song, but I was disturbed by you. Now I have to be coerced by you to change the song. Aren’t you bullying honest people?”

“In this way, there are a million fairy crystals here, which can be regarded as compensation for Taoist friends. Please change a song!”

A million cents?

Xu que glanced at the crowd, shook his head and said, “isn’t this appropriate?”

“Appropriate!” Everyone spoke in unison.

“You are welcome! Please accept it and change a song. I’ll thank you first. ” The friar also pushed Xianjing forward.

“Ladies and gentlemen, in fact, I’m not making trouble. My way of understanding Zen is quite special.” Xu Wei finished and shook his wrist.

Everyone could see that his first petal had lit up a little.

Is that ok?

Everyone was stunned, but they had to believe Xu Que’s theory of listening to songs and understanding Zen.

But if Xu Kuang is allowed to fool around, they can’t understand, so they have to stop the goods!

“Taoist friend, take this fairy crystal.” The friar urged again.

The crowd also looked at Xu Ke eagerly.

“Ah, this…”

Xu que was embarrassed: “in fact, it doesn’t matter whether immortal crystal is immortal or not. It’s too difficult to find a song with the same effect, so… This one million immortal crystals is a little mean!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1642
chapters.body:
Chapter 1642

Chapter 1642

C.1642

It doesn’t matter whether it’s immortal or not?

That’s what you mean, doesn’t it matter?

What’s the meaning of one million Xianjing? How many meanings is that?

Not enough?

“Taoist friend, are you going too far?” The Friar’s face sank immediately.

Xu Shao stalled: “don’t you agree? You hit me! ”

As soon as the man raised his hand, he counseled back and said, “how much do you want!”

“200 million Xianjing, I barely cut a song and change another one.”

“Why are you so shameless!”

Xu que turned his eyes: “obviously, you disturbed my meditation, but now you’re doing it upside down. Who’s shameless! Who is bullying people! ”

Facing the accusation of deficiency, people are incompetent to defend!

Do you want them to reason with Xu que?

Finally!

A man made a difficult decision and said, “let’s make it up to him, otherwise we can’t pass the test within the time limit.”

“That’s what I think!”

Although there are still a few unwilling, but under the oppression of the people, they can only compromise with Xu que.

With concerted efforts, the two hundred million immortal crystals were soon gathered together.

A monk with a black face handed over all the fairy crystals to Xu Wei.

“Happy cooperation!” Xu que immediately smiled and pressed the cut song button.

The blood boiling song in everyone’s ears finally stopped.

However, just as everyone was relieved and ready to enter the enlightenment state again.

A rough, high pitched male voice suddenly sounded: “every time, I’m wandering and strong in loneliness. Every time, even if I’m hurt, I don’t shed tears…”

Shua!

Everyone in the audience was petrified on the spot, with black lines on their faces and convulsions in the corners of their mouths!

good heavens! What’s the difference between changing songs or not?

No, it’s special. It’s better not to change it!

This song is to scare people to death!

The old man who had negotiated with Xu que got up again: “Taoist friend, Xianjing, you have accepted it. It’s inevitable that some people said they couldn’t go?”

Xu Kuang pressed the pause button, looked confused and said, “what’s the matter? I changed the song according to your request. Aren’t you satisfied? I’ll go. Do you deliberately find fault and want to fight me? ”

The crowd was speechless.

You’re awesome!

“Everybody, let’s be fair!”

At this time, er Gouzi finally couldn’t see it and stood up: “Ben shenzun felt that brother Ke was right.”

“…” everyone looked at Er Gouzi and remained silent.

You are a real dog!

The next moment, er Gouzi added again: “of course, everyone here is right. The main reason is that the way we understand is different. There is a conflict!”

With that, er Gouzi looked at Xu vacancy again: “brother vacancy, give me a face. Can you wear headphones? In this way, you can not only understand Zen, but also affect others. ”

As soon as the monks listened, their eyes lit up.

Nice dog! It’s a good dog!

Immediately, the people agreed: “since there is such a treasure, please use it!”

“Yes, in this way, we won’t disturb each other.”

“Alas!”

Xu Wei sighed and looked up at the sky: “I also want to use headphones, but… But I’m poor!”

He has seen the earphone cable in the system mall. It’s worth ten o’clock!

After ten?

Oh, that’s a lot. Round it up to one billion!

“Poor?”

The crowd looked at the pile of fairy crystals in front of Xu Que and didn’t know what to say.

“Alas, you don’t know. Every time I use the headset, I need to consume a lot of Xianjing. Don’t look at me. I’ve been earning Xianjing by my own efforts, but it’s not enough for the headset at all.”

With that, Xu que really took out an earphone cable and shook it in front of the crowd.

The old man had seen through Xu Ke’s mind and said bluntly, “Xu Daoyou, just say it. How much is it this time.”

“What do you mean? Do you think I’m blackmailing you? Our fried heaven Gang is always upright and never does such dirty things! ”

Xu Kuyi said, “but you forced me to use such a precious thing. You are responsible for the consumption. Shouldn’t you?”

How did he say such a high sounding excuse, a shameless reason?

But it’s all for this. People feel they can bear it again for the last time!

“You can make a direct offer.” The old man said with a dark face.

“Well, I appreciate a man like you who is straightforward and courageous! Five million fairy crystals are used once. ” Xu Kui praised the old man and reported the number at the same time.

Everyone was stunned! Five million? And NIMA just once Xu Daoyou… “The old man opened his mouth immediately, but before he finished speaking, he was interrupted by Xu Kuang:” no price! “” The people immediately looked at each other and looked at each other. Nearly a thousand people can’t get together any more Xianjing. After a simple exchange, the people clenched their teeth and said, “OK, let’s give it!” By the way, with my progress in understanding Zen, it is estimated that I only need to use this headset a hundred times. Don’t give more. ” Xu que kindly reminded. fuck! The people scolded in an instant. A hundred times? Isn’t that 500 million fairy crystals? This is a robbery Give… Give it to him! ” His voice trembled with popularity. They just want to solve the trouble quickly and get through the first level safely. They simply cooperate and start to gather up Xianjing. Soon, the 500 million fairy crystals were complete. Xu que accepted the 500 million fairy crystal with a smile: “happy cooperation!” Cooperate with you… Well, Xu Daoyou, now I accept Xianjing, but I can’t play any more songs and disturb us! ” Don’t worry, our fried heaven Gang always spit and nail! If you speak out, pour out the water… “Xu que picked up a pile of words boasting about the fried heaven gang. When they heard the speech, they were finally relieved. Now you can finally understand Zen at ease! But as soon as I sat down… “Smile in the face of danger, the dream will not come true far away. Summon up courage and move forward firmly, miracles will appear…” the song sounded again. No, this time it’s not the black box. It’s the guy Xu Ke humming while wearing headphones! Even if you hum, don’t break the sound and don’t run out of tune! This product is really going to kill us! They felt exhausted, powerless and helpless. It’s agreed not to sing, but now I sing by myself. It’s so ugly… Who would have thought that after paying 700 million fairy crystals, I still couldn’t hold this bastard That’s all! ” Someone got up directly and left the small hall temporarily. He didn’t want to continue to be trapped. He decided to wait until Xu Ke was sent to the second level after the enlightenment. As a result, the big deal is to be one round slower than others. It doesn’t matter. Seeing this, the others said nothing and left one after another. Only some people are still sitting on the ground, but they are not in a hurry to understand. They all calmly look at Xu Ke, with an expression of “whatever you want” Stop playing? Oh, OK. In fact, I just want to say, “don’t worry. I’ll understand it right away.” Xu que smiled. Seeing the dejected appearance of everyone, I immediately felt a little boring. He directly changed out of the system interface, consumed the installed force value, and directly lit a petal. Whoosh. The next second, Xu Ke disappeared in an instant Lying trough! ” The crowd was startled again. This… So fast? When you say you’re finished, you’re really finished? How did the boy do it I’m NIMA! ” Someone suddenly shouted angrily and locked his eyes on the old man… If the old man didn’t think he was right to talk to Xu que, they wouldn’t be trapped by hundreds of thousands of fairy crystals! The old man also noticed something and hurriedly closed his eyes to understand Zen, but he also hated Xu deficiency in his heart! Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude were shocked when they saw Xu Ke disappear from the lotus seat! It’s said that cultivating Buddhism and understanding Zen need pure and kind noble morality. Why did the dark hearted Xu boy progress so fast Does it have anything to do with singing? ” A suspicious color appeared on the two dogs’ faces, and then opened his mouth and sang, “it’s raining outside, like my hard work…” “grass!” In an instant, all the people in the hall shouted angrily, and their voices almost collapsed. Is it over yet On the third watch, I asked for a monthly ticket. If you don’t vote again, you won’t even be third.]

chapters.title: Chapter 1643
chapters.body:
Chapter 1643

Chapter 1643

C.1643

After a burst of illusory spatial distortion, Xu Ke’s vision gradually recovered.

He looked around curiously. He was sent to a lotus pond like the vast sea.

This lotus pond is surprisingly large, and countless wonderful lotus blossoms on the water.

On top of each wonderful lotus stood a young boy, but each boy was just a ethereal shadow, which looked very unreal.

“It’s a little interesting!”

Xu Xu smiled and didn’t worry about doing anything.

After all, I use the system to open and hang up. I must appear here faster than everyone else. I still have plenty of time

Whoosh!

The idea just came out, and there was a teenager in monk’s clothes in the lotus pond.

“….” Xu que suddenly stared.

Nima, so fast?

However, after the monk costume boy appeared, he didn’t look at Xu Ke much. He directly sat on a wonderful lotus, slowly overlapping with the boy’s projection.

Then, a Buddha light came out behind the monk clothes boy.

“Sleeping trough, isn’t this guy a hanging ratio?”

Xu que stared at the monk clothes boy suspiciously.

But after the other party sat down, there was no other action.

“Do you want to understand Zen in the lotus pond?”

Xu que muttered.

I decided to ask first.

He recalled the voice at the first level, but it didn’t appear at the moment. He had to look up and shout, “Hello! That voice, don’t you come out and explain how to play the second level? ”

Pop!

A howl did not attract the sound, but woke up the youth in the middle of the lotus pond, and the Buddha light dissipated instantly!

The artistic conception was broken, and the monk clothes boy was not angry. He was very calm. He got up slowly and looked at Xu vacancy: “benefactor, you disturb the artistic conception of the poor monk!”

“It’s all right. Don’t you monks pay attention to fate? Being disturbed means that the fate has not arrived yet. The little monk continues to refuel! ” Xu que waved his hand.

“….” the monk costume boy was speechless for a moment. He seemed to be speechless by this sentence, so he didn’t say anything more and went to another wonderful lotus.

“Ah, little monk… Oh, no, master, since you’re awake, why don’t you tell me how to spend this level?” Xu que looked at the monk clothes boy and showed a bright smile.

The monk’s young man frowned slightly and said faintly, “follow fate.”

With that, he went directly to the depths of the lotus pond, as if to avoid this annoying Xu lack.

“Oh!”

Xu que watched the monk’s robe boy go away, smiled, then jumped in shape and tried to set foot on a wonderful lotus.

Whoosh!

But then a light flickered.

Another thin old man appeared in the lotus pond.

The old man noticed Xu Ke for the first time and immediately asked, “Taoist friend, is this the second level?”

Xu que glanced at the old man and said, “who do you ask me? Realize it yourself and don’t bother me! ”

“Ah……” the old man looked confused. Did he say something wrong?

Why is this boy so grumpy!

Tut tut Tut, young people nowadays are becoming more and more disrespectful!

At this time, Xu que was already sitting on the knees of a wonderful lotus, learning from the original appearance of the monk in uniform, and began to understand the artistic conception contained in the boy’s projection on the wonderful lotus.

A moment later, Xu Xu didn’t feel anything.

An hour later, dozens of people had come to the lotus pond, but Xu que still had no feeling.

“What the hell!”

Xu que couldn’t help opening his eyes, but found that other miaolian around him were full of people, and several of them were about to coincide with the boy above miaolian.

“Madder! The version is for me. I won’t play anymore. ” Xu que scolded angrily, but also mixed with some divine resonance. Leng woke up several monks who were about to integrate the projection Artistic Conception!

“Dao you, be quiet!” Everyone glared at Xu que!

If the fighting were not restricted here, they would definitely hold the boy down and beat him!

The old man who had previously talked with Xu que couldn’t help but say, “little friend, this pass needs to sink down to understand the supreme magic. It’s impossible to have a state of mind like you.”

As soon as Xu Ke heard this, he was a little unhappy immediately!

A mere immortal Zun dares to teach me this great Luo Jinxian to do things. How can he be confident?

Isn’t that the magic of perception?

Is it difficult?

No, it’s not hard at all. I’m going to hang up!

Xu Ke immediately called out the system interface and asked directly.

As a result, the reply of the system was really like what the old man said. The projection of these children contains Buddhist magic, which needs meditation to understand!

However, the system can also help you understand, and the price is incredibly low, which makes Xu Ke unbelievable.

To crack a projection, you only need 200 points!

“No, no, the system has changed.”

Xu que was very happy immediately, and a smile appeared on his face.

When they saw the smile on Xu Que’s face, they all shook their heads: “Hey, I’m young and can’t stand the blow. Is that crazy?”

“Perhaps it was because of the previous coincidence that he easily broke the pass that he was complacent. As a result, he lost his mind when he hit a wall here.”

Xu que didn’t bother to pay attention to these people. He directly began to let the system crack the wonderful lotus under himself!

A moment later

“Ding! Congratulations to the host ‘Xu Ke’ for obtaining the Buddhist secret method [dragon claw hand]

“I’ll kill Xu que. I’ll break him into pieces!” Zhou Mei clenched her fists tightly and was extremely angry!

He couldn’t figure out why the eldest brother would be killed in this place under the control of the will of heaven and earth. The key is that the murderer will not be punished.

“Tut Tut, brother Ke, look at their stupid appearance. It seems that they haven’t guessed the truth.” The two dogs raised their eyebrows, sipped their mouths, and whispered to Xu que with a full face.

Duan Jiude is very emotional. The villain’s IQ is not online. Is this the inhumanity of heaven and earth or the distortion of human nature?

Sleeping trough, is this goods so shameless?

If you really want retribution, don’t you have to blow up hundreds of times for what this guy did in the first two levels?

“Yes, I’m short of brother, or I’ll save them.” Two dogs also said.

Xu Ke is stunned. What do these two goods mean?

Brain pumping?

Save a knitting man at this time

“Eh, wait, do you two know how to break the pass?” Xu que suddenly reacted and immediately asked Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi.

Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi didn’t respond, but there was an unusually obscene and cheap smile in their eyes.

“Brother Qian, why don’t you use that treasure? Only that treasure can save everything.” The second dog spoke again and said in a praying tone.

treasure?

The second dog shouted, turned his head and looked at Xu Duan. His eyes were about to crack and said, “brother Duan, do you think we can live without using the treasure? Even if we can get away with it, there are so many people here. How can you bear to watch them die here for nothing? ”

Everyone present was instantly moved.

Sleeping trough, this dog is good!

And this is on our side. It’s a good dog to stand up and talk in order to save us!

From now on, we will never eat dog meat again!

Everyone stared, shocked and unbelievable.

It turned out that what he had done before was not for his own self-interest, but for fear of a dangerous situation like the third level. Only then did he converge so many fairy crystals and treasures, all of which were prepared to urge the mysterious treasure!

When someone said this, Xu que immediately shouted, “shut up. I said, I’ll never charge you half a cent. If you look up to me, you’ll give me some thin noodles. Don’t mention taking things out. I won’t accept it.”

Chapter 1652

Chapter 1652

C.1652

“Ah, this…”

Many monks were stunned.

Was rejected?

How much blood have we shed in our hearts before asking for benefits? This time, we wanted to take the initiative to give some benefits, but we were rejected?

Originally, they also wanted to see if this was a new routine, so they offered to hand over some Xianjing and so on.

But now being rejected is completely beyond their expectation.

“Missing brother!” Suddenly, er Gouzi jumped out and shouted, “you have to think clearly. You can save everyone, but would it be bad to expose the bead now?”

bead?

Everyone present was stunned when they caught the keyword.

Xu que was stunned and suddenly realized.

Yes, how can I forget the purple bead? It’s an independent small space. If you hide in, you can directly ignore the Shura people at this level.

Thinking of this, Xu que waved his big hand and said with dignity: “it doesn’t matter. Just a bead. Let’s have a look. Even if someone from Tianmen wants to rob, I don’t believe all the heroes here will sit idly by.”

what the fuck!

The Tianmen strongman not far away almost scolded.

When did we say we were going to rob?

Why do you guess at us like that?

Xu que naturally didn’t believe the nonsense of these people, but he also took out the purple bead.

This bead is very unstable. Whenever there is a fluctuation of Xianyuan force, it will directly suck the other party into it. If someone really grabs it, it will be completely thrown into the net.

Xu Xu really wants the strong man of Tianmen to rush over right now.

“Whoosh!”

As soon as the bead came out, it suddenly burst out of the majestic void force.

There was an immediate commotion in the crowd.

“Eh, this thing… What a strong force of void fluctuation!”

There was an old man with a surprised look on his face: “Xu Xiaoyou, with such empty power, does it mean that this thing contains a small world?”

“Good!” Xu Ke smiled and quietly blocked the Xianyuan force in his hand, leaving only the purple bead lying on it calmly.

The people present had changed their faces and stared at the bead.

Is there a small world in this thing?

This… This must at least be the existence of the divine object level!

If you can own this thing, can’t you open up a world on your own, and you can be God on holidays?

Several strong men in Tianmen also had their hearts pounding and speeding up, and their breathing became rapid.

I really want to rob this bead!

“Xu Daoyou, I can’t imagine that you have such a divine object. I admire and envy it, but I don’t know what the relationship between this object and cracking this pass is?”

The old man inquired.

Xu que looked at the old man with many words and scolded him. Why did he cooperate so well?

What does this bead have to do with cracking this level? How do I know?

“Cough… It’s too powerful. I forcibly took it out and showed it to everyone. It really consumes a lot. Let two… Let King Wei Wu and Duan Jiude solve your doubts!” Xu que began to play, holding up the bead with a pale face and eating hard.

“It doesn’t hurt. I can hold it. Let’s have a few more eyes.” Xu que clenched his teeth and said with difficulty.

The crowd suddenly felt a heat.

Xu Daoyou is so warm-hearted, a good man!

“Ladies and gentlemen, in fact, the small world in this thing is the key for us to crack this pass.” At this time, er Gouzi also began to explain it to the public.

Duan Jiude cooperates with his partner: “yes, we’ll use the secret method of the tianbang sect later to open this thing. At that time, everyone can enter the small world.”

“As long as we enter it, we can urge the bead to break through the void of this level and enter the next level safely.” Er Gouzi added. After hearing this, they frowned slightly and hesitated. Everyone into that little world together? This… This is not very good. After all, this is the thing that fried sky took out for himself. I’m afraid the small world inside is also under their control. If you go in, don’t you throw yourself into the net and let the mermaid meat Xu Daoyou, I don’t know what to say. ” At this time, the old man said again, embarrassed. Xu que turned his eyes quietly and said with a smile, “but it doesn’t hurt to talk.” This thing is a small world. If we enter it and you don’t let us out, what’s the difference between us and being trapped at this level? ” The old man said bluntly This…… “Xu que was stunned and looked stunned. Then he stared at the people present and said in disbelief, “you… Do you all think so of me? In your eyes, I am such an unbearable man? ” Ha…… “Xu que shook his head and smiled like a self mockery:” it’s all right. I never forced you. Anyway, whether you come or not, we will urge this thing to leave this level. Whether you come or not, whatever. ” With that, Xu que put away the beads directly and walked to the top of the mountain. Su Yunlan looked at each other, didn’t speak, and directly followed Xu que How unreasonable! ” The two dogs jumped out and glared at the people: “it’s not easy for God to respect all beings. They are all one life. They took the initiative to ask brother short to save you. I didn’t expect you to be so ignorant and doubt brother short’s motivation.” Oh, old man, I said long ago that these people should not be saved. You are still too naive and kind. ” Duan Jiude sneered and left Shit, I’m blind. Anyway, your life is your own. You can’t die if you love it. ” Two dogs swearing, also turned to follow This… You misunderstood me. I didn’t mean that. ” The old man was a little silly and hurried to explain, but Xu Ke and his party had gone away. Everyone at the scene stayed where they were and hesitated. What the old man asked was the voice of all of them. After all, it’s someone else’s small world. If the other party has any evil thoughts at that time, they will really throw themselves into the net. But if they continue to stay at this pass… They turn around and look at the large number of shuras coming from behind, and they are also a little embarrassed. It seems more dangerous to stay here Benefactor Xu, I am willing to enter that small world. ” At this time, the little light bulb put his hands together and swept solemnly towards the top of the mountain to catch up with Xu que. The others saw this, and immediately there were dozens of figures. They no longer hesitated and followed closely

chapters.title: Chapter 1654
chapters.body:
Chapter 1654

Chapter 1654

C.1654

Ah, this

Everyone in the audience was stunned.

This is king Wei Wu and Duan Jiude of the fried heaven sect. I’ve never seen them lose anything since I heard about their deeds.

But now, both of them were seriously injured and fainted directly.

This level is too difficult.

It’s terrible!

But the Tianmen people are to blame for all this.

“Amitabha, benefactor, what should we do now?” The little light bulb came back to himself, sang the Buddha’s horn and looked at Xu que.

The eyes of everyone present also focused on Xu que.

At this time, he has long been the backbone of everyone.

“Xu Daoyou, maybe I’ll help you. We’ll open the small world in the bead and force the people from Tianmen out.” At this time, the elder of the Ming Hejiao said.

“Shut up!”

Xu que immediately shouted angrily, “if it weren’t for you, an old man, to make trouble here and say what you can guarantee for the people of Tianmen, how could we end up like this? Duan Jiude and King Weiwu of our bombing gang would not have been so badly hurt in order to cover us. ”

The elder of Styx sect was scolded so that he didn’t dare to answer a word.

The strong man in the immortal state had to bow his head with guilt at the moment.

He was too confident before. He thought that Tianmen people would take the overall situation into account and could not mess around.

Unexpectedly, those bastards in Tianmen were so short-sighted that they directly cut off everyone’s way of life.

“Cough…”

At this time, Duan Jiude, who was supposed to be in a coma, suddenly coughed violently, and a large stream of blood gushed out of his mouth, but he also woke up.

“Lack… Lack brother, don’t blame them. We’re the only ones to blame!”

Duan Jiude said weakly, and his face was very pale: “brother Duan, you… You save them, old man. I’m hurt… Cough… It’s not a big problem.”

Saying that, Duan Jiude’s blood flowed out like no money.

The crowd at the scene was so excited that their eyelids jumped.

Nima, it’s all hurt like this. What’s the matter?

And persuade Xu Wuxian to save us?

Elder Duan Jiude, you are really unparalleled in benevolence and righteousness!

At this time, the two dogs next to suddenly opened their mouths, and a large stream of blood sprayed out directly like a fountain.

The sudden blood column startled everyone.

“Brother Kuang… Come on, save everyone. I can hold on.”

The two dogs trembled and said that the blood sprayed from their mouths had not stopped, and had gathered into a stream on the ground.

The people felt ashamed and uneasy again.

In particular, the elder of the Ming Hejiao immediately took out a storage ring and handed it to him: “you two, I’m only responsible for my carelessness. This is the healing medicine of my Ming Hejiao. It was refined by Miao Xianzi, the master of the TIANYAO Pavilion. There are no more than 100 xianyuanzhou. Although it’s extremely precious, please take it.”

“No need.”

Two dogs and Duan Jiude shook their heads and refused. They always looked at Xu vacancy and begged, “brother vacancy, help everyone.”

Boom!

In an instant, the whole audience was shocked, and a long lost warmth flowed all over the body.

This… Is this the truth of the world?

It’s been a long time since I met such a righteous and selfless spirit!

We are known as cultivating immortals, but in the end, we all cultivate a selfish heart.

Duan Jiude and King Weiwu of the bombing Gang never forget their original heart. Even if they are in danger, they still don’t forget the safety of others.

Gao Yi!

“You two, these are some thoughts of shengyuanmen. Let’s see if we can help you!”

“You two have worked hard. I have a special healing medicine made by the patriarch, which is no worse than that refined by the wonderful fairy. Please take it!”

“Yes, you two should get better. Otherwise, even if Xu Daoyou rescues us, how can we feel at ease if there are any disadvantages between you?”

For a time, all the friars took out all kinds of precious healing pills and forced them into the arms of Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude.

After all kinds of “rejection” failed, er Gouzi and Duan Jiude could only “embarrass” to accept the holy medicine.

“Oh, that’s all!”

At this time, Xu que seemed to be influenced by this scene and sighed deeply.

“Since you are so intentional, I will sacrifice the last means. Maybe it won’t last long, but… I can only do my best!”

When the voice fell, Xu que suddenly drank and stepped on the ground.

“Bang!”

The whole mountain rocked in an instant.

Then, the Ashura Dharma phase behind Xu que suddenly soared and directly magnified to a height of tens of feet.

C.1655

How to put it?

I always feel a little uncomfortable and a little unaccustomed.

After all, the first two levels were just collected by this guy. At the third level, the goods suddenly changed and became selfless.

The key is that now everyone is willing to send him Xianjing, but he doesn’t want it.

This NIMA

Sure enough, men are eels… Bah, fickle.

“The old master doesn’t need to say much. I’m Xu kuxiang. If I don’t accept a penny from you, I’ll never accept it. This is the principle.” Xu Ke’s firm and incomparable response is still struggling to support the Dharma phase.

However, this kind of “persistence” is of no great use. Just after saying the words, the FA Xiang suddenly cracked hundreds of cracks, shaky and ready to burst at any time.

Those Shura people not far away suddenly brightened their eyes and stared covetously.

Everyone present was so frightened that their hearts missed a beat.

This dharma phase can’t be destroyed!

A group of people gathered here. Once the Dharma phase was broken and the Shura crowd rushed over, everyone had no place to run. They could eat a pot directly.

“Xu Daoyou, the principle is set by people, and what people set can be changed. But I won’t make it difficult for you. You can refuse, but I’m willing to give it! ”

The leader of the Styx sect shouted, clapped the storage ring, and hundreds of millions of fairy crystals were swept out in an instant.

Such dense fairy crystals appear more and more bright in the air. Swimming in the air, they seem to turn into a long river and flow directly to Xu Ke’s feet.

However, as soon as each immortal crystal approached Xu Xu, it disappeared instantly, as if it had been melted directly.

“No, old master, stop it, don’t do that!”

Xu Xu’s face changed dramatically and shouted to stop all this.

At the same time, he also saw the soaring number of fairy crystals in the system storage space!

“Boom!”

As the immortal crystal of the elder of the Styx sect continued to “melt”, the huge Dharma phase behind Xu lacked was finally shocked, regained its brilliance and became solid.

“Look, the Dharma phase has been restored again.”

“This is related to the lives of all of us. Don’t hide any more. Throw out those with fairy crystals.”

“Don’t tangle any more, otherwise Xu Daoyou’s Dharma phase will be broken, and it’s useless for us to keep this dead thing.”

Many people shouted. At the same time, they took out their precious fairy crystals and threw them at Xu vacancy.

“Ah ah!”

“Don’t do this!”

“By doing so, you are making me break my promise.”

“I’m ashamed of the fried heaven Gang!”

“Why are you so!”

Xu Ke kept shouting and laughing in his heart.

In the system storage space, the number of fairy crystals directly soared by nearly 10 billion.

This is really rich!

“Hey, look, the lotus mark on our wrists seems to move.” At this time, someone suddenly shouted, very surprised and excited.

As soon as the others listened, they also rolled up their sleeves to check.

Sure enough, the lotus imprinted petals on the wrist really sparkled.

“My God, the mark is finally lit up.”

“What is this?”

“We clearly didn’t do anything.”

“Is it difficult for this regiment to test unity?”

“Unity fart, do you understand the Buddha Dharma? The test of this level is the nature of mind, and all sentient beings are equal. ” Someone retorted.

“All beings are equal? What do you say? ”

“Amitabha!” The little light bulb put his hands together and stood up: “the benefactor was right just now. This level is really the equality of all sentient beings. These shuras are all equal with us.”

“What?” Everyone was stunned.

Are the shuras equal to us?

What does that mean?

“I see!”

One person shouted: “the first group of people who came in before us thought they were monsters when they saw these Shura people. They would directly kill and kill indiscriminately, which would annoy these Shura people to besiege us.”

“Lying trough, so we are all the later ones?”

“So this level was originally the easiest. As long as we come in and coexist peacefully with the Shura people without disturbing each other, we can pass this level?”

“Shit, those who started first are really short handed!”

After they understood the way to solve this pass, they couldn’t help scolding.

Xu Xu is also a little stunned.

Dare to love this level is so simple?

So this is a mistake. I opened the Dharma phase to protect everyone, and those Shura people slowly lost their goal.

Therefore, the sense of hatred gradually decreased, and the “equality of all sentient beings” slowly began to work wonders. In other words, just hold on for a moment and everyone can pass? Ah, we have to hurry up and make another profit Poof! ” Xu Ke immediately opened his mouth and spewed out a stream of blood, and his momentum became extremely depressed. The Dharma phase behind him was dim again and began to show small cracks Lying trough! ” So many fairy crystals, can’t hold it so fast? ” No, Xu Daoyou, hold on for a moment, and we can pass the Customs together soon! ” The crowd shouted anxiously Don’t panic. There’s a God. ” At this time, er Gouzi jumped out, took out a black weapon and threw it directly at Xu vacancy Brother Ke, this is an ancient immortal weapon. There are also a lot of immortal yuan power in it. Please absorb it quickly. ” As soon as the voice fell, the thrown blade disappeared in front of Xu Kuang. Xu que also immediately checked the storage space and drew a hard blow from the corner of his mouth [excrement stirring stick]: an ordinary stick, as its name suggests, is only used to stir excrement. Er Gouzi owes a lot of beating goods. He has acting skills when he is free, but he can’t keep up with the props. Dare this thing pretend to be an ancient fairy? If this is detected to be false, the whole Bureau will be gone Eh, are magic weapons and the like OK? ” Yes, we didn’t expect that Xianjing is mainly to provide Xianyuan power. Those high-level magic weapons or immortal tools contain a lot of Xianyuan power, which just plays such a role. ” Ladies and gentlemen, the chance to pass is at hand. Take out all your treasures. ” Xu Daoyou, I have an ancient insect stone here. It’s expensive. It’s really wasted to extract Xianyuan power. But now the situation is critical, and I won’t hide it. ” The elder of the Styx cult threw out a crystal clear yellow stone with flesh pain on his face. Through the Yellow luster, you can clearly see that there is a intact red bug sealed inside What kind of amber is this? It doesn’t feel simple. ” Xu Xu himself was shocked. This is something similar to amber. It’s really extraordinary. However, he could not pay attention to more observation. He was moved and directly put it into the storage space of the system. Boom! At the next moment, Xu Ke solidified the phase transformation of the method again. Seeing this, the crowd immediately became more excited Useful! Really useful! ” Come on, throw all the treasures containing Xianyuan power to Xu Daoyou. ” Come on! Family, victory is at hand. ” There was constant encouragement in the crowd. Xu Xu was full of tears and pain: “no, please stop. If you do so, what face will I have to face the millions of gang members in the future?” Everybody stop, don’t vote for the monthly ticket… Is this wave crazy enough? Do you vote?]

chapters.title: Chapter 1656
chapters.body:
Chapter 1656

Chapter 1656

C.1656

Whoosh! Whoosh! Whoosh!

A large number of immortal crystals and magic weapons constantly flied in mid air and flew to Xu que.

Some people even clenched their teeth and directly threw out a semi immortal weapon, which alerted many people present.

So more and more monks also threw out, and all the treasures at the bottom of the box were thrown out, all swept to Xu’s face, and quickly disappeared.

In everyone’s opinion, these things are all turned into immortal yuan power to maintain Xu’s lack of Dharma.

But Xu Xu is crazy when he looks at the mountains of treasures in the system space.

Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude saw gold in their eyes.

This wave has really made a lot of money.

If such a huge harvest is taken as the inside information, it can directly kill any great power in Tianzhou.

No, no, these details, even in xianyuanzhou, may be enough to support one of them.

“Xu Daoyou, hold on a little longer. We’ll pass the customs soon.”

Someone hollowed out his family, looked at the lotus petal on his wrist and shouted excitedly.

The rest of the people are looking forward to it. They have no treasure to throw away, but they feel good as long as they can pass this level.

After all, if you can’t pass this level, everyone will have to die under the siege of those Shura people. It’s useless to save more treasures.

“What you did today has ruined Xu’s reputation. If you didn’t care about your lives, Xu wouldn’t live in this way even if he died outside and jumped down from the mountain.”

Xu Ke’s face was full of grief and anger, and his eyes showed a kind of helplessness and suffered all kinds of grievances.

“Don’t worry, Xu Daoyou. We will never spread the news today.”

The people comforted one after another. For fear that Xu Weizhen couldn’t open his mind, they directly withdrew the FA Xiang and jumped down from here.

“Amitabha, benefactor Xu, you have not broken your promise, and this is to save all sentient beings. There is no need to do so.” The little light bulb also said positively.

“Oh, you don’t understand. The most important thing for the people of our fried heaven Gang is reputation. Since I said I wouldn’t charge you half a cent, even if you gave it voluntarily. ”

Xu que shook his head and sighed. Youyou said, “I don’t know what kind of face I should face the millions of bombers after I go out.”

“Xu Daoyou, if you don’t mind, you can post an honorary elder in our Styx sect later. As long as you say a word, there are tens of thousands of followers of Styx sect, which can be deployed by you.”

The elder of Styx immediately opened his mouth, took out a gold token and threw it at Xu que.

Thousands of believers?

Xu Xu’s eyebrows picked up in an instant.

Nima, can’t I force millions of members of the heaven bombing Gang?

It’s a Styx sect. It’s tens of millions of followers. Did you force the saint to shout so many times and don’t get any forced value.

“Xu Daoyou, on behalf of Hehuang sect, I sincerely invite you to become an honorary elder of our sect.” At this time, another man came out and threw out a token.

“Our Lingyu sect also invited Xu Daoyou to be an honorary elder.”

“So is my cloud gate!”

“I beggars’ sect…”

Soon, many influential figures present took the initiative to set an example.

They are not stupid. This kind of kindness is not bad for them. Everyone can see their weak strength. If they are really willing to become honorary elders of major forces, they will definitely earn money for these forces.

“You don’t have to. If it’s really good for me, you can send someone to join our fried heaven Gang so that Xu can commit crimes and make contributions.”

Xu Kui said so, but he also put away all the tokens.

As soon as they were asked to join the fried heaven Gang, they directly chose silence and pretended not to hear anything.

The bombers are strong.

But the problem is… It’s a dead enemy with Tianmen.

What’s the difference between joining the bombers and dying?

“I’m too easy to announce that I belong to the fried heaven gang from now on.” At this time, Su Yunlan said.

The crowd suddenly turned pale.

Taiyi sect wants to join the fried sky Gang?

what the fuck!

This is the power founded by Tianmen, and it was founded by Yurou fairy. Are you going to join the fried heaven Gang?

“It’s very kind of you, madam. Come and reward you with a MEDA.”

Xu que immediately smiles and blows kisses to Su Yunlan across the air.

Su Yunlan blushed and stared at Xu Kui angrily.

In public, what are you doing.

The people present were also wide eyed.

Good guy, it seems that those treasures have really fed the goods and supported the FA Xiang. They still have time to kiss people.

However, such a scene also relieved everyone.

Since Xu Ke can hold this phase, it means that this level is basically stable.

… soon, there was a sudden movement on the top of the mountain. Those shuras seemed to see Xu lack trying to protect everyone and began to disperse gradually and retreat down the mountain. As the shuras retreated, the lotus petals on their wrists began to shine again. Until an hour later, the petal marks on everyone’s wrists were completely bright, and the whole mountain began to shake. Boom! With a dull noise, a huge light beam sprang up on the hillside and rushed straight into the sky After that, this level has finally passed! ” The exit has appeared. ” The crowd began to shout in surprise. Some people even swept out of the coverage of Dharma phase, directly came to the edge of the mountain, looked down and said in a surprised voice: “if so, those Shura people have recovered their peace, rested at the foot of the mountain and no longer hate us.” When they heard the speech, they also tentatively walked out of the scope of FA Xiang. At the foot of the mountain, Shura people looked up at them, but they were no longer interested in them and looked away directly I really want to thank Xu Daoyou this time, otherwise I’m afraid we’ll fall here. ” The elder of Styx sect looked at Xu Que and bowed his hands to thank him You’re welcome. It’s your effort. ” Xu que waved his hand and removed the FA Xiang. His face was full of “fatigue” Xu Daoyou is modest. Without Xu Daoyou’s secret technique, those treasures would not work. ” Thank you, Xu Daoyou. Let’s go first. ” The crowd thanked Xu Kuang one after another, then turned around and swept towards the shining, and the monkey hurried to the next level. After all, this is just the third level. They almost lost their lives and exhausted all their treasures. If they can’t inherit the ancient Buddha on this trip, they will lose a lot Brother Qian, come on, share the stolen goods. ” When the crowd went away, er Gouzi rushed forward immediately, biting Xu’s trouser legs and urging him What’s the hurry? There are so many people here. We’ll divide them after we go out. ” Xu que slapped two dogs and led Su Yunlan to the hillside. The entrance to the fourth level is almost the same as the entrance to the previous levels. It is an array with transmission function. After several people explored with the spirit, they didn’t hesitate any more and stepped directly into it

chapters.title: Chapter 1657
chapters.body:
Chapter 1657

Chapter 1657

C.1657

Whoosh!

With a strong pull, the scene in front of the group changed rapidly.

In the blink of an eye, everyone appeared at the fourth level.

In the air, there is an old ancient city floating.

From a distance, the city walls are extremely mottled and broken, and only a few incomplete boards are left at the city gate. They shake gently with the wind, making a “creak” and “creak” sound.

A kind of gloomy air permeated from the ancient city.

“Strange, how can there be such a test in the Buddhist land? The spirit of yin and evil is so strong! ” Su Yunlan’s face was dignified and frowned.

“Don’t worry, I’m healthy and masculine all over and just restrain this evil spirit. Stay close to me… Er Gouzi, I didn’t say you. Don’t hold my leg!” Xu Kuyi pushed Er Gouzi’s head away and looked disgusted.

“Something’s wrong with this place!” Duan Jiude looked around, frowned and said in a deep voice, “the group of people with us in the third pass are gone!”

“Eh, yes, why are those salted fish gone?” Xu Ke’s eyebrows picked up and reacted.

The elders of Styx sect were only a few breaths ahead of them.

But now it seems that only a group of people are left in this level.

“Brother Kuang, could it be that our last pass was too cruel and immoral, and the ancient Buddha couldn’t see it anymore. He specially sent us here?” The second dog guessed.

“Fuck you, you’re wicked!” Xu Que and Duan Jiude scolded at the same time.

“Come on, you three stop making trouble and don’t forget the business.” Su Yunlan saw that the three goods were about to fight and hurriedly stopped the way.

Su ling’er also nodded, and his small nose frowned gently: “I seem to smell Xiao Qi’s breath, and she’s here too.”

“Oh?”

Xu Ke immediately swept his eyes and opened his powerful divine consciousness in an instant.

Boom!

Tens of thousands of breath rushed into the divine sense immediately.

“Lying trough!”

Xu que was startled and looked straight at the ancient city in mid air: “all the people are in that old city.”

“Ben shenzun also sensed that there was a strong prohibition outside the old city.” The second dog also said.

“The third level, those who are with us are also inside.” Duan Jiude nodded.

“I’ll go. We’re the only ones left outside the city?”

Xu que stared.

It’s a little weird.

Everyone was sent to the city, and only a few of them were left in the sand outside the city.

What grudges.

“Brother lack, the God knows.” At this time, er Gouzi’s eyes brightened and exclaimed, “it’s the problem of prohibition.”

“What do you say?” Xu Que and others all looked at Er Gouzi.

Er Gouzi proudly explained: “the prohibition is a composite array. The whole city is integrated with the array, so the city can only accommodate 50000 creatures. We estimate that when we came, there were just 50000 people in the city, so we were excluded.”

“So we happened to be a little late?” It’s a bit bad luck to pick Xu’s eyebrows.

“It’s all right. When several people die in the city, we will be automatically transmitted…” two dogs shook their paws.

Just before he finished, the figure of Er Gouzi suddenly twisted.

Shua, two dogs disappeared from several people out of thin air.

“Lying trough!”

“Lying trough, lying trough!” Xu Que and Duan Jiude exclaimed at the same time.

Su Yunlan was also stunned.

“Did the two dogs run by themselves or were sent up by force?” Duan Jiude asked.

“It should have been forcibly transmitted.” Xu que shrugged his shoulders.

If Er Gouzi stealthily runs away in an array, he must be able to detect it.

But the transmission just now was motionless. Without any omen, the two dogs disappeared directly.

“It seems like what Er Gouzi said. As long as someone dies in the city, we will replace him!” Xu que said.

“Then this wave is not a big problem. With the bad heart of Ergou teacher, since they all go up, they will certainly find a way to kill several people and pit us in.” Duan Jiude road.

“There’s nothing wrong with that.” Xu nodded.

Then, the party simply waited in place.

“Whoosh!”

A moment later, there was another light noise.

Duan Jiude disappeared directly from where he was.

“Oh, Mr. Duan was also sent away. It seems that it will be Ben’s turn to force the saint right away.”

Xu Kuxi smiled and couldn’t wait to go up to see what fun the ancient city had.

“This kind of casualties is not high. From the frequency point of view, it should not be as dangerous as the third level.” Su Yunlan said.

“It’s hard to say.” Xu que shook his head with a smile: “according to my guess, the more difficult the next level should be, but it doesn’t matter. If I go up first later, I’ll clean up the danger first. Then you…”! Whoosh! Whoosh! The voice didn’t fall, and there were several light sounds in succession. Su yunlanya’s wife Su linger and her party disappeared from Xu Que’s eyes in an instant. “…” Xu Ke’s smile was frozen in an instant. Nima, Ben forced the saint to fall last? No! How can the ancient city be lively without me It seems that the saying is true. Important people often have to come last. ” Xu Ke resumed smiling again at the next moment. The last one is the last one. It’s just a matter of waiting for a while anyway. He simply called out the system interface, exchanged a beach chair, got a parasol, and directly enjoyed the beach sunshine bath on the sand sea. One hand is 1982 sprite and the other hand is Chinese tobacco. It’s very beautiful. However, after a pack of cigarettes… Xu que is still lying on the beach chair with a cigarette end under his feet I’ll wipe it. Won’t anything happen? Haven’t sent me up for so long? ” Xu que frowned. This wave has been waiting too long, at least for several hours. There are two dogs and Duan Jiude on it. How can there be no casualties for so long? Is there anyone else who has children to fill the population? These only a few hours are not enough Whoosh! ” Suddenly, the familiar sound of breaking the air sounded in Xu Ke’s ear Oh, come, come… “He was relieved, but he was stunned again. The sound is there, but the question is, why are you still lying on the beach chair? It’s still a sand sea around “Xu Duan?” At this time, a familiar voice came from behind. Xu que immediately looked stunned and suddenly turned around. A beautiful shadow in white stood behind him with a delicate and beautiful face, but he looked at him expressionless Xuanyuan Wanrong? ” Xu que got up from the beach chair and said in amazement, “Why are you here?” I’m looking for something that may unlock our relationship in Taiyi Tianshi. ” Xuanyuan Wanrong said faintly oh Can Taiyi Tianshi be untied? ” After Xu Ke was stunned, his face was full of joy. When Xuanyuan Wanrong saw his reaction, his face was suddenly cold: “just speculation.” It’s okay. Guess is also hope. You tell me what it is, and I’ll help you. ” Xu Xu is still very enthusiastic. He really wants to get rid of Xuanyuan Wanrong. He knew very well that the woman could not be provoked You don’t have to mind your own business. Take care of yourself. ” Xuanyuan Wanrong replied coldly, his tone was obviously more indifferent than before, and there was a little anger No, what do you mean I’m nosy? My name is also… “Why are you here?” Xuanyuan Wanrong suddenly interrupted Xu Que and asked Me? ” Xu Ke was stunned and spread his hand: “it’s all right, I’ll walk around.” Then he shook the Red China in his hand and handed it to Xuanyuan Wanrong: “do you want to have a Chinese son?” Xuanyuan Wanrong frowned slightly, looked at the smoke in Xu Que’s hand, looked at Xu que again, and then nodded: “OK!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1658
chapters.body:
Chapter 1658

Chapter 1658

C.1658

Hearing Xuanyuan Wanrong’s answer, Xu que was shocked and shook his hand, and Red China fell to the ground with a “pa”.

What’s the matter with this woman?

Instead of her previous character, she should face each other coldly and scold me!

Promise to smoke?

“Does the sun rise here from the west?”

Xu Ke took his hand as a curtain to cover his eyes and looked at the fiery red sun in the distance.

Xuanyuan Wanrong frowned slightly and said in a voice, “this is a forbidden place. Sunrise and sunset all depend on the forbidden operation, and sunrise in the west is not impossible.”

“Whoosh!”

Before the voice fell, a slight wind swept by.

Xuanyuan Wanrong looked stunned, and a look of surprise flashed in his eyes. Then he looked cold, raised his hand and patted behind him.

Bang!

Xu Que’s figure suddenly appeared, and the purple gold force Wang stick in his hand was shaking wildly, just like a posture of getting rid of it.

“You must not be Xuanyuan Wanrong! Say, “who are you?”

Xu Xu’s face was serious and dignified: “she certainly won’t accept my cold joke. It’s more impossible to promise to smoke!”

Xuanyuan Wanrong looked colder: “we have Taiyi Tianshu connected. Who do you think can fake it?”

He put away his little black stick and was surprised.

The woman’s cultivation strength has improved again!

Although she didn’t go all out just now, she can beat herself back easily. This strength is already unfathomable!

And

Xu Ke always feels that this woman’s attitude seems a little strange?

The memories of their experiences in the memory world were all brought out when they left. Logically, the woman should know that she handed her cigarettes just to tease her.

She accepted it?

Xu Weiwei narrowed his eyes and looked up and down at Xuanyuan Wanrong, thinking what the woman had experienced.

“This is a place for Buddhist training. Can you wander here?” Xuanyuan Wanrong raised his hand, and a spirit gushed out, sucking Red China into his hand.

Xu que stared at Xuanyuan dumbfounded. Wan Rong took out a cigarette, put it under her nose and smelled it. Unexpectedly, she really lit it and smoked!

Mom!

Dead!

The woman smoked!

Smoking is harmful to health!

“Pa!”

Xu que slapped himself with his backhand.

Mmm… It’s burning. It’s not a dream.

“Well… Can you smoke?” Xu Wei couldn’t help asking, “it’s easy to choke when smoking for the first time…”

Xuanyuan Wanrong said faintly, “No.”

As he spoke, he expertly spit out a few smoke rings.

Xu Ke:

What the fuck is that?

When I smoked for the first time, my nose and tears choked out!

However, after taking a sip, Xuanyuan Wanrong threw away the lit cigarette and threw hongzhonghua back to Xu Xu: “there is nothing here. I don’t know why you like it so much.”

Xu que smelled the speech, carried his hands and made a melancholy gesture: “I don’t like smoking, but when I’m worried, or sometimes when I’m in a mood, I’ll be almost anything if I don’t come.”

Xuanyuan Wanrong frowned slightly, some did not understand Xu Xu’s words, and asked, “for example?”

“For example? For example, I suddenly want to shit… Cough, no, for example, I suddenly want to go to the hut. If I don’t have a cigarette at this time, I’d rather hold it. In short, it’s that unspeakable feeling. You won’t understand it. ”

With that, Xu que looked up silently and added a cigarette to himself.

“Hiss!”

He took a deep breath, and the tobacco was burning red with white smoke.

“Look at this cigarette. It looks like I’m smoking. In fact, the wind is also pumping. I smoke half and half, but I don’t care about it. Maybe the wind has some trouble. ”

Xu que finished, took another sip, slowly spit out bursts of smoke, and his face was full of loneliness and solitude.

The sun just fell on his face, and his eyes were crystal clear, like tears spinning around.

Sorrow, depression, depression, countless emotions emanated from him at this time, which made people can’t help guessing how many difficult things he had to bear.

Xuanyuan Wanrong was stunned.

I’ve always been used to this guy’s incoherent rogue appearance. Why has this product suddenly become so deep?

You smoke half the cigarette and half the wind?

Maybe the wind has some trouble?

This remark is carefully tasted, but it has some other artistic conception!

Xuanyuan Wanrong was thoughtful.

“Whoosh! Whoosh! Whoosh! ”

Suddenly, a few sounds of breaking the air came from my ears.

Xu Weizheng waved his hands wildly towards the air, as if he were fighting something What are you doing? ” Xuanyuan Wanrong was a little wary and asked Endure the calm wind and waves for a while, take a step back, think more and more angry. I just thought carefully. Why does the wind smoke half of my cigarette? How expensive cigarettes are! I won’t kill him! ” Xu Ke continued to draw air while responding to the road. “…” Xuanyuan Wanrong was frozen in place, and his face was full of question marks. Is this guy mentally retarded Boring! ” Xuanyuan Wanrong looked speechless and turned directly to leave. But looking at the desolation around, she stopped again, turned her head and looked at Xu Que and said, “are you alone here?” Not really. ” Seeing that he couldn’t scare the other party away, Xu que simply stopped and pointed to the ancient city for a long time: “people have been transmitted in.” Speaking of this, Xu Ke seemed to think of something: “do you have a way to get in? Take me one. I’ll go in and save people. ” Save people? ” Xuanyuan Wanrong glanced at him coldly and shook his head: “I’m just looking for something to dissolve the relationship. I haven’t been tested by Buddhism and don’t understand this place.” Xu que was stunned. I dare say that this woman came in by “sneaking in”! Nima, isn’t my first few levels a waste of time? Well, it doesn’t seem to be. At least the harvest is very big The ancient city is actually a forbidden city, which can only accommodate 50000 people. Only when people are dead in the city will people outside be transported in, but there may be no danger inside. I’ve been waiting here for most of the day, but it’s still not my turn… “Xu Ke explained briefly. In the middle of his words, he suddenly had a meal. No! Reasonably speaking, many people died in the second level and the third level. According to the experience that the level is becoming more and more dangerous, the death rate of this level should not be so slow what the fuck! Shouldn’t two dogs and Duan Jiude find any benefits in it, so they won’t let me in? ” Xu Ke’s heart jumped, and the more he thought about it, the more likely it was. These two guys have done such things before. If they find out the great benefits inside, they may really control the ancient city by their array prohibition No, it seems that we still have to break the prohibition by ourselves, otherwise we don’t know we have to wait until monkey years and horses. ” Xu Xu’s eyes narrowed and his mind moved System, come out and help me crack this… “Whoosh! Just as Xu lacked communication with the system, a slight wind suddenly sounded. Xu que only felt his body light, and the scenery in front of him suddenly changed. The surrounding light suddenly became dark, and the light curtains were suspended in the darkness, just like bright stars. But among these light screens, there are pictures that are constantly flashing and changing. Su Yunlan appeared in one of the light curtains, but she was wearing simple clothes, walking in a high mountain, with sweat on her face, and seemed very tired. On the mountain, there is a nunnery This… What’s the situation? ” Xu Xu is a little stunned. Looking at the other light curtains, er Gouzi wandered in the street, his whole body dirty and extremely depressed. Passers-by saw him and kicked him directly. Er Gouzi was kicked to the ground in an instant and screamed. Another light curtain, Duan Jiude’s figure also appeared in it. His experience is also somewhat bad This…… “Xu Ke was stunned. This scene… Seems familiar

chapters.title: Chapter 1659
chapters.body:
Chapter 1659

Chapter 1659

C.1659

I still remember when I was in Huoyuan state.

Once experienced a big array of seven emotions and six desires with Zixia fairy Shiqing Xuan.

All those who enter the array will be pulled out and put into some special scenes for testing.

A test is a lifetime.

“These two places are so similar that there should be no connection?”

Xu que recalled the scene in the big array. The past was vivid and couldn’t help feeling.

Alas, people are so handsome that they can pick up girls even if they break the array!

It’s very distressing!

Xu Ke once again cast his eyes on those light curtains.

Judging from the current situation, most people seem to have a hard time and have lost their cultivation, but they don’t seem to be in danger.

Of course, er Gouzi had the worst childhood.

In the dreamland, these two goods seem to really become an ordinary dog and live a life of being driven around every day.

“If you live your life, it’s called retribution!”

Xu que stood under the light curtain, gloating on his face.
