“You have a big heart.” At this time, Xuanyuan Wanrong’s voice suddenly sounded on his side.

“Why are you here? Sneak into my side, don’t you like my beauty and want to plot against me? I tell you I won’t give in! ”

Xu Ke was stunned, put on a righteous face and said in righteous words.

Xuanyuan Wanrong looked cold and didn’t bother to talk to him. He directly revealed the power of the soul and wanted to find out what happened.

Xu que has nothing to do. He continues to observe the surrounding light curtain, and then finds an acquaintance.

Impressively, it was the old man who came in behind the small light bulb at the second level.

At this time, the old man was wearing coarse linen clothes and walked hard in an old street. His face was haggard and his steps were vain. It was obvious that he had reached the limit.

Then he shook twice and fell down without a sound.

On the old man’s body, a dim white light rushed out of the light curtain and scattered into a mass of fireworks in the dark.

At the same time, another white light came out of the darkness into the light curtain.

“It seems that it should have the same effect as the seven emotions and six desires array. If you die in the array, you will really die.”

Seeing this scene, Xu que affirmed his conjecture and understood why he had waited so long before.

The ancient city can only accommodate 50000 people. I think someone experienced in front didn’t understand the situation, so he died as soon as he went in.

Subsequent practitioners understood the rules, so they supported such a long time.

He briefly informed Xuanyuan Wanrong of the situation.

After hearing this, Xuanyuan Wanrong looked dignified: “the inheritance of ancient Buddha has such a magical array to test people’s seven emotions and six desires, but how do you know?”

“Hey, hey, I forced the saint to be familiar with the history of 5000 years. Naturally, he knows both ancient and modern times.”

Xu Xu said confidently.

“Then tell me how to crack it?”

“Why? Nature is to keep the original heart. A pure person like me will break through any difficulties. ”

Whoosh!

Just then, two dim white lights came out of the light curtain.

Then, an irresistible restraining force poured out of the darkness and fell on them.

Xuanyuan Wanrong wanted to untie the ban for the first time, but the next moment he looked ugly.

“Ha ha, vegetable chicken, this forced saint to untie!” Xu que laughed.

At the moment when the prohibition shrouded over, he was ready to directly let the system crack.

At this time, his cultivation was normal.

“How did you do it?” Xuanyuan Wanrong was stunned and looked at Xu Que in disbelief.

Whoosh!

But the next moment, Xuanyuan Wanrong’s body stiffened, and the whole person turned into streamer and swept towards a light curtain.

“Eh?”

Xu Xu also suddenly changed his face and was surprised.

Xuanyuan Wanrong rushed out of the light curtain and directly dragged him inside.

“Trough, system… System, come on…”

Xu que realized something was wrong and called out the system, but it was too late. The whole person was directly dragged into the light curtain.

With a splash of ripples on the light curtain, everything returned to calm.

At the same time, in the curtain of light.

“Your Majesty, there are senior officials and junior officials. You must not go! The empress will cut off the minister’s head if she leaves! ”

A flustered voice sounded.

Xu que looked down and found himself riding on a wall.

On the left is the magnificent imperial city with great momentum, on the right is the bustling imperial street, and in the distance is the lively market.

Under the wall, a young man in purple official clothes was looking up at him, waving his hands, looking very anxious. Seeing Xu que looking over, the young man quickly shouted, “Your Majesty, I know you yearn for freedom, but you can’t escape from the palace in private!” Your majesty? what the fuck! I came in directly to be the emperor? Isn’t that the twelve concubines in three palaces, six courtyards and three thousand beauties in the harem? It’s so beautiful! Xu que suddenly brightened his eyes and was a little excited. Is there any wool here Who said I was running away? I just want to stand higher and see my country. ” Xu Kui said with a gesture, then turned over, jumped down from the wall and landed safely. Just feeling the inexplicable pain on the soleplate of his feet, Xu que already understood that he had become a mortal again It’s very kind of you to understand, your majesty. ” With a sigh of relief, the young man hurried forward and bowed respectfully, “after the queen presides over the court meeting, she will wait for you in the imperial study.” Well, I see… She’s waiting for me? Wait, why did she preside over the court meeting? ” Xu was stunned when he was absent. What do you mean? Aren’t you the emperor? Why does the queen preside over the court meeting? The young man obviously didn’t expect Xu Ke to ask this. He was stunned for a long time before he carefully said, “yes, your majesty… The queen has presided over the court meeting for some years.” Then, under Xu Que’s questioning, he finally figured out his identity. Two words sum up, dizzy king! The current land boundary is a country called the East Tang Dynasty, which is located in the east of this land. He is the monarch of the East Tang Dynasty, still called Xu que. But he has a complete life as a person. The old emperor of the eastern Tang Dynasty died early, so little “Xu Ke” took over the government at the age of eight. But eight years old… Know shit about government! Almost without any accident, the whole court was made a mess, and the people in China were unable to make a living. They once called him a faint king. But “Xiao Xu Ke” also likes poetry, books, songs and dances. He is not interested in the government at all. If he makes such a mess, he will let go. Seeing that the subjugation of the country was imminent, Fengyu country next door offered to marry the East Tang country. At the age of 14, Xiao XuKe married the three princesses of Fengyu country. After getting married, the three princesses were immediately made queen, and also showed their excellent ability to govern the country, and soon cultivated their own power. As other emperors, they have already begun to panic. However, Xiao XuKe is a good man. How can he be fucking married by politics? He wants democracy! Be equal! Love freely! So, for eight years, Xiao XuKe didn’t have a roommate with the queen. And every once in a while, Xiao Xu wants to find a way to escape from the palace. It is called pursuing dreams Damn it, this fool… “After knowing everything, Xu que couldn’t help scolding in a low voice. The young man thought he had heard wrong: “Your Majesty, what did you say?” Nothing. Take me to the court meeting. I have something to announce! ” Xu Duan carried his hands behind him, and his mouth was full of publicity, with an inexplicable momentum. Faint king? Oh! Then let Ben force Shengxiu to show you, what is happy planet, again… Bah no, what is Mingjun

chapters.title: Chapter 1660
chapters.body:
Chapter 1660

Chapter 1660

C.1660

At this time, the magnificent main hall of the imperial palace.

Carved beams and painted columns, golden dragons flying, magnificent!

A woman wearing a phoenix robe and a phoenix crown to cover her face sat high on the Dragon chair.

She is the queen of the eastern Tang Dynasty, but she has been in power for eight years!

In the eight years, she gave full play to her imperial talents, managed the world in order, the people lived and worked in peace and contentment, and the national strength became stronger and stronger.

So that the people of the eastern Tang Dynasty called the queen the female emperor. Even civil and military officials privately did not mention the queen, but only the female emperor.

And Xu Ke, the monarch, became almost invisible. No one paid attention to him or mentioned him.

This shows how tightly the queen controls power.

However, even if the queen knows how to govern the country and the East Tang Dynasty is peaceful and the people are safe, she is only a small border country after all.

Eight years is far from enough for a small country to grow into a behemoth, not to mention facing the aggression of a big country from time to time.

Two years ago, Qin, the largest country in Kyushu, launched a campaign to unify the world.

After two years of Crusade, only the eastern Tang Dynasty and Fengyu are left. They are located in a remote place, so they have not been ruled for the time being.

But the officials were still in constant fear.

Today’s meeting is mainly to discuss the war.

The ministers admonished one after another, but no matter what they said, the female emperor did not respond.

“Strange… Why didn’t my mother respond?”

“Did you fall asleep? It shouldn’t be… ”

“I heard that my mother went back to Fengyu country a few days ago. I’m afraid she already has a dispute in her heart.”

The ministers talked one after another, but they didn’t dare to speak loudly for fear of disturbing the wise female emperor on the throne.

Xuanyuan Wanrong sat on the Dragon chair, her face covered behind the Phoenix crown bead curtain, thinking quietly.

After listening for so long, she has basically figured out her situation.

A generation of female emperors had a worthless and useless husband. They had no internal worries and serious external troubles.

Simply put, if you don’t do anything, the country’s demise will be at your fingertips.

“Monarch Xu Ke? That guy came in to me? ”

Xuanyuan Wanrong frowned. Logically, everyone entered a different light curtain. Why would they two be together?

Is it the influence of Taiyi Tianshu again?

Or did Xu lack untie the prohibition at the last minute and get involved?

After sorting out his thoughts, Xuanyuan Wanrong sat up slightly and exuded an indescribable power.

She was originally an outstanding disciple of the heavenly palace. She was chosen by heaven. She had been in a high position for a long time and was just an emperor. It was no difficulty to control her.

“The emperor has arrived!”

Just as she was about to speak, a sharp voice suddenly sounded outside the temple door.

The emperor?

Xuanyuan Wanrong’s eyes were slightly heavy. Before, she learned from the officials that Xu jiannai, the monarch of the eastern Tang Dynasty, was an ignorant, frivolous and talented faint monarch.

Such a temperament is exactly the same as that guy.

She had thought it over in a moment. She would find a place to exile the guy later to avoid getting in the way of herself.

At this time, the ministers were also in doubt and talked about it one after another.

“Did I hear you wrong? Is the emperor coming to the court? ”

“Young life, heaven has eyes. The emperor is finally willing to participate in the government!”

“Shh… You forget what happened when the emperor presided over the government eight years ago?”

Although Xiao Xu is short of mediocrity and boundless, among all the officials, there are still some old die hards who adhere to the orthodoxy in their hearts and silently support the royal family. At this time, naturally, some people are happy and others are worried.

The sound outside the hall came from far and near, but when they heard the sound, the ministers frowned one after another.

“I’m afraid of farts! I’m the emperor. How can I be afraid of a woman? ”

“Fuck off! Don’t pull me! ”

“I warn you not to pull me. I’m going to recapture the lost imperial power. If you dare to stop it again, be careful that I cut off your head!”

“What? The seal is with the queen. Only she can order it? That’s great! Today I will revive my husband’s platform! ”

The ministers looked at each other.

They have heard that outside is the emperor who hasn’t been to the court for eight years.

But the question is, when was the emperor so arrogant?

Although Xu Ke has always done some rebellious acts, in fact, when he saw the queen, he turned his head and ran away like a mouse seeing a cat.

It’s hard to put down the front, but it’s never hard to put down the front.

The ministers of the eastern Tang Dynasty were used to it. At this time, they suddenly heard such arrogant words and were shocked.

“Emperor, what’s the matter?”

“It’s over. The emperor is crazy. Call the imperial doctor quickly!” Am I dreaming? Is the emperor so brave today? ” In the voices of the ministers, a young face appeared in the hall, with an uninhibited smile on the corners of his mouth and an extremely arrogant walking posture. That’s their emperor, Xu Ke! Behind Xu Wei, the young man who had just stood under the wall, Gong Qiwei, the Chamberlain of the etiquette Department of the current Dynasty, followed in with embarrassment and bowed to his colleagues from time to time. All the ministers around looked at Gong Qiwei strangely and winked one after another. What’s going on? Is the emperor crazy? Gong Qiwei was sweating and waving his hands. His heart was miserable. Are you asking me if I’m crazy? I don’t fucking know! I just want to bring the emperor back. God knows that he suddenly ran all the way to the hall! I can’t stop it! Xu que walked among the ministers with a confident smile on his face. Although there is no way to use Zhenyuan here, he is also a great Luo Jinxian, the emperor of the dynasty. There’s nothing wrong with being arrogant. He came to the Dragon chair in three or two steps, looked down at the sitting queen and piled up a warm smile: “dear Queen, I have awakened. It’s time to return the throne to me.” He had thought about it. When he drove the queen down, he would wave his troops north to fight the princes and establish an immortal Dynasty. Finally, in the pilgrimage to all countries, he successfully passed the test and flew away, leaving an unparalleled legend. Just thinking about it makes me feel full! The queen seemed to be indifferent to his words and said faintly, “are you sure?” Huh? How does it sound a little familiar? Xu que was stunned, raised his hand and grabbed the Queen’s Phoenix crown. The ministers were all shocked when they saw this scene. The emperor is so brave today! Dare to provoke the queen in public Empress, we haven’t seen each other for such a long time. I really miss… Sleeping trough! ” Before he finished, a scream suddenly echoed in the hall. Xu que looked at the familiar face in front of him in horror: “is the queen you?” Under the Phoenix crown, Xuanyuan Wanrong stands out! She looked up slowly, her face like frost: “why can’t it be me? But you… Why are you here? ” This sentence was like a flash of lightning in Xu Ke’s mind. He just reacted. At the last moment, he really entered the same dreamland with Xuanyuan Wanrong. After two seconds of silence, Xu que turned and left Excuse me, goodbye! “”… ” The courtiers nodded slightly. HMM… it smells like this. The emperor is not crazy Second, send it, ask for a monthly ticket!]

chapters.title: Chapter 1661
chapters.body:
Chapter 1661

Chapter 1661

C.1661

Xuanyuan Wanrong, who had left the court, sat face to face with Xu Xu, facing each other everywhere.

“So… As you said, if we want to leave here, we need to pass this test, and the test is to spend our life here safely?”

Xuanyuan Wanrong sat on the chair and asked.

Xu que fiddled with the crown on his hand and said casually, “yes, according to my experience, as long as we can die smoothly, we can go out.”

Xuanyuan Wanrong heard the speech, and her eyebrows were slightly skimmed, and she began to meditate.

If according to the mortal’s life, I will stay with this guy for decades at least?

Xu que saw that she didn’t speak and didn’t take the initiative to find a topic, but began to check the system.

Like previous experience, the system function is limited at this moment.

However, this seems to be a change made by the system itself. Except for the collection of forced value, exchange and storage functions, other functions cannot be used.

“Lying trough!”

Everything else was fine. Only when he saw the exchange function, Xu lacked was so surprised that he burst into foul language.

The price of exchange items for science and technology has increased by hundreds of times, and the items classified by Xiuxian have increased by thousands of times!

Only traditional martial arts are cheap!

“Day dog Oh, system, you explain to me what’s going on?”

“Ding, the system detects that it is currently in a low military environment. In view of the host’s need for experience, the price of all exchange products beyond the rules in the system mall will be at a normal premium.”

Can this premium be called normal?

I have to pay hundreds of thousands of dollars to exchange an ordinary talisman!

Of course, this is not the worst!

Xu Ke found a more excessive thing. Due to the change of the environment, all the installed force values accumulated before have been frozen and can’t be used at all!

I just saved ten points when I installed force in the hall!

“Dog system, not human!”

Xu que swears.

At this time, Xuanyuan Wanrong suddenly said, “in that case, let’s wait here until we die.”

Xu Ke was stunned. I’m afraid you were thinking about this for a long time?

“Yes, but I have one condition.” Xu que thought for a moment and said, “you have to hand over your power. I will be in power in the East Tang Dynasty.”

“Impossible!”

Xuanyuan Wanrong refused without hesitation.

Although she didn’t know much about Xu Ke’s talent in governing the country, with his previous temperament, Xuanyuan Wanrong had no doubt that this guy would bring down the East Tang state in less than half a year.

“Hey, you, I’m the emperor, okay?” Xu Kuda stabbed, “you’re sleeping in addition to cultivation. You know the rule of chicken.”

“That can’t be handed over to you.” Xuanyuan Wanrong said calmly, “what’s more, you also don’t know how to govern the country.”

Xu kuanleng snorted, “you’re teasing me. I don’t know how to govern the country? If you let me come, what’s the matter with the state of Qin? Do you know what an eternal emperor is? It’s me! ”

But no matter how Xu que lobbied, Xuanyuan Wanrong was unwilling to delegate power.

In her words, Xu Que’s temperament is too jumpy and has no rules. In particular, if she rules a country with a violent temper that is not afraid of heaven and earth, how can she rest assured.

After all, subjugation here means that their fate will be terrible, worse than death.

“Why are you so stubborn? You really think you’re a genius? Governing the country is not as simple as you think! ” Xu Wei almost jumped up in anger.

“You know it’s not easy. I’ll take power and control everything. It’s safer than you.” Xuanyuan Wanrong’s eyes were calm and her tone was firm.

“You…” Xu que stared, knowing that he could not persuade the woman anyway, so he didn’t talk nonsense at all.

“OK, I think you can control when.” Xu que directly threw away his sleeve.

The meeting between the two broke up unhappily.

Soon, the night passed.

The national strength is not strong. Although there are many troops, they can only protect themselves temporarily, which is worse than those countries in the previous five element mountains.

However, the small problem of famine can still be solved!

Thinking of this, Xuanyuan Wanrong waved his hand and said in a loud voice, “proclaim the will of the palace, open the national treasury and relieve the world.”

Wheeze!

Xu que couldn’t help laughing.

At this level?

You mean you can run the country?

Xuanyuan Wanrong glanced coldly at Xu Duan. Xiumei looked slightly and didn’t understand what he meant.

“It’s okay, you go on.” Xu Weiqiang smiled and waved his hand.

He was not idle last night. He read the national affairs over the years and had already read them in his heart.

Because of its remote location, the agriculture and Commerce of the eastern Tang Dynasty did not develop well, and the national economy was not strong. The key is to resist the invasion of foreign enemies. The silver in the Treasury a few years ago has long been used to recruit troops and horses, all of which are used in war. At present, there are few silver deposits in the whole Treasury. How about opening the national treasury for disaster relief? Shit Report back to the queen, the Treasury… There is not much silver at present. ” Hubu Shangshu came out with a stiff head. He presided over the Ministry of accounts, managed the Treasury and knew more about a country’s inventory. Not to mention disaster relief now, it’s good to be able to barely maintain the operation of the country. The key is that he can only maintain it when he is a minister of the Ministry of household who has lost all his hair. “…” Xuanyuan Wanrong’s face coagulated after hearing the speech, thought a little, and said in a deep voice: “if so, then the whole country will levy taxes to support the drought areas.” WOW! As soon as this remark was made, the ministers were in an uproar. Now there is famine in Northwest China, but the life of people everywhere is not easy. Temporary taxation undoubtedly increases the burden on the people. I’m afraid there must be families to separate their wives and children. The key move will certainly cause people’s protest. At that time, not only can’t collect much money, but also arouse people’s anger. The gain is not worth the loss! The empress used to be wise and powerful. How could she suddenly take such a step? The ministers looked at each other, confused. But because of Xuanyuan Wanrong’s once majesty, no one dared to expose it, and no one dared to stop it. Until it’s down. When the ministers left, 35% of them gathered together and began to talk about it How did the empress decide such a method? ” I don’t know… What does the queen mean? ” Alas, I hope, but although this move will arouse public anger, it… Should be able to solve the famine. ” Meanwhile, in the imperial library. Xuanyuan, Wan Rong and Xu que sat opposite each other again What were you laughing at? ” Xuanyuan Wanrong didn’t understand. According to her understanding, disaster relief is nothing more than silver. Just give yourself two full silver. Xu que smiled and said meaningfully, “I tell you, if you do this for no more than seven days, there will definitely be a big problem.” Hum, absurd! ” Xuanyuan Wanrong snorted coldly and ignored him. Without advice, Xu que went to continue to check the file. Anyway, I have already said what I should say. Since she doesn’t listen and something goes wrong, I don’t blame myself

chapters.title: Chapter 1662
chapters.body:
Chapter 1662

Chapter 1662

C.1662

Time flies.

Xu Que and Xuanyuan Wanrong spent seven days in a dreamland in the twinkling of an eye.

It has to be said that Xuanyuan Wanrong is still a model as the head of a country.

After all, no matter how to say, he was once the chosen person of heaven. He was an excellent disciple of Tiangong academy and had been in the top position for a long time.

With her talent, even if she had never been in touch with governing the country before, she learned almost everything in a week.

But according to Xu Kuan’s words, there is nothing to show. The so-called governance has not been cured at all. It is all a strategy of treating the symptoms rather than the root cause. Sooner or later, something will happen!

Do you really think that an immortal genius can govern the country?

It doesn’t exist!

“What? After so many days, do you still think I can’t manage all this? ”

In the imperial book room, Xuanyuan Wanrong sat down again with Xu Que and asked faintly while looking at the file in his hand.

The files are about some agricultural reforms. In her opinion, they are unimportant things and don’t pay much attention to them.

According to her, the most important thing for a strong country is to have the concept of its own country.

In other words, it belongs to the belief of the country, and all the people unite and work together.

This is the same truth as cultivating immortals.

An immortal without Tao Yun will only be stuck in that realm and can’t break through all his life.

Only when we understand what Tao we want to take and have Tao Yun can we go further!

She directly informed Xu Ke of this idea.

Xu Wei almost laughed after listening.

“You take it for granted, and you think everything too beautiful. Your fantasy is a utopian world. If we continue to follow your idea, we estimate that we will have to be a pair of desperate mandarin ducks here in less than two years. ”

After being imprisoned for cultivation, Xu’s courage was released, and he didn’t give face at all.

Anyway, everyone is mortal. What are you afraid of?

You are the queen and I am the emperor. If you really want to count, I am still the one above!

Afraid of wool!

“Pa!”

Xuanyuan Wanrong was not angry after hearing this. He was still calm and indifferent. He closed the file, called the maid to serve him and put on the Phoenix robe.

“It seems that you have not demonstrated your so-called ability to govern the country in recent days.” She turned her back to Xu Ke and said indifferently.

“I’ve been observing the people these days!” Xu Ke slumped leisurely on the chair and replied.

“Oh, really?”

Xuanyuan Wanrong shook her head and sneered.

Before she came, she had trained many spies in the palace to monitor the trend of the imperial city.

According to the spy’s report, Xu Ke slipped out of the palace no less than five times this week. Every time he went out, he wandered around and had fun everywhere.

Even ran to find the descendants of those important officials and go to the bars to listen to music!

Whether this song is serious or not, I won’t mention it for the time being.

But the descendants of those important officials were too bold to go out with the emperor. Obviously, they were all a group of wine bags and rice bags.

And the result did not surprise Xuanyuan Wanrong.

In just a few days, Xu que became a good brother with those dandies. He hung around the fence day and night and didn’t want to go home at night!

“Oh, after all, I’m a frivolous man. I can’t afford to use it!”

Xuanyuan Wanrong shook her head and smiled, but she wouldn’t care too much.

I’m just a little skeptical about my previous ideas. How can I think this guy has connotation?

The maid served the two people, and her heart was terrified.

My mother… What do I hear?

It’s not enough for me to die 10000 times!

Mom, I want to go home

However, fortunately, although Xuanyuan Wanrong and Xu Xu are emperors here, they don’t have the spirit of emperors in their hearts. They didn’t expect to go up at that level at all.

After finishing their appearance, they came to the hall.

The ministers had already waited below, waiting for the beginning of the court meeting.

However, the atmosphere today is obviously not quite right.

The full courtier’s face was ugly, and his forehead was still sweating. It seemed that there had been some major changes.

Xuanyuan Wanrong noticed this and wondered if there was another natural disaster?

“Empress, the emperor has arrived!”

With the sharp voice of the eunuch, the court meeting officially began!

“I have something to start!”

Before they were seated, a minister couldn’t wait to get out of the crowd and shouted.

Xuanyuan Wanrong waved faintly: “Aiqing, please talk.”

“I beg the queen to order that the national tax be stopped!”

Huh?

Xuanyuan Wanrong suddenly gave a “click” in his heart, but his face didn’t show any expression: “why did Aiqing say this?”

The minister’s face was serious and his voice was sincere: “empress, before that, taxation had been carried out. The people were miserable because of the drought these days. Some people even lost their homes, separated their wives and children, and the domestic people could not make a living. If this goes on, the country will be ruined!”

With this minister taking the lead, the other ministers seemed to have found the backbone and began to admonish one after another.

“I ask the queen to take back her order!”

“Empress, the people have no spare power to pay taxes. Please stop the national tax collection!”

“Empress, this matter must not continue!”

With your words and mine, the hall became noisy.

Xuanyuan Wanrong’s face became more and more ugly. She couldn’t understand what she had done wrong.

Although the amount of money needed for disaster relief was huge, the population of the eastern Tang Dynasty was so large that it was only a small amount of money shared among everyone.

Can it be said that the people can’t even afford this silver?

How is that possible?

If you were so poor, the East Tang country would have been in chaos. But according to what she saw before, although the East Tang country is a little poor now, it is not so poor that the people can’t make a living!

At the thought of this, her eyes could not help but turn to Xu Ke. She seemed to think of something, and her heart was a little cluttered and stunned.

This guy seems to have really said before that there will be a big problem in seven days.

Now

But how can he predict?

“Tut tut……”

Xu que noticed Xuanyuan Wanrong’s eyes and sneered in his heart.

Hey, I warned you long ago that the tax increase is not easy to use. You just don’t listen.

There’s trouble now. You know you’re looking at me. You want to ask me for help?

Don’t help! Gas or not, gas or not?

Xuanyuan Wanrong obviously noticed the kind of gloating in Xu Que’s eyes, and didn’t bother to pay attention to it.

Just in the face of the admonition of the ministers, she had no way at this time.

Stop taxation, how to solve the drought and famine?

If we don’t stop, I’m afraid there will be chaos in the country.

After hesitating for a moment, she said, “the Minister of household, how much silver is left in the Treasury?”

When the Minister of household heard the speech, his heart trembled: “report back to the empress. Now there are less than ten million and twenty million silver left in the Treasury.”

“All of them are allocated for disaster relief.”

“Ah, this…”

What is the queen talking about?

Give it all out. What if something happens again?!

That’s the Treasury. If the silver that bears the operation of a country is empty, the whole country will not be far from collapse!

“Empress, no!”

“This must not happen!”

The ministers admonished one after another to stop Xuanyuan Wanrong’s behavior.

Xuanyuan Wanrong frowned again.

This won’t work, that won’t work. What’s going on?

Can I change silver out of thin air?

“Do you have a headache? What can I do? ”

At this time, Xu’s cheap voice came over.

Xuanyuan Wanrong saw that Xu Kuan was looking at himself with a smile. The smile on his face was very badly beaten.

“What do you want to say? Does it make sense to ridicule me at this time? ” She subdued the impulse to hit people and whispered.

“It makes sense to ridicule you, but it’s not necessary. In fact, it’s very simple. I can help you solve it, but you have to promise me one thing! ”

“You say!” Xuanyuan Wanrong took a deep breath and said slowly.

“Cool! Then let me be frank. I don’t want that jade seal, but you have to give me the power to mobilize all departments. If you don’t delegate power, it’s difficult for me to do things. ” Xu kuying said.

Previously, he tried to do things, but found that he had been elevated by Xuanyuan Wanrong, so the order was almost nullified, and no department was willing to listen to him.

Now we have a chance. As long as one wave, Ben forced saint to rise directly.

“Are you sure you can solve it?”

Xuanyuan Wanrong looked at Xu Duan suspiciously, as if he didn’t trust or believe it.

Just hesitated for a long time. After she found that she seemed to have no other way, she decided to take a step back and nodded: “yes, but all your orders should be reviewed by me.”

Anyway, now that things have reached this point, it’s better to see what he can do.

If something really happens, I can handle the orders myself and stop it in time.

“No problem!”

Xu que suddenly brightened his eyes and smiled at the corners of his mouth.

He just wanted the order from the Ministry of work, so he was ready to pay back the money by shouting all over the place.

Unexpectedly, Xuanyuan Wanrong agreed so easily!

Woman, your name is naive!

chapters.title: Chapter 1663
chapters.body:
Chapter 1663

Chapter 1663

C.1663

At the moment, all civil and military officials in the Manchu Dynasty have quarreled.

Some people asked to stop taxation. Naturally, some flatterers flattered the queen and stood up for the queen to support the continuation of taxation.

The two sides quarreled.

“Dong Dong Dong!”

At this time, a heavy knock on the table sounded.

“Noisy! Be quiet! ”

Followed closely, Xu Kushen drank.

The noise of the whole hall suddenly stopped!

Everyone was stunned and turned to look at the high seat with a confused face.

When did the emperor come?

Why did you come out and shout?

“You waste… Well, you Aiqing, don’t quarrel. You can’t solve all the small things. I really don’t know what’s the use of raising you. Leave this matter alone and leave it to me! ”

Xu que said aloud, with an expression of cow force and coax on his face, and his eyes obviously dislike everyone.

As soon as the ministers listened, they were stunned again.

What?

What did the Emperor just say?

Leave it to him?

Lying in a trough, the emperor’s disease is becoming more and more serious. Does the Queen really want to take care of it?

No, the empress has been fooling twice recently. Nothing is right!

“Huh? What are you doing? Can’t you hear me? ”

Seeing that the people were stunned, Xu que immediately turned black and shouted in a deep voice.

The ministers were still silent. At the same time, they all lowered their heads to avoid looking at Xu vacancy.

I must have heard everything.

But… How can a man who has not dealt with the government for eight years take over this hot potato at this time?

The key is that the emperor almost subjugated the eastern Tang Dynasty before. Isn’t it too fast to intervene at this juncture?

“Did you hear me right? Your majesty said he would deal with it? ” An old minister leaned over to others and asked in a low voice.

“Am i hearing hallucinations?”

“I seem to have auditory hallucinations… I must have been working too hard recently, so I got sick.”

“Don’t lie to yourself, your majesty really said so!”

“Your Majesty, I’ve heard that the scenery at the border is excellent recently. It’s a good thing for your majesty to set out for inspection.” A minister played sincerely.

“Yes, your majesty, I’ve heard that there are snow mountains in the Far West. It’s better to go and have a look.”

There was no exception for Xu Xuanrong to give up his remonstrance, but he turned to persuade him to give up.

The implication is that you’d better go as far as you can, and don’t contaminate state affairs.

We’ve had enough trouble. Will you stop making trouble?

Besides… According to the empress’s method, it may cause chaos and make people miserable.

But as long as the famine year is over, it can slow down in the future.

But if you let your majesty intervene, I’m afraid the East Tang country will be finished next month!

Xu que grinned and thought how unreliable the emperor was before

Look at these ministers. As soon as they hear that they want to intervene in state affairs, they want to send themselves to the border.

He had no doubt that if he had children, it was possible for these ministers to persuade him to abdicate on the spot.

After all, I’m not afraid of the mediocrity of the emperor. I’m afraid the emperor will faint.

“Dear Aiqing, I really have a good way to govern the country.” Xu Xu didn’t care about the attitude of these ministers, and said with a smile.

The ministers were even more flustered when they heard the speech.

“Lying trough, I remember when I first entered the court eight years ago, your majesty smiled like this!”

“Yes! I remember too! Then we almost subjugated the country! ”

“Mom, your majesty, we don’t like this smile.”

“The queen didn’t take over the government that time. We don’t know where it is now!”

The courtiers turned their eyes to Xuanyuan Wanrong for help, which could not be more obvious.

Empress, stop your husband!

He’s going to be a demon again!

Xuanyuan Wanrong’s face was calm, indifferent and did not respond at all.

Seeing that the empress was like this, the ministers were finally desperate.

It’s over. It’s really over.

You shouldn’t have advised the queen to take back her order just now!

Well, the empress doesn’t want to take care of it. Let HunJun take over.

Seeing that the courtiers all looked resigned, Xu sighed and said sincerely, “Aiqing, you might as well listen to my method and consider it again?”

There was silence in the hall, and no one wanted to be the first bird.

Finally, under the threat of Xu lack’s eyes, a minister finally stood up and said, “please, your majesty, what should I do?”

Xu que looked at each other with appreciation and slowly said, “in my opinion, this disaster relief just needs silver, so we’d better take silver from the people.” A minister rolled his eyes. Isn’t that fucking nonsense? We don’t know how to take money from the people, but the problem is where the people have money! Taxation is already scraping. You can’t let the people take out all their money! Who doesn’t keep some surplus silver in his hand? In case something happens to his family, doesn’t he have to die? Sure enough, he was confused… Before the minister objected, Xu que continued, “so my way is to establish a private Treasury so that the people can deposit their money into the warehouse, and the imperial court can give rebates to the people every month. In this way, not only taxes can be reduced, but also disaster relief can have money.” Private library? The ministers were stunned one after another. A moment later, they reacted and were shocked. what the fuck! Yes, you can build a private library! Why didn’t they think of this?! Establish a private bank so that the people can put the silver stored in the private bank. They only need to rebate to the people every month to get a large amount of silver for disaster relief. When the disaster relief is over and the National Treasury is abundant, you can deposit the bank back. As long as there is a certain cash reserve circulation in the warehouse, there is no need to worry about the shortage of silver! It’s a fucking genius! The courtiers present are not ordinary people. They only need to think carefully to figure out the joints. Xu’s method is nothing more than to establish a state-owned bank. However, this advanced concept, placed in the eastern Tang Dynasty, is simply a shocking policy of governing the country. The ministers were stunned. Is this still their fatuous and incompetent emperor who only knows to shout to pursue his dreams? Are they dreaming? Can he think of such a great policy of governing the country with his lovely little head Your majesty, Shengming, this policy is feasible! ” The minister thanked the emperor for all the people and came up with this good plan! ” Your majesty, holy Xu’s ministers began to sing praises. There were even old ministers who firmly supported Xu Duan in tears, kowtowing and crying on the spot. The late emperor, did you see that, your majesty? He is promising! He can run the country Let Prime Minister Li be in charge of this matter. I have written a guide on how to conduct myself. Come to me and get it when you go down. ” Xu que waved and easily exposed the matter. One side Xuanyuan Wanrong was already stunned and unbelievable. This guy really has a way, and it’s so easy Soon, amid the noise, the meeting ended. After retreating, they left side by side again and walked in the imperial garden. The side of the body is full of trees, with bright peach blossoms and bright crimson. Xuanyuan Wanrong has no time to appreciate it, and her heart is a little complicated. She really didn’t expect that the natural disaster that left her helpless was easily solved by Xu missing a few words. Tangled over and over again, Xuanyuan Wanrong finally asked, “the method of private library… Did you really think of it yourself?” Oh, otherwise, I asked beggars casually from the roadside? ” Xu Wei said angrily, “I said, you are not the material for governing the country at all. Don’t hold on.” Xuanyuan Wanrong didn’t answer this question and threw a token back: “with this order, you can mobilize six men and horses.” Well done! ” Xu que takes the token, looks excited, and turns around to leave. Seeing Xu’s hurry, Xuanyuan Wanrong couldn’t help asking, “what are your plans and what are you going to do with this order?” Infusion. ” Xu lacks his head and doesn’t go back to the tunnel Infusion? What liquid? ” Xuanyuan Wanrong was stunned and didn’t understand. Xu Ke’s footsteps stopped, turned his head and showed a bright smile: “the night I miss you.” Second, send it, ask for a monthly ticket!]

chapters.title: Chapter 1664
chapters.body:
Chapter 1664

Chapter 1664

C.1664

With Xuanyuan Wanrong’s order, Xu que left the imperial garden and went straight to the work department.

The Minister of the Ministry of industry is a black and thin man. Judging from his appearance, he is about forty years old.

Seeing Xu deficient’s arrival, the Minister of the Ministry of work suddenly changed his look, quickly got up to meet him, smiled pleasantly and said, “Your Majesty, why are you free?”

Xu que heard the fear in the other party’s words and looked at him with a smile: “why, the Minister of the Ministry of industry doesn’t seem to welcome the king?”

The Minister of the Ministry of work trembled and hurriedly explained, “if there is anything, your Majesty’s grace and heavenly family, I can’t wait for it.”

On the surface, he was friendly, and his heart was roaring wildly.

I can’t wait for your sister!

Don’t you have any points in your mind? Come to me again?

The Minister of the Ministry of industry had an ugly and stiff smile.

Among the six ministries of the eastern Tang Dynasty, apart from Gong Qiwei, the Minister of rites who followed Xu Ke’s ass all day, he was the most poisoned Minister of the Ministry of works.

Every time Xu Wei had any strange idea, he would come to the work department for experiment at the first time.

Fortunately, Xuanyuan Wanrong ordered that Xu vacancy be prohibited from making any transfer in the six ministries, which curbed Xu vacancy’s disorderly behavior.

Unexpectedly, the faint king came again today. The fear once dominated by the faint King reappeared in the heart of the Minister of work.

“Lao Zhang, come with me. I’m looking for you.”

Xu Wei learned from his memory that the other party’s name was Zhang Kaiyun. At this time, he came to the door and skillfully took people away.

Zhang Kaiyun trembled and looked like he had committed PTSD. He said with a sad face: “Your Majesty… Wei Chen, there are still affairs to deal with. What’s the matter… Can you go to Gong Qiwei?”

Almost without hesitation, he sold his colleagues with a backhand.

Anyway, Gong Qiwei runs behind the faint king all day. Dead Taoist friends don’t die!

“Really don’t you come with me?”

“Your Majesty, I’m really involved in official business. If I leave, I’ll make a big basket!”

Xu Wei narrowed his eyes slightly and touched a gold medal from his waist: “Lao Zhang, look what this is?”

Zhang Kaiyun looked at Xu Que’s action and thought that the faint gentleman would not kidnap himself with a knife. Suddenly, there was a flash of gold in front of him.

What, gold… Gold?

When he opened yundun, his eyes widened and his mouth couldn’t close.

Sleeping trough, six dispatching orders!

Isn’t this thing carried by the empress? How can it be in the hands of the faint king!

Xu opened his eyes and thought of it.

This stupid gentleman… Won’t he finally be unbearable, so he killed the queen and robbed these six dispatching orders to rebel?

No, he really did it. It doesn’t seem to be a rebellion!

And he doesn’t have the force and courage… Wait, it can only be stolen!

“Six dispatching orders can be transferred at will without imperial edicts.” Xu que said to the old God, “so, Lao Zhang, you’d better go with me honestly. We are old friends and won’t hurt you.”

In his memory, the former “little emperor” actually had creative ideas and made a lot of good things in the Ministry of work.

But later, in order to resist the feudal traditional ritual marriage, he became a visionary who dreamed of free love all day.

Alas, marriage is harmful. Do a good job. What kind of harm has the family done!

But I don’t know why. Although Xu Ke took out the transfer order, Zhang Kaiyun was more frightened. He said nothing to go with him.

“I open the cloud and die here today. If I jump from here, I won’t go with you!” Zhang Kaiyun hugged the chair legs tightly and shouted at the top of his voice.

Xu que was suddenly happy. He wanted to be seen by people who didn’t know. He thought he was the flower picking thief who wanted to tarnish his innocence.

After thinking about it, he squatted down and slowly approached the open cloud.

Zhang Kaiyun looked nervous. In his heart, Xu que must have been crazy. He might have killed the empress and robbed the token to clean the hall.

He Lao Zhang will never go along with the faint king!

Better be a bamboo in the wind than a slave under the knee of a faint king!

It’s absolutely impossible for him to work for this stupid king!

“Lao Zhang… Since you are so reluctant, it seems that the credit for finding a new grain variety with a yield of 40 stones per mu can only be given to others.” Xu’s voice, like mosquitoes and flies, got into Zhang Kaiyun’s ear.

Zhang Kaiyun was a fool.

What are you kidding?

Nowadays, wheat is planted all over the country, and the yield per mu is only five stones, which is still a good harvest.

40 stone per mu, boasting without making a draft?

However, Xu Ke has accumulated a lot of loading force values in various loading force measures over this period of time, and has long exchanged various excellent crop varieties in the system.

The key is that these things are also very cheap. You can change a lot at a little.

“Lao Zhang, you don’t seem to believe it? Why don’t you look at this! ”

Xu que said, took out a potato from his arms and looked at the open cloud with a smile.

Confused, Zhang Kaiyun took the potato, put it in front of his nose and smelled it. He wondered, “Your Majesty, what is this?”

“Potatoes, what you can eat, ah, ah, you can’t eat this undercooked one. I have boiled one!”

Xu Wei stopped Zhang Kaiyun, who wanted to eat potatoes raw. He reached out and took another cooked potato from his arms and handed it over: “peel it and eat it again. It’s enough for the people to have enough food and clothing!”

“Is this… Really edible?” Zhang Kaiyun is a little counselled. He always feels that his majesty is strange today!

“Don’t you believe it? Shall I show you? ” Xu Duan raised his eyebrows.

“I dare not!”

Zhang Kaiyun hurriedly replied, quickly peeled and stuffed the potatoes into his mouth.

Then the next second, the cloud opened, the whole body trembled like an electric shock, and then stayed in place.

He’s stupid!

This soft waxy taste that melts at the entrance, this damn smell

It’s delicious!

At this time, Zhang Kaiyun almost wanted to roar and shout. This thing called “potato” is so delicious and full!

If you can really produce 40 stones per mu, you can definitely feed the people of the eastern Tang Dynasty, and more than enough!

“Your Majesty, this thing… This thing…” Zhang Kaiyun looked at Xu vacancy and couldn’t speak neatly.

Xu que looked at the increase of 10 points in the system interface, and his face was already happy.

“I know what you want to ask. Don’t ask. Come with me. I’ll take you to a place and you’ll know.”

Xu que waved his hand and walked out directly.

Zhang Kaiyun was stunned and followed closely.

Soon, they came to the countryside in a carriage.

“Ten miles further, you can stop.”

Xu que tells the coachman the direction.

During this time, he didn’t go to the bar to listen to music. In fact, he also met some people and asked them to arrange reliable work.

Such as reclaiming land and planting crops.

Finally, the system is used for ripening.

By the time they arrived, all the crops on the ground were ripe and the branches were covered with gratifying fruits.

Zhang Kaiyun stood on the ridge, stunned.

This… How is this possible?

It’s crazy to produce so much per mu!

He rubbed his eyes hard, looked at the land full of harvests in front of him, determined that it was real, and finally couldn’t help crying.

“Your Majesty, it’s really a Ming king. It’s lucky for our country and the people to have an emperor like your Majesty in the eastern Tang Dynasty!”

“Your Majesty, what else do you have to do? Give it all to Weichen. Weichen will help you with his painstaking efforts!”

Zhang Kaiyun completely threw away his previous thoughts.

Crops that yield 40 stones per mu, let alone let yourself work. Even if you kill him to sacrifice heaven to exchange these crops, you will earn blood!

What, you say Xu Xu is a fool?

Shit, he’s the king of my heart!

“Lao Zhang, I’ll leave it to you.”

Xu que said with a smile.

“I will devote myself to it!”

Zhang Kaiyun immediately knelt down and shouted.

On the same day, Xu que handed over the cultivation methods and seeds of these crops to Zhang Kaiyun and asked him to try them himself.

After all, crop planting still depends on the water and soil environment. Cheating makes the system unable to see the effect of ripening.

Only by letting Lao Zhang try it once can we determine whether he can really produce 40 stones per mu.

Zhang Kaiyun hurried back to the work department with an excited face, summoned people and began to carry out the farming plan!

Xu Ke went on to other films.

No one knows what he talked about with the six Shangshu. At least Xuanyuan Wanrong didn’t get any news except about Zhang Kaiyun.

After all, they travel to the countryside together. Unless the spy is blind, it can’t be invisible.

In the bedroom, the sandalwood and green smoke float slowly, making a dreamy atmosphere.

Xuanyuan Wanrong half leaned on the bed, surrounded by gauze curtains.

The Scout knelt in front of the bed on one knee and reported what Xu lacked had done in detail.

“Step back.” Xuanyuan Wanrong whispered after listening.

The spy retreated, and the whole room was calm again.

Xuanyuan Wanrong looked at the file in her hand, and her eyebrows and eyes were full of doubts.

What the hell is this guy doing?

Are you really busy with national affairs? It’s impossible. With his character, it’s good not to toss a single moth and make a big mess in the world!

But… Why does it always feel wrong

chapters.title: Chapter 1665
chapters.body:
Chapter 1665

Chapter 1665

C.1665

In the next few days, Xu Ke began to disappear again.

The court is still presided over by Xuanyuan Wanrong.

The officials who had been shocked by Xu Que’s good private treasury policy had calmed down before they had time to be happy for two days.

What Mingjun returns!

What emperor will finally rule the country?

Pooh!

I can’t see people in the morning for several days. I’m still a confused king!

However, Xu’s private Treasury strategy has achieved great results in China under the joint control of several old ministers.

A large amount of silver, like a snowball, quickly piled up in the private Treasury, and then distributed some in the name of disaster relief.

The victims in the famine area received relief and were grateful to the royal family.

As for the Treasury, because of the existence of private Treasury, the current silver flow has been buffered. For the time being, there is no need to worry about the trouble of not using silver.

At this time, Xu que is pestering the Minister of war to find someone for himself.

“Your Majesty, it’s not that I don’t help you, but that your idea is really……” the Minister of war hesitated for a long time and failed to say that sentence. It’s really a little disrespectful

Xu que put on a serious face: “Lord Chen, don’t you believe me?”

“I dare not, but… It really can’t.” The Minister of war quickly denied it.

Yes, I just don’t believe it!

You suddenly asked me for 3000 elite soldiers and said you wanted to prepare for a rainy day and train soldiers!

Bullshit!

Forget how you cheated before?

The Minister of the Ministry of war still remembers this. A nest of mountain bandits who didn’t know where to come from outside the imperial city were bold enough to occupy the mountain as king.

At that time, Xu que, who had just begun to pursue his dream, immediately went to the Minister of war to suppress the bandits.

As a result, the bandits were not suppressed, but they became hostages.

Fortunately, the mountain bandits were forced to count and didn’t dare to tear up the tickets directly. Finally, Xu lacked the opportunity to be saved by experts.

However, if the mountain bandits at that time were more iron headed and tore up tickets with their backhands, I’m afraid Xu Duan would become the most disgraceful emperor in the history of the eastern Tang Dynasty.

At this time, Xu que came to find his important person and said that he wanted to carry out the elite policy and cultivate the ultimate assault assassination team.

Mom, scared to death!

“Emperor, you’re so skinny. Don’t mention training elite soldiers. I’m afraid you’ll hurt yourself.” The Minister of the Ministry of war had a cold face and did not show mercy at all.

Xu que glanced at him and walked slowly to the courtyard of the military headquarters.

The courtyard of the Ministry of war is different from that of the Ministry of industry. All kinds of weapons are placed inside. In the center, there is even a bluestone specially used to test weapons.

When the Minister of the Ministry of military saw Xu que walking over and making a fist gesture, he immediately began to panic: “Your Majesty, don’t fight Qingshi. I’m just talking casually. You can’t fight…”

Bang!

Suddenly, a loud noise drowned all the words behind him.

A small fist hit the bluestone hard, and time seemed to stop at this moment.

Whoosh!

In the next second, the bluestone suddenly cracked and turned into countless gravel and splashed around.

The Minister of the Ministry of war was so stupid that he didn’t even notice the blood marks on his face.

What do you see?

That’s the bluestone that has been lying in the courtyard of the Ministry of war for ten years. After countless knives and axes, it’s still not strong enough!

When did the faint King become so fierce?

Although there is no way to exchange the skill of cultivating immortals, there are many Wulin secret scripts.

Whether internal Qigong or external horizontal practice, Xu Ke only needs to exchange it and spend some forced value to make himself practice to the peak.

It takes only three seconds to become a Wulin expert!

That’s it!

Xu que slowly breathed out a breath, took back his right hand, and asked with a smile, “Shangshu, what do you think now?”

The Minister of the Ministry of war was stunned. Ignoring the shock in his heart, he immediately replied: “with the emperor’s divine power, why worry that I don’t prosper in the eastern Tang Dynasty!”

“Your Majesty, this way, please. I’ll take you to choose as many as you want, but your majesty, can you put your fist down first and I’m scared…”

Another few days, fleeting.

His majesty Xu Ke, who had disappeared for several days, finally appeared in the hall.

He finally came to the morning!

The officials of the Manchu Dynasty were indifferent, and the excitement in their hearts had long disappeared.

I thought your majesty put forward a good plan, which is to prepare for a strong return and return to power.

Unexpectedly, the goods disappeared silently for more than ten days, and now they appear.

What is this Dear Aiqing, is there anything to start today? ” Xu que sat on the Dragon chair, feeling a little depressed. He has been running around these days. Relying on the six orders given by Xuanyuan Wanrong, he managed to arrange what he wanted to do. Although I gave the private treasury system before and shocked the forced value obtained by the ministers, there was no problem with the commodities in the exchange system. But it is obvious that there is no way to win the trust of the ministers just by putting together a good plan. Especially the old thing of the Minister of the Ministry of war, who wants people himself, can even say that the mother Ministry of war has just laid off staff recently. It’s disrespectful! So even if everything is ready, it takes a lot of effort to persuade the six Shangshu. If you are imprisoned and become a mortal, you should naturally abide by the natural laws of the body. At this time, Xu Wei felt sleepy to death. He wanted to go back to bed immediately and yawn on the Dragon chair. Xuanyuan Wanrong glanced at him, cold. This boy, after all, is still tired and lazy. It’s useless! At this time, a general suddenly came forward to play: “I have this play. Recently, the border nomads have frequently disturbed China’s borders and robbed the people. Please also send troops to expel the nomads and raise the grandeur of the eastern Tang Dynasty!” Oh, it’s going to war, isn’t it? Here are your soldiers and horses. Fight. ” Xu Xu is not interested in these things and agrees casually. The general looked embarrassed and said, “well… Your majesty, there are soldiers and horses, but the military expenses of the war…” Xu Ke was stunned and immediately reacted. This is fucking asking for money! Before he could respond, Xuanyuan Wanrong said faintly, “let’s discuss this later. Now there are four natural disasters in China, and there is still a need for stable development. There is no surplus silver for military supplies.” The ministers also seconded it one after another, deeply convinced. Today, the eastern Tang Dynasty is in a state of waste, and the domestic people’s livelihood is withering. In addition, it has just experienced natural disasters. It really needs a long period of stable development. As for the border nomads, it’s not a big problem, but expelling them requires a lot of silver to maintain the consumption of the army. It’s a job of burning money. Xu que was not happy at once: “that’s unreasonable. How can it be done? People are jumping on your grave. Why don’t you go out and punch him? Press the nomads on the ground and let them know what strength is! ” A reckless man. ” Xuanyuan Wanrong snorted coldly, “fighting wastes people and money. How can it be such a trifle?” If you don’t fight, it will be worse. In the future, people will invade the country, burn, kill and loot. Won’t it be more costly? ” Xu lacks a hard line Are you determined to fight? ” Xuanyuan Wanrong frowned Yes! ” Xu Shoudao OK, you can fight if you want, but the central government will not give you half of the military expenditure. You can’t touch the private Treasury and the national treasury! ” Xuanyuan Wanrong said and got up and left directly. It’s not a big war against nomads, but the army consumes millions of taels of silver, which is not a small amount. Xuanyuan Wanrong thought that if he controlled the finance, Xu que would recognize the reality and give up the idea. However, Xu Wei sat on the Dragon chair with a smile, and his whole body exuded a momentum of looking at the world: “a mere million liang of silver, is it money?” I made Lingshi in those years. I remember it all from ten million, okay Second, send it, continue to ask for monthly tickets!]

chapters.title: Chapter 1666
chapters.body:
Chapter 1666

Chapter 1666

C.1666

After morning.

Several old ministers of the Ministry of household stood rigidly in the imperial study, winking at each other.

What did the queen call us in?

I don’t know. We haven’t done anything wrong lately

You must have offended the queen!

Several people looked at each other and didn’t know what would happen next.

After a while, Xuanyuan Wanrong said faintly, “you are the ministers of the humerus of the eastern Tang Dynasty. You have worked hard for many years.”

what the fuck!

Several old ministers felt trembling and terrified when they heard the speech.

In general, if such words thank you for your hard work and high achievements, the next moment is to break the cup and rush out a pile of knives and axes!

“This… The empress has been praised too much. It’s all what the old minister should do.” The most stable Minister of the Ministry of household took the lead in opening his mouth and said, “the old minister can also contribute more strength to the eastern Tang Dynasty. May the prosperous age of the eastern Tang Dynasty be immortal!”

Other ministers also reacted one after another and echoed.

“Yes, I think there are still many ideas I haven’t done.”

“The old minister can work for another ten years!”

For fear that Xuanyuan Wanrong didn’t understand their value, they all competed to express themselves.

Xuanyuan Wanrong picked up the tea cup, took a sip, and said faintly, “your thoughts are understood by the palace, but you can’t light the border war. Do you understand?”

These words flashed through the minister’s mind like lightning.

The ministers looked at each other and immediately understood.

I see. I just told them not to help the emperor.

But you are not allowed to give money or soldiers.

The hearts of all are filled with sorrow.

Although I know that the empress and the emperor are tit for tat, I didn’t expect the opposition to this extent.

However, the empress had been in power before the eastern Tang Dynasty. If they were to listen to the emperor’s arrangement, I’m afraid they would not be at ease.

“Two adults of the Ministry of industry and the Ministry of war, I heard that the emperor went to your place recently?” Xuanyuan Wanrong suddenly said.

The Minister of war and the Minister of industry looked at each other and saw the fear in each other’s eyes.

Although Xu lacked to find them is indeed a serious matter, they still couldn’t help feeling empty at this time.

No matter how the emperor fights with the empress, it is also a household chore of the heavenly family.

The husband and wife quarrel at the head of the bed and at the end of the bed. They get involved. If they reconcile one day, they will be unlucky at that time.

So without hesitation, they sold Xu que on the back hand and told them all the things Xu que had done with them recently.

After hearing this, Xuanyuan Wanrong didn’t say much and held back the crowd.

Hearing the speech, the old ministers, like being pardoned, left the imperial study one after another.

“40 stone grain per mu, with one enemy of 100 elite soldiers… Hum, it’s fantastic!”

Xuanyuan Wanrong recalled the ministers’ words and snorted coldly.

What Xu lacked did was nothing if he was an immortal.

However, there is a lack of aura here and it is impossible to cultivate immortals. It is undoubtedly difficult to go to heaven if you want to do these two things.

Although the Minister of the Ministry of industry and the Minister of the Ministry of war clearly stated that Xu Ke did have results.

But Xuanyuan Wanrong didn’t believe it at all, just as they were cheated by Xu Weimeng.

Joke, that guy is best at cheating. It’s not easy to cheat two mortals!

At this time, Xu que, who was regarded as a liar by Xuanyuan Wanrong, was drinking and having fun with a group of dandies.

Although there is a generation difference between the two groups, Xu Kuang’s name as a waste has long been spread. In addition, he basically comes to hang out with these guys when he is free these days. The other party has long regarded Xu Kuang as a fellow.

Think about it, even the emperor’s majesty wandered around the brothel with them and said how glorious it was!

At this time, after three rounds of wine, Meiji sang and danced. At present, the people were already drunk and hugged together to say some drunken words.

“Brother Kuang, if you want me to say, you might as well move out of the palace!” A dandy said dimly, “what’s the matter with you staying in the Palace this day and being angry with a woman!”

That is to say, this place is a closed place. In addition, we are all our own people and know the root and bottom, so we dare to speak like this.

If it had been put outside, it would have been imprisoned for disobedience.

Xu que didn’t care. Holding a wine jar, he said dimly, “I’m angry too, but I don’t have money! All the money in the palace is in the charge of that woman. If I come out, I’m afraid I’ll go to your house to eat and drink… ”

The dandy was excited. After waking up most of the time, he said with a smile, “brother short, don’t joke. How dare we take you in.”

Being able to be a dandy shows that they are sober at home despite their lack of power.

A mindless dandy has long died.

If they really take them in, they won’t be able to cut off more heads when the empress comes back to settle accounts in the autumn! Xu Wei didn’t expect these losers to really take him in. Instead, he sat up straight and said in an excited tone: “I want to understand. I want to revive my husband’s gang! I wonder if you guys can help me! ” When the dandies heard the speech, they suddenly came to their senses. The emperor is going to fight with the queen. How can such peerless gossip be without them Brother Ke, as long as you speak, we will support it to the end! ” you ‘re right! There is no reason for a woman to be an emperor. Support me! ” It is incumbent upon you to revive your husband’s gang! ” Brother Ke, tell me what you want to do! ” Xu lacked a successful smile on the corner of his mouth, and Lang said, “it’s just the so-called man has no money and his waist is not hard, so I decided that I want to make money! I want to open a restaurant! ” As soon as the dandies heard this, they all felt fierce. Some of them felt that this was nonsense. They suddenly thought that their father had to sneak around and save a small Treasury when he went out to visit the brothel. Yes, men have money and confidence! The emperor is worthy of being the emperor. One word reveals the secret of revitalizing the husband’s gang So I decided to do business in the imperial city! At that time, I hope you brothers will patronize more! ” Xu que put on a big brother’s appearance and said proudly, “when I regain power and revitalize my husband’s Gang, I need your benefits!” The dandies are satisfied with this. When Xu que rises again in the future, isn’t he able to help the dragon I support you! ” My brother’s business is our business! ” I’m willing to sponsor the missing brother three hundred Liang! ” I sponsor a thousand Liang! ” With the strength of the wine, the dandies took out silver tickets one after another to support Xu que. Soon, tens of thousands of silver notes piled up on the table. Although these silver tickets are not a small number for dandies. But what is this money when you can see the emperor fighting with the queen? Seeing this scene, Xu’s mouth aroused a successful smile. Hum, silly people, I’ve been making concessions for so many days. I’ve been hanging out with you every day, listening to music and hanging out for so long, so that’s this moment! If you are fooled by me, don’t you have to pay out? This wave, the start-up funds are in hand

chapters.title: Chapter 1667
chapters.body:
Chapter 1667

Chapter 1667

C.1667

To open a restaurant in the Imperial City, it only needs two thousand liang of silver.

Although there are still some doors to deal with behind the scenes, Xu Ke is also an emperor no matter how to say. After a word or two, everything can be unimpeded.

Of course, he did all this without telling Xuanyuan Wanrong, and even carefully found a white glove to avoid the sight of the spy.

The woman is so small-minded that if she knows, she will secretly resort to tricks.

A few days later, a brand-new restaurant rose in the imperial city.

The sudden appearance of this restaurant immediately attracted the attention of many people.

You know, the boundary of the imperial city is an inch of land and an inch of money. If you want to open a restaurant, you must not only have money, but also have huge contacts.

Otherwise, the restaurant will not last long.

“Baiyun restaurant… I haven’t heard of a similar restaurant before.”

“Which noble family is this? The restaurant opened suddenly?”

“I don’t know, but I haven’t heard of their signature dish. It seems to be called hot pot…”

“Isn’t it written on the plaque that fried heaven helps the bottom of the sea to fish hot pot!”

Just when everyone was talking, an amazing scene appeared!

The famous dandies in the Imperial City walked together one after another and went to the restaurant happily.

The hearts of the people were suddenly creepy.

These dandies are well-known villains in the imperial city. Although they have not committed any heinous crimes, they must be arrogant and domineering in ordinary days.

Generally, when these guys appear in groups, they either go shopping or go to someone’s trouble.

“I’m afraid this restaurant can’t open tomorrow…” someone who knows the way well sighed silently.

It’s a pity that such a good restaurant has just opened and will be poisoned by these villains.

Before everyone finished their regret, a shocking scene appeared.

These dandies stood in and were carried out of the restaurant!

And it’s not that he was seriously injured and couldn’t walk, but because he ate too much, he could only be carried out!

The shopkeeper said, “let the shopkeeper go! I beg you, let me pack one! I haven’t had enough! ”

Even if the dandies don’t give up, they can only be carried back to the house.

WOW!

For a time, there was a lot of discussion about the restaurant.

“I’ve seen a ghost. The last time those dandies patronized the restaurant like this, the restaurant closed down the same day!”

“Didn’t you find that even if the shopkeeper didn’t give face, all the dandies didn’t make trouble!”

“Yes! They are all fearless guys. When did they become so obedient? ”

The discerning person quickly pointed out the key. The owner behind the restaurant has more energy than expected.

Soon, someone spread the relevant information of the restaurant.

“I tell you, this restaurant only sells one dish, that is hot pot. I heard it costs one hundred Liang silver!” Someone familiar with the matter said.

“True or false, one hundred Liang silver is so expensive?”

“Really! And it is said that it tastes wonderful and makes people linger! ”

Although the dandies say they have a bad reputation, they are also the most enjoyable people in the imperial city.

There’s always something delicious and fun. These guys flock like sharks smelling blood.

This time, with them as pawns, the reputation of Baiyun Building soon spread in the Imperial City, and there were many crowds at once.

The imperial city is at the foot of the emperor. Although one hundred liang of silver is expensive, some people can afford it.

In almost half a day, there was a long line downstairs of Baiyun, almost across the whole street, and even there were people in the next street.

Just when everyone complained about too many people, the shopkeeper spoke again.

“The restaurant’s hot pot is limited to 99 copies a day. If you don’t want to line up, you can apply for a membership card of 998 liang of silver and arrange seats in advance.”

Even if some dignitaries pay money and apply for a card, they are immediately regarded as guests and enjoy delicious food.

Other rich people scoff at it.

“Idiot, do a membership card just to enjoy it in advance. It’s stupid.”

“That is, I don’t know that only waiting can make beautiful things more valuable.”

“This kind of upstart doesn’t deserve to line up with us.”

The dignitary who got the membership card came out after eating. When he heard these words, he showed a subtle look on his face and said loudly, “no, no, no, someone can’t afford to get a membership card. Queue up here. It’s good to say that he’s rich?”

what the fuck! One stone stirs up thousands of waves. Everyone is rich. Why are you so arrogant? It’s only 998 liang of silver. I can’t afford it Give me one! ” A rich man was filled with indignation and took out his money to get a card on the spot I want one too! ” Give me ten and one for each person on the table. Some upstarts see it and think I can’t afford it! ” According to incomplete statistics, there are more than 100 rich people who handle membership cards alone. Some rich people don’t believe in evil and don’t do cards even when they die. As a result, they lined up all day and couldn’t get in line. The question is to give priority to the orders of members. The rich are suddenly stupid. They don’t have a fucking membership card now, let alone eat hot pot. They can’t even smell it! As a result, almost all the rich who wanted to eat hot pot ran to get their cards. Xuanyuan Wanrong in the palace was surprised to get the news Just hot pot can cause so many followers? ” The spy who came to reply hesitated and whispered, “madam, there is a rumor that the Baiyun Building was built by your majesty.” I know. ” Xuanyuan Wanrong was not surprised. “Only he can think of such a ghost idea and make money by opening a restaurant.” But the war requires millions of taels of silver, and it is still the lowest. Today’s restaurant’s turnover, even if you add cards, is only less than 200000 silver. Xuanyuan Wanrong doesn’t know how to govern the country, but she knows that in this world without aura, even if the food is delicious, she will be tired of eating one day. Today there will be such a high income, just because everyone is trying to be strange. With the passage of time, the turnover will gradually decline. At that time, according to the earning method of one hundred Liang silver for this dish, I don’t know if I can earn one million Liang silver until the year of the monkey. But she didn’t know that this was just the first step Leeks, of course, can’t be cut at one time. We should give them some room to grow! ” Xu Ke, who is teaching experience to the shopkeeper, said

chapters.title: Chapter 1668
chapters.body:
Chapter 1668

Chapter 1668

C.1668

After a whole day’s momentum, Baiyun tower has reached a peak in the imperial city.

Both dignitaries and ordinary people are proud to have a hot pot.

However, although the taste of hot pot was wonderful, the selling price was always something that ordinary people could not afford, so soon only dignitaries came to dinner.

Seeing that the sales began to decline gradually, Xu que asked the shopkeeper to go out and talk again.

Imperial City, Tianxing teahouse.

This teahouse belongs to a special teahouse, and the guests are all talents and beauties, or royal relatives and relatives.

Since Xuanyuan Wanrong came to power, his relatives have become more and more powerful, so now half of the people in this building are related to Xuanyuan Wanrong.

At this time, a scholar was telling a story vividly.

All the people around him sat around him and listened attentively.

“It is said that before the moon went to heaven, there was a woman who loved each other on earth. Unfortunately, human immortals could not love each other. They were destined to be separated.”

“So Yuelao thought, what can he do to bring this woman to heaven.”

“Finally, he thought of a way, that is to send the immortal Qi in his body to the woman’s body. As long as the woman has his immortal Qi in her body, she can also be brought to heaven by herself.”

“But there are regulations in the fairyland that immortals can’t directly deliver immortal Qi to mortals. This is against the law… Cough, against heaven.”

“So Yuelao thought hard for a long time, and finally he came up with a way.”

At this point, the scholar stopped talking, but picked up the tea cup and drank slowly.

The surrounding audience suddenly became anxious and began to urge.

When everyone was almost waiting, the scholar said again.

“So, Yuelao made a hot pot, using the best fairy medicine and herbs in the fairy world, and ate the hot pot with the woman.”

“When eating hot pot, Yuelao transports his immortal Qi into the hot pot. Because there is the immortal Qi of fairy medicine, the immortal Qi He transports will not be found by the fairy world.”

“The woman ate a hot pot and was full of immortality on the spot. In short, the woman directly became an immortal and lived and flew with the old man.”

“From then on, they will accompany each other day and night in the sky, draw red lines for lovers on earth and marriage for you.”

The scholar closed the folding fan and said with a faint smile, “since then, there has been a legend in the world that if a man loves a woman, he will invite her to eat the most expensive hot pot to prove his sincerity. When the moon in the sky sees it, he will understand your mind and will tie your red line to death. He will never be separated.”

“This is an ancient saying that hot pot will last forever!”

When the voice fell, the audience around showed a suddenly enlightened expression, and the women were full of peach blossoms and red.

“Oh my God… It’s too romantic. Woo woo, there was such a sad and beautiful love story between Yuelao and Hongniang.” A woman with hazy tears was moved beyond measure. She grabbed the man beside her and said softly, “husband, you will also invite me to eat the most expensive hot pot, won’t you?”

The man coughed: “no… the story is not sad and beautiful, and people didn’t say that the woman is matchmaker…”

“What do you mean? Don’t you want to invite me to the most expensive hot pot? ”

“No, I didn’t mean that…”

“Then why don’t you promise immediately! You just don’t love me! ”

“Ah, this…”

With this precedent, the women in the teahouse have set their eyes on their male partners.

The scholar raised his eyebrows, shook his head and said, “I don’t know, but according to the legend, the two things seem to be quite similar. I’m afraid… The deep fried tianbang Haidilao really has this love hotpot.”

Then, the story of Yuelao began to spread throughout the imperial city. With the help of people with intentions, almost everyone recognized a truth.

Only after eating the love hot pot of deep fried tianbang Haidilao, can we be worthy of the couple called true love!

For a time, the crowd surged and went straight to Baiyun Building.

The shopkeeper of hotpot restaurant didn’t let go until the queen of the dynasty, that is, Xuanyuan Wanrong’s nephew, appeared.

“You guys, the true love hot pot I fried tianbang Haidilao is only sold for 100 copies a day, and one is sold for 10000 silver. If you can accept this price, you can enter it.”

Ten thousand silver!

The price immediately frightened many people, many of whom were attracted by the price.

Only the children of those dignitaries have this capital to enter.

However, this is only the beginning… In the prime minister’s house of the current Dynasty. The prime minister sat in the courtyard, looking at the files and thinking about how to deal with the recent emptiness of the national treasury. The prime minister’s wife came over, glanced at him, and said in a strange manner: “I heard… Zhang Shoufu took his wife today to eat the true love hot pot fished by the deep fried sky help…” the prime minister frowned and stroked his beard: “it’s just a rumor. Why follow the trend?” OK, you old man! I knew you didn’t love me! ” The prime minister’s wife suddenly changed her face and scolded angrily, “I’ve been with you for so many years.
