Now you won’t let me eat hot pot?” Ah, madam, what did you say… “I knew you were always thinking about marrying a concubine recently. Why don’t you like me now? Hum, sure enough, men are all virtue! ” Alas… Eat. I’ll take you to eat now. ” Such scenes also occurred in other imperial officials’ houses. Although the amount of ten thousand taels of silver is not low, for these high-ranking adults who have been officials in the dynasty for many years, although it is painful, it is worth paying for family harmony. One hundred true love hotpots soon sold out, and the one-day sales instantly rose to one million liang of silver! In a few days! At the time of going to the court, Xu que made people carry millions of liang of silver to the court hall in front of all the civil and military officials of the Manchu Dynasty. The white silver fell to the ground and almost blinded everyone. Shock the government and the public Nuo, take it, a million liang of silver for the military. ” Xu Wei yawned and felt sleepy. I’m tired of pretending to be a scholar and telling stories to people these days. The general trembled his hands and knelt down on the hall with a “plop”, with tears in his eyes: “thank you, Emperor!” Xuanyuan Wanrong was also stunned: “where did you… Get so much silver?” Xu que glanced at her with a cheap smile on his face: “were you thinking that even if my restaurant really sells hot pot, it can’t sell a million liang of silver?” Yes… What’s none of your business? I mean, where did you get so much silver? ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1669
chapters.body:
Chapter 1669

Chapter 1669

C.1669

Soon, Xu vacancy began to spread from the mouth of all officials in the Manchu Dynasty.

Completely shocked the whole country.

Almost everyone knows that the emperor’s majesty, relying on the developed hot pot, made millions of liang of silver a day.

It was enough to earn a million liang of silver, but the point was that he did not hesitate to give all the silver as military expenditure.

This is a noble and dignified move, which immediately attracted countless people’s admiration among the people.

“It is worthy of our emperor’s majesty. We have wronged him in the past few years!”

“That is, your majesty is dignified, will rule the world for thousands of generations!”

“Woo woo, your majesty is so loyal to the country and the people. From then on, I will be his Majesty’s loyal fan!”

As for those dignitaries who bought hot pot, as well as Royal relatives and relatives, they all reacted that they were dumb.

But it was the emperor who let them suffer. Even if he was unwilling, he could only knock off his teeth and swallow them in his stomach.

Soon, the military expenditure was replaced by weapons, grain and grass, which were quickly transported to the border and equipped with soldiers and horses.

After only a few days of war, the nomads at the border were beaten down in an instant.

This matter spread back to the Imperial City, and Xu’s reputation rose to a higher level in the hearts of the people all over the country.

At this time, in the back garden of the palace.

Xuanyuan Wanrong and Xu que sit opposite each other, and Xu que still looks lazy.

Xuanyuan Wanrong looked at him with complicated eyes and didn’t know what he was thinking.

“If you keep staring at me, everyone is mortal. If something happens, I won’t be responsible.” Xu Xu suddenly said.

Xuanyuan Wanrong didn’t care about his glib words this time, but asked seriously, “where did you hear the story you told?”

Before, Xu lacked to sell true love hot pot by means of hunger marketing through the influence of public opinion on the earth. His action was too fast.

When Xuanyuan Wanrong reacted, Xu que had finished harvesting all the leeks.

Naturally, she was shocked, and her view of Xu vacancy wavered again.

How could he have come up with such a wonderful idea if he was just an apprentice!

According to the spy’s return, most of the rich people who were cut leeks were relatives.

In other words, while making money, Xu Ke intentionally or unintentionally weakens the influence of her forces, which is unimaginable!

Although Xuanyuan Wanrong didn’t understand it, he was not a fool. After a little thinking, he realized that if these ways were put in the immortal world, they would be enough to cause bloody storms one after another.

And this is all the thoughts of the scoundrel in front of her who is regarded as ignorant and incompetent.

But what Xuanyuan Wanrong cares about most is actually the story Xu Ke said.

Yuelao is an immortal. Even she doesn’t know about it. How can Xu Xu know?

Is it difficult… Is he connected with the fairyland?

Hearing Xuanyuan Wanrong’s question, Xu que was stunned and looked blankly: “wait… Don’t you take that story seriously?”

Sleeping trough, isn’t this woman stupid and sweet?

Xuanyuan Wan Rong smiled slightly and said, “did you make it up?”

“This is not nonsense… In fact, it is not entirely.”

In the middle of the story, seeing that Xuanyuan Wanrong had a tendency to change his face, Xu Ke immediately changed his mouth and said with a deep expression: “in fact… Only the immortal is false. In this story, the real Yuelao is me.”

“I fell in love with a woman, but I couldn’t be with her. In memory of her, that’s why I made hot pot.”

When he said this, Xu Que’s face was serious and his tone was affectionate. There was a trace of regret in the depths of his eyes.

Xuanyuan Wanrong was stunned.

This… Is the story that happened to him?

In order to commemorate this woman, I don’t hesitate to use this way!

Xuanyuan Wanrong also tasted the hot pot and knew that it would take a lot of energy to develop such a delicious thing.

Even those who practice immortality can’t do it easily.

He knew that the woman could not be with him, but he was willing to spend his heart and effort to make this thing to commemorate her.

Can you say… This disciple is really a affectionate person?

Xuanyuan Wanrong was at a loss for a moment. She didn’t know who Xu que was.

If he is affectionate, he looks like a naughty scoundrel when facing himself.

But if he is an asshole, when he says that, the affection in his eyes can’t be hidden

As for Xu que, there was only one thought in his mind at this time.

This woman won’t really believe it, will she?

Just now, I was just habitually pretending to be a bully. My women are living well!

“Then why is it called Haidilao hot pot?” Xuanyuan Wanrong asked again Because I thought of turning into a sea king and fishing for her in the vast sea. Although I knew it was impossible, it was also a thought. ” Xu que said that, got up silently and walked away. Xuanyuan Wanrong looked at his bleak, slightly trembling back and couldn’t help but be stunned. Xu Duan, with her back to her, couldn’t help laughing. After Xuanyuan Wanrong became a mortal, he was really cute and easy to deceive as before. This woman is really strange. Does her IQ decline with her accomplishments After this incident, Xu que found that Xuanyuan Wanrong’s attitude towards him began to change. Although they still often show their dissatisfaction with themselves, they can no longer say that they are disciples as before. Xu Ke felt that the relationship between the two sides should be eased. He simply took advantage of the opportunity to return to power, but was mercilessly rejected. Pooh, dog woman! Just pretend to lie! The two were so light and warm. Xu que still couldn’t see anyone every day. Xuanyuan Wanrong’s heart palpitation gradually subsided with the passage of time, and his view of Xu que deteriorated again. It is clear that the eastern Tang Dynasty needs to develop vigorously, but he runs outside all day. Do you have the consciousness of being a king However, a few days later, Xu Ke reappeared in the hall for the first time. Xuanyuan Wanrong was a little stunned. Did this guy take the initiative to go to the morning court? Xu que was careless. He sat on the Dragon chair without changing his face and waved his hand: “Dear Aiqing, if you have something to play, you can leave the court if you have nothing to do!” At this time, the Minister of the Ministry of industry directly came out, and Lang said, “I have a play. After continuous efforts, I finally found a grain that can produce 40 stones per mu. I also hope the queen will promote it in the world!” WOW! Countless courtiers were in an uproar. Even Xuanyuan Wanrong stood up in an instant. In his mind, he immediately recalled the previous report of the spy and looked at Xu que with surprised eyes. Can you say… What the spy reported before is true?! An excited minister came forward, grabbed the minister’s hand and shook it vigorously: “Lao Zhang! You are so awesome! It can be invented! ” Zhang Kaiyun smiled twice and whispered, “I didn’t invent it. The real inventor… Someone else.” Who is it? Say it, I will give him three kowtows and nine worships, and set up an longevity archway at home! ” Zhang Kaiyun looked at Xu Duan and saw that the other party didn’t mean to stop him. Then he slowly said, “this thing was invented… It’s your majesty.” The man was stunned and the others were stupid. what the fuck! It was actually studied by Hun Jun On the fourth watch, ask for a monthly ticket!]

chapters.title: Chapter 1670
chapters.body:
Chapter 1670

Chapter 1670

C.1670

The news spread again from all the officials.

The whole world was shocked!

The people talked about it one after another, and the people could hardly believe it.

Is this still their stupid king who ignored the government for eight years?

Is the ghost on you?

I can’t even think of a new variety of food with a yield of 40 stones per mu!

But anyway, Xu Xu did a good thing this time.

The people sang praises for Xu que one after another.

What ordinary people see is that Xu que has developed new crops that can feed the people.

As for those in high positions, they see more.

In an official house, several middle-aged people were sitting around a stone table with dignified faces.

“What do you think of this time?” The middle-aged man sitting in the first place picked up the tea cup and said slowly.

He is Xuanyuan Wanrong’s uncle, and he is also one of the important officials in the court.

As for the others, they are loyal supporters of the relatives’ party.

“First of all, whether these things are really made by the emperor or not, but the old man, the Minister of the Ministry of work, actually started this matter in public, which shows that he has stood on the emperor’s side.”

The middle-aged man in the next head pondered for a moment and said, “if I guess right, I’m afraid the emperor has taken power now. This time, it’s just a test.”

“In fact, in my opinion, the emperor’s sudden awakening this time may not be a good thing. If he can concentrate on the government in the future, it will not be a good thing for me in the eastern Tang Dynasty.” Someone defended Xu que.

“Stupid!”

The head of the middle-aged man patted the table and shouted, “have you forgotten how many things we have done to support the queen over the years? If you let the emperor regain power, how long do you think it will take your majesty to find out these things? ”

For a moment, everyone was speechless.

Once the son of heaven and a courtier, several people here understand this truth.

If there were no Xuanyuan Wanrong, even if Xu Kuan ignored the government, the power would still be in his hands, and the courtiers of the hall would still serve Xu Kuan.

But there was a Xuanyuan Wanrong, who showed amazing ambition as soon as she entered the palace.

He tried every possible means to win over the courtiers, appoint people by favoritism, forcibly overhead Xu Ke, and controlled the power of the eastern Tang Dynasty.

Now, whether it’s opening restaurants or developing crops, it represents one thing.

Once the emperor’s Majesty was announcing to the world that he had come back!

“As you can see, how should this be handled?” Someone asked.

Everyone was silent, their eyes met, and they all saw the thoughts in each other’s hearts.

Never let their emperor return to power!

In the palace, Xu que negotiated with Xuanyuan Wanrong again.

“How about giving me the jade seal this time?” Xu Wei said triumphantly, “it’s easy to get one million liang of military expenditure. Who is more suitable to be an Emperor than me?”

Hey, hey, when I get the jade seal, I will abolish you as a queen and demote you as a common people at the first time!

When you are lonely and helpless on the street, I will go on a luxury tour again to let this woman see Lao Tzu’s guard of honor!

It’s beautiful to think about it

“No.” Xuanyuan Wanrong said faintly.

“Oh, that’s right. We are grasshoppers on the same rope… Wait, what did you say just now? No? ”

Xu Kuan was angry: “you are a woman who doesn’t promise! It was agreed that I would give the jade seal to me when I solved the trouble? ”

The jade seal is the order of the son of heaven. Without the jade seal, the Xu missing imperial edict is useless at all.

He was able to mobilize the Minister of the Ministry of war, but also relied on the six dispatching orders given by Xuanyuan Wanrong.

Xuanyuan Wanrong said faintly, “what you have done is not a policy of governing the country. Combined with your reputation in the immortal cultivation world, all these may be deceptive paths. How can I believe you?”

Gan!

This woman is cheating!

Xu Wei was so angry that he almost laughed: “Xuanyuan Wanrong! Don’t take you to play like this! ”

“What I said is true, not to mention… When did I say that as long as you solve the trouble, I’ll give you the jade seal?”

“I promised… Well, this…”

Xu que was stunned.

Yes, the woman doesn’t seem to have promised herself at all

“OK! You are cruel! ”

Xu didn’t say it for a long time, so he had to turn around and leave with his neck.

Shit, we have to find a way to make this woman spit out the jade seal.

It’s just that the courtiers listen to her. When I turn back, I can prove my ability. There are ways to get the jade seal back!

He investigated the current court forces, which are probably divided into three groups. A group of relatives led by Xuanyuan Wanrong are the biggest forces in the court and firmly control the power. A group of former imperial ministers, led by themselves, vowed to defend the dignity of the royal family to the death. The last group is the important officials loyal to the court, such as Gong Qiwei, the young ministers. The third group of people said it better, telling good birds to choose trees and rest, and said it harder, it was called wall grass. Look who is powerful, stand on whose side Hum, Xuanyuan Wanrong, since you are unkind, don’t blame me! ” Xu Que’s face showed a smile. If he wants to get rid of Xuanyuan Wanrong, he must first get rid of these relatives. Otherwise, any decision will be stopped Shit, it’s not easy to change. Isn’t it easy to stink? ” It’s time for you to see what the Internet spray experienced in the era of the information explosion is! The next day, it was on the hall. Xu Weigang just sat on the Dragon chair. Before his ass was hot, someone played Your majesty, I have a play! ” Impressively inspired by Xuanyuan! Xu que narrowed his eyes and stared at him for a long time. I was trying to fuck you, and you brought it yourself? Xu Wei smiled in his heart and waved, “say.” Your majesty, now there is a severe drought year after year, the National Treasury is empty, and the people are unable to make a living. I’m afraid it’s caused by the scourge of heaven. I also ask the emperor to make an edict for sin and ask heaven for understanding, heavy rain and ease the suffering of the people. ” Sin has been ordered! The ministers immediately burst open the pot! Xuanyuan inspired this move, which is tantamount to directly roasting the emperor on the fire. Sin is equal to a letter of repentance, telling the people what mistakes they have made and praying to heaven for forgiveness. It doesn’t matter if you are a Mingjun, but if it is Xu deficient… He has done a lot of stupid things in recent years. If you are a Mingjun, it is equivalent to making public what he has done in recent years. As a result, Xu Xu’s actions and the prestige he has just established will fall to the bottom of the valley among the people in an instant. At that time, Xuanyuan inspired the emperor to continue to preside over the court for the time being, and continue to let Xuanyuan Wanrong control the court. Xuanyuan Wanrong will not fall, and the relatives will live forever

chapters.title: Chapter 1671
chapters.body:
Chapter 1671

Chapter 1671

C.1671

“This… Crime has been ordered. It’s too much.”

“How? The emperor, as the son of heaven, naturally has to bear what he has done wrong! ”

“Well… If the emperor is virtuous and benevolent, he should be so for the sake of the people…”

Xuanyuan inspired this advance, which immediately made the ministers talk one after another.

Xu que sat on the Dragon chair, raised his eyebrows, stared at Xuanyuan’s inspiration, sneered: “are you stupid… Cough, took great pains to come up with such a plan?”

Shit, you want me to blame myself?

Are you afraid to live in a dream?

This crime has been ordered, which is tantamount to admitting his incompetence to the world!

Ben forced the congregation bird. You’re weird!

Xu que immediately waved his big hand and said in a deep voice, “let’s not talk about the crime of the imperial edict for the time being. I have more important things to announce now!”

Xuanyuan inspired him not to give in: “emperor, it’s about the people. You can’t delay it!”

Oh, is this a forced palace?

Xu que was suddenly happy. He leaned down slightly and said in a deep voice, “Aiqing, what I want to say next is a great event for the country and the people. Are you sure you want to interrupt me?”

“I dare not!” Xuanyuan inspired Yilin in his heart. He heard that Xu que was already impatient. If he forced him again, he was afraid that the faint king would have to do something absurd.

He tilted his head slightly and looked at Xuanyuan Wanrong.

Xuanyuan Wanrong looked straight ahead and turned a blind eye to Xuanyuan’s inspired eyes.

Xu lacked a subtle look, but he didn’t say it on the spot. Instead, he announced: “Dear Ai Qing, I announce today that I will build schools in China, abolish the recommendation system and establish the imperial examination system. At the same time, I will make great efforts to build civil engineering and build national roads.”

WOW!

The ministers were shocked when this remark was made!

The construction of the school is for the education of the people, and the ministers have no opinion.

Building national roads is also a good thing. Naturally, they can’t say anything to refute.

But the abolition of the recommendation system and the establishment of the imperial examination system directly caused a sensation in the whole court!

The establishment and promotion of officials in the eastern Tang Dynasty all depended on the recommendation system.

In short, if you want to be an official in the DPRK, you must recommend people who are officials in the DPRK.

But where can I find acquaintances who are officials in the dynasty?

As a result, all the officials in the court have their own factions and are implicated in each other to control the court.

Those born in poor families, even if they have talent and learning, can’t be an official in the DPRK.

Xu Ke’s move is undoubtedly against the interests of all officials. He is completely facing the whole court alone!

“The emperor can’t!”

“The recommendation system has been like this since ancient times. The ancestral system cannot be abolished!”

“Emperor, please think twice!”

With the exception of a small number of reformists, everyone else spoke out against it and strongly demanded that Xu que take back his life.

Among them, led by Xuanyuan inspiration, the whole Waiqi group reacted most violently.

They all rely on recommendation to become officials in the DPRK, and they earn a lot of money through recommendation every year. Xu Ke’s doing so is tantamount to digging the roots of his relatives.

How could they agree?

Listening to these opposing words, Xu que still smiles on his face.

It depends on the way you people jump in a hurry. It’s so cute!

“You won’t succeed. The imperial dynasty ruled for thousands of years. Is it to change it casually?” At this time, Xuanyuan Wanrong said faintly.

“You know a fart. Stay and watch it!” Xu shaopi laughed at the meat but didn’t laugh, so he said directly.

I’m the son of heaven and the leader of the fried heaven gang. If you want to make a reform, you have to look at your face?

Xu Wei thought for a moment and put a gentle smile on his face: “since you Aiqing are so opposed to the imperial examination system, I will consider it again, but what do you think of the other two policies?”

Seeing Xu Kui’s relief, the ministers all breathed a sigh of relief.

As long as you don’t recommend, it’s easy to say anything. As for building roads and schools, let him fix them.

“Emperor Shengming!”

“This is the work of thousands of generations. I am willing to contribute to the emperor.”

“I seconded.”

Bang!

Xu Wei immediately patted the table with an excited look: “OK! I didn’t expect Xuanyuan Aiqing to know what I mean. Now the Treasury is empty. Now I also intend to ask you to donate money. Now there are ten eight schools built everywhere. A little makes a lot! I wonder how much Xuanyuan Aiqing is going to donate? ”

Xuanyuan inspired the whole person to be confused.

When did I say I would donate money? I just said a secondment… Sleeping slot!

Dog day emperor pit me!

Xuanyuan’s inspiration immediately reacted. Do you understand the meaning of giving a force?

Say yes, it’s absolutely impossible to pay!

Xuanyuan inspired him to decline on the spot: “this… Minister’s salary still needs to subsidize his family…”

“It’s said that Xuanyuan Aiqing went to Baiyun Building to eat hot pot a few days ago. He threw thousands of gold a day. Can’t he even take out this silver?” Xu que glanced at him and blocked his next words directly. Xuanyuan’s face looked like a pig’s liver, and he wondered for the first time. Shit, how did this stupid gentleman know that I spent so much money on hot pot? Oh, it seems that the emperor opened it. It’s okay In that case, the minister donated five… “Xuanyuan inspired a face of flesh pain and compared a palm Fifty thousand Liang! Well, I didn’t expect Aiqing to be so heroic. She is worthy of being an important Minister of humerus in the eastern Tang Dynasty! It’s really great. Such feats should be announced to the world. I’m glad to have an important minister like you! ” Xu que didn’t wait for him to finish. He directly patted the table and stood up. “Let’s applaud Xuanyuan Aiqing!” Everyone looked at each other and finally clapped reluctantly. The people present have reacted. The emotional emperor is waiting for them here. Shit, I wouldn’t eat that hot pot if I knew. Xuanyuan looked at Xu que who preached loudly in front of him. Now he wanted to take a knife and commit the crime of plotting against regicide. Nima, I wanted to donate five hundred Liang! You shout so loudly here and say so great! How can you tell me what’s behind you? Xuanyuan inspired me to understand that Xu Ke is not donating money at all, but robbing money! Xu que looked at Xuanyuan’s green and white face and sneered in his heart. Son of a bitch, why don’t you oppose me so fiercely just now? I’ll pit you for a sum of money first! Stay dishonest, oh no, no matter you are old or dishonest, you will feel better next Soon. In the cry of Xu qiru’s speech, the ministers have contributed a lot of silver. After going down the court, the other ministers looked at Xuanyuan’s inspired eyes as if they were going to eat him. Nima… If you weren’t there against the emperor, would we donate so much? Xuanyuan wanted to cry without tears, but he hated it in his heart. Dog emperor! We’ve made a deal

chapters.title: Chapter 1672
chapters.body:
Chapter 1672

Chapter 1672

C.1672

Soon, driven by the lack of funds, the rich and powerful businessmen also began to make donations.

Batch after batch of silver flowed out of the hands of the rich and poured into all parts of the country.

Under the leadership of the rich, people have also made voluntary donations to contribute to the construction of schools.

However, the world will not be too beautiful. Some people are willing to donate, and naturally many people are unwilling to donate.

In the imperial library.

“What do you mean? Five surnames and seven hopes said they were unwilling to donate money? ” Xu que looked at Gong Qiwei who came to report the news and said with a frown.

The eastern Tang Dynasty was in a social state of identity system. Here, the aristocratic families had high prestige and status. Among them, the aristocratic families with five surnames were the most powerful, and the two surnames had two prefectures respectively. Therefore, they were called the five surnames and seven outlooks.

Now the five surnames and seven hope to take the lead in not participating in the donation will certainly play a very bad leading role.

At that time, the royal authority will be affected. I’m afraid other families will learn from each other and despise the imperial power one after another.

That’s not good!

“In reply to the Holy Father, the five surnames and seven hopes said that they had suffered natural disasters this year, and the same losses were not small. There was no extra money to subsidize the refugees.” Gong Qiwei knelt down and said in a deep voice.

Xu Shideng was angry from his heart: “these old Wang Ba said they had no money? Really think I don’t know that they open their warehouse and put grain at a high price? ”

Famine was rampant. Instead of providing relief, rich families hoarded grain. When even the royal family could not manage it, they sold grain at a high price, forcing countless civilians to sell their children and women.

The wine and meat in Zhumen are smelly, and there are frozen bones on the road. Such a scene can be found everywhere in the place where the rich and powerful are located.

It can be said that the glory of the five surnames and seven hopes is built on countless bones. Even Xuanyuan Wanrong once used the power of the powerful family to control power.

Gong Qiwei is now regarded as a confidant and naturally began to actively give advice.

“Your Majesty, the owner of the aristocratic family implicitly asked you to bid for the grain they hoard, and then be your…”

Xu Xu’s eyes were cold: “go on.”

Finally, the emperor asked them to hesitate again

“Oh, what a good abacus!” Xu Shideng laughed angrily.

Originally, he thought that he would stay here for a long time. If he could be stable, he wouldn’t be too arrogant.

But now five surnames and seven hopes are even more dragged than him!

Who can bear it?

Do you really think I’m the old loser emperor?

“Pass on my instructions and send someone to collect money at the gate of Wuxing Qiwang’s house.” Xu que narrowed his eyes and said with a sneer, “just tell them that I will set up a merit monument in the imperial city according to the amount of donation and announce it to the world!”

Gong Qiwei didn’t react at first. After thinking about it for a moment, he suddenly understood Xu Xu’s idea.

“Emperor, your move is wonderful… It can be said to be a drastic draw!”

“What is your educational level? I call it moral kidnapping! ”

Hum, don’t you want to donate?

OK, then I’ll tell the world the amount you donate and let the people all over the world know. I’ll see if you five surnames and seven hopes have the face to donate less.

Within a few days, driven by Xu que, a monument of merit and virtue was soon established in the imperial city.

Five surnames and seven looks panicked in an instant.

Their powerful family has stood for a hundred years, relying on their continuous reputation.

For them, mere money is just a by-product of time accumulation. Only being famous all over the world is what they pursue.

Now, if they don’t donate this merit monument, it’s completely equivalent to being roasted on the stove and will be sprayed by the people every minute!

“Dog emperor, it’s cruel!”

“I can think of such a bad move. Who is giving him advice?”

“Do we still donate?”

“Donate a fart, I Liu Shi swear not to obey!”

“Master Liu, you fart. I just received the wind. You have sent someone to donate tens of thousands of Liang.”

“Ah, really? It seems that I’m old and have a bad memory! ”

“Go, go and donate quickly. My Li family will take the merit monument first!”

“Fart, the top of the list must be my Wang family!”

For a time, many donors, especially Wuxing Qiwang, continued to krypton gold in order to compete for the top of the list, which completely alleviated the pressure on the Treasury.

After all, silver is needed everywhere at present. Although Xu Xu has developed various crops, crop growth also needs a certain cycle after all.

Xu Ke also took out a large part of the donation and sent it to the disaster area.

After finishing all this, Xu que also began to think about how to take the jade seal from Xuanyuan Wanrong.

After all, everyone wants to die together. Xu que also wants not to offend each other as much as possible. After thinking about it, seeing is believing. No matter how many beeps he beeps here, Xuanyuan Wanrong won’t believe him. It’s better to take her to the scene Follow me to the disaster area. Under my management, the disaster area is now stable and prosperous. You’d better hand over the jade seal! ” Xuanyuan Wanrong’s face was calm: “right and wrong, merits and demerits are in the hearts of the people. How do I know you’re not acting?” Hey, this woman can’t get into oil and salt! Xu que pressed down his anxiety, remained silent for a moment, and said in a deep voice: “I see. You are afraid to see my outstanding achievements and fall in love with me. After all, I am handsome and talented. It is human nature to fall in love with me.” Xuanyuan Wanrong: “?” Is this bastard short circuited? Xu que put on a look of self intoxication, approached him and said affectionately, “I know you’ve been talking angrily all the time to attract my attention. I admit that your tricks have been successful, but… Woman, you’re playing with fire…” “well, shut up, I’ll go with you.” Xuanyuan Wanrong twitched fiercely in the corners of her eyes. Finally, she couldn’t listen and chose to compromise. It’s disgusting and terrible. It’s shameless to the extreme Would that be all? ” Xu que showed a proud smile. Greasy man, invincible in the world Not long after, under the protection of the guards, they came all the way to a resettlement site for victims outside the imperial city Look, this is my development… What’s the situation? ” Xu Xu was stunned when he saw the scene in front of him. The whole resettlement area is full of starvation victims, and countless people have corpses on the road. A large number of hungry victims lay on the roadside, shivering, as if they were dying soon. Without any reason, Xu Ke burst into a rage and shouted, “Gong Qiwei! Get over here! Didn’t you say that the disaster relief funds were in place? Why is this happening? ” Gong Qiwei ran over, knelt in front of Xu Kuan and said in a trembling voice: “Your Majesty, I’m going to report this to you. According to my investigation, the disaster relief fund was ten million liang of silver, but in fact, only three million liang of silver was actually implemented, and even the food I bought…” after listening to Gong Qiwei’s report, Xu Xu’s face was as gloomy as ink: “take me to see the food you bought.” Under the leadership of Gong Qiwei, several people came to the granary, where a large amount of grain was stacked. Xu Kai tore open a bag of packaging, and rice fell pattering, mixed with a large number of stones. Grab a handful of stones, more than rice. Xu que silently looked at the handful of rice in his hand. After a long time, he said, “who sold these…?” Yes… Five surnames and seven hopes. They took the initiative to sell at a low price. ” Gong Qiwei whispered Hehe… Five surnames and seven hopes. How brave you are… It’s the first time I’ve been fooled like this. ” Xu Xu is very angry at this time. For the first time in a long time, someone dared to play with him like five surnames and seven hopes. As for the 7 million taels of silver that disappeared, Gong Qiwei didn’t have to say that Xu que knew where to go. The money of the people is divided into three or seven parts, and all the money of the tyrants and gentry is returned. There has been collusion between officials and businessmen since ancient times How dare they? ” At the moment, Xuanyuan Wanrong was also angry. Then he glanced at Xu vacancy and said in a deep voice: “is this the so-called ability you want to show me? You can’t even hold down five surnames and seven hopes. How can you govern the whole country? ” Well, you’re right! ” Xu nodded. Xuanyuan Wanrong was stunned. This was the first time Xu lacked agreed with her words, which made her a little unresponsive How can I manage the eastern Tang Dynasty if I can’t even hold down five surnames and seven hopes? ” Xu que grinned and showed his white teeth, but his tone was full of forest cold: “I want to see where they are brave enough to control and tease me as a doll!” Don’t say it’s a fantasy world. Even in xianyuanzhou, the Immortal Emperor is not qualified to play such a trick! Your five surnames are Qiwang. Which hair is it

chapters.title: Chapter 1673
chapters.body:
Chapter 1673

Chapter 1673

C.1673

Imperial Palace, imperial study.

“Give me the seal.” Xu Ke once again asked for a jade seal.

The next thing he wants to do, he must have a jade seal to issue a will before he can be justified.

Otherwise, with the arrogance of five surnames and seven hopes, I’m afraid I’ll ignore it at all.

Xuanyuan Wanrong glanced at him lightly, picked up the tea cup and took a sip: “no, I know you want to do something about five surnames and seven, but now is not the time.”

Nima’s!

Xu Kui took a deep breath, looked at Xuanyuan Wanrong’s eyes and said in a deep voice: “last time, if you don’t give it, I’ll do it my own way.”

“For the last time, I need to think long-term about dealing with them. Don’t be overwhelmed by anger!” Xuanyuan Wanrong said in a deep voice, without giving in.

She was well aware of the position of five surnames and seven hopes in the eastern Tang Dynasty. If they were moved at the moment, it would probably cause great unrest.

For her, it doesn’t matter what the future development of the eastern Tang Dynasty will be.

What matters is that right now, and before her normal death, she is in power and has no worries about her life!

So everything can’t be angry!

“Well, different ways do not conspire!”

Xu nodded and turned away directly.

Xuanyuan Wanrong slowly put down the tea cup in his hand and looked at the direction Xu lacked left, with some hesitation in his eyes

The next day.

Five surnames and seven hopes have learned the news spread in the palace. They are very happy.

“I said, the emperor’s children can’t help us.”

“Ha ha, you’ve done a good job. You’ve not only got on the merit monument, but also recovered the silver. We’ve gained both fame and wealth!”

“Lord Xuanyuan, you have to put away the 1 million liang of profit before.”

“Even if the emperor has no power, he doesn’t even want to do anything!”

Inspired by Xuanyuan, an important official of the dynasty, he gathered with people of the five surnames and Qiwang family and raised a glass to push the lamp. How happy is it.

In their view, the little emperor was just a useless waste.

Not enough to fear!

Even, the first Jiang family among the five surnames and seven hopes announced in the imperial city that they would hold a banquet in three days!

People familiar with the matter denounced the Jiang family. It’s just a matter of making the country difficult to make money. Now it’s still made public. It’s heinous, but it’s useless.

A few days later, news came from the palace.

One day, a meteorite fell into the imperial city. After being excavated by the royal family, it turned out to be a jade seal.

The current emperor, Xu que, called this imperial power granted by heaven.

From now on, the jade seal of the past will be invalid, and this heavenly jade seal will be regarded as the national jade seal!

The news did not cause much commotion among the people.

But many people who knew that the seal was in Xuanyuan Wanrong’s hands frowned.

The emperor replaced the old jade seal in this way. Will the queen sit and wait to die?

“Ha ha, yes, the little emperor is too young after all. What’s the use of playing this trick?”

“Mr. Jiang, will the birthday party continue?”

“Of course!”

Today’s Jiangfu is particularly lively.

Master Jiang has arranged a seven-day birthday banquet. Today is the most important formal banquet.

They invited almost ordinary wealthy families in the eastern Tang Dynasty, and even a few senior officials in the imperial city. These dignitaries gathered in the Jiang mansion.

Just at the beginning of the birthday banquet, there were bursts of vibrations outside the mansion. It was clear that there were a large number of people coming.

“Bang! Bang! Bang! ”

At the next moment, the gate of the Jiang family house was knocked.

“Lao Jiang, open the door. I’ll see you off… Oh, no, I’ll give you a birthday!”

A cheap voice sounded.

Everyone present was stunned.

“Emperor?”

“Why is the emperor here?”

When everyone was stunned, they only heard a loud bang, and the whole house gate fell down.

“Oh, why did the door fall down without knocking!”

Wearing a Dragon Robe, Xu Wei led thousands of troops and horses to appear directly in front of the crowd.

At this moment, everyone’s face changed dramatically.

“What did the emperor do with his troops?”

“He’s crazy. Today is uncle Jiang’s birthday!”

Old master Jiang’s eyes narrowed slightly, but he still sat in the chair and said faintly, “I don’t know your majesty is coming to our Jiang house. If you wish me a birthday, I will appreciate it.”

With that, he glanced aside.

The Jiang family immediately understood, waved their big hands, and a group of private soldiers immediately circled out of the dark part of the house and ambushed.

Although these private soldiers did not appear in front of the public, the dense footsteps directly sold them out.

Xu que grinned: “master Jiang is arrogant. It’s all right to sit and talk when you see me. How dare you ambush me with private soldiers?”

Old master Jiang looked as usual. In his opinion, Xu Ke was just a waste emperor without any power.

As a rich family with five surnames and seven hopes, it is only easy to change the dynasty with a wave. A mere abolished emperor is not qualified to awe him.

“Your Majesty is serious. Today is the little old man’s birthday. Since your majesty is here, I happen to have thin wine in my house. I wonder if your majesty can see it.” Old master Jiang is neither humble nor arrogant.

All the rich and famous families around looked at Xu que with a smile and talked about it without concealment.

“How dare the little emperor run into the Jiang family directly?”

“Laugh to death. What can he do to us? It’s just luck to be emperor. ”

“If we join hands, just the royal family, overthrow and then set up.”

All kinds of treacherous words spread directly to Xu’s ears.

He smiled faintly: “old master Jiang is really hospitable. Since you have said so, I will come in!”

As he said this, he suddenly raised his hand and shouted: “it is said that the Jiang family is suspected of harbouring Qin criminals. There is a suspicion of conspiracy. Now search the Jiang family in an all-round way!”

“Yes!”

With Xu Que’s order, a large number of soldiers and horses poured into the Jiang family, even climbed over the wall from all directions, and subdued the private soldiers of the Jiang family in an instant.

Hum, a group of scum. I was forced to be a saint, but Ding Yong brought all the forbidden guards of the imperial city this time. How dare you be arrogant?

“Emperor, are you going to destroy my Jiang family?” Old master Jiang’s face sank and asked coldly.

“Why did old master Jiang say this? I just received the spy’s news to confirm it. If the Jiang family is innocent, will I kill innocent people indiscriminately?” Xu que replied with a smile.

“Emperor, the imperial prisoner has been arrested!”

Soon, Ding Yong brought someone to report!

A middle-aged official was escorted out, inspired by Xuanyuan, who had a secret meeting with the Jiang family.

“Emperor, what is my crime?!” Xuanyuan was sweating and panicked.

Xu que directly raises his hand, throws out an account book and throws it on Xuanyuan’s inspired face.

“You embezzled 7 million taels of silver for disaster relief donations. You have been searched out at home. Now you are afraid of crimes and hide in the Jiang family. Today you are arrested by my own soldiers and executed on the spot!”

Seven million taels?

Still hiding at home?

You’re a fucking fool!

Xuanyuan inspired him to stare: “you, you wronged me. How can I hide seven million Liang at home…”

“I don’t care where you hide, so you admit corruption? Drag it out and cut it. ” Xu que waved outside the house without waiting for him to finish.

“No, wait, I want to see the queen…”

Xuanyuan suddenly realized that the emperor was coming for real, and immediately roared.

However, in the face of the forbidden guards, no matter how hard he struggled, it was useless to resist. He was soon pulled out of Jiangfu!

A moment later, the sound of the blade coming out of the scabbard sounded outside the house, and the wailing inspired by Xuanyuan immediately disappeared.

The hearts of the people were cold.

This Xuanyuan inspiration is a powerful partner of five doors and seven looks in the court. The key is the relatives of Queen Xuanyuan. Unexpectedly, they were killed in this way?

Is it difficult that the emperor really wants to break his face with these famous families today?

“Your majesty!” Mr. Jiang’s face was as black as ink, and he said angrily, “without investigation, I asked the beheading officials whether they were different in ceremony, only by oral instructions without imperial edicts, and different in reason. Do you really want to be a confused king?”

“Hehe, dizzy gentleman? I haven’t been a fool for many years. ” Xu que narrowed his eyes slightly and leaned over and said, “today, I want to be a tyrant!”

“You…” master Jiang was so angry that his face turned red and he had difficulty breathing.

“Your majesty!”

At this time, a forbidden guard hurried out of the house with a jade seal and a dragon robe in his hand.

“Your Majesty, my subordinates found it in the house!”

Dragon Robe jade seal?

what the fuck!

Everyone turned pale and hid it privately. It’s a felony to conspire against the nine families!

Mr. Jiang, no matter how confused he is, can’t put these things at home!

There is only one possibility… It was just brought by the forbidden guards!

Xu Wei took over the jade seal Dragon Robe and said with a grim smile, “I didn’t expect that the Jiang family had such ambition and dared to commit the crime of rebellion!”

“According to my order, the Jiang family committed a rebellion and plotted against it. The criminal evidence is conclusive. They are implicated in nine families and are beheaded on the spot!”

“You, how dare you slander me?” Master Jiang roared angrily, “you don’t have a jade seal. My five surnamed and seven distinguished families had a book and iron Certificate in the previous dynasty. You can’t commit a crime without a jade seal!”

“Oh, the jade seal, I have.”

Xu que took out a gorgeous Kowloon jade seal from his arms with a smile, took the written imperial edict from the attendant next to him, and pressed it hard, “you deserve to die under the imperial edict of the heavenly jade seal.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1674
chapters.body:
Chapter 1674

Chapter 1674

C.1674

Overnight, the Jiangjia murder shocked the world.

Also from this day on, one after another shocking news spread all over the world.

Countless voices of discussion were transmitted among the people.

“Have you heard that the emperor has developed crops that can produce 40 stones per mu!”

“Not only ah, I also heard that the emperor also built schools and asked poor people to become officials!”

“Really? Then we poor people can read… But books are so expensive. ”

“Don’t worry, the emperor has developed papermaking. Now books are sold very cheaply.”

“Yes! Then I’ll buy some sets myself! ”

Since Xu que slaughtered the Jiang family with five surnames and seven hopes, it began to get out of control.

Road construction, paper making, trade, splitting the family and paying the State Treasury

One policy after another, as if prepared, began to be implemented step by step.

This also pushed the broken East Tang country towards the prosperous side.

Xuanyuan Wanrong seemed to acquiesce in Xu Ke’s practice after learning about the Jiang family murder case, no longer opposed anything, and let him gradually take over the whole court.

After all, their goals are the same after all.

As long as we can make the East Tang country develop steadily without great changes, the best result is that they can live here safely until they die and successfully pass the test.

Xuanyuan Wanrong never understood why those strange ideas always came out of Xu’s mind.

It seems unconventional, but it can always have an unexpected effect and make the country better.

She was even thinking, is it true that what Xu Ke once said is not nonsense? Does he really have the ability to become an emperor through the ages?

With the passage of time, Xuanyuan Wanrong herself didn’t find that her view of Xu Xu is changing bit by bit.

Years can change people the most. In a twinkling of an eye, they have been in this world for two years.

In the past two years, Xu’s various policies have built the eastern Tang Dynasty into a strong and prosperous country.

Although it is not as good as the state of Qin, it is very different from the eastern Tang Dynasty two years ago.

On this day, it was the morning meeting again.

After dispersing the dynasty, they were in the imperial library to discuss how to develop the next step.

“Report!”

Suddenly, a eunuch came in a hurry, knelt down outside the Royal study and shouted, “empress, er… Emperor, the envoys sent by the state of Qin are coming!”

“Well?”

Xu Que and Xuanyuan Wanrong looked at each other. After two years of running in, they were familiar with each other’s ideas.

The two tacitly understood that there was trouble.

“I’ll solve it. You’re not good at these things.” Xu que said.

“…” Xuanyuan Wanrong hesitated a little before nodding, which was tacit approval.

They got up directly, opened the door of the imperial study and walked away.

At the same time, on the main hall, the envoys of the state of Qin stood among the ministers, looking proud and disdainful.

The courtiers all around were as black as iron and whispered.

“The envoy of the state of Qin is too arrogant!”

“There’s no way… After all, the state of Qin has a strong army and has ruled more than half of Kyushu.”

“This time, it’s said to be a visit. God knows what’s hidden!”

The envoy listened to the discussion around him and sneered. His expression became more and more arrogant.

“Emperor, the empress arrived!”

With the sharp voice of the eunuch, Xu que sat on the Dragon chair, while Xuanyuan Wanrong sat on the side of the Phoenix seat.

The envoy’s eyes were full of disdain. He just bowed and said, “see the king of the East Tang Dynasty.”

A remonstrating minister immediately angrily stepped out: “bastard! It’s disrespectful not to kowtow to your majesty! ”

The courtiers around also had hidden anger in their faces, and their eyes looked like those who killed their father and enemy.

Xu que waved his hand and said with a smile, “it doesn’t matter. It’s a guest from afar. I don’t know what can I do for the envoy this time?”

Xuanyuan Murong glanced at him and was surprised.

Although the two had discussed on their way here, they had to bear it no matter how provocative the envoy was.

After all, the state of Qin is powerful now. If there is a war, the state of the East Tang will be destroyed in less than three days.

Now they can’t use any real yuan. They are just two ordinary people. Naturally, they can’t crush the state of Qin by relying on the power of immortals.

Therefore, the only current plan is to slow down the troops.

Try to preserve the state of the eastern Tang Dynasty first. With their literary and military strategies, they can easily subvert the state of Qin.

But it takes time.

With her knowledge of Xu Xu, this guy can’t help it. At this time, the envoy straightened up and said in a loud voice, “Your Majesty, the emperor of Qin has only one intention to let Wei Chen come to your country this time.” He paused, looked around at the ministers and said word by word, “let your country surrender!” WOW! The whole hall burst into flames what? Let’s surrender?! ” King Qin has gone too far! My day, your mother! ” Do you want to die? My day, your family! ” Surrender before you fight? Joke! China’s eastern Tang Dynasty has devoted its strength to fighting this war! ” Er… Lao Du, if you think clearly, we really can’t fight. ” The envoy’s words were too straightforward and aroused public anger. This kind of behavior of persuading surrender before beating is placed between countries, which is equivalent to saying that Lao Tzu will eat you and will not beat you if he is obedient. To be vulgar, it’s no different from riding on the head of the monarch of the East Tang Dynasty. In particular, these words were spoken by an envoy, which was a great humiliation. However, unexpectedly, Xu que had no change and always kept a smiling expression. A moment later, Xu Duan pressed his palm to calm the scene down. Xuanyuan Wanrong came to his ear and whispered, “you can promise for the time being. At present, the national strength of the eastern Tang Dynasty is weak and there are not so many troops to fight a national war.” Xu Que’s face remained unchanged: “how long do you think it will take us to reach the national strength of the state of Qin?” Ten… No, eight years. ” Xuanyuan Wanrong had known the strength of the eastern Tang Dynasty, with a large population, but the military strength was weak and the weapons were backward, so he was always in the posture of a weak country. In eight years, it can be built into a powerful country. At that time, it will be enough to fight the state of Qin. Xu nodded and smiled more warmly. If Duan Jiude sees Xu Ke’s smile at this time, he must shout: “this boy must want to do something again!” Aiqing, don’t be impatient. The fact that King Qin can send envoys shows that he is still very sincere. ” Hearing what the monarch of the eastern Tang Dynasty said, the envoy looked more arrogant and seemed to be a domineering posture But… Before making a decision, there are some words that I hope the envoy can bring to the king of Qin for me. ” Xu que waved to the envoy, “the envoy came forward. Don’t let others hear this.” The envoy sneered in his heart and thought it was nothing more than some words of begging for mercy, so he came to the Dragon chair. The ministers’ eyes were about to bleed, and even several people had held the official hat on their head in their hands. They threw their hat away when Xu lacked made a decision King of the East Tang Dynasty, what do you want to bring to us, the emperor? ” The envoy said proudly. Xu que smiled and said, “tell the king of Qin to wash his neck… Wait to die!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1675
chapters.body:
Chapter 1675

Chapter 1675

C.1675

The envoy of the state of Qin was stunned and stunned.

Is this guy crazy or am I crazy?

What did he say?

How… How dare you be so disrespectful to the king of Qin?

Soon, the envoy’s face suddenly became gloomy and his tone was cold: “Your Majesty, your words are a great humiliation to the king of Qin! If you apologize now, the envoy can let bygones be bygones…… ”

“Let bygones be bygones, NIMA!”

Xu que directly slapped the envoy in the face.

With a snap, the whole court fell into a dead silence.

The envoy was so confused that he couldn’t believe it.

You were beaten?

Isn’t this king of the East Tang Dynasty a loser? Every day, I only know what kind of free love to pursue. I haven’t heard that he is so bold!

This is mainly because the state of Qin has been fighting everywhere in recent years, cultivating students and recuperating, and did not pay much attention to the situation of the eastern Tang Dynasty.

In their view, the eastern Tang Dynasty, a small border country, would have to kneel down and bow down to their ministers to say.

Unexpectedly, today’s eastern Tang Dynasty is not as weak as before.

The ministers below were also stunned.

what the fuck!

The emperor beat the envoy!

Is he crazy?

When the two countries communicate, the envoy is the representative of the monarch of a country.

Xu Ke’s behavior at this time is no different from directly slapping the king of Qin.

Xuanyuan Wanrong was also shocked by Xu Ke’s sudden slap.

“What are you doing?” She whispered, “what’s the difference between this and declaring war on the state of Qin?”

Xu que took out his ears and said indifferently, “just declare war. It’s not that you can’t fight.”

Joke, how dare a mere envoy be so arrogant?

I can pretend to be stronger than me. Can I bear you?

As for what can’t be beaten, Xu kugen didn’t take it to heart.

I’m kidding. I forced Sheng to read up and down for 5000 years and keep the art of war and strategy in mind. Will he fail to beat the shit king of Qin in a dreamland?

It doesn’t exist at all!

“Bastard! You are dead, and your whole East Tang country will be destroyed! ”

After the envoy reacted, his face turned red and screamed angrily.

Nima’s, still destroy the country?

Xu que sneered twice. In the frightened eyes of the people, he waved his big hand, otherwise he took out a big sword from his crotch.

“It’s robbery time now. The men stand on the left and the women stand on the right. All of them hold their heads with both hands, otherwise don’t blame me for my big sword that goes all the way to the earth. You’re welcome! Hey, what about you? Give me some reaction! ”

Shua!

At this moment, there was a dead silence in the whole hall.

Everyone was stupid and looked stupid.

Robbery?

You are the emperor!

Rob the envoys of the state of Qin in the imperial palace?

“Emperor, Emperor…” a minister trembled.

“Don’t call me the emperor. I’m Xu Ke, the leader of the fried heaven sect!” Xu que laughed wantonly.

Fried sky Gang?

Where the hell is this gang coming from?!

No, the point is, when did the emperor join the fried heaven Gang!

The envoy felt the cold on his neck and turned white.

At the critical moment of life and death, he stopped his arrogance and said in a trembling voice: “well… Your majesty, we can discuss something and resort to the law. We king of Qin always pursue fairness and justice. It’s not good for the eastern Tang Dynasty.”

“When you were so arrogant, did you consider resorting to the law?”

Xu que said with a smile, “resort to the law, right? Now I think your behavior has caused serious mental trauma to our monarch. I ask your king of Qin to compensate me 300 million gold, or I will castrate you on the spot! ”

300 million gold!

The envoy was dumbfounded.

You might as well just kill me!

If the king of Qin knew that the envoy he sent was put on his neck with a sword, I would be the first to cut down, okay?

Lose face and throw it to other countries. Who will die if he doesn’t die?

Thinking of such an end, the envoy only felt incomparable fear in his heart, even * * * * didn’t feel anything.

“Lying in the trough, why are you so timid and scared to pee?” Seeing this, Xu que quickly jumped away and waved his hand with a look of disgust, “come on, take our envoys down and treat them well.”

Several strong imperial guards came forward and left with envoys.

After finishing the envoy, Xu Ke lay back and said leisurely, “you Aiqing, what’s your opinion? Let’s express it.”

The ministers were silent.

What a fart!

Xu’s behavior just now is to let these ministers relieve their anger. But after detoxification, there is trouble that can’t be handled. Is this envoy killed or not? If you kill him, the king of Qin must know that when he waves, thousands of troops will attack him. He and others can only become subjugated people. If you don’t kill them, let the envoys go back. Today, the emperor humiliated the envoys so much that the king of Qin will be angry. At that time, the iron hooves will roll and destroy the eastern Tang Dynasty Xu Ke, you do this completely regardless of the overall situation. ” Xuanyuan Wanrong said with a cold face. She is in a bad mood now, not just Xu Ke’s off-line behavior. It was because when Xu lacked did these things, Xuanyuan Wanrong felt a trace of betrayal. Didn’t we all decide to develop slowly? Why do you do this? After all, he was the same as before, completely regardless of other people’s feelings. Xu que didn’t feel the resentment in Xuanyuan Wanrong’s words at all, and said lazily, “do you really think people are here to persuade surrender? Shit! ” Then he turned over and sat up and said seriously, “I tell you, even if we surrender now, we will never get a chance to breathe. Maybe next year, there will be Qin soldiers missing in the eastern Tang Dynasty for no reason. At that time, the king of Qin has some reasons to come and clean us up.” Xuanyuan Wanrong’s eyebrows wrinkled into a Sichuan character: “then, as you said, the king of Qin will fight sooner or later. Why do you send someone to persuade him to surrender now?” There are only two reasons. One is that he is too lazy to waste his troops. The other is that there are some problems in his country that hinder the pace of outward expansion. ” Xu que touched his chin and said thoughtfully, “I prefer the second reason.” Why do you assert that? ” Xuanyuan Wanrong still doesn’t agree with Xu Ke’s words Because the arrogant king of Qin will not persuade him to surrender, but will wait for others to take the initiative to surrender. ” At this time, the ministers were already talking. Wen Chen and the generals were divided into two sides and argued loudly As I can see, the plan for today is to quickly rectify the troops and horses and shrink the defense. China is far from the state of Qin. The troops and horses of the state of Qin will retreat after a long siege. ” You old man, don’t fart. Emperor, give me 300000 troops and horses. I will kill the general of the Qin army under my horse and never let the Qin army invade my land! ” You fool knows to fight! ” Old man, you want to fight, don’t you! ” Xu sighed and slapped on the Dragon chair: “be quiet!” Xu que has now established enough prestige. When he gave the order, the people immediately fell silent I now announce that I will fight with the king of Qin in person! ” The voice fell. All the officials in the Manchu Dynasty were stunned and almost thought they had heard something. What did the emperor say? He’s going to fight? Go to the battlefield and compete with King Qin? finished! It’s not easy for you to translate

chapters.title: Chapter 1676
chapters.body:
Chapter 1676

Chapter 1676

C.1676

Xu Ke’s words immediately caused a sensation in the court.

Almost all the ministers were against Xu Kuan’s going to the imperial expedition.

After these two years, Xu Ke’s popularity among the people has reached a peak.

Whether it’s paper and printing, or exploring crops, it’s all a good thing for the country and the people.

If another emperor did this, I’m afraid he had begun to write a capital close-up for himself in history books, such as the Ming monarch of the eternal generation.

“Your Majesty, this matter is very important. I hope your majesty will consider it in the long run!” An old minister burst into tears, even ignoring the difference of his status, held Xu’s lack of thigh and died.

“NIMA… You old man, let go! Be careful, I’ll hammer you with my fist! ” Xu que is not angry.

“Your Majesty, do it! Even if I die today, I won’t let the emperor make such a decision! ”

“Sleeping trough… You don’t believe I have this strength! Lao Ding, tell them how strong I am! ”

Xu que raised his hand and pointed. The people’s eyes fell on Ding Yong, the Minister of the Ministry of war, along the direction of his fingers.

Ding Yong’s body shook and his face turned black.

Nima… I’m hiding in such a corner. Can you still see me?

Sin!

After pondering for a moment, Ding Yong stepped forward and said, “Your Majesty, fighting in this battlefield is not the same as fighting among the people. For the sake of the emperor’s dragon body, please take back your order.”

The implication is that the war can not be won by being a reckless man. Be honest and develop the domestic economy. Don’t engage in any imperial expedition.

Xu Ke’s eyes are round.

Good you ding Yong. I’ve taken care of you for the past two years. I’ve spent all my money in the military headquarters. Don’t you support me at this time?

Unexpectedly, you guy with thick eyebrows and big eyes betrayed me!

Ding Yong, the Minister of the Ministry of war, was expressionless and stood with his hands tied. He didn’t respond to Xu Que’s glare.

I’m kidding. The eyes of his colleagues around him are almost poking him into a sieve!

At this time, if he dares to stand up and support Xu que, he will be beaten by these shameless people when he walks out of the palace

Seeing that there was no support, Xu que waved his hand directly: “OK, let’s talk about it. What good ways do you have?”

The wailing ministers heard the speech, immediately put away Sima’s face and began to play solemnly on the ground.

“Your Majesty, we can surrender first, entrust the virtual snake, wait until the time develops, and then fight back fiercely!”

“Throw a fart! Your majesty, give me 500000 troops and horses. I will certainly resist the troops and horses of the state of Qin beyond the border! ”

“Your Majesty, let me say, let’s just buy that envoy and let him be our traitor…”

Xu Duan’s eyes are turning to the sky. There’s a chicken feather for these 25-year-old ideas!

Do you really think King Qin is a fool?

He felt that he had done too many things in the past two years, which made all these ministers fucking retarded?

Ah, sure enough, it’s still bad if it’s too strong.

“Xu Ke, I don’t know what you’re thinking, but I will never agree with you to go to Yujia personally.” Xuanyuan Wanrong turned his head and lowered his voice.

Xu que glanced at her and said with a smile, “are you so reluctant to give up on me? You really won’t fall in love with me? ”

Xuanyuan Wanrong habitually ignored his breath adjustment and said calmly, “you said that we just have to wait here until we die. This is the common test of both of us. If you go to Yujia and die on the battlefield, how can you ensure that I won’t have an accident?”

“Tut Tut, don’t talk like I’m going to abandon my wife and children… Oh, forget you don’t have children.” Xu Wei shrugged and said, “but you should know very well that if I don’t go to the battlefield, the army of the East Tang country can’t survive for half a year.”

“Why do you think you have this ability?”

“With my intelligence.” Xu qiaomei said For two years, haven’t you seen the king’s supreme wisdom? ”

Xuanyuan Wanrong subconsciously wanted to refute, but he was silent again when he thought of the other party’s achievements in the past two years.

Xu Ke’s contribution in the past two years is indeed extremely outstanding. It is totally different to engage in invention, reform and war!

Xuanyuan Wanrong knew more about the troops of the eastern Tang Dynasty.

Although the policies put forward by Xu vacancy have greatly improved the overall domestic strength, the military strength is still weak.

What they lack most now is time.

If we could give them a few more years to be energetic and strong, they would not be so passive in the face of the state of Qin.

There was a lot of the opposition in court. In end, no result was discussed, so we had to retreat hastily.

But it is obviously impossible to forget this. Although the envoy was arrested on the main hall, the courtiers can’t spread it around.

But after all, there were many spies in the state of Qin in the East Tang Dynasty. They soon spread the news back. Qin state, Imperial City Hall Asshole! The children of the eastern Tang Dynasty dare to humiliate the king like this! ” The king of Qin roared, and the eyes of those Yin owls were uncontrollable anger. An old minister whispered: “Your Majesty, calm down and be careful of your body…” King Qin’s eyes flickered when he heard the speech. Xu vacancy guessed right. The fundamental reason why the king of Qin sent someone to suppress people and try to persuade them to surrender is that his body can’t stand the four expeditions. In the past, the king of Qin personally went to battle and was in danger many times. Although he has won the reputation of being the bravest of the three armed forces, he has accumulated large and small injuries in his body. If the state of Qin had not had rich financial resources and collected panacea everywhere to heal his wounds, I’m afraid he would be lying in the hospital bed now. The best way to deal with this is for the state of Qin to bear this breath and form an alliance with the state of the eastern Tang Dynasty. After his health improves, he will go on the expedition. This is the suggestion of the ministers. But king Qin did not think so. He was the king of Qin. In two years, he swept away all the countries. He was an invincible and brave general and a king for thousands of years. Now he has been cultivating for two years. Seeing that Kyushu is flat and the eternal glory of dominating the world is in front of him, how can he give up Pass on my will and order the three armies to invade the eastern Tang Dynasty! ” On this day, the flames of war burned on this continent again. After receiving the news, the eastern Tang Dynasty immediately began to prepare for the war. Even though the national strength is not as strong as that of the state of Qin, they can’t wait to die. When Xu que learned what the king of Qin had said, he also expressed his response across the air King Qin, you fool, wait till you die. I’ll go to the border and kill you myself! ” When the king of Qin heard the news, he was very angry and immediately said that he would also fight in person. Therefore, in the shock of the ministers of the two countries, King Qin and Xu que began their own journey of imperial expedition. Xuanyuan Wanrong and his ministers failed to persuade him. After two years of drilling, Xu que had already firmly controlled the ministries of the eastern Tang Dynasty. On this day, Xu que directly summoned the three armies and went straight to the border with his troops and horses I want to be the pirate king… No, the man of Kyushu Communism! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1677
chapters.body:
Chapter 1677

Chapter 1677

C.1677

In the yellow sand desert, the strong wind swept over, and the gravel rolled over in the air. There was a yellow land between heaven and earth.

This is the border, thousands of miles of yellow sand, uninhabited.

On this barren land, there is a magnificent city, covering an area of hundreds of square kilometers. The city wall made of huge black stones tightly wraps the whole city like a giant in armor.

This is the border of the eastern Tang Dynasty, known as the town edge city of Tianmen pass.

Hu Zhengtang, the town general of the eastern Tang Dynasty, led a large army stationed here all year round to resist foreign enemies in exchange for peace in China.

Hu Zhengtang fought for many years, leaving countless scars on his body, and his character was tempered as hard as iron.

It is said that this gentleman was wounded by a poisonous arrow. During the process of scraping his bones and healing his wounds, he just didn’t hum. He can be said to be a real tough man.

Today, however, the hard-blooded man is full of fear and frustrations.

Everything is because of a young man sitting in front of him.

He was dressed in white, with a handsome face and a kind smile, giving people the feeling of spring breeze.

But Rao is so, Hu Zhengtang’s heart is more empty.

“General Hu, what do you think of me?” The young man picked up the tea cup and said with a smile.

Hu Zhengtang wiped a sweat and said with a smile, “you can be called a generation of wise monarch with both wisdom and courage.”

“Do you think I’m a fool?”

“This… Of course not.”

“Then why don’t you let me go to the battlefield!”

As soon as the young man patted the table, he roared, “do you despise me?”

“I dare not!”

Hu Zhengtang knelt on the spot and cried endlessly in his heart.

God, why is this ancestor here?

This man is Xu Kuan, who is on the imperial expedition.

After several days of trekking, Xu Ke and his party, escorted by the imperial palace guards, successfully came to Tianmen pass.

At first, Hu Zhengtang didn’t take it seriously.

After all, the first Emperor didn’t do it in those years. It’s not much different from the leaders’ inspection in the countryside. It’s just sitting in Tianmen pass waiting to listen to the war report.

While Hu Zhengtang was thinking about how to perform better and strive to show the momentum of the border army in front of the current emperor, Xu que found him.

“Lao Hu, I want to lead the army to kill the enemy.”

“Your Majesty, what did you just say? Weichen’s ears are not very good.”

“I want to fight and kill the enemy!”

“Oh… Your majesty, are you going to fight to kill the enemy?”

“Yes!”

“Are you kidding!”

Hu Zhengtang was surprised at that time.

He’s at the border, but the news hasn’t stopped. He knows all the things Xu hasn’t done in the past two years.

Destroying the five surnames and seven hopes, building roads, building private libraries, setting up schools and conducting scientific examinations are all good things for the country and the people.

Especially since Xu Kuang came to power, the military expenditure at the border was sufficient, which made Hu Zhengtang change his outlook on Xu Kuang. He thought that the emperor of the eastern Tang Dynasty finally woke up and wanted to be a Ming monarch.

At this time, you told me you were going to fight the enemy?

Don’t be funny. The news didn’t say you would fight!

For the sake of Xu Que’s safety, Hu Zhengtang simply did not agree to Xu Que’s request and resolutely did not allow his safety consideration.

In Hu Zhengtang’s words, the emperor should do what the emperor should do. Don’t always think about what you have or don’t have. In case you die on the battlefield, you don’t have to fight this war.

Of course Xu Ke doesn’t like it.

I personally said that I would cut off the head of the king of Qin. If I didn’t do it, I would break my promise.

A man should keep his word and cut his head if he says to cut his head!

“Dang!”

“Dang!”

“Dang!”

While they were arguing, a harsh gong sounded.

At the border, even three-year-old children know that the sound of gongs represents the beginning of the war, allowing people to return to their houses for refuge.

As soon as Hu Zhengtang’s face changed, he arched his hands and said, “please rest here. The last general is going to command on the front line now!”

Then he hurried away. As soon as Xu lacked his eyes, he was about to follow up, but he was stopped by several soldiers.

“Your Majesty, the general has ordered us to protect your safety.” A soldier said respectfully, “the emperor is a Ming monarch. Don’t go to the risk in person.”

“Please stay here!”

The soldiers spoke in unison.

Xuanyuan Wanrong came out from behind and said in a slow voice, “give up. They respect you very much now, so they won’t let you take risks.”

After these two years, Xuanyuan Wanrong’s impression of Xu Ke has improved.

It has to be said that this bastard really has a strong ability to govern the country as he said.

Today’s East Tang Dynasty is several times stronger than two years ago.

But it is limited to governing the country. It is far from enough to lead troops to war and rely on the ability to govern the country. That is to say, Xuanyuan Wanrong has a good sense of Xu deficiency now, so he came to persuade him and put him to death two years ago. Xu Wei glanced at her angrily: “don’t you even believe me? I really can fight! ” What you say is what you say. ” Xuanyuan Wanrong threw down this sentence and turned back to the house. This kind of war between the two countries will not stop for a few years. With the current strength of the eastern Tang Dynasty, even if the state of Qin attacks the whole country, Tianmen pass can be kept for at least one year. There is basically no danger in staying in Tianmen pass, so it’s up to him. At this time, there was a lot of noise outside the house. People at Tianmen pass came home one after another and stayed closed. Xu Xu looked into the distance, and the smoke and dust had filled the sky, which showed how many soldiers and horses gathered outside the city at this time Shit… It’s not that easy to lock me up like this! ” If you miss such a good opportunity, don’t you regret it all your life? Xu Wei thought for a moment, and a proud smile appeared at the corners of his mouth. There’s a way! Xu Xu came to the door and told a soldier Well, well, you can send a message for me and ask Gong Qiwei to come over. ” A moment later, Gong Qiwei hurried to the hospital under the leadership of the soldiers Your majesty, what can I do for you? ” Gong Qiwei wondered and thought he had something important to tell himself. Xu que motioned him to close the door, and then a malicious smile appeared on his face: “come here, come here.” What are you doing, Emperor… “Don’t shout, keep your voice down! Take off your clothes! ” Emperor! You, it’s not good for you… No, emperor, don’t pick my clothes. I’m really going to cry… “You cry. No one will save you if you cry and break your throat! It’s good for you to be obedient! ” The soldier who noticed the movement came over, hesitated, knocked on the door and said, “Your Majesty, but something happened?” There was no movement in the room, only a rustling sound could be heard. Just as the soldiers were about to push the door in, “Gong Qiwei” suddenly walked out with his head down and closed the door The emperor is not well. Don’t disturb him. ” Through the crack of the door, the soldier saw that the figure of Wei’an was lying on the bed, and he was relieved “Gong Qiwei” left the yard all the way and came to the street. He made sure that no one could see him, so he raised his head. A handsome face, it’s Xu que Hey, hey, you want to lock up Ben? You’re still young! King Qin, wash your fart… Cough, wait for your neck to die! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1678
chapters.body:
Chapter 1678

Chapter 1678

C.1678

The military camp of Tianmen pass is in the city. Xu Wei takes the military map from Hu Zhengtang and finds it all the way to the military camp.

At this time, the army had been transferred to the battlefield, and the barracks seemed a little empty.

Xu Wei wandered around and found only one army left to serve as logistics, about 3000 people.

This time, Xu Xu didn’t hide his identity, but came to them openly.

“Your Majesty is coming!”

“Welcome your majesty!”

The soldiers recognized Xu Ke at a glance, immediately knelt down and shouted respectfully.

Over the past two years, Xu Kuang’s reform methods have greatly improved the domestic economy, with sufficient military spending. The wives, children and children of these soldiers are also very good. Naturally, they are full of gratitude to Xu Kuang.

Xu Wei nodded with satisfaction, stood in front of the crowd, organized a speech, and said, “this time, I will personally fight to kill the enemy. I don’t know if you are willing to kill the Qin thieves with me?”

The soldiers were dumbfounded.

“What did your majesty just say?”

“Did you hear me wrong on the battlefield?”

“You heard right… I heard it, too.”

Go to war?

You’re kidding!

Your majesty, we know that you are wise and powerful. You are a generation of wise kings in governing the country, but this is war!

You’ll die!

A soldier looked frightened, raised his hand tremblingly and said, “Your Majesty, the general has ordered that if your majesty wants to go to the battlefield, we must stop your majesty…”

Xu que rolled his eyes. Hu Zhengtang, a dog day, didn’t expect you to do this.

I’m kidding. If I can’t even handle this little soldier, what kind of emperor will I be?

He cleared his throat and said slowly in a deep and solemn tone, “do you have a dream?”

“Dream?” The soldiers were stunned and felt a sense of solemnity at the bottom of their hearts.

“Dream is something that we should strive for even if we pay our lives. My dream is to make this Kyushu a place without oppression, but any ideal is fought step by step! The most precious thing for a person should be life. Do you ask me if I’m afraid of death? Of course, I am also afraid of death. Life is only once for everyone, so I think people should spend their life like this! ”

Speaking of this, Xu was absent. While the soldiers were stunned, he paid a high price to let the system open BGM.

Looking at the forced value of the equipment that disappeared like water, Xu lacked a burst of flesh pain.

Shit, the black hearted businessman of the system just uses the tape recorder. He actually collects so much forced value from labor and capital!

This time, if you don’t go to the battlefield and get back your money, you’re really blind. So much forced value!

The grand movement of the symphony of fate played, and the shocking melody sounded in their hearts like a giant hammer pounding their hearts.

“Where did the music come from…”

“I don’t know, but I feel myself suddenly excited. This music is too hot!”

“Ah! I’m burning! ”

With the sound of music with strong rhythm, Xu que opened his arms as if to embrace the sky: “I hope that when I look back on the past, I will not regret for wasting my time or be ashamed of doing nothing. In this way, when I am dying, I can say that I have dedicated my whole life and all my energy to the most precious cause – fighting for the liberation of Kyushu!”

The words fell, and three thousand soldiers were in awe.

Xu Kuang looked at the crowd with a smile. From their eyes, Xu Kuang saw a burning flame.

“If we say that the world will eventually become an equal place, why can’t we take this step first!” Xu Wei waved his arm and roared, “now the state of Qin wants to oppress us and make us defeated. If you lose, your son will become a slave, your wife and daughter will become a concubine, a servant girl and enslaved by others. Do you agree?”

“No!” The soldiers got up and roared.

“What are we going to do now?”

“Defeat them!”

“Well said!”

Xu Wei went to the weapon rack, took out a long knife and waved it: “now, let those damn invaders see clearly that all the officers and men of the East Tang kingdom are bloody soldiers! The eastern Tang Dynasty is immortal! ”

The soldiers shouted at the top of their lungs, “the eastern Tang Dynasty is immortal!”
