Under Xu Ke’s almost brainwashing speech, the 3000 soldiers had fallen into a state of fanaticism at this time, and seemed to regard this battle as a liberation action bathed in sacred significance.

Although there is no way to exchange the things in the immortal world, it’s too expensive!

However, with the blessing of chef skills, the food made by Xu lacks also has the effect of improving the realm, but it only improves the realm of martial arts.

In addition to the martial arts scripts he gave these soldiers, these soldiers were quickly and efficiently turned into three grade masters in just a quarter of an hour! You know, a third-class master in the army is enough to become a centurion leading the team and command 100 soldiers under his command. Three thousand centurions, what a terrible team Brothers, come with me and take off the dog head of King Qin! ” Xu que shouted and ran to the battlefield outside the city with 3000 soldiers At this time, on the battlefield outside the pass, the two armies are facing each other. Thousands of troops are not enough to describe the scene in front of us. Hu Zhengtang stood on the wall, his eyes full of dignified color. At this time, a general in the city of Qin is fighting loudly, and he says, “there’s a soldier in the east of the city of Qin! Don’t hide in the city and don’t come out! ” This… Qin Guoguang is the vanguard force, there are 300000 people… The total force has exceeded one million. ” Hu Zhengtang asked the deputy general behind him, “how many people do we have now?” The deputy general arched his hand and said, “report back to the general. At present, there are 300000 troops stationed at Tianmen pass. The rest of the troops are constantly being mobilized. As for the people and horses brought by the emperor, they are still coming.” How long will it take? ” About… It will take another seven days. ” Hu Zhengtang rubbed his eyebrows and worried: “so we have to stay here for seven days, 300000 to one million… Fortunately, we didn’t let your majesty down to lead the army.” Your majesty, does he want to lead? ” The deputy general was surprised Yes, if your majesty comes down to lead the army, I’m afraid we can’t make it for three days. ” Hu Zhengtang breathed a sigh and waved, “give orders. No matter how provocative the enemy is, they are not allowed to go out of the city to fight.” Yes! ” As soon as the voice fell, a familiar voice suddenly exploded on the battlefield Get ready to die, losers! ” I saw a young man riding a war horse, rushed out of the city gate, behind him was a team of 3000 people, billowing with smoke and dust, rushing to the hundreds of thousands of troops already stationed in front. Hu Zhengtang’s eyes and canthus were about to crack, and the whole person was like being struck by lightning Emperor! Why is he there? ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1679
chapters.body:
Chapter 1679

Chapter 1679

C.1679

Now, Tianmen pass is in the city!

Xuanyuan Wanrong was looking at the latest file, but he couldn’t see it for a while, and suddenly put down the file in his hand.

“Strange… Why do you always feel upset?”

Xuanyuan Wanrong frowned slightly. She was always uneasy and couldn’t concentrate.

A moment later, she still put away the file and went directly to Xu Que’s door.

Seeing the empress arrived, several soldiers quickly saluted: “see the empress.”

Xuanyuan Wanrong raised his hand, motioned for several people to be excused, and asked, “has your majesty ever come out?”

The soldier respectfully said, “tell the queen that the emperor has never been out of the room.”

Xuanyuan Wanrong was determined and was about to leave. Suddenly, he heard the soldier hesitate and say, “but… Lord Gong came to the emperor.”

“Lord Gong? Gong Qiwei? ”

Xuanyuan Wanrong’s ominous premonition was magnified in an instant.

Bang!

She pushed the door open.

The furnishings in the room had not moved. The man in white was lying on the bed with his back to the door, shivering.

Xuanyuan Wanrong quickly walked to the bedside and turned the man over. His face was hard to see.

What lies on the bed is not Xu que at all, but Gong Qiwei with a black nose and a swollen face!

They clearly watched Lord Gong leave. How could it be that Lord Gong was lying here?

“Er… Emperor… Empress?”

Gong Qiwei’s face was bitter. Then he hurriedly bounced up from the bed. He didn’t even dare to get down from the bed. He knelt down and shouted, “the queen makes atonement! I deserve to die! ”

Xuanyuan Wanrong took a deep breath and said coldly, “Why are you here? What about Xu Kuang? ”

Gong Qiwei trembled and buried his head lower: “report back to the queen, the emperor, the Emperor… He should have gone to the battlefield.”

To the battlefield?

Xuanyuan Wanrong immediately recalled what Xu lacked had said before.

We should personally lead the troops to cut off the head of the king of Qin as a night pot.

Unexpectedly, this guy still racked his brains and ran out.

Xuanyuan Wanrong’s face was as heavy as ink. He turned and walked quickly outside the house.

“Gong Qiwei, send orders to the rear army to stop resting and speed up to Tianmen pass!”

Gong Qiwei was stunned and asked loudly, “empress, where are you going?”

“I’ll see if that bastard is dead!”

The voice fell, and Xuanyuan Wanrong’s figure had hurried away.

At this moment, the front battlefield.

The soldiers standing on the wall didn’t react at first.

Until Hu Zhengtang exclaimed, everyone was stupid.

“What’s going on? How could the emperor be outside the city? ”

“No, where did the soldiers behind him come from? Aren’t the soldiers and horses brought by the imperial city still on the road? ”

“That’s the logistics team! It’s logistics. How did the emperor bring them out? ”

“Is that the fucking point? The point is the emperor, the emperor! The emperor hasn’t even killed a chicken. Isn’t it death to lead troops out now? ”

Hu Zhengtang slapped the deputy general on the head and hurriedly ran down the city: “you fucking fools! Open the gate and go out to save people! ”

All the officers and men immediately reacted, hurriedly followed them and ran under the wall, complaining endlessly in their hearts.

Your majesty, your majesty, you can even go on a personal expedition. Why don’t you stay in Tianmen pass city?

You have to lead soldiers out to war. Is this what an emperor should do?!

The key is that there are more than 300000 people opposite, while the emperor has only 3000 troops!

Even a strong general who can enlist and be good at war can’t do such a thing!

Pulling 3000 troops and horses to attack the army of 300000 people, are you out of your mind?!

Just as they hurried to the bottom of the city wall, Xu que had rushed to the two armies with the soldiers and horses behind him.

Qin Bing, standing in the middle of the battlefield, could not hear Hu Zhengtang and others because of the distance.

However, seeing that someone dared to rush out, Qin Bing was overjoyed: “ha ha! Brothers, Dongtang’s counseling bag has finally come out. Follow me! ”

Qin soldiers, who were still waiting for orders, mounted one after another.

Shua!

Hundreds of thousands of Army long knives came out of their scabbard and pointed at Xu Ke!

Murderous!

Here are the soldiers of the great Qin Dynasty who swept through Kyushu. Hundreds of thousands of people made swords together. That momentum alone is enough to make people scared.

In the distance, Hu Zhengtang, who had just run to the gate of the city, hurriedly called the garrison and rushed over on his horse.

“Come on, come on! Don’t let your majesty suffer! ”

“Bastard, where’s my horse? Bring it quickly!”

“Hurry up!” Feeling the killing spirit coming from the front, Xu que became more and more excited and shouted, “brothers, rush with me!” Three thousand soldiers shouted in unison, “kill!” However, unexpectedly, Xu Ke suddenly clamped his horse’s belly, accelerated his speed, directly left the team and rushed forward. The shouting Qin soldier was stunned. He laughed wildly, took out his long knife and roared, “boy, you have the courage to remember your grandfather’s name. The one who killed you today, general pan Meng of the state of Qin!” The sound resounded everywhere Pan Meng? ” Hearing the speech, Hu Zhengtang’s deputy general exclaimed, “he is Pan Meng, the rumored butcher! It’s said that this guy created the reputation of killing countless enemies with a long knife in the previous campaign! ” The general who followed in the rear suddenly turned pale God, I heard that this guy is cruel and can’t kill his opponent with one knife? ” yes! This guy will cut his opponent and torture him! ” The most frightening thing is that this guy is a rare second-class expert in the military array. A long knife is invincible! ” It’s over. In front of the army, I’m afraid only the first grade can fight him. ” Does our emperor have a quasi first-class realm? ” Eh… I don’t know. I don’t think so. I haven’t heard of the emperor practicing martial arts… “Hu Zhengtang yelled:” shit! You are still in the mood to discuss. Hurry to rush me! Your majesty, I skinned you when something happened! ” At this time, Xu que had rushed to pan Meng Boy, die! ” Pan smiled grimly and waved a long knife. His tall body was like a demon God. Xu Xu ran straight towards the edge of the knife. Hu Zhengtang, who saw this scene in the distance, roared: “stop!” At this moment, Xu Kuang fiercely drew his knife. The knife was as light as a spear, and fiercely chopped it. When! Pan Meng’s long knife broke at the sound What? ” Pan Meng looked at his broken knife edge in disbelief. Before he could react, he just felt a cold on his neck. His last memory remained in the picture of his headless body falling. I… failed? Xu Wei took back his long knife, didn’t even look at the body, and spat casually This guy is a fool. Don’t you know how to yield horses? “Why don’t you get away when you see me coming?” Behind him, hundreds of thousands of East Tang army were stunned. what the fuck! Your majesty cut off the enemy general with a knife? Is this still their emperor who has no strength to bind chickens? What’s the matter with the world

chapters.title: Chapter 1680
chapters.body:
Chapter 1680

Chapter 1680

C.1680

Xu que, the emperor of the eastern Tang Dynasty, was famous in the six countries in his early years because of his dizzy king.

After a sudden awakening, he began to eliminate the government, carried out great reform in China, and made many decisions that were beneficial to the country and the people, also known as the Emperor Ming.

But no matter what he did, the impression of the world on him always remained on the level of grand plans.

What, do you ask the emperor if he can do martial arts?

Don’t be kidding. If the emperor knows martial arts, where might he need to climb over the wall and leave the palace?

It doesn’t exist!

However, Xu’s startling knife today shocked everyone.

The emperor knows martial arts?

And kill pan Meng, the general of the state of Qin?

Seeing that Xu Xu killed the enemy general with a knife, the soldiers on the wall immediately cheered.

“Mighty!”

“Yang my East Tang Guowei!”

“Well done!”

Xu Xu also stayed in place, waiting for the three thousand soldiers behind to follow up, waving at the same time.

Although he was a little far away, he could still feel the enthusiasm of the soldiers.

“Ha ha, cheer for me! Brothers, do you see that those who offend me in the eastern Tang Dynasty have such corpses! ”

Then he waved his long knife and swept out the wind.

Not far away, Hu Zhengtang felt his throat dry: “did you… See it just now?”

The deputy general rolled his throat and muttered, “I see… Your majesty chopped pan fiercely with a knife.”

“I’m not dazzled, am I?”

“Report back to the general, you are not dazzled…”

The people who hurried to the rescue were all stupid.

When did the emperor have such skills?

This is fucking magical!

Suddenly, someone with sharp eyes said, “Hey, the emperor’s hand seems to be the Dragon killing knife in the legendary Imperial Palace treasure house.”

“True or false?” Hu Zhengtang was shocked and looked intently, “it’s really a dragon killing knife!”

According to legend, there is a dragon slaying knife hidden in the treasure house of the eastern Tang Dynasty.

This knife cuts iron like mud. Even a young child can easily cut iron and stone.

But Hu Zhengtang knew that this was not a legend.

When the former Emperor was alive in his early years, he went to the palace and was granted the seal. He once witnessed the power of the Dragon slaying knife. Blowing hair and breaking hair, rusty iron like mud is a heavenly adjective.

“No wonder the emperor took out the Dragon killing sword.”

Hu Zhengtang breathed a sigh of relief and felt that he seemed to understand something. “It’s also pan Meng’s carelessness. The emperor is worthy of a generation of Ming Jun!”

The deputy general wondered, “Hu Shuai, what do you mean by this?”

Hu Zhengtang showed an expression of “I’ve seen through everything for a long time”: “Your Majesty should have found that the morale of our soldiers in the eastern Tang Dynasty had been hit because of the provocation of Qin soldiers for days. In order to boost morale, he took great risks and didn’t hesitate to kill the provocation under his horse just to boost my morale!”

When they heard the speech, they suddenly realized it.

i see!

Thinking of this, they looked at Xu Ke with admiration.

I am worthy of being the emperor of the eastern Tang Dynasty. In order to boost our morale, we actually took risks!

This is so moving!

“Now that the emperor has killed the enemy general, I don’t think it will continue. Let’s go up and get the emperor back!”

Hu Zhengtang cut off the railway: “don’t let the emperor be hurt!”

Just as the crowd came forward, they saw Xu Duan suddenly pull the reins, as if to move.

Hu Zhengtang pressed down his excitement: “it seems that the emperor is ready to retreat. Let’s meet him quickly… Hey? Where is the emperor going? Why did he rush forward again… ”

Xu que slowly pulled the reins, raised his dragon killing sword and shouted, “brothers! The wheel of history cannot be stopped. Today we will make the state of Qin history! Go! ”

what the fuck!

Hu Zhengtang’s face turned white with fear.

Emperor, why are you still charging?

Ahead is the 300000 troops of the state of Qin!

It’s not surprising that Xu Ke can do this step when pan Meng is not strong enough to kill the general alone with the sharp edge of the Dragon killing sword.

But it’s not the same thing as fighting with soldiers!

Three thousand soldiers and horses will surely die if they attack three hundred thousand troops!

Emperor, come back quickly!

However, Xu que rushed more and more fiercely with 3000 logistics soldiers, and in the twinkling of an eye he came to the hundred steps of the Qin soldiers.

Before the Qin army, a dignified, cold faced middle-aged man rode a dark horse and stared at Xu Wei.

He is the first general of Qin, Bai Qi!

In those years, he fought in the six countries and killed 300000 prisoners. The name of killing God spread all over Kyushu!

“This son is so strange. I didn’t expect such a strong general in the East Tang country.” Bai Qi has some admiration in his eyes.

Over the years, Xu Kuang has been so confused that even people in China don’t remember him, let alone an enemy general. Therefore, Bai Qi didn’t recognize Xu Kuang, but regarded him as a fierce general of the eastern Tang Dynasty It’s a pity that he dared to kill our general in front of the 300000 troops in Qin. Now he dares to charge up with 3000 soldiers and horses… “Rao is Bai Qi’s high vision. He has to admire Xu’s courage, but he also shakes his head regretfully and says,” it’s a pity that he will die here today! ” Bai Qi’s voice fell, suddenly raised his right hand and opened his five fingers Ready! ” Behind him, dozens of archers got up, bent their bows and arrows, and got ready. Finally, he took a look at Xu Ke. Bai Qi suddenly clenched his fist and waved: “put the arrow!” Shua! Tens of thousands of arrows shot out suddenly, passing a perfect parabola in the air and falling towards Xu Que and others No! ” Hu Zhengtang’s expression changed suddenly, “the emperor, he brought logistics soldiers. These soldiers wear light armor and can’t stop these arrows!” When the two armies fight and face the cavalry charge of the other party, they usually choose to shoot arrows first to consume the other party’s strength. Under normal circumstances, heavy cavalry usually charge, and their armor is thick enough to resist random arrows. Even light cavalry will carry wooden shields to resist arrows. But Xu Wei led a team of logistics soldiers with incomplete equipment. There was nothing else except a bright silver light armor and a long knife to kill the enemy. After being shot like this, 3000 people are afraid to kill or injure most of them! Hu Zhengtang became more and more anxious. The bow and arrow of the state of Qin was strong and heavy. With Xu’s lack of equipment, he was bound to be unable to resist. Seeing that countless people were going to die miserably on the spot, Xu que looked indifferent, waved the Dragon butcher knife and shouted, “brothers, follow my footsteps! What can you do to me! Let them see our snakeskin walking! ” He pulled the reins and controlled the horses to shuttle through the arrow array. The whole person seemed to turn into a streamer and skillfully avoided each arrow. Three thousand soldiers and horses behind him are now three-level masters. Naturally, they can keep up with Xu Ke’s actions and follow him. In the dull eyes of the people, three thousand soldiers and horses miraculously passed through the arrow array without any casualties Ha ha, unexpectedly, I am the most coquettish pig in the audience! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1681
chapters.body:
Chapter 1681

Chapter 1681

C.1681

“How is that possible? How did he do it? ”

Bai Qi narrowed his eyes slightly and was surprised.

Behind him, there was no general squeaking.

Everyone looked at each other and thought the same.

How the fuck is this possible?

So many bows and arrows, Leng is that no one was hurt?

How ridiculous!

“Who is this son? Young, riding is so exquisite. ”

Bai Qi’s eyes flashed a look of appreciation, “not only that, but even the 3000 soldiers and horses behind him have such riding skills. This is the most incredible!”

A person’s riding is not uncommon, but it is unimaginable that a full 3000 people have such good riding.

From Bai Qi’s perspective, we can naturally see that the 3000 people behind are all marching with the soldiers leading the charge, just learning from each other.

Even after learning a superficial action, the 3000 people passed the arrow array with almost no casualties!

The soldier was clearly not agile, but every time he changed direction, he just avoided the arrow.

This requires not only reaction, but also familiarity with the art of war, experience countless battlefields and understand the characteristics of the art of military arrows.

“The whole army lined up!”

Nevertheless, Bai Qi doesn’t intend to let each other go.

If such an opponent exists, it will be a great trouble for them to conquer the East Tang Dynasty.

“Ready! Attack! ”

With Bai Qi’s order, hundreds of thousands of soldiers raised their long knives, and thousands of troops and horses collapsed and rushed towards Xu vacancy.

Xu que held up his long knife and said with a laugh, “listen to my command, guerrilla warfare!”

Guerrilla warfare?

Bai Qi had a doubt in his eyes. He had been marching for many years and had not heard of the famous guerrilla warfare method.

In the battle of normal cavalry, they often choose heavy cavalry to charge, light cavalry to assist, and the two cavalry sprint hard.

Because on the battlefield, only heavy cavalry can play a decisive role, but the heavy cavalry is too large to make any flexible operation, so they can only choose recklessness.

The light cavalry is because their armor is too thin. Even if they charge and change direction, they are easy to fall into the enemy line.

But Bai Qi is still not flustered. Years of war have made him extremely confident in himself.

The boy in front of him may be a genius, but if he really wants to attack the army with 3000 light cavalry, he will die!

Hu Zhengtang and others were also very anxious.

“Come on, come on! Never let your majesty rush in! ”

“Bring me the bow and arrow, and bring your majesty back when you shoot the horse leg!”

“Bai Qi is not those garbage generals. If your majesty falls into it, he will die in it!”

Many officers and men present spoke of Bai Qi with a look of fear.

When Bai Qi was famous all over the world, most of the generals of the six countries were educated on the ground by each other on the battlefield and were afraid of his superb military strategy.

At this time, seeing that Xu Wei led troops directly into the enemy array, everyone was filled with despair.

Whoosh!

Xu Ke led three thousand soldiers and horses, just like a clay ox into the sea, and broke into the enemy array in an instant!

“It’s over…” Hu Zhengtang suddenly turned pale.

Even if he led the troops himself, there were only 3000 people, and it was impossible to escape.

However, when the people were in despair, they saw Xu que like a flying swallow lighting water. When he rushed to the edge, he suddenly turned and ran to the other side, carrying his troops and horses to attack the periphery of the infantry again and again.

“This… What kind of tactics is this?”

A burst of pure light burst out in Bai Qi’s eyes.

The scene in front of him has exceeded his imagination. He never thought that he could charge in this way.

It’s incredible!

Bai Qi stared for a moment and was stunned: “this, their cavalry, are all three grade warriors!”

WOW!

The surrounding Qin generals were shocked.

The third grade warrior is enough to be a centurion in the army!

With a team of 3000 centurions, no wonder they can command the horses like an arm!

“This son is hateful. He should have taken such a deceptive tactics!” A general angrily scolded.

Bai Qi shook his head: “you only see the surface. If you want to train 3000 three grade masters to this level, it’s hard to imagine the effort, and you have to let these masters trust him from the heart. Who can do it?”

The generals are silent. Jianghu experts are arrogant. They usually don’t obey orders when joining the army. They like to go their own way.

This is also a long-standing disadvantage in the army. Unexpectedly, it was overcome by the young man in front of us.

What they don’t know is that these 3000 soldiers are just three grade masters.

A few hours ago, it was still a pile of logistics soldiers waiting to die… “Long halberd soldiers are ready!” Bai Qi waved again. Rows of soldiers with long halberds came to the ground, and the long halberds in their hands poked Xu Que and others. Hu Zhengtang said in a deep voice, “the halberds are special cavalry. I’m afraid your majesty will be hurt this time!” However, at this time, Xu que threw away the knife and took out a long sword with a laugh Why did your majesty lose the knife? ” What’s the use of swords? Swords are the best on the battlefield! ” The crowd was in a hurry. They thought Xu Ke had never been on the battlefield and didn’t know the inside story Dugu Jiujian – swing sword style! ” A powerful sword burst out on Xu que! Dugu Jiujian, an advanced martial art from the system, was officially revealed to the public. The Qi of the sword like a master’s skill splits out horizontally, and the shadow of the Dao sword spreads out. It is violent and swift, and spreads around. In this world, you can’t cultivate immortals, but you can practice martial arts and internal power. Xu que has already reached the realm of the peerless sword God in the legend of the Wulin This man… Is so strong! ” This sword technique is extraordinary! ” Bai Qi was surprised. Hu Zhengtang and others in the rear were also extremely shocked and almost scared crazy. what the fuck! The emperor really has something! This sword technique… It’s like a sword shining across 19 continents, and the sword Qi runs 30000 miles The sword Qi is rolling and countless halberds are broken. Three thousand light cavalry take this opportunity to break into the enemy array and cut countless enemies. Under the leadership of Xu que, he rushed out again Brothers, let’s go! ” At this time, Xu Kui raised his arms and retreated unharmed with Qingqi. Behind you, there are corpses everywhere! Although it was the enemy, Bai Qi still couldn’t help thinking of trying to attract each other. Such talents, if trained under him for several years, can become a generation of famous generals Young man, how did you study your method of riding the array? ” Bai Qi pulled the reins of his horse and stepped out of the crowd. Lang said, “if you are willing to join our great Qin Dynasty, I can guarantee you to be the next commander of the state of Qin!” WOW! This remark surprised everyone. Bai Qi, the God of Qin guobing, even promised to attract this person with his future handsome position! I can’t believe it! Xu Que’s face was full of pride when he heard the speech No, I can achieve today’s success all by my intelligence and hard work! ” System, change all the installed force values for me! Change all

chapters.title: Chapter 1682
chapters.body:
Chapter 1682

Chapter 1682

C.1682

A lightning warm-up battle ended with a great disparity in troops and a few wins more.

Xu KUWAN, like a god of war, came back slowly with 3000 troops and horses.

Behind them, the yellow sand and blood filled the sky, but they couldn’t stop the momentum emanating from them.

Hu Zhengtang looked at the thin figure and felt like a dream.

With 3000 troops and horses, they attacked the military array of hundreds of thousands of people, and returned without casualties.

In the history of the Kyushu war, it belongs to this man!

But the question is… When did the emperor have this skill?

“What’s the surprise? I’m going back.”

When passing Hu Zhengtang, Xu que patted the town general on the shoulder: “I know that you can’t extricate yourself from the heroic posture of forcing saint, but the soldiers in the city still need you to rectify.”

“Ah, ah, oh, yes, your majesty!” Hearing the speech, Hu Zhengtang quickly turned around and followed Xu Xu.

When the horse’s hoof kicked, several people led three thousand soldiers and horses to the bottom of the city wall.

Xu que sat on the horse, waved the long knife in his hand and shouted, “the eastern Tang Dynasty is immortal!”

The soldiers on the city wall shouted in unison: “the eastern Tang Dynasty is immortal! Your majesty is mighty! ”

The cry shook the sky and broke through the clouds!

Xuanyuan Wanrong just rushed to the city wall. Seeing this scene, his eyes showed a shocked look.

“He’s fine… What did this bastard do?”

In the distance, Bai Qi was stunned when he heard the chorus of soldiers in the eastern Tang Dynasty.

The deputy general murmured, “didn’t you say… The emperor of the eastern Tang Dynasty was a weak scholar who only knew how to do research?”

“You are blind! Who collected the previous intelligence? Let me get it out of the art of war! ” Bai Qi stared and scolded.

If you knew that it would be the emperor of the eastern Tang Dynasty, you wouldn’t have sent such a little force before. It’s not too much for the whole army to attack!

If the emperor of the eastern Tang Dynasty could be taken down directly, there would be no need to fight the next war at all.

“It’s a pity… It’s impossible to miss this opportunity in the future.” Bai Qi sighed with regret, and the more he thought about it, the more he breathed.

Shit, not only by being beaten in the face, but also by a weak monarch!

Where does the God of labor and capital put his face?

On the other hand, as Xu Kuan entered the city, the news spread that he had attacked hundreds of thousands of troops with 3000 troops and horses.

The whole Tianmenguan city was completely ignited by the news.

“Oh, my God! How can our majesty lead troops to war? ”

“More than that, it is said that your majesty only brought 3000 troops this time, and killed a round trip in the other party’s hundreds of thousands of troops, and was unharmed!”

“What? Your majesty only took 300 people and killed hundreds of thousands of others? ”

“I’ll tell you, it’s said that our majesty killed the soldiers of the state of Qin with three people and severely hit the soldier God Bai Qi’s face!”

“God, do you know that your majesty took the head of Qin guobing God alone!”

“The emperor is awesome!”

The more the news spread, the more outrageous it became.

In the end, it was directly said that Xu lacked a person to kill the king of Qin and abduct the Queen’s concubine of the state of Qin, even the Empress Dowager.

The king of Qin was furious when he heard the news.

“What are those crafty people farting! It is my order that the whole country attack the eastern Tang Dynasty! ”

Even so, the people of the eastern Tang Dynasty still fell into a fanatical atmosphere.

Our emperor is invincible!

That’s what they think.

After this battle, Xu Ke became famous in the first World War, and the portraits were sung all over the world.

Walking in the city, although the people did not dare to come up and disturb the holy driving, they all looked at Xu que with reverent eyes.

“Wonderful, look, this is my prestige.” Xu Wei enjoyed the atmosphere, “check who spread the rumor quickly? Find out, I have a reward! ”

Xuanyuan Wanrong accompanied him and looked at the guy who had been with him for two years. He vaguely had an inexplicable feeling.

“This guy… Is really not good for nothing.”

Although it is said that the current reputation is exaggerated, what Xu lacked did is true.

When I was in the Imperial City, I didn’t see him practicing martial arts, let alone learning the art of war. How could I have such ability?

This bastard always seems to be able to come up with something unexpected.

Aware of Xuanyuan Wanrong’s eyes, Xu que glanced at her and suddenly hugged her arms: “how do you look at me with such eyes? You can’t help but covet Ben and force him. Are you ready to use it in the street? Not very good… So many people are watching, but if you have to, let’s go back and talk… ”

“Get out!” Xuanyuan Wanrong immediately broke the black line and left without looking back. This guy… Is still an asshole as usual. Xu que smiled indifferently. Instead of following him back, he came to Hu Zhengtang’s house. Seeing Xu Que’s arrival, Hu Zhengtang quickly got up and saluted: “see the emperor.” Free and flat. ” Xu Wei waved his hand and sat down in his chair. “What’s the situation now?” Hu Zhengtang showed a worried look on his face: “tell the emperor that the king of Qin has gone crazy. Now there are four million troops hoarding at the border, and almost all the troops in China have been transferred.” Four million! The soldiers were stunned. Even with the Imperial troops brought by Xu Kuan, the garrison of the whole Tianmen pass city is less than one million. Although the main reason is that the East Tang Dynasty has not been in war for a long time, there are not many domestic garrisons, and Xu Ke has made great efforts to develop workers, peasants and infrastructure in the past two years, resulting in most people going to farm. But the gap is too big It seems that the king of Qin is really angry this time… Four million troops, including the soldiers incorporated by the government in the other countries, have been sent. ” Hu Zhengtang murmured, feeling that the road ahead was dark. The soldiers who were originally in high spirits were also depressed at this time. How the fuck is this? Almost one to four personnel ratio, people can drown the soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty with one mouthful of saliva Don’t panic, there is our guild leader… Well, I’m here, everything is easy to say. ” Xu vacancy cleared his throat and said mysteriously, “to tell you the truth, I’m the leader of the fried heaven gang. If we fight at that time, naturally there will be the fried heaven Gang soldiers to save us!” Hu Zhengtang smiled weakly: “don’t joke, Emperor. What heavenly soldiers and generals, or you’d better go back to the imperial city first. As long as you’re still there, at least we won’t fall in the East Tang Dynasty.” It doesn’t matter if the border is gone. As long as the emperor Xu que is still alive, the eastern Tang Dynasty will rise again. While the people were at a loss, suddenly a herald came Newspaper! The king of Qin has arrived at the front line. Shoot messengers to visit! ” When they heard the speech, they were stunned. Why did the king of Qin suddenly send another messenger? You’re not here to persuade me to surrender again, are you? I really forget their last envoy. Are they still locked up in the imperial palace of the East Tang Dynasty

chapters.title: Chapter 1683
chapters.body:
Chapter 1683

Chapter 1683

C.1683

Hu Zhengtang’s residence.

An envoy of the state of Qin was sitting upright in a chair, his face full of uncontrollable pride.

The faces of several officers and men around him were as black as the bottom of the pot. If it hadn’t been for the military order, I’m afraid the envoy would have been beaten on the ground.

“That’s how the eastern Tang Dynasty received envoys?” The envoy rolled his eyes, and the old God said on the ground, “I have been sitting here for less than half an hour, but you don’t come yet? Don’t you pay attention to the Qin Kingdom? ”

The soldier’s forehead was blue with veins and took a deep breath: “Your Majesty is discussing with the general. Please wait a moment, envoy.”

“Alas, my king specially sent my officials and relatives to make friends with the eastern Tang Dynasty, so as not to provoke a war between the two countries. But the monarch of the eastern Tang Dynasty is so ignorant of good and bad. If I let my king know, I’m afraid I have to be angry.” The envoy said in a strange way.

At this time, an arrogant voice came from far and near: “really? Then I’d like to see what king Qin’s rage looks like. ”

Then, a slender figure entered the house, with a handsome face and a cynical smile around his mouth.

On the side of the body is an elegant woman with a cool look and an elegant temperament between her eyebrows and eyes.

Impressively, Xu Que and Xuanyuan Wanrong.

Behind them were several generals such as Hu Zhengtang. Almost all the soldiers who could speak in the city followed.

There was no other reason. Before coming, everyone had a big quarrel.

The Conservatives headed by Hu Zhengtang feel that they should keep the city and slowly map it.

Taking advantage of the favorable location of Tianmen pass, as long as it is passively defended, it can support for several years.

As long as China develops and the border forces are strong, we can fight with Qin Guotang in a few years.

But Xu Xu is not.

In his words, it is: “if others ride on your head and shit, don’t you beat him? You should rub him on the ground! Let him feel what strength is! ”

General Hu Zhengtang was speechless for a while.

The other party is sweeping the state of Qin!

Although you killed tens of thousands of people with 3000 troops, it was just a small-scale battle.

If you fight, you three thousand soldiers and horses will be surrounded by hundreds of thousands of troops. You will die if you can fight again!

Xu Wei is noncommittal about this.

Young soldiers, oh, you haven’t seen real strength

When the emissary saw Xu que, the proud color on his face converged slightly.

The domestic courtiers may not know, but as a close guard around the king of Qin, he naturally knows that the person who led 3000 troops and horses into the army of the state of Qin is the seemingly harmless monarch in front of him.

“See the emperor of the East Tang Dynasty.” The envoy sat in his chair and arched his hand.

Although he was afraid, the envoy still maintained his due pride.

When Hu Zhengtang and others saw this, their faces Suddenly sank, and the atmosphere in the hall suddenly became anxious.

Xu que raised his hand and pressed it falsely, subdued the impatience of the people, and stared at the envoy with interest: “I don’t know your Majesty King Qin, what do you want to bring to me?”

“The day before yesterday, China tried to have friendly exchanges with your soldiers, but your country misunderstood our good intentions and sent people to raid our soldiers, which is contrary to the tradition of the intersection between the two countries.” The envoy’s speech was to confuse black and white, which immediately made the officers and men of the eastern Tang Dynasty red.

However, his next words made people angry.

“However, I’m kind-hearted and decided not to investigate. It’s mainly one thing to send my official here this time.”

“Persuading surrender again?” Xu lacks a wonderful way.

King Qin is not really so retarded, is he?

The envoy thought Xu Ke was afraid, and a proud look poured out on his face again: “my king said that as long as your country is willing to take the state of Qin as the main, voluntarily form an alliance with the state of Qin, pay tribute every year, and invite the king of the East Tang Dynasty to stay in our Imperial City, our state of Qin will not investigate this matter.”

Nima’s, the dog day king of Qin is shameless enough!

Xu Kuang laughed angrily. He came to fight and was killed by himself. Unexpectedly, he had the good intention to make up such a story.

The envoy’s words were very clear. He wanted Xu Ke to enter the state of Qin as a hostage. In name, it was an alliance. In fact, it was just another way to persuade him to surrender and become a minister.

Xu que thought for a moment. With the face saving virtue of the king of Qin, he would make such a decision. Is it difficult for someone to help him speak behind his back?

What he didn’t know was that after Bai Qi saw his performance that day, he went back and advised him to die, trying to make the king of Qin put the eastern Tang Dynasty in his pocket, so as not to pity a talent who could fight for the state of Qin.

But even if he knew, Xu Ke would only spit hard.

How can the leader of this fried heaven sect be subordinate to others?

When Hu Zhengtang and others heard the speech, a burst of pure light broke out in their eyes, but they soon fell into hesitation.

It is said that the plan given by the king of Qin is actually more appropriate for the current Eastern Tang Dynasty. But in that case, the emperor will have to be wronged and become a hostage in the state of Qin, which they can’t accept Compared with the entanglement of Hu Zhengtang and others, Xu que seemed to care nothing about these. Instead, he said meaningfully: “what if I don’t agree?” The envoy raised his eyebrows and said, “the four million troops of our country are now displayed outside the Tianmen pass. The monarch should think clearly.” Pop! The deputy general on one side finally couldn’t help but slap the table and stood up: “enough! Your state of Qin is too arrogant. You’re just an envoy. You dare to talk to your majesty like this. I’ll drag you out and feed the dog now! ” The envoy sneered and said, “you should think clearly. If I die here, four million troops of the state of Qin will attack the city immediately!” The generals suddenly turned pale. They haven’t even set up their fortifications. If the Qin army attacked the city now, it would not break the Tianmen pass, but hundreds of thousands of people would have to die and hurt. The eastern Tang Dynasty is far from being able to afford such losses Are you threatening me? ” Xu que smiled. The envoy was stunned: “I just……” bang! Xu Wei directly pounded the table and stood up, angrily saying, “I hate others threatening me most! All generals listen to the order. The king of Qin humiliated me in the eastern Tang Dynasty. As the king of the eastern Tang Dynasty, I swear not to accept this insult. Now I am declaring war on the state of Qin. I will fight tomorrow! ” The envoy was suddenly stupid. Before he could speak, he saw a flash of knife light passing in front of him With a click, the minister’s head fell to the ground. Hu Zhengtang and others were completely stupid. Your majesty, what are you doing! There are still things to discuss! Last time it was just custody. Why did you kill it directly this time? Xu que put away his long knife. His face was full of anger, but he was secretly proud in his heart. Shit, fortunately, the envoy came to provoke me. Otherwise, how can I persuade Hu Zhengtang to go to war? King Qin is really a good man

chapters.title: Chapter 1684
chapters.body:
Chapter 1684

Chapter 1684

C.1684

same day.

Xu que stood on the city wall, holding the envoy’s head and shouting at millions of troops: “King Qin, you old thing, wait for me, and bring troops to kill you tomorrow!”

This once caused a riot in the Qin army. Fortunately, Bai Qi suppressed the soldiers in the army.

And in the eastern Tang Dynasty, because of Xu’s lack of action, he was inspired.

“Good shout!”

“Our monarch wants to be so tough!”

“The emperor is mighty!”

For a time, Xu’s prestige in China reached its peak.

In contrast, the barracks seemed a little low.

Four million. What’s the concept?

The total population of the eastern Tang Dynasty is less than 10 million, and Qin Guoguang is the one who took out to fight, which has exceeded half of the domestic population of the eastern Tang Dynasty.

Such a huge army hoarding outside Tianmen pass is a great pressure for the defenders of Tianmen pass.

In addition, Xu’s words completely ignited the anger of the king of Qin.

In the period of rage, the king of Qin directly issued the coldest and cruelest military order – butchering the city!

When the Tianmen pass city is broken, the city will not stay!

For a time, everyone in the city was in danger.

“It’s over. We really can’t win.”

“Bastard! I haven’t played yet. How can I know I can’t win? ”

“The state of Qin has four million troops! Four million! You can’t even leave the body! ”

“It’s said that King Qin wants to kill the city… What should I do? There are still children waiting for me in my family…”

“Why did the monarch provoke the king of Qin? It’s just to live in the state of Qin for a few years.”

Walking in the street, you can hear such remarks everywhere.

The Qin army swept through Liuhe and was invincible. The pressure brought by fame alone was enough to crush every soldier of the eastern Tang Dynasty.

Some troops even mutinied on a small scale that night, and Hu Zhengtang tried his best to suppress it.

The next day, above the wall.

Hu Zhengtang was wearing armor and his face was as heavy as water. Under him were soldiers of the state of Qin waiting to fight.

“Tell the general that all the soldiers who mutinied yesterday have been imprisoned in the cell, but now the morale of the army is turbulent… The next battle is not easy to fight…” the deputy general said with worry.

Hu Zhengtang sighed and looked not far away. At this time, Xu kuzheng led his 3000 troops and horses ready to go at any time.

At this point, they have no way to stop Xu vacancy.

“If the order goes on, you don’t want to win, you just want to be invincible. The most important thing is that your majesty can’t lose!” Hu Zhengtang said in a deep voice.

“Yes!”

The deputy general threw his fist and hurried down to issue orders.

At this time, Xu que is distributing the things he redeemed from the system next to each other.

Although it is said that the price of hot weapons is too high to be exchanged, this cross era cold weapon is extremely cheap. Xu Xu used all the equipment value to exchange it for equipment.

“It’s time for you to build your career, brother!” Xu Xu shouted loudly.

Through yesterday’s heroic performance, Xu Kuang has completely conquered the 3000 soldiers. Now they have followed Xu Kuang’s lead.

Even if Xu que asked them to die directly, there would be no violation at all.

Xu Wei sighed: “sure enough, you still have to have strength…”

In the twinkling of an eye, time came to noon.

After a whole morning, the two armies have finished preparing for war.

The millions of Qin soldiers lined up in front of them and made no secret of their strength. They were going to attack the city at one fell swoop.

Boom!

Boom!

Boom!

Bursts of passionate war drums sounded, and millions of troops of the Qin army shouted in unison: “the state of Qin will win!”

The sound was like thunder, the air rushed into the sky, and even the clouds in the sky were vaguely dispersed.

As for the East Tang Kingdom, morale is low. It is inevitable to be a little timid in the face of such a strong team.

The drum gradually calmed down, the battle array of the Qin army dispersed, and a powerful and handsome middle-aged man came out slowly.

He had a dragon crown on his head and a Golden Dragon Robe. His whole body exuded the momentum of a king in the world.

“See my king!”

See a million soldiers together.

He is Ying Fangwu, the monarch of the state of Qin who swept through Liuhe!

Seeing this man, even Hu Zhengtang couldn’t help frowning: “King Qin has imperial spirit, commands 4 million troops and has vigorous morale. We’re afraid we can’t support this battle for long.”

“Fortunately, the emperor has promised me not to charge first this time, but only as an auxiliary army,” he said

Xu Kuang just skimmed his lips and said angrily, “shit… I’m not as handsome as I am. What can I pretend to be?!”

But I have to say that Ying Fangwu is really a character. From a lack of perspective, as the head of a country, the king of Huoyuan kingdom was just like this one It’s a pity. I’m afraid your imperial road will end when you meet Ben Pusheng. ” Xu que showed a sneer on his face, suddenly waved his long knife and roared, “brothers, the king of Qin appears. I’ll point him down later!” Kill the king of Qin! ” Three thousand soldiers roared in unison. Xu que adds internal force to the roar, which doesn’t disperse around the wall. Sometimes, the simplest way of encouragement can achieve the best effect Strange… I feel like I’m not so afraid. ” Yes, what are the Qin soldiers? We are the people who want to kill the king of Qin. ” I’m burning. Ow, Ow! ” Inspired by Xu Que’s shouting, the soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty once again aroused their fighting spirit and followed the 3000 soldiers shouting: “cut down the king of Qin! Kill the king of Qin! Kill the king of Qin! ” Hearing this continuous roar, Rao Shi, king of Qin, had long been angry. Now he couldn’t help but change his face: “I’m the great power of Qin, invincible! Lord Dongtang, if you are willing to surrender, I can promise… “Vote for NIMA! Wash your fart… Cough, neck, get ready to die! ” Xu que directly interrupted King Qin’s shouting. How dare this guy interrupt me? The king of Qin once felt that he had become an emperor after sweeping Liuhe. He had a lot of breadth of mind. But today, he was repeatedly broken by Xu Duan, and his face was about to be deformed by Qi Follow my orders! The whole army! Capture Tianmen pass and kill the city! ” With the order of the king of Qin, the formation of the Qin army began to move. Millions of soldiers move together, the momentum is so spectacular, and the dull footsteps are like stepping on people’s hearts. Xu Wei stood in the front with 3000 soldiers, turned to look behind him and shouted, “brothers, follow me!” When the voice fell, he took the lead and rushed out first. Three thousand troops and horses followed, and the whole team came out like a sharp arrow. what the fuck! Hu Zhengtang, standing on the city wall, was stupid again. Why did the emperor rush out again? Didn’t he say he was responsible for the auxiliary war after the war

chapters.title: Chapter 1685
chapters.body:
Chapter 1685

Chapter 1685

C.1685

In the face of Xu Xu’s fierce impact, Ying Fangwu just sneered twice and pushed into the military array.

“General Bai, I don’t want to see this man alive after this war.”

Ying Fangwu’s voice was full of cold and fierce, which was introduced into Bai Qi’s ears.

Bai Qi sighed, pulled the reins and slowly came to the front of the army.

“Follow my orders and ride lightly!”

At the command, tens of thousands of light cavalry wearing bright silver armor came out and stood in front of the army.

Each of these cavalry men had a long bow, a three foot long knife on the horse’s back, and a white cloud pattern on their armor.

“That was the flying feather ride that was famous all over the world in Yan country!” Hu Zhengtang suddenly grasped the handle of the knife, “unexpectedly, the king of Qin restored this cavalry!”

When King Qin swept Liuhe, he naturally pocketed the powerful armies of various countries.

This was what Hu Zhengtang was most worried about. Unexpectedly, it really appeared in front of him.

Today’s World War I, the eastern Tang Dynasty is not only fighting against the state of Qin, but also fighting against other countries!

“Feiyu rides at the fastest speed in the world, known as the first speed in Kyushu!”

“Your Majesty’s cavalry is fast, but it can’t be faster than flying feather!”

“The king of Qin is so terrible that even the powerful armies of various countries can be reorganized!”

The officers and men talked one after another. Their faces were ugly. They didn’t think much of Xu Ke who was charging.

Nevertheless, Hu Zhengtang was not as worried as yesterday.

After all, although Feiyu riding speed is fast, it is based on the sacrifice of lethality.

In short, I move faster than you. I shoot you first and then hit you. You can’t react at all.

After seeing Xu Que’s riding skills yesterday, Hu Zhengtang is not worried that the throwing of Feiyu will affect Xu Que’s charge.

“Unfortunately, I’m afraid there will be a lot of casualties for the three thousand soldiers…”

Even though the three level masters are superior in force, they are still human beings. It is far from impossible to say that they should rely on their bodies to resist bows and arrows.

Moreover, because Feiyu riding is shooting arrows in the process of galloping, the power of arrows will increase sharply. It can’t be stopped by the armor on the light riding alone.

The two cavalry quickly drew closer, and the flying feather riding commander running in the front shouted, “get up!”

The flying feather cavalry behind them set up long bows, bent bows and arrows, and the target pointed at Xu’s lack of 3000 troops and horses!

At this time, Xu Xu’s eyes burst into a light: “brothers, replace the fried tianbang crossbow I sent you, and let the opposite side see what is real archery!”

“Yes!”

Three thousand soldiers and horses responded in unison, immediately took out a strange weapon from behind, leaned over the horse’s back and aimed at the flying feather horse who was also aiming.

Before departure, Xu que specially exchanged these Zhuge crossbows in the system for the moment.

In real history, the emergence of Zhuge crossbow undoubtedly changed the trend of the whole cold weapon war.

Whoever owns Zhuge crossbow has a powerful killing weapon.

In this world, the military tactics of all countries are still in the most basic state. The state of Qin swept Liuhe, relying on the strength of its troops and the advantage of its number of people.

Zhuge crossbow has undoubtedly become an artifact here!

Everyone watching the war in the distance was stunned.

This… What is this?

Why is the shape so unique? What’s the name of Zhuge crossbow?

But it doesn’t look like a bow and arrow at all

“Come on, brothers, follow me, aim at each other and load! Ready… Shoot! ”

Xu Kui stood up, showed his Zhuge crossbow and gently pulled the trigger.

Whew!

The Zhuge crossbow in Xu Wei’s hand instantly shot a thin and sharp short arrow, which was much faster than the speed of ordinary bows and arrows.

Almost in the blink of an eye, he directly hit one of Feiyu’s cavalry.

The bright silver armor on the cavalry didn’t play any blocking role at all. It passed directly through the chest and died instantly.

“Hiss!”

His eyes were almost shocked.

This thing is so powerful, but with a gentle press, the arrow is far faster than the normal bow and arrow shooting speed, and the power is so amazing.

Instant death!

How terrible!

Feiyuqi, who was charging, was stunned, and his speed dropped subconsciously.

The leader of Feiyu cavalry thought he was dazzled and frequently looked back at the fallen cavalry.

What was that?

Such a small thing flew over at once and killed my men directly?

See the ghost Was that a concealed weapon just now? ” It should be. I heard that the king of the East Tang Dynasty is a Wulin expert. ” Damn it, it’s so insidious to use concealed weapons! ” Just now, only Xu Kuang stood up, so the commander of Feiyu riding thought that only Xu Kuang used the Zhuge crossbow. Although one soldier was killed or injured, it is not unacceptable. He looked gloomy and snorted coldly: “brothers, don’t panic. This kind of concealed weapon can only be used with deep internal skills. Even if the king of the East Tang Dynasty has such skills, he has only one person. Tens of thousands of us are here. We don’t have to be afraid of him at all!” Yes! ” The rest of the flying feather cavalry cheered up and shouted. Yes, only the emperor of the East Tang Dynasty can use this concealed weapon! If you die, you’ll kill a few people. There’s nothing to be afraid of! At this time, Xu que suddenly made a move with one hand and said with a laugh: “brothers, perform for them according to what I just did!” Then three thousand soldiers and horses set up their upper bodies and showed their Zhuge crossbows Hiss! ” The commander of Feiyu riding immediately took a breath. Shit, why does everyone have it? Don’t you mean concealed weapons? Can all of them use them? Before the commander of Feiyu riding gave orders, the 3000 soldiers and horses had pulled the trigger Whoosh! ” Three thousand sharp short swords were shot out in an instant and went straight to Feiyu. In the blink of an eye, Feiyu riding lost 3000 people! All three thousand short swords, without exception, hit an enemy. The commander of Feiyu cavalry was almost stupid. Then he remembered that the other cavalry was the team of everyone’s three grade experts. But at this point, he had no way back Brothers, the other party let go of a round of concealed weapons. It needs time to reload and continue to rush with me! ” Before the words fell, he saw Xu que suddenly smile and aimed Zhuge liancrossbow at them again Guess why I call this weapon a crossbow? ” Crossbow? The commander of Feiyu riding was stunned and his face suddenly changed. Shit! It’s not really what you think! The next second, another wave of 3000 short swords came through the air

chapters.title: Chapter 1686
chapters.body:
Chapter 1686

Chapter 1686

C.1686

Whew!

Xu Ke pulled the trigger one after another and shot short arrows at Feiyu.

The three thousand soldiers and horses behind him followed suit and pulled the trigger quickly.

Whew! Whew! Whew! Whew! Whew!

In an instant, countless short arrows shot out quickly.

Feiyu rode here, and waves of cavalry fell down.

In the face of the overwhelming rain of arrows, feiyuqi has no resistance at all, and can only fall to the ground and be slaughtered.

After a few rounds, the battlefield was almost cleared, leaving only the commander of Feiyu riding standing in place and at a loss.

Xu que raised Zhuge’s crossbow, put it on his mouth, gently blew a breath, and said deeply, “please call me… Western cowboy!”

Above the city wall, there was silence.

All the soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty were stupid.

What kind of monster weapon is this?

It’s fast and powerful. It doesn’t take much effort. It can shoot continuously!

Even if you can shoot continuously, there are so many?

Three thousand fried tianbang crossbows were fired together, but they really killed Feiyu

This is only 3000. What if there are 30000 or 300000?

I don’t dare to think about it for a while.

In that case, what else is there to fight?

Just stand on the wall and shoot arrows. Whoever comes will die!

He looked at the center of the battlefield. At this time, except for Xu’s 3000 troops and horses and the soldiers behind him, the leader of Feiyu riding was left standing alone in the state of Qin. He looked very lonely.

Although he shouldn’t, Hu Zhengtang still felt a touch of sympathy in his heart.

The commander of Feiyu riding is too pathetic… But your majesty is too terrible to invent such a terrible weapon!

At this time, the commander of Feiyu riding finally slowed down from the stupefied God, looked at the front with interest, looked at his weakness, and trembled all over.

The flying feather cavalry, who had been trained for many years, was first incorporated by the king of Qin. Now it’s not easy to go to war. None of the enemy was killed. As a result, all his men died?

Xu kuyang shouted: “the one in front, do you still fight?”

Flying feather riding commander wants to cry without tears.

What a fucking fart!

Don’t you see I’m alone?

For a time, the commander of Feiyu riding stayed in the middle of the battlefield, neither walking nor not walking.

Let’s go. It’s a shame. I came out with tens of thousands of people, and the regiment was destroyed directly.

If you don’t go, will you let yourself attack the 3000 soldiers and horses alone?

Don’t be funny. He’s not a great general with magical skills. What’s the difference between rushing directly and dying.

“Come back!” Fortunately, Bai Qi’s voice sounded at the right time and solved his siege.

The commander of Feiyu riding, such as being pardoned, pulled the reins, turned his horse’s head and hurried to the army of the state of Qin.

Bai Qi looked at Xu Xu’s eyes and sighed in his heart: “I didn’t expect that the king of the East Tang Dynasty not only had high martial arts, but also had such a sharp weapon… I underestimated him.”

The next second, his eyes widened sharply.

Xu que raised his hand, aimed the crossbow at the commander of Feiyu riding, and sneered, “did I let you go?”

Then he pulled the trigger gently.

Whew!

A sharp short arrow came in a flash and penetrated the chest of the flying feather riding commander.

Flying feather riding commander’s body stiffened and fell down slowly.

His unbelievable expression still remained on his face. It seemed that he couldn’t believe that he died here.

If he could speak, he would probably shout, “hold back!”

I’m afraid anyone would feel extremely oppressed in this situation.

Facing Bai Qi’s gloomy eyes, Xu que smiled proudly and said, “I’m a principled person. If I want to kill you all, I have to kill you all!”

Bai Qi took a deep breath and pressed down his anger.

When the two armies fought, kindness was the biggest mistake. He thought that he had deliberately left the commander of Feiyu riding just now because he had cherished benevolence.

Now it seems that it’s just to slap them in the face!

His subordinates were killed in front of him, but there was nothing he could do. What a shame for a commander!

“Give me orders! The iron butcher came out! ”

Bai Qi roared. The herald beside him waved the flag and passed the military order.

In general, large-scale wars, because the battlefield is too large, it is often difficult to convey quickly by words alone.

With Bai Qi’s order, the military array gradually dispersed, revealing a huge iron cavalry hiding in the rear.

Standing on the city wall, Hu Zhengtang faintly felt a shock.

The shock became stronger and stronger. At the end of his eyes, there was even a burst of smoke among the Qin soldiers, covering the appearance of the cavalry. A moment later, the smoke dispersed and the terrible cavalry appeared in front of the crowd. Tall war horses first appeared. They looked more than twice as tall as normal war horses. They were all black and covered with pure black armor. The knight on it is covered with black armor. It fits tightly and has no weakness. The armor depicts ferocious beasts. The knight holds a long gun with a foot length of ten feet. Even if it is so far away, Hu Zhengtang can feel a burst of killing blood from each other Iron, iron, iron floating slaughter! ” Hu Zhengtang completely changed his face this time and grabbed the herald next to him: “come on! Hurry up and order your majesty back! The iron floating slaughter is not something they can contend with! ” blamed! The state of Qin even sent out Tiefu Tu! You know, tiefudu is the first of the three cavalry in the state of Qin, known as the invincible heavy cavalry. When King Qin swept Liuhe, he relied on the invincible benefit of Tiefu Tu! No cavalry is the enemy of tie futu. With tie futu’s equipment, it can easily break down the three thousand troops and horses with only one impact. Even say that as long as 3000 iron floating slaughters, they will be enough to fight ten or even twenty times their own cavalry! Tiefutu is not so much a cavalry as a group of walking chariots! The name of Tiefu Tu has spread all over the world. Most soldiers have not seen it with their own eyes. They just think it is a legend. As soon as I saw it today, I was immediately photographed by it. Great fear came, and the soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty looked like earth. They could hardly imagine the scene of fighting with tiefutu. I’m afraid it will be like a chicken without resistance, and it will be torn up directly! However, Xu Xu looked at the cavalry from hell, looked fearless, and pulled out the long sword behind him. Zheng! The sound of swords echoed on the battlefield. Xu que was full of spirit and laughed loudly: “come on, let’s go together!” This time, not only the soldiers, but even Ying Fangwu arrived and was shocked. Is this guy crazy

chapters.title: Chapter 1687
chapters.body:
Chapter 1687

Chapter 1687

C.1687

“Hum, ignorant people, they basically arranged the terror of the cavalry under my command. They even dreamed of fighting my cavalry with 3000 troops and horses!” Ying Fangwu snorted coldly and disdained, “I don’t know how to live or die!”

However, at this time, the bodyguard beside him couldn’t help saying: “well… Your majesty, I feel that he doesn’t want to fight cavalry against cavalry, as if he is ready to fight iron floating slaughter alone.”

Ying Fangwu was stunned and looked ahead.

Xu que left 3000 soldiers and horses in place, rode forward alone and came to the middle of the battlefield.

The sword blade in his hand reflects the dazzling sunlight. One man and one horse stand in front of Tiefu Tu, which means to fight Tiefu TU with one man’s strength.

Ying Fangwu suddenly felt an incredible emotion.

Are you kidding?

Is this guy crazy or stupid?

How can a man stop the iron butcher!

Even if he is a master, it is impossible!

At the beginning of the establishment of Tiefu Tu, the king of Qin specially found an expert to try.

Even a famous and top martial arts expert in the Jianghu suffered a tragic death under the impact of Tiefu Tu.

The armor design of tiefutu makes it impossible for ordinary swords to cut in, so they can only be destroyed with brute force.

However, the material of the armor is a hundred refined armor selected by thousands of people. Let alone cut it with brute force. At the beginning, the master of that product tried his best to cut it, but he only broke a small hole in the armor.

It’s said that Xu Ke is a master, but what if he is a master?

Personal strength can’t fight the army at all!

Hu Zhengtang and others have been completely stupid at this time, and even forgot to stop Xu vacancy.

“Your Majesty… Really crazy.” The deputy general on one side said shakily.

“That’s an iron floating butcher… Even if we pile human lives, tens of thousands or even hundreds of thousands of people will be killed before we can kill each other…”

“No, go and stop your majesty! Never let him go! ”

Unfortunately, when they reacted, Xu Ke had begun to charge.

“King Qin, look carefully. How did you cavalry get hacked to death by me!” Xu Ke’s laughter echoed on the battlefield and was extremely arrogant.

Although Bai Qi admired Xu’s courage, he also waved and ordered: “charge!”

Tiefutu began to accelerate slowly, and the dull sound of iron hoofs was like bursts of thunder.

At first, their speed was not fast, but then it became faster and faster, just like a black torrent.

Xu que, like a lightning bolt, went straight to this torrent, as if to split it.

This is a scenario that can never happen again in the past and in the future.

With one person’s strength, impact the world-famous iron futu heavy riding!

All the officers and men trembled in their eyes.

This is their majesty. Even though they know that they will die, they still have no fear!

This is the one they deserve to follow!

Hu Zhengtang’s eyes twinkled with tears and said in a deep voice, “generals, don’t let your majesty die alone. Come out with me!”

He has determined that Xu Ke will die in this sprint.

The monarch is dying. As a general, there is no reason to live alone.

He has given orders. If all his troops die, he will open the gate and surrender.

King Qin’s so-called slaughtering city is just to vent his anger. It’s not necessary to kill all their soldiers.

After all, he conquered the eastern Tang Dynasty. Since then, this is also the people of the state of Qin. As the Communist Lord of Kyushu, the king of Qin is not so blind.

“Boom!”

However, at this time, a huge roar suddenly came from the battlefield.

Hu Zhengtang’s heart trembled and immediately turned away. He didn’t dare to look back.

He knew that this was the sound that Xu lacked had collided with each other, and the violent speed was afraid that Xu lacked had been torn to pieces.

“General!” The deputy general’s voice suddenly sounded, “look at the battlefield!”

Hu Zhengtang roared, “I said, go with me!”

“No, general, look!” The voice of the deputy general became more and more anxious, which also revealed a sense of excitement and shock.

Hu Zhengtang suddenly muttered in his heart. Is it difficult that his majesty is not dead? Or did you suddenly wake up and run away?

Tangled repeatedly, Hu Zhengtang looked back and looked at the battlefield. He was stunned!

“Sleeping trough! What’s the matter, your majesty? ”

In the middle of the battlefield, the two collided with each other at an amazing speed, but surprisingly, Xu que was not directly hit into pieces of meat.

Instead, it was an iron floating butcher cavalry who was directly blown up by Xu Duan’s fist!

Xu Ke’s figure jumped high, and in front of him was an iron floating butcher with black armor.

The cavalry around were all dumbfounded at this time.

what the fuck! Is this NIMA still human Is there something wrong with the boy? ” How is it possible that even the top experts in the Jianghu can’t beat Tiefu Tu away with one punch! ” Xu Que’s face showed disdain: “you know a fart. I’m born with divine power!” God, natural power? Are there such soldiers in the Qin Kingdom? As for the soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty, they were completely excited Your majesty, there is no match in the world! ” Your majesty is too fierce! I really did it! ” No, do you know that your majesty is a natural power? ” No matter how powerful you are, your majesty will be the goal of my life from today on! ” Xu Wei waved his long sword, and countless sword lights flashed. Each sword light pierced into the black armor of tiefutu. After a short stay in the air, the tiefutu soldier fell to the ground, shed hot blood and died. Xu Ke threw a long sword, and the blood on the sword splashed on the ground, which was particularly dazzling It’s too weak. You fell before I could work. ” Xu que cracked the corners of his mouth, revealing Bai Sen’s teeth. The commander of tiefutu was also shocked, and a low voice came out from behind the mask: “are you the king of the East Tang Dynasty?” No, I’m your father! ” While these people were in a daze, Xu que completely released his hands and feet, waved a long sword and began to kill in the iron floating slaughter. Shua! Shua! Shua! One sword light came out one after another. Each sword pierced into the gap of black armour. Black armour is not completely closed. There are gaps at key activities, but they are very small. Even a top expert can’t guarantee that each sword can pierce into it. But who is Xu Xu? Relying on his intelligence and talent, he silently practiced martial arts for two years. Finally, with the addition of the system, he successfully became a man of the sword God! A sword shines across 19 continents, and the sword Qi spans 30000 miles! At this time, Hu Zhengtang also recovered from the shock, made a quick decision and shouted, “send my order and the whole army will attack!” The surging soldiers rushed out of the gate like a torrent and went straight to the Qin soldiers. Qin Bing was also unwilling to show weakness. The two sides mingled at the same time.

chapters.title: Chapter 1688
chapters.body:
Chapter 1688

Chapter 1688

C.1688

“Sword, sword God!”

At the forefront of the battle array, Bai Qi, seeing this scene, immediately exclaimed: “is there anyone in the world who can build the realm of sword God?”

That’s the legendary realm!

But the fact is that he Ming, who has become a sword God, rushed to kill in the tiefutu army array with only a long sword.

“Look at my fried heaven Gang nine swords!”

“Swing the sword!”

“Falling sword!”

“Obscene and cheap… Cough, one sword holding the sky!”

Bai Qi was more and more frightened when he saw it. Xu Que’s sword technique was powerful.

Especially in the “one sword holding the sky” style, the sword body was expanded into a big sword with sword Qi, which ran through several tiefutu soldiers.

The nine swords of fried heaven sect are so terrible!

“What kind of organization is this fried sky Gang? It can develop such terrible sword skills. I’m afraid the best master in the world can’t move under him!”

Seeing his soldiers fall one after another, commander tie futu couldn’t hold his tension.

“Tie Fu Tu, form an array!”

With a loud roar, he took the lead in running with his soldiers.

Tiefutu was originally an army strong in fighting and killing. Only when their speed was raised, they were the most powerful team.

At this time, trapped in Xu deficiency, they simply can’t give full play to their due strength.

With the command of the commander, tiefutu soldiers gathered together one after another, like a huge wall connecting the earth and the sky, blocking the sunlight, and a breath of terror came face to face.

“Kill!”

The commander of tiefutu burst out and began to sprint forward.

“Your Majesty, hold on! Here we are! ”

Hu Zhengtang, with his troops and horses, came to Xu que quickly.

At this time, the two armies have been fighting together. As the main general, Hu Zhengtang should have commanded the battle in the array.

However, as an emperor, Xu Kuang had gone deep into the enemy’s battle. Hu Zhengtang had to hand over the command to the deputy general who had followed him for many years, and he came straight to Xu Kuang with his army.

As an emperor, Xu que can’t afford to lose. Hu Zhengtang is ready to destroy the army behind him.

“Your Majesty must be rescued!”

“Yes!”

The soldiers and horses were also psychologically prepared, all looked solemn, the five fingers holding the long sword tightened hard, and the finger joints turned white, as if they were ready to go.

Other countries have used their destruction to prove that there is no chance of winning a frontal battle with tiefutu.

But even their majesty is standing on the front line now. What else can they be afraid of?

Xuanyuan Wanrong didn’t know when she went up the city wall. Looking at Xu Que’s back, she glanced at a worry in the depths of her eyes that she didn’t even realize.

“Asshole… I don’t know how to cherish my life.”

I don’t know when she began to think about Xu Ke’s safety.

Was it when he showed his ability to run the country?

Or when I saw him win with three thousand troops and horses?

Xuanyuan Wanrong didn’t know that in her long life, she realized for the first time that she couldn’t control her mood.

The two groups of people and horses approached each other at a very fast speed, and everyone’s eyes were red, as if the blood began to boil.

“Hey, it’s just a war. What are you doing with so much blood?”

Xu Wei said faintly. The long sword went into the scabbard and directly stepped down on the spot. The huge Qi in his body began to flow to the palm.

The furious Qi gathered in the meridians. Xu Duan’s arms opened to both sides, drew a semicircle, and suddenly pushed forward: “the dragon has regrets!”

Seeing that Xu Xu didn’t use his sword anymore, commander tie futu immediately accelerated his speed and said with a wild smile: “the emperor is crazy. Brothers kill him!”

“Kill!” The sound of iron floating slaughter is like a huge wave, which will drown everything in front of you.

Tiefu Tu is a cavalry trained by him. Even if he is an expert, he can easily tear each other apart.

In this world, no one can fight tiefutu with bare hands!

Even if you are a sword God!

Watching

“Roar!”

An earth shaking dragon roar suddenly sounded between heaven and earth.

Then, a golden dragon gushed out from the missing palms. The God Jun was powerful, twisted his huge body, wrapped in unparalleled strength, and rushed towards the iron futu that was reuniting.

Boom!

The figure of the Golden Dragon instantly covered the whole iron floating Tu.

The commander of tiefutu looked at the figure that covered the sky and the sun, and his face hidden under the iron armor turned white.

“This… What the fuck is this?”

The next second, a violent roar exploded, and a large amount of dust was splashed in the air, which immediately covered the sun, and the whole battlefield was extremely dark. I don’t know how long it took, the dust and smoke dispersed. Xu Kuang was standing in the middle of the battlefield, and opposite him was the tiefutu army, which had tens of thousands of people. At this time, there were less than a thousand people left. Everyone was stunned. The whole battlefield was silent, only the wind roared. Whether it was the eastern Tang Dynasty or the soldiers of the state of Qin, they were all silly and blank in their brains This… What kind of martial arts is this? ” Is this still martial arts? Where can there be such martial arts in the world?! ” That was a dragon just now, that was a dragon! The monarch of the eastern Tang Dynasty is the real one! ” In an instant, Ying Fangwu, who was still in an ignorant state, came back to his senses, and his eyes were burning with anger: “kill him for me! I want him dead! ” He was so angry that he even forgot to use my claim. There is only one idea in my mind. Kill this man! You are the real one! No one can rob him of the position of Kyushu Communist! The soldiers of the state of Qin gradually recovered, roared and charged at Xu que. Hu Zhengtang also slowed down and led the soldiers and horses to collide with the soldiers of the state of Qin. In this battle, the sky was dark, the sun and the moon were dark, and the whole battlefield was full of blood. Xu lacked in the battlefield, just like a God coming down to earth, holding a long sword and killing the Qin army. A whole iron floating slaughter army was slaughtered by him alone. Almost half of the Qin soldiers were killed by Xu que. On the other hand, the soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty still suffered nearly one-third of the casualties, although Xu Ke was the main combat force. Facing the Qin soldiers sweeping Liuhe, the soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty are still not enough to see. A large number of broken black armor piled up on the battlefield, just like a pile of garbage. Xu incomplete walked among the corpses everywhere, and his side was filled with blood gas. His white robe was dyed red by blood, and his calm smile was like a demon from hell in Qin Bing’s eyes Is this still a man… “How can there be such a brave man in the world?” It’s impossible… It’s impossible… “Xu que inserted the long sword beside him and shouted to the sky:” who else? ” The sound is deafening and resounding all around

chapters.title: Chapter 1689
chapters.body:
Chapter 1689

Chapter 1689

C.1689

At the moment, the soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty who are still standing are all boiling with blood, following Xu que roaring.

“Who else!”

For a moment, the roar was like thunder, reverberating in all directions.

Even the invincible Qin soldiers were frightened.

Hu Zhengtang was also one of them. After shouting, he found that the wound on his shoulder had been torn open again.

But he didn’t feel any pain at all. Instead, he felt very happy in his heart.

“Ha ha, I’ve never been so happy in fighting in my life. It’s the honor of the last general to have the opportunity to die on the battlefield with his majesty today!” Hu Zhengtang laughed.

Who knows, Xu que curled his mouth, rolled his eyes and said, “die with me? I want to be beautiful. Even if I die, I’ll be buried with a beautiful girl. If it’s bad, there’s a Xuanyuan Wanrong. Who wants to be buried with you? ”

Hu Zhengtang choked at this and almost didn’t come up at one breath. A moment later, he smiled bitterly.

Their monarch is really a strange man. He can say such words calmly when he is dying.

The commander of tiefutu looked at the almost dead soldiers around him, and the whole person was completely ignorant.

This fucking fart!

He was extremely oppressed. He was the commander of the world’s first cavalry. He didn’t expect to beat all the people under his hands one day!

The opponent didn’t lose a hair!

If he had not been a master himself, he would not have ended up much better than his own men.

“Monster… Monster…”

Commander tie futu murmured, and his body trembled involuntarily.

He has never seen such a terrible Wulin expert in his life… No, is this guy really called martial arts?

Xu que stepped forward and sneered, “aren’t you going to kill me? Come on! ”

The commander of tiefutu shook his body and subconsciously stepped back, together with the living Qin soldiers around him.

“Hey, don’t retreat. I’ve just warmed up!” Xu que took another step forward and shouted loudly.

Qin soldiers suddenly shook their bodies and stumbled, almost falling directly to the ground.

Shit, you just warmed up?

You’re killing two-thirds of our hundreds of thousands!

You are so fierce, which of us dares to fight you?

“I heard you are a master of first-class products?” Xu que glanced at commander tie futu again and said provocatively, “come on, fight with me alone. It’s okay to fight in groups. What’s the big deal? I won’t let you come with one hand? Then let me get my hands? I can’t do both hands. I can’t add more than one foot. Ha, I have to walk. ”

Commander tie futu is about to cry.

Brother, I’ll call you brother!

Why don’t you let me go back? You’ve killed all my men!

What’s more, your martial arts are so powerful and unparalleled. What rubbish am I, a first-class expert, who is not qualified to stand in front of you!

Just treat me as a fart and let me go!

In the past few years, Xu Ke has given them too many surprises.

Originally, I thought that today’s battle was the war to destroy the country in the eastern Tang Dynasty. However, I didn’t expect that Xu Que’s strength was far beyond their imagination.

What’s a fucking surprise?

This is a fucking surprise!

“Emperor, this is… Too powerful…”
