“It’s not just powerful, it’s against the sky…”

“No, when did the emperor practice martial arts? Isn’t he farming all these years? ”

“Guess how we know? But with the emperor, maybe we can really fight… ”

“Yes, we still have hope!”

Xu’s performance undoubtedly gave everyone a shot in the arm.

With such a powerful monarch in front, the invincible army of the state of Qin seems less terrible.

Hu Zhengtang took a deep breath and knew that this was the best time for them to launch an attack. He made a quick decision and shouted, “soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty, follow me! Drive the Qin thieves out of the territory of the eastern Tang Dynasty! ”

“Yes!”

The officers and men of the eastern Tang Dynasty responded in unison.

Suddenly, under the leadership of Xu que, the eastern Tang Dynasty blew a howl of counterattack.

Even if a third of the soldiers were lost, the remaining soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty still had the strength of a war.

Because in the previous World War I, Xu Ke, as the main exporter, had killed most of the soldiers of the state of Qin.

The three thousand soldiers and horses who had followed Xu Kuang also grabbed the Zhuge crossbow next to him and rushed towards the Qin soldiers in front.

“Go! We can win! ”

This idea echoed in everyone’s heart.

Facing the soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty who rallied up their morale again, Ying Fangwu was indifferent and even had no panic.

“It’s just hundreds of thousands of soldiers. They die when they die. If these East Tang people are really naive, can they defeat the four million soldiers under my command?” WOW! With the order of the winner, millions of troops stationed in the original place took a step forward Daqin will win! ” The thunderous roar echoed on the battlefield, and a repeated thunder directly woke up the soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty immersed in beautiful fantasies. The hundreds of thousands of Qin soldiers they killed earlier were only a small part of the four million. In order to overcome this part, the eastern Tang Dynasty has done its best, and even the monarch had to unite in person to win the victory. Then… What should they do next No… there are too many Qin soldiers. ” We beat the students to death, but we didn’t even kill half the people opposite. ” I’m afraid your majesty has exhausted his Qi. How can we fight? ” For a moment, the morale that had just been raised fell again. Looking at the boundless army of the state of Qin in front of us, the officers and men of the eastern Tang Dynasty had a re boiling blood and could not help cooling down. At this time, Xu Xu’s voice suddenly echoed on the battlefield: “big husband, do something and don’t do something. Since ancient times, no one has died, and death should be deserved!” He waved his long sword and looked at the standing soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty: “you only see many enemies, you feel afraid, but life is like this. Difficulties and obstacles will always stop you in the direction of your progress. Do we have to give up like this?” No, don’t give up… “The voice of the soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty came thinly Louder! ” Don’t give up! ” Good! ” I don’t know where the BGM began to ring. Xu KUWAN, like a deductive conductor, waved a long sword and laughed, “in the face of death, we should be full of disdain and spit hard with all our strength. We hold his throat and let the despicable King Qin understand that death can never make us yield!” Understand! ” Come with me, hetui~! ” Bah! ” Millions of soldiers spit together. What a spectacular scene! Ying Fangwu trembled, clenched his fists and turned white. Nima’s, I’m the king of Qin, the son of destiny. Will so many people spit one day? What a shame

chapters.title: Chapter 1690
chapters.body:
Chapter 1690

Chapter 1690

C.1690

“Bring me my broadsword and I’ll go up and kill him!”

Ying Fangwu’s eyes were red. He threw the Dragon crown on the ground. When he lifted his robe, he was about to jump down.

Shit, it’s the first time he’s been humiliated like this!

Tens of thousands of people spit together. Who can stand it?

The courtiers around him, who had seen this, rushed forward and hugged the Emperor: “emperor, don’t, you are a golden body. Don’t go to battle to avoid damage!”

“Don’t fucking stop me. This boy is too arrogant. I can’t eliminate my hatred if I don’t kill him today!”

“Your Majesty, no!”

Seeing this, Xu que laughed and said, “King Qin, you soft egg, come and cut me if you have a temper! I stand here and let you chop! ”

Then he waved hard: “brothers, the king of Qin has been afraid. Spit him again with me!”

As a result, tens of thousands of people spit on the famous scene of the century of King Qin.

“Wow! Xu Ke, I will kill you today! ”

Seeing that the king of Qin was almost out of his mind by Xu’s lack of breath, Hu Zhengtang and his soldiers were amazed and shocked.

Your majesty is indeed a genius!

Words and deeds can be said to be penetrating and point to the key. A few words made the king of Qin lose his reason!

“Killing people and killing people… It’s terrible.” Hu Zhengtang murmured, feeling that he knew his majesty again.

Xu Ke was happy to see the crazy rise in the installed value of the system.

It’s just that I spit twice, which brings me so much forced value.

King Qin is a good brother!

Under the persuasion of his ministers, the king of Qin finally calmed down, but the anger in the depths of his eyes burned more and more fiercely.

“Pass on my oral instructions and the whole army will advance!”

I put all my troops on this one time. Even if you are an immortal, you can’t help it!

Millions of troops are moving forward slowly, which brings the suppression force that ordinary people can’t imagine. Just looking at the dense crowd makes people shudder.

Even though we have just won a small victory, the overall situation has not changed much.

Although the state of Qin lost hundreds of thousands of soldiers, the eastern Tang Dynasty also lost a lot.

What’s more, there are four million people in the state of Qin, and hundreds of thousands of soldiers are just a drop in the bucket. They can supplement the lost troops almost instantly.

In contrast, in the eastern Tang Dynasty, after losing one-third of the soldiers, the military array suddenly became loose.

Even if some soldiers were dispatched from the city, they still looked a little decadent compared with the Qin soldiers who still showed a majestic trend at this time.

“It’s over… There are too many of them.”

“You’re afraid of a ball. With your majesty, the sword God, it’s no use even if more people come.”

“Yes, we have your majesty, invincible!”

Hu Zhengtang also looked at Xu que, his eyes full of reverence: “Your Majesty, you…”

“You fart, really think I’m an immortal?”

Xu Wei turned his eyes angrily: “more than three million people, even if they kneel there and don’t move, I can’t cut them down next to each other!”

“Er… This is…” Hu Zhengtang scratched his head in embarrassment.

That’s what I said, but who called Xu que so fierce that even he thought Xu que could kill these people.

But that is simply impossible. Even if the strength of the eastern Tang Dynasty is doubled, the soldiers of more than three million people may not be able to stop it, not to mention Xu’s lack of one person.

“It’s time for our generals to be loyal today!” Hu Zhengtang took a deep breath, stood proudly at once and shouted before the final war, “today, the thieves of the state of Qin invade our territory. Even if we die, we will resist the enemy.”

The soldiers shouted in unison, “don’t let the enemy invade our country!”

Hu Zhengtang’s heart suddenly filled with pride and said in a deep voice: “Your Majesty, it’s the honor of the last general to die in battle with your majesty today!”

Xu que glanced at him, slapped him on the shoulder with his backhand, and said earnestly: “Lao Hu, you’re good everywhere, but you’re too pessimistic. You feel like you’re going to lose before it starts. You can’t think so.”

Hu Zhengtang smiled bitterly twice and thought, do you still expect to win?

As you said yourself, there are more than three million people across the street… There are less than 600000 people here.

The dull drums sounded, and the rapid drums seemed to strike everyone’s heart.

The huge Qin troops came like a torrent. Even if the soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty were timid, they had to face it.

Among them, Xu que was the most prominent. He led the army to fight hard. For a time, he was in a stalemate with 3 million Qin soldiers.

Xuanyuan Wanrong stood on the wall, holding his hands together subconsciously.

“Empress, don’t worry, the emperor will be fine.” The deputy general on one side whispered.

“I’m not worried about him.” Xuanyuan Wanrong said quickly, saying the end, but he was involuntarily weak again. The eyes of Rushui looked under the city wall and showed her eyebrows slightly. Even if she pretended to be calm, she still couldn’t hide her inner worry. Now we are all mortals. If we die here, we will really die outside. Don’t lead the Qin army to the battlefield… Don’t lead the Qin army to kill you. However, with the advantage of a large number of soldiers, even if Xu’s martial arts were against the sky, it was impossible to defeat the other party on his own, and the war situation began to fall to one side uncontrollably. Like a huge stone mill, the army of the state of Qin pushed forward slowly and crushed the soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty in front into powder. In the face of the enemy’s powerful offensive, the soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty gradually became desperate from the high fighting spirit at the beginning, and then numb. They were completely subconsciously resisting. However, Xu que stared in a direction, as if waiting for something. The winner stood proudly on the chariot and said in a loud voice, “Xu Ke, as long as you are willing to surrender to me and kowtow to me, I can let you go.” Rao was so angry that the three corpse gods jumped violently. Ying Fangwu was still stunned by Xu’s performance, and it was difficult to hide his heart of cherishing talent Bring down your mother. I’ll cut off your head later and be a night pot! ” Xu que scolded without hesitation You… “Whew! A sound of breaking the sky suddenly sounded. In the distant sky, a black iron arrow pulled out its long tail and drilled into the clouds. That was the signal he had set before, which meant that the army he had trained for many years had surrounded the whole battlefield. Xu que suddenly brightened his eyes, turned his head and looked at yingfangwu across the air. A proud smile appeared at the corners of his mouth: “yingfangwu, you’re finished!” Then he took out a Zhuge crossbow from his arms and pulled the trigger towards the sky A cloud piercing arrow, thousands of troops and horses to meet! Come out, blast heaven to help millions of heavenly soldiers! ” PS: there are only dozens of monthly tickets this month, that is to say, there are only dozens of people chasing them???]

chapters.title: Chapter 1691
chapters.body:
Chapter 1691

Chapter 1691

C.1691

Whew!

The short black arrow darted into the sky like a swift and exploded at the highest point.

All the soldiers stopped involuntarily and looked at the brilliant fireworks in the sky.

What happened?

Why did anyone set off fireworks?

Why did you start celebrating in advance before you lost?

“Hey, it seems that your majesty put it?”

“What’s the situation? Why did your majesty suddenly set off fireworks to celebrate that we are going to destroy the country?”

“Is your majesty crazy?”

“No, what is that fried heaven Gang?”

At the same time, Ying Fangwu frowned and looked at the fireworks. His heart couldn’t help lifting up.

This Xu lack is really beyond common sense. God knows what this guy is doing.

However, a moment later, there was no movement. Ying Fangwu couldn’t help but relax and sneered: “hum, it seems that this guy is at his wit’s end and has nothing to do. Pass my order…”

Boom!

Suddenly, there was a dull noise in the distance. You could see the rolling smoke and dust gradually spreading here.

A moment later, a majestic iron cavalry appeared in the sight of the people. The leading Knight held a big flag with three wantonly publicized characters: “fried heaven Gang!”

“Well, what’s that?”

“God, where did this big team come from?”

“Look at the flag in their hands, fried heaven Gang! Are they the heavenly soldiers of the sky bombing gang that the monarch said? ”

“We are saved!”

Countless people have bright eyes and their faces are full of ecstasy and horror.

This army of 300000 people, wrapped in boundless power, came to the battlefield like a divine army.

The knight, headed by the leader, thrust the flag on the ground, facing Xu deficiency, raised his hand and shouted, “see sect leader!”

“See sect leader!”

The rest of the Knights roared in unison, and the momentum emitted by them directly dispersed the clouds in the sky, and the sun shrouded in an instant.

Everyone was stunned.

Your majesty, is there such a powerful army hidden?

Didn’t he grow vegetables all these years? Where did he get the army?!

Winning Fang Wu was also stupid at this time.

Where did the 300000 troops come from?

After a short pause, he regained his composure and said in a deep voice, “there are only 300000 more, which is simply vulnerable in front of the iron cavalry of Qin!”

Xu que laughed loudly and waved his long sword: “listen to the order of the Tianbing of the fried sky help! The whole army attacked! ”

“Yes!”

This terrible iron horse quickly adjusted the square array.

With a roar, the whole cavalry charged at the Qin soldiers!

Naturally, Qin Bing can’t admit defeat so easily. What if there is more than 300000?

They are the invincible soldiers of the state of Qin!

Only death, no surrender!

The two top armies in the world collided like two huge waves.

Several Qin soldiers surrounded a Tianbing of the bombers who had fallen from the war horse. They were very happy.

“This time we will do meritorious service!”

“Kill this man, and we can all rise to a military rank at least!”

“Let’s go together and share the credit!”

The three people rushed forward, and the long sabres in their hands were extremely sharp. The sharp Sabre Qi gushed out and gathered together, which was even comparable to the blow of the third grade master.

These three men are also well-known among the Qin soldiers. They practice the joint attack Sabre technique. Together, they can compete with the third grade martial arts.

With this move, they made great achievements in battle after battle.

“Die!” The three people roared.

“What?”

The three people are shocked. This person is the martial arts realm of the peak of Sanpin!

Before they recovered, the other party made another knife, and the three heads fell to the ground and drowned in the horse’s hooves.

On the other side, a general of the state of Qin reached the second level of martial arts, waved his long knife and rushed towards the enemy in front of him.

“Boy, I’m general Wei Wu of the state of Qin. Die!”

If you want to be a general of the state of Qin, you need at least the realm of three grades.

Wei Wu is one of the best. With the strength of a second-class Wufu, he fought on the battlefield and killed countless enemies.

However, the Tianbing of the tianbang group just waved a knife with one hand and easily split the general in half.

Similar scenes took place everywhere in the battlefield, almost forming a one-sided situation.

Bang Dang!

“These soldiers… The lowest accomplishments are all three grades!”

Ying Fang stood up at once. If the whole person was struck by lightning, there was no difference that the long knife at hand fell to the ground.

The army composed of 300000 martial artists is at least three grade, and there are even several one grade masters!

Just this army, a master can catch up with the existing number in Qin!

This army is terrible. It’s terrible!

In front of the soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty, the Qin soldiers were almost powerless to fight back in the face of the army composed of warriors, and were rushed to pieces in an instant.

At the beginning, Qin soldiers also tried their best to resist, trying to block the attack of the bombers with the advantage of battle array and number of people.

But after several rounds, the army formed by millions of Qin soldiers was almost completely scattered.

Even if Baiqi and other military gods command the battle, it is still difficult to recover the defeat.

The war is like the collapse of Mount Tai, which can not be stopped by manpower!

Half an hour later, the fighting continued.

But this time, it was not the soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty who were chased and chopped down, but the invincible army of the state of Qin who had swept Liuhe!

Everyone was shocked. Hu Zhengtang, who had been directing the battle, was filled with incredible emotions.

They actually did it… Not only were they not defeated, they even seemed to have a tendency to defeat the Qin soldiers!

“All officers and men, listen to the order! The whole army attacked and attacked the Qin soldiers! ”

With Hu Zhengtang’s order, the soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty immediately followed behind the Tianbing of the bombers and launched a final charge.

This became the last straw to overwhelm the camel, and the army of the Qin army collapsed!

The king of Qin couldn’t believe his eyes and shouted angrily, “stop them! You are the iron cavalry of the state of Qin. You are not allowed to fail! ”

Bai Qi, who was already black and blue, hurried to the scene, knelt down on one knee and said in a hurry, “Your Majesty, we have lost. Please retreat quickly!”

“My iron cavalry is invincible in the world. How can I lose!” The king of Qin was almost red eyed, and his reason was almost on the verge of collapse.

Bai Qi’s heart was bitter. Even if he used his arms like a God, the strength of the other party was too strong and unreasonable!

One charge killed hundreds of thousands of people. Qin soldiers had more than three million soldiers. It’s good, but there are only a few charges.

The most important thing in war is morale. Once a soldier is killed, he will lose.

“No! I didn’t lose! I can go to battle myself! ”

Winning Fang Wu doesn’t believe he will lose. He has been running around the world for so many years. He is the son of destiny. How can he lose to a small border country?

“Since you don’t go, leave your life!”

A frantic voice suddenly sounded. Xu que rushed into the battle like a sharp sword and rushed to the winning Fang Wu alone.

Shua!

There was no chance for Yingfang Wu to speak. Xu que waved a long sword and cut off the other party’s head.

The winner’s eyes were full of incredible expression until he died.

Bai Qi turned pale and knelt softly on the ground, as if he had been drained of his essence: “Your Majesty… Dead…”

The former soldier God had completely lost the idea of fighting at this time.

Xu Wei grabbed the head of the king of Qin, and his voice spread all over the battlefield: “the king of Qin is dead! Those who fall will not be killed! ”

The fighting Qin soldiers looked up and found that the king of Qin, whom they once respected, had only one head and a look of despair on his face.

When King Qin died, the spiritual pillar in their hearts completely collapsed!

Bang Dang!

The sound of swords falling to the ground sounded. There was the first soldier to surrender, followed by a large number of Qin soldiers kneeling to the ground.

Hu Zhengtang wiped his bloody face, looked around, was stunned, and then said with ecstasy: “we won… We won! The eastern Tang Dynasty is immortal! ”

“Dongtang is immortal!”

“We won! Your majesty is invincible! ”

On the battlefield, countless soldiers of the eastern Tang Dynasty were ecstatic and hugged each other.

On the wall, Xuanyuan Wanrong breathed a sigh, and a faint smile appeared at the corners of his mouth: “asshole… It seems that you are really a good emperor.”

The noisy celebrations resounded through the whole battlefield for a long time

This war completely established the position of the eastern Tang Dynasty as the overlord of Kyushu.

Although the king of Qin is dead, the state of Qin is, after all, a behemoth that once swept Liuhe. A big war can’t let the state of Qin fall.

However, Qin II, who was pushed to power by his ministers, seemed to be not very clear-minded. On the first day of his accession to the throne, he poisoned and vowed to avenge his father.

Then, despite the dissuasion of all officials, they carried out harsh tyranny throughout the country, conscription and tax increase, and the people were unable to make a living.

Those who have been destroyed and want to restore their country are ecstatic.

Well done, Qin II!

They were worried that they could not find the cause of the uprising. At this time, they just rose up and led the poor people to resist. For a time, there was a lot of chaos. The interior of the state of Qin was fragmented by the rebels. Qin II was in a mess. He couldn’t care to avenge his father again. When the civil strife in the state of Qin was the most serious, the state of Eastern Tang sent troops again and began to fight the world

chapters.title: Chapter 1692
chapters.body:
Chapter 1692

Chapter 1692

C.1692

This time, the eastern Tang Dynasty showed their strong military strength, which was more powerful than the former state of Qin.

Just because they have mastered a weapon beyond the times – fire gun!

Yes, after defeating the state of Qin, Xu Que’s forced value reached an unprecedented number, so he did not hesitate to exchange the gunpowder gun manufacturing drawings and finished products.

With these two things, and the Minister of the Ministry of industry led a large number of people to study day and night, we successfully made fire guns in batch.

With the fire gun in hand, the pace of conquering the world of the eastern Tang Dynasty was directly accelerated countless times, or it is not too much to take shape in one step.

Soon, the eastern Tang Dynasty conquered Kyushu with the advantage of destroying the withered and decadent.

With his unprecedented achievements, Xu que was regarded as the emperor of Kyushu and ascended the throne of Kyushu Communist Lord, and Xuanyuan Wanrong also became the holy queen of the mother instrument world.

From then on, Kyushu was free of war and began to enter a period of vigorous development.

Xu que carried out the policies previously implemented in the East Tang Dynasty to the world at one stroke, vigorously developed the economy, and made slogans such as “if you want to be rich, plant trees first”, “as long as the sows are well raised, you can’t run away with wealth”, “no matter how poor you are, you can’t get poor education”.

Under his leadership, the whole Kyushu is thriving, showing exuberant vitality, and even reaching the point where the people stay indoors at night.

Ten years later, Xu Ke’s reputation reached its peak in Kyushu.

In the past five hundred years, no one has ever reached the point of deficiency, and it is not too much to call it an eternal emperor.

The people sing praises for Xu que, and even some people who worship him blindly believe that Xu que is the reincarnation of an immortal in heaven. There is nothing in the world that he can’t do.

At this time, the immortal in the eyes of the world was sitting on the Dragon chair with an agitated face.

After ten years in this world as a mortal, even if Xu Ke is the unique sword God in the world, the traces of years are inevitably left on his face, and wrinkles quietly climb up the corners of his eyes.

“Your Majesty, this matter is very important. You can’t help but take it to heart.” Gong Qiwei looked sad and arched his hands. “You’re in your thirties. It’s time to leave your children…”

Xu que glanced at Xuanyuan Wanrong sitting on the Phoenix seat and couldn’t help turning his eyes.

Gong Qiwei is such a fool. I refused last time. I haven’t stopped for two fucking days. Come again?!

Why don’t you let me have a prince? You’re uncomfortable, aren’t you?

“OK, then ask the queen. Is this what I want to be born?” Xu Kuang waved his hand and looked like he was lack of interest.

Are you kidding? Have children.

He dares to promise that if he really dares to touch Xuanyuan Wanrong, she will castrate herself after she goes out!

Gong Qiwei finished the task, breathed a sigh of relief, and was about to retire when the six Shangshu’s eyes were like knives and swept over together, among which the Shangshu of the Ministry of war was the most violent.

It is no secret that Xu Ke became a sword God, but his strength is simply bizarre. The Shangshu of the Ministry of war has long wanted to study it.

But he was worried that if he made this request, he would be hacked to death by Xu Duan’s sword, so he decided on the prince.

As for where the prince comes from, it’s hard for the emperor.

In addition to him, the other several Shangshu have their own ideas more or less, so they are so positive, including the ministers.

Of course, Yanguan’s group of old people are mainly idle. Xu is too wise and powerful. They have to start from this aspect. After all, they still have to finish the work.

Gong Qiwei felt the look like a knife behind him. He wanted to kill himself in the hall. Before he died, he shouted: you forced me to death!

At this time, Xuanyuan Wanrong, who had almost no sense of existence, suddenly said, “the prince can’t be delayed. It’s not like choosing a concubine for the emperor.”

Xu Xu sat up with his eyes shining.

How about choosing a concubine!

I don’t have to face Xuanyuan Wanrong’s cold face every day!

WOW!

However, the ministers were suddenly agitated at this time, causing an uproar.

“No!”

“Empress, don’t choose a concubine!”

“Since the founding of the people’s Republic of China, the eastern Tang Dynasty has pursued monogamy, and the selection of imperial concubines is contrary to etiquette and law!”

“If the emperor is so, the people will follow suit. Where is human relations! What is the reason! ”

Xu que: ”

And that?

Looking at a group of Ministers who were dying, Xu Ke was very puzzled.

If I understand correctly, are we still in the feudal dynasty?

Is this the beginning of monogamy?

I don’t know if your tradition is still open

“Your Majesty, what do you think?” Xuanyuan Wanrong suddenly opened his mouth and gave him a meaningful look. Xu que suddenly took a puff from the corner of his mouth. I just kicked the ball, and you kicked it back to me? Ben forced Saint not to take your broken ball Since the empress can’t make up her mind, let’s discuss it later! Retreat. ” Xu que put down a word and got up without hesitation and retreated. However, it did not end like this. Naturally, choosing a concubine is not enough. We can only find a way to convince Xu Duan. From this day on, the speech officials and ministers began to follow Xu Xu around the clock Your majesty, do you think the cloud in the sky looks like a newborn baby? ” No, get out. ” Your majesty, I heard that a nest of tigers has appeared in the countryside recently. The whole family is happy. Shall we go and have a look? ” Laozi, this is the imperial city. Where the fuck did the tiger come from? ” Your majesty, if you don’t have a prince! Wei Chen jumped down from here! ” Somebody, get the coffin ready for Zhang Yanguan. “…” Annoyed by the crowd, Xu que had to tell the truth: “it’s not that I don’t want to, it’s the queen who won’t let me!” The queen won’t let you? Everyone looked at each other. What’s the matter? Gong Qiwei, as Xu Ke’s confidant, was once again pushed out as the head of injustice Your majesty… You said the empress wouldn’t let… What’s the specific way? ” You’re talking nonsense. Why don’t you let me? ” Xu kubai glanced at him, thinking that the big guys are adults and need to speak so vaguely, “it’s literally. I haven’t had an intimate relationship with Xuanyuan Wanrong until now. It’s straightforward enough!” If the ministers were struck by lightning, they were all stunned on the spot. The emperor and the empress have never! This… What’s the reason? Where is human relations? What bad news of the eastern Tang Dynasty No, your majesty? ” Adhering to the principle of bold assumptions, Gong Qiwei raised a reasonable question. Xu que stared round and said angrily, “why not? Who can’t, where can’t, say such words is responsible, do you know? I’m the Lord of Kyushu now. You don’t want it anymore, do you? ” With that, Xu kuyue thought more and more angry. I’m a Kyushu saint, but I’m still a virgin without a * *? Shit, is there any justice? After Xu lacked left, the people gathered together to discuss You say, is what the emperor said true or false? ” It should be true. ” Someone hesitated What if the emperor can’t? You haven’t tried! ” The imperial doctor can use my personality to guarantee that the emperor is absolutely normal. ” In that case… What the emperor said really means that the queen doesn’t allow it… “But it’s very normal for couples to have the same room. Why doesn’t the queen allow it?” Is it because the queen is afraid? ” The ministers were immediately confused and didn’t know what to do. Finally, the imperial doctor put forward a way: “I have a good prescription that can stimulate human function and make them have lust. At that time, only your majesty and the queen need to live in the same room, and it will be natural…” as soon as this statement came out, the people looked at the imperial doctor with shocked eyes. I didn’t expect that you, an old man, would still do this! It’s a pity to be a doctor The old minister is willing to dispense medicine boldly for the continuation of the East Tang Dynasty! ” That old man is also willing to take medicine for the continuation of the imperial family of the eastern Tang Dynasty! ” Just do it. A group of people rushed to the imperial dining room and put the medicine in the evening meal that night. Even in the evening, these old people bought the bodyguard and ran to the corner to listen. After they were sure there was nothing wrong, they left. The next day, the ministers received the news. Today, the emperor is ill and will not go to court

chapters.title: Chapter 1693
chapters.body:
Chapter 1693

Chapter 1693

C.1693

In the twinkling of an eye, six years have passed.

Five years ago, Xuanyuan Wanrong gave birth to a son. The people all over the world were ecstatic and the courtiers were a sensation. A seven-day banquet was held.

Today is just the time for the ceremony and banquet, and it is also the birthday of Xu Ke’s son.

In the imperial garden, Xu Weizheng plays with a little boy.

Although the little boy is only a few years old, he has a shadow of Xu deficiency from his appearance.

Xuanyuan Wanrong sat at the stone table and looked at their backs. A faint smile appeared subconsciously at the corners of his mouth.

However, when Xu lacked eyes, she resumed her expressionless indifference again.

Seeing this, Xu que couldn’t help sighing.

They have been here for more than ten years. Even under the bad idea of the old doctor, they had a relationship involuntarily and had a child, but Xuanyuan Wanrong still had this cold attitude.

Holding the child, Xu que went to Xuanyuan Wanrong and stretched out his right hand to her: “let’s go, empress. The banquet will begin soon.”

Xuanyuan Wanrong looked slightly stunned. Looking up, the sun just fell behind Xu Xu, and a hazy halo appeared around him.

After hesitating for a moment, she gently put her hand on it.

Between the fingers, the years are in a hurry.

In the twinkling of an eye, decades have passed.

Rao Shixu Ke has made countless changes in this world, but it can’t change the fact that Xuanyuan Wanrong and he are mortals after all.

In the palace, Xu que was lying on the hospital bed, old and wrinkled.

On his side is Xuanyuan Wanrong, who is also old and no longer young.

In front of them, a group of Ministers knelt.

There was also a young man who looked like Xu Ke and Xuanyuan Wanrong. He knelt in front of the Dragon couch and looked sad.

“Shit, people in this world are so short-lived… I’m a top expert, and I can only live for more than 50 years…” Xu Wei scolded weakly.

Xuanyuan Wanrong was still calm and said softly, “why, do you still want to stay in this world?”

“That’s not… It’s mainly the hot pot taste I just developed. I haven’t tried it yet. Who, go to the imperial dining room and ask them to bring me a hot pot.” Xu que instructs a maid nearby to say.

Hearing the speech, the maid quickly got up and ran out of the house.

Just after two steps, there was a sudden “bang Dang” sound behind her. The maid’s footsteps stiffened and slowly turned around. She only saw her missing hand hanging by the bed.

Xuanyuan Wanrong, who was on one side, had also closed his eyes and gently put one hand on Xu Ke. They were silent.

The young man’s face was full of sadness, and Zhou Qun Chen was also crying.

“Father! Mother! ”

“Your majesty!”

On this day, Kyushu mourned for the funeral of the emperor.

Whoosh!

With a flash of white light, the picture in front of them was like a broken mirror, just a trance, and they returned to the ancient city again.

Standing still for a long time, they slowly opened their eyes.

The moment they opened their eyes, they were full of vicissitudes, even with a confused look. It was not until they saw everything around them that they gradually returned to Qingming.

Buddhism has a cloud. The world of mortals is just a dream. Who knows the big dream first.

In a hurry for decades, it’s just a fantasy.

Xu Ke was still in a trance at this time. Although he retained his memory, he really spent decades in the environment.

Looking at the past few decades, it can be described as ups and downs. It rose as the monarch of a weak country, experienced ups and downs, and finally became the emperor of Kyushu.

This seemingly long, but extremely short mortal life in the eyes of Xiuxian people makes Xu Ke’s heart more profound.

Now, after breaking the illusion and waking up from a dream, a burst of unspeakable sadness surged from the bottom of my heart.

“Big dream floating, such a brilliant life is just a dream, what is my life?”

Xu Ke had this idea for the first time. Although he knew that it was the sequelae of just getting out of the illusion, he still couldn’t take off some bags.

Just as he was sinking deeper and deeper in this complex emotion, it was Xuanyuan Wanrong’s voice that woke him up.

“You’re right. You can leave when you die.”

Xuanyuan Wanrong looked as usual, as if his life over the past few decades was really a dream. “The inheritance of ancient Buddha is really extraordinary. Now you have passed the customs, go and accept the inheritance.”

Xu que looked up and down at Xuanyuan Wanrong strangely, and glanced at the key place from time to time.

In other words… This woman seems to have given birth to a son in the dreamland?

Will there be any changes to the body?

Just as Xu que was filled with regret, Xuanyuan Wanrong flashed a bright red on his face that was not easy to be noticed, and said coldly, “it’s over. I’ll continue to look for something that can relieve Taiyi’s heavenly book. You can do it yourself.” With that, the whole body changed and disappeared in place Alas, no… “Seeing Xuanyuan Wanrong disappear, Xu kupo sighed with regret I also want to ask you if your body has changed after giving birth to a child… This illusion should have no impact on your body. ” Somewhere in the desert, Xuanyuan Wanrong’s body gradually emerged. She looked back at the ancient city, which had become very small. A blush sprang up on her cheeks involuntarily, and her tender little hands clenched slightly This bastard… Dare to look at me like this when they come out. ” With her accomplishments, the dreamland life of just a few decades will not be greatly disturbed, but her experience in the East Tang country still inevitably affected her mind. Even she didn’t realize it. The reason why she ran so fast was that there was a crack in the layer of solid ice in her heart. The attitude towards Xu Xu also changed imperceptibly. A moment later, Xuanyuan Wanrong’s look returned to calm and continued to move towards the depths of the desert. On the other side, Xu que was standing in place, looking at everyone’s dreamland with great interest Hey, that’s it. Beat this dead dog so hard that he always thinks about pitching me! ” Yes, and this wicked old man, clean him up several times! ” After watching it for a while, I determined that Su Yunlan and others were OK. It was estimated that they would be able to get rid of the phantom in a while, so I put down my heart and began to think about another problem. Where is the inheritance of ancient Buddha? I have passed the four levels. According to this situation, the inheritance test should be almost over. But there are so many people left. Can we share the inheritance of ancient Buddha equally Dang! ” Dang! ” Dang! ” Just when he was puzzled, the bell that had appeared in the previous levels sounded again…….

chapters.title: Chapter 1694
chapters.body:
Chapter 1694

Chapter 1694

C.1694

Xu lacked an exciting spirit. This time the bell didn’t ring out of thin air, but came from the front.

He was shaking and confirmed the progress of the people in the dreamland. Then he walked in the direction of the bell.

Walking in the dark, there is no light, all guided by the bell.

I don’t know how long I’ve been walking. Suddenly there’s a touch of light in front of me, and Xu que subconsciously frowns.

As he approached, the light became stronger and stronger. Xu que gradually adapted to the light of this intensity and saw the scene ahead.

I saw a slowly rotating light curtain, suspended in the dark.

Through the light curtain, you can vaguely see a giant Buddha standing behind the light curtain, but you can’t see his face clearly.

“Ha ha! I’m coming! ”

Xu que laughed twice and went straight into the past.

Bang!

The next second, Xu que felt as if he had been equipped with a very hard iron wall. Even with his current cultivation, he felt dizzy.

“Hiss… NIMA’s, what’s the situation?”

Xu que rubbed his head and looked up inexplicably. He found that a lotus was slowly floating on the light curtain.

One of the petals is emitting a strong golden light, while the other petals are very dim.

He tried several more times and found that no matter what means he used, he couldn’t break in.

“Really, I’ve seen a ghost… Do you want all the petals to light up?” Thinking of the second level, Xu Ke decided to try.

When he stepped back two steps, the petals that originally emitted golden light suddenly darkened for a minute.

Back again, dark again.

Keep retreating. It’s darker.

As he ran quickly forward, the light on the petals brightened up quickly.

“That’s true. You need all the petals to light up!”

Xu Ke was suddenly dumbfounded. He didn’t expect this to happen.

In other words, if you want to go in, you have to wait for others to break through the illusion, and then come to the light curtain to help light up the whole lotus.

Otherwise, you can’t get in by yourself.

“No, never wait for them to come out!”

Xu Ke soon shook his head and denied this method.

Other people don’t say that if you let two immoral goods, er Gouzi and Duan Jiude, go in, I’m afraid I’ll get a lot less benefits.

Rather than let this sacred Buddhist realm be harmed by these two immoral goods, it’s better to inherit all the inheritance into your own hands.

After all, I was forced to be a sage and righteous little gentleman. I was a righteous gentleman. It was natural for the ancient Buddha to pass on to me.

Yes, that’s it!

But now I’m alone. I can’t count them at all

Xu que frowned and thought, and suddenly thought of something.

Emmm has a part of herself!

“But it has to be tested. Try it. If it can be done, I’ll teach Yunlan them when I get the inheritance of the ancient Buddha.”

Xu que took it for granted to remove two dogs and Duan Jiude.

I’m kidding. I don’t know how many benefits these two dogs have taken behind their backs. Especially in Er Gouzi’s stomach, there are so many good things that they drool. It’s good not to let him bleed!

He did what he said, and Xu que turned into a separate body without saying a word.

This separation is as like as two peas, but no difference except strength.

At the moment when the separation appeared, the petals of the lotus lit up again.

“Yes!”

For a moment, all the petals lit up a bright golden light, and the whole lotus was like a real Buddhist pure lotus, emitting a sacred brilliance.

Boom!

At the same time, the whole light screen began to spread around, turned into countless streamers like fireflies, and disappeared into the darkness.

Xu que laughed and walked into the entrance.

Just step by step, the scene in front of us has changed greatly.

I am at the bottom of a towering Buddhist temple. Looking up, I see golden light, auspicious clouds and flying cranes, a sacred scene.

The Buddhist temple is surprisingly large. Xu Ke is like a tiny mole ant looking up at the gods and Buddhas.

In front of him was a long step. Xu lacked a step to step on it, and the boundless sound of Buddha echoed in his ears.

“There are thousands of kinds in the world, but the world of mortals is long. When you enter my Buddha, all are dust…”

However, Xu que didn’t pay any attention to them at all. He ran directly and climbed up the steps, and soon came to the highest place.

Stepping on the last step, the tall and majestic Buddha appeared in front of us.

In front of the scene, Rao is Xu Ke, who is used to seeing the big audience, and he can’t help being surprised.

“Sleeping trough… It’s too big…”

In front of me was a broad and boundless hall. At the top of the hall, I sat cross legged on this magnificent Buddha. The Giant Buddha has a peaceful face and exudes calming Buddha light all over, while on both sides of him, there are 108 virtual shadows of golden Arhats suspended. It can be seen that these Arhats are not real people, but the remnant images left by those powerful beings countless years ago. However, we can see that this place was once strong. Even after so many years, the image of these Arhats still hasn’t dispersed Someone…… “at this moment, the Buddha’s closed eyes slowly opened. When he was about to open his mouth, he was suddenly stunned. Below him, only a handsome man with evil spirit in his eyes stood. Strange, why is there only one person? The ancient Buddha is a little confused. Although he is only a soul division here and is only responsible for providing inheritance, it will disappear after inheritance, but he has inherited the memory of the ancient Buddha in the end. He clearly remembers that when the ancient Buddha was left for inheritance, the number of people entering was specially set. One is to screen out suitable inheritors. The other is to worry that if only one inheritor is passed on, in case the inheritor hangs up, the ancient Buddha inheritance will really have no roots. But the scene in front of him was obviously inconsistent with the previous settings… Seeing that the ancient Buddha didn’t speak for a long time, Xu lacked some impatience: “are you the ancient Buddha? Isn’t there any inheritance? Give it quickly! I’m still waiting to go out and preach the Buddhist scriptures and universal life! ” Shit, if you grind haw again, they should break through the illusion! The ancient Buddha was not in a hurry. After a moment of silence, he slowly said, “lucky people… Why are you the only one here? There should have been 18 people here…” the inheritance of 18 people! Xu Xu’s heart suddenly blossomed with joy. If he could get the inheritance of 18 people, he should be able to supplement his own righteous Qi seal magic Sutra, right Well, to tell you the truth, we happen to be eighteen. ” Xu que looked positive and shouted, “come out and fry the eighteen Arhats of tianbang!” The voice fell, and seventeen figures appeared around the body in an instant. Gufo: “…” do you think I’m stupid? This is clearly your part

chapters.title: Chapter 1695
chapters.body:
Chapter 1695

Chapter 1695

C.1695

One person and one Buddha look at each other in the magnificent and sacred Buddha Hall.

Xu Fuxing stared at the ancient Buddha, waiting to accept the inheritance, leave the Buddhist realm and break through the realm.

The ancient Buddha always kept his kind face and good purpose without saying a word.

For a long time, Xu que finally couldn’t help: “what are you looking at?”

“Look at you… Well, monks don’t lie. Amitabha.” The ancient Buddha recited a Buddhist name and said gently, “this predestined person, although my Buddha is generous, my Buddha heart is pure and can see through all the dharmas in the world.”

The implication is that you don’t want to fool me. I’ve seen that you are a separation method.

Xu Ke was stunned and thought that the dead bald donkey was really hard to deceive.

But it’s not a big problem. It’s not an ordinary separation.

Since his skill was melted, the separated body was no longer like before. It was a pile of silver gun wax heads, which was useless.

Once the separation technique was combined with 3000 thunder illusions, and then the summoned separation has most of Xu Ke’s strength.

However, these separations can only exist for one hour, and other aspects are almost perfect.

In the past, with dozens of separate bodies and systematic retaliation mechanism, Xu que hanged two fairy kings. At that time, his cultivation was not as good as it is now.

Now he has made great progress in cultivation, and the created separation is naturally more powerful.

“Well, ancient Buddha, to tell you the truth, these 17 good brothers are my sworn brothers, Jin Lan. We are brothers and sisters. We once studied in Shaolin Temple. Do you know Shaolin Temple? It doesn’t matter if we don’t know. At that time, we were called eighteen Arhats in Shaolin Temple. It can be seen that all of us were devoted to the Buddha! ”

Xu que began to talk nonsense directly. Relying on the ancient Buddha, he didn’t know how many years he had not been born, thinking of ways to deceive.

The ancient Buddha smiled and said nothing.

Is this guy really stupid?

“This predestined person, since you said that seventeen are your good brothers, I think you should pass the test together.”

The ancient Buddha said slowly, “in that case, I won’t embarrass you, just show your understanding of the secret Dharma.”

What he said was the test in the lotus pond at the second level.

After the lotus pond test, you can enter the next level after understanding ten secret arts.

However, any one of the secret dharmas in the lotus pond is the Mahayana secret Dharma of Buddhism, which is incomparably advanced.

Even in the realm of fairy king, you can only understand ten gates at most. If you do more, you will lack divine soul power, leading to exhaustion and death.

The test of that level is not only the Dharma understanding, but also the mind, so as to see whether the experimenter can control his original mind without greed and contention.

It means that only this person can understand the Dharma successfully before he comes to the ten Dharma gates.

Thinking of this, the smile on the ancient Buddha’s face is strong.

Ben fo has been here for thousands of years. Can you fool me?

It’s wishful thinking!

Hearing the request of the ancient Buddha, Xu Shixian was stunned and looked embarrassed: “reveal the secret method… It’s a little difficult.”

“If it’s inconvenient to reveal, benefactor, you can wait while the rest of the experimenters enter here, and you can get inheritance.” The ancient Buddha whispered, feeling that he had given face.

He just wanted him to wait here without driving him out immediately, which fully reflects the noble character of our Buddha’s benevolence.

“I don’t know what kinds of secrets you want to see?” Xu que suddenly asked.

“Now that the benefactor has decided, it’s convenient to wait… Eh? What did you say? ” The ancient Buddha was stunned immediately. Rao shiai had been in his heart for many years, and there were some waves in his heart.

Xu que asked: “to tell you the truth, our 18 brothers have understood all the secrets of the second level, so we don’t know what kind of ancient Buddha you want to see?”

Ancient Buddha: ”

The ancient Buddha had only one idea in his mind.

That’s the tens of thousands of Buddhist secret dharmas he specially screened out at that time. Let alone all the enlightenment, even if he can understand more than ten, he can already be regarded as having a high understanding of Buddhism.

If you can understand 50 schools, you are a Buddhist genius. Any Buddhist school will be treated as a Buddha.

If you can understand more than 100, that’s great. It can be called a living Buddha alive. It will be offered directly as the hope of a Buddhist.

Of course, the living Buddha here does not mean that he is a living Buddha, but has the potential to become a living Buddha.

But there is no such person… No, there is no such person.

Now you tell me that your 18 brothers have understood all the secrets?

Really when Ben fo doesn’t understand the market?

“In that case, you can show it.” The ancient Buddha pondered for a moment and said.

He wants to see what the young man is going to fart today.

Xu nodded, turned and looked at the seventeen separated bodies. His voice was loud and said, “brothers, show the ancient Buddha our strength!”

Shua! As soon as the voice fell, the 17 figures raised their hands and lifted their black robes. According to the previous habit, all the figures summoned agreed to wear black robes and embroider the words of fried heaven Sect on their backs. At this time, as soon as the black robe was taken off, their faces were immediately revealed. I saw the 17 people, everyone’s head was smooth, and the bare upper body was golden, shining incomparably in the light of the Buddha. The strong muscles are dark gold, especially smooth, and there is a fag temperament in the invisible. Ancient Buddha: “!” What the hell? Let you show the secret, not let you run naked. Hey! This is the holy land of Buddhism! Running naked in public is immoral and harmful to the outlook Come on, show! ” Xu que gave a low roar and took the lead in showing the secret method. The virtual shadow of a big golden bird emerged behind him, its wings waved, and the sound of its long song rang through the temple. Impressively, it is the FA Xiang of the golden winged ROC Drink! ” The split on one side also whispered, and a big green bird appeared. Then another terrible giant elephant appeared. One after another, the most terrible Buddhist dharma appeared one after another behind the 18 people Peacock king! Show yourself! ” to listen attentively! Show yourself! ” Green lion! Manifest! “”… ” Xu Ke separated from his 17 Arhats and successively summoned hundreds of Buddhist dharma images. The appearance of each Dharma image represents a kind of Buddhist secret Dharma. The most outrageous thing is that they are not a total of hundreds, but almost everyone has hundreds of dharmas. Their number is so large that they can even vaguely fill this magnificent hall. The ancient Buddha is stupid. This… What’s the situation? How can anyone understand so many Dharma signs? It’s unscientific. No one can understand so many secrets except yourself. Thinking of this, the ancient Buddha suddenly became vigilant. This guy should not be an old opponent in the past. After reincarnation, he will come to do his own business

chapters.title: Chapter 1696
chapters.body:
Chapter 1696

Chapter 1696

C.1696

“Good! Very good, that’s it! ”

“Hey, what about you? Can you use some strength!”

“We are now showing the momentum of the fried Tiangang, which represents the face of the fried Tiangang. Everyone should be serious and don’t let the ancient Buddha flat!”

In order to win more trust in the ancient Buddha, Xu que even began to command in a serious manner, pointing out the Dharma phase revealed by one of them from time to time.

The half asleep and half awake eyes of the ancient Buddha were shaking wildly at this time, as if they were startled.

Seeing a ghost, I don’t think I’ve been sleeping too long and have hallucinations?

So many people have understood the secret method?

And it seems that there are thousands of secrets, not to mention hundreds of them, not to mention these guys haven’t shown them yet.

In their time, these people have long been offered as Buddhas, okay!

At this time, he has completely eliminated the idea of his old opponent.

Even those enemies in those years can count as one. Don’t want to understand so many secrets!

“You… How can you understand so many secrets?” The ancient Buddha couldn’t help asking.

He really couldn’t figure out whether these 18 people were really the legendary genius?

Do you need only one look to understand the secret Dharma?

Xu que heard the speech, looked solemn and said, “yes, we are geniuses!”

Ancient Buddha: ”

Ancient Buddha: “… No.”

Xu Xu sighed, “your understanding is not very good.”

What the fuck is none of my business?

Even if another person is here, he will still doubt whether life is good or not!

“Let’s just say that we have understood the secret Dharma, and we have understood it according to your requirements. Do you still want to deny the inheritance?” Xu que immediately narrowed his eyes.

He is ready. If he doesn’t inherit the ancient Buddha, he will grab it… Oh, no, further show his sincerity.

We are the eighteen golden Arhats of the fried heaven Gang, the noble followers of our Buddha. How can we say rob?

The ancient Buddha heard the speech, closed his eyes and began to think.

Normally, Xu Ke is the only one here. He shouldn’t give the secret Dharma.

The other 17 people, even if the ancient Buddha is just a soul separation, can see that it is a fucking body separation at all.

But it’s strange at this point. Even in their time, the separation created by separation was a kind of thing that had no strength and could only pretend.

However, the secret method revealed by these people just now is enough to prove that each of them has considerable strength and understanding, which makes no sense. It is completely contrary to the essence of separation.

As for you, is there anyone who can sacrifice and refine a body with strength?

Naturally, there are some methods, such as Tao body, which can also get a strong body that is slightly weaker than itself, but there is only one!

Who the fuck will take out 18 directly like this boy, and their strength is almost the same as themselves.

Even if you can’t do it yourself, okay!

If there were such a skill, it would have unified xianyuanzhou for a long time. Why should we leave it here.

A fight is a crowd of dozens of people. Who can stand it?

After eliminating all the impossibilities, the only thing left, even if it is incredible, is the truth.

“So, are you really the eighteen Arhats of the fried heaven Gang?” The ancient Buddha opened his eyes again and asked in a slow voice.

Xu que was righteous, his face was not red and his heart did not jump: “that’s right!”

“Your gang is really full of talents. It seems that my Buddhism is expected to be prosperous…”

With a long sigh, the ancient Buddha put his hands together, and his body was as bright as a real Buddha.

“Now that you have met the standards, I will pass it on to you. I hope you can preach my Buddhist teachings and carry forward the glory of Buddhism after you go out.”

The voice fell, and the virtual shadow of the golden Arhats around seemed to wake up. He put his hands together and recited in unison, “Amitabha.”

Xu was stunned, and his heart blossomed with joy.

Unexpectedly, the ancient Buddha is so simple!

Believe any nonsense. It’s easy to cheat!

If everyone in xianyuanzhou is as simple and simple as this ancient Buddha, it must be a perfect heaven and earth!

“Thank you, Buddha.”

Xu Kuang put his hands together and put on a dignified and solemn look. After all, the play should be done to the end.

The rich Buddha light on the ancient Buddha began to spread around, and every arhat virtual shadow exposed turned into a bright golden light and integrated into it.

When the last arhat shadow disappeared, the sound of chanting Buddha in the hall was strong to the extreme. Xu que only felt a buzzing sound in his mind. It seemed that a great voice went directly into his brain. You were reciting the Buddhist realm My Buddha is merciful! ” With a powerful Buddhist voice, all the Buddha light fell from the sky, just like a river pouring back into the Xu deficient body. In an instant, powerful power bloomed in his body. Xu que vaguely saw a Jingshi green lotus blooming slowly, emitting endless brilliance Ding! Congratulations to the host “Xu Ke” for his ability to inherit the ancient Buddha! ” Whether to integrate the inheritance of ancient Buddha? After fusion, you will unseal the “Zheng Qi Feng Mo Jing” to the third level. ” When hearing this prompt, Xu was stunned and immediately ecstatic. Lying trough, this can be unsealed! It’s no wonder that more than 20000 secret dharmas collected before can’t be unsealed. The feelings are poor. The inheritance of the ancient Buddha. In fact, it can also be understood that the previous secret methods are equal to plug-ins. With the inheritance of ancient Buddha, they can be directly connected to an operating system, which is equal to making up the bad part of the module, and naturally they can be unsealed Fusion! Give it all to me! ” Xu Wei agreed without hesitation! This time I really made a lot of money Ding! Fusion begins! Progress 1%… Progress 2%… Progress 3%… “With the continuous improvement of the progress bar, Xu Ke can obviously feel that his feelings about Buddhism and Taoism are being integrated and melted. From the previous independence, it began to form a whole. When the final integration is completed, it is the time when you have completed the promotion of your Zhengqi seal magic Sutra! I don’t know how long it took, the Buddha’s light gradually faded, the inheritance finally came to an end, and the integration gradually came to an end. When the last ray of Buddha light disappeared, Xu Kui fiercely opened his eyes. A Jingshi Golden Lotus slowly rotated in his eyes and then disappeared. The ancient Buddha also closed his eyes and fell asleep again: “the inheritance is over, benefactor can leave…” seeing this, Xu Ke paced to the ancient Buddha and patted the huge Buddha body Ancient Buddha? Are you asleep? Buddha? Big bald head? “A bald donkey?” I really fell asleep! Xu lacked a sinister smile at the corner of his mouth: “it’s all here. It’s a waste of time not to leave something…” he said, exchanged a stone tablet from the system and began to knock it. A moment later, the stone tablet took shape and stood on the side of the ancient Buddha, with a line of large characters with dragons and Phoenix dancing on it The ancient Buddha said: “fried heaven Gang cow force!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1697
chapters.body:
Chapter 1697

Chapter 1697

C.1697

“Well… That’s perfect.”

Xu Wei nodded with satisfaction. “I’ll just say. No wonder I didn’t feel right just now. How can I blow up the sky without me in such a magnificent place?”

With this stone tablet, the holy land of Buddhism is worthy of its reputation!

Xu que is searching the ancient temple to see if there are other benefits.

After all, I have a system to add myself. I must be faster than everyone. Others should still be lost in the dreamland

“Benefactor, I really have a relationship with Buddha. I can break through the dreamland so quickly and come here.”

Before Xu Ke could react, he saw a young man wearing a monk’s banner climb the steps, fold his hands and bow to him.

Impressively, he was the little light bulb monk who was second only to himself in the second level.

“….” Xu was stunned.

Is that too fast?

However, it seems normal. No matter what people say, they are also orthodox disciples of Buddhism. Judging from the speed of breaking through the customs before, the understanding of Buddhism is naturally very high.

“Little light bulb, you have good qualifications!”

Xu que walked forward with a smile and raised his hand to touch his bare head, but he was deflected by the small light bulb.

He folded his hands and read the Buddha’s name: “Amitabha, benefactor, the monk’s head can’t be touched.”

“Nun can touch it. Why can’t I touch it?” Xu lacked a stare and suddenly remembered something, “by the way, how did you get in?”

The little bulb showed a puzzled look: “after passing through the dreamland, all the way forward, there is an entrance. The little monk stepped into it and came here. Didn’t benefactor come in like this?”

“Er… Of course, it’s like this. It’s just to see if you cheat and come in from other places.” Xu que touched his head and said with a laugh.

It seems that after I came in, the light curtain at the entrance of the passage has disappeared.

Fortunately, I didn’t slip my tongue just now, otherwise I would let the little light bulb know that I came in first.

Hearing Xu Que’s words, xiaobulu smiled helplessly: “Amitabha, my Buddha has a cloud. Monks don’t lie. Even if my cultivation is not high, I don’t dare to lie.”

“If you don’t lie, it means you are a real Buddhist child. I like you very much!”

The two talked for a while, and the others entered here one after another.

Most people freeze as soon as they enter here.

“God… Is this the Leiyin temple where the legendary ancient Buddha is located?”

“It’s too big… Compared with Qingzhou where we are, it’s even broader by countless times.”

“The rich Buddhist flavor must be the inheritance of ancient Buddha! Let’s go up! ”

“Yes, yes, go up quickly, so as not to be preempted by others!”

When they came to the main hall, they were shocked by the magnificent and brilliant landscape here again.

Such a huge ancient Buddha, even the fairy king here, is less than one tenth as big as the other.

Just the Buddhist breath from the ancient Buddha gave them an idea of local conversion.

A few people with weak cultivation have even begun to recite the Buddha’s name silently. Only those fairy kings can forcibly resist the assimilation here.

As for Xu Ke, it is purely because he has learned all the Buddhist secrets. He is already half a Buddhist child, and naturally will not feel assimilated.

Everyone looked surprised.

“The so-called true Buddha is located in the Buddha land for three thousand miles, that’s it!”

“Too powerful! If I get inheritance, I will be able to break through the realm of xianzun! ”

“Hum, let’s see who found it first!”

Almost in an instant, the crowd dispersed and began to look for the inheritance of ancient Buddha.

“Xu que!”

A surprise voice suddenly sounded.

Xu Ke looked back and the aroma came. A soft body rushed into her arms. It was su Yunlan.

Behind her was lady ya, Su linger and others.

The key is that Su Xiaoqi and situ Haitang also came out. Obviously, they also passed the previous level safely.

“Long time no see, general situ!” Xu que looked at situ Haitang and said with a smile.

“Willing to appear? Remember us? ” Situ Haitang gave Xu a white look and complained that Xu hadn’t come for so long.

“It’s not easy for me to come to this world, but I’m relieved to see that you’re all right.” Xu Kuanshan smiled.

“We have sister xiaorou to protect us. How can something happen.” At this time, Su Xiaoqi suddenly shouted.

Su ling’er immediately glanced away and gently scolded, “Xiao Qi!”

“Ah… Sorry, I’m just quick to say…”

Su Xiaoqi was so reminded that he immediately knew he had said the wrong thing and hurriedly withdrew.

Xu Xu knows that they are afraid to ask about xiaorou. After all, xiaorou seems to have forgotten her memories and become the Yurou fairy of Tianmen It’s all right. I already know about the situation. ” Xu Wei comforted softly, “believe me, I can bring xiaorou back soon, and then everyone can be reunited.” The women nodded hard, and they never had any doubt about what Xu lacked said. Although he likes to pretend to be forced, and he is also crafty, he has never broken his promise in dealing with his women and always does what he says Wait… Let’s get out of here and wait until we get out! ” Xu que saw Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi running over from a distance. His face suddenly changed. He quickly pulled up the girls and wanted to go. Unfortunately, his action is still a step slow Look! Brother Ke is here! ” The second dog roared, and the speed suddenly became faster. He turned into a remnant shadow, rushed to Xu Duan’s face, and said with a flattering smile, “brother Duan, we finally found you! You don’t know that in order to find you, God has worked hard. It’s hard to describe sacrificing his life and forgetting to die! ” Duan Jiude followed him with a straight face and said, “yes, I’ve worked hard too. I don’t hesitate to spend my life to calculate that you’re here!” Xu que sneered, “Oh, really? Then why didn’t you come to me from the beginning? ” Ah, this… This is not to believe that you can win the day. It must be a big plan to come alone for fear of disturbing your layout. ” A man and a dog look at each other and speak in the same voice. They are too lazy to take advantage of their own goods. They must be too lazy to take advantage of their own goods All right, don’t talk nonsense. Such a good thing inherited by the ancient Buddha is here. Go find it quickly! ” Xu Wei immediately wanted to order the two pits of goods, “I’m going out to catch up with my wives.” Ah, this… Isn’t very good. ” It’s good. How can we enjoy it alone? ” As they spoke, they ran quickly around for fear that it would be no good if they went slowly Go, go! ” Seeing this, Xu que hurriedly pulled Su Yunlan and others to run. Before he ran out for two steps, he heard the surprised voice of two dogs: “lying in the trough! Brother Kuang, look, there’s a stone tablet here, which says “fried heaven help cow force!” fuck! Er Gouzi, you will die if you shout later

chapters.title: Chapter 1698
chapters.body:
Chapter 1698

Chapter 1698

C.1698

Xu que couldn’t help but sigh and took a deep breath. When he was ready to harden his head and continue to leave, the people around him had been attracted.

“Hey, look, there’s a stone tablet here!”

“What does it say? Fried heaven help cow force? ”

“Fried heaven Gang? What is that? ”

“Did you forget that Xu Ke outside before…”

“Hiss! I remember! ”

The people suddenly lost the topic of discussion.

Just because Xu lacked had been engaged in wind and rain outside before, and even the people from Tianmen were slaughtered, he had already let the fried Tiangang declare outside.

At this time, seeing this stone tablet, I immediately looked at Xu que with eyes together.

Obviously, they want Xu Ke to give a statement.

Why do the stone tablets of the fried heaven sect appear in the place where the ancient Buddha is inherited?

Xu Wei scolded Er Gouzi ten thousand times in his heart, turned to look at the people, put on a solemn look, and said in a deep voice: “in fact… To tell you the truth, the ancient Buddha is also a member of my fried heaven gang.”

“This stone tablet is what the ancient Buddha left here after joining our fried heaven gang. It is to let future generations know how great our fried heaven Gang is!”

These words are enlightening and make people yearn.

The largest group in the world may not be much on earth, but where is this?

This is xianyunzhou where the four heavenly gates are located!

Become the largest gang in xianyunzhou, and even drag the legendary ancient Buddha into the gang. What an admirable act!

“No wonder Xu Kehui is so powerful… It turns out that the fried heaven gang has such a long inheritance history!”

“So, didn’t the fried heaven sect come earlier than the four heavenly gates today?”

“Shh… Shut up and let people hear this. Do you want to die?”

“Oh, yes, just say it in your heart.”

You should know that the ruling power of the four heavenly gates in xianyunzhou is absolute, and almost no other forces can compete with xianyunzhou.

Even if the fried heaven sect had a glorious time, it was only in the past. Now it is the world of the four heavenly gates.

Seeing that the atmosphere was almost enhanced, Xu que suddenly jumped into the air, opened his arms and said in a loud voice: “everyone, meeting is fate. Since we are here, we might as well join our fried sky gang and become a member of the fried sky Gang! Make history with me! ”

When saying this, BGM sounded at the right time.

“Lang Ben! Waves and currents! ”

“Thousands of miles of surging river water will never stop!”

“It’s all over the world!”

“Mixed culture is a surging trend!”

When the song “Shanghai beach” was played, people seemed to see that thousands of species in the world had turned into a surging river.

Countless heroes stand in the river.

There are those who are gifted and intelligent, who fall halfway, those who persevere, who always walk on the river, and those who are the mainstay of the river. How happy is it!

At the end of the river, there stands a huge stone tablet with a line of magnificent characters.

Fried heaven Gang cow!

Today, Xu Ke’s brainwashing skills are becoming more and more powerful. Even people with a firm Buddhist heart, such as xiaobulb, can’t help but have the idea of joining the fried heaven gang.

Of course, this is not only Xu’s function, but also because he integrates the Buddhist Secret Law – Universal living beings.

Using this method, the voice of words is Buddha sound, which can make people convert to our Buddha.

After some modification, Xu Ke has directly become the version of the universal fried heaven gang.

What I said is the voice of the fried tianbang. Anyone who hears this voice will convert to my fried tianbang!

“Brother Duan… The ink on it hasn’t dried yet!”

At this time, the two dogs made a sound again and wondered.

Because of the identity problem of Er Gouzi himself, he didn’t have the slightest feeling about Xu Ke’s words. He squatted there with Duan Jiude to study the stone tablet.

Join the fried heaven sect. Ben shenzun was originally a member of the fried heaven sect. What’s good to join.

It’s better to seize the time and find a way to get the inheritance of ancient Buddha!

The atmosphere that had been in place was instantly destroyed by Er Gouzi’s words.

Xu Ke kept calm on the surface, but in fact, his green veins burst on his forehead and scolded wildly in his heart.

Fuck you! Is er Gouzi out of his mind?

I was about to lame these people, but you suddenly came out and wasted so much saliva!

This secret method has a big flaw, that is, it can not be disturbed by the outside world. Er Gouzi’s voice was like his mother had installed a horn, which suddenly made Xu lack his skills. At this time, Xu que felt like falling in love with the school flower when he was young. He finally fooled into the hotel and took off his pants. As a result, the school flower was as depressed as telling him that he had come to his great aunt. At this time, people also gradually changed. The people present are basically the fairy king and others. After a little thinking, how can they not understand what happened just now Asshole! How dare you use the art of bewitching us! ” This son must be upset and kind. He had so many people outside before! ” Yes, I bought Buddha seals from him before, and I was badly hurt by this guy! ” The little light bulb took a meaningful look at Xu Ke and suddenly said, “donor Xu, what you just used is the method of universal living in the inheritance of ancient Buddha. Have you got the inheritance of ancient Buddha?” WOW! As soon as this remark was made, everyone was in an uproar! They have been looking for feelings here for so long, and the inheritance of ancient Buddha has long been taken by this boy! It’s shameless not only to embezzle the inheritance of ancient Buddha, but also to persuade them to join the fried heaven Gang! Xu Xu’s heart is also a trough. Unexpectedly, you little monk with thick eyebrows and big eyes are so scheming No, Absolutely not! ” Xu que immediately said, “I want to be fair and aboveboard. It’s absolutely impossible to embezzle the inheritance of ancient Buddha!” This is the basic principle of our bombing Gang! But how can people believe it? Otherwise, why can’t they find even a trace of the inheritance of ancient Buddha after looking here for so long? But they can’t do it here. They can’t do anything about Xu vacancy. Everyone looked at each other and had a dispute in their hearts. When you get out of this place, take the boy immediately and force him to hand over the inheritance of ancient Buddha! Xu Xu doesn’t even have to look at it. He knows what abacus these guys are playing in their hearts. Just as he was about to find a way to escape, the prompt of the system suddenly came Congratulations to the host, the inheritance and integration of ancient Buddha is completed, and the righteous mad devil Sutra has been upgraded to the third level. ” A huge force poured into his body in an instant, far exceeding the limit that he could bear now. In the sky, a turbulent black cloud rolled and thundered. The disaster is coming

chapters.title: Chapter 1699
chapters.body:
Chapter 1699

Chapter 1699

C.1699

Xu que can clearly feel that the true yuan in his body has far exceeded the current level after the Zhengqi seal magic Sutra has been promoted to the third level.

Even it is so huge that even fairyland can’t bear it.

This time, it’s a double disaster!

Immortal King robbery, immortal Zun robbery!

However, due to the shielding of the Buddhist realm, the breath of heaven robbery has not yet come down for a while and a half. Except for Xu deficiency, others present know nothing about it.

Seeing that the disaster was coming, Xu que suddenly hardened his waist.

Heaven’s disaster is in hand. I have it all over the world!

Xu que, who has a natural disaster, is the most invincible existence in the world!

At this time, he even expanded to dare to compete with the Immortal Emperor!

“Ha ha! Now that you all see it, I’m not afraid to tell you frankly that the inheritance of ancient Buddha is that I’m in my hand. I won’t pretend. I’ll have a showdown! ” Xu que laughed arrogantly.

The crowd was shocked. This man was too arrogant!

Taking the inheritance of ancient Buddha, I dare to announce it in such a grand manner. I have never been beaten by the society!

There are basically immortal Zun and Immortal King. You Xu lack a big Luo Jinxian. You have a big appetite for swallowing the inheritance of ancient Buddha alone.

Basically everyone has this idea, but no one has said it for a while.

After all, Xu lacked the strength shown before, which made people afraid.

“You bastards, you are shameless and mean! The inheritance of ancient Buddha has always been the property of our fried tianbang. You outsiders still want to take it from our fried tianbang. Ben shenzun is the first to refuse! ” The second dog son reprimanded the people with a dignified tone. Then he turned his head and looked at Xu vacancy pleasantly, “am I right, brother vacancy?”

Duan Jiude also stood up at this time and said in righteous words: “yes, yes, we have always adhered to the important principle that the inheritance of ancient Buddha is inseparable from the fried heaven Gang, so the inheritance of ancient Buddha should be our lack of brother!”

These two goods, as soon as they saw that the inheritance was taken by Xu que, stood up and licked them without hesitation.
