Xu Wei looked at the performance of the two goods and nodded with satisfaction, fully affirming their language.

The crowd looked at the notorious combination of immoral dogs and shouted in their hearts.

You three are shameless!

When did the inheritance of ancient Buddha become something of your fried heaven Gang? Just because there’s a broken stone tablet?!

And you, the dog, obviously what you just said. The ink on the stone tablet hasn’t even dried. It’s clear that it was made not long ago. Now it turns around and says that it belongs to the fried heaven Gang since ancient times!

It’s good to say that we are brazen, mean and obscene?!

With these words to you, you are more shameless than we do not know how many times!

Xu Kushen said in a voice, “now I’m going to inherit the ancient Buddha. Who is in favor of it and who is against it?”

“I object!”

As soon as the voice fell, a fairy king stood up and said with a gloomy face: “Xu Daoyou, it’s too overbearing for you to say so. Everyone knows that the inheritance of ancient Buddha has nothing to do with your fried heaven gang. Now you want to swallow it alone. Do you want to be the enemy of all of us?”

His words directly put Xu vacancy on the opposite of everyone present.

Of course, even if he doesn’t say so, most people will stand on the opposite of Xu deficiency. After all, the inheritance of ancient Buddha is very important, which is a great creation.

How could they let Xu Ke be taken away alone?

As soon as he said this, everyone immediately agreed.

“Yes, if you hand over the inheritance of the ancient Buddha, we can leave you a way to live.”

“The inheritance of ancient Buddha is owned by everyone. Don’t think of swallowing it alone.”

“Hand it over quickly, there is still a glimmer of life.”

As they spoke, they scanned Xu que with greedy eyes.

Although Xu Xu is making a fuss outside, when you think about it carefully, he is just a great Luo Jinxian.

Which one is not Xianwang xianzun?

Even if he killed the immortal Zun of Tianmen, who knows if he was lucky?

The so-called world Xi Xi is for benefit. There is an ancient Buddha inheritance in front of us. People’s fear of Xu Ke is fading bit by bit.

Xu Wei also understood that if they could not do it because they were not in the Buddhist realm, I’m afraid they would have rushed up and taken themselves down by now.

“Brother Qian, how can we run?” Two dogs came up to Xu Xu and asked in a low voice.

Duan Jiude looked calm on the surface, but in fact he was flustered in his heart: “yes, boy, what plan do you have? You will support us! Now there are so many immortal kings staring at me. I’m under a lot of pressure! ”

Xu que waved his big hand: “we’re not going!” Er Gouzi:??? Duan Jiude:??? What the hell? No?! You think you have to escape with us! Can you tell me not to go now and stay here as a sandbag? Er Gouzi jumped directly, stood in front of Xu Kuang, and said righteously: “brother Kuang, I have to talk about you. The inheritance of ancient Buddha is the precious wealth of xianyunzhou. As people of the fried heaven Gang, how can we have the idea of swallowing it alone?” Yes, old Taoist, I have to criticize you now. ” Duan Jiude also put on a look of awe inspiring righteousness, nodded and said, “old Taoist, I have always taught you to be willing to share. Sharing with others is our source of happiness. Doing so will only plunge you into the vortex of greed and lead you to the road of evil. It’s really not advisable!” Hey, are you two really him? It’s a grass on both sides! ” Xu que was angry and laughed. The people are also ignorant and good. How can they suddenly condemn Xu deficiency? Even so, they remain vigilant. After all, the immoral dog group has a good reputation. Their lower limit is close to the dark Canyon famous in xianyunzhou. At this time, er Gouzi suddenly raised his hand and hit a real yuan. He suddenly rushed to Xu Ke: “today I will walk on behalf of heaven!” Xu Ke was stunned, thinking that Er Gouzi was so brave now? Take the wrong medicine! Then, he saw Duan Jiude winking at him. He immediately responded, directly raised his hand and waved Su Yunlan and others around him. The light of the transmission array suddenly lit up. It turned out that Er Gouzi quietly engraved the transmission array to escape here while talking nonsense Hahaha, fools! Our God has incomparable power. Can you trash stop our God? ” Two dogs stood in the transmission array and said arrogantly, “come and hit me if you can!” The people suddenly became angry. They were fooled by a dog Taoist friends, stop this guy together! ” As they spoke, they ignored the rules of the Buddha’s realm test and directly hit a real yuan and rushed to the transmission array Lying trough! ” Two dogs screamed and hurriedly dodged. Seeing this, Xu que directly hugged Su Yunlan and others and avoided to one side. Boom! At the moment he dodged, the transmission array was directly exploded, and the light that had risen gradually disappeared into the air Ah…… “the two dogs were dumbfounded. They all looked at Er Gouzi and sneered Dead dog… Who said let’s hit it just now

chapters.title: Chapter 1700
chapters.body:
Chapter 1700

Chapter 1700

C.1700

Xu que said nothing, pointing to two dogs: “I testify that he said it. All Taoist friends look at this dog head and don’t miss it!”

Duan Jiude echoed: “yes, yes, this dog is really insidious, cunning, despicable and shameless. I’m ashamed to be with it!”

Seeing the people’s fierce eyes, it was clear that they were ready to do it to themselves. Er Gouzi immediately panicked and said in a hurry: “no! You can’t hit me! This is a Buddhist trial. Fighting is forbidden! Just now you hit Zhenyuan, which has triggered the prohibition around you. Didn’t you notice? ”

The people looked slightly stunned, and suddenly their faces became ugly.

At this time, around them, there was a terrible breath of restraint.

If they dare to do it again, they will be greeted by a storm like blow.

You know, this is the temple where the ancient Buddha is located. What remains must be the prohibition set by the ancient Buddha himself.

Among the people present, even the highest immortal, did not have the confidence to say that he could survive.

Seeing that the people dared not move, the two dogs became arrogant again and barked at the people.

“Come on! Have the ability to beat the God! God has given you every move! ”

“Doesn’t anyone have the courage? Nuo Da xianyunzhou can’t even find a person who dares to fight against God! It’s really lonely, lonely! ”

“There is no better way than this!”

Two dogs stood with their hands on their backs. I don’t know when they changed into the most coquettish flower underpants. Behind them, the red cloak fluttered, and their face was full of loneliness, showing the style of an expert.

At the same time, a powerful BGM sounded again.

“Invincible is how, how lonely!”

“How invincible, how empty!”

“Alone at the peak, the cold wind blows constantly!”

“My loneliness, who can understand me ~”

With the vigorous and low singing, the color of the cloak behind Er Gouzi became more and more bright.

Xu que yelled: “shit, I said why the previous recorder was missing! Stolen by the dead dog! ”

Others looked at Er Gouzi’s hypocrisy and almost vomited blood with anger.

Fuck you, you’re a master of hammers!

If there were no prohibitions everywhere, you dead dog would have been blasted into slag by us. How can you be arrogant here!

Feeling the eyes of the people like wolves and tigers, Rao shiergouzi trembled with courage.

“Don’t advise. There’s only one chance to ridicule so many immortal zuns in public. If you miss it, it’s gone!” Seeing that Er Gouzi meant to retreat, Xu que quickly whispered and urged, “if you dare to ridicule them again, I’d like to call you brother dog!”

Duan Jiude immediately understood and said, “that’s right! As long as you can do it, you will be the big brother from today on! ”

Being egged on by the two people, the two dogs suddenly had a fever in their head and sprayed in public.

“You rubbish are in vain! I dare only stand there and fart. I can’t even move a hair of my God! ”

“God only needs one finger to crush all of you into powder!”

“With all due respect, I’m not talking about your garbage, but all of you here are garbage!”

These words scolded all the people present except Xu Que and others. Their faces were as ugly as the bottom of a black pot.

Big guy is big and small. When was he scolded by a dog?

But shit, I can’t do it!

It’s so oppressive!

“Shit… This dead dog is too arrogant! When you go out, you must beat him up! ”

“How can a beating dispel our hatred? We must skin and bone to eliminate this hatred! ”

“Yes, I’ll cook it in a pot for seventy-nine days!”

“Dao you, call me then!”

At this time, er Gouzi was so arrogant that he directly took out a piece of flavored stinky tofu and threw it at the people: “Hey, do you still want to cook Ben shenzun? Eat my stinky tofu! ”

The crowd turned pale and dispersed quickly.

They’ve seen the power of stinky tofu before. The smell lingers around the beam for three days. It’s a big killer!

At this time, Xu que suddenly frowned.

Since he obtained the inheritance of the ancient Buddha, he has far more control over this place than others. At this time, he noticed the abnormality before everyone else.

The prohibition here… Seems to be weakening!

The immortals were not vegetarian either. Soon someone exclaimed, “the power of prohibition here is weakening!”

As soon as the voice fell, I saw a gap appear in the air. Before it was fully formed, one after another appeared.

With the emergence of these gaps, the Golden Buddha light is lost madly, which means that the power of prohibition is weakening rapidly.

After a while, the Buddha light in the whole temple disappeared, no longer magnificent, but a little lonely Well, what’s going on? ” It’s the transmission array just now! The transport array opened the channel to the outside world and was bombed, so the power in it was torn apart! ” Ha ha ha! You can’t live for your own sins! ” They soon deduced the truth, and Xu lacked was a little surprised. What kind of transmission array was arranged by Er Gouzi just now! The broken power can even tear up the prohibition No, the transmission array arranged by Er Gouzi is not that powerful array. It is mainly because of the gathering power of countless immortal kings and immortals here. ” As the array master second only to ER Gouzi in the team, Duan Jiude gave an explanation after a little thought. Xu Wei suddenly realized that it’s no wonder the prohibition didn’t start just now. It turned out that it was disturbed by the power of these people. It’s normal to think about it. After all, the prohibition here has existed for at least tens of thousands of years. It has long been damaged, and now it has been destroyed, which is beyond expectations. But now, the bad luck is er Gouzi… “You, what do you want to do?!” The second dog shook his body and felt the cold eyes around him. He said in a trembling voice, “we are all dignified people. We can talk about any contradictions. Don’t fight and kill at any time. I’m a Buddhist guide to compassion… Ah! Xu Ke, save this God! ” Xu que sneered twice, gloating and said, “you deserve it. Who made you want to pit me just now?” All the immortals, Wang xianzun, rushed up, took all kinds of measures, and directly blasted at Er Gouzi. Two dogs screamed, ran behind Xu Wei and shouted, “the ancient Buddha is inherited in this boy’s hand. He is the culprit!” Everyone was stunned, right! This dead dog is wool. Now the inheritance of ancient Buddha is the most important! Xu Xu’s face was as ugly as eating shit: “NIMA’s, you pit your father!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1701
chapters.body:
Chapter 1701

Chapter 1701

C.1701

Dead dog mistook me!

Finally, he turned his attention away. As a result, the dead dog’s sentence immediately made everyone focus on himself again.

“Shit, er Gouzi, you fucking did it on purpose, didn’t you?” Xu que yelled and grabbed Er Gouzi’s neck.

Two dead dogs were not afraid of boiling water. They stuck their necks and said, “brother lack, you said that you shared difficulties with our God. I am blessed to enjoy it! Did you forget so soon? ”

“You fart! When did I say that? What’s more, why are you blessed? ”

You and I had a direct quarrel and even tore at each other.

Quarreling, a man and a dog suddenly looked at each other, showing a thoughtful expression.

“Right now!”

Xu Que and ER Gouzi roared together, rolled up the people around them and rushed directly towards the crack.

Now the Buddhist realm has been torn and the prohibition has been broken. These cracks are the channel between the Buddhist realm and the outside world.

As long as you rush out, it will not be high enough for birds to fly!

“Hahaha! Everybody, go fart! ”

Xu que laughed and rushed to the gap.

Bang!

A violent crash sounded. How fast you rushed, how fast you fell.

Xu Xu was knocked dizzy and fell directly to the ground. It took him a long time to relax.

“Oh, my God’s head, I’m dying.” The two dogs covered their heads and rolled on the ground like they were dying.

A fairy king came forward with a sneer and said in a deep voice: “we can’t underestimate the reputation of immoral dogs. We’ve just joined hands to set up an array here. Xu Daoyou’d better hand over the inheritance of the ancient Buddha.”

“Yes, as long as you hand it in, we promise to let you leave safely.”

“You should be able to believe the promise made by xianzun here?”

Xu kupei took a sip and disdained to say, “believe it? Don’t be ridiculous. Er Gouzi just pretended to force me to give only ten points, but he still has 90 points to say to him. He’s right. You’re a bunch of despicable and obscene goods. You have no reputation! ”

The two dogs said, “what the God said is a wise saying, but isn’t it true that my words are full marks?”

“With your IQ, it’s hard for me to believe that you are the reincarnation of ancient magic dragon, but I believe in the reincarnation of ancient magic pig.”

“Hey, boy, how can you swear?”

The patience of the people present gradually lost. Seeing that the crack was getting bigger and bigger, the power of prohibition had completely disappeared, so they had no scruples anymore.

“Since you don’t want to hand it over, don’t blame my men for being merciless!”

A Fairy Statue whispered, raised his hand and pressed it out.

I saw that the space was distorted and broken into fragments in an instant, forming a nothingness.

Duan Jiude and others immediately took a breath of cool air. The power of xianzun’s palm was so terrible!

Since they came to xianyunzhou, they have seen many fairy kings make moves, but rarely see xianzun really make moves.

The last time I saw him, I had a duel with the yin-yang Immortal King of Shengzong. The Dharma decision displayed by the other side showed the power of approaching the immortal.

It is said that under the immortal, all are mole ants!

The twisted space emits a powerful force, which rolls Xu Ke and others in, and instantly tears them into pieces!!

The whole Buddhist realm suddenly fell into a dead silence.

Everyone was stunned.

So… What’s the situation?

Why did you die with a slap?

No, isn’t this boy strong?!

The immortal Zun did not expect it, and looked down at his palm: “I shouldn’t… I didn’t give so much power… Is it because my state has improved recently?”

“Didn’t even xianzun kill the wicked dog before? Why can’t you stop it now? ”

“They were just using tricks before. The boy’s real strength is just Luo Jinxian. How can he stop the power of xianzun?”

“But the problem is that people are broken. What about the inheritance of ancient Buddha?” Someone suddenly said.

Everyone was surprised.

what the fuck!

The inheritance of ancient Buddha is still in Xu’s hands. Now that people are dead, doesn’t it mean that the inheritance of ancient Buddha is completely gone?

Then didn’t they come once in a hundred?!

Just as everyone was entangled, a burst of crazy laughter came from a distance.

“Ha ha! Fools, I didn’t expect it! ”

Everyone was surprised, turned around and was stunned.

Xu Ke and his party, who should have been torn to pieces, have already stood outside the crack. The three immoral dogs are laughing wildly. How hateful and hateful that smile is.

“Unexpectedly, the God is immortal. You can never kill me!” The two dogs said with their hands on their hips and their toes high It seems that this immortal is not strong enough! ” Xu que took out his ears and looked indifferent. “He said he was a master? I have no strength to beat people. Go back and Practice for a few more years! ” fuck! They couldn’t help but stare, and they were angry with the three people’s cheap appearance. Shit, the wicked dog group is too fucking owe Wait… How did they avoid that slap just now? ” Suddenly someone exclaimed Yes, that palm just now has even torn the boundary of the Buddhist realm. It is reasonable to be involved. There is no chance to escape. ” How on earth did they do it? We didn’t even notice it. Did they hide their strength? ” Xu Ke’s eyes lit up and said, “since you have asked questions in good faith!” Then I will tell you mercifully! ” Two dogs pose SKR and stand in front of Xu Ke. Duan Jiude looked awe inspiring: “in order to prevent the world from being destroyed!” In order to maintain world peace! ” Carry out love and true evil! ” A lovely and charming decent character! ” Xu que! ” God respects two dogs! ” Duan Jiude! ” The three looked at each other and stood together. Centered on Xu Xu, Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi stood behind him, stretched out their hands like a pair of wings, and said in unison: “we are the fried tianbang shuttling around Xianyun island! Fried heaven Gang, xianyunzhou first is waiting for us! ” Let me go… People are completely stupid. Many people are petrified in situ, and their colors fade with the naked eye What a shame… How did they come up with such a shameful formation? ” God, my eyes! Help me! ” I don’t know why, after reading it, I unexpectedly felt that their actions were a little emotional… “Lying in the groove! You’re not right. Stay away from me and don’t come near me! ”
