chapters.body:
Chapter 1702

Chapter 1702

C.1702

“Boy, it’s very useful to use your Divine shell. They didn’t see that what was just an illusion.” Duan Jiude whispered.

Xu Weiwei opened his mouth and said, “hurry up. There are so many immortal zuns. We can’t run away without making some preparations.”

“Get it!”

Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi looked at each other and began to arrange an array in the back.

With the shell of the gods as a cover, these fairy kings and immortals on the opposite side can’t see what they are doing. They can only see three people standing in front and posing poss.

The people frowned and couldn’t understand how Xu lacked escaped the palm.

“Is it an illusion?”

“It’s possible that these guys are best at these crooked things.”

“If the illusion can blind our perception, it is quite terrible to do this.”

“Hum! Fancy, I want to see what tricks you have! ”

A immortal Zun snorted coldly, jumped, raised his hand directly and slapped again.

The irresistible pressure suddenly came and pressed the surrounding mountains and stones into powder. Some fairy kings with weak cultivation even couldn’t resist the pressure. They frowned and turned their skills to resist.

“Only one, not enough to see!” Xu que raised his index finger, shook it left and right, and said provocatively, “I dare say that I don’t need to do it at all. This person will retreat by himself!”

WOW!

As soon as this remark was made, the people immediately burst into an uproar.

“Are you kidding? I really think I’m a god!”

“This is immortal Zun. Even the Immortal Emperor can’t say such words.”

“It seems that these guys haven’t been taught for a long time and have forgotten themselves!”

Everyone talked and didn’t believe what Xu lacked said.

Just as xianzun was about to rush to Xu que, he suddenly stopped the car, his face changed greatly, his eyebrows frowned, and beans of sweat fell from his forehead.

Gollum!

A huge noise came from him, which seemed to be a harbinger of some other physiological activity.

Immortal Zun widened his eyes and said in disbelief: “this… What did you do to me?!”

“Oh, xianzun can’t do it? Didn’t you say you were going to shoot us? ” Duan Jiude sneered and joked, “come on, I’m waiting for you.”

“Grass! This guy is so arrogant! ” Someone said angrily.

“But why did the Taoist friend suddenly stop?”

“Yes, there is a smooth road ahead. It is clear that there is no danger. As long as we continue, we will be able to capture these three people!”

The people were puzzled. They didn’t know why the immortal statue suddenly stopped.

Only he knew that his stomach was turning over rivers and seas at this time, and he was suffering from colic. It was like a knife stirring around in his stomach.

Bean sized beads of sweat rolled down from his forehead, and xianzun’s face was blue and purple for a while.

This has not happened to him for a long time, which is clearly a sign of poisoning!

“You are shameless… You poisoned me!” Xian Zun said gnashing his teeth.

Poison!

The crowd was shocked and looked at the wicked dog group with vigilance.

I knew that when the cultivation reached the level of xianzun, ordinary poisons could no longer play a role. Once the skill was turned, the poisons could be discharged.

It is absolutely rare and strange poison that can work on xianzun. Naturally, they dare not approach for fear that they will also be attacked.

“Yes! I can’t see such a dirty thing as poison! ”

“The old Taoist has always convinced people by virtue. It is impossible to poison them!”

Two dogs and Duan Jiude agreed one after another.

A hostage said suspiciously, “you certainly don’t want to admit your poison!”

Speaking of this, Xu que suddenly sighed and looked sad: “let’s think about it together. At the second level and the third level, I didn’t try my best to break the level, but I didn’t expect everyone to misunderstand me so much, which makes me very cold!”

His words were sincere and made those who were still questioning speechless.

Although this guy did make a hole before, I’m afraid he might not be able to break the second and third levels if it wasn’t for him.

When I think about it, it seems that this guy has a spirit stone at most. If he really wants to pit the dead, he doesn’t seem to have any.

Of course, those people in Tianmen have long been enemies. They have become mortal enemies. No matter who starts, they will not be merciful.

Another immortal Zun said in a deep voice, “in that case, how dare you swear by the way of heaven that you never go down!”

Without saying anything, Xu Kuan directly raised his right hand: “I swear by the way of heaven that I will never poison. If I poison, let Er Gouzi and Duan jiudetian fight five thunders!”

Boom! As soon as the voice fell, there was a dull thunder what the fuck! Why bomb us? You are unreasonable! ” The second dog was surprised, ran directly behind Xu Wei and held his clothes tightly, “God, you can see clearly. If you want to bombard this guy, don’t miss.” The dark clouds are gradually spreading from the sky, but because the prohibition has not completely dissipated, the smell of heaven robbery has not spread out. When they saw that Xu lacked had just finished, there was a burst of thunder. They all felt speechless, but they didn’t doubt the authenticity of Xu lacked’s speech. After all, it’s no joke to take the oath from heaven. If Xu Ke was really poisoned, he would have been cut into powder by Tianlei Is it really not his poison? ” That’s strange. How did this Taoist friend get poisoned? ” It’s so weird. Is there something we don’t know about in this Buddhist realm? ” While everyone was talking, Xu que suddenly stood up and said, “I know what’s going on?” Then he pretended to look at the immortal statue and concluded: “this Taoist friend is going to have diarrhea!” suffer from diarrhea? You’re kidding! Everyone thought it was incredible. What does xianzun exist? The body without dirt has long been separated from the high-level existence of mortal behavior. How can there be diarrhea Xu Daoyou, you are talking nonsense. Do you know what kind of immortal Zun exists? How could it be time to have diarrhea! ” Someone sneered. Xu Weizhen said wordlessly, “of course I know, because I gave the laxative!” Hum, let me tell you… Wait, what did you just say? Did you take the laxative? ” All the people looked at Xu Ke with surprise. What the hell? Say it again Fourth watch, ask for a monthly ticket!]

chapters.title: Chapter 1703
chapters.body:
Chapter 1703

Chapter 1703

C.1703

“Did you give him the medicine? But how did you do it? ” Someone wondered.

Facing the puzzled gaze of the crowd, Xu que blinked and took out a bag of powder: “welcome to the good thing recommendation of fried tianbang today. This recommended product is the best Croton powder produced by fried tianbang. It is delicate and smooth. It can be absorbed by breathing. It is ground with fragrant Croton in the spring and Autumn period, which has been lost in xianyunzhou for many years! It’s the best thing for your opponent to use before the battle, whether it’s for you or for yourself! ”

The crowd was stunned and immediately covered with black lines.

You’re crazy!

What kind of goods to sell well!

Think this is xianyunzhou mall?!

And it can be absorbed by breathing. This horse riding is not Croton powder at all, but a strange virus!

Hearing Xu Que’s words, everyone took a step back with tacit understanding.

Some immortal Zun was attacked for no reason before. Up to now, they can’t stand up straight. They don’t want to follow suit.

“Don’t worry. Just now it was just a sample. You are all potential customers of our fried heaven gang. How could you be drugged casually.” Xu que said with a smile.

The crowd could not help shivering.

No, let’s do it?

Fool you!

Don’t think who blackmailed the spirit stone in the second level!

Ergouzi took out the recorder very tacitly and began to give up a BGM, which was full of magical rhythm, making people listen to Xu Xu’s introduction involuntarily.

“Now buy, we not only deliver goods to the door, but also buy one for one, and guarantee you to use it for 100 years. This is an unprecedented preferential strength. Don’t miss it!”

Xu Wei, holding a big horn, hissed to the crowd.

Under the magic BGM effect, people’s eyes become a little confused.

“Listen to him… It seems really worthwhile.”

“One bag can last a hundred years. Now buy one and get one free.”

“And looking at this effect, even immortal Zun is useful. If we use it to deal with others, won’t we get twice the result with half the effort!”

Xianzun, who was regarded as an example of the product, turned green at this time. No matter how he was oppressed, he could only bear the comments of the people around him.

The effect of this Croton powder is extra powerful, almost to an outrageous degree. He has almost run his skills to the limit, but he has never been able to suppress his desire to vent three thousand miles.

Shit, when I stabilize, I’ll kill you the first time!

At this time, the immortal Zun had a strong intention to kill Xu que, not only because of the inheritance of the ancient Buddha, but also because Xu que dared to tease him like this!

“Don’t miss it!”

“It’s rare to see Millennium Croton powder. You can make money if you buy it!”

“Big guy, come and buy it quickly!”

Under Xu Que’s vigorous publicity, many people in the audience have shown an eager look, but some can’t afford to buy.

After all, this thing is just Croton powder, not something eternal.

But the key place is here. This Croton powder can make a xianzun lose combat effectiveness. Even the strength of xianzun level can’t expel it from the body.

If you are a poison, just fart when the skill works.

But this Croton powder can’t be taken out, and it doesn’t hurt the body. From a certain point of view, it can even be regarded as a kind of medicinal material.

Look at the immortal Zun. He hasn’t slowed down yet. His blue face makes people feel shit. You know how powerful the Croton powder is.

This degree of weakening, if put in the duel of life and death, can be said to be a great advantage.

Instead of any immortal statue on the scene, I’m afraid that the immortal statue who mistook Chinese and Pakistani bean flour can explode each other in an instant.

“How many spirit stones do you want to sell such a good Croton powder?” Two dogs began to be a qualified supporter.

Xu Duan patted his thigh and said in a loud voice, “today, everyone is happy. I’ll give you a friendship price – a 9999 spirit stone!”

9999 spirit stone?

Rao was a little excited and shocked by the price.

A Croton powder is so expensive that you might as well grab it!

“No! Too high! ” Duan Jiude stepped forward at this time to seek welfare for everyone.

“Then… 999 spirit stones?”

“No, it’s still too expensive! I say a price, and you sell it at the price I say! ” Er Gouzi waved his big hand and said with great momentum, “listen… 99 spirit stones, 1000 pieces! Fill me up! ”

They were still shocked by the high price of 9999. At this time, they suddenly heard the low price of 99. They looked at Er Gouzi with gratitude.

“We all wronged the dog before. He is a good man… No, a good dog!”

“Yes, it’s so touching to get such a favorable price for me!” Sobbing, I’m going to give it a hug. It’s really not easy! ” Xu Duan’s face showed difficulty. After struggling for half a day, he seemed to have made up his mind and said fiercely, “OK! Ninety nine is ninety-nine! I’ll sell at a loss today! ” Anyway, they have lost money, so it’s better to lose more! ” Two dogs didn’t know where to find a small black stick, put it on his mouth and shouted, “now, now! Transfer out the inventory! Today, the God spoke here. The top 100 families will give another five bags of bean flour! Plus the previous buy one get one free, a total of seven packs! Ninety nine spirit stones and seven bags can affect the Croton powder of xianzun! With such a favorable price and such a good welfare, the family members quickly raise the spirit stone in your hand to rush to buy it! ” Xu Que’s face changed greatly: “no! I don’t owe it to death to sell me like this! ” Er Gouzi already put on a manic expression: “no, I said I had to sell! My family come with me and rush to buy! ” At this time, the people were completely moved by the enthusiasm of Er Gouzi and shouted in unison Rush to buy! ” Rush to buy! ” Rush to buy! ” For a moment, cheers echoed in the sky, full of a cheerful atmosphere. Soon, someone took the lead in throwing out a bag of spirit stones: “give me a bag!” I want a bag, too! ” I want ten packs! ” Don’t fucking rob me, these are all mine! ” Get out of here! A fairy King dares to rob me! ” The crowd immediately scrambled, and the big guys shot one after another. The gorgeous Zhenyuan instantly flooded the place of trial. Xu que, who should have been in the center, stood in the air not far away with ER Gouzi and Duan Jiude. Looking at the chaotic scene below, he smiled proudly at the corners of his mouth What about? Isn’t that a good idea for me? These guys haven’t found themselves caught yet. ” The second dog said proudly. Xu que thumbed up: “yes, yes, it is worthy of being the first God pit in the world!” Don’t fart. I’m the first God in the world! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1704
chapters.body:
Chapter 1704

Chapter 1704

C.1704

Pick up all the spirit stones around. When Xu Wei and others were about to slip away, a Buddha horn sounded below.

“Amitabha!”

Loud as a bell, Da LV instantly suppressed all the noise on the scene.

Xu was stunned at first, and then his face suddenly changed: “shit, this little bald head is bad for me again!”

The second dog said strangely, “small light bulb? Who are you talking about? ”

“Just a small bald head who likes to mind his own business.” Xu kupei took a sip, turned his head to look at the black clouds rolling in the sky, and motioned Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi to stay away, “it’s impossible to be good today. Go away and don’t splash blood on him later!”

At the moment when the Buddha horn sounded, a burst of golden light spread around like a wave.

In the center of the chaotic battlefield, Xiaohe SHANGZHENG closed his eyes and recited the Buddha’s name in a low voice.

With the little monk as the center of the circle, the golden light source constantly surged up. Everyone who was swept by the golden light was slightly stunned, and his eyes slowly recovered the color of Qingming.

“Strange… What happened just now?”

“I can’t seem to control my thoughts and actions…”

“I’ve seen the ghost. I’m already immortal. Unexpectedly, someone can control me?”

“Damn it! Can I buy this junk Croton powder? How can I buy it? What the hell is the wicked dog doing? ”

After they regained consciousness, they still remembered what had just happened and immediately shouted abuse.

What the hell is going on?

These people all remember what happened just now, whether it is Xu Que’s passionate publicity or the fanatical scene of himself and others.

But they can’t understand why they became like that.

Although this Croton powder sounds great, it’s actually useless at all.

You said you could breathe in, but if you really fight, who will let you get close easily.

When the opponent saw you throw a bag of things, he had evaporated the things thousands of miles away. He had no chance to let the other party absorb them.

Have you lost your wits and rushed to buy Croton powder?

At this time, the little monk put down his hands, stopped reciting Buddhist scriptures and opened his eyes.

In his pupils, he could vaguely see a vague Buddha shining. After a moment, he was immersed.

“Alas… Almsgiver, you’ve just been using universal life again.” The little monk sighed and said in a painstaking tone, “it is the holy Dharma of Buddhism to universalize all sentient beings. It should have been used to enlighten the common people and understand the real morality of Buddhism. Benefactor, your use is completely bringing the secret Dharma of Buddhism to dust!”

It’s universal again!

The crowd immediately reacted, looked at Xu Ke and others with an iron face, and yelled.

“Shit, I said how could I not control myself just now!”

“This little bastard always uses such indiscriminate means. It’s damned!”

“Get out of the way. I’m going to tear him up now!”

Compared with before, people simply wanted to kill Xu deficient and then quickly.

If it was just for the sake of inheriting the ancient Buddha and interests, now face accounts for a large part of the reason.

Who dares to play them like monkeys?

Only wicked dog combination!

On the surface, the little monk has no waves, but in fact, there are already waves in his heart.

It is the holy Dharma of Buddhism to help all living beings. It is also described in ancient Buddhist books that once this secret Dharma comes out, all the Buddha land will be within three thousand miles.

But that is used to describe the ancient Buddha!

The ancient Buddha’s Dharma is profound, powerful and unparalleled. It is known that every word and action is the Holy Buddha in heaven and on earth.

Even if it is the Dharma of the Three Thousand Buddhas, even if it is the Dharma of the Three Thousand Buddhas, it may not be possible for people to achieve the effect of the Three Thousand Buddhas, even if it is the Dharma of the Three Thousand Buddhas themselves.

But who’s here?

It’s all Xianwang xianzun!

Although there are as many immortals as dogs, and the fairy King walks everywhere, in fact, if these people enter the lower world, they can push the whole world.

Just as xianyunzhou attacked Tianzhou at that time, if it weren’t for Xu Que’s reason that Zhengqi sealed the magic Sutra, he entered a violent state and directly destroyed the invading Xianwang xianzun at one stroke.

At this time, I’m afraid the local friars on Tianzhou have already been slaughtered!

Having just mastered universal life, he can bewitch so many immortal zuns. What’s the origin of Xu que?

Is he the reincarnation of the legendary ancient Buddha?

The little monk narrowed his eyes slightly and looked at Xu que from a distance, trying to find out the shadow of the ancient Buddha from him.

“Shit, there is no refund once the items of Ben tianbang are sold. Now you can’t return them even if you want to return them!” Xu que stood in the air and shouted.

The crowd became angry. You mean a refund? Who the fuck wants you to refund! It’s like we don’t need this spirit stone Oh, you’re not rare, so I’ll accept it. ” Xu que took the spirit stone and waved to the people, “everyone, we don’t turn the mountain and the water. It’s fate to meet thousands of miles. Today’s on-site sales meeting of fried Tiangang is over. In the future, we fried Tiangang will strive to bring you more and better goods. Goodbye!” After that, he grabbed Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi and ran away. As for Su Yunlan and others, he had already sent them away. When they heard this, they scolded for a while, and suddenly felt as if they had forgotten something. Strange… What is it? It always feels like a very important thing… “Lying in the trough! Ancient Buddha inheritance! ” A fairy King glanced at the little monk. When he saw the shaved head, he immediately exclaimed, “the fucking ancient Buddha inheritance is still on that guy. Don’t let him run away!” A word woke up the dreamer. They immediately reacted and rushed after Xu que Grass! I was almost fooled by this boy! ” Stop talking nonsense and hurry up, or the inheritance of ancient Buddha will be gone! ” On this day, monks in the Buddhist realm were lucky to witness a historic scene. In the sky, Xu que, Duan Jiude, er Gouzi and others ran frantically forward, and behind them were a group of immortal kings and immortals shouting to fight and kill. Anyone who sees this scene has to thumbs up and sigh heartily. good heavens! This is the real big death! The little monk followed behind and shook his head with regret. It’s not that he doesn’t want to admit it. The truth is that there is no shadow of any ancient Buddha from Xu que. It is said that the ancient Buddha is fraternal, intelligent and full of the beauty of human nature. It is said that after three thousand disasters, he will come to popularize the world into Western bliss. As for Xu Kuang… If anyone told him that Xu Kuang was the reincarnation of the ancient Buddha, the little monk estimated that it was possible for him to return to secular life on the spot. This guy is too shameless to look directly at

chapters.title: Chapter 1705
chapters.body:
Chapter 1705

Chapter 1705

C.1705

Boom!

A deafening sound broke through the air.

In a well-known ancient temple in the Buddhist realm, a monk is practicing hard and has reached the realm of immortality.

Hearing the news, he looked up and found a young man passing in the air with an old man and a dog.

“He Fangxiao is small. An dares to disturb the purity of our ancient temple!”

The monk was about to stop, when he suddenly saw a large group of fairy kings and immortals behind the three guys.

He is aggressive, just like an expression of chasing and killing an enemy.

“Amitabha, I suddenly remember that I have something to do…”

The monk turned and left, shocked in his heart.

Who are these two people and a dog?

It can attract so many immortal zuns!

The Buddhist realm… I’m afraid it’s going to be chaotic.

Those two people and one dog are a combination of immoral dogs who ran away madly after winning the inheritance of ancient Buddha.

As for those immortal kings, xianzun was following closely at this time, and he was very angry.

Originally, I thought that the inheritance of ancient Buddha was easy to catch, but I didn’t expect to be fooled by Xu vacancy.

In this way, the dreamland created by Xu que at the beginning was simply a trap.

The guy hid Croton powder in it and secretly sent it to the immortal Zun.

Immortal Zun was caught. When everyone’s vigilance was relaxed, this guy immediately began to spread his power to all living beings and bewitch their minds.

However, many people think something is wrong.

It is reasonable to say that the secret method of popularizing all living beings is not what they can really master at their current level.

You know, that’s the secret method used by the ancient Buddha to develop believers.

For Buddhists, believers are their most important resource. It can be said that it is not too much.

Therefore, for believers, Buddhism has always taken the most powerful means of mind control, and will never let any believer out of their control.

The Buddhist Association has established many strict regulations, which are also based on this foundation.

During the chase, someone found the little monk. After asking, he learned that even if he came to show universal life, it was impossible

“Shit, you’ve been chasing for so long. Don’t you feel tired?” Xu Wei complained angrily, “isn’t it just an ancient Buddha inheritance? Is it necessary to kill your parents like me?”

They were almost out of their wits and seven spirits went to heaven.

Isn’t it just an ancient Buddha?

You can also say that you have the ability to pass on the ancient Buddha to us!

“You have the face to say that!”

“Don’t take it if you have the ability! Hand over the inheritance of the ancient Buddha! ”

“This guy is really shameless. I will frustrate him today to dispel my hatred!”

All the people were angry, not only because of the inheritance of the ancient Buddha, but also because the means used by Xu Que and others on the road were extremely inferior.

Looking around, even the highest immortal zuns were disheartened and embarrassed at this time.

“I want God to say that you don’t have the ability. If you have the ability, come out and fight alone!” Two dogs stood up arrogantly and pointed to one of the female friars, “it’s you. The God has been unhappy with you for a long time!”

The female Friar’s face was gloomy, and she stood up directly, and her immortal breath burst out immediately.

“Well… Well, I didn’t say you. Why did you stand up?” The two dogs immediately shifted their targets and looked at an old man, “I’m talking about your old man! Come and get beaten! ”

The old man snorted coldly and jumped into the air. Even though he was still in the air, he had already operated the skill, and the immortal Zun’s peak cultivation was undoubtedly revealed.

“No, you people didn’t call you. What are you doing?” The second dog wiped the cold sweat on his forehead and turned his head and said, “that dwarf! You’ve been unhappy for a long time. Stand up when you get beaten! ”

“Who the fuck are you calling a dwarf?” The friar stood up directly, roared, and instantly turned into a friar three feet tall.

Er Gouzi: ”

After a moment of silence, er Gouzi returned to Xu Que’s side, put on a pair of sunglasses and said slowly, “Alas, none of you can fight. Ben shenzun is very disappointed with you.”

Xu que hid his face: “don’t say you know me when you go out later. It’s really embarrassing.”

“My God is unparalleled in the world. He is the first brave man of the fried heaven sect. Where is he ashamed?”

Duan Jiude mended his knife and said, “teacher Ergou, it’s important to have self-knowledge. It’s the most humiliating thing to have no self-knowledge.”

A Fairy Statue stepped forward and said in a deep voice, “Xu Ke, if you hand over the inheritance of the ancient Buddha now, we can let bygones be bygones, but if you are stubborn, you can’t bear the consequences.”

The main reason why they don’t rush up now is that they are afraid of Xu Ke’s counterattack before he dies. After all, the immoral dog has a reputation, and the immortal Zun who died under them is not without it.

What’s more, now the inheritance of ancient Buddha is in Xu Wei’s hands. If he is forced to hurry and let him destroy the inheritance, these people present will be empty Almsgiver Xu, we have just joined hands to set a ban here. You can’t escape. ” Even the small light bulb believes that it is the best choice for Xu que to honestly hand over the inheritance of ancient Buddha. The prohibition jointly set by several immortal kings and immortals will take a lot of time even if Xu lacks the system function to crack it. It is often between the strong and the weak who fight for so much time. As for ER Gouzi and Duan Jiude, the two wastes are purely theatrical goods, which are useless at all. Just when everyone thought Xu Ke would be obedient, he saw him suddenly step forward, pull an exaggerated arc from the corners of his mouth, and roar with laughter: “do you want to inherit the ancient Buddha? It’s on me, but I won’t give it to you. If you can, come and take it from me! ” Everyone was stunned. What is Xu Ke thinking? We have all told him the pros and cons, and he dares to provoke us like this? Do you really think you have the strength to rival xianzun? While on the road, immortal Zun has analyzed it. They have always overestimated the real combat power of unscrupulous dogs. Before defeating Tianmen immortal Zun, they also won by stratagem. They didn’t beat it by force at all. Not to mention so many immortal zuns present, even if Tianmen people are here, they should avoid its edge Bastard, you’re going to propose a toast instead of a penalty! ” An immortal Zun couldn’t help shouting angrily and stepped forward, “just a big Luo Jinxian. I really think that if you master the inheritance of ancient Buddha, you can do whatever you want?” Xu que raised a cold smile at the corner of his mouth. His whole body suddenly soared and rushed all the way to the fairyland. The crowd was suddenly dumbfounded. What happened? Why is this guy suddenly in Wonderland

chapters.title: Chapter 1706
chapters.body:
Chapter 1706

Chapter 1706

C.1706

Xu que stared at the Immortal King and immortal statue, and his cultivation broke out without concealment.

The main reason why he did not break through so many means just now is that Su Yunlan and others have not left far. With the news of his crossing the sky now, I’m afraid no one in a hundred miles can be spared.

In addition, there is always the suppression of the ancient Buddha’s breath in the Buddhist trial, so the natural disaster has not come yet.

After being chased so far by these guys, the smell of the ancient Buddha has long disappeared without a trace, and Su Yunlan and others have left the Buddhist realm. Xu Ke naturally has no scruples at this time.

This desert just became his place to cross the robbery!

After Xu Ke inherited the ancient Buddha, he had a faint feeling that his breakthrough would not be simple.

At least the power that flows into your body is far more than making yourself break into fairyland!

Even… Xianzun realm is possible!

However, the difficulty of this robbery is definitely the most difficult one in my history.

Even the last five times of heaven’s calamity was just a breakthrough from man’s fairyland to Dalai fairyland.

This time, I have to break through all the way from Da Luo Jinxian to Xian Zun. The difficulty is totally different.

Duan Jiude was also frightened and asked cautiously, “no, why did this boy suddenly go to fairyland? Is the ancient Buddha so powerful? ”

No wonder they are so afraid. It’s mainly the natural disaster of Xu Ke. It’s true that it’s too abnormal.

That’s not a natural disaster for normal people!

Last time, the five heavenly robberies reached Qi Zhi. They just killed ten fairy kings in a fairyland, which was extremely terrible!

“Did you only break into fairyland this time?” Two dogs asked carefully.

Xu que smiled faintly, and a fine awn flashed across his eyes: “of course.”

Er Gouzi and Duan jiudeton breathed a sigh of relief: “fortunately, it’s just a breakthrough. There should be no problem…”

“No.” Xu Xu continued, “this time I should directly break through to xianzun.”

Two dogs and Duan Jiude were stunned and saw the daze in each other’s eyes.

“Teacher Duan, did I hear wrong?” Two dogs slapped Duan Jiude in the face, “do you feel pain?”

“Pain, it doesn’t seem to be an illusion… Lying in the trough! Why did you hit me? ” Duan Jiude touched his face and was just about to reply. He immediately reacted and became angry.

“It hurts to beat yourself.” The two dogs said with their hands on their hips.

Duan Jiude almost laughed angrily: “I’m NIMA… It seems that I need to let you understand why the flowers are so red today!”

“Oh, you dare to do it! I will teach you a good lesson today! ”

The two immediately fought together, and then fought farther and farther… They soon left Xu Xu’s side.

Xu que looked at the two goods with a speechless face and thought that the fried tianbang had these two pit goods. The average IQ was lowered by one grade.

Seeing that he was about to go to the Immortal King, two dogs turned over and stood up: “everyone, after careful consideration, Ben shenzun decided to give up and join you.”

Duan Jiude also said with a straight face: “yes, I see that Xu que is not a thing. He deceives people too much, so I came to help you.”

The people looked confused. For a moment, they didn’t know whether the two goods were enemy or friendly.

Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude took advantage of this opportunity to squeeze directly into the last part of the crowd and find a corner cat.

“Give you a suggestion. You’d better find a place to hide later.” Two dogs shouted, “this boy is about to cross the robbery!”

Robbery?

Everyone felt the fluctuation of the smell of fairyland on Xu Que and immediately talked about it.

“When did he break into fairyland?”

“Unexpectedly, I want to cross the robbery at this time. Is it because I want to kill us with heaven’s robbery?”

“Hum, it’s a joke!”

They didn’t take Er Gouzi’s words seriously at all, and laughed at them one by one.

“What can we do about the robbery in the fairyland?”

“Ha ha, is this boy crazy and wants to deal with us with heaven’s robbery?”

“I’d like to see what makes his robbery different.”

Those present were dismissive of such words as avoiding natural disaster.

Joke, the lowest people present are fairy kings. Which one is not tempered and has experienced countless disasters?

What can you do to them?

Can you chop them to death on the spot?

Ridiculous!

The people were not in a hurry to do it now, but looked at Xu vacancy and waited for his disaster Boom! ” Just then, a dull roar came from Xu Que’s body. Bang! Bang! Bang! As if countless shackles had been broken, Xu Ke’s breath began to climb madly, approaching fairyland. Boom! At the same time, there was a sudden thunder in the sunny sky. Then, rolling black clouds flew from a distance, but when they floated not far away, they suddenly stopped Strange… Is this a cloud robbery? Why didn’t you move? ” I don’t know. It seems a little strange to rob the cloud… It’s afraid to come over? ” You’re kidding. How could Tianjie be afraid of the robbers? ” A fairy King laughed and said, “this boy brought the disaster. We don’t need to do it at all. He will be destroyed by himself!” Why did you say that? ” You don’t know. This is a god killing desert in the Buddhist realm. It is said that this is the place where ancient gods died. Any natural disaster will be more powerful if it arrives here. ” The fairy King proudly explained, “this boy broke through in such a hurry that there is absolutely no possibility of survival.” I see. The fairy king like me has already passed the natural disaster. Even if the natural disaster is strong, it will not be greatly damaged. ” That’s right. If the boy is not dead after the disaster, we will search his soul and win the inheritance of the ancient Buddha. ” When they heard the speech, they laughed and looked at Xu Xu’s eyes, which was no different from looking at a dead man. Xianzun, who was previously deprived of laxative by Xu, was even happier at this time. He looked resentful and said, “young man, after you die, I will take your body back and hang it in front of the door. The corpse will be exposed for tens of thousands of years, so that you can know the end of offending us!” Xu que was still concentrating on improving his realm. At this time, he couldn’t help raising his eyebrows when he heard this. How many times will thunder robbery increase? And this good thing It’s delivered on the fourth watch. Please ask for a monthly ticket!]

chapters.title: Chapter 1707
chapters.body:
Chapter 1707

Chapter 1707

C.1707

Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude were still watching a play later. Suddenly, they heard that Tianjie would strengthen, so they quickly retreated madly again.

A fairy King frowned and said, “Why are you so afraid? It’s just a fairy King robbery. We can resist it easily.”

The two dogs threw down a word without looking back and directly broke out of the prohibition: “silly lack.”

“Idiot.” Duan Jiude followed and ran out of the ban all the way behind Er Gouzi.

“Bastard!” When the Immortal King ascended, he was angry and shouted loudly. He raised his hand and wanted to kill them.

Anyway, they are all with Xu Ke. The combination of immoral dogs is immoral and everyone has to kill it.

However, er Gouzi and Duan Jiude twisted their bodies like eyes behind them, avoided the strike of the fairy king and ran away.

Looking at the hurried back, I seem to be afraid to stay here.

They suddenly ran away, which immediately made the immortal kings and immortals present feel uneasy.

Why did you suddenly run away?

Isn’t Xu Ke with them? Why don’t you abandon your partner and run away?

And how did they get out??

The prohibition here was jointly set by all the people present. The purpose is to ban Xu vacancy’s action and make him unable to escape.

The prohibition is so strong that even if Immortal Zun reaches this peak, it can’t be broken for a while.

The man and the dog were like walking around. They didn’t see any action to break the ban and ran out directly?

“Xu Ke, this is your good brother of the fried sky gang. He left you and ran away.”

“It’s really disappointing. I’m even afraid of the fairy King robbery. It seems that your wicked dog combination is just a vain name.”

“When we kill you, we’ll kill that man and dog. Your fried tianbang will be removed from Xianyun island!”

“Be ready to accept your failure!”

The crowd mocked one after another, looking relaxed and freehand, as if waiting for the beginning of a good play.

For them, the Immortal King robbery is powerful, but it is only for the friars who have just entered the fairyland.

Monks who have been immersed in the Immortal King and immortal Zun environment for many years and firmly grasp their own strength, just a fairy King robbery, just like enjoying a thunderstorm.

Even if you are injured, you just go back and use some magic medicine to recover your injury. The most used magic medicine will be more precious.

You know, this is xianyunzhou. There are fairy kings everywhere. The only fairy King robbery is just sprinkling water.

It’s not that you haven’t survived the robbery. What are you afraid of?

Xu que glanced at the crowd, and a joking smile appeared at the corners of his mouth: “are you sure you don’t lift the ban? Don’t run away then. ”

A fairy king came out of the crowd with confidence and said, “hum, even if I die today, I can’t leave here if I’m cut to ashes by the robbery!”

“Yes, bold.” Xu que exclaimed and continued to run Zhenyuan to summon Tianjie.

At this time, Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi, who had left the prohibition scope, were standing on a hill and pointing at the people.

“Teacher Duan, how many of these weak intelligences have survived?” The two dogs curled their mouths, with a disdainful expression.

Seeing this, Duan Jiude pretended to think for a moment and said in a deep voice: “I think it’s all dead. It’s too close to run away.”

“I also think it’s mainly because they are so stupid that they dare to stand there and watch when they see us all run away.”

“Yes, no wonder it’s said that the Immortal King xianzun of xianyunzhou has a bad brain. Most of them were stupid before.”

At the beginning, the fairy king who wanted to start, looked at Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi with dead eyes, looked at himself and others, and suddenly felt an uneasy feeling in his heart.

Didn’t they break the ban to escape? Why are you still commenting now?

The most important thing is that this person looks at himself and others like a dog. He is really like looking at a dying person. He has only sympathy and compassion, but he doesn’t even worry.

From the previous performance, the relationship between immoral dogs can be said to be quite stable. The three know each other.

Now even the most afraid dog hasn’t run away. A look ready to see the play can only explain one situation.

That is… They believe Xu Ke can do what he says!

Over the years of cultivation, the fairy king has cultivated a kind of spiritual ability that is close to advance, and can feel what will happen next with a vague sixth sense.

With the approaching of Jieyun, the sixth sense of uneasiness in his heart became stronger and stronger.

What’s the problem?

It’s fake to rob the cloud. In fact, it’s the reinforcements of the bombers?

Or does the boy really have any means to make Tianjie his means to clean up himself.

The fairy King prefers the second conclusion.

After all, up to now, I have seen three of them, and one is not human. If all of them die, the bombers will be removed from the list. Thinking of this, the fairy King shook his head and put those strange ideas behind him. Just a big Luo Jinxian, even if he has the ability, he can’t turn over any waves in front of them. The cloud robbery is getting closer and slower. It seems that he is reluctant to come over. People suddenly wondered. What’s going on with the robbery today? In the past, when splitting people, the cloud robbery came as fast as possible. I wish you could break through the last second and split on your head immediately the next second. At present, it’s like counseling to cover the sky. Don’t you dare to come over? Seeing this, Xu que narrowed his eyes slightly and shouted, “come here!” The robbery cloud seemed to be heard. It spread out in an instant and completely shrouded the whole sky. Everyone is stupid. What’s going on? Why did you come all of a sudden? You are a natural disaster. Can you be a little dignified? Come here as soon as others yell. Do you want to lose face Do you want to inherit the ancient Buddha? ” Xu Kuan grinned and a look of banter flashed in his eyes, “then live well first!” Speaking of this, Xu que suddenly raised his voice, opened his arms towards the sky, looked crazy, and his long hair danced in the back of his head, just like the nine day gods and Demons coming to the world! He stared at the robbery cloud, just like the instructions of the gods, and shouted, “Heaven robbery, come down!” Boom! The voice fell, and there was an earth shaking noise between heaven and earth. The arm thick golden lightning condensed out in the clouds, entangled together quickly, and merged into golden dragons. The Dragon roared and fell from the sky with unparalleled terror! Everyone present was stunned

chapters.title: Chapter 1708
chapters.body:
Chapter 1708

Chapter 1708

C.1708

“What is this?!”

“Sleeping trough! Is this a robbery? ”

“It’s impossible. There’s no such thing as robbery!”

“Yes, don’t be kidding. If this disaster really falls, I can’t even carry it!” A fairy King spoke in horror.

Not only him, but also all the monks present, looked at the crazy dancing golden dragon, and the whole person was stupid. He just felt a huge shock in his heart, as if even his soul had been dispersed by the roar just now.

There were even fairy kings with low accomplishments who directly softened their legs and sat on the ground, as if they had lost their soul, staring at the dragon.

You told me this thing was a disaster?

Are you kidding!

There’s no such thing as robbery!

Boom!

Soon, a golden dragon was fully formed, with a huge head sticking out of the clouds, and a larger body hidden in the black clouds.

“That, that’s the ancient Holocaust!” Someone exclaimed, “it’s shaped like a dragon. It’s more like a scourge than heaven. Ordinary friars will turn it into fly ash!”

The people present took a breath of cool breath, leaving only shock in their hearts.

This is an ancient catastrophe!

But this did not weaken their shock.

There are people who have seen great storms and waves. Naturally, many people have seen the ancient Holocaust.

But the key to the problem is that according to the records in ancient books, the most ancient Holocaust is the thickness of arms, but if you don’t say this thing in front of you, they all think it’s a real dragon!

Xianyunzhou is not a creature without a dragon, but it is not a real dragon, but a monster with a trace of real dragon blood for some reason.

The real dragon is a real divine beast, carrying the will of heaven. Its strength is unfathomable and its power is infinite.

Therefore, any thing that has something to do with the dragon is far more powerful than the monks imagined.

“My God… Why is this ancient catastrophe so terrible?”

“I’ve been practicing for nearly a thousand years. I’ve never seen such a huge ancient catastrophe… It’s terrible…”

“My God, if this ancient catastrophe comes down, we’re afraid we can’t resist it at all!”

“What the hell is this guy? Why did God send such a powerful disaster! ”

“It’s over. Something big is going to happen. Look behind the robbery cloud! There was more than one real dragon disaster in ancient times! ”

They were stunned and looked at the sky.

At the moment when the Golden Dragon broke the black cloud and was ready to come, they saw that behind the cloud, countless golden lightning were condensing, and the dragon shape had gradually taken shape.

“Sleeping trough! How many days are there? ”

“This boy should not be the legendary man of heaven and earth!”

“This is not a robbery. I just want him to die!”

“Never mind whether he’s dead or not! We’re going to die! ”

The monks present counted one by one, and their faces were full of horror and disbelief.

If there are only one or two ancient catastrophes condensed into a real dragon, that’s all.

But the problem is, there are dozens of ancient catastrophes at present!

This is so special. Even if you work hard, you can’t stop it at all!

“Xu Daoyou! I know I’m wrong. Please stop quickly. Don’t let the disaster affect us! ” A fairy king was so frightened that he made a noise and began to crack the ban crazily, “what are you doing? Untie the ban quickly!”

It must have experienced countless difficulties and obstacles to reach the realm of fairy king.

If you die here, it’s not worth it!

It’s a realm that I’ve worked hard to cultivate. If I’m killed directly, I’ll be killed because of someone else’s robbery. How much I have to hold back!

“Xu Daoyou, I came here to help you. I’m a friendly army!” Another fairy king was ingenious and began to have a relationship with Xu vacancy. “As long as you let me out, I am willing to become a close comrade in arms of Xu Daoyou. From now on, I will take you as the leader! When you meet the people of the fried heaven Gang, you must treat them with the best etiquette! ”

That tone, that look, it’s not too much to lick the dog.

The fairy King’s face was bitter, which was not that he licked the dog quite.

But if they really let this ancient catastrophe fall, they really can’t stop it, and there will be only a dead end.

As for losing face or something, it doesn’t matter at all, okay?

Thinking of this, people couldn’t help scolding at the bottom of their hearts.

Shit, why did you impose a ban just now!

Well, if you want to run, you can’t run away immediately!

Several fairy kings looked at each other, and the real yuan surged in their bodies. They began to think of ways to break the prohibition and want to escape before the disaster.

However, at this time, they suddenly saw that Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi, who had previously run out, suddenly ran back and worked hard outside the prohibition. Before they could react, powerful prohibitions were constructed one after another, directly shrouded outside the prohibitions they jointly set up, and completely closed the people. what the fuck! Everyone was stunned and disordered directly in the wind You’re fucking sick, aren’t you? ” Open the prohibition to me quickly, or I will never finish with you! ” Stop it! No more prohibitions! ” The Immortal King and the immortal have been completely stupid. This person and a dog are so wicked! It’s even more forbidden outside the prohibition. It’s clear that I don’t want them to go out! Looking around, in addition to the prohibition set by everyone just now, dozens of prohibitions are already forming on the periphery. These two guys seem to have great attainments in the forbidden array. Each forbidden array is established with extremely profound techniques. This also shows a problem, that is – they have no chance to escape now! These dozens of prohibitions have taken shape. Even if the fairy King present makes a move together, it is impossible to escape from this area before the ancient catastrophe falls! What’s more, Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi are eyeing outside at this time, ready to repair the prohibition at any time. With these two guys guarding, even if they and others have the ability to break the ban, they don’t have that chance at all Xu Daoyou, we have no enemies with you. It’s just because of the inheritance of the ancient Buddha that we have come to this point. It’s just the so-called enemy should be solved rather than tied up. Why don’t we stop here and stop here. I swear I will never fight against the fried heaven Gang again from now on! ” An immortal even spoke and took the initiative to obey the soft road. The crowd had retreated to the edge of the prohibition, and they didn’t even dare to get close to Xu vacancy. Xu que glanced at them and sneered, “do you want to go? OK, give me the ransom first

chapters.title: Chapter 1709
chapters.body:
Chapter 1709

Chapter 1709

C.1709

Ransom, ransom?

Everyone was stunned and didn’t react.

Xu que rolled his eyes and said angrily, “haven’t you heard of kidnapping? Now you are my hostages. Don’t you have to pay ransom if you want to go? ”

Hearing Xu Duan’s words, everyone was almost angry.

Lao Tzu, the king of immortals and immortal Zun, was reduced to asking for the ransom to redeem himself.

What a shame!

An immortal Zun fell into the devil and slowly said, “I don’t know how much ransom Xu Daoyou needs?”

Xu que narrowed his eyes, felt the coming terror on his head, and said with a smile: “you are all dignified figures in xianyunzhou. The lowest accomplishments are fairy kings. I don’t think it’s too much for one person to want a billion spirit stones?”

Hiss!

They suddenly took a breath of air-conditioning, and their eyes were full of incredible look.

billion?!

Why don’t you just rob… Oh, he’s robbing now. It’s okay.

But the question is, who can get a billion!

Even if there is, it is impossible to take a billion spirit stones running around in the street!

“Xu Daoyou! Here are all my spirit stones! ”

“This is all my wealth. Please accept it!”

“Xu Daoyou, this is the spirit stone I brought with me. If the amount is not enough, I can go back and get it for you when I leave here.” A fairy king knew he didn’t have many spirit stones, so he took the initiative to propose.

Although their fairies have retreated to the edge of the prohibition, once the ancient catastrophe comes, it will cover hundreds of miles around, and there will be no place to hide at that time!

At this time, the people were very upset. Why did they come to hunt down the boy?

Isn’t it just an ancient Buddha inheritance? Just give it to him?

Regret is very regret!

Who could have thought that a boy of Luo Jinxian would suddenly break into the fairyland at this time!

What’s more terrible is that this guy’s natural disaster is still an ancient disaster!

Even the ancient Holocaust, but this ancient Holocaust is much stronger than the legendary ancient Holocaust. I don’t know how many times!

Something’s wrong!

Looking back thousands of years, the monks present had never seen such a powerful ancient catastrophe.

Is this really a robbery?

This boy didn’t offend heaven, so heaven came to take revenge!

I have to say that they have guessed the truth, but the truth is too amazing, so no one thought about it for a while.

“Xu Ke, think it over. We are Qingyun Taishang gate, which is the sect of Tianmen. You can only spend this Tianjie once. If you kill us, Tianmen will never die with you!” Youxian Zun was so frightened that he had to raise the name of Xianmen, hoping to make Xu que stop.

“Xu Ke, I’m willing to swear by the devil in my heart that as long as you let us go, we will never retaliate, and we will never be enemies with the fried sky Gang again!” Some fairy king even swore on the spot to leave.

However, no matter what they said, Xu que stared at the sky as if he hadn’t heard it.

He slowly lowered his head and looked down at the people. His deep black eyes did not have the slightest emotion. Behind him, thunder and light danced like gods and demons.

He raised his hand and put all the spirit stones thrown out into the system.

“Gentlemen, it seems that this spirit stone is not enough?” Xu que showed a joking smile and whispered.

A fairy King clenched his teeth and directly threw out his storage ring: “Xu Ke, this is all the wealth I brought out.”

The rest of the Immortal King, xianzun, also reacted and threw their storage ring to Xu que.

“Here are all the magic weapons I brought out. Xu Daoyou, please take them.”

“I don’t bring much. If it’s not enough, I can write you an IOU for Xu Daoyou.”

IOU?

Xu que suddenly brightened his eyes and said, “yes, you have a good idea. Then write me an IOU.”

Everyone was stunned, and then turned to glare at the talking fairy king.

Nima!

You’re so free. What’s the IOU!

I just need to hand over my belongings. If these are OK, I still owe an account!

With Xu Kuang’s character, people have no doubt that Xu Kuang will come to the door with an IOU in the future.

After all, this guy knows at a glance that he is not afraid of heaven and earth. Even the immortal Zun of Tianmen dares to pit, let alone the immortal Zun of these small forces.

With a feeling of humiliation, they wrote ious one after another and handed them to Xu que.

A moment later, Xu Xu’s hand had a bunch of IOUs, and he was happy to bloom.

“Qingyun taishangmen owes me three billion spirit stones.”

“The nine tiger blood evil gate owes me three billion spirit stones.” “…” After reading all the IOUs, Xu que put them into the system. He was satisfied and said, “yes, yes, you are very cooperative. The leader of this fried sky Gang likes to make friends with sensible people.” Who the fuck wants to be friends with you! Everyone roared in their hearts. If it weren’t for it, the ancient catastrophes would fall down on their heads. They couldn’t have signed such an unequal IOU! Three billion spirit stones! It’s almost as good as selling them! At this time, several fairy kings who were very slow suddenly appeared from a distance. When I came near, I saw the scene in front of me, and the whole person split directly what? These immortal kings and immortals are locked in by Xu Duan. They are about to cross the sky? ” After hearing the story, the fairy kings couldn’t help feeling a touch of happiness. Fortunately, I’m slow enough, or I’ll be locked up now Gahahaha, the God said, “I want you to run away. You have to listen.” Two dogs stood outside the prohibition, laughing on their hips and arrogant, “it’s called not listening to God’s words. It’s a loss in front of you.” Duan Jiude said with a deep expression on his face: “yes, I have warned you not to offend this boy. You have to chase and kill for so long. I don’t know what you think. I don’t even have one tenth of the handsome and witty of the old man. I dare to fight this boy?” It has always been a proud place in Duan Jiude’s heart to be able to live to this day after many pitfalls. Look at you fairy kings. Usually you are high above each other. As a result, you don’t have to wither when you meet this smelly boy. Old man, I’m different. I’ve cheated this boy many times, but I still talk about today! What’s that? This is called the gap Boom! ” At this time, a deafening noise broke out again over the desert. I saw dozens of golden dragons condensing again behind the first golden dragon. At this time, these golden dragons are frantically absorbing the ancient disasters around them and making their bodies bigger. In addition to Xu que, the people who are under the sky robbery have begun to feel dyspnea, cold sweat on their forehead, and even the Immortal King’s repair is not enough. At this time, they can’t even straighten up. This is the power of robbery! The so-called Shangu catastrophe contains the power of heaven and earth, which is enough to make a fairy King friar collapse directly

chapters.title: Chapter 1710
chapters.body:
Chapter 1710

Chapter 1710

C.1710

If there were not many immortal kings and immortals present, they would share all the pressure. I’m afraid everyone would have fallen down now.

But there is another exception, that is, Xu Ke, who is standing at the center of Tianjie.

His eyes were full of excitement. He raised his head and chest with great momentum and was ready to face the disaster at any time.

All the people who handed over all their wealth and even were forced to write down a huge amount of Lingshi IOU were in a hurry when they saw that Xu que didn’t seem to be moving.

“Xu Daoyou, we gave the spirit stone and wrote the IOU. Is it time to let us out?” A fairy king was like an ant on a hot pot, sweating with anxiety.

But he was not in a hurry. He saw that the disaster was coming soon. If he didn’t go again, it would be too late.

“Huh?”

Xu Xu suddenly looked at him innocently: “when did I say you could go?”

“Er… Xu Daoyou, what do you mean by this?” The Immortal King was slightly stunned, and an ominous premonition filled his heart.

Xu que broke his fingers and said slowly, “I just said you should pay the ransom, right? I also said you don’t have enough ransom, right? The IOU was put forward by you. I just followed your suggestions, but in everything I said, which one said to let you go? ”

what the fuck!

Everyone was stunned.

What do you mean?

Take the spirit stone and don’t let people go?!

Ready to cheat, right!

“Xu Daoyou, don’t be kidding.” The fairy King wiped the cold sweat on his forehead and said with a smiling face, “this matter is very important. Don’t play like this…”

Xu Que’s face was cold and said in a deep voice, “who the fuck is kidding you?”

He glanced at the fairy king xianzun below and sneered: “at the beginning, you took the initiative to hunt me down and want my ancient Buddha inheritance. Now you find that you can’t make it, you want to go, you want to go, where is such a cheap thing? You can all stay here today. As for the suicide note, remember to write it well, it should be a reminder to your future generations. ”

Speaking of this, Xu lacked a pause, and then said in a deep voice: “tell them that if you meet the fried heaven gang in the future, you will give me a detour!”

The sound echoed in the air like thunder, like a sledgehammer hitting people’s hearts.

The fairy King pointed to Xu Wei with trembling fingers and said in a harsh voice, “how dare you fool us? It’s too much to deceive! ”

Xu Ke was immediately happy: “yes, I’m just playing with you. What can you do with me?”

Boom!

At this time, the Golden Dragon on the sky suddenly roared, and then dived down from the air and came straight to Xu.

God, it’s coming!

The crowd suddenly trembled, looked blank, and shouted desperately, “no!”

Click!

A dazzling dragon lightning, like a sharp arrow across the sky, suddenly broke through the air and fell on the Xu’s head in an instant.

At the same time, the heavenly power, which is extremely terrible, also completely locks everyone in the prohibition.

As a robber, Xu que became the first target of the Golden Dragon’s attack.

And in the black thunder clouds, dozens of golden thunder and lightning also fell on the Xianwang xianzun present.

The fairy king who fell outside was stunned when he saw this scene.

Because the number of catastrophes separated from this is at least a few times smaller than the ancient catastrophes Xu lacked asked to experience.

It’s quite different!

If XuKe’s natural disaster is a golden dragon, these lightning bolts are just little snakes.

Even if the dozens of golden lightning add up, it can’t be compared with Xu Xu.

“What’s going on? Why are these golden lightning so small? ”

“Yes, the ancient Holocaust over there is terrible, but in contrast, the ancient Holocaust of these fairy Kings is not a grade at all.”

“Is it difficult that these immortal kings and immortals used any special means to forcibly weaken the power of heaven robbery?”

Several people talked about it one after another. I don’t know why.

Several fairy kings recognized Duan Jiude and wanted to do it, but looking at the terrible disaster in the distance, they finally restrained their mind.

Don’t you see what the brothers in front are like now?

I’m afraid I won’t get it for too long.

“Please give me some advice.” The fairy King arched his hand.

Duan Jiude, a peerless expert, looked ahead, and his eyes were vast and deep: “it’s not impossible to tell you, but… It’s about the secret of heaven. Even if I say it, I’m afraid I will be hated by the heaven. If I get revenge at that time, I’m afraid I don’t have any means to protect myself…”

As he spoke, he stretched out his right hand and posed to rub the money. Several fairy kings smelled the speech and their faces were as ugly as eating shit. Shit, I’m so wordy that I just want benefits This is a healing elixir handed down by my family. It’s very good for healing the injury. Please accept it. ” A fairy King took out a bottle of pill from the storage ring and handed it to him. Duan Jiude quickly explored his hand and put the pill into his arms before two dogs rushed over Damn it, I’m so stingy. I gave you a bottle of pills… “Duan Jiude muttered. The fairy king didn’t hear clearly, frowned and said, “Taoist friend, what are you talking about?” Nothing. I said, “you’re really outstanding. You know you’re an expert at a glance.” Duan Jiude smiled all over his face and introduced to the people, “in fact, this situation is normal. The ancient Holocaust encountered by those immortal kings and immortals is actually the real ancient Holocaust. There are ancient books. The ancient Holocaust under the gods is like a human arm and has infinite power.” This news was told by an old man who had a broad knowledge of the past and the present at that time. Although this place is Xianyun Island, the ancient Holocaust is really rare and unusual, so even these native fairy kings don’t know what the ancient Holocaust was like. At this time, hearing Duan Jiude’s explanation, I couldn’t help but be surprised: “then why is Xu Ke’s ancient catastrophe so fierce? The body is as big as a real dragon, but also lifelike, as if a real nine day dragon had come to the world? ” Duan Jiude smashed his mouth and rubbed his fingers again: “well… This matter involves the sky…” the fairy King twitched at the corners of his mouth and scolded in his heart. Nima’s, can you charge twice? The wicked dog combination is really shameless to the extreme This is the treasure I found from an ancient relic. Please accept it. ” Fairy King Qiang held up his smiling face and handed over a broken fairy weapon. Duan Jiude accepted it with disgust on his face. Then he explained to the people: “because Xu lacks the path of cultivation, heaven and earth think that he belongs to the gods, demons and Buddhas. Therefore, the natural disaster is endless. It looks like everything. It is even more powerful. Kill the gods, kill the Buddhas and kill the demons!”

chapters.body:
Chapter 1711

Chapter 1711

C.1711

Several fairy kings were startled when they heard the speech.

Are you kidding?

Killing gods, killing Buddha and killing demons, just hearing these words has made people fear.

It’s not just them. If any fairy King existed in them, they couldn’t stop for a moment, and they would be broken into fly ash in an instant.

“It’s terrible… Fortunately, I’m so slow.”

“Indeed, if I had run a little faster just now, I’m afraid I’d be trapped in the prohibition now.”

“Fortunately, my master didn’t teach me the body method back then, otherwise I’m afraid something big will happen now…”

It has to be said that the natural disaster experienced by Xu que now has a faint rudiment of the Holocaust.

Although the ancient catastrophes he had experienced before were fierce, they all had their own types and did not contain the real power of ancient catastrophes.

However, with the improvement of cultivation, Xu que felt more and more. There was a great terror in the disaster, which is an irresistible existence for today’s monks.

Although I only felt a trace in the golden dragon, it was enough for he Minghua to treat it carefully.

But this did not surprise Xu Xu.

After all, I built three thousand roads. I just wanted to follow my heart.

If it’s good to hear, it’s another way. If it’s hard to hear, it’s not allowed by heaven and earth.

Living between heaven and earth is like living in a cage. The higher the cultivation, the more you can feel the suppression of this heaven and earth on monks.

It seems to be telling them that no matter what level you cultivate, as long as you are in this world, you should abide by the rules.

Those who do not obey the rules will face great terror.

But what kind of person is Xu Ke?

The leader of the fried sky sect has been a saint for generations. He will never subordinate himself to others today!

Even if it’s the way of heaven, you don’t want me to bow your head!

“Come on! More is not enough! ”

Xu que smiled disdainfully and rose directly into the sky. The whole person was like a sharp sword to pierce the sky and collide with the Golden Dragon.

Boom!

One person and one dragon collided together in an instant!

Before everyone had time to respond, they only saw a dazzling golden awn, full of vision.

The Immortal King xianzun at the bottom finally withstood the ancient catastrophe. The impact caused by the collision between Xu Que and Jinlong instantly knocked most people to the ground.

“God… Is this guy crazy?”

“That’s an ancient catastrophe. He rushed up like this!”

“It’s so hard for us to resist this catastrophe. How did he do it?”

Fairy kings looked into the air with complex eyes, and their hearts were in an unspeakable mood.

What will happen to a great Luo Jinxian who attacks the legendary ancient Holocaust?

“Boom -”

The huge roar echoed continuously, the void around was distorted, and even black cracks filled with terror appeared.

That is the void entrance where space is torn apart.

If you accidentally fall in, you will immediately be involved in the turbulent flow of space. Even if xianzun is in it, it is a situation of ten death and no life.

Seeing the golden awn expanding, it suddenly stopped when it was about to fill the whole sky.

Then, the golden awn dimmed at a speed visible to the naked eye, and then it seemed to stagnate for a moment and burst into pieces.

The huge golden dragon, whose body was like broken glass, turned into countless pieces of golden awn and flew in the air.

The dazzling light bloomed and stabbed people’s eyes, but the people present still tried to look at jinmang and wanted to see what the situation was.

The next second, a worldly figure gradually emerged from the golden awn.

Behind him is a slowly broken golden dragon, surrounded by boundless golden light, like the lower boundary of a real God!

“God… What is he doing?” A fairy king suddenly widened his eyes and said strangely.

Xu Ke was like a magnet, absorbing all the broken golden awns into his body.

That’s an ancient catastrophe!

These people are even difficult to resist, but this guy absorbed them directly?

“He’s absorbing the ancient Holocaust!”

“My God, how is this possible?”

“This guy is so terrible… He can even absorb the ancient Holocaust!”

Whether inside or outside the prohibition, they all burst into a pot.

Everyone stared at Xu Ke in amazement and couldn’t believe their eyes.

What kind of terrible ability is it to absorb after fighting the ancient Holocaust!

Or is this ancient catastrophe not as terrible as it seems?

Such an idea suddenly surged up in a immortal Zun’s heart.

“Will it be possible that the Golden Dragon just looks big, but it doesn’t have such strong power at all?” The immortal Zun guessed, “we all know that the more concise the power is, the stronger the power is. The emptiness has its form, and it doesn’t make any sense at all.” A word awakened the dreamer, and the people who were still in shock immediately returned to God It seems reasonable… “Maybe the most powerful disasters were borne by us. He just shared some of the aftershocks.” The more you think about it, the more likely it is! No wonder he will lock us all up, just to let us help him share the disaster! ” With a beginning, people can not help but associate it, and soon speculate on a result far from the facts. In fact, the ancient catastrophe Xu lacked spent was not so powerful at all. What he suffered was only a small part. The really powerful ancient catastrophe had been shared by these immortal kings and gods! At the thought of this, people could not help gnashing their teeth This bastard, it’s too much! ” That’s right. He stole the ancient Buddha’s inheritance and even entrapped us to help him share the disaster! ” It’s unforgivable! ” A fairy king stood up abruptly and said in a harsh voice: “he can’t take all the benefits. The ancient catastrophe after the fragmentation of the heavenly disaster must have little power left, and we have to absorb it!” As soon as this statement came out, it immediately aroused everyone’s secondment Yes, he can’t take all the benefits! ” Go, go! ” Those immortal zuns who were still struggling to resist the ancient Holocaust briefly recovered and found that they wanted to absorb those golden Mans, so they quickly made a voice to stop them. However, as soon as he opened his mouth, he felt boundless pain, which immediately made him unable to distract himself from other things. Two dogs and Duan Jiude, who were still outside the prohibition, looked strange when they saw the people’s behavior Teacher Duan… I don’t know if Ben shenzun has been overworked recently. I seem to see that the fairy kings seem to want to absorb the ancient Holocaust? ” Teacher Ergou, you are not blind. They really intend to…… “Duan Jiude is stupid. To absorb the ancient Holocaust, are you crazy? Do you think everyone is Xu Ke

Chapter 1712

Chapter 1712

C.1712

Outside the prohibition, the people began to discuss in a low voice.

“You say, why do they suddenly run to absorb the natural disaster?” A fairy King wondered.

Just now, they saw that within the prohibition, several fairy kings suddenly rushed towards Xu que for no reason. Then they began to use Zhenyuan to draw the surrounding golden Mans, trying to absorb the disaster.

“Who knows, I only know they’re dead.” Duan Jiude rolled his eyes and said.

He was in Tianzhou before, but he saw with his own eyes what those fairy kings were cut into by the ancient Holocaust. If their cultivation was a little worse, they were directly cut to death.

The tragedy of that time is still vivid to this day.

“I’ll tell you, there was also a fairy king who didn’t believe in evil. As a result, he was directly split into fire and died in situ!” Duan Jiude began to spread sensational remarks.

Er Gouzi, who had not spoken for a long time, suddenly said, “in the view of God’s respect, they don’t think they can carry down even their shortcomings. There’s no reason why they can’t resist it?”

Several people were stunned, and the more they thought, the more likely they were.

If they were in that position, they might think so.

After all, Xu Ke is a great Luo Jinxian, but who are they?

Which one doesn’t have to be big Luo jinxianqiang?

He can do it, why can’t we?!

Maybe it’s because we shared the disaster for him that this guy spent the disaster so easily!

“No… no, someone really doesn’t have such a number in mind?” Duan Jiude murmured.

Within the prohibition, several fairy kings are cheering for each other.

“That is, this disaster is very good for physical improvement. We must not let him swallow it alone.”

This is what Duan Jiude said. There is no group of people to count in his heart.

There were four or five fairy kings who came together to a place slightly lower than Xu.

As for other people, they are already watching the lower body

After waiting for their successful experiment, they rushed up to rob those golden mans at the first time.

“Are you ready?” A fairy king has covered the body surface with real yuan.

In this way, even if there is an accident, you can operate the skill method to remedy it in time.

The others nodded, “ready!”

“OK, let’s start!”

Several people joined hands to build a Zhenyuan shield to firmly wrap around the body.

At this time, they didn’t leave any hands. Although they subconsciously felt that Xu Ke could be absorbed only by cheating, it was an ancient catastrophe after all, and they didn’t dare to underestimate it.

Xu que glanced at them, ignored them and continued to absorb jinmang.

Some people want to die, and he can’t stop them.

Seeing Xu que ignored them, these fairy kings were determined and more energetic.

“He must think he will be found, so he feels guilty!”

“Yes, I’ll say that a great Luo Jinxian can’t resist the ancient catastrophe so easily!”

“Let’s absorb it quickly and don’t let him take all the benefits.”

A few people whispered, then let go of their hands and feet, ejected Zhenyuan, and tried to pull all the gold mans around.

Under the guidance of Zhenyuan, large tracts of golden awns were attracted to them, like a golden lake.

Several people looked at each other, nodded vigorously, and withdrew the body protection Zhenyuan on the body surface at the same time.

“Come on! Absorb it! ”

A strong suction force broke out from several people, and Jin mang was immediately pulled towards their bodies.

Snap!

Several people suddenly looked stiff. They saw that the golden light was attached to their body surface and began to explode. Even the body of the fairy king could not stop the injury.

“Damn it! What’s going on… Cough! ”

A fairy King roared half way, suddenly bent down and coughed and bled.

He saw a puff of smoke rising from his seven orifices. He looked frightened and shouted in pain: “these golden mans… Are burning my meridians… Ah! What pain! Somebody help me! ”

Unfortunately, not only him, but also several fairy kings around who absorbed golden Mans, one by one, all fell into the same state.

Several people wailed bitterly in mid air, burning holes gradually appeared on their body surfaces, and slender golden arcs burst out from inside to outside, circling and beating around them.

A moment later, several people fell from the air and hit the ground heavily.

Looking carefully, I found that these people had become charred corpses, and the smoke rose slowly, like the passage of life.

Everyone looked at each other, and their brains were confused for a moment. What happened? It’s not a good deal. The ancient Holocaust is nothing more than you. Can I do it? Why did you die suddenly? Xu Xu looked at the scene below and smiled at the corners of his mouth. The joys and sorrows between people are not interlinked, and the experiences between people are also different. If these guys didn’t suddenly get nervous and want to absorb the ancient Holocaust, they might not die so soon. You know, most of the reason why he was able to carry such a powerful ancient robbery was because the flesh was extremely powerful. After being baptized by the melting pot of heaven and earth, his body has completely crushed the prison body of Dacheng Pluto town of Mo Junchen. In addition, now it has been inherited by the ancient Buddha, and the system has integrated it into the Zhengqi seal magic Sutra. It seems that without knowing it, its flesh body has also integrated the golden arhat Dharma, which is the most popular method of Buddhism. Although Xu Kuan is still a little holy body, if he and Mo Junchen rely on the flesh, he doesn’t even need to do his best to crush each other. Compared with themselves, the flesh of these guys is as weak as an ant. How dare they even dream of absorbing the ancient Holocaust? It’s really an old man who eats arsenic – he’s impatient Well, this time it has absorbed a lot of ancient disasters, which is further from my goal. ” Feeling the ancient havoc constantly filled in his body, Xu que could not hide his joy. At that time, he created a method with ordinary Tianlei. Later, the thunder was consumed. After discovering the ancient Holocaust, Xu que came up with the idea of creating a method with the ancient Holocaust again. In fact, the last five fold disaster was already done, but that time it was just a breakthrough to dalaosan fairyland. The ancient disaster was insufficient in both quality and quantity. Taking advantage of this breakthrough, Xu que is ready to absorb all the ancient catastrophes and strive to create a method of self-determination with the ancient catastrophes. At that time, even if you don’t use the righteous Qi seal magic Sutra, you can press these guys on the ground and rub
