chapters.body:
Chapter 1713

Chapter 1713

C.1713

“Well done!”

“If you don’t die, you won’t die…”

In addition to the prohibition, Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi clapped like seals.

It is said that they have seen many people who die, including themselves, who are excellent models of death.

But like these fairy kings, it is rare in the world to die to this extent.

Actually want to use the flesh to absorb the ancient Holocaust?

Even if the Immortal Emperor of Sifang Tianmen is here, I’m afraid he will give a thumbs up and sincerely sigh: “good guy, you have a good job.”

Duan Jiude, with his hands on his back and his face exposed to the vicissitudes of life, said with emotion: “I have to say, this is what makes a generation of talents come out, and a generation of new people change old people!”

Er Gouzi also got up, put on his flowered underpants and raised his cloak behind him: “yes, it’s the so-called back waves of the Yangtze River push forward waves. Mr. Duan, we’re all old.”

“Yes, Mr. Ergou, it’s time for us to think of some new ideas.”

When the fairy king heard the speech, he felt a cold surge from his heart.

Your wicked dog’s means are already very famous!

No more innovation!

Don’t want people to live!

However, the fairy king was very glad that he had slowed everyone down a step just now.

Otherwise, it is estimated that there will be one of the charred corpses lying there.

Within the prohibition, the smell of panic is spreading in the house.

“Isn’t it that those ancient catastrophes are not very powerful?”

“You are blind! I don’t see the bodies are already here! ”

“These are all the strong men at the peak of the fairy King… Can’t even stop a broken golden awn?”

What they don’t know is that with the continuous growth of Xu Ke’s strength, the ancient catastrophe is becoming stronger and stronger.

They didn’t even know that some people were missing this time.

Even he had just suffered a great shock.

I don’t know why, these ancient catastrophes seem to be changing into the real ancient catastrophes that were once terrible and smelled of color change.

It is said that even the Immortal Emperor can’t stop the real ancient catastrophe!

The disaster he has now crossed is just a false disaster with no divine form.

But it doesn’t matter. Seeing these guys being chopped to death is what Xu Ke is most happy to see.

“It’s not over yet!” Xu que sneered and continued to accelerate the absorption of the ancient Holocaust. “Do you want to learn from me to absorb the ancient Holocaust? It’s too much. I can’t even make up my mind about the power that forced the saint to overflow. Do you still have the courage to chase me? Ridiculous! ”

People’s faces were extremely difficult to see, but they couldn’t even say a retort.

As a matter of fact, the Immortal King and strong man at the peak just absorbed a little thunder after the ancient catastrophe and directly hung up.

Xu que not only absorbed the thunder light, but even broke the Golden Dragon completely formed by the ancient catastrophe.

What happened?

No shit, not even a hair!

And he even has the realm of Da Luo Jinxian. Who dares to believe it?

At the same time, an old monk with a sad face is hurrying here.

“The Buddha’s breath appears here… Is it true that the Buddha is here?”

The old monk’s eyes were slightly frozen and looked into the distance. His eyes were full of golden auspicious clouds, including thunder flashes, which looked terrible.

“There are still people who have been robbed here… I have to hurry as soon as possible, otherwise the real Buddha will fall into the hands of others, and I’m afraid it will be difficult for my Buddhist realm to rise again!”

However, after a few breaths, he had reached the forbidden area. He stood on a sand dune and looked at the forbidden area not far away.

“It’s actually a ban jointly set by dozens of immortal kings and immortals. Is it to protect this person from robbery?” The old monk narrowed his eyes slightly, stared for a moment, shook his head, “no, they don’t want to protect this person, but want to imprison this person!”

Er Gouzi, who was talking with Duan Jiude, suddenly looked around and said, “strange… I seem to feel a familiar smell.”

“Familiar breath? Are there any old acquaintances here? ” Duan jiudeton frowned and looked around. He suddenly looked vigilant, “teacher Er Gou, you shouldn’t have offended anyone before. Has someone come to the door?”

“Joke! God wants to be aboveboard. How can he get revenge everywhere? That’s what you do! ”

“Don’t fart! Old man, my nickname is Duan Jiude, a gentleman. I’m eager for justice. I’ll do such shameless things as sneaking around? ”

They didn’t say a few words well, and they immediately pinched each other.

The fairy king on one side silently left a little far away. He felt from his heart that as long as the two goods quarreled, he must be thinking about something to trap people.

However, it is strange that Mingming old monk is standing not far from Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude, but neither they nor the fairy king who is watching have looked past. The nine golden dragons represent the way of heaven. They are extremely unwilling to let this person go through the robbery, so they want to suppress it with huge power of the robbery. There are dozens of golden dragons, even though they are not as powerful as those contained in ancient books. Today, they are enough to become a terrible robbery in the annals of history! What’s the use of you!

The day is so blue and the earth is so yellow

“Boom!”

It was like a tangled ball of wool, which soon turned into a huge ball.

The people around also looked confused. They saw that the number of ancient catastrophes was not as many as Xu Duan. At this time, they didn’t know what the ancient catastrophes were all about.

Bang

Bang

“Strange… I feel my heart beat faster!” A fairy king was surprised. You know, as a fairy king, xianzun has absolute control over his body and will not be affected by the outside world. Although it is said that there is the immortal revered by croton powder, it is only because it is true that it is too insidious and impossible to prevent. After all, letting your opponent control your body is almost like letting your opponent control your life and death. At this time, several fairy kings with low cultivation were already red in the face. The violent beating of the heart accelerated the blood flow of the whole body, and their emotions were excited. Xu Ke’s face gradually became strange. It was the first time he met the ancient catastrophe that had been brewing for so long. I’m afraid it’s far more powerful than the havoc of the past! Bang bang! When the speed of the heartbeat reached the extreme, the dragon ball suddenly contracted and its body size decreased by two-thirds. After a pause, it shrank again. Soon, the original huge dragon ball became a bead the size of a fist. Xu was stunned and suddenly said, “is this the legendary dragon ball?” The beads condensed from a group of golden dragons are dragon beads! Dragon ball? When people look at me and you, they say they haven’t heard of it “But he’s ready for it, isn’t he?” A fairy King wondered I’m afraid so. Even I haven’t heard of the word “dragon ball.” Is it a legendary fairyland thing? ” Someone exclaimed. The fairyland is the place where the legend exists and the final destination of monks. There have been many times in history that people suspected of being left over from the fairyland. In order to compete for these treasures, they have killed a river of blood and bodies everywhere. At this time, they suddenly saw Longzhu, a treasure suspected to be left by the fairy world, and their breathing became heavy. The world is all for profit. Although there is a lesson from the second killing of the fairy king, the eyes of the people still show an expression of greed. If it’s really a fairyland thing, if you get it, you may be able to become the strongest in xianyuanzhou! Even if it is not a fairyland thing, just the quality condensed from the above ancient Haojie is enough to make people move. However, the heart returns to the heart. For the time being, no one dares to rush up and grab it. Under the gaze of the public, countless golden lightning surged from all directions and wrapped the Dragon beads around the Zhu. Brush! When the golden light completely engulfed the dragon ball, it suddenly dispersed, and a slender figure came out, with his forehead on his feet, wearing dragon scales, and a golden long gun in his hand Dragon God! ” The old monk was surprised, “it’s actually the head of the eight heavenly dragons in the legend. How can it appear here!” It’s incredible that the legendary Dharma protector of Buddhism appeared in the disaster! Looking back thousands of years ago, there had never been such a miracle The eight parts are also known as the eight dragon gods. The Dragon God is the leader of the eight parts. Since the Dragon God appears here, that is to say… “The old monk was so excited that he trembled at the thought of the almost non-existent possibility This young man… He is the real Buddha! ” This is the prosperity of our Buddhism! ”

One move, will you see life and death

It’s too embarrassing! ” With these ten humanoid lightning, the ancient havoc thunder in your body must be able to supplement and completely kill them. The self-made law is today

Chapter 1723

C.1723

Ten golden humanoid lightning bolts stood on the sky, behind them were thundering black clouds, and their powerful power came to their faces, which made them breathless.

He said, “what about the sky? Can heaven be high? From today on, I, Xu Ke, the leader of the fried heaven sect, will be a saint for a generation. I want the whole xianyunzhou to remember my name. ”

The sound reverberated in the air like thunder.

Everyone felt the majestic momentum in Xu Que’s words and looked up at the thin figure.

With a wave of his big hand, the black-and-white flames behind him rose and scorched the void.

A magnificent symphony of fate sounded from nowhere, and the sound seemed to press on everyone’s heart.

“This boy… He’s so brave. The ancient catastrophe is right in front of him. He dares to say such words!”

While everyone was feeling, Xu que suddenly shouted, “I want this day, I can’t cover my eyes anymore! I want this place, I can’t bury my heart anymore! I want all living beings to understand what I mean! The Immortal Emperor will disappear! ”

The vigorous momentum spread out, making people tremble, numb in limbs, and almost unable to control their hands and feet.

“My God!”

“This guy is crazy!”

“In the face of the human lightning of the ten immortal emperors, I dare to release such crazy words!”

People seem to have been unable to think of anything, and they have a new understanding of Xu’s arrogance at the bottom of their heart.

Facing the way of heaven, I am not afraid at all, but make such wild remarks!

“Boom -!”

Yongzhen Immortal Emperor was still the first one who couldn’t help but rushed out of the beam and started with Xu que.

The rest of the Immortal Emperor’s human lightning did not move. It seemed to maintain the force that the Immortal Emperor should have, and disdained to punish Xu que together.

This time, the strength of Yongzhen Immortal Emperor did not increase, and Xu que was particularly relaxed and freehand.

“That’s the level of the Immortal Emperor? Not very good. ”

“Do you have any unique skills? Show them.”

“You are the Immortal Emperor. Is it appropriate to be beaten by me?”

Xu Ke is chatting while fighting. 80% of his combat power is used for provocation.

He was deliberately testing whether Yongzhen Immortal Emperor was conscious or not.

When he broke up the previous humanoid lightning just now, he clearly found signs that the other party had consciousness, so he wanted to test whether the other party had consciousness or not.

After all, I have to stay in xianyunzhou for a long time. If the other party really notices, I’d better make preparations in advance.

After all, no matter how strong you are, you are just a immortal.

The four immortal emperors have commanded xianyunzhou for many years. In fact, their power is unfathomable. If they stare at themselves, let alone save xiaorou, they are afraid that they will have to flee back to Tianzhou immediately.

The real strong man is not a reckless man. Xu Xu is very clear about this.

“But as long as you give me time, I can surpass you soon!” Xu que blocked the human lightning and said confidently.

The real strong are also confident in themselves.

In front of him, if there is a mountain, move the mountain, if there is a sea, fill the sea. If there is no chance to force, create the opportunity to force. No one can block his Xu’s lack of road!

Not even the Immortal Emperor!

At this time, the human lightning of Yongzhen Immortal Emperor suddenly raised his hand and waved, and a huge Yin formula appeared out of thin air and bombarded Xu que severely.

Xu Ke didn’t check for a moment and couldn’t avoid it, but he resisted it with the help of Xiaocheng holy body and the automatic repair ability of the system.

“Hey, hey, your Dharma is absolutely painless!”

Xu Ke grinned and directly operated the skill to mobilize the immortal yuan in his body. His body flashed and rushed directly to the human lightning.

“It’s too weak. Go back!”

Xu lacked a burst of drink, and his breath burst out. He pretended to force his fist and burst out boldly.

The human lightning, which was supposed to have no mind, suddenly burst out a look of surprise in his eyes. His arms stopped horizontally to block the punch.

Xu que keenly caught the change in each other’s eyes and sneered: “you are really conscious of it. It seems that you immortal emperors are not so loyal to the way of heaven.”

When the fist was about to fall, Xu que stopped the fist, twisted his body violently in mid air, drew a whole circle with his fist and bombarded it out again.

It is this moment of delay that makes the humanoid lightning action appear loopholes. Bang! The human lightning of Yongzhen Immortal Emperor was directly blown upside down and involved in thunder clouds. Xu Duan stood proudly in place, moved his wrist and looked disdainful: “I thought how strong the Immortal Emperor was. That’s all!” Within the prohibition, the trapped immortal kings and immortals have been completely stupid God… This guy’s strength has become stronger again… “Obviously, he was still pressed and beaten before. Now he can suppress the human lightning of Yongzhen Immortal Emperor.” It’s terrible. I’m afraid no one can limit him in the future! ” Xu Xu looked at the remaining nine human lightning on his head, and his eyes gradually became dignified. If the next nine human lightning flashes are like eternal truth and have their own touch of consciousness, he can’t even stop it. And in the process of fighting Yongzhen, Xu que also found one thing. The human lightning condensed by the way of heaven should have no consciousness, but Yongzhen broke this law. That only shows that he is already trying to seize the power of heaven You immortal emperors are respectful to the way of heaven on the surface, but you are not a good man in private… “Xu Wei felt cold in his heart and felt more and more uneasy about xiaorou staying at the gate of heaven. In his opinion, the four heavenly emperors didn’t look like that kind of good person at all. They would try their best to cultivate her because they found a peerless genius. It’s only possible that they want to get something from xiaorou. In addition, Xu Xu can’t think of other reasons Boom -! ” It seems that Yongzhen was defeated, Tianjie was vaguely angry, and a violent thunder came again. The nine motionless figures first shook and then slowly floated towards Xu lack. At the same time, the human lightning of Yongzhen Immortal Emperor also drilled out of the thunder cloud, and the wound on his body was quickly made up by the thunder. At this moment, the huge pressure fell. Ten emperors come

crazy!

A moment later, the old monk shook his head, couldn’t understand it, and focused on Xu Ke again.

He didn’t even care whether Xu Ke was the reincarnation of the real Buddha, but wondered how he would fight the human lightning of the ten immortal emperors.

Even if you go out on your own, I’m afraid it will take a lot of effort and even consume the source to clean up.

As for the reincarnation of the real Buddha

“Amitabha, the old monk feels that there is a strong smell of Buddhism on this son. It must be our Buddha.” The monk recited the Buddha’s number to comfort himself.

Anyway, as long as it has Buddhist flavor and is strong enough, it’s not a big problem to take it back to be a Buddha.

Three hundred miles away, a man and a dog meet again.

Two dogs are lowering their hands and digging holes in the direction of shovel. They laugh heartily and say, “Oh, how clever are you, Mr. Duan? Did you go home and turn off the fire?”

“Two dog teacher, we really have fate. Didn’t you go back to collect your clothes?” Duan Jiude also put away the array plate he had just prepared to send to the heaven and earth, and smiled.

“Hey, Ben shenzun suddenly felt that the safety of brother Duan couldn’t be better than a dress?” Er Gouzi said righteously, “as the deputy leader of the fried heaven sect, saving the sect is intolerable!”

Duan Jiude’s tears filled his eyes. He grabbed Er Gou’s hand and said excitedly, “Er Gou’s teacher’s words were deafening and enlightening, which moved the old man.”

Then he wiped a tear: “old man, I also think that as an elder of the fried heaven Gang, even if brother Ke is doomed to die today, we should at least take his body back and make him safe!” Teacher Duan! ” Two dog teacher! ” A man and a dog, holding hands and looking at each other with tears in their eyes, were speechless and choked. After a long time, Duan Jiude took a deep breath and said excitedly, “in that case, it’s better to use the array plate under the to go back together and save brother Kuan!” Two dogs threw their shovel in their hands and excited: “good! It all depends on Mr. Duan! ” Duan Jiude arranged the array, the light gradually lit up, and their shadows gradually blurred. The two looked at each other with a kind smile. Two dogs: shit, I didn’t cheat the dead old man! Duan Jiude: hum, I guessed you were coming back! These two pit goods didn’t think Xu Ke would lose at the beginning. Because they know Xu Ke too well and won’t do anything uncertain. Since he chose to play against the human lightning of the ten immortal emperors, it shows that Xu Ke is confident that he can defeat them. Everything just now is just a play made by the two to deceive each other. After all, if one of them left and Xu que cleaned up the human lightning later, wouldn’t there be so many fairy kings and immortals present to blackmail him? In order to enjoy the exclusive benefits, the two guys tried their tricks, but they ended up in the same way. The old monk was paying attention to Xu Ke and suddenly noticed that there was a breath of transmission array around him. When I looked at it, I was stunned. Aren’t these two goods gone just now? Why did you suddenly come back? Take a closer look, good guy! The dog smelled like a fairy weapon and was secretly preparing to suppress each other. On the old man, there was a faint smell of killing array, and the target was the dog. But on the surface, it is still a kind expression. It is most appropriate to describe it with a smile. The old monk could not help shaking his head and sighing. Do young people today behave like this?

Xu que put away the storage ring and said solemnly, “I’ve always been the most appreciative person of current affairs. Since you have such foresight, you should give it to your friends. If you don’t know each other, go.”

The fairy king was overjoyed when he heard the speech. He got up and walked out.

After taking two steps, I looked back and found Xu que smiling at him and running straight away.

Seeing this, the Immortal King and immortal statue took out their storage rings.

“Xu Daoyou, this is my full wealth. Please accept it.”

“Xu Daoyou, let’s also make a friend. When I return to the sect, I will certainly introduce myself to the sect leader. We are the top ten gates of xianyunzhou!”

“Go along, Xu Daoyou. There is a little girl in my family who hasn’t got a suitable Taoist partner yet. I think Xu Daoyou is a good match because she is radiant and handsome…”

Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude felt that their world outlook had been refreshed. Unexpectedly, these fairy kings and immortals looked superior. Unexpectedly, when they were shameless, they became more and more shameful.

“Bah, I have no backbone. Even my daughter came out!” Two dogs spit, not without disdain.

Seeing this, the fairy King gathered around Er Gouzi and said in a low voice, “this dog Taoist friend, there is a spirit beast at home. It can be said that he is beautiful…”

“I think you are very suitable to join our fried heaven Gang!” Two dogs instantly changed their faces, patted each other on the shoulder and said with appreciation, “why don’t we go to your house in a minute?”

Xu Wei takes all the storage rings into his arms and wonders when he will get a big reward for the robbery.

One robbery can bring so many benefits. If you rob twice more, wouldn’t you be as rich as xianyunzhou?

But it’s urgent to leave.

The terrible breath just now is really frightening. Xu Ke is sure that if the owner of the breath appears, no one can escape.

“All right, two dogs quickly withdraw!” Seeing that Er Gouzi was still chatting with people, Xu que grabbed her back neck and was about to leave.

“Hey! Don’t pull this God, the one over there, let’s go to your house for dinner… ”

Boom!

At this time, a powerful threat came.

Xu Ke’s face suddenly changed, as if a huge mountain was pressed on his shoulder, which directly pressed him down.

Not only him, but also the surrounding Immortal King xianzun, including ER Gouzi and Duan Jiude, were suppressed.

Those with weak cultivation even lay on the ground and couldn’t move.

“Shit… What the hell?” Xu que turned back hard and looked behind him. He was shocked and said, “lying in the trough! What’s that?! ”

The rest of the crowd heard the speech, turned around and looked at it, and immediately petrified on the spot.

I saw a huge figure looming in the sea of fire. The figure was about tens of feet high and had two horns. The surrounding flames didn’t seem to have any influence on him, and even had a tendency to be absorbed by it. That’s a Kirin fire combined with natural disaster! Even Xu lacked himself and dared not absorb those flames Sakyamuni! Unexpectedly… You have suppressed me for so many years, and I still have a day to see the sun again! ” A burst of wild laughter came, containing boundless terror, setting off a gust of wind Click! ” Dozens of immortal kings and immortals jointly set the ban, because each other’s words were directly fragmented! When the strong wind came, Xu Ke felt a burst of chest tightness, and the blood flow around him was slow. This feeling is terrible… The other person doesn’t look like human at all! Xu Ke seemed to return to the sense of oppression from the beast when he first faced the tiger. It has nothing to do with strength, but naked suppression from the essence of life Two dogs! Draw the transmission array quickly! ” Xu que suddenly ran Xianyun and shouted at Er Gouzi, “the wind is pulling!” Two dogs son smell speech, dare not neglect, hurriedly depict on the ground. A moment later, a transmission array appeared in front of several people. Two dogs raised their hands and patted, and the complex array patterns suddenly lit up. The glittering white light gradually diffused out. Just when the three people were about to be shrouded in it, they suddenly “clicked”, turned into countless light spots and broke What is it? ” Xu Xu was almost crazy. “What are you doing?” Two dogs were stunned. Instead, Duan Jiude suddenly patted his thigh and said in pain: “NIMA, just now we engraved the prohibition and killing array around us and prohibited the use of any transmission array. We can’t use the transmission array now!” Woge! Xu Ke is a fool. He has the heart to whip the corpse of a man and a dog in his heart. You really don’t have enough success and more than enough failure

I saw a fairy king suddenly gush out of his body. He was impressively a generation with a firm mind. He forced himself to carry the threat of terror and made a decision.

Duan Jiude looked like an old God. He pinched his fingers and said, “don’t disturb the old man. I’m calculating. I suspect there are demons here!”

“Ha ha…”

Xu que turns a blind eye. You don’t have to ask why these two goods set up a killing array.

Most of them see that they have finished all the people, so they are ready to come and pick up the leak. Who knows when they meet a demon who doesn’t know where to run out.

Well, I can’t just lock others up, but I can’t run away with myself!

“What the hell is this?” Xu que raised his head with difficulty and looked at the huge figure.

The other party’s figure seemed unreal, shrouded by the blazing flame and distorted. Those golden thunder, lightning and flame were constantly absorbed by him.

As the figure gradually solidified, the smell of terror became stronger and stronger. Even the ten immortal emperors just came out together, they didn’t feel this way.

“Sakyamuni! Get out of here! ”

The figure suddenly roared, his arms shook, and the air wave spread in a flash.

Poof! Poof! Poof!

Overwhelmed on the ground, several fairy kings with weak cultivation gave a stuffy hum on the spot, spewed out blood, and fainted directly.

Even if the power of the other party is not aimed at them, there is still a layer of prohibition between the two sides, but they are still hard hit.

No one can resist the destructive power of this terror.

All the friars arrived with a thrill and fear.

“Boom -!”

At this time, the thunder clouds that had been blown up suddenly gathered again and roared.

I don’t know why, he vaguely felt that the thunder this time seemed different from before… In his anger, he seemed to have a touch of fear.

The discovery shocked him immediately.

What is the origin of this figure?!

There is even a trace of fear of robbery!

Before he thought it over, countless golden thunderlights fell from the sky, like pouring rain, turning the scope of the prohibition into a sea of thunder.

Then, a “click” sound of breaking sounded.

Under the stunned gaze of the people, the prohibition jointly constructed by the people was suddenly fragmented!

The towering sea of fire poured out with golden thunder, and in an instant swallowed the fairy kings closest to the prohibition.

The higher immortal statue directly bounced up.

In the face of the fear of death, they even let them break through the coercion and forcibly drive their bodies.

Xu que also widened his eyes and directly displayed the positive Qi seal magic Sutra: “two dogs, array!”

It must be too late to run. Combined with the power of restraining the fragmentation and the suppression of the flame for a long time, the explosion speed is much faster than they imagined.

Xu Que’s eyes burst into golden thunder, and his black hair quickly turned into silver.

A terrible smell suddenly came!

It seems that there have been some unexpected changes after the Zhengqi seal magic Sutra has broken through to the third level, but Xu lack has no time to check it now.

He held his hands high, and the immortal yuan poured out madly, condensed in his palm, and cast the immortal level decision at the same time.

“Is the array ready?” Xu que roared.

Two dogs hurriedly took things out of their stomachs and began to run around.

Duan Jiude didn’t dare to neglect. He threw all kinds of materials out to help ergouzi arrange the array Nima’s! Put this stone over there! ” Stop the ink, hurry up, you silly dog, and arrange it first! ” Both of them are greedy for life and fear of death. At this time, they are in a crisis of life and death, which has aroused their potential and the action of array arrangement is fast. The sea of fire came near in a twinkling of an eye, and the blazing temperature came on his face, even made Xu lack feel that his hair began to burn. Just as the sea of fire was about to reach his eyes, two dogs roared, “the cloth is ready!” Good! ” Xu Kui took a deep breath, and Xianyuan burst out madly, and xianjue burst out suddenly Open! ” A powerful and unparalleled force burst out in an instant and split into the sea of fire like sword light. With his current strength, he can kill the fairy King level, but he can fall on the sea of fire, but he can only block the progress of the sea of fire and leave a living space for several people Hurry and give me the killing array you made! ” Xu Wei tried his best to stop the sea of fire, turned his head and shouted to ER Gouzi, “we’ll have to finish the ball if we don’t go again!” The strength of the other party has far exceeded the cognition of the three people. Even Xu que doesn’t think he has the ability to stop the other party. What’s more, it also includes his own flame and the ancient catastrophe after the thunder cloud broke. Don’t say it’s him. It’s hard to be kind even if there is an Immortal Emperor Wait for me! ” Two dogs rushed around and began to break through. The huge figure seemed to notice the movement here and suddenly moved towards them. Xu que suddenly felt a jump in his heart. Just as he was preparing to retreat back, an old voice suddenly sounded in his ear Little friend, this is a supernatural devil. If you hold him for a quarter of an hour, I will seal it again. ” Xu que was stunned. Looking back to the other side, he found an old monk standing in the sea of fire. The flame that almost burns the immortal statue into carbon seems to have no effect on the old monk

chapters.body:
Chapter 1733

Chapter 1733

C.1733

“Why should I trust you?” Xu Kushen asked in a confused voice.

Where did the old monk come from?

I haven’t seen it before!

The old monk stands in the sea of fire, but it seems that he does not exist.

Xu que explored the past with his soul. He couldn’t feel the existence of the old monk at all. If he didn’t see each other with the naked eye, he was afraid that he thought he was hearing hallucinations just now.

The old monk was silent for a moment and suddenly raised his hand to play a Buddha light.

“What is it?”

Xu Ke subconsciously caught it, and then found that the flame in front of him began to recede!

Even the performer, who can’t control the sea of fire, was pushed back by the old monk’s Buddha light?

Hiss

Where can I breathe a little more air?

“Are you kidding?” Xu missed pointing to the huge figure, “shall I go to the top? What do I take? ”

“Little friend, since you have inherited the inheritance of my true Buddha, this thing is just a soul division. Naturally, it can.” The old monk kindly advised.

Split the soul?

Xu Ke was stunned. He looked at it again and suddenly found the problem.

Although the figure was huge, its circumference was blurred and its body was illusory.

Even after absorbing the sea of fire, it is still not as solid as ordinary people, as if looking at things through a layer of ground glass.

“Well, I’ll go now!” Xu que suddenly became stiff.

It’s just a matter of dividing the soul. Can’t we make it possible to force the saint?

Joke, today I’ll show you the strength of the fried sky Gang!

But before leaving, Xu que told Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude to help him keep an eye on the old monk.

“This old thing appears so strange that it may have been peeping around for a long time. I don’t know what I’m comfortable with.” Xu que whispered, “keep an eye on him.”

Two dogs and Duan Jiude promised.

“Don’t worry, brother lack!”

“That is, can’t God respect this little thing?”

Seeing that they are full of confidence, Xu wants to be the same. They just stare at individuals. If they can’t do this well, they might as well die in situ.

“I’m coming!”

Xukuxianyuan drum Dang, directly into the gradually weakening sea of fire.

Seeing Xu Ke’s back go away, er Gouzi and Duan Jiude looked at each other. They were in a flash and came to the old monk’s side in the twinkling of an eye.

Two pits of goods, one left and one right, locked their eyes on the old monk.

The old monk was stunned and said helplessly: “two Taoist friends, I won’t harm this little friend. I don’t have to stare at the poor monk like this.”

“No!”

Both speak in the same channel.

The second dog son had a natural look on his face: “brother lack has explained that we should keep an eye on you!”

“That’s right!” Duan Jiude said eloquently, “we are the mainstay of the fried heaven sect. We are the pillars of the sect. We will definitely strictly complete the task of the sect leader!”

The old monk was silent for a moment and decided to ignore them.

Two dogs and Duan Jiude looked at each other and nodded.

In this way, they completed the task assigned by brother Ke, did not have to conflict with the old monk, and did not need to face the monster like a God and a devil.

It’s a good trick to kill three birds with one stone!

The old monk put his hands together, recited the Buddha’s name silently, and the Golden Buddha light kept pouring from his body.

These Buddha lights gradually solidified behind them and turned into a tall figure with a strong smell of Buddhist monks.

Just seeing that figure makes people feel peaceful.

“With the strength of my little friend and the Buddhist light of my Buddhist relics, I should be able to resist this demon. Unfortunately… I can only condense the golden and angry Dharma phase.” The old monk’s gray eyebrows wrinkled slightly and worried, “looking at the shape of this demon, is it true that the legend in Buddhism was true?”

According to the old monk’s understanding, it is said that countless years ago, the master of the real Buddha at that time was named Shakyamuni.

The Buddha master was born with a transparent Buddha heart. He can understand the truth of any Buddhist dharma at a glance. In just a few hundred years, his cultivation has advanced by leaps and bounds. He has become the master of the Buddhist realm and his cultivation is comparable to that of the Immortal Emperor.

Several years after he became the Lord of Buddha, a peerless demon suddenly appeared in the Buddhist realm. This demon was extremely ferocious and blood flowed everywhere.

Buddha Sakyamuni could not bear the suffering of ordinary people. He went to seal the demon alone. Finally, he took his body as a seal and sealed it in an unknown place.

There was no one in this place until many years ago. It was rumored that the God killing desert in the Buddhist realm was the place where demons were suppressed.

At that time, a large number of monks went to explore, but they finally got nothing, and the rumors gradually disappeared in the crowd.

Unexpectedly, today he just came to explore the place where the Buddha is, and he can really find the trace of demons I don’t know whether this trip is a blessing or a curse. If you really have the reincarnation power of the Buddha, it’s not a problem to resist this demon… “He said, looking up to the front to see how Xu lacked did. By virtue of the way, Xu Xian walked through the fire step and walked into the fire step. As for the golden lightning, he naturally laughed at it without hesitation. Although the body has been fully absorbed, the excess ancient havoc can be condensed alone to form something almost like thunder beads. At that time, fight and throw out a few thunder beads directly. No matter what immortal you are, you have to kneel. Not far from the figure, Xu que looked up. Close, Xu Weicai found that the other party’s body was shrouded in a thick black fog, completely covering up his body shape. He felt the blessing from the light of the Buddhist relic around him. A proud smile appeared at the corners of his mouth and hooked his fingers at the huge figure Ugly, come and hit me! ” what the fuck! The old monk is stupid! Amitabha, I want you to stop it, not to provoke it! You’re killing yourself by doing this! The huge figure, aware of the existence of deficiency, the huge head was slightly lower. At the moment of seeing the deficiency, his eyes suddenly burst into flames in the black fog, as if stimulated by something It’s you! Sakyamuni… No! You are not him… I understand, I understand, ha ha ha ha! ” The figure said a few words and suddenly laughed wildly, “Sakya, you bastard! I’m dead! Now it’s reduced to letting the younger generation inherit your mantle! It’s pathetic! ” Suddenly, he stopped, and a strong killing intention burst out of his huge pupils: “in that case… I will personally bury your mantle and let you completely disappear in the world!”

Chapter 1734

C.1734

Xu que was stunned, suddenly surprised, and suddenly looked back at the old monk. He couldn’t believe it.

Grass!

Sakyamuni is the Buddha!

I said how it felt wrong!

Normally, if this thing is sealed by some ancient power, there’s no reason to get through a disaster by yourself!

Well, is the feeling special? No wonder the other party will be so angry because of their inheritance.

As the king of routine, Xu que straightened out his ideas in an instant.

Because the breath revealed when he broke through led to the awakening of the demon buried in the desert.

Shit, this thing is just a split soul. It’s so fierce that it can’t stand it at all!

Although Xu Xu is unhappy, he still has to act according to his ability. If he doesn’t run away, he will have to explain here.

I still have so many big things to do. So many girls are waiting for me to save.

With a “whoosh” sound, the immortal cloud drum dangled under his feet, took Yu steps, and ran back quickly.

What the old monk is Farting!

At this time, the old monk was helpless and sighed: “little friend… I have the intention to save you. How can I pit you?”

Although he is not the opponent of the demon, he can hide in the dark and block the opponent as long as Xu is careful.

But for his howling voice, the other party would never have found him.

You know, what appears now is just a demon dividing the soul.

“Die!”

Even if the light of the Buddhist relic he gave is not good enough, it should not be cracked directly.

Besides, aren’t these two goods friends of the young man?

How can you run faster than yourself?!

At this time, Xu Ke, who was in the dark fog, felt the unparalleled rage sweeping towards him.

Bloodthirsty, tyranny, cruelty, killing… Countless feelings are contained in it, like a huge tsunami, almost destroying his consciousness.

“Oh!”

Xu Ke subconsciously covers his head and has almost no way to think normally.

“Ding, it is detected that the host is in the magic Qi environment. Do you absorb the magic Qi to supplement the positive Qi and seal the magic Sutra?”

The system prompt sound sounded in his mind, and Xu Ke’s eyes suddenly burst into surprise.

The system is awesome!

Even this thing can be done!

“Suck, suck, suck, suck!” Xu Ke didn’t even think about it. He directly asked the system to start absorbing.

“Ding, start to absorb the magic Qi.”

“It is being absorbed. Please keep the host in a state. The absorption will stop when the magic gas concentration drops to a certain extent.”

The consciousness that had been suppressed almost collapsed began to become comfortable at this moment.

“Ah… Comfortable.”

Xu Wei felt like he was soaking in a hot spring. He was warm all over, and even exchanged a recliner from the system.

“System, some music.” Xu que snapped his fingers and ordered.

A melodious symphony of fate sounded, and the black air around began to fluctuate rhythmically with the rhythm of the music.

Of course, the demon didn’t feel what happened in the black fog. Devouring Xu que, the demon seemed to have fulfilled his great wish and suddenly burst into laughter Ha ha ha ha! Sakyamuni, you sealed me here. I didn’t expect this to happen! ” The image of the devil gradually materialized. With the gradual improvement of his image, the whole desert began to tremble, countless gravel was beating wildly, and a strong and terrible breath came Boom -! ” The rolling black clouds came from the sky. This time, it was not a disaster, but heaven and earth felt the birth of a great demon, so they showed signs to remind the world that a demon had come to the world. Outside, the old monk looked forward with a sad face, and his heart was extremely desolate. I thought I could find the Buddha this time, but I didn’t expect to accidentally release the soul of this demon My Buddha is merciful. Even if I sacrifice this body today, I will suppress you! ” The old monk roared. The golden body Dharma behind him solidified and turned into a golden arhat up to several feet, which was revealed in the world. The strong Buddha light shines on the whole sky, and countless golden light columns are transmitted from the black clouds. The strong cultivation breath is undoubtedly revealed at this moment. The peak of xianzun realm! No, even stronger! This seemingly unsightly old monk is already a strong man at the top of Xianyun island! The demon was also attracted by the old monk’s accomplishments. He looked down at the old monk and said hoarsely, “immortal territory? Has the inheritance of the disciples left by Sakyamuni been so weak now? ” amitabha! The Buddha said, “those with golden eyes and angry eyes expel all kinds of demons in the world!” With a loud cry, the old monk immediately stepped forward, raised his golden palm and suppressed the demon. Endless Buddha light poured out from the old monk and poured out all over the world. However, in the face of this scene, the demon just sneered, raised his dark palm and pressed it forward. Boom! The unparalleled Buddha light seemed to be blocked by something and poured away in an instant Poof! ” As soon as the old monk’s face changed, he even changed his moves. He directly ejected a mouthful of blood, and his face was as white as gold paper. Unexpectedly… I broke my golden anger with one palm

chapters.title: Chapter 1735
chapters.body:
Chapter 1735

Chapter 1735

C.1735

“This… How is this possible?”

The old monk could hardly believe what he saw.

He has been practicing Buddhism for many years. Looking at xianyunzhou, only a few people can compete with him in Buddhism.

The golden anger I just showed is the Mahayana Vajra Dharma in the Buddhist dharma, which has an overwhelming power over the demons in the world.

Even monsters who have also reached the immortal realm can’t stand this move for a quarter of an hour.

The great demon broke his golden anger with one palm!

Also let yourself be seriously backfired!

And this is just a wisp of soul, it’s hard to believe!

“Old monk, the Buddha is so angry that you haven’t even learned a third of the power of the Buddha. Do you still want to suppress this seat?” The black air was swirling, and the demon looked down on the old monk with disdain in his voice. “If Sakya uses this move, I’m afraid of him. As for you… Die obediently!”

The demon sneered, raised his dark palm and pressed it towards the old monk: “go to the hell and tell Sakya that the day when I completely get out of trouble is the time when his Buddhism will be extinct!”

As soon as the old monk gritted his teeth, he forcibly climbed up from the ground, sat down cross legged, folded his hands, and recited the Buddhist scriptures loudly.

“When you look at the free Bodhisattva and walk deep like a wave, you will see many times…”

The magnificent immortal yuan poured out of the old monk, and the strong golden light fell from the sky and shrouded the old monk.

Behind it, the already dispirited golden gangnu image was illuminated by the golden light and solidified again.

“Evil, if you have a poor monk here, you will never be born!”

The old monk roared, and countless golden meridians suddenly appeared on the surface of his body. A large amount of golden light swam in his meridians, as if fish were swimming in the river.

At the same time, the huge statue of Jin Gang’s angry eyes also sat down with his knees crossed, his expression gradually became calm, his hands folded, and unexpectedly assumed the same posture as the old monk.

“Buddha’s true form? You old man has some skills. ” The demon was a little surprised. He didn’t expect that the old monk could cultivate this dharma phase. “Unfortunately… When I met you today, you Buddha will never become a real Buddha again!”

The demon looked up and shouted, “red dragon!”

The black gas surged up in an instant and gathered in the palm to form a huge black dragon.

“Roar!”

The Dragon bows its head and sounds like a flood!

The surrounding space was distorted by this roar, and the visible ripples spilled out, and the surrounding gravel was instantly annihilated under the impact.

“Demon!” With a roar, the old monk showed his green tendons on his forehead, turned his palms to the sky, and suddenly pushed, “convert to my Buddha!”

Boom!

Buddha’s true shape, palm facing the sky, suddenly pushed forward!

It looked very slow, but in fact it came to the demon in the blink of an eye.

“Hum, overestimate yourself!” The demon sneered and pressed down with one palm.

With a roar, the black dragon opened its ferocious mouth and bit towards the true shape of the Buddha.

Bang!

In an instant, the Buddha’s true form collided with the dragon and directly rushed the crowd around to fly.

The immortal kings and immortals who survived were already shocked to see this scene.

“Oh, my God, what’s the level of battle?”

“The old monk is just an immortal realm. He can play such a powerful force!”

“The point is where did this demon come from?”

“It’s terrible. The strength of this demon is comparable to that of the Immortal Emperor! I’ve never seen such a powerful existence! ”

People don’t know that the demon is just a soul.

If I knew about it, I’m afraid I would faint on the spot.

A soul division can give play to such strength. If the noumenon is born, xianyunzhou may have to die!

The Immortal King xianzun present, whose cultivation is not strong, can only be regarded as a medium level.

Therefore, they can’t intervene in this level of battle at all. They can only hope that the old monk can stop it.

“Boom!”

The black dragon was in a stalemate with the Buddha. Seeing this, the old monk roared, and golden flames began to appear all over his body.

“Old man, how dare you burn your Buddha origin?” The demon was surprised and said, “your master hasn’t taught you. Burning the source of the Buddha will make you lose your soul after death. Won’t you go into reincarnation?”

The old monk bit his teeth and spilled blood from the corners of his mouth: “as long as you can suppress the demon, what’s wrong with losing your soul!”

“Have backbone!” The demon laughed twice and raised his other hand. “In that case, I’ll send you on the road!”

He saw the same black gas gushing out of his other hand, converging into a black dragon, roaring up to the sky and swallowing towards the true form of the Buddha.

The old monk’s eyes were about to crack: “you… You still have spare strength?!” He thought that burning the Buddha’s source was enough to suppress the demon. But I didn’t expect that the demon had been banned for many years, but it still had such strong strength that it hadn’t even been revealed before Go and see your Buddha! ” The demon laughed wildly. Two black dragons entangled together and jumped at the Golden Buddha’s true shape, click! Under the astonished gaze of the people, the huge Buddha was blown out of a crack in an instant! The crack spread like a spider’s web, and soon covered the whole body of the true shape, and then broke with a bang Poof! ” The old monk immediately spewed out a mouthful of blood, and the whole man flew upside down, passed over the people and landed in the distant desert. He didn’t know whether he was alive or dead. Everyone’s heart suddenly sank to the bottom of the valley It’s over… Even the eminent monk can’t stop us. We’re dead! ” Run away! What are you doing standing here! ” Don’t go to the theatre. Hurry back to the sect door and ask the sect leader to do it! ” Just as they wanted to escape, a chill suddenly came through their bones. They slowly turned back and saw two red beams coming through and falling on them in the black fog Hey, hey… You little snacks will become the first help to our breakthrough! ” Ferocious voice, with endless killing intention! A huge black fog big hand stretched out, covered the sky and the sun, and grabbed it at the people. Everyone’s face was like gold paper, and their breathing was almost stagnant at this moment. Not surprisingly, they will be greeted by endless darkness and destruction! Bang! The big hand of the black fog fell down and drowned the people. The demon nodded with satisfaction. holy crap

Er Gouzi didn’t know when he put on his red cloak. He had a pair of sunglasses on his nose and his hands on his back. He looked indifferent to the situation.

He sighed and said sadly, “Alas, I can’t go to hell. Who goes to hell? Now that the devil is here, I don’t want the friars in the world to suffer, so I’m willing to stop the devil with my body. Don’t stop me!”

When Duan Jiude heard the speech, he rolled in place and howled: “no, deputy leader, you can’t do this!”

How do you feel familiar with this scene… It seems that you have seen it somewhere?

Seeing that they didn’t wake up, the second dog son rushed to Duan Jiude with his claws on his back.

Don’t howl, hurry out and help god respect the court!

Duan Jiude’s reaction was not unpleasant. He directly turned over and got up from the ground and stood next to ER Gouzi with a dignified look Now that you have made this decision, as a member of the fried heaven sect, I can’t fall behind. ” Duan Jiude solemnly said, “the elder has decided to share life and death with the Deputy guild leader and use the forbidden move together!” Two dogs heard the speech, grabbed Duan Jiude’s hand and said in a deep voice, “elder Duan, have you decided?” Duan Jiude held Er Gouzi, tears in his eyes, and said excitedly, “it’s my elder’s honor to go to the yellow spring with the deputy leader to suppress demons!” One person, one dog, care for each other without words, only the feeling of sympathizing with each other is spreading! Everyone looked at each other and didn’t know what to say for a moment. A dog may be bragging. But now it’s true that one person and one dog… Should it be true? Tell us quickly, or the demon will react and we won’t be able to run away. ” Yes, Taoist friends, say it quickly. ” The second dog grinned and quickly took it back with a cold face: “OK! The two dogs didn’t even look at it. They waved their big hands directly, and there was a faint light on their stomach. With a “whoosh”, they sucked all the things into their stomach Ladies and gentlemen, I’m going to use the forbidden move! ” Two dogs shouted, legs slightly bent, the whole body burst out vigorous Xianyuan. They were also excited and clenched their fists subconsciously. Great. Sure enough, the fried heaven sect is still reliable! Bang! With a dull noise, the two dogs ran back like a sharp arrow. I saw the figures of Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude go away… Away… Until they disappear completely. Everyone looked at each other with confusion in their eyes. What about the big move? Where’s the agreed forbidden move

From past experience, er Gouzi is usually unreliable, but he never misses anything he recalls every time, and these people have saved themselves from danger by relying on ER Gouzi’s memory many times.

The second dog son whispered, “boy, this thing in front of you is an extraterritorial demon. In those years, xianyunzhou was plagued. Even the Immortal Emperor can’t take him. Be careful yourself.”

Xu Wei was going to make a mockery. When he heard Er Gouzi’s words, he was stunned: “what foreign demons? Is there such a thing in the world? ”

Are you kidding?

Such things as extraterritorial demons are fundamentally different from the painting style of xianyunzhou, okay!

Previously, whether in Wuxing mountain or Tianzhou, although there were monsters, they were all suppressed miserably.

The main reason is that the friars of the Terran are too powerful. There are many sects in all sides. Just one can crush the whole audience.

In the battle of Wuxing mountain, Mo Junchen alone could block the whole army of the sea family, which can be seen from the weakness of the demon family.

“Boy, you don’t understand. The extraterritorial demons and demons are not the same species.” As soon as ergouzi heard it, he knew what Xu Xu was thinking and explained, “just like this God is not a demon.”

“Yes, you are a dog.”

Xu Wei didn’t notice the words behind, but was shocked by the explanation in front of Er Gouzi.

Did you remember it again?

How many lives have you reincarnated?

How come you can see things in the desert where birds don’t shit in Temo xianyunzhou!

“It doesn’t matter. No matter what nonsense he is, foreign demons are all local chickens and dogs in front of our guild leader! Vulnerable! ” Xu que waved his big hand and said proudly.

Two dogs immediately worried: “don’t take it to heart, you boy, the strength of foreign demons is not what you can imagine!”

Xu Ke ha ha twice. Is this still imaginative? It’s already in front of you, okay Asshole! Bastard! ” At this time, the demon was extremely angry and frightened. In front of him, this human is just a cultivation achievement that has just broken through the immortal realm. In his opinion, it is almost as small as a mole ant. I’m a great foreign demon general. I was beaten like this by an immortal realm! Even if it’s a split soul, it’s impossible What have you done, mole ant? ” The demon roared loudly, and the black gas rolled around him, trying to make up for the lost black gas. However, no matter what he did, the black gas was gradually dispersing, which meant that his soul was about to dissipate. And his chance to escape the seal is getting weaker and weaker. Xu Kuan sneered: “I’m an invincible saint. Do you still need any means to beat you? It’s ridiculous. It’s clear that your own strength is poor and your kidney is deficient! ” Fart! ” Then you have the ability to prove it? ” You… Ants! I want you to die! ” The devil was so angry that he didn’t even keep the last soul, and his powerful power broke out directly. Boom! In an instant, countless evil spirits gushed out, dark clouds rolled in the sky and dull thunder burst. The second dog looked up and his face suddenly changed: “no! Boy, go! The real demon killing thunder is coming! ” What is it? ” Xu que said dismissively, “shit, destroy the demon God thunder. This forced the saint to swallow even the ancient catastrophe. Destroy the demon God thunder is a fart!” You know shit! The previous ancient Holocaust was not complete at all. This demon killing thunder exists to exterminate foreign demons. It must be that the seal of the real Buddha has an array to summon the demon killing thunder! ” Er Gouzi directly began to draw a transmission array, “the previous ancient catastrophe can’t even compare with the power of 1% of the current demon killing God thunder!” Before Xu Ke could speak, an unparalleled breath of destruction came from far and near. Hiss! Xu que felt the breath and immediately took a breath of cold air. This is completely different from the previous ancient Holocaust. It is not a level of existence at all! I can’t stop it! Absolutely unstoppable

chapters.body:
Chapter 1741

“Boom!”

With the rolling of black clouds, the sky gradually darkened, and the golden light originally through the clouds was also covered.

The demons roared, the black fog rolled, the soul of the right way gradually became larger, and dark lights emerged in his body.

“Go, go! Once the demon killing thunder falls later, this place will certainly become a dead land! ” The two dogs hurried anxiously.

As for the fairy king, xianzun has scattered and fled, and dare not stay here again.

Xu Xu didn’t dare to delay. He stepped out of Yu step and rushed towards the direction of the transmission array.

“Come on, start!”

As soon as he stepped in, he made a sound to urge Er Gouzi.

The two dogs nodded, pinched out the decision and drove the transmission array.

“Lying trough!” Duan Jiude looked up and exclaimed, “is this foreign demon crazy?!”

“Ants! You can’t escape! ” The demon roared, and the blood red eyes spattered with endless resentment.

He can’t help but have no resentment. He has accumulated strength for many years and finally found an opportunity to break through. Now he has been screwed up by these mole ants!

The boundless magic Qi turned into several black dragons and hit the transmission array hard!

“Click!”

The protective light curtain of the transmission array has a crack visible to the naked eye.

“Woge! Hurry up! ” Xu que hurriedly urges Er Gouzi to make a decision at the same time, trying to break up the black dragon.

However, the black dragon at this time was transformed by the demon’s core in his body. Xu lacked a move and didn’t even respond.

Two dogs held their hands high and clapped down: “Qi!”

When the three men leave suddenly, they will pull out a strong light from the void.

The three people’s body shape became blurred instantly. It took only three breathing times at most to send them away from here.

“Succeeded!” Two dogs shouted.

Seeing this, Xu que looked at the demon and raised a middle finger: “silly fork, I’m leaving now. Just stay here and die!”

Seeing that the enemy was about to escape from the sky, the demon’s eyes were about to crack and roared, and the huge demon body burst into countless blood mouths!

“Back to the origin!”

Suddenly, countless black lights lit up on the demon, and Xu Que’s body also lit up spotty black lights.

Whoosh!

Before he could react, a powerful force came from the demon and directly pulled Xu que out of the transmission array!

Two dogs and Duan Jiude quickly stretched out their hands to drag Xu vacancy back. The next second, the transmission array suddenly started.

Boom!

The huge light column was bright to the extreme, and their figures disappeared in the light column in an instant.

The demon laughed ferociously: “mole ants! Do you think you can run away? ”

Xu que was pulled to fly towards the demon and sneered, “am I afraid of you? As long as the transmission array is still there, Ben forced saint to leave in minutes! ”

Although this force is powerful, it is also because Xu lacked doesn’t know that the other party can pull himself past by summoning the magic core.

“Stop it!”

Xu Que’s body was full of immortal yuan, and a huge force poured out of his body. He stopped in mid air.

Then, he performed the immortal level decision and blew a blow directly at himself!

“Bang!”

The violent explosion directly impacted him back. Even if the force pulling him still exists, it can only slow down his speed.

Hum, want to keep me?

There are no doors!

Xu que laughed sarcastically at the demon and said, “silly que! I’m leaving now… ”

Boom!

A black thunder suddenly fell from the sky and fell directly on the transmission array.

The temporarily built transmission array was split and turned into a pile of rags.

Xu Wei fell directly into the sand dune and plunged directly into it.

He’s a fool.

Nima, is the robbery taking revenge on me?

As soon as the front foot said that there was a transmission array, you could go anywhere, and the back foot was split by me?

It’s heaven’s way. Do you want to be so careful!

Before he climbed out, the suction increased again and pulled him out in an instant.

“Mole ant, what did you just say?” The demon looked at Xu que flying towards him and sneered. Xu que was silent for a moment, put on a righteous expression, and said in a deep voice: “brother devil, stop, there are all demon killing thunder outside.” Take your mother! The devil almost scolded. If it weren’t for you son of a bitch, I would have been out of trouble! Now, the soul is gone. If it is split by the demon killing thunder, maybe the body will be seriously damaged! Xu que earnestly advised, “brother devil, we can resort to law for any grievances. There is no need to solve them by such violent means. Xianyunzhou is a legal continent. As long as you are willing to give up the idea of dying together, I can guarantee that I will use all my strength to help you out.” The demon was stunned and was stunned by Xu Que’s words. What shit legal means? Xianyunzhou and this thing Mole ants, don’t try to confuse this demon. You will die today! ” The demon was silent for a moment and decided to kill Xu que. The other party is just a fairy respect, which can make him so embarrassed, which makes him have a great sense of crisis. Never let this child grow up. Xu Que’s face was cold and immediately scolded: “Mom, you bastard really don’t want face. I forced Sheng to tell you you’re not serious, so don’t blame me for being serious!” Hum, after absorbing the devil’s core, your body is no longer under your control! ” The demon raised his dark palm and said in a cold voice, “do you think this demon left you and really wants to kill you?” Xu que was stunned when he heard the speech and hugged his arms: “well… With all due respect, I’m not interested in that aspect.” What are you talking about? ” Countless demon cores poured out of the demon’s body and floated in the air. He sneered, “the demon wants to refine you into a puppet of the cost demon with the power of the demon source. In this way, even if you die, you can still walk in xianyunzhou instead of the demon!” Then, the magic core in the air instantly emitted countless black lights and instilled them into Xu lack’s body. A powerful force invaded his body, swam along the meridians and entered the Dantian Shit, want to transform me? ” Of course, Xu Wei knows what the other party wants to do. It’s nothing more than transforming himself into something similar to a doll. And this demon can control himself with his own body and do evil. Are you kidding? Ben forced the congregation to be controlled Fuck you, since you want to change, let me suck enough! ” Without saying a word, Xu que directly operated the skill and absorbed a steady stream of black light into his body

C.1742

The demon was still waiting to transform Xu que, but a moment later, his face suddenly changed.

“You, what are you doing?”

You know, all his magic cores are condensed by the magic source. If they are absorbed by the boy, the soul will collapse immediately!

Now Tianjie is caused by the demon trying to break free from the seal. If you can annihilate the soul of the other party before the demon thunder comes, you may have a chance of life!

It’s crazy. It’s crazy.

Because of Xu Xu’s own skills and systematic help, absorbing the magic core is like drinking water.

The demon is because the body is sealed and the soul loses strength one after another. At this time, some can’t rob Xu!

In the distance, the old monk, who had been seriously injured, came back with difficulty. Seeing this scene, he was shocked.

This son is fighting against the devil!

And vaguely, it seems that he still has an advantage!

“Who the hell is this young man?” The old monk is in a mess.

He was seriously injured by the devil’s two direct moves, and Xu’s cultivation was much weaker than himself. At this time, he was able to draw with the devil.

If the old monk didn’t know that the real Buddha had already reincarnated, he would really think that now the real Buddha is recovering and fighting against demons!

The Immortal King xianzun, who had fled to the distance, felt the horror coming from behind and was terrified.

“Oh, my God… Who were we chasing and killing just now?”

“Dao you, go with me!”

At this time, the people can’t mention any trouble to find Xu lack. First, they don’t talk about breaking the ancient Holocaust. It’s as easy as drinking water. Just because they can fight against demons now, they don’t dare to make any provocation at all.

I’m kidding. Even this ancient demon can’t help it. What can weak chickens do?

“Bastard! What a bastard! ” The demon was so angry that he directly turned over his huge dark palm and patted Xu Wei!

The surging magic gas was like a tsunami and suddenly pressed down.

This blow was an angry blow by the demon. It was powerful and even exceeded the slap that had just hit the old monk.

Seeing this, the old monk’s face changed dramatically.

Having personally experienced this move, he deeply understood the power of this palm, which Xu Weixiu could not bear!

“Ding! This move is far beyond the capacity of the host. Please avoid it! ”

Xu que bit his back teeth and shouted, “avoid NIMA!”

With that, the immortal yuan surged all over the body, ran the immortal rank decision, and burst out a punch!

“Bang!”

The violent roar exploded, and the invisible air wave spread around like a tsunami!

Xu Ke’s internal suction became more and more crazy, continuously weakened the magic Qi, and even stubbornly resisted this palm!

The devil’s eyes are splitting!

Nima! Is this special or human?

It’s okay to be slapped by me?

When are humans so strong?!

Countless black holes are torn out of the void, just like the devil opening his huge mouth and wantonly swallowing the surrounding existence.

The feeling was not obvious before, but after absorbing the magic core, Xu lacked a clear feeling that there was a familiar and extremely evil smell in the void, which came from an extremely distant place.

That’s the smell of extraterritorial demons!

“Hehe, in that case, let your friends see how you died!” Xu que roared and greeted the demon, “go to hell! System, maximum power! ”

Boom!

In an instant, the roar rang through the void, and there was a black hole the size of a needle in the deficient Dantian.

Although it was almost invisible to the naked eye, there was a terrible attraction from it. The surrounding magic gas was immediately pulled over, and even formed a long dragon of magic gas, which poured into Xu Que’s body!

“Ding, the magic Qi absorbs 120 percent.” Ding, the magic Qi absorbs 150 percent. ” Ding, the magic Qi absorbs 200% “…” The devil’s face changed greatly. He vaguely felt that the devil source in his own body was even being absorbed by the other party! This is unscientific! Logically speaking, he is only a soul dividing. Even if the magic source is absorbed, it is only the soul dividing magic source is absorbed. But Xu que began to absorb the demon source in the sealed body directly through his soul division! At this moment, the demon finally felt fear! Having survived for unknown years, he has faced death more than once. For him, death is not the end, but another beginning. Extraterritorial demons exist outside the sky and never die. Even if it is destroyed in xianyunzhou, the noumenon magic source existing in the void can be reborn as long as it is not destroyed. At that time, he was just an accident, so he came to xianyunzhou, so he was caught and sealed by the real Buddha. He was not afraid of how Xu lacked absorbed him before. But this time, he was really flustered Stop, stop! ” The demon quickly made a sound, shook his hands and stopped, “you can’t absorb any more!” There was already blood in Xu’s gap. Hearing this, he laughed wildly and said, “you say you don’t suck? Do your mother’s spring and autumn dream! ” If you continue to absorb it, the demon killing thunder will come soon! ” The demon roared. In the sky, the black clouds rolled directly by lightning, not as golden as the ancient catastrophe, but as dark as black. Among them, the boundless breath of destruction came, as if to destroy everything in the world! However, Xu que is now in charge. Facing the demon’s advice, he only responded frantically: “will I be afraid of killing the demon God thunder? Let him come and die together! ” Boom! With Xu Ke’s roar, all the magic sources were completely absorbed into his body. At the same time, countless black thunder fell! Destroy demon thunder, come

chapters.body:
Chapter 1743

Chapter 1743

C.1743

In contrast, the ancient Holocaust was huge, but the arrival of the demon killing thunder was silent.

A dark lightning, like a slender snake, fell from the sky.

From a distance, it was like a fine black rain. I couldn’t feel any deterrent at all.

However, at the moment when a thunder fell on him, Xu Weimeng widened his eyes!

Snap!

Even the body that could not be blown away by the ancient catastrophe suddenly burst into a wound!

Even he tried to recover by using the law, but a force was constantly eroding the wound and preventing his recovery!

And there are thousands of thunder like this, even if you want to hide!

In the distance, the old monk saw this scene and his heart sank to the bottom of the valley.

“It’s over… The demon killing thunder is coming… I’m afraid you won’t be alive again!”

As the oldest Buddhists, he knows the power of this demon killing thunder.

In ancient times, when extraterritorial demons came, there was great power to summon the demon killing God thunder to help with the array.

Overnight, he destroyed dozens of demons with divine thunder, including one general!

And the mighty, only one!

But the great power also paid a heavy price. When the demon killing God thunder came, he was also in the center of the thunder robbery.

After the thunder robbery, the body collapsed, the cultivation was lost, and the spirit was eroded by the residual thunder every day and night.

Finally, after several months of persistence, he was frightened and completely disappeared into the world, and even had no chance of reincarnation!

The rain of divine thunder in front of us is as powerful as the tragic battle recorded in the record, and even more prosperous!

“Amitabha… Send you west.”

The old monk was silent for a moment, sat down cross legged and recited the Buddhist scriptures in a low voice.

He can’t save Xu que. He can only see each other off in this way.

As for those fairy kings and immortals, they were frightened at this time.

What happened today is more exciting than what happened in the past century and millennium!

Ancient havoc, human lightning, foreign demons, and now even the demon killing thunder that no one has ever seen in the legend have appeared!

Even if someone suddenly jumped out and said he was the Taoist emperor, they wouldn’t be surprised at all.

“This demon killing thunder… Doesn’t seem to have much power?” Someone suddenly wondered.

After the demon killing thunder came, all the prestige was restrained under the black cloud. They were too far away to feel it at all.

A fairy King hesitated and said, “why don’t we check with the spirit?”

Everyone looked at each other. No one wanted to be the first bird. Finally, they had to go to the fairy king.

He sat down cross legged, scattered some spirits, and slowly explored towards the area where God thunder came.

“It’s strange. It seems that the divine thunder has no power. I’ve been close and haven’t felt it yet. I’ll go in and try… Poof!”

The fairy king was still reporting the situation. Suddenly, a mouthful of blood gushed out and the whole man fell on his back!

“Taoist friend, what’s the matter?”

“Hell, have you been attacked?”

The crowd quickly gathered around and looked up.

The fairy king was lying on the ground, his eyes closed, blood flowed from his seven orifices, and a strong black gas flowed in his body.

A Fairy Statue carefully poked out with fairy yuan.

Just touched each other’s body, suddenly “snap”, this immortal yuan was annihilated in an instant!

Xianzun was immediately startled. He didn’t dare to make any more moves, so he had to take out the immortal weapon to check the body.

A moment later, the immortal Zun took back the immortal’s weapon with an ugly face and said in a deep voice: “I’m afraid this Taoist friend will never wake up again…”

WOW!

As soon as they said this, they immediately burst into a pot!

“What do you mean? He’s dead? ”

“It’s impossible. I think he’s still angry!”

“Didn’t you say there was no power? Why did you die suddenly? I think the boy is still alive in there! ”

After a pause, he said again: “and even if he can really wake up, his cultivation will fall to the great Luo Xian, or even lower level… Because the demon killing thunder is constantly eroding his body, when we just investigated, his elixir field has been damaged, the immortal yuan has been lost, and the spirit root has been defeated.”

In a word, this man has been abandoned.

The crowd suddenly became silent. There was a dead silence, and the dropping of the needle could be heard.

Everyone’s heart is filled with an incredible emotion.

It’s just a trace of soul searching. It was directly abandoned by the demon killing thunder!

Is Xu Daoyou, who is in there, actually 1 able to compete with foreign demons? It’s incredible! Now people can’t describe their feelings in words, and even feel absurd! He’s so bullshit! Everyone is a fairy place. Why does Xu que look like a species at all? At this time, Xu Ke is not easy. Although it seems that he can survive in so many demon killing thunder instead of being very powerful, in fact, his body has reached the limit. Had it not been tempered by ancient catastrophes in the past, and there were a large number of ancient catastrophes in the body, which were the same as the origin of heaven with the demon killing God, the power of the demon killing God thunder could be weakened to a certain extent. At this time, he was afraid that he had long been annihilated into powder and no longer existed. Of course, there are people who feel worse than him… Oh, no, demons exist Ah! Asshole! “Damn you!” The demon is roaring wildly, and his body is full of demon killing thunder. Each thunder will completely annihilate part of the demon Qi. However, in such a short time, his huge body has shrunk by a third, and continues to shrink rapidly. Xu Wei trembled all over, reluctantly pulled up the corners of his mouth and said with a ferocious smile: “how about this thunderstorm?” Nice, NIMA! The demon wanted to scold like this, but he couldn’t tell his mind at all. He could only try his best to run the demon Qi and resist the demon killing thunder. Boom – just then, there was another dull noise in the thunder clouds. A huge black thunder stretched its head out of the clouds and slowly condensed into a dark dragon God thunder condensed form! ” The devil’s heart suddenly thrilled! This is a form with extremely powerful power. If it falls, it will definitely be annihilated by flying ash Mole ants, let you go today, and I will take your life someday! ” The demon dared not delay, frantically gathered the magic Qi around and fell towards the bottom of the desert. The seal can also find a chance to break through, but if you die here today, there will be nothing. Seeing that the other party wanted to leave, Xu que immediately shouted, “stay here! Above, drop the thunder! ” At the same time, he directly reversed his skill and spewed out all the magic Qi in his body! The black dragon in the sky seemed to really listen to his words and rushed down with a whoosh! The demon was scared to death when he saw this scene! Nima’s, this boy is a special son of heaven! Just say it

chapters.title: Chapter 1744
chapters.body:
Chapter 1744

Chapter 1744

C.1744

“Boom -!”

The huge black dragon fell from the sky, and the turbulent smell of destruction suddenly swept the whole desert!

Buzz!

Xu Wei felt that his brain was suddenly blank. He only had time for the system to exchange magic resistance equipment such as exciting armor and Banshee veil.

Then, consciousness completely fell into a coma

I don’t know how long later, a shock woke him up.

Xu que opened his eyes with difficulty, and his eyes were full of dazzling sunshine. He was lying on a scooter, aching all over.

“Where am I?”

He glanced around, and the sight immediately made him jump out of his chair.

“Sleeping trough! Where have I been? ”

I saw yellow buildings around, which seemed to be made of yellow sand. Pawns and traders walked through them, a lively scene.

But almost half of them are bald!

Oh, my God!

Xu que subconsciously touched his head and felt that his black hair was still thick. He was relieved.

Fortunately… The hair is still there.

The so-called head can be broken, blood can flow, hair can not be messy!

“Taoist friend, are you awake?” Suddenly, a voice came from the front.

“Who… Ouch, pain!” Xu Ke turned over and sat up. As soon as he opened his mouth, he was choked back by a sharp pain.

It’s strange that even if you are injured, you should be well now with system repair and maintenance?

Before he examined the wound, he saw a smooth little bald head appear in front of him.

“Little light bulb!” Xu que exclaimed, “Why are you here?”

This man is impressively second only to his own little monk in the previous trial of ancient Buddha.

He smiled helplessly, folded his hands and said, “benefactor, the little monk’s name is fahui, not a small light bulb.”

“Gee, you should know yourself clearly. Look at your bald head. You don’t even have to turn on the lights at night.” Xu que stood up and pointed around, “where is this? Why are there so many bald heads? ”

Little monk fahui said faintly, “this is the ancient city of true Buddha in the Buddhist realm. It is the holy city established by the ancient Buddha at that time. It is called Tianzhu.”

Xu Wei heard that sentence in his mind for no reason. I’m from the eastern Tang Dynasty and go to the west to seek the scripture

“How did I get here?”

“The little monk left from the trial. He wanted to return to the holy city, but he found that there were demons in the exterminating desert. When he drove away, he only saw his Taoist friends lying in the desert.” In a few words, fahui explained the cause and effect.

Xu kuruo thought. The little monk said that he was the only one, that is to say, the extraterritorial demons either ran away or were destroyed.

However, the high probability should be destroyed. After all, the power of the demon killing thunder is really terrible.

If you don’t have your own system, I’m afraid you can’t hold up until the divine thunder falls.

Do not see do not know, a look startled!

The body is empty. It’s like being copied. There’s nothing!

“Sleeping trough! System, where are my accomplishments? Why is there no magic Qi of Xianyuan Buddha? ” Xu que was shocked and hurriedly summoned the system.

“Ding, due to excessive absorption of magic Qi, he is currently in a dormant state. For the time being, only the forced value exchange system is open, and no question and answer service is provided.”

Well, the system is on strike, too.

Xu sighed and lay down on his back. He was about to exit the system when he suddenly saw a system prompt.

“Ding, there is a system feedback. Do you want to check it?”

Xu Ke was stunned and chose to check. Only then did he find out what happened.

It turned out that at the moment when the demon killing thunder came, the system could not stop it with Xu’s physical state at that time.

So he directly started the revenge mechanism, used all the forces in his body to resist the demon killing thunder, and combined with the exchanged all demon resistance suit, which saved his life.

However, due to the amazing power of the demon killing thunder and the imbalance of magic Qi, the system also went down and entered a dormant state.
