After hibernation, the system will continue to help Xu lack repair his body.

In other words, before the system wakes up, he has to find a way to deal with his injury.

As for why, let alone recover in a short time.

The only thing he has left is this powerful body comparable to the Buddha’s golden body.

“Wonderful, old monster, you’ve done me a lot of harm!” Xu que gnashed his teeth and said, “when I fix it, I’ll find you first!”

If it weren’t for this shit’s Extraterritorial demon, he should have gone to Taiyi sect and talked with his confidant night and night!

Fortunately, however, the system gives a solution at the end.

At present, of course, there are no accomplishments, because the magic Qi in the body is too strong, resulting in a power imbalance, so the system can only use all the power consumption to block the magic Qi.

If you want to restore cultivation, you must find something strong enough to balance the magic Qi Taoist friend, I don’t know what you’re going to do next? ” As fahui spoke, he untied the rope from his body. Xu Wei found that Fa Hui had always tied the rope of the scooter to his body and acted as a man pulling the cart. He was moved at the bottom of his heart. There is true love in the world, there is true love in the world, look at the little light bulb! How kind, how kind, this is the image of a monk I have something important to do. Thank you, little bulb. Next I’ll go by myself. ” Xu Ke turned over and jumped off the scooter. At the moment of landing, the body trembled and then forcibly stood firm Taoist friend, you haven’t healed yet. Why don’t you go to the Buddha trial with the little monk? ” Fa Hui asked with concern when she saw that Xu que was leaving I’m kidding. This kind of small injury doesn’t need ben to force saint to treat. It can heal naturally! ” Xu Kui patted his chest and said curiously, “what’s the advantage of your Buddhist trial?” Fahui explained: “the Buddha represents the inheritance of the real Buddha. If you pass the test and become a Buddha, it is said that you will get a relic and ancient scriptures left by the ancient Buddha in that year, representing the ancient Buddha to preach Buddhism in Xianyun island.” Xu Wei was ready to go. Hearing the last words, he suddenly stopped, turned his head and looked at Fa Hui: “you just said, there are ancient Buddha relics and ancient scriptures?” Ah… Yes, because it is said that the end of the Buddha’s trial is the place where the ancient Buddha sits. ” Little light bulb, I suddenly feel that my injury has worsened again. You continue to drag me away. I also want to participate in the Buddha trial. ” Alas? Daoyou, didn’t you just leave? And you don’t believe in Buddhism. ” Amitabha, I suddenly realized that there are three thousand mortals in the world. Only my Buddha will stay in my heart. Let’s go quickly. After going, the relic will be gone! Go, little light bulb! ” Xu que put his hands together. “……”

chapters.title: Chapter 1745
chapters.body:
Chapter 1745

Chapter 1745

C.1745

On the way, Xu que carefully studied the injury in his body and finally came to the conclusion that there was no cure, so he simply gave up the idea of rapid healing in a short time.

According to the report of the system, what you need now is items that can balance magic Qi.

What can balance the evil Qi better than the ancient Buddha relic and the ancient Scripture?

It’s our duty to become a Buddha!

At this time, they were moving slowly towards the West. The roads in the city were covered with a layer of fine yellow sand, and the wind blew up a dusk.

“What on earth will the Buddha try to do?” Xu que put on a black robe and swayed slowly.

He has not felt walking slowly with his feet for a long time. This feeling makes him recall his feeling when he first came to the world.

At that time, although the cultivation was low, it was easy and happy.

Fa Hui put his hands together and walked ahead. He said slowly, “the Buddha trial is a trial spread in the Buddhist realm. The little monk also participated in it for the first time, so he doesn’t know what will happen.”

Xu Xu didn’t give up: “isn’t there any rumors?”

“Yes.” Fa Hui hesitated for a moment and said, “it is said that the Buddha’s trial needs to ban his cultivation. It is purely a mortal body who obtains the ancient Sutra through the trial.”

Xu Ke was suddenly happy.

I just had no accomplishments, only this strong body.

This is a trial created for him!

“Go, go, go! Let’s hurry! ”

At the urging of Xu que, they came to the place where they took part in the test – Dalaiyin temple in the evening.

“Why is it Da Leiyin temple again?” Xu que looked at the big characters on the plaque and said strangely.

Fahui explained, “this place was built in imitation of the temple where the ancient Buddha got the Tao, so it is also called Da Leiyin temple.”

In front of us is a majestic temple. The golden body of the ancient Buddha, dozens of feet high, stands like a mountain in the main hall of the temple.

Your highness is a wide square. They are standing in the middle of the square.

Around the body, there are a bustling crowd. In addition to a large number of bald monks, there are more ordinary monks.

“I said… I’ll take those with hair as secular disciples in your Buddhist realm.” Xu missed pointing to those people in the distance who obviously couldn’t catch up with humans, and whispered, “don’t tell me that those things are the mounts of your Buddhist disciples.”

Xu Xu is stupid. Didn’t he say the Buddha trial was good?

Why did even the non human guys come?

“Amitabha.” Dharma Hui whispered a Buddha’s name and said in a deep voice, “my Buddha is merciful. All creatures can participate in the Buddha’s test regardless of race.”

“I see. This is your belief in Buddhism. All Buddhists are Buddhists, aren’t they?”

Xu Kuan grinned. Taking advantage of fahui’s inattention, he ran to the corner and changed the shape with the system.

When he reappeared, he looked like a compassionate Buddhist disciple. His face was white and very weak.

“Little light bulb, what do you think of my shape?”

Xu que proudly walks up to Fa Hui and turns around.

Fa Hui stared at him in amazement. After a long time, he recognized Xu Ke’s identity from his breath: “Xu, Xu Daoyou? Is this your real body… No, the previous one is your real image. ”

“Do as the Romans do. Of course, you have to have a shiny bald head to participate in the Buddhist trial.” Xu que pretended to read a Buddhist name and said solemnly, “from now on, please call me master Tang Sanzang.”

Fa Hui tells Xu que that there is no host for the Buddha trial. He just needs to wait here and start the trial as soon as the time comes.

The specific trial rules will be notified to the participants at the beginning of the trial.

At this time, the trial has not yet begun. All the big guys get together to chat.

After all, it’s a Buddhist trial. No matter what they look like, big guys look like harmony. They either exchange Buddhist ideas or discuss the content of the trial.

Fahui seemed to be well-known. Along the way, people recognized him and talked about him for a while.

“Amitabha, I didn’t expect master fahui to come too.”

“The trial of Buddha begins ten thousand years ago. We Buddhists will not miss such a grand event.”

“But with master fahui here, I’m afraid we have little chance. Who can compare with master fahui in the study of Buddhism?”

As for Xu vacancy beside him, he was directly ignored.

Xu kubai glanced at him: “Amitabha, aren’t you talking nonsense? Who isn’t here to participate in the Buddha trial?”

“Well… So is.” The Buddha was stunned and asked, “I don’t know why monk friends came to participate in the Buddha trial? I think you don’t study Buddhism deeply… ”

The people present did not regard cultivation as high or low, but regarded Buddhism as high or low. Want to find out about me? Xu que smiled kindly and said, “I’ve turned over seventy-seven and forty-nine demons in China. I’m taking part in the Buddha trial to see if there are any demons in the West.” “…” The monk was stunned by Xu Que’s simple and rough language style. After a moment of silence, he quietly withdrew. Dang -! Just then, a deafening bell rang. They immediately stopped the discussion and looked at the golden body of the ancient Buddha in the hall. Hum – a trembling sound came from the golden body, and a brilliant golden light gradually surged behind it, covering the whole square. Xu que only felt his head faint. When he woke up again, the scene in front of him had changed greatly. I saw a towering mountain standing in front, like a palm. At the bottom of the mountain, there was a monkey with Lei Gong’s face. Xu Wei was surprised at that time: “am I crossing into the journey to the west?” Just as he was preparing to summon the system, a peaceful voice suddenly sounded in his ear: “let’s go. The disciples selected by the Buddhism, with the compassion of the Buddhism, accept your four disciples, overcome the difficulty of September 81, and go to the west to get serious before they can become the Buddha.” Xu que couldn’t help but wonder if the man who wrote the journey to the West would not have crossed back from here? Up the stairs, Xu que came to the monkey and tore off the pressure on his head without saying a word. Then he grinned at the monkey and said kindly, “Hello, my name is Tang Sanzang. Come with me to the west to learn scriptures.” Eh… No, Lao sun, I was suppressed by the Buddha. In fact, I think what he said is quite reasonable. Let’s just learn from the West. ” Amitabha, do you think I am right or he is right? ” That’s the Buddha… It must be you, right! Master, don’t panic. I’ll come out and go to the West with you to learn scriptures. ” Xu Wei put down the Zen stick he had just taken out and nodded with satisfaction: “very good. He is worthy of being a good disciple of the teacher.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1746
chapters.body:
Chapter 1746

Chapter 1746

C.1746

Under the earnest instruction of Xu que holding a Zen stick, the monkey soon accepted the fact that he became a disciple of Sanzang in the Tang Dynasty.

“Well, from today on, your name will be kakarot.”

“No… master, I have a name. My name is monkey king.”

“That name has become a thing of the past. Now your name is kakarot.”

Fuck your monkey king!

What do you think I’m the monkey king?

Xu Ke didn’t forget that he still has a part, which is to help Sun Wukong.

Monkey King was quite wronged: “no, you are unreasonable… OK, from today on, my name is kakarot. Master, let’s go together!”

“Well, that’s right. Don’t worry. I didn’t take out the Zen stick to scare you. It’s just itching. I want to play occasionally.”

Xu que waved his Zen stick as he spoke.

With a bang, the tall boulders of the people around him were smashed.

Monkey King, no, kakarot took a breath of air-conditioning directly and was shocked.

What happened?

Isn’t monk DUT convincing people with reason?

What do you think of this person in front of you? It doesn’t look like a reasonable type!

After recovering the monkey king, Xu que began to take the lead in charging towards the West.

When he came here, he brought a package with a map showing the way to the West.

“System, check where this is. I always feel something wrong.” Xu que ordered while looking at the map.

After about three seconds, the system gives a reply.

“This is the memory of the God.”

“The realm of memory?” Xu que was stunned. After some questioning, he finally understood the original appearance of the normal trial.

The place where he is now is a continent called east god. On this continent, demons and humans coexist, and immortals are extraordinary and ignore world affairs.

He was a Buddhist monk who refined Buddhism. He felt the suffering of the people, so he decided to go to the great Leiyin temple in the West sky to seek the Scriptures and help all living beings.

All of this, in fact, is an illusory existence, a dreamland built on the memory of the ancient Buddha.

“Niu wow, was the ancient Buddha so strong in cultivation? Can you still build such a big fantasy? ”

Xu Wei was amazed. Looking at the plants and trees around him, he was almost no different from the real existence.

He has also experienced several fairyland before, including a long mortal life when competing for the inheritance of ancient Buddha.

However, they are only limited to one country. The scope is far from being as large as it is now. It has reached the level of a continent.

“In other words, did the ancient Buddha really experience learning scriptures from the west?” Xu Ke pays more attention to this point.

“Reply to the host, your current experience is the personal experience of the God.”

“Well, it seems that I’m not the only one to cross.”

One person and one monkey embarked on the journey to the west, and Xu lacked intermittently obtained relevant prompt information on the road.

If you want to pass the test, you have to overcome the difficulty of 9981.

And every experimenter, regardless of his cultivation level, will be banned from cultivation and spend this long journey as a mortal.

On the way, we need to accept four disciples as our own protectors and arrive in the West.

As like as two peas, the whole background story is almost the same as the journey to the West.

It’s just that his big apprentice doesn’t know if it’s a loading error. His character and records are completely different.

They walked all the way and soon met a gang of robbers.

“I drive this mountain! I opened this tree! If you want to live from now on, stay and buy road wealth! ”

The tall robber, carrying a mountain knife, roared fiercely.

At this time, outside the memory, several old monks are looking at the golden mirror of nap in front of them.

Each golden mirror represents a participant in the test.

The performance of the experimenters in the realm of memory will be presented to several old monks. What they have to do is to ensure that there will be no casualties.

After all, this is a Buddhist trial, just to inherit the Dharma. If there are casualties, it can’t be explained.

These old monks are Buddhist masters who have practiced for many years in Dalaiyin temple, but they do not have the ability to control the state of memory. They can only pull the experimenters out of the state of memory at dangerous times.

“You guys, long time no see.” A tall and thin old monk said with a smile, “we have been sleeping for many years, and we are very lucky to finally witness the trial of the Buddha again.”

“Yes, I don’t know who can become the ultimate Buddha this time.”

“It is said that the person who tried this time had a flawless Buddha heart, which is called Dharma wisdom.”

“Really? I heard that he didn’t come alone. ” An old monk smiled.

“Oh? Can you take part in the trial with those who are born with Buddha’s heart? Is it also the chosen person of my Buddha? ” The old monks are very excited. After all, this Buddhist trial will only be opened once in many years. When they last tried in the Buddhist realm, they were young people, but now they are old. After chatting for a while, the old monks turned their attention to these testers The test of the Buddha is to test the understanding of the Dharma and whether it can turn evil with a compassionate heart. ” Yes, those who practice Buddhism are no different from ordinary people after being banned. Only in this way can they be tested. ” I hope this time, there will be a real Buddha. ” An old monk sighed, “the last Buddhist trial, without exception, was defeated by the last Scripture.” When it comes to this, all the monks have a heart. That can be said to be the most pit father’s level. If they hadn’t witnessed the normal test with their own eyes, they would have been pit if they went in Ah, that seems to be the monk friend who came in with Fa Hui. ” An old monk suddenly pointed to a golden mirror and said. In the picture, Xu Weizheng takes his big apprentice against a group of bandits Monk, if you know the truth, give me your money. I can spare your life! ” The black strong man waved his mountain knife and the wind roared. Kakarot whispered, “master, use your Dharma to understand them.” Xu Kuang put his hands together, stepped forward and said with a smile, “no problem. Let’s see. I’ll teach you the Dharma.” Hearing the speech, the black strong man immediately laughed wildly and said, “ha ha ha! I’ve been wandering the Jianghu for many years. You’re a monk without hair. Look, I’ll send you to the West! ” Then he slashed with a knife. The sabre was so heavy that the monks who had been banned decided not to hide. Seeing the knife approaching, Xu que suddenly gave a loud drink and raised his hand with a fist: “put down the butcher’s knife and become a Buddha!” Click! The mountain knife broke at the sound

chapters.title: Chapter 1747
chapters.body:
Chapter 1747

Chapter 1747

C.1747

Bang!

After smashing the mountain knife, the fist power did not decrease. It fell on the big man and blew him out.

Karot was surprised.

In front of the golden mirror, the old monks waiting for Xu que to show the Dharma were also surprised.

What the hell?

Feel each other with the Dharma! This is direct violence persuasion!

What about the Dharma you have practiced for many years?

You are a monk. You have to find out!

“No, no, it shouldn’t!” An old monk reacted and said in a hurry, “isn’t he banned from cultivation? How can you smash the mountain knife with one punch? ”

Those who practice Dharma are mostly weak. Even if there are Buddhists who specialize in practicing Vajra arhat Dharma, their strong body also comes from cultivation.

How can a mortal break the mountain knife with his fist?

“Is there something wrong with the trial?” An old monk hurried to the rear, “I’ll check it!”

As the supervisors of the trial, they have the right to check the trial and terminate the trial in case of problems. This is the rule set by the ancient Buddha at the beginning.

“Yes, most of them are Buddhist trials, which have been passed on for many years, and their strength has weakened.”

“It should be so. That’s why I let him keep some accomplishments.”

“It seems that we slept too long, so we didn’t repair it in time. We should pay attention in the future.”

The old monks whispered and reflected on themselves.

After a while, the old monk who went to repair returned to the crowd.

“How’s it going? Is there a problem with the forbidden array? ”

“Has it been repaired?”

Several old monks quickly asked.

I saw the old monk who went to check. His face was strange and he said, “I’ve checked everything… Everything is intact and there’s nothing missing.”

The crowd was suddenly silent.

After a while, an old monk said quietly, “so, this tester… Is he a Buddha practitioner who practices the flesh body? In other words, his understanding of Buddhism is like this? ”

Buddhists’ understanding of Buddhism will be reflected in their own accomplishments.

For example, Xu Ke’s previously obtained universal living is the most famous mouth gun Fairy Art in Buddhism.

Fight all depends on one mouth, use my reason to convince you.

In Buddhism, most magic principles are similar to this, but there are some differences in expression forms.

But the appearance of Xu deficiency completely broke their inherent impression.

In the realm of memory, Xu que walked forward with a smile on his face, came to the strong man and asked with a smile: “benefactor, do you feel that you have a deeper respect for Buddhism in your heart?”

The strong man was dizzy at this time. When he heard the speech, he jumped up directly and scolded angrily: “deepen NIMA…”

Xu que didn’t wait for him to finish. He raised his fist directly.

Bang!

The strong man fell to the ground again, and even the big tree trembled twice.

“Benefactor, do you feel the Buddha calling you?”

“No!”

Bang!

“Benefactor, are you willing to believe in Buddha now?”

“Trust your mother!”

Bang!

“Benefactor…”

Kakarot looked pale, and beads of sweat rolled down his forehead.

Mom… Isn’t your master a great virtue of Buddhism?

Why is it so violent?

Do Buddhists take this path now?

After Xu Que’s unknown number of blows, the strong man got up again, his face was angry and his teeth clenched.

Xu Xu is still smiling: “benefactor, do you feel the call of Buddhism now?”

On one side, kakarot showed vigilance and had already touched out the stick in his hand.

As Xu Ke’s eldest disciple, he has the obligation to ensure each other’s safety.

The strong man took a deep breath, fell to his knees with a “plop”, put his hands together, raised them above his head, and said in a trembling voice: “thank you for your help. I suddenly felt the call of the Buddha and begged the master to help me become a Buddha.”

Kakarot: ”

Old monks: ”

Is that ok?

Convince people with your fist?!

Xu nodded and said with satisfaction, “in that case, the poor monk will help you become a Buddha!”

After that, he squatted slightly, clenched his fist, and slammed his fist on the big man.

Without uttering a word, the big man fell down directly and softly, as if he had no voice.

Kakarot fooled the whole monkey.

Buddhist disciples killed?

Are you still called a Buddhist disciple?!

“Master… He wants you to make him a Buddha, not to kill him…” kakarot whispered.

Xu Wei took out his shovel from the system and said, “yes, isn’t it good for me to send him to the west to see the Buddha? Stop talking nonsense. Come and help me dig a hole and bury people. ” That’s not very good… OK, I’ll help you dig. Master, put down your Zen stick first. ” This is a good disciple to be a teacher. ” One man and one monkey began to dig pits and bury corpses in the mountains and forests. The scene was extremely strange. Halfway through the excavation, kakarot finally couldn’t help but ask, “master, people are just robbing money. They can’t die.” Xu Wei put down his hoe, thought for a moment, and asked, “do you think I did wrong?” We are monks. Shouldn’t we be merciful? ” Said kakarot cautiously. Xu nodded and continued to dig: “you’re right. In that case, I’ll say that you killed these people in the future.” Kakarot: “…” you are the first bodyguard of the teacher. When you go out of the door later, you will think of that kakarot holding two watermelon knives and cutting all the way from the south gate to the LingXiao palace. There are countless wrongs under his hands. Isn’t it very powerful? ” Master… Why don’t you let me go back to the five elements mountain and continue to be pressed. ” Dig quickly! ” Ah! Don’t take out your Zen stick! ” In front of the golden mirror, several old monks looked at each other Is it illegal for him to An old monk hesitated. Although it is said that he killed a person in the realm of memory, not a real person. When the Buddha trial opens again in the future, this person will be reborn, but he has committed the crime of killing after all. The people looked at each other. The tall and thin old monk said in a deep voice, “in that case, we will first terminate his trial, bring him out and ask again.” Agreed. ” Agreed. ” At this time, the fat old monk in charge of the inspection suddenly changed his face and took out a scripture from his arms. On the cover of the Sutra, there are several big words: arhat book. He quickly turned to one of the pages and found that a name called “Zhao Tiezhu” was gradually revealed on the page This, this is the name of the big black man just now? ” Why is it in this arhat book? Isn’t it only those who have been transformed by my Buddha can be listed in the arhat book? ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1748
chapters.body:
Chapter 1748

Chapter 1748

C.1748

After a while, the master old monk waved his hand and reluctantly said with a smile: “this… How can it be? Although people in the realm of memory have the opportunity to become Buddhas and get on the arhat book, it has to be taught by his people’s extremely profound Buddhism.”

“Yes, even you and I may not be able to do this, let alone a young man.”

“It’s not a measure at all, it’s killing!” The old monk scolded angrily.

The fat old monk sent the arhat Book forward and said expressionless, “what’s going on up there?”

“Er…” the man was speechless.

All the people present have deep attainments in Buddhism. After so many years of intensive cultivation of Buddhism, it is natural to see at a glance that lack is not even a Buddhist at all.

It’s dead, that is, it looks like a little in shape.

“It’s strange… Why do I see this person without Buddhist attainments, but the shadow of Buddhism can be seen everywhere?” The old monk observed carefully for a while and suddenly exclaimed.

“True or false, don’t read it wrong!”

“No, look carefully. His move of waving a Zen stick is clearly a staff method of subduing dragons and subduing tigers!”

“Really! Wait… He can even subdue the devil! ”

In the picture, Xu que takes kakarot all the way to subdue the demons. Every time the demons try their best to subdue the demons, it is a set of farmers’ three fists, so that the demons can’t take care of themselves.

The speed of time in the realm of memory is not equal to the outside world, so the old monks also witnessed Xu Ke’s journey and recognized his moves to subdue the monsters.

These moves are basically the internal Dharma of Buddhism.

According to the usage of Buddhism, all the moves are of infinite power. However, Xu Ke has no accomplishments now, and they are only used in vain.

Even so, it still shocked the old monks.

“Where did he learn these Buddhist spells?”

“I don’t know. He clearly doesn’t have the breath of Buddhism. How can he use Buddhist magic?”

What they don’t know is that all the secrets Xu Ke learned come from the inheritance of ancient Buddha.

There is no Buddhist mental Dharma in itself, so there will be no Buddhist breath on the body.

When the old monks were shocked, Xu que had brought kakarot to a place called Baigu cave.

On the way, Xu que took advantage of his sincere Buddha heart and the warm blood of compassion to subdue little white dragon with a Zen stick.

At the same time, he also adopted the same method and successfully accepted Zhu Bajie and monk Sha.

A group of five teachers and disciples killed countless demons along the way, causing the demons along the way to be frightened.

“Brothers! Tang Sanzang is here! ”

“Sleeping trough! The dead bald man who killed the demon? ”

“Get out, get out! The dead bald thief is cruel. My brother was directly beaten to slag by him! ”

“How could there be such a perverted monk, mom? I want to go home!”

This leads to their progress countless times faster than other testers.

When most of the experimenters were still accepting their disciples, they had come to the place where they faced the challenge for the first time on the way to the West.

“Shifu, evil spirits are rampant here. Let’s take a detour.” Monkey King… Oh no, kakarot kindly reminded.

Xu que rode on the white dragon horse and said unsteadily, “what are you afraid of, what monsters are there? You can blow them up with a fist as a teacher!”

“Master… Be merciful.”

“You’re right. You can blow it up with one punch!”

My master is so cruel that they can’t see it anymore.

Xu que felt the rising force value in his body, pulled the reins and moved forward.

Playing monsters can increase the value of equipment and make yourself detour?

You’re kidding!

However, along the way, Xu que could feel that the monsters along the way were getting stronger and stronger. It was really difficult to cope with them only by relying on his body.

So he looked for the system to exchange several props for backup.

“Disciples, come with me!” Xu que touched the props in his arms and was in high spirits. “He forced the saint with Ben… No, go through the white bone cave with me!”

Strictly speaking, this white bone cave is just a mountain forest. Walking in it, it is surrounded by dense trees.

Xu que walked and looked around, and several disciples whispered.

“What is master looking at?”

“Nerd, I must see where there are monsters!”

“What on earth did our master do before he became a monk… How do I feel that master is more fierce than us?”

“My grandson doesn’t know… Shh, keep your voice down. Master has seen it.”

Xu Xu suddenly turned back and looked at a big tree with a bright smile on his face.

I found you!

He jumped off the white dragon horse and ran to the big tree. The reason why Baigu cave is called the first challenge of westward travel is that it is the place where the relationship between Tang Sanzang and Sun Wukong broke for the first time. The story of three dozen Baigujing is said by word of mouth. Because Sun Wukong killed Baigujing, he was mistaken by Tang Sanzang for indiscriminately killing innocent people, and the relationship between the teacher and the apprentice broke down. But looking at his apprentice’s advice, let alone three dozen bones essence, it is possible to be beaten three times by bones essence. As a master, how can I let my disciples be beaten by monsters? All the suffering should be borne by yourself Old man, what are you doing here? ” Xu lacked a probe and looked behind the big tree. I saw an old man tremble, slowly raised his head, reluctantly smiled and said: “ah… It’s an eminent monk. I’m looking for my daughter. My daughter hasn’t returned for many days. I’m a little worried about the old man…” in front of the golden light mirror, several old monks are whispering to each other This is a difficult time. ” Bai Gujing was originally transformed by human death, so the human body she transformed is difficult to distinguish without cultivation. ” Tang Sanzang killed so many monsters before. If mortals appear this time, they won’t die. ” The tall and thin old monk said confidently, “Tang Sanzang’s killing heart is too heavy. I’m afraid his insight has been forced by blood. It’s impossible to see the real body of this demon!” I think so too. I’m afraid he’s come here. ” The fat old monk nodded in agreement. They saw what Xu lacked had done along the way. It was not in line with the code of conduct of a Buddhist child. It was not too much to call him evil. Naturally, they didn’t want him to pass the test Old man, you come out first. It’s inconvenient behind the tree. ” Xu que stretched out his hands and helped the old man out. The old man was stunned. inconvenient? What’s inconvenient? Then he saw Xu Xu, suddenly his face changed, raised his right palm, and his voice was like thunder Demon, I can see at a glance that you are not human! Die! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1749
chapters.body:
Chapter 1749

Chapter 1749

C.1749

The old man was so frightened that his face turned white and his heart lay in a groove.

What’s the origin of this smelly monk?

Can you see through your real body at a glance?

See the ghost!

As for the disciples nearby, they were scared crazy.

Sleeping trough!

Master is crazy!

Even mortals!

“No, no, old man, I’m human…”

The voice didn’t fall, but Xu Ke didn’t hesitate to punch directly.

The old man cried, fell to the ground, twitched twice, and there was no movement.

“Ah ah! Master, you killed someone! ” Kakarot exclaimed, “we’re going to lose our great cause of learning scriptures!”

He didn’t even see clearly just now. Xu que killed someone!

Xu Wei shook his head and said, “this is a monster, not a man.”

Several disciples looked at each other and showed a frightened look.

It’s over… Shifu is crazy

Xu que saw that several people didn’t believe it and smiled, “OK, I’ll find the monster for you.”

Then he jumped into the jungle.

The old man ran away from the other side of the cave.

After casting spells to seal the entrance of the cave and adding several defensive spells, the white bone spirit was relieved and sat on the stone chair in shock.

“How can the smelly monk see through my real body?” Baigujing can’t understand it.

She herself is a white bone essence formed after people die and their resentment has not disappeared.

Even if her cultivation is not high now, the human body transformed is definitely not visible to ordinary people.

“Fortunately, the monk has no accomplishments and should not be able to spell. I’m still safe here for the time being…”

Bang!

Before Bai Gujing’s voice fell, a dull noise came from outside the cave.

She was stunned. Before she could go out and see what had happened, she heard an arrogant voice.

“Baigujing, open the door! You have the ability to steal men… No, you have the ability to be an old man. You don’t have the ability to open the door! ”

Gee!!!

Baigujing almost screamed.

It’s the smelly monk. How did he come here?

I’ve obviously hidden my breath. Even a monk with high mana will take a lot of time to find here!

Bang! Bang! Bang!

Outside the cave, there was a dull noise, which became more and more urgent. It seemed that someone was frantically hammering the cave with his fist.

Before Bai Gu thought about what to do, he suddenly heard a “click”.

The array I had just constructed was smashed into pieces and disappeared into the air.

I saw Xu que stride into the cave, with a kind smile on his face: “Amitabha, benefactor, I’ve come to pass you.”

Then he came forward with a set of farmer’s three fists, which didn’t give Bai Gujing the chance to beg for mercy.

“Bang!”

A punch fell, and the white bone essence suddenly turned into a pile of bone shelves, which disappeared and died.

Although Xu Ke’s body has no mana, it is tempered by magic source, Xianyuan and Buddhism. It is powerful and unparalleled. It has the effect of breaking demons.

A monster like Baigujing, who has almost no strong Demon power and depends on changing skin to deceive people, has a set of farmer’s three fists and dies directly.

In front of the golden mirror, several old monks were completely stupid.

The Baigujing they placed high hopes on didn’t play a role at all. It was almost cleaned up as soon as it appeared!

“What’s the matter? How can we try this! ”

“There’s something wrong with this guy. Is he Buddhist or not? Why is his killing so heavy!”

“Never let this person pass the test of the Buddha!”

Xu que came along the way and has achieved great killing and special killing. These old monks hated his behavior and didn’t want him to pass the Buddha test at all.

What does Buddhism Depend on?

It’s the Dharma, it’s the mouth gun!

Is to use a heart of benevolence to influence the world!

You can only punch three times. What’s the difference between our Buddhist monks and those ordinary monks?

It just lowers the style of our Buddhist practice!

However, the old monks did not have the ability to control the trial. They could only gnash their teeth and stare at Xu que, allowing him to drive all the way in the Buddhist trial.

Several old monks almost bit the futon under their seats in a hurry.

Shame, absolutely shame!

It is absolutely a shame for those who study Buddhism to let such people pass the test!

“I have a way!” The fat old monk suddenly brightened his eyes and shouted loudly.

The old monks around heard the speech and quickly surrounded it. The fat old monk lowered his voice and said slowly, “although we can’t control the Buddhist trial, we can inject our cultivation into it. In this way, the strength of demons will be greatly improved.” This… Is a good way, but how can you be 1 sure that he will not be able to fight? ” Xu Que’s performance all the way has shocked the old monks. Especially the powerful flesh left a deep impression on them. One punch, one monster, who can stand it? It’s still ninety-nine and eighty-one difficult. According to this playing method, the eighty-one difficult can only last a few more days! The speed of time in the realm of memory is 100 to 1 with the outside world, that is, when you spend 100 days inside, the outside world only spends one day. In the realm of memory, Xu que has killed nearly 20 monsters in less than half a month. He has driven straight all the way, and he has gone nearly one-third of the way! Others haven’t even accepted the fourth disciple yet! The fat old monk said in a deep voice: “I have observed carefully that although his body is strong, he does not have any mana. Even so, there are few monsters who can fight with one on the way to the west, so we should inject our cultivation into the most powerful monsters. I say so, you should know who is the most reliable?” The old monks just thought a little, and then showed the color of enlightenment. King Mirs with golden wings! The monster with the hardest background on the westbound road! He used to be the mount of the true Buddha. Later, he fled the great Leiyin temple and came to the mortal world without permission, which became one of the ninety-nine and eighty-one difficulties As long as king Dapeng with golden wings gets our cultivation, Tang Sanzang is definitely not an opponent! ” Indeed, King Dapeng with golden wings has practiced around the real Buddha for many years. His flesh is strong and his magic power is deep. His strength in the realm of memory is almost one to one. Coupled with our perfusion, he is bound to defeat Tang Sanzang. ” It’s not too late. Let’s go now! ” The old monks made a quick decision, sat down with their knees crossed, operated their skills and began to take action. They saw golden light on their bodies, and their eyes were filled with blood and firm will. We must not let Tang Sanzang obtain the scripture

chapters.title: Chapter 1750
chapters.body:
Chapter 1750

Chapter 1750

C.1750

While the old monks are trying to strengthen the king of golden winged Dapeng, Xu Ke and others are rushing through the pass.

“Master, it’s not good! The second senior brother was captured by the tiger king! ”

“Take me to save your second senior brother!”

“Shifu is bad. The elder martial brother was beaten by the weasel spirit.”

“Shame! Watch how I fight monsters! ”

“Master, it’s not good! The elder martial brother and the second martial brother were captured by monsters! ”

“Shit, I’m going to let this monster experience it today. How did the name of invincible fist come from before becoming a monk?”

Soon, the legend of Xu Ke and his party spread on the westbound road.

The monsters didn’t even dare to come out, for fear that they would be smashed by the missing fist.

This makes Xu lack depressed.

If you don’t come out, what about my pretending value?

In order to resist the demon killing thunder, he not only consumed all his strength in his body, but also used his force value to exchange for magic resistance props.

Thousands of magic resistance props!

Just to block a demon killing thunder, it shows how powerful this thunder is!

Overnight, he changed from a rich man to a poor boy. It can be said that he fell from heaven to hell in an instant.

Xu Wei now feels like he’s back to the time when he just owned the system and tried his best to get the installed force value.

To get a bit of installed force value, you have to live frugally and break your fingers to calculate what you can exchange for.

Otherwise, if you are not careful, you may run out of installed value.

“System, how much force value do I have now?” Xu que lay on the white dragon horse and asked lazily.

“Ding, the current installed force is worth 5000 points.”

Well, it’s no different from a poor man.

Xu que sighed melancholy. All the way to the West was in remote areas. He couldn’t find anyone to pretend.

Moreover, in recent days, there are fewer and fewer people they can meet, and it is slower and slower to obtain the forced value.

However, if you want to balance the magic Qi quickly, you only need to improve the system progress by consuming the installed force value. Otherwise, you have to find a way to obtain treasures and absorb power from them to balance.

The only thing that works in this journey to the west is the last relic and the ancient scriptures.

Therefore, the installed force value has become his most important consumable now.

“Master, it seems that there is a daughter country ahead.” Pig Bajie trembled his ears and ran over with interest.

“Don’t bother me, daughter country… Daughter country?!”

Xu que suddenly became refreshed. He turned over and dismounted, took out a mirror from his package and sorted out his appearance.

A country full of women!

For a whole country, it is simply unreasonable for them to miss this opportunity!

“Disciples, what do you think of my image?”

“Master, even if it’s the daughter country, you won’t…”

“Bah! What do you think! What is the daughter country? Being a teacher is a monk! ” Xu que said solemnly, “I’m trying to save them! Do you understand? Let the spirit of Buddhism shine on this country! ”

Of course, the most important thing is to force your own value, which is the most important point.

Xu Wei took several disciples all the way to the gate of his daughter’s country.

It is said to be the daughter country, but in fact it is only a large city. Because it is located in deep mountains and forests, it is called the daughter country.

Xu Fuqing cleared his throat and said the familiar line: “I come from the eastern Tang Dynasty and pass through the daughter country. I also hope the king will let us go.”

After a while, the gate slowly opened, and a general of the daughter country came out, stopped in front of several people, turned over and dismounted.

“Welcome several eminent monks to come here. The last will be the king. Welcome all of you.” The general bowed, then straightened up and said, “the king ordered the last general to stay in the city for a few more days. I don’t know what elder Tang thought.”

Xu que could not wait, but his face remained reserved: “we are just passing by. I’m going to the west to seek the Scriptures. I’m afraid we shouldn’t delay too long.”

“Well, it’s a pity. In that case, I’ll send you by the end…”

“But since the king is so enthusiastic, the poor monk would be better obedient than respectful!” Xu Weifei said quickly, and then waved behind him, “disciples, follow me into the city!”

The general was stunned. She clearly wanted to say that she would send you away?

I didn’t keep them!

Seeing that Xu Ke and others had entered the city, the general dared not fall behind and hurriedly followed up.

After entering the city, Xu que found his daughter’s country, which seemed different from his imagination.

Looking around, there were not many people in the city. The houses on both sides were empty and uninhabited.

But when you look carefully, you can find traces of people living in it, as if they had just left it.

Xu Ke was a little confused. What do you mean? I heard that Ben forced saint to come, so I hid all the people. For fear of seeing Ben forced saint’s handsome face, so I fell in love with me? That’s not necessary. I’m a monk now. I’m not close to women! Noticing Xu’s eyes, the general sighed and said in a deep voice: “to be honest with the holy monk, a monster has appeared in China recently, abducted many people and left, and the king is worried about it.” Abducted? Which monster is so bold! ” Xu que was immediately angry. These people are self imposed. Who is so bold to stop me from acting? The general was worried and said, “it’s a black tiger spirit… This tiger cultivation is incomparably powerful, and our soldiers can’t beat it.” Hearing the name of black tiger essence, Xu que was a little confused. Where is the black tiger spirit from the daughter country? Did you run to the wrong set? Then he 1 realized that this was not a true journey to the west, but a memory realm built according to the memory of the ancient Buddha OK, tell me where the ancient Buddha is. I’ll clean him up now! ” Ah…… “on the other hand, the king was still worried in the palace about how he could save the people. The general suddenly ran in a hurry and said, “Your Majesty, the holy monk has arrived.” The king was a beautiful woman, but he was also haggard. He waved his hand and said, “you can settle down the holy monk.” No… the holy monk went directly to the black tiger spirit and said he wanted to help us save the people. ” What?! ” At the same time, Xu que has come to the cave of black tiger Jing and shouted with gongs and drums Black tiger spirit, you have the ability to rob women. You have the ability to open the door! ” Let people go quickly, or I’ll call in! ” However, no matter how Xu que shouted, the black tiger essence was hidden in the cave and never appeared Master, I’m afraid the black tiger spirit didn’t dare to come out after hearing about master’s reputation. ” Pig Bajie whispered aside. Xu Duan’s eyes turned, and a sinister smile appeared at the corners of his mouth. He took a deep breath and shouted, “black tiger essence, you toothpick picking waste wood, get out quickly!” Roar! As soon as the voice fell, an angry roar sounded, and the earth shook around. Xu que proudly looked at the apprentice beside him and said with a smile, “you see, speaking should be like a teacher, penetrating into the inside! Hit the pain point ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1751
chapters.body:
Chapter 1751

Chapter 1751

C.1751

Why did the black tiger spirit abduct so many women for no reason?

There is only one reason!

“That’s because he can’t function! So he has low self-esteem! That’s why he abducted so many nationals of his daughter country and wanted to prove himself! ”

“Only people with low self-esteem will rob women so often!”

“Do you know what this is called? People are addicted to food. That’s what I mean! ”

Outside the cave, Xu lacked a righteous face and shouted loudly.

Many monsters in the surrounding mountains and forests gathered around and looked surprised when they heard Xu Xu’s words.

“No wonder I said that the black tiger spirit is always sneaky recently. It turned out that he went to kidnap women?”

“Don’t mention it. Last time, the black tiger spirit secretly asked me how to make myself more lasting!”

“Sleeping trough! Really? Start talking! ”

Most of the monsters present knew some gossip about the black tiger spirit. At this time, some discussion immediately built up the image of the black tiger spirit who was addicted to food, so he kidnapped a large number of women.

Rao is the black tiger essence. No matter how thick skinned he is, he can’t sit still at this time!

“Roar!”

Only a vigorous roar was heard, and a huge figure jumped out of the cave like a huge mountain stone.

“Tang Sanzang, don’t talk too much!”

I saw a black bear with a height of three feet standing on the rocks, glaring at Xu Wei.

“Hey, I’m wrong?” Xu Wei shook his head and defiantly said, “aren’t you a toothpick?”

“Wow! Tang Sanzang, you deceive people too much! ”

The black bear spirit stomped hard, and the rocks under his feet suddenly appeared spider web cracks, emitting a powerful smell all over his body.

Zhu Bajie and others on one side were stunned.

How do you feel that the strength of the black bear essence is much stronger?

Unfortunately, under the weak farmer’s three fists, this guy had no resistance and was beaten directly.

“I’m wrong, holy monk!”

A moment later, the black bear essence lay on the ground with a black nose and a swollen face, waved the white flag in his hand and begged for mercy loudly.

Kakarot and others showed a natural expression.

HMM… they are worthy of being their masters. Their means are as violent as ever.

The black bear essence turned over and sat up with a wronged face and said, “yes, it was king Dapeng with golden wings who told me that if you can really love human women, you can cure my stubborn diseases…”

Xu Ke was stunned and said curiously, “what’s your stubborn disease?”

Black bear’s face is red, and he whispered, “that’s what you said…”

Xu Wei was surprised at that time!

I just yelled a few words, but you really did?

Seeing Xu Xu’s shocked look, the black bear spirit was a little unhappy: “what’s wrong with me? I just want to find a girl like an angel and fall in love with me! Shouldn’t more girls choose to find angels? ”

“Indeed, what you said is very reasonable.” Xu Xu clapped his hands, “now the whole world knows you are small.”

Everyone around looked at the black bear spirit with an unspeakable look, and their eyes were full of sympathy.

The black bear’s face was stunned, and then became solemn and stirring. A moment later, he howled and ran to the distance.

“Master… You may have left a psychological shadow.” Kakarot looked sympathetically at the back of the black bear.

Xu que snorted and took out his Zen stick with his backhand: “am I wrong? He is a toothpick. ”

“Master, you’re quite right. The disciples agree that the black bear spirit is not good!”

Seeing Xu que put down the Zen stick, Zhu Bajie quietly breathed out a breath and wiped out the cold sweat from their forehead.

The people who saved the daughter country were naturally warmly treated by the king. Xu Ke and others stayed in the daughter country for two days.

Two days later, they embarked on a journey again.

As for the king of the beautiful daughter country, Xu que naturally disdains it.

What about beauty?

I’m a monk. I’m not close to women!

Xu que was thinking about a problem all the way.

Was the real Buddha the legendary Tang Sanzang.

Normally speaking, the real Buddha should be Sakyamuni. Tang Sanzang is Jin chanzi, his eldest disciple.

This is a widely circulated story about the journey to the West on earth. It is well known. Even a three-year-old child knows something about it.

But according to the saying in the realm of memory, the one who experienced all this was the real Buddha himself.

Xu que was suddenly surprised, and a creepy feeling rose in his heart.

There is no doubt that the earth has a channel to this place, which has been personally proved by Xu Xu.

But if this inference continues, the original journey to the West will undoubtedly be a hoax.

There is no golden cicada in this world, nor is there a real Buddha with Tang Sanzang. Some are just to experience the Buddha’s heart and reincarnate and rebirth? And the other party has been to earth Can it be said that the journey to the West was a journey to the west across countless worlds? ” The four masters and disciples started from the earth, crossed several worlds, and finally came to Leiyin temple to seek the Scripture. Of course, the Leiyin temple is definitely not the one Xu Ke sees now. People and monks have said that it is just a replica Forget it, it has nothing to do with me. The top priority is to quickly obtain the Sutra, restore cultivation and save xiaorou. ” In the twinkling of an eye, a few days later, Xu Ke and others finally came to shituoling. This is also the worst place where the four masters and disciples were beaten in the journey to the West. Although the strength of the golden winged Dapeng king has been weakened in the realm of memory, Xu que can not resist by relying on a flesh body. Fortunately, he pretended to force him all the way these days and successfully suppressed some of the magic Qi. At this time, he had some weak cultivation accomplishments in his body. Combined with his body, I think we can take the golden winged Mirs king. His body at this time is like a tall, powerful and incomparable, but without the slightest energy, it can only be regarded as a hard scrap iron. However, with a trace of cultivation, I can struggle twice at least Master, this is Shituo mountain. The golden winged ROC king there is said to have listened to Buddhism for thousands of years under the throne of Buddha. His strength is unfathomable. How should we get there? ” Sun Wukong has adapted as like as two peas, and even the shape has been made the same as that of kakroit. I’ve been thinking for a long time. I feel that the previous killing is too heavy. I have dry days and harmony, so I decided to be reasonable this time. ” Several disciples suddenly showed an unbelievable look on their faces, and then moved to tears. Master! You finally know why! Then, they saw Xu que riding a white dragon horse, pedaling to the Lingkou and yelling inside Flat haired bird, get out of here! I have come to reason with you! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1752
chapters.body:
Chapter 1752

Chapter 1752

C.1752

Xu que looked back and saw several people frozen in place. He was not angry and said, “hurry up and reason with my teacher!”

Before several disciples came back, there was an earth shaking roar in Shituo mountain.

“Tang Sanzang, you are too arrogant!”

I saw a huge unparalleled golden winged ROC bird rising with its wings. Its body was like a huge mountain, blocking out the sky and the sun, covering the whole lion camel ridge.

“I… grass!”

The four masters and disciples looked up and exclaimed.

“Disciple, have you seen the golden winged ROC before? He wasn’t that old then? ” Xu que looked at kakarot strangely. Among the scripture learning team, only he had faced the real Buddha in those years.

Kakarot swallowed a mouthful of water and murmured, “absolutely not… Then he will be big, and his cultivation will not be so strong.”

In kakarot’s perception, the breath on the golden winged ROC was almost half that of the real Buddha.

That’s the real Buddha that has never existed!

It’s invincible to have half the cultivation of the real Buddha here!

“What the hell is this? The game official is too relaxed to see players, so temporarily increase the boss difficulty? ”

At the same time, in front of the golden mirror, several old monks showed a happy look on their faces.

“Hum, this son is absolutely unexpected. We can temporarily improve the cultivation of golden winged ROC bird!”

“Yes, the joint efforts of several of us, plus the golden winged ROC in the realm of memory, once listened to the Buddha under the real Buddha seat for thousands of years, which is absolutely invincible in the world!”

“We just don’t want him to pass the test at any time.”

Several old monks turned pale, but they still kept their duties as the trial guard of the Buddha to ensure that every trial taker’s life was not in danger.

A large number of cultivation losses make them more like a group of dying bones, but the heat in their eyes burns more strongly.

For the ancient Buddha!

For faith!

The trial of Buddha must not be passed by such murderous people!

During the trial, Xu que looked up at the huge golden winged ROC and fell into meditation.

Zhu Bajie had already packed up his luggage and hurriedly said, “master, let’s go quickly! This thing is terrible. I’d better hurry back to my gaolaozhuang! ”

“Yes, master, why don’t we go back and Practice for a hundred years and clean up this flat haired bird.”

Even the white dragon horse had a loud nose and looked like it was leaving.

All the monsters in the memory realm, including several disciples, are shaped according to the memory of the ancient Buddha.

Several disciples are so cowardly. Xu que doesn’t know whether they used to be like this or whether the ancient Buddha deliberately changed their character in order to increase the difficulty of the trial.

But all this is not bad for Xu Ke!

I’m the leader of the fried sky sect. Aren’t you afraid of a flat haired bird?

“Disciples, come as soon as you go!”

He put down his Zen stick, jumped up and flew directly to the sky.

Kakarot was worried when he saw this: “master, you didn’t take your Zen stick!”

However, Xu que rode to the golden winged ROC.

Flying in the air, the golden winged ROC is immersed in the filling feeling of infinite power in his body.

Seeing Xu Weifei coming, he immediately burst out a burst of laughter: “Tang Sanzang! Come on! I will eat you now and become a Buddha! Get out of here! ”

After all, he is the monster who has stayed with the real Buddha for the longest time. He knows that this is just the memory of the real Buddha,

Except for those who transcend into Buddha, other monsters are really locked up here!

Including himself!

There are only two options to get out of here.

Or the person being tested can naturally get rid of it by feeling the Dharma, just like the black and strong man before.

Although that one’s detachment way has some special characteristics, it is detachment after all.

Another way is to tear up the boundary of the memory with great strength and escape!

Originally, he didn’t have this opportunity, but today several old monks poured all his accomplishments into his body, which made his accomplishments reach an unprecedented level.

As long as you swallow the tester again, you can escape from here with the help of the sealed power on the other party!

“Roar!”

The huge roar shook the earth, the mountains shook, and the demons and beasts around turned pale.

“It’s terrible… The golden winged ROC king has become so powerful!”

“Why is his cultivation so powerful? Almost to the limit we can see! ”

“The flesh of Tang Sanzang can’t bear the attack of King Dapeng with golden wings!”

Everyone is not optimistic about Xu Ke. He has been sealed for cultivation here. It is impossible to fight him because of his physical body and Buddhism.

Can you rely on your mouth? Don’t be funny. King Dapeng with golden wings killed countless demons before he surrendered to the Buddha. He listened to the Buddha for thousands of years under the Buddha’s seat. Even the Buddha has no way to influence. Can a mere tester do it? In the eyes of the public, Xu que directly lifted his cassock, revealed his strong upper body, and shouted, “demon, I want you to help me practice today!” what the fuck! Everyone was stunned when they saw this scene. What?! I saw Xu missing his upper body, tattooed with a lifelike golden dragon pattern, teeth and claws, and a powerful dragon power fell in the air Tai Wei, Tian Long, the Buddha, di Zang, Prajna Buddhas, Prajna lamakong! ” Xu Duan pinched out his hands and made a decision. A powerful Buddha idea surged out. He saw that the golden dragon pattern suddenly soared into the air, turned into a mighty Golden Dragon and rushed towards the king of golden winged rocs How is that possible? Don’t you have no accomplishments?! ” The golden winged ROC king was shocked and turned pale. Rao Shi has now improved his cultivation to the peak of memory, but he still feels fear from the Golden Dragon. You’re not a match for this? Driven by fear, the king of golden winged Dapeng did his best without hesitation. As soon as his wings vibrated, his golden wings fell, like thousands of sharp arrows, shooting at Xu vacancy! Xu que raised a proud arc at the corner of his mouth and raised his hand: “hum! How dare you teach others how to teach others how to do things, David Tianlong! ” Roar! The Golden Dragon’s body took off, and its huge body blocked all the arrow feathers. Then, the dragon’s tail swept fiercely and slapped on the golden winged Dapeng king. The golden winged ROC king was like being directly fanned upside down, like a kite off the line, falling askew to the ground, “bang” and smashing a huge pit. Whether in the territory of memory or in front of the golden mirror, there is silence, and the needle can be heard

chapters.title: Chapter 1753
chapters.body:
Chapter 1753

Chapter 1753

C.1753

The old monks stared at the golden mirror in front of them, and their brains went down directly.

They have guarded the Buddhist realm for many years and witnessed several Buddhist trials, but they have never seen anyone who can make such a trial.

Although it is said that considering that the experimenter has no cultivation and only physical strength, the cultivation of demons in the trial has been suppressed, which is several big realms lower than the outside world.

The purpose of doing so is to let the experimenter’s Buddhism come into play.

But who can play like Xu Wei?!

Is this called Foley?

Ah! What the hell is this, Buddhist?!

“This is Buddhism!” Xu Weizhen said in words, “I teach you truth with Buddhism. Isn’t this Buddhism?”

With one foot on the golden winged ROC and one hand on his hips, he said confidently, with the dragon pattern looming on his body.

System production, Dawei Tianlong tattoo paste, high-quality products are guaranteed!

Before, in order to prevent meeting his opponent on the road, Xu que had already exchanged the forced value for this one-time prop.

Gulu

The three disciples swallowed a mouthful of water and looked at each other.

“You don’t seem to agree with the idea of being a teacher?” Xu Wei didn’t hear the sound and turned to look at the three.

The three immediately applauded: “master, you are awesome! Master is right! ”

Feeling the rising pressure in his body, Xu Kui showed a satisfied smile.

Sure enough, we still need to use this method to install the forced value quickly!

He vaguely guessed that most of his trial process was watched by others, otherwise the forced value wouldn’t come so fast.

“Well, disciples, go on the road with me!”

The four disciples and their party set foot on the journey again, and the shadow of the big Leiyin temple is in front.

A few days later, they finally came to the big Leiyin temple.

On the way, he met an old turtle who collected a river fee. Xu que naturally used his own means to tell the old turtle what helping others is.

Joke, it’s your honor to force saint to cross the river. Do you want to collect the river fee?

I don’t know what to do!

Before he came to the big Leiyin temple, even though he had seen it several times, Xu que still sighed: “it’s really a treasure land of Buddhism, resplendent…”

On the high Lingshan mountain, a golden temple stands in front. The sky is shining, and the Buddha light is shining. It is extremely sacred.

Stepping up the steps step by step, the Buddha’s voice is winding, just like clear water cleaning the mind.

All the way up the steps, they arrived at the main hall, but they didn’t see the Buddha. Only two old monks were standing in it.

“Yes, the ancient Buddha has already left. How can he wait here?”

Seeing the crowd coming, a touch of surprise flashed in the eyes of the two old monks.

All the trials lead to this place, but they didn’t expect that there would be testers here so early.

In terms of time, even half of the road of those testers has not been reached.

But since someone came, they couldn’t stay standing.

“Congratulations, everyone. You have finally come here after the difficulties of ’99 and 81.” A tall old monk came forward with a kind smile on his face, “I don’t know what you are going to exchange Buddhist scriptures?”

While talking, he rubbed his fingers, which is self-evident.

Kakarota, Zhu Bajie and others understood and handed over some things left on their way.

As a result, the tall old monk obviously showed a look of disgust on his face and threw it back: “Amitabha, this thing is not worthy of exchanging Buddhist scriptures.”

Several disciples suddenly made trouble.

They have no concept of worldly property, plus they are the memory of the real Buddha here after becoming a Buddha.

After becoming a Buddha, their weak mind also affected them. They didn’t have any valuable treasures.

“Do we have to turn back?” Kakarot frowned and obviously didn’t want to go back.

All the way here, I have to go back to get money. God knows that I am not the first person to get the Buddhist scriptures in the end.

Seeing this scene, Xu que immediately recalled that the last difficulty of traveling westward was that the two old monks wanted kickbacks. As a result, Tang Sanzang took a pile of blank scriptures at that time.

But when you meet yourself, you still want a rebate. You don’t know what to do!

“Bold!” Xu kudeng burst into a cry and said, “in such a sacred place as the Buddha, you dare to ask for kickbacks in front of the people. It’s lawless!”

The two old monks were shocked by the roar, almost scared to death, and looked at Xu que with angry eyes.

“Amitabha, don’t talk nonsense. This is the place of true Buddha. We are all eminent monks. How can we ask for a rebate?” The tall old monk is righteous.

“Eminent monk? I bah! ” Xu que sneered and came forward, “just your rubbish Dharma cultivation is not as good as the poor monk!”

As a Buddhist disciple, the dignity of the tall old monk ignited at once and roared: “we have served in the big Leiyin temple for many years. How can we be inferior to you as a little monk!” Not satisfied? Then have the ability to compare Buddhism! Look who can! ” Xu Xu didn’t give in. “If I win, you’ll let us go in and get the Buddhist scriptures!” that ‘s ok! If you lose, go back now. The Buddhist sutras here don’t need people like you who respect the Buddha! ” Deal! ” Several disciples were in a panic and hurriedly stopped them Master, why don’t we forget it? ” Kakarot came forward and grabbed Xu que, with a bitter face and said, “this is a comparison of Buddhism. I’m afraid you’re not an opponent…” Xu que stared: “what do you mean? The Buddhist doctrine of being a teacher is omniscient, penetrating the past and the present. How can there be an invincible doctrine? ” Eh… “Kakarot was suffering. Master, when did you talk about Buddhism along the way? We only see you fighting and killing all the way. You are more cruel than our four monster disciples! Xu Shao shook off kakarot’s hand and said in a loud voice, “come on, let’s have a good competition in Buddhism today!” The tall old monk sneered and said in a deep voice, “dare you ask monk friends, what is the promising method?” WOW! As soon as the words came out, the disciples showed a bitter look, and the old monks in front of the golden mirror also meditated. What is true Buddha? This is the school’s understanding of Dharma. Three thousand people have three thousand views. Maybe everyone has a different understanding of the law. What Xu Ke needs to do is to find the core explanation of the law and convince the two old monks. The difficulty lies in how he can convince the old monk to understand what he said! But Xu Xu didn’t think for long. He smiled disdainfully and said, “that’s it? I didn’t expect you two old bald donkeys to be so old and have such a low Buddhist knowledge! Listen to me! ” All promising dharmas are like dreams and illusions, like dew and electricity, so be it! ” Boom! As soon as this sentence came out, the two old monks were stupid

chapters.title: Chapter 1754
chapters.body:
Chapter 1754

Chapter 1754

C.1754

Xu Ke’s voice was not loud, but it hit them hard like Hong Zhong and Da Lv.

Both know that this is a place of trial, and everything is nothing but vanity.

Is their existence false or another kind of truth?

That’s why they asked the question.

Xu Ke’s remarks directly and fundamentally explained what is the promising law.

Everything in the world, things born by reason and harmony, is unreal and eternal.

Like a dream, like a fantasy, like dew, like electricity.

We should experience, observe and understand the world in this way.

The tall old monk trembled and was excited. It was like hearing the greatest Buddha sound in the world and the most profound truth!

It turned out that… It was so!

See through the truth, put down all the attachment to people and things, put down the law of action, and then we can prove the law of inaction!

Their existence is both false and true. All this lies in themselves. How to treat their existence!

Xu que stared at the two people with a serious face and was proud of himself.

The two woodlouse, Ben forced the sage just to recite the Diamond Sutra, which scared you to death.

He discovered before that the Dharma in this world is fundamentally different from the Dharma widely spread on earth.

It can be said that the Dharma on earth has nothing to do with this place, but it uses the most refined and profound words to explain the depth of the Dharma.

Maybe it was lost, or maybe it was the misunderstanding of later generations, which led to this situation.

But it has nothing to do with Xu Xu. He just needs to recite it. That’s enough.

A moment later, the two old monks looked at each other and bowed deeply to Xu que.

“Thank you, master Sanzang. I’ll understand.”

Several disciples were all silly. Their master conquered these two bald heads with one word?

That’s awesome!

The tall old monk straightened up and said respectfully, “the real Buddha relic and Buddhist scriptures are in the rear. The master can take them by himself.”

“You don’t lead the way?” Xu que wondered.

The tall old monk shook his head and showed a peaceful smile on his face: “we have realized that we are leaving here.”

The voice fell, and their bodies began to disintegrate, and then turned into spots of golden light and dissipated in the air.

In front of the golden mirror, the fat old monk opened the arhat book again, pointed to a page on the book in amazement and exclaimed, “really! They have become Buddhas! ”

On that page, two names emerged out of thin air, just like a brand.

The whole hall was silent, and the needles could be heard.

The old monks looked at each other and never expected that the end of the matter would be like this!

The tester named Tang Sanzang actually passed the 9981 difficulty by killing and cutting. In another word, he passed the most difficult test!

This is a ridiculous thing to describe!

It’s outrageous!

In the territory of memory, Xu que saw the two scattered and broke into the back of the hall all the way.

Just before the meeting was a wooden platform, on which a Buddhist relic and a Scripture were suspended.

Xu que took down the scripture two steps forward and frowned: “that’s it? Lao Tzu… No, I’ve worked so hard to come here. It’s just a Scripture? ”

Then he held the relic next to him.

At this moment, the picture in front of me spread and melted like ink.

Xu Ke was just a trance, and returned to the square he had entered before.

And the Scriptures and relics in his hands turned into a streamer and poured into the Dantian.

Xu que suddenly felt a moderate Buddhist power swimming around his body, moistening his heavily injured body.

As for the relic, it is suspended in the Dantian, occupies the central position, and emits infinite Buddha light, just like a small sun.

At the same time, more figures appear here one by one.

At first everyone looked puzzled, but then they reacted.

Someone passed the test!

“How is that possible? I’m still in my daughter’s country! ”

“What the hell? I don’t even know who my second apprentice is. ”

“Hehe, you’re pretty good. I’ve dealt with my big apprentice. Up to now, he hasn’t listened to me.”

The experience of those who participate in the trial is similar, but there are some differences in the people they meet.

When they came out to communicate with each other, they found that most people were still less than one-third of the place.

The man who walked fast was only half gone and was stunned.

Even those who have high attainments in Buddhism have not completed it. Who moves so fast?

Soon, they found Xu Ke standing in the center.

It’s not Xu que who attracts people’s attention, but the Buddha light emitted from him. It’s too dazzling.

“Is he the one who passed the test?” Really? Does anyone know him? ” Anyway, I don’t know… “I know! He came with fahui! ” Everyone’s eyes fell on fahui, full of inquiry. Little monk fahui felt the pressing eyes around him, sighed and folded his hands: “Amitabha, I don’t know why he passed so quickly.” Although it is said that people who practice Buddhism are indifferent to their mind and nature, who is easy to cultivate to this point? On weekdays, it looks like my Buddha is merciful, but now when it comes to the inheritance of ancient Buddha, they don’t mind using thunder. At this time, Xu and Gu lost the book, but they had no way to win it on the spot. In particular, Xu Xu was still an unknown generation before that. How can this be convincing Ah… Comfortable. ” At this moment, Xu que opened his eyes and groaned comfortably. When the Buddhist scriptures were put into the body and the relic was in charge, the progress of digesting magic Qi in the body rushed to 90% in an instant. With the existence of these two Buddhist treasures, one day at most, I can balance the power of Buddhism and magic Qi. At that time, I will become the invincible leader of the fried sky sect again! Wonderful Oh, sleeping trough… Amitabha, I don’t know what you monks think when you look at me? ” Xu Wei was startled by the surrounding eyes and almost scolded. A monk came over with an unconvinced face and said in a deep voice, “my monk friend, I want to know why you can pass the Buddhist trial so quickly.” Xu Ke was stunned and suddenly showed a bright smile: “in fact, it’s because the ancient Buddha and I are one family.” WOW! This remark immediately aroused public anger. You’re kidding! What kind of person is the ancient Buddha? How can he be a family with you! In the face of the people’s doubts, Xu sighed and flashed the stone tablet he had made in the Buddhist realm See clearly, the poor monk is Tang Sanzang of the fried heaven sect, and the ancient Buddha was also one of our fried heaven sect. ” Everyone was slightly stunned and looked at it together. I saw several big words written on the stone tablet: fried heaven help cow force

chapters.title: Chapter 1755
chapters.body:
Chapter 1755

Chapter 1755

C.1755

The people looked up and down at the stone tablet with an unbelievable look on their faces.

Someone was unconvinced and asked, “just say it?”

Xu que turned over a white cloud and pointed to the upper left of the stone tablet.

The man looked intently and found that there were three big words “ancient Buddha Yue” in the upper left corner.

Connected, the ancient Buddha said: fried heaven to help cattle force!

“Amitabha, you should believe what I said now?” Xu que said with a smile.

Believe?

Trust your head!

At that time, the people put on an expression of “is your brain funny?”.

You never know where to get a stone tablet, engraved with such a sentence, just to convince us?

You’re kidding!

Are we such idiots? We read Buddhist scriptures!

“You can’t prove it’s an ancient Buddha!”

“Monk friend. Why don’t you put it away… It’s a bit embarrassing. ”

“Cough… I don’t know if there are other ways to prove it? You’re being. It’s really hasty. ” A monk coughed and kindly reminded him.

Even the friendliest monk here can’t see it.

On the contrary, Fa Hui sighed and stepped forward: “you don’t need to say more. I can testify for my monk friends. This thing really comes from the side of the ancient Buddha.”

Then he explained how he had entered the place where the ancient Buddha was passed on, how he met Xu que, and how he found the stone tablet.

Fahui seems to have great prestige here. After listening to him, all those who were still questioning closed their mouths.

It was a slight frown, and a faint smile appeared at the corners of his mouth.

Finally, the tall and thin old monk in charge of the examination came out and announced the end of the trial, and all the talents dispersed one after another.

As for whether he was convinced or not, whether he believed what fahui said or not is unknown.

Xu Ke doesn’t matter. Anyway, now the ancient Buddha relics and ancient scriptures are in his body, it’s impossible for him to spit out.

“Little light bulb, can you monks also lie?” Xu Xu came to fahui and asked with a smile.

What fahui said just now almost completely restored their experience in the place where the ancient Buddha was inherited.

But there is only one difference – he didn’t tell you that in fact, in the land of inheritance, it has been found to be false.

I didn’t have any kindness with him, but the other party saved my life.

Why did he do that?

Fa Hui hesitated for a moment, folded his hands and said, “Taoist friend, to tell you the truth, the poor monk was actually saved by you.”

“I saved you?” Xu Ke was at a loss.

I haven’t seen him since I came out. Where can I save him?

Fa Hui sighed, and his face was more ashamed: “in fact, the poor monk didn’t leave at that time, and the prohibition didn’t stop me. Seeing that the devil 1 was born, I wanted to stop it, so I went to it alone…”

When Xu Wei heard this, he opened his mouth and made a heartfelt sigh: “lying in the trough… You are really not afraid of death…”

He never expected that the little monk should be so brave!

Even he didn’t dare to get close to the foreign evil at the beginning. The little bulb rushed in without saying a word?

“But compared with Taoist friends, the cultivation of the poor monk is hardly worth mentioning. He can’t even cause any harm to each other. He’s exhausted without even getting close to the core.” Fa Hui’s face showed a touch of fear, which seemed to recall the horror of the foreign evil, “fortunately, the Taoist friend appeared and led the evil away, so I had the opportunity to leave…”

It turned out that Fa Hui rushed into the evil spirit of foreign demons at that time. As a result, he was directly targeted by the evil spirit because of his Buddhist practice. He was crazy about his cultivation and fell down in a short time.

Originally, he was going to die. As a result, Xu que directly divided three into five and two, attracting the attention of foreign demons.

Fahui seized the opportunity to recover his strength, and then he had a chance to escape from heaven.

Only Er Gouzi and others banned it. Fa Hui said that although he was not good at cultivation, he was still a little accomplished in array prohibition.

Thinking of this, Xu que grinned and raised his hand to pat the small bulb on the head: “well, you also saved my life. The two don’t owe each other. Strictly speaking, I should owe you.”

Fa Hui tilted his head slightly, avoided Xu’s hand and said calmly, “this is a cause and effect entanglement. I have a definite number in my heart, but I want to remind Taoist friends that if I have a chance, I must not go to Tianmen.”

Xu Ke was stunned. How did little light bulb know he was going to Tianmen?

A touch of impatience was revealed in FA’s eyes: “the poor monk watched the Qi trend of Taoist friends before. Although Wu Yun was prosperous, there was a disaster when he hit, which should be where the four heavenly gates are.”

Xu que shrugged his shoulders and said, “I thought there was something. It was a disaster. Even foreign demons could clean up the saint. How could the four heavenly gates put me…” it was a disaster of life and death! ” Fa Hui said solemnly, “Taoist friends must keep the monk’s in mind. Don’t go to the four heavenly gates in a hundred years! This robbery is extremely dangerous. Even the little monk can’t resolve it! ” Fa Hui’s tone was particularly serious, and Xu que immediately frowned. A moment later, his expression gradually softened and said with a smile: “little bulb, Tianmen, I have to go. There is a very important person waiting for me there.” I owe her that. I must bring her back! What else did fahui want to say? A tired voice sounded nearby: “two, if there’s something wrong, can you talk about it later?” They turned their heads and found a fat old monk standing aside with a bitter face. He looked at Xu Ke up and down, sighed and said in a deep voice, “since you have become a Buddha, you are the representative of my Buddhist realm. Although you have some actions… Forget it, as a Buddha, I hope you can shoulder your responsibility as a Buddha. You need to participate in the four Tianmen grand gatherings in half a year.” Xu que looked at the other party’s worried expression and muttered. It’s strange. The old guy looks like he’s constipated. If the fat old monk could hear Xu Ke’s heart, he would shout that my Buddha would finish. In their view, Xu Ke, who has killed too much, is not qualified to be a Buddha at all. But it happened that he passed the test. Who can stand it?
