In addition to him and the tall and thin old monk, other monks directly broke the defense on the spot and returned to the place of confinement without saying a word. They were unwilling to come out again. Fa Hui heard the words “Four Heavenly gates” and opened his mouth to stop it, but he heard Xu Que’s resolute voice Don’t worry, I will go

chapters.title: Chapter 1756
chapters.body:
Chapter 1756

Chapter 1756

C.1756

After explaining some precautions, the fat old monk hurried away, as if he didn’t want to communicate too much with Xu.

Now it’s Xu Que’s turn to be a little confused.

What’s the matter with this old guy?

At least he passed the test. He was certified by the ancient Buddha and appointed by the emperor. He is a righteous Buddha. All right!

Should I be so despised?!

Fa Hui also felt a little incredible: “Xu Daoyou, why do these people have this attitude towards you?”

Xu Wei turned his eyes angrily: “who knows.”

Fa Hui thought for a moment and asked, “Taoist friend, how did you pass the test?”

Xu Xu didn’t hide it, and told him exactly what he had done in the trial.

After listening, fahui’s face turned blue and white, which was a wonderful scene.

He never thought that Xu Ke passed the test in this way!

Not to mention the watchman, even he is a little worried.

People try to persuade demons with Buddhism! It’s not persuasion with your fist!

After a long silence, fahui said with a bitter smile, “maybe… The ancient Buddha set up this test in those days, and he also considered this aspect.”

Buddhism doesn’t seem to have many arrangements for Buddhas. It just leaves a request to go to the four heavenly gates to participate in the cloud climbing meeting after each trial.

The so-called Dengyun meeting is actually a gathering of young talents in sin Yun Chau.

At the rally, a competition will be held mainly by the immortal emperors of the four heavenly gates. The participants are talents from all sides of Xianyun island.

The final winner will become the closing disciple of the four immortal emperors.

This is the agreement between the ancient Buddha and the four heavenly gate immortal emperors in the Buddhist realm. It is unknown why this agreement was reached.

Xu que doesn’t care. Anyway, he will go to the four heavenly gates in the end. Now he has a Buddha’s identity, which just doesn’t need to expose his identity.

“Little light bulb, where are you going next?” Xu que asked.

Dharma Hui put his hands together and said, “I’m going to experience and sharpen the Buddha’s heart. This trial made me realize that I still have many shortcomings in Buddhism.”

Xu nodded, and a sinister radian came up at the corner of his mouth: “I’m going to Taiyi sect next. Why don’t you come with me?”

“Too easy?” Fa Hui looked stunned. “Xu Daoyou, are you talking about the Taiyi sect that came to the edge of the Buddhist realm to establish a sect not long ago?”

“Er… It should be. No other sect is called Taiyi sect. What’s the problem?”

Fahui shook his head and said regretfully, “Taoist friend, don’t you know?”

Xu Ke frowned slightly, and an ominous premonition welled up in his heart: “don’t know what? What’s the problem? ”

Fa Hui’s next sentence immediately raised Xu Que’s whole heart.

“Taiyi sect has offended the desire demon sect. The whole sect has died in name only.”

“What?” Xu Ke’s eyes suddenly burst into anger and shouted, “what’s going on?!”

Fa Hui told him that Taiyi sect had a decent life because it was covered by Yurou fairy.

But later, I don’t know why, Yurou fairy became more and more indifferent to Taiyi sect, until later, people of Taiyi sect couldn’t even meet Yurou fairy face to face.

Originally, the strength of Taiyi sect was not strong. In addition, the leader’s appearance is a posture of heaven and man, which attracted countless people’s covet.

But no one dared to touch them because they were covered by Yurou fairy.

As a result, fairy Yurou became more and more indifferent to Taiyi sect. Some sects gradually moved their minds. After several attempts, they found that fairy Yurou really didn’t care about Taiyi sect, so they completely let go.

Under the pressure of all parties, the Taiyi faction was forced to move to the periphery of the Buddhist realm.

He Zong is not willing to let go of the influence of the other immortal sect, but he Zong is not willing to let go of the influence of the other immortal sect.

“They did something to Taiyi?” Xu que narrowed his eyes and his voice leaked from his teeth.

When fahui heard this, his heart jumped.

At this time, Xu Ke seemed to hide some vicious power, like a sleeping beast, who wanted to choose people to eat!

Even when he stood by, he felt a palpitation.

“That’s not true. The desire demon sect is actually… How to say, it’s a very strange sect.” As a Buddhist disciple, Fa Hui wanted to know about this kind of magic door, “although they are also a demon sect, they don’t kill indiscriminately. As far as the poor monk knows… They should have used a lot of spirit stones to dig corners of Taiyi sect…”

Speaking of this, Rao Shihui could not help smiling.

Xu que was stunned and thought he had heard wrong.

It’s a big magic gate, but it’s still engaged in mergers and acquisitions, splitting and digging the foot of the wall?

Hearing that the Taiyi sect had not been besieged, Xu Ke was relieved, and his momentum gradually subsided: “what’s the matter with the Taiyi sect in name only?” Eh… Well, the desire demon sect is famous in xianyunzhou. Most of the people of the Taiyi sect have been poached by the desire demon sect, so they will go to participate in the inheritance of ancient Buddha this time. They should want to obtain the inheritance and have a broad strength with the Taiyi sect in external publicity. ” Xu Wei was stunned when he heard this. He thought that this set of operation is quite similar to some rich second-generation on earth… I like you. I don’t play Yin, just smash it with money. Until you are willing Hum, no matter what bullshit demon sect or sect, bullying Taiyi is the enemy of Ben forced saint! ” Xu kuanleng snorted, and his arrogance suddenly appeared, “when I blow up the heaven Gang, is it a decoration?” He has thought it over. It’s time to revive the reputation of the bombers in xianyunzhou! However, it is urgent to find Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude first. With these two goods, it will be much more convenient to do things by yourself. After all, these two are excellent coolies. The reputation of two goods, er Gouzi and Duan Jiude, has long been famous in this land. After all, the three of them dared to pit even the immortal statue of Tianmen before. At this time, just let fahui inquire a little and find out where they were going How on earth did these two goods do it? ” Xu Wei looked at the information in his hand and couldn’t understand it. “In such a little time, he ran to the Taigu secret place?” Taigu secret land is on the other side of the Buddhist land, about tens of thousands of miles away from here. Even with the teleport array, it will take at least a day. Fa Hui shook his head and said, “I don’t know, but recently, it is said that ancient treasures were born in the Taigu secret place.” Xu que knew it immediately. No wonder. Don’t count the moving goods in the pit.

chapters.title: Chapter 1757
chapters.body:
Chapter 1757

Chapter 1757

C.1757

After Xu Que’s lobbying, fahui promised him to take him to Taigu secret place.

It’s just that the journey is far away, so we have to go through several transmission arrays. It takes about a day in the transmission array. In fact, it is estimated that the external time is at least half a month.

Xu Wei checked the situation in his body. After obtaining the relic of the ancient Buddha and the ancient Sutra, the evil Qi has been balanced by about 60%. Now his cultivation has basically returned to the early days of the fairy king.

This cultivation achievement is not high or low. In xianyunzhou, where there are many immortal kings like dogs, it has the same status as the three grade Wufu in the world.

Fortunately, however, after the Buddha’s journey to the west to learn scriptures, his costume force value has exceeded the 100000 mark.

Most of these contributions mainly come from the old monks who supervise the trial and those who test with him at the same time after passing the trial.

“Hey… It’s hard to get water from the sea, except that Wushan is not a cloud.” Xu sighed and lamented his system that had no sense of existence.

The system has not been upgraded for a long time since the last upgrade.

There is no other reason. The installation value required for upgrading is too expensive.

In addition, after the massive invasion of xianyunzhou, I was always busy, so I never found a chance to integrate my abilities.

On the way to Taigu secret place this time, I just have time to tidy up.

The system of version 11.0 integrates and upgrades all excavations. At present, there are mainly two sets of decisions in the body.

The first is the body method combination of “three thousand thunders” and “Heaven’s will leads to seclusion”.

As for the rest, it is the powerful and extreme Dharma decision such as xuanbing ghost fog hand, as well as the king forcing fist and King forcing leg that you understand.

On the whole, although fewer decisions can be used, they are more powerful than before. I don’t know how many times. Here are the benefits brought by the 11.0 system.

“Well… Name it first. The body method must be as fast as the wind.” Xu Xu recalled the happy man and smiled knowingly.

However, when he saw the immortal level decision, his face suddenly changed.

“This… System, are you sure there is no problem with the immortal level method you gave me?”

“Ding, the computing power of this system is first-class. Please don’t question the computing power of this system.”

Xu que scratched his head when he saw the detailed explanation of each move in the immortal level Dharma decision: “is this the legendary return to nature… Forget it, let’s tentatively set it as the king forcing ten moves.”

In this way, combined with King forcing fist and King forcing leg, it is the twelve King forcing moves.

Good, very energetic!

After all this was done, Xu Ke took his mind out of the system and looked at Fa Hui: “where are we now?”

Fa Hui closed his eyes to practice Buddhism all the way. Hearing Xu Xu’s voice, he opened his eyes and said faintly, “the former convenience is an ancient secret place.”

front?

Xu que looked up and saw that there was a wilderness in front of him. The blue sky was like a washed sapphire, clear and flawless.

Under the leisurely reflection of white clouds, the dense crowd gathered on the wilderness, just like groups of ants, gathering together, making people’s scalp numb.

“Sleeping trough! Why are there so many people? ” Xu Wei was surprised at that time. “Didn’t you say that this ancient secret place is a mystery that doesn’t spread out. As long as a few people know the location, even you know it by chance?”

Fa Hui was also in a daze: “yes… When I received the news, I said that no one had found this place yet…”

“Wait, how long have we been in the transmission array?” Xu Wei suddenly realized something.

“About… More than a month.”

“That’s no wonder…” Xu lacked the amount of help. “It’s reasonable that we only spend half a month? Is there something wrong with your transmission array? ”

“Er… Xu Daoyou, in fact, it’s mainly because you left the transmission array many times on the way to go shopping…”

“Well, ha ha, it’s nothing for most of the month. If there’s a saint, what ancient secret place can’t be taken down?”

Xu Ke, with a sweaty face, dragged the small light bulb forward.

On the way here, because the system has detected many treasures deliberately to help him recover, Xu que had no choice but to suspend several times to buy them.

After the bumps and efforts along the way, he has now successfully pushed the balance of magic Qi from 60% to a new height – 65%.

Xu Wei collapsed at that time, shouting abuse at system profiteers, evil capitalists and vampires who exploit the working people.

They stepped down from the transmission array and headed for the wilderness.

It was supposed to be an empty and lonely place, but now people come and go, and there are flying swords everywhere in the sky. Sometimes there are friars who have conflicts because of the road conflict.

“Front! Can you hurry up! ” Can you open a flying sword? Just keep walking at this level! ” Why, a fairy King dares to be so arrogant. Come and fight! ” I’m afraid of you! ” A word disagreed, the two fairy kings went to war on the spot, and the people around them avoided it one after another and looked at it with disdain. What’s the point of fighting in public with such a rubbish cultivation? Don’t you see Immortal King and immortal statue everywhere? The Taigu secret place is said to be the heritage site of the Immortal Emperor. It is undoubtedly a great temptation for the monks trapped in the immortal place for many years. Walking, a burst of shouting and swearing suddenly came: “shit! Wicked dogs sell fake goods to me! ” Xu Wei gave a “click” in his heart at that time, and looked strangely at the direction of the voice. I just arrived. Why did someone scold me This Taoist friend, I don’t know what the wicked dog did to make you so angry? ” Xu Xu came to the man and smiled kindly. Seeing that he was a monk, the monk looked a little pale and said, “what else can I do? I spent a thousand yuan on the treasure map, and I almost killed me.” You bought a treasure map from them, too! ” Someone nearby came up and said angrily, “I’ll buy it too! As a result, I went straight to the next continent! ” Wicked dogs are really wicked! Don’t let me catch them! ” You’re all right. I was directly led to the saint’s bathhouse by them… My leg was almost broken. ” You are really miserable… It’s convenient to ask Daoyou, do you sell that map? ” After hearing this, Xu Wei silently returned to fahui. Fa Hui looked at him and said curiously, “Xu Daoyou…” “remember, my name is Tang Sanzang!” Xu que said seriously, “my surname is Tang, not Xu.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1758
chapters.body:
Chapter 1758

Chapter 1758

C.1758

After visiting dozens of victims, Xu que learned about the general course of the incident.

Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi came to feihaizhou a month ago. Then one person and one dog didn’t know where to find out that there were treasures in the ancient secret place, and then began to explore frantically.

During the exploration, three large doors, ten medium doors and countless small doors were destroyed.

And more than once!

Every auction will claim that this time must be true. As a result, all the treasure maps auctioned out are fake!

“Shit… These two goods have used all the things I learned from me!” Xu Wei’s teeth itch with hatred after hearing it.

You say you can sell it. I’m not here, but I’ve integrated my name!

Xu que looks at the fake treasure map in his hand. In a hidden corner on the back, there are four small words “drawn by Xu Que”, with a method of concealment on it.

If you don’t look carefully, you can’t see it at all.

Only after finding something wrong and carefully searching it with the spirit can we find this line on the back.

“Amitabha, why did Taoist friend Duan and Taoist friend Ergou cover it up with such a clumsy Dharma?” Fa Hui didn’t understand. “Such a method can be cracked.”

Xu Wei rearranged the decision and showed it to fahui: “look again.”

“This Law… Hey, why can’t I find it?” Fa Hui looked around and found that he didn’t find the line of small characters. He closed his eyes and meditated for a moment, spitting out a Buddhist sound, “broken!”

“Pooh!”

A sound almost like a bubble burst came out, and the line of small characters reappeared on the back of the map.

Xu Wei shrugged and said, “now you see, even your Buddhist disciples who are best at illusion can’t see through for a moment. How can those guys who rush to find treasure when they get the map see it? It must have been after he found himself deceived that he remembered to check the authenticity of the map. ”

“These two Taoist friends are really thoughtful, but if you don’t want to be found, you can erase this line of small characters from the beginning, or don’t leave this line of boy when you make a map.”

“… you brain, I’m really worried about the future of Buddhism. I didn’t make this map at all!” With a long sigh, Xu que said gnashing his teeth, “these two guys secretly made a map, wrote this signature, and made it clear that they want to drag me into the water!”

It’s easier for three targets to be chased than for one dog to be chased.

Xu Xu can’t imagine that these two pit goods can even use this shameless means in order to distract attention.

“Hey, Dao you bought a fake map, too.” A monk passed by and saw the map in Xu Xu’s hand. He smiled helplessly, “these two goods are simply immoral. Sooner or later, it will be thundering.”

Tear!

Xu Kuyi tore up the map, raised his head and piled up a kind smile: “yes, these guys are like five thunders in the sky. They can’t die easily. The poor monk suggested that they dig out their ancestral tombs and frustrate the ashes of their ancestors, so as to dispel their hatred.”

The monk seemed to be frightened and said with a stiff smile: “this Taoist friend… Not really. What a grudge it must be to dig people’s ancestral graves.”

“Amitabha, I have no grievances or enmities with them, but I have been jealous of evil since I was a child. I can’t stand this shameless liar behavior. At this time, I just feel angry in my chest. I wish I could catch these two people with my own hands and apply the Buddhist golden and angry method.” Xu Duan smiled with a blue vein on his forehead.

Shit, I don’t only want to bury the ashes of their ancestors, but also want to raise the ashes of these two pit goods!

“Er… In that case, I’m just going to join the victims’ Alliance. I don’t know if Taoist friends are interested in going?”

“Victim alliance?” Xu que wondered.

The friar nodded and said in a deep voice, “yes, this wicked dog combination is too shameless. Now the Taoist friends who are exploring the ancient secret territory in Feihai prefecture have been suffering from it for a long time, so they have organized a victim alliance and are ready to join hands to capture it.”

With Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi’s evil ability, Xu que understands everyone’s feelings.

“It’s so good. I’m going to do justice with my Buddhist dharma this time!”

After that, he and fahui followed the friar to the meeting place of the victims’ Alliance.

It is actually a large-scale assembly on a mountain.

When Xu Wei and others arrived, more than 100 people had gathered here, all over the mountains and fields, in twos and threes, to denounce the shameless act of the combination of immoral dogs.

“These three guys are shameless! It led me to the top of the East China Sea. I almost died in Guixu! ”

“If you want me to say, Xu Ke is the most shameless! Make so many fake maps! ”

“Yes, if it weren’t for him, how could we be cheated!” There was a lot of scolding. Xu que followed the monk, looking at his nose, mouth and heart, looking calm. As the saying goes, it’s none of your business. I’m the new Buddhist monk Tang Sanzang in the Buddhist realm. Xu Que and his company have nothing to do with me! At the top of the mountain, several people separated the parties. Xu que glanced and his temples jumped. Cultivation is not low! Looking around, there is no one below xianzun territory, and the lowest is also the early stage of xianzun territory Ladies and gentlemen, we are gathered here today. I think everyone knows what it is for. ” A middle-aged friar said in a deep voice, “the wicked dog combination from the fried heaven gang has repeatedly entrapped all Taoist friends and cheated them of treasures. It’s shameless! With them, I’m afraid even in a hundred years, we won’t find the place where the Taigu secret place is! ” That’s right! ” These three guys are a disaster. It’s time to kill them! ” For a time, the crowd was angry and the whole mountain was full of uproar My surname is Tang, not Xu. My surname is Tang, not Xu. ” Xu Xu’s Old God was talking about it Taoist friend, what are you talking about? ” Nothing. I’m reading the Sutra to see if I can communicate with the Buddha and kill the wicked dog. ” Xu que is not angry. Mom, these two guys are killing people! I haven’t recovered my cultivation now. There are so many people here. If one comes, I’ll have nothing. Just then, a sarcastic voice came Hum, I thought there was something important when so many people gathered here. It turned out that it was a bunch of waste people who deceived themselves and others here. It was ridiculous

chapters.title: Chapter 1759
chapters.body:
Chapter 1759

Chapter 1759

C.1759

I saw a handsome and slender young man coming slowly from the mountain road.

The man was dressed in beautiful Jue rings and walked around the court with a folding fan in his hand. His expression was filled with pride.

“Just two people and a dog have made you so embarrassed that you are still immortal friars.” The man smiled disdainfully, with a mocking look on his face.

WOW!

These words immediately aroused public anger.

A strong man snorted coldly, strode forward, raised his hand and grabbed the other party: “who, Xiao Xiao, dare to talk nonsense here!”

The man didn’t look at each other. With a dozen folding fans in his hand, the strong man immediately screamed like a boulder flying out.

Hiss!

All of them took a breath of air-conditioning and looked at the man’s eyes suddenly changed.

The strong man is a good player in xianzun’s realm. He always takes his strong flesh as his combat power and gives full play to it. He can even drag two xianzuns of the same rank with the power of one person.

But the man in front of him beat the other party away with one fan!

“Taoist friend, how dare you ask the teacher?” At the beginning, the middle-aged man who presided over the ceremony had dignified eyes and hugged boxing.

The corner of the man’s mouth lifted a proud arc, and the folding fan in his hand opened “Shua” to reveal the ink words “I travel in the moonlight on the sea and sky”.

“I, Murong Yunhai, the twelve disciples of Xianmen!”

Xu lacked a dark scold: “dog day, a face like a thief!”

Fa Hui was puzzled and said, “why did senior brother Xu… Tang say that?”

“Look at his coquettish face. Why doesn’t he look like an obscene thief? Only an obscene thief would wave around with a fan! ” Xu que sneered, feeling very unhappy.

Shit, can anyone pretend to be more powerful than themselves?

It’s tolerable, who can’t bear it!

However, when others heard the name, their faces showed horror.

“Twelve disciples of Xianmen!”

“It is said that the Tianmen strongman was selected and trained by the four immortal emperors in various continents!”

“How did they come here? With the teachings of the Immortal Emperor, do you still need to snatch the inheritance of the Immortal Emperor? ”

The crowd murmured, and their words were full of awe.

“The twelve? What is that? ” Xu que asked.

The friar on one side was frightened and whispered, “Taoist friend, don’t you know the twelve disciples?”

Xu vacancy shook his head: “I have been practicing in the temple with my younger martial brother before, and I don’t know anything about the outside world.”

The monk glanced at Murong Yunhai, as if afraid of being discovered: “the twelve disciples were once a legend. It is said that there were four immortal emperors who taught them personally, and they rarely appeared in front of the world. Therefore, everyone thought it was a rumor. Until hundreds of years ago, a sect tried to challenge the status of Tianmen, At that time, the Immortal Emperor sent four first disciples of the twelve disciples. ”

Speaking of this, the Friar’s throat rolled and his voice was a little dry: “as a result… The sect door was destroyed overnight. The half step Immortal Emperor, who was the top of the sect, was dismembered in front of the immortal gate. His death was very miserable!”

Only four people were sent out, and a large number of detached people had been killed!

Even if Xu Zongdi doesn’t come, he can’t do it for himself. I’m afraid he won’t do it now.

After experiencing the lightning of the Immortal Emperor, Xu que deeply realized that the gap between himself and the Immortal Emperor could not be made up by cultivation.

There is that special power. Under the Immortal Emperor, they are mole ants!

“I see. I understand.” Xu que answered, stepped aside and thought.

These guys suddenly appear here, which is inherited by the Immortal Emperor. On the one hand, not surprisingly, they are mostly aimed at the combination of immoral dogs.

Before they killed the immortal Zun of Tianmen, they also exposed their relationship with xiaorou. Although they don’t know what the Immortal Emperor is doing, they certainly won’t let themselves continue to live.

His eyes turned, and Xu lacked already had a dispute in his heart.

What wicked dog?

He is Tang Sanzang, the Buddha with promising future, the true biography of ancient Buddha and the spokesman of weiguangzheng.

“It’s the disciple of the Immortal Emperor. We don’t know Mount Tai.” The middle-aged man arched his hands and said, “although he is the peak cultivation of xianzun, he still can’t afford to offend the four main gates after all.” I don’t know how many people come, but what’s your order? ”

“I can’t tell you what to say, but I heard that the wicked dog group was here. According to the order of the master, I came to catch him back to Tianmen.” Murong Yunhai said casually, without concealing his pride on his face, “what you want to do has nothing to do with me. We just want a wicked dog.”

Seeing this, the middle-aged man was relieved, holding a smiling face and said: “in that case, I must help you with you, but these four don’t know…”

Then he looked at the people behind Murong Yunhai.

Murong Yunhai smiled and stepped aside: “these are my younger martial brothers. They will carry out this operation with me.” Duanmu Lei! ” Shangguan Ruiqian! ” Ye Shuo. ” With that, Murong Yunhai shook his fan, and the three stood behind him, looking ahead, floating like immortals We are the four sons of Tianmen! ” Xu que grinned and looked at the friar beside him: “Taoist friend, the famous twelve disciples of Tianmen, is this virtue?” Well… This… I’ve never seen it before. ” Tut, if it’s all this virtue, Tianmen may be over. ” Xu que was surprised and had a little curiosity about Tianmen. Even if one or two of the immortal Zun’s brains are not normal, he can also be understood as weak jurisdiction. Why is it that even the Immortal Emperor’s personal apprentice has this virtue now? Or are there problems in the brains of Xiandi’s men? Facing the disciples of the immortal sect, although they are dissatisfied with each other’s hegemony, it’s not good for Tianmen’s sake. In fact, these people have discussed about the plan to catch immoral dogs before. Even if Murong Yunhai and others come, they are just a few more people Ladies and gentlemen, we have contacted each other before and want to trade with them. Therefore, the location of this transaction has been determined. You only need to set an ambush in advance to catch all the wicked dogs! ” The middle-aged man said in a deep voice, “it’s just… This time the trading place is in ghost valley. I don’t know which Taoist friend is willing to go?” When they heard the name of ghost Valley, the people who were excited at first shrank back Ghost Valley is the place where all ghosts live. It is said that there is a peerless ghost king with strong cultivation. Even immortal Zun will be assimilated and dangerous… “Someone whispered. At this time, a warm voice suddenly sounded Amitabha, I am willing to go. ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1760
chapters.body:
Chapter 1760

Chapter 1760

C.1760

Ghost Valley is a Jedi on feihaizhou.

It is said that there was a war between gods and Demons tens of thousands of years ago, so there were many evil spirits left here. After years of baptism, evil spirits gradually formed.

Among them, a ghost king was born. It is said that his cultivation was comparable to the Immortal Emperor, and almost all the entrants died in it.

The trading place is located in ghost valley. All the immortals present turned pale and dared not go.

But the sudden sound, like the sound of nature, brought light to everyone.

The middle-aged man who was still worried about how to convince everyone burst out with a surprised look in his eyes: “which Taoist friend is really a model of our generation!”

“Amitabha, I am willing to go.” A young man stepped out in front of the crowd.

Behind him was another monk who looked like a teenager.

“This is… Master fahui?!” The middle-aged man didn’t know who Xu Ke was, but he recognized Fa Hui’s identity, “you’re here!”

Hearing fahui’s name, people around him looked different and whispered.

“It’s the legendary born Buddha body. The current Buddha of Buddhism is very popular?”

“So, it’s just the end of the Buddha trial recently. I think it’s the friend of Dharma Hui who has become a Buddha?”

Xu que couldn’t help but turn around and take a look at fahui. Unexpectedly, this small light bulb is quite famous.

So many people know him?

Murong Yunhai also looked at Fa Hui and said faintly, “in the middle of xianzun, the Buddha’s heart is flawless. This session of Buddha is still interesting…”

Everyone appreciated fahui. Only he looked bitter and astringent. After a long time, he said, “in fact… The Buddha is not a monk.”

“Master fahui 1, don’t be modest. Even your master Tongming once said in the Buddhist realm that the Buddha’s heart is flawless and is a born Buddha. How can you not be a Buddha?”

“That is, to become a Buddha is not to inherit the mantle of the ancient Buddha? It seems that in the future, there will be another strong man on Xianyun island. ”

They all thought that fahui was modest and praised him one after another.

Fa Hui was hard to say. He explained in a low voice, but no one believed him.

After a while, the middle-aged man noticed Xu Ke’s existence: “this is the Taoist friend who just said he was willing to go to ghost Valley? It is worthy of being the younger martial brother of Dharma Hui Taoist friends. Such courage is really a model of our generation! ”

Dharma Hui’s quiet voice came: “Taoist friend… This is senior brother Tang Sanzang.”

“Elder martial brother?” The middle-aged man was stunned and said with a dry smile, “ha ha, sorry, I’m clumsy.”

“Senior brother Tang Sanzang… Is this Buddha.”

“Oh, Buddha, Buddha is good… What Buddha?!” The middle-aged man suddenly widened his eyes and said in surprise, “friend of Dharma Hui, do you think this master of Tang Sanzang is the son of your Buddhism?”

Fa Hui folded his hands and bowed, “Amitabha, that’s right.”

For a moment, Xu que immediately attracted everyone’s attention.

Although the Buddha of Buddhism is not as detached as the twelve disciples of Tianmen and appears every other time, it is also a legend.

It is said that every Buddhist will transmit Buddhist and Taoist teachings in Xianyun Island, and almost every Buddhist will eventually become a half step Immortal Emperor.

It can be said that the Buddha is the representative of the real Buddha walking on earth. If you exaggerate, today’s Yurou fairy is the Buddha of xianyunzhou.

Every Buddhist in the past was a famous Buddhist disciple at that time. His Buddhism was profound and had great prestige in Xianyun island.

Fa Hui itself plays this role.

Where’s the unknown Tang Sanzang?

The middle-aged man obviously couldn’t accept it. After a long time, he said, “I don’t know, master Tang Sanzang, why did you take the initiative to ask to go to ghost Valley?”

He stared at Xu que with a touch of consideration in his eyes.

Although the Tang Sanzang master was a Buddha, he only had the cultivation in fairyland, and the cultivation in his body was obviously a little vain. Compared with Dharma Hui, it was a heaven and a earth.

Not only the middle-aged man, the monks around him also looked at Xu vacancy with suspicious eyes.

“Amitabha, the reason why I am willing to volunteer is because I have a grudge against the wicked dog combination!” Xu Wei felt angry in his eyes and showed his green veins on his forehead. “In those days, the poor monk had not yet entered the practice. He once had a hairy wife. We loved each other very much and could be said to be fairy lovers… As a result, the three immoral dogs passed by that day and coveted my wife’s beauty. Duan Jiude, a shameless and vicious villain, abused my wife in every way, The dog even ransacked all the treasures handed down by our ancestors. Fortunately, I escaped into the mountains and forests at that time, which left me alive… ”

When they heard the speech, they couldn’t help but marvel and denounce one after another.

“Wicked dogs have done such things! Shameless! ”

“How shameless! It’s insane and unreasonable! ” Don’t worry, master Tang. We will help you catch the wicked dog! Cut thousands of knives to vent your hatred! ” Xu que wiped away the tears from the corners of his eyes and felt relieved: “thank you for your kindness, but it’s enough to catch Duan Jiude and the dog. In fact, the poor monk was able to escape from life that day with the help of his Taoist friend Xu que. He was really a kind man. He did evil with Duan Jiude and the cheap dog completely because of their coercion, I hope you can be more lenient to Xu Daoyou. He has to. ” You know, that Xu Daoyou is not only tall and handsome, handsome and unrestrained, but also kind-hearted, righteous and kind… “As he said, Xu que suddenly noticed the strange eyes of the people, so he stopped boasting and folded his hands together:” in general, after joining the Buddhist sect, the poor monk has long understood the truth of when to repay each other for grievances, So I hope that when you see Xu Duan’s Taoist friends, you can forgive him and spare his life. It can be regarded as a favor from the poor monk. ” They had already been provoked by Xu Que’s narration. At this time, they even said yes again and again, saying that they would let Xu que go when they saw him Don’t worry, Tang Daoyou. With your words, we can forget the past as long as they return the money they cheated. ” Someone smiled and said, after all, the face of the Buddha still needs to be given. Xu Kuang was stunned. He folded his hands and read the Buddha’s name: “Amitabha, I mean, just open up when you see Xu Kuang’s friend.” Er… The nine virtues and the dog… “Xu Kui took a deep breath and said sincerely,” please kill them for the poor monk

chapters.title: Chapter 1761
chapters.body:
Chapter 1761

Chapter 1761

C.1761

Soon, the crowd formed a team led by Xu Que and Murong Yunhai and set out towards the ghost valley.

Feihaizhou is the area closest to Tianmen, and ghost Valley is located at the boundary between feihaizhou and Tianmen. Starting from here, we came to the location of ghost Valley in about half a day.

Along the way, Xu que successfully won the favor of everyone with his tragic experience, brilliant personality and excellent eloquence.

At the same time, we also found that Xu Ke’s insight is completely different from that of a monk in fairyland. He not only has a deep study of Kung Fu, but also has great attainments in the understanding of Tao, which makes people more admire.

But of course, Murong Yunhai and his gang are not included.

“Where on earth did Tang Sanzang come from?” Murong Yunhai walked at the back of the team and whispered with his younger martial brothers.

The three shook their heads and said they had never heard of this person, which made Murong Yunhai confused.

As a disciple of the Immortal Emperor of Tianmen, he has his own intelligence channels. They almost know the young strong people from all over Xianyun island. Even fahui, a strong hermit who has been meditating in Buddhism for many years, has records in Tianmen.

But Tang Sanzang didn’t.

Far from being recorded, they had not even heard of the name before today.

“There is a possibility.” Shangguan Ruiqian suddenly said, “this Tang Sanzang has never appeared in front of the world before.”

“What’s the difference between him and fahui?” Duanmu Lei wondered, “even Fa Hui, we know his existence.”

“No, I mean, he never appeared in front of the world since he stepped into the road of cultivation.” Shangguan Ruiqian said seriously, “if you think about it carefully, take what he said as true. How did he get his cultivation in fairyland now? Can let a monk who is halfway to become a monk step into the fairyland in a short time. Guess who can do it? ”

When they heard the speech, their faces changed.

This kind of thing has happened to them.

Almost everyone of the twelve disciples of Tianmen was promoted to the fairyland at the fastest speed, and the later realm is to practice, break through and integrate slowly.

Therefore, they can enter the immortal realm at a young age, because someone in the front realm has helped them make a breakthrough.

Only the Immortal Emperor can do all this.

“Do you mean that an Immortal Emperor helped him finish his early cultivation?” Murong Yunhai’s face changed slightly, “how can it be?! Let’s not talk about whether there are other immortal emperors. Even if we experienced all that at the beginning, we were dead and alive. Have you forgotten how many brothers and sisters we had? ”

The twelve disciples of Tianmen were supposed to be 108 disciples, but because they practiced in this way, they survived in the end.

“Maybe I think too much, but anyway, his talent is definitely similar to us and even surpass us.” Ye Shuo said seriously, “you’d better pay more attention to him. I suspect his purpose is not the immoral dog at all, but the Immortal Emperor’s heritage here. Don’t forget that the immoral dog is only the second goal here. The real goal should be the Immortal Emperor’s heritage here.”

Xu vacancy guessed right. On the surface, these guys came to catch evil dogs. In fact, their goal is still the legacy of the Immortal Emperor.

Murong Yunhai was silent for a moment and said, “anyway, pay more attention to this guy’s trend, just in case, and this person appears too abrupt. I heard that the three immoral dogs are extremely insidious. Maybe one of them pretended to be.”

How many people can become the twelve disciples, whether in mind or strength, is the top existence of xianyunzhou.

Xu Ke’s words can frighten others, but it’s still a little late to convince them.

Xu Xu also understood this matter, so he was careful all the way and didn’t dare to show any foot.

Before his accomplishments were restored, he was determined not to be the opponent of these guys.

In a twinkling of an eye, they came to the outside of the ghost valley.

Xu Wei shook his head. These guys are like a group of 250.

He wanted to ambush others. He came three days in advance and didn’t prepare any traps. He didn’t even arrange the ambush place.

This brain deserves to be cheated by two dogs!

But the more these guys take it lightly, the more convenient it is for Xu Ke to do his own things.

“Hey, hey, there are such a bunch of big fish. I’m sorry for myself if I don’t pit them!”

Fa Hui stood beside Xu Xu, feeling a chill inexplicably. Then he put his hands together and said, “Amitabha, Taoist friend, you’re going to harm people.”

“Hey, don’t talk nonsense. I just want them to understand that things outside their bodies are insignificant. Life doesn’t bring, death doesn’t bring.”

At this time, they were on a hillside. Xu que drew a prohibition around them, raised his hand and summoned a separate body and turned into his own appearance.

When he did all this, he didn’t hide it from fahui. First, he still needs Dharma Hui to cover up. Second, he is also a Buddhist. As a Buddhist, Dharma Hui listens to the Buddha. As long as he didn’t violate the requirements of his life principles, fahui almost agreed without principle, which made Xu lack feel that he was much more reliable than the two pit goods of Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude. However, Murong Yunhai came to the door before he went out Sanzang Taoist friends, I’ve heard a lot about Buddhism. I’ve been fascinated by the rumors of Buddhism for a long time. I came here today to see the heroic posture of Buddhism. ” Murong Yunhai shook his fan and wandered over leisurely. Xu que glanced at him and said with a smile, “it’s Murong xianzun of Tianmen. It’s disrespectful. I don’t know if Murong xianzun knows a person’s name is ouyangke?” Who is that? ” Murong Yunhai was stunned and didn’t understand A monk admired by the poor monk. Your demeanor is very similar to that of the other side. ” Xu que put his hands together and said in a deep voice, “I don’t know your arrival. What can I do for you?” Murong Yunhai shook the folding fan and took out a small wooden box: “in fact, the wicked dog once tried to steal treasure from our Tianmen gate. We almost caught him, but finally let them escape. When they ran away, they left this thing. It should be of some use to you.” Xu Kuan grinned. These two guys are really busy. They run to find Taigu secret place and have time to steal from Tianmen. They pushed and pulled for two rounds according to the usual practice, and Xu Kui accepted the wooden box with an embarrassed look. After Murong Yunhai left, fahui said curiously, “why did he suddenly come to give you something?” Xu que played with the wooden box and said with a smile: “this guy set it for me. The things in it are not so easy to take.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1762
chapters.body:
Chapter 1762

Chapter 1762

C.1762

In the combination of immoral dogs, Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi have deep attainments in array because they have been cheated for many years.

Although the cultivation is less than that of the Immortal King, the use of the array is perfect. Xu que even suspects that even the immortal Zun is not as strong as them in the use of the array.

Influenced by his experience, Xu Ke also has some attainments in array.

The moment the box was taken out, he saw that a small positioning array was engraved on it.

“Others will only be alert to the things in the box, but they will never care about the box. This guy has a little brain and can think of this way.” Xu Wei shook his head and handed the box to Fa Hui. “On the surface, it’s for me to chase people. In fact, he wants to see how I will deal with it. If I never take it out or destroy it directly, this guy will doubt me.”

The reason is very simple. Since you say you have a deep hatred with wicked dogs, you should always use what I give you to track them?

If you put it in the storage ring and never take it out, or destroy it, what you said before will be broken.

Fa Hui looked at it for a while and returned the box to Xu que. Xu que opened the box and took out the contents.

It was something like a stone, with circles of meaningless patterns attached to its surface. At first glance, it seemed to suck people’s mind and spirit.

Fa Hui frowned slightly when he saw the thing: “this is… Moire stone!”

“What is the moire stone?” Xu que asked.

“Moire stone is a product near the ancient secret place. It’s of no great use except for the strange lines on the surface.”

Xu nodded, but his eyes were already hot.

This stone must be of great use!

“Keep an eye on it for me. I’m going to study it now.” Xu que sits down with his knees crossed and tries to explore the moire stone with his mind.

Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude firmly implement the principle that thieves don’t leave empty. They can’t take a useless moire stone with them.

However, there was no discovery when God’s consciousness penetrated. Xu lacked thought for a moment and tested with immortal cloud, Buddha yuan and magic Qi.

This contrast suddenly appeared.

In addition to Buddha yuan, the moire stone has different reactions to immortal yuan and magic Qi, but the reaction of magic Qi is much weaker than that of immortal yuan.

“Do you know that moire stone has a reaction when instilling into Xianyuan?” Xu que looks at Fa Hui beside him and asks.

Fa Hui nodded and said, “this is the normal reaction of Moire stone. It is said that it is a natural phenomenon formed by the residual power of the Immortal Emperor and erosion day and night.”

Xu nodded, calm on the surface, but the heart was already choppy.

Nima… According to this theory, doesn’t it mean that this thing has been eroded by magic gas?

Hell, how can there be evil spirit in the Immortal Emperor’s legacy?

He was almost sure that Er Gouzi must have found a way to enter the Taigu secret place, which might have something to do with this moire stone.

Xu que puts the wooden box aside and doesn’t hurry to find Er Gouzi.

Anyway, I’ll see you in three days. There will be plenty of opportunities and plans at that time.

After finishing all this, Xu Wei was bored and suddenly looked at Fa Hui curiously.

Fa Hui was meditating. Hearing this, he slowly said, “I don’t know. Before reaching the Immortal Emperor, I can’t understand what power the Immortal Emperor’s realm is.”

Xu que tilted his mouth and did not ask, but closed his eyes and meditated.

Now the cultivation has been restored to the middle of the fairy king. As long as he continues to obtain treasures, his cultivation can be improved all the time. Once his cultivation is restored to a complete state, no one present is his opponent.

When the cultivation is restored, go to Taiyi sect to meet Madame Ya and them, find Jiang Hongyan and Shi Qingxuan, and then kill Tianmen and save rou’er.

“Rou’er… Don’t worry, I can take you home soon.”

Thinking of rou’er, Xu lacked his hard heart all the time, so he couldn’t help being soft.

Although he has so many confidants, rou’er is always a forbidden area in his heart and a pure land that can make him peaceful.

In the twinkling of an eye, three days passed.

Dozens of immortals gathered in front of the ghost Valley, led by Murong Yunhai, looking covetously, waiting for the arrival of Er Gouzi.

Xu Que and Fa Hui stood in the corner of the crowd and closed their eyes to nourish themselves. In fact, God consciousness always paid attention to the movement around.

According to his understanding of Er Gouzi, he certainly won’t appear like this. It’s called compassion to pit these people so that they don’t know their parents.

The middle-aged man led the immortals to wait at the mouth of the ghost valley. He also monitored the surroundings with divine consciousness and was ready to start at any time.

“Ha ha! I didn’t expect you to come so on time. It seems that you are looking forward to the arrival of our God! ”

At this moment, an extremely cheap laughter came. Two dogs were walking towards this side with auspicious clouds, a red cloak waving behind them, wearing flower underpants and a pair of sunglasses.

Xu Xu glanced around and immediately understood how much people resented Er Gouzi. Just the appearance of this guy, many people have clenched their fists Dog friend, have you brought what we want? ” The middle-aged man stepped forward and said in a deep voice. Two dogs jumped down from the auspicious cloud, his hands on his hips and said arrogantly, “how many times have I said that I should be called Lord God, okay?” Lord God. ” The middle-aged man’s face was full of humiliation, and his resentment was heavier, “I don’t know what we want, can you bring it?” You see what you say. I’ve always been honest in business. ” Er Gouzi took out a wooden box from behind and put it on the ground. “This is the exploration map of ghost valley you want. It took me a lot of effort to get it. I’m afraid it’s too dangerous to say for three days and nights…” the middle-aged man winked around and was preparing to trade. Xu que suddenly got up and said, “Amitabha, let me go.” Tang Daoyou, this dog is extremely insidious. There must be extremely dangerous prohibitions around. Are you sure you want to go? ” I have a bitter hatred for this dog. My lifelong dream is to capture this dog and return my xianyunzhou to peace! ” Xu Kuyi said in earnest, “so let me go!” When he said this, the light of justice twinkled in his eyes, which made people feel at ease OK, Taoist friends, sweep the array for Taoist friends of Tang! ” The middle-aged man was in an agitated mood and immediately took the crowd to stand by. Xu que nodded to the crowd and strode towards Er Gouzi. The second dog looked at Xu Que’s approaching figure and wondered, “why haven’t I seen you before…” Xu que grinned and said in a voice that only two can hear: “because I’m your father, dog thief!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1763
chapters.body:
Chapter 1763

Chapter 1763

C.1763

The second dog was stunned, and an excited light burst out in his eyes: “lying in the trough! Boy, it’s you. You’re not dead! ”

While talking, he raised his hand and laid a ban to prevent people around from hearing their conversation.

Xu Mian’s face suddenly darkened: “you think I’m dead, don’t you? So swagger outside in my name? ”

The second dog smiled pleasantly and said, “how could it be? We’re not thinking about your great fortune. The so-called disaster will last for thousands of years… No, teacher Duan said that if you hadn’t had an accident and heard what we made, you would come to us.”

“Hehe, you Duan Jiude, I remember.” Xu que sneered twice and handed the spirit stone in his hand, “take it.”

The second dog was stunned: “what is this? A gift for me? Everyone is so familiar, don’t do this… ”

Although he said so, er Gouzi still grabbed the spirit stone quickly, and he didn’t see any action, so the spirit stone disappeared in his hand.

“You think it’s beautiful. Those guys brought it to you for trading.” Xu Wei stretched out his hand, “give me the treasure map and prepare to hijack me later, otherwise these guys will catch you.”

Er Gouzi said proudly, “joke, can these waste firewood stop our God? The prohibitions they put down have long been broken by God! ”

Xu Kuan thought that it was the same reason. Only two dogs appeared here, indicating that Duan Jiude was still hiding in other places. What prohibition could stop them?

“All right, let’s fight casually for a while, and then I’ll fall to the ground badly.” Xu Wei handed a piece of communication jade to ER Gouzi, who had just redeemed it from the system. “I’ll take the fake treasure map of ghost Valley to deceive them. Let’s go after a wave of treasures.”

These two fools in front of us, the treasure on their body just balances their evil Qi.

This time, it was the second dog’s turn to be stunned: “what fake map? This map is true. ”

“Really… Wait, really?” Xu Ke immediately pulled the map and spread it out, “are you two out of your mind? Take out the good things? ”

The second dog quickly explained, “no, this treasure map is really right, but the method in it can’t be used by Ben shenzun and teacher Duan, so I want to give it to those fools. When they go in for exploration, teacher Duan and I can get behind.”

Xu que looked up and down at Er Gouzi and said suspiciously, “isn’t ghost valley a dangerous place? You two pit goods have the courage to follow in? ”

Er Gouzi looked in other directions and said with a guilty heart, “well… They are exploring the way… In fact, there is not much danger in it…”

“If you don’t say anything, I’ll catch you now and give it to those guys.”

“We are brothers of life and death!” The dog’s eyes widened in disbelief.

“Countdown, three, two, one…”

“The entrance of Taigu secret place is in ghost valley.” Two dogs said quickly.

what the fuck!

Xu Wei suddenly figured out the cause and effect. Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude found the entrance to the ancient secret place. However, because there were many dangers in the ghost Valley, they decided to treat these explorers as cannon fodder, and they followed them to reap their success!

“I said, how dare you two go to ghost valley.” Xu que glanced at him and thought, “later, you’ll do as I say!”

The immortal zuns surrounded outside the ghost valley began to get impatient.

A quarter of an hour has passed since Xu que went to trade with ER Gouzi.

Everyone felt strange. It should be Xu lacked. After confirming that it was true to come here, he decisively sent a signal and summoned everyone to rush up and catch the cheap dog.

The middle-aged man couldn’t help worrying: “what’s the accident?”

With the shameless degree of immoral dogs, middle-aged men find it difficult for their poor imagination to figure out what each other will want to do.

Among the four sons of Tianmen, ye, the most bad tempered, stood up and looked irritable: “I can’t wait. It’s a shame that you should be so careful for a dog that can’t even be immortal!”

The people around looked a little ugly. This was tantamount to scolding all of them.

“Maybe Tang Daoyou found something, so he delayed for a while…” the middle-aged man wanted to make things right, but he suddenly heard someone shouting.

“Fighting!”

He suddenly turned back and saw that Xu vacancy had fought with ER Gouzi.

“I’m going to walk for heaven today!” Xu que roared, splashed gold in his palm and slapped Er Gouzi.

The two dogs looked disdainful. The last step was a punch and broke the palm print: “it’s like a teacher’s axe!”

Then, er Gouzi directly took out a long knife and put it on Xu Que’s neck. He shouted to the people around him: “listen to me, who dares to step forward, I will put the head of the great monk on the ground!”

Ye Shuo laughed and said, “do you think we care about this guy’s life?” But everyone except him hesitated. After all, Xu Ke’s broad mind and profound knowledge all the way made many people like him. It’s inevitable to hesitate to start. Xu Wei suddenly shouted, “don’t hesitate! Cast your most powerful spell and blast it at me!! Let me die with this vicious dog today! As the saying goes, “who will go to hell if I don’t go to hell? I’m willing to exchange this cheap life for the peace of Xianyun island!” The words were loud and bloody, and everyone burst into tears. What is Buddhism and Buddhism! Look at this ideological consciousness, look at this moral standard, I don’t know how many times higher than them! The middle-aged man bit his teeth and waved his hand and said, “since Taoist friends Tang said so, let’s…” then, he heard Xu Ke yell again: “even if he told you that the treasure map of ghost Valley in my hand is true, don’t believe that ghost Valley is the entrance to the ancient secret place. All these are lies made up by evil dogs! Destroy the dogs with me! ” When they heard this, they were struck by lightning. They thought that Xu Que and the wicked dog were bitter enemies and would shout such words. There was only one possibility. The map is real! The entrance is also true! But in order to let these people kill him and ER Gouzi together, they say these are fake! The middle-aged man waved his big hand and said in a hurry: “we must save Tang Daoyou! Don’t hurt him… And the map in his hand! ” Xu Que and ER Gouzi looked at each other and nodded slightly. Good, the big fish is on the hook

chapters.title: Chapter 1764
chapters.body:
Chapter 1764

Chapter 1764

C.1764

“Boy, your plan is very effective!” The second dog moved his wrist with a long knife and whispered.

“Nonsense, these guys are coming for the ancient secret place. With the image of deep hatred and great light before forcing the saint, they will feel that this map is true, and ghost Valley is the entrance to the ancient secret place.” Xu Xu’s expression didn’t change and his lips wriggled. “I just said that those were fake in advance in order to let them kill you and me.”

“Wonderful! This move is really a conspiracy! Mr. Xu, you are becoming more and more insidious! ”

“I’m flattered, teacher Ergou. I’m still a little far away from you than shameless.”

“You’re welcome. The God wants to think that those who achieve great things are informal.”

“The real owl is not afraid to kill the whole family.”

Xu Kui pointed his finger on his side and said, “remember those guys, they are all from Tianmen. Later, you will propose to trade with them. They will die. They don’t know their parents!”

“Copy that!”

At the same time, a group of immortal zuns who had tried to encircle and suppress Er Gouzi also came near.

Ye Shuo, the leader, was impatient and said anxiously, “don’t think we’ll give in if we use this thing as bait. The majesty of Tianmen is inviolable…”

“Ye Shuo, shut up.” Murong Yunhai fully demonstrated his leadership at this time, and said expressionless, “so now that map is in the hands of Tang Daoyou?”

The two dogs sneered, pushed their sunglasses and waved their cloak behind them: “the God has always been honest with both young and old people. Do you think everyone is the same as you? If you don’t do business well, you’re a shameless scum! ”

All of them were lying in a groove, thinking who was the shameless scum!

You’ve been selling fake goods all the time. Isn’t it your immoral dog trio?!

Where’s the face to condemn others so righteously?

But now they dare not say these words. They are afraid that they will accidentally annoy Er Gouzi. At that time, they will wipe Tang Daoyou’s neck and run away by themselves. They are afraid that they will never find the entrance to Taigu secret place in their life.

“I’ve heard before that unscrupulous dogs have always been honest in doing business and are exquisite businessmen.” Murong Yunhai smiled.

“The last person who said that is dead.” The second dog smiled and looked ferocious. “Don’t talk nonsense. It’s time to rob. Men stay on the left and women stay on the right. Put your clothes… No, hand over all the valuable things on your body!”

Facing the threat of Er Gouzi, they didn’t move.

Murong Yunhai smiled coldly: “this place has been banned by us. Even if you kill Tang Daoyou, you can’t run away.”

“Hehe, why do you think Mr. Duan hasn’t appeared yet?” Two dogs disdained.

Murong Yunhai was stunned and suddenly realized this key problem.

In the combination of immoral dogs, the evil dog and Duan Jiude are the two people who are most proficient in array prohibition. Unless they have fallen into it, they can crack it outside. With their ability, it won’t take a moment.

“Click!”

While he was thinking like this, a broken sound suddenly sounded around him.

He suddenly turned back and found that the void was broken like a glass lens. It was a delicate arrangement made by himself and others, which had been cracked.

Duan Jiude appeared in the distance and said with a laugh on his hips: “fools, you garbage prohibition. I’ll break it easily with one finger!”

Seeing this, er Gouzi laughed and said, “what else do you have to do now? Listen to my God’s arrangement. I can keep the little monk alive. Our wicked dogs are not interested in the ancient secret place. I promise we won’t rob you! ”

“Is that true?” The middle-aged man hesitated and said in a deep voice.

What he has been worried about is that if he and others save Xu que, he will run away if Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude Huang que are behind.

At that time, the sky is really high and birds can fly. No matter how capable they are, they can’t catch up with people.

But if they are not interested in ancient secret places, Tang Sanzang is the only one who knows the entrance of ancient secret places and has the treasure map of ghost valley. He must be preserved.

The second dog looked impatient and waved his hand and said, “don’t you believe it? I swear by the way of heaven that if I follow you to rob the Immortal Emperor’s heritage in the ancient secret land, I will die with five thunders! ”

At the moment when the voice fell, an unspeakable force spread in the void, and the heavy pressure suddenly came and then dispersed.

That’s the oath made by heaven when he heard the oath.

Xianyunzhou is the closest place to the heavenly way. Here, any oath aimed at the heavenly way will be fulfilled.

Seeing that Er Gouzi did so, the middle-aged man and Murong Yunhai looked at each other and completely relieved.

“Well, we promise you, what do you want?” Murong Yunhai said. The two dogs rolled their eyes and said angrily, “didn’t you hear what I just said? It’s time to rob. Hand in all the valuable things! ” Don’t go too far! ” Ye Shuo raised his hand to fight, but Murong Yunhai stopped him Don’t be impulsive. As far as I know, although this wicked dog has a black heart and smokes his ass, he will pay attention to doing business. ” Murong Yunhai was more stable than ye Shuo. He said in a deep voice, “give me all the treasures.” When they heard the speech, they immediately looked reluctant Why should we all hand it in? ” That is, you made the deal. Why should we hand over our things? ” It’s not fair! ” At this time, a powerful momentum broke out, just like the birth of a peerless strong man. Murong Yunhai’s face was overcast and immortal yuan rolled around: “you, if you are willing to help Tianmen, you are my friends of Tianmen. Tianmen always has the greatest kindness to friends.” The implication, if not a friend, is unknown. They looked at each other and felt Murong Yunhai’s killing intention. Finally, they lowered their heads and gave up their storage ring. Murong Yunhai was about to give these storage rings to ER Gouzi, but he saw Xu Duan suddenly struggling violently may not! These are the treasures accumulated by Taoist friends after years of hard work. How can we give them to this shameless dog in order to save the poor monk! ” Xu que glared angrily and roared with awe inspiring righteousness, “I will commit suicide now. I will never give this evil dog a chance to threaten everyone

chapters.title: Chapter 1765
chapters.body:
Chapter 1765

Chapter 1765

C.1765

Hiss!

They all took a breath of air-conditioning, and even the action of taking out the treasure was fast.

Murong Yunhai tensed up and hurriedly stopped: “Taoist friends, don’t do this! We are willing to give the treasure for your safety. Don’t do anything to hurt yourself! ”

Xu que was full of grief and indignation. He held the long knife tightly in his hands and said, “never do this. I have a grudge against this evil dog. It’s a great shame to be captured by it. Now I have to let all Taoist friends exchange treasures for me. I really can’t bear it!”

“Voluntary! We are voluntary! ” Murong Yunhai roared angrily, “master Tang Sanzang’s virtue is noble and our generation admires it. How can you die in the hands of such small people!”

As he spoke, he winked wildly at the people around him.

I really want people to commit suicide. No one of you can enter the ghost Valley once the wicked dog runs away!

Murong Yunhai, a disciple of the Immortal Emperor, has contacted many ancient books and knows more about the ghost Valley than others. He knows that it is difficult to walk in the ghost valley without a map.

Those ghosts have a strong resistance to fairies, and the friars at xianzun level are very difficult to deal with. If they accidentally fall into the tide of ghosts, they will die.

Not to mention the legend that ghost Valley can be more powerful than the ghost king of Immortal Emperor.

Without a map, can we go in and die together??

Seeing Murong Yunhai’s action, everyone understood one after another and made a noise quickly.

“Master Tang, don’t do this!”

“Yes, master Tang has the mission of spreading Buddhism. It’s unwise to die with this dog!”

In the face of the persuasion of the crowd, Xu Feifei didn’t feel at ease. Instead, he beat his chest and feet, hurt his heart and said, “you don’t understand! What a sinister trick the dog has prepared against you! ”

The people were awestruck, and their eyes fell on ER Gouzi, frightened.

There are even more vicious tricks!

This dog is not human!

The two dogs were stunned and looked at Xu Ke’s back with a blank face.

What?

What more vicious plan can there be?

Until he saw Xu Xu’s gesture to compare himself behind his back, he immediately reacted, adjusted his expression and said fiercely: “unexpectedly, you found out that even the idea of God’s preparation for the second blackmail. He is worthy of being a Buddhist. A benevolent heart has a clear insight into all the ugliness and evil in the world!”

Xu Wei praised Er Gouzi in his heart.

What a good dog! You can understand what I mean so soon!

The crowd turned pale when they heard the words. Unexpectedly, er Gouzi was so greedy that he was ready for the second blackmail long before blackmail.

Murong Yunhai took a deep breath, forced down his anger and said in a deep voice: “Taoist friend, you’re not authentic. Since it’s a transaction, there’s no saying of second blackmail… Transaction.”

The second dog put on an agitated expression and shook his hand and said, “all right, God, for the sake of justice, benevolence and noble virtue of this Taoist friend of Tang, it’s enough to hand over all your storage rings!”

Murong Yunhai suddenly breathed a sigh of relief. It was just a storage ring. It was still acceptable.

He called the people to see that the storage ring was handed over to him. Then he put it into a storage ring and handed it to ergouzi: “here is the storage ring for all of us. I hope you can abide by our transaction agreement.”

Ye Shuo snorted heavily beside him, and his face was unhappy.

Er Gouzi took the storage ring, winked at Xu que, let it go, smiled and said, “the deal is concluded, and the great monk will be handed over to you. My God will go first!”

As soon as the voice fell, er Gouzi’s figure dissipated into the air like a cloud and smoke.

Murong Yunhai was stunned and felt a burst of happiness in his heart.

Fortunately, I didn’t do it, otherwise I’m afraid the dog will run away on the spot. If I want to catch him at that time, it will be very difficult.

Compared with catching immoral dogs, maintaining Tianmen’s dignity and finding Xiandi’s heritage are obviously more important.

While Er Gouzi disappeared, Duan Jiude’s figure also disappeared.

“Boy, I’ll see you perform next.” The voice of two dogs sounded in my mind.

The communication jade he gave him is a high-grade product exchanged by the system. It can communicate directly in the spirit within a certain range.

Xu nodded and responded with the spirit: “don’t worry, you go to the ghost Valley to make the layout first. Today, one is counted as one. Don’t want to run!”

Just a few storage rings can satisfy your appetite?

Of course not!

Storage ring, treasure, Immortal Emperor’s legacy, I want them all!

This is the style of the bombers!

After adjusting his mood, Xu que put on a sad expression, forcibly squeezed out a few tears from the corners of his eyes, looked up at the sky at an angle of 47 degrees, and let the tears fall from the corners of his eyes.

“I’m just a cheap life. I’ve decided to serve the Buddha in my life. Why do you have to pay so much for me?” The sun shines from the clouds, and the Xu’s body shines a hazy halo, which is extremely sacred. Everyone looked at Xu Ke, as if they felt a selfless greatness from each other, and the bottom of their heart seemed to be knocked by a heavy hammer. What a noble man! Even in danger, I still think of them! What a great sentiment! In this filthy world of cultivating immortals, people are in danger. Everyone just wants to protect themselves. Unexpectedly, there will be such a noble person. Even the most vicious and murderous friars present could not help feeling a trace of shame from their hearts. Ye Shuo looked at each other and murmured, “is there really such a noble person in the world?” This remark immediately aroused public anger What do you mean? ” In order to help us, Tang Daoyou didn’t hesitate to take risks. Now you have the face to say such words? ” It’s stupid! Without the slightest gratitude! ” We are ashamed to be with you! ” Murong Yunhai glared at Ye Shuo and motioned him to shut up. Don’t you see that big guys are facing Tang Sanzang now? At present, Tang Sanzang represents the public opinion. If they speak ill of Tang Sanzang and are beaten on the spot, at least they must be tripped in the next exploration. Besides, he still has the map of ghost valley Master Tang, you must not belittle yourself. You have to lead us into the ghost valley. ” Murong Yunhai decided to hold each other up. “I think only Tang Daoyou, who is so virtuous and noble, is worthy to lead us to the Taigu secret place. Is that right?” yes! That’s right! ” Let Tang Daoyou take us in! ” Xu Que and Murong Yunhai smiled where no one could see them. I really have a plan

chapters.title: Chapter 1766
chapters.body:
Chapter 1766

Chapter 1766

C.1766

Murong Yunhai’s plan is very simple. Since Xu que is such a noble man, it is actually the most reliable to let him hold the map.

After all, he has said before that the purpose of looking for an immoral dog is to revenge.

I’m not interested in what Taigu secret place is.

“Are there any risks if you do this?” Shangguan Ruiqian asked in a low voice.

Murong yunhaiwei shook his head and said softly, “I don’t think so. Do you know why Buddhist monks often practice faster?”

Buddhist monks belong to a special group in xianyunzhou. Before they reach xianzun, they tend to be much faster than ordinary monks. Although their actual combat power is slightly weak, many monks envy this rapid cultivation method.

In fact, most monks understand the reason, but after understanding it clearly, they can only smile bitterly and sigh.

“Because at the moment they entered the Buddhism, they had established clear rules and commandments. The three poisons and eight commandments of the Buddhism are the commandments they must abide by. It is equivalent to abandoning some desires belonging to ordinary people in exchange for the favor of the heaven, so as to achieve the effect of rapid cultivation.” Murong Yunhai said in a deep voice.

Greed, anger and infatuation are three poisons, and the eight precepts are killing, stealing, immorality, nonsense, drinking, wearing incense, sitting in a high bed and eating out of time.

Once the precepts are violated, the Buddha’s heart will shake. At least, it will arouse the mind devil, or the Buddha’s heart will crack on the spot and the cultivation will be destroyed.

Therefore, the credit of Buddhist disciples in xianyunzhou is one of the best. After watching Xu Ke’s performance, Murong Yunhai completely believed Xu Ke’s words.

He really has a deep hatred for wicked dogs.

If he lied or was with an immoral dog, he would have been shaken by the Buddha’s heart, depressed and devastated.

How can you still have the strength to stand up like this?

“So we can completely trust Tang Sanzang, and his character and morality are so noble. I believe he will never maliciously harm us in the process of leading the way.” Murong Yunhai said confidently, “believe me, I always see people very accurately!”

A Buddhist disciple can’t lie, so he must be telling the truth.

So he must have a deep hatred for immoral dogs.

Therefore, the benevolence and justice he just showed are all true.

Unfortunately, he never thought that Xu was not a Buddhist disciple at all!

The only Dharma Hui who knew the truth looked confused.

What happened?

Isn’t Xu Daoyou an old acquaintance with the dog?

Why is it still like this? Has your life been skipped for a period of time?

At this time, I don’t know the Dharma. I don’t feel like I’m living in a temple all the year round.

“Well, Xu… Senior brother Tang, you and the dog…” after hesitating for a moment, fahui decided to ask clearly.

Xu Ke’s face remained unchanged, and he still maintained the expression of three points of solemnity, three points of grief and four points of hatred. He raised his hand and pulled the play to his side.

“If you tell me about my relationship with ER Gouzi, I’ll kill myself immediately and make your Buddhism have no Buddha!” Xu deficient said in a voice that only two people could hear.

Fahui was shocked at that time.

Suicide is still used to threaten people these days!

But on second thought, the importance of Buddhas to Buddhism is self-evident. If it were not for the fact that the Buddhas appeared this time, it is estimated that the old monks who supervised them would come to protect the Dharma in person.

But even so, fahui still consciously assumed the responsibility of protecting the law in order to preserve Xu vacancy.

If Xu Kuan commits suicide, the trial of Buddhism will not open again within a hundred years, and the emergence of the next Buddha will wait at least a hundred years later.

At that time, God knew what Buddhism would be like!

“I see. If elder martial brother Tang is really an example of Buddhism, he is not only kind and generous, but also full of a sense of justice. I will learn more from elder martial brother.” Fa Hui immediately said.

Xu Wei was stunned and thought that the little light bulb was just like talking nonsense.

With these words, Fa Hui’s face changed, took a deep breath and whispered the Buddhist scriptures.

“What’s the matter with you?” Xu Ke said.

Dharma Hui’s face showed bitterness: “what the little monk said just now, he committed the ring of nonsense. At this time, the Buddha’s heart wavered.”

Xu que was silent for a moment and almost stood up.

You little monk curse people without getting dirty!

At this time, the middle-aged man walked slowly over and stood beside Xu Wei with respect: “Tang Daoyou… Oh no, master Tang, we all know that you should have been seriously injured in the process of just now, so we collected some treasures to heal you.”

Then he handed over a storage ring: “there are all the natural materials and earth treasures just put together by us, which should be helpful to your injury.”

Xu que was moved on his face, then suddenly sighed and pushed aside the storage ring: “no, you have just been robbed by that evil dog. These Tiancai and Dibao are also very important to you…”

“Don’t worry, Taoist friends. What we just gave is only a part. Even if the evil dog is smart, how can he know how many treasures we have.” The middle-aged man smiled proudly. Xu Wei scolded secretly in his heart. There are still a lot of good things hidden by these dogs, but on the surface, he took them down half way. Put away the storage ring. Xu que whispers to ER Gouzi with communication jade Pay attention, these guys still have a lot of good things. Remember to try to drain them later. ” God knows, God knows! ” Go to your mother’s God and take advantage of me. Now you are called Earth dog No. 1 and Duan Jiude is called Earth dog No. 2! ” I, NIMA… “Before the two dogs scolded, Xu Wei unilaterally cut off the communication between them. At this time, they have gathered a team and are ready to move towards ghost valley. Basically, they are elites, but they still maintain the greatest caution in exploring the ghost valley. After all, none of the people present had really entered the ghost valley. According to the guidance of the map, everyone stepped into the ghost valley. There was nothing strange at the entrance. But as it went deeper and deeper, the sky became darker and darker, and the surrounding air began to reverberate with seemingly indistinct cries, as if evil spirits were hovering here. Murong Yunhai stopped first, frowned and said, “you guys, it seems different here.” According to the map, there should be a Dharma array at the entrance, but we didn’t see any array at all. ” The middle-aged man looked at the map and wondered. Xu que walked in the last place. When he was preparing to speak, he suddenly saw a flower in front of him, and the scene suddenly changed. In the gloom, a beautiful woman with almost no trace was slowly approaching herself Officials…… “the enchanting voice sounded, which made people in a trance for a time. Xu que wiped the tears from the corners of his mouth and said, “I’m a family… How can one be enough? I want ten! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1767
chapters.body:
Chapter 1767

Chapter 1767

C.1767

The beauty’s posture is enchanting and her expression is charming. The pieces of cloth on her body are not so much used to cover up, but rather to enhance interest. The effect is a little reliable.

She was still charming and close to Xu que. Before she finished the sentence “official”, she heard Xu Que’s heroic words and was stunned.

I haven’t left here for a hundred and eighty years. Does it mean that the people outside have become simple, or debauchery to this extent?

One of you is not enough, but you need ten?

Or a monk’s request?

But just as the so-called beauty scheming, the reaction was so fast. However, after being stunned for a long time, it was filled with a charming smile again: “Officer… You are really joking. I’m afraid you can’t stand even one of my family, let alone ten.”

“Amitabha.” Xu que put his hands together and asked sincerely, “do you dare to ask, benefactor, can you double heaven?”

“Er… I haven’t been involved yet. If necessary, I can learn…”

“What about the dragon?”

“Ah, this…”

“Yin and yang are deeply intertwined. What about the Victorian tower?”

Xu Wei sighed with great regret: “should I always move?”

“Ah! I will! ”

It was not easy to hear a beauty who knew what she knew. She was immediately overjoyed and winked at Xu vacancy: “I didn’t expect that officials would play so many tricks. I’ll teach my family well later.”

Xu Wei put away his smile and said, “neither will this nor that. Will you take this to test the poor monk? Which monk can’t stand such a test! ”

After that, he slapped the Buddha and splashed: “it’s useless to leave you. I’ll send you to the Western Paradise!”

The beauty was caught off guard and directly hit by this palm. Suddenly, she felt the incomparable Buddha light melting her body quickly.

“Ah! You dead monk, how dare you beat me! I remember you! ”

The beauty’s face uttered a painful wail, revealing its original face in the light of the Buddha.

It was as if it had been roasted by fire. It was dark all over. The slender jade hand turned into a ferocious ghost claw. It was covered with scars. It was a ferocious ghost.

Xu que sneered: “you have a bit of courage. You dare to seduce the poor monk and die!”

After that, the Buddha’s light surges all over the body. Raising your hand is a move to learn from the Vajra magic palm inherited from the ancient Buddha.

The rich Buddha light converged into a huge golden palm print and roared towards the front, killing it in a flash.

At the moment when the female ghost disappeared, the surrounding environment retreated like the melting of ink.

The sky was still dark, but the people who had just disappeared appeared again.

Several people with strong cultivation have sobered up, while those with poor strength are still trapped in a dreamland.

“Tang Daoyou escaped from the dreamland so quickly.” The middle-aged man was surprised.

Xu que smiled and said, “I’m flattered. It’s just that my Buddha’s power is more restrained from evil things here.”

“Indeed, Buddhism does have natural advantages here.” The middle-aged man sighed, walked beside the monks who were still immersed in the dreamland, and said in a deep voice, “this should be the entrance array mentioned on the map, but what we didn’t expect is that the array is actually composed of hundreds of ghosts, which is really impossible to prevent.”

Murong Yunhai also walked in it to help those who did not get out of the dreamland wake up.

Those who woke up, after adjusting for a moment, also joined the team to help others.
