The bodies lying behind them are the main reason for their depression.

Everyone didn’t expect, but just stepped into the ghost Valley, there was a monk’s death.

And not one or two. There were ten monks who died in this array.

There is even a Fairy Statue!

Silence and panic spread like a virus here, and everyone was afraid of the way ahead.

Even immortal Zun died unknowingly. How can they survive this array intact?

They can accept death in battle. After fighting the enemy with real swords and guns, they can die if they are inferior to others. That way, at least they can die well.

But they can’t accept the array formed by ghosts.

“Do you have your own way to deal with this array?” The middle-aged man glanced around, and no one dared to look at it.

He sighed, already aware of the result.

Although the monks in xianyunzhou are powerful, it is precisely because xianyunzhou is too powerful that they have never experienced defeat.

Although these friars are superior in strength, they can’t compare with Xu Ke and others in psychological perseverance, and even those Tianzhou people who died in battle.

Moreover, ghosts rarely appear in xianyunzhou. Most friars either run directly into reincarnation or find ways to give up and rebuild. Who will be willing to exist as ghosts? In this way, they can’t even think of a few ways to deal with ghosts How about… Let’s quit first? ” A young man suggested. Others raised their heads, looked at each other, and then looked at Murong Yunhai with expectant eyes. Although middle-aged men are their leaders at this time, everyone knows that Murong Yunhai from Tianmen is the leader. The power of Tianmen is so strong that almost no one will resist Tianmen. The four immortal emperors are like four mountains, firmly pressing on the heads of everyone. Murong Yunhai glanced at the younger martial brothers behind him, saw perseverance from their faces, bit his teeth and said, “move on! It’s just a ghost. I work with several younger martial brothers to open up a way for you! ” Shangguan Ruiqian stood up and said in a deep voice, “I have a secret method that can temporarily avoid the intrusion of ghosts.” Hearing of such a magical method, people’s hearts rekindled hope again. Shangguan Ruiqian rested for a moment and showed his method of avoiding ghosts. A golden mask opened, shrouded the people in it and began to move forward. As the crowd went deeper and deeper, it was almost completely dark and could not see five fingers. I only heard the shrill cry. Several monks couldn’t help but make several Dharma decisions, but they couldn’t play the slightest role. Shangguan Ruiqian’s forehead was sweating hard and said, “I can’t support it… There are too many ghosts here, and the consumption is faster than I thought!” The crowd immediately got flustered and gathered together to report to the regiment for warmth. Seeing that the color of the hood is getting darker and darker, the sad ghost faces around are close at hand, and a trace of cracks begin to appear on the hood. Just then, a gentle voice sounded Amitabha, let me come. ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1768
chapters.body:
Chapter 1768

Chapter 1768

C.1768

“Tang Daoyou!”

“Master Tang Sanzang!”

The crowd looked in the direction of the speaker and suddenly exclaimed.

Xu Xu came out from the bottom of the team, his hands folded, and a faint Buddha light was distributed around his body.

Those ghosts who are not afraid of the mask are suddenly far away and dare not come forward.

Xu que walked to the front of the crowd with a smile and whispered, “Amitabha.”

Every monk in the light of Buddha felt a warm feeling flowing in his body and completely expelled the cold caused by the approaching of evil spirits.

“Look! The ghost retreated! ”

Someone pointed to the front and exclaimed.

I saw a ghost blocking the way on the road where Xu lacked the light of Buddha, which was about to break through the light mask.

But at this time, when I saw the Buddha light, I was afraid and retreated back into the darkness.

Really useful!

“Great! I didn’t expect that master Tang’s Dharma cultivation was so powerful! ”

“Thanks to master Tang, I’m afraid we can’t go out this time.”

“Thank you, master Tang. In the future, master Tang will be my good brother, and his business is my business!”

People shed tears of gratitude and expressed their thanks in their own way.

Xu Wei shook his head and said, “this is what the poor monk should do. You can save the poor monk from the evil dog. I’m very grateful to you.”

Speaking of this, he paused and continued to say, “but what I’m doing at this time is a Buddhist secret, which consumes a lot. I’m afraid it won’t last long…”

Everyone’s heart jumped.

The ghosts around here haven’t dispersed!

“That’s not good, Tang Daoyou.” The middle-aged man held the map and said in a deep voice, “according to the display on the map, this array will take at least a quarter of an hour to go out!”

They haven’t come half way in from the beginning. If Xu que doesn’t last long, I’m afraid everyone will have to be buried here!

Xu Kui took a deep breath and looked solemn: “it doesn’t hurt. Even if I risked my life, I’ll take you out! If you have a chance, we should help you out. ”

Hearing this, they immediately grabbed the straw and quickly asked Xu Ke what help he needed.

Xu que pondered for a moment and explained: “my monk, this method consumes Qi and blood, cultivation, and even my longevity. As long as these three are not consumed, I can stick to it…”

It’s all about this. Even if these people are idiots, they can understand it.

The middle-aged man was the first to bear the brunt. He patted his chest and said, “don’t worry, Tang Daoyou. I don’t dare to say anything else. I have a lot of supplementary pills and green clothes!”

“Are you qingsuyi?” Murong Yunhai asked in some surprise, “the Dan God of the green bamboo gate?”

“Murong Taoist friend flattered me. It’s just a false name. Compared with Tang Taoist friend, it’s not worth mentioning.” Qingsuyi raised his hand and wiped it in the air, and a lot of pills appeared in his hand.

“Tang Daoyou, these pills are the best products I refined. They can replenish the consumption in your body as quickly as possible.”

Qingsu Yi handed these pills to Xu Wei and said calmly, “as long as you need it, I Qingsu Yi can refine pills for you at any time!”

There was a green vegetable belt, and others took action one after another. They handed Xu Wei his natural materials, earth treasures, pills and magic weapons as his backup resource bank.

Xu Xu looked at these people and took out the storage ring from all over his body, where he didn’t expect it at all. He felt a burst of lying in his heart.

Mom, these guys are the real old oil!

Yes, yes.

The next time you rob, you must not let them take the initiative to hand it in. You have to search it yourself.

After receiving four or five storage rings, Xu que gave a low drink and a flash of Buddha light merged into the storage ring.

A moment later, the Buddha light gushed out again, but it became countless times stronger, as if it had been nourished by something.

“Everyone, with your help, my Buddha light is already strong. I’ll take you out of here now!”

With that, Xu lacked a pair of palms, and the rich Buddha light suddenly melted like water, supporting the whole light curtain.

“Great!”

“Master Tang is really powerful!”

“We are saved!”

All the people were excited and walked forward behind Xu Wei.

Everyone’s face was filled with a happy smile. Only little monk fahui was at a loss.

Xu Kui Daoyou just put the Buddha light into the storage ring, took it out again, and released more Buddha light.

Don’t these people see it at all?

It seemed that he was aware of the abnormality of Fa Hui. Xu que tilted his head slightly and put his hand on his neck. You dare say, I’ll kill myself! Fa Hui made a quick decision: “elder martial brother, younger martial brother, come to help you!” After walking for a while, Xu Que’s voice came from the front: “you guys, I’m exhausted…” Murong Yunhai did not hesitate and threw out several storage rings: “Taoist friends, catch it!” Subsequently, the Buddha light was strong again. However, less than a quarter of an hour later, the Buddha light began to weaken I’m exhausted… “With the help of Taoist friends!” Poor monk… “Taoist friend!”… ” Everyone thought it was incredible. Does this method consume so much? No less than 20 storage rings have been consumed! Fa Hui looked at Xu que, who was in high spirits and did not show any exhaustion. He whispered a Buddhist name and felt deeply sinful. Buddha… Forgive the disciples. They are all for the development of Buddhism. Xu Ke has been observing around all the way. Others are afraid of ghosts, but he is not afraid. I’m a Buddhist disciple. I’m noble and upright. I’m immune to all poisons. What demons and ghosts dare to come close? What’s more, I force the holy body to have the most precious treasure of Buddhism. There are thousands of Buddhist dharmas added to the body, including the relic of the ancient Buddha on the left hand and the scriptures of the ancient Buddha on the right hand. Even if everyone here dies, he can’t die! So when he stood up, he casually performed a Dharma, and the old God walked forward on the ground. No matter how nervous others are, Xu lacks no panic. But somehow, the more Xu Shiyue walked in, the more he felt a terrible feeling in front of him. Intuition told him that it was definitely not so simple to enter the Taigu secret place from the ghost valley Wait… Er Gouzi won’t give me a fake map? ” Xu Ke was suddenly surprised and thought of this possibility. The more he thought about it, the more likely it was. He quickly contacted Er Gouzi Hey, er Gouzi, did you give me a fake picture? ” How could it be! ” The two dogs’ resolute voice came. Before Xu Kuan calmed down and prepared to cut off contact, he heard Duan Jiude’s voice from the other end what the fuck! The boy found out? ” I told you to do better and don’t cut corners… “Lying in the trough! Xu Wei almost scolded. Do you really dare to give me a fake

chapters.title: Chapter 1769
chapters.body:
Chapter 1769

Chapter 1769

C.1769

I don’t know how many years no one has entered the ghost valley. The entrance has long been controlled by these ghosts.

Ghosts are like an overwhelming insect larvae, forming a terrible maze. If there is no map, they can’t go out at all.

Murong Yunhai thought he was lucky because he found the great Buddhist virtue of Tang Sanzang and could lead them through this area.

Qingsuyi also thought he was lucky because he met Murong Yunhai and Tang Sanzang. Under their leadership, it was not difficult to enter the Taigu secret place.

Other monks also think they are lucky, because Murong Yunhai and qingsuyi, two young strong men who are famous in xianyunzhou, and Buddhist virtues such as Tang Sanzang, want to come to the Immortal Emperor’s heritage in the ancient secret land.

But Xu que doesn’t think so.

He just wants to curse his mother.

“I’ve been unlucky to know you two all my life!” Xu que maintained the peace on the surface and scolded at the bottom of his heart, “Er Gouzi, I will skin you when I go out!”

He made thousands of calculations, calculated Murong Yunhai’s reaction, calculated qingsuyi’s idea, and calculated all the monks present.

But Xu que didn’t think that the treasure map of ghost valley that Er Gouzi promised at the beginning was a fake map!

Gan!

I went deep into the ghost valley. You just told me it was a fake picture!

The second dog smiled pleasantly at the other end and said, “brother Duan, calm down. It’s the so-called day will bring great responsibility to the people. We must first work hard and work hard for their muscles and bones…”

“Don’t say so much. You’re dead.”

“Don’t be short, brother. It’s a big deal. We’ll harvest three or seven at that time! Eighty two is OK… Or nineteen? ”

“It’s not brother Kuang. If we don’t lie to you and those guys see it, our plan will be gone.”

Xu Xu was silent for a moment and suddenly asked, “what did you just say?”

Two dogs were stunned: “if we don’t lie to you…”

“No, last sentence.”

“Nineteen?”

“Deal.” Xu Ke immediately agreed, “tell me what has been changed in this picture.”

There was no voice at the other end, only a rustling sound of searching for things could be heard.

A moment later, only Duan Jiude’s voice came: “er… The array at the entrance on the original picture actually has a quick way to pass, which was wiped by me and ER Gouzi.”

Then, Duan Jiude repeated it through the method.

“I see. Where are you now?” Xu Xu glanced around and couldn’t see anything clearly.

At least you should know where Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude are. If something happens later, you can call these two goods to carry the pot in time.

“We’re following, but you can’t see.”

“Do you have a way through here?” Xu que immediately found a strange way.

Although it’s easy to pass, in fact, the strength of ghosts here is not weak. Most of them are in fairyland.

Even Xu que felt the breath of xianzun in the black fog!

This made him curious about the origin of ghost valley. According to theory, there are four immortal emperors in xianyunzhou who rule all year round, and basically there will be no great unrest.

Where did so many ghosts come from in ghost Valley?

Is it true that the so-called God devil war?

Xu Wei is noncommittal. There are too many secrets buried in xianyunzhou. Now he can’t fully explore them for a while and a half.

At present, the most important thing is to quickly find the Taigu secret place and strive to find the Immortal Emperor’s heritage in it.

According to the system, the remaining 35% progress, the required loading value, or Tiancai Dibao is an astronomical figure!

Even if there were so many treasures just now, it was just a drop in the bucket.

If you want to balance the magic Qi completely and quickly, you can only find a way from the Immortal Emperor’s legacy.

Of course, there are so many leeks here. Of course, I have to harvest a wave. I can’t waste it.

During the communication between Xu Que and ER Gouzi, the people behind him are talking one after another.

“I didn’t expect master Tang to be so powerful?”

“Master Tang is a Buddhist this time. Of course he has the ability.”

On the contrary, some people in the sect despised it: “hum, it’s just fairyland. What can you do if you have the ability?”

What’s so stupid?

Now it’s all up to me to cover you. How dare you talk like this?

“Chen Mo, is that what you want the demon sect to teach you?” Qingsuyi’s face was gloomy.

Not only did they save their lives here, but they also saved their lives!

Although the green bamboo gate is not a large sect, it also knows the words “know kindness and reward”. If Chen Mo wants to do something unfavorable, he will never let this guy go.

Facing the people’s gaze, Chen Mo’s face stiffened for a moment and said with an indifferent smile: “don’t you really think this guy has the ability to cover us? Look at the size of this land. Even we immortals can’t resist it. I really think a fairy king can protect us? ” Everyone was suddenly silent. This is a problem they ignored. The map shows that this area is far beyond people’s imagination. At present, it will take at least half a day to go out. Xu Weigang has only been a short distance away, and has consumed most of their resources. In addition, they have been blackmailed once by Er Gouzi. I’m afraid the remaining resources are really not enough to support them to leave here. Xu Wei has been paying attention to the conversation. He is happy when he hears the three words “desire demon sect”. Shit, there’s a way to heaven. If you don’t go, there’s no door to hell. You break in. Bullying the woman who was forced to be holy, I was worried that I couldn’t find you any trouble. Unexpectedly, I sent it to the door! If he were outside, Xu Ke’s cultivation hasn’t recovered yet, maybe he would be in a bit of trouble. But now it’s in ghost valley. He has a thousand ways to deal with this guy Amitabha, I can hold on now, but I’m afraid if I continue, I can’t hold on just by resource consumption. ” Xu que suddenly said. When they heard this, they were in a panic. If Xu Ke couldn’t hold it, the ghosts all around rushed down, and few people present could survive These ghosts have a deep hostility. I’m afraid I’ve been eroded by the hostility and can’t maintain the Buddha’s light. ” Xu que said weakly, and the Buddha light around him began to falter. Qing Suyi was in a hurry and hurriedly said, “Tang Daoyou, you must support!” Xu Wei smiled in his heart, meditated for a moment, and said seriously, “I have a way. I need to find someone to let me vent my fire.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1770
chapters.body:
Chapter 1770

Chapter 1770

C.1770

Diarrhea, diarrhea?

Hearing this, the people present were stunned, and then looked at Xu que with strange eyes.

Are all the disciples of Buddhism so open now?

In public, I even said such words of tiger and wolf!

Together with the nearby Dharma Hui, they quickly lowered their heads, dared not face the eyes of the people, and recited the Buddha’s name in their hearts.

“Amitabha… Buddha forgives me. I think of Buddhism…”

Xu Ke’s words are really too dissolute. Fa Hui, a pure little monk, can’t bear it at all.

On the contrary, Xu Xu was serious and said confidently: “yes, I need to purge the fire. Only after purging the fire can I have the strength to continue to support the Buddha light.”

People, look at me, I look at you. For a moment, I don’t know who to push out to be the fire seeker.

Murong Yunhai glanced at several nuns nearby and asked tentatively, “why don’t you sacrifice some Fairies in Furong palace…”

Furong palace is one of the few in Xianyun island. It is all the ancestral door of female monks.

Not only are they beautiful, but also they are enchanting, which attracts countless monks.

Although Furong palace is only a medium-sized sect gate, it is at the forefront of xianyunzhou in terms of popularity.

The friars of Furong palace who came this time also had beautiful faces and good bodies.

At this time, when Murong Yunhai looked at them, several nuns changed their faces and said angrily, “Murong Yunhai! What do you mean? Can we ask our sisters to serve a monk? ”

“No… it’s also for everyone’s safety.”

“Don’t even think about it! Be careful, I’ll report to my palace master! ”

Murong Yunhai suddenly seemed to be stuck in his throat, smiled and retreated back.

Seeing Murong Yunhai’s reaction, they also instantly thought of the rumor in their minds, and all looked strange.

Xu Wei said strangely, “why do you look like this when you talk about Furong palace?”

A friar looked around and whispered, “master Tang, you don’t know. It is said that the master of Furong Palace once had an unspeakable relationship with an Immortal Emperor. Although no one dared to confirm, everyone took this rumor seriously.”

Xu Kuan immediately knew that Murong Yunhai had to ask the master of Furong palace to say a word, Shiniang. No wonder he was so counselled.

“You guys, don’t panic. The poor monk said that purging fire doesn’t mean what you understand.” Xu que frowned and looked exhausted. “I need a Taoist friend to come forward and let me introduce the anger into each other’s body, and then Fa Hui, my younger martial brother, can disperse the anger for him.”

When he said this, he stared at Chen mo of the desire demon sect all the way.

Chen Mo was a little flustered by his stare, and an ominous premonition welled up in his heart: “grass, what are you staring at me for?”

Xu sighed and said in a deep voice: “I just heard that Taoist friends are people who want the demon sect. Such hostility is easy to arouse the evil thoughts in the people’s hearts. Ordinary friars can’t bear it at all. However, I know that the cultivation method of the demon sect is different from that of ordinary friars, and I have a stronger bearing on this aspect. Therefore, I’m afraid that only Taoist friends can shoulder this heavy responsibility.”

This is what he asked fahui just now. He wants the demon sect to practice and understand the road, but they uphold a casual doctrine.

Most monks practice self-restraint, and they follow their own nature. Therefore, the way of cultivation is more evil. To say better, it’s arbitrary, and to say worse, it’s psychological disease for everyone in the sect.

After hearing this, Xu Wei thought that he would treat you today.

I dare to think about my woman. If I don’t make you obedient today, I’ll write it upside down!

“Chen Mo Dao you, Tang Sanzang Dao you are right. Your cultivation method is really different.” Murong Yunhai came over with a overcast face and said in a deep voice.

In fact, he is a little suspicious that Tang Sanzang is taking revenge, but Chen Mo is really annoying. Now he has a request from Tang Sanzang. It’s not a big deal to help him clean up this guy..

“Since Taoist friends are so reluctant, the poor monk won’t insist.” Xu que pretended to shake his head and said sadly, “it seems that we are all dying here today. I hope you can’t blame the poor monk for failing to save you under the yellow spring. It’s really more than your heart but less than your strength!”

Listening to Xu Ke’s words, everyone was in a hurry.

“I just want you to help me. Why do you whet haw so much?”

“What bullshit wants the demon clan, just like special shrinking eggs!”

“If I wasn’t qualified, I would get you in the fucking round?”

“Bullshit wants the demon sect. Go back and destroy it!”

Xu Xu then said, “but if you die here, the soul will suffer for hundreds of millions of years.”

Facing the public’s condemnation, Chen Mo’s face became more and more ugly.

Shit, the dead monk is clearly fixing him!

But now everyone is on his side. His fists are hard to beat his four hands. If he insists on not accepting it, I’m afraid the surrounding guys will attack him immediately. After weighing the pros and cons, Chen Mo gritted his teeth and agreed: “monk, you can do whatever you can.” Thank you, Taoist friend. We will remember your kindness. ” Xu que smiled gratefully, “although this method requires handsome appearance, Taoist friend, you’re still a little poor, but try your best.” You… “Chen Mo twitched at the corners of his mouth and clenched his fists with anger. Wait for me. If your shit doesn’t work later, see how I’ll deal with you today Start now! ” Chen Mo stared at Xu Wei fiercely, with round eyes and gnashing teeth. Xu Kuang folded his hands and said, “Amitabha, the poor monk will start now.” He closed his eyes and concentrated, a wisp of fairy yuan gushed out from his fingers, and then forcibly mobilized a touch of magic Qi from his body and hit Chen mo Go! ” Everyone was suddenly surprised, and they all felt the tyrannical smell of the evil gas Younger martial brother, quickly use your secret method to dispel hostility! ” Xu que roared. Fa Hui looked blankly. What is the way to get rid of hostility? I can’t No, I forgot, younger martial brother. He hasn’t learned yet! ” Xu que screamed. Chen Mo was so stupid that he felt the evil spirit raging in his body and scolded: “shit, dead monk, are you playing with me!” With a long sigh, Xu que closed his hands and said, “it seems that only the poor monk can get rid of the hostility for the almsgiver!” Bang! After saying that, he took a deep breath, directly raised his hand and punched him fiercely, and hammered him hard on Chen Mo’s face Come on! Look at me today, subdue demons and eliminate demons, and eliminate the world! ” With that, Xu que waved his fist and punched and kicked Chen Mo for a while

chapters.title: Chapter 1771
chapters.body:
Chapter 1771

Chapter 1771

C.1771

Bang! Bang! Bang!

One punch after another fell like a meteor, making Chen Mo dizzy.

What made him feel most incredible was that every time he tried to mobilize the immortal yuan in his body to resist and alleviate the pain, he would be forcibly interrupted by the power in his body.

Nima… This guy is definitely taking revenge on me!

“You…”

Bang!

“Fuck you…”

Bang!

“Stop fighting, I…”

Bang! Bang! Bang!

Every time Chen Mo made a noise, he was beaten back to his throat, and his heart was so bent that he couldn’t.

The crowd stared at the scene, all dumbfounded.

Is this the Buddha’s decision to expel hostility?

Why is it completely different from the Buddhist secret Dharma in their impression! This is too violent!

Someone even took out the recording crystal quietly and recorded the scene.

The demon sect is very domineering in daily life. However, its sect is the strongest friars under the Immortal Emperor. Other persecuted sects just dare to be angry.

Finally, I had the chance to see the disciples of the demon sect beaten violently. It’s a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. It’s a pity not to record it.

“Son of a bitch, have you hit enough!”

Finally, Chen Mo couldn’t help it any more. The immortal yuan rolled in his body, forcibly suppressed the wisp of magic gas, roared, and slapped Xu Kuan hard.

The cultivation accomplishments of xianzun in the early stage burst out, flying sand and stones, with unparalleled power.

Tang Sanzang is just a cultivation in the fairyland. How can he stop xianzun?

Pop!

However, Xu que raised his hand and slapped Chen Mo in the face.

Chen Mo immediately felt a peaceful Buddha spirit pouring into his body. Originally, the cultivation of xianzun realm was enough to resist, but the fierce spirit in the Buddha spirit was entangled, and a destructive force was formed in an instant.

This force immediately disintegrated the strength he had gathered, and he had no strength all over.

Xu Kuang’s backhand poked his eyes again and struck him on the throat, making Chen Mo blind and dumb.

Chen Mo’s red eyes glared at Xu Duan and wanted to denounce him. However, his voice came to his mouth, but he couldn’t say anything.

“You guys, the evil Taoist friend Chen is angry. I need help!” Xu que looked up and shouted anxiously to the people around him.

The crowd gathered around. Chen Mo’s eyes were full of blood, full of tyranny, and a voice of “Ho Ho” came out of his mouth, as if he had been confused.

This appearance is very consistent with what Xu lacked said. It is the performance of being angry into the heart and regardless of the enemy and ourselves.

“How can we help?” Green vegetable clothes came up and was startled to see Chen Mo’s expression.

Xu que pressed Chen Mo, who was fluttering, and said sincerely: “gentlemen, pour Xianyuan into your fist and expel the hostility for Chen Mo according to my method just now.”

Chen Mo suddenly sank when he heard his words.

Gan!

You don’t really believe it, do you?

This is obviously nonsense!

According to his method?

Everyone looked at each other and suddenly fell into silence.

Seeing that the people didn’t respond, Xu que also muttered in his heart.

Strange, why are these guys quiet… Is Chen Mo so popular?

“Everybody… But what’s the problem?” Xu que asked tentatively.

“Well… Will we 1 kill Chen Daoyou when so many of us fight him?” Someone asked.

Xu Wei shook his head, folded his hands and said, “Amitabha, Chen Daoyou has advanced cultivation. I think this flesh injury will not be a big problem, but if we don’t help Chen Daoyou expel the hostility now, when the hostility breaks out and attracts the ghosts around us, we all have to die here.”

“Taoist friends, do it quickly!” Qingsuyi made a quick decision.

Murong Yunhai looked left and right, and said in a deep voice, “are you ready?”

The others took a deep breath and said in unison, “ready!”

A crowd surrounded Chen Mo, looked down at Chen Mo and moved their fists.

“Chen Mo, don’t blame us. We’re also for you.”

“Yes, and if you can’t get rid of the anger in your body, we’ll all have an accident.”

“Yes, it’s all for the sake of all of us.”

Chen Mo immediately widened his eyes and showed an unbelievable look.

You don’t really believe this guy’s nonsense, do you?

“Ho ho… No, not… Ho ho ho…”

Before he finished, countless fists were constantly enlarged in his eyes.

“Friends, today we will carry forward the right way!”

In the chorus of shouts, the sound of falling fists came one after another. Bang! Bang! Bang! A moment later, Chen Mo turned his eyes directly and fainted in place. Xu que squatted down quickly, raised his hand and pulled Chen Mo’s eyelids. Taking this opportunity, he took back the wisp of evil gas hidden in his body Amitabha, the evil spirit of Taoist friend Chen has been expelled. Thank you for your great help. ” Seeing this, they waved their hands and said that they were just doing their bit Tang Daoyou, you should be all right now? ” Murong Yunhai asked with concern. Xu nodded and looked weak: “I thought my younger martial brother could help, but I forgot that he didn’t learn this method. This time, the poor monk consumed too much. I’m afraid he can’t continue to resist the ghosts around him.” All of them immediately knew that they once again gathered together a piece of Tiancai and Dibao and handed it to Xu que. Murong Yunhai looked bitter and said in a deep voice, “master Tang, you have to hold on for a long time… There are not many treasures on us.” Xu Ke frowned slightly and then said, “in fact, I have a secret method to make the most of these natural materials and earth treasures.” What can I do? As long as we can last longer, we will fully cooperate! ” Yes, master Tang, that’s our life-saving benefactor. Tell us what you can do! ” Xu Que’s eyes fell on Chen Mo lying on the ground, and his face showed difficulty: “this method… Is to need a monk as the transfer station for the poor monk to absorb Tiancai and Dibao, so that the poor monk can absorb the power of Tiancai and Dibao to the greatest extent.” Transfer station? ” The crowd looked at Xu Que’s eyes and also fell on Chen mo I don’t know how long later, Chen Mo woke up and found himself floating in the air what the fuck! What?! ” As soon as he opened his eyes, he saw several ghosts wandering in front of him. If it hadn’t been for a faint layer of Buddha light to separate himself from each other, he would have jumped on his face now Come on, Chen Daoyou. After we go out, we’ll remember what you’ve done. ” Green Su Yi stood below and repeated the story for Chen Mo in a few words. A moment later, Chen Mo shouted angrily, “Tang Sanzang! I hate you! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1772
chapters.body:
Chapter 1772

Chapter 1772

C.1772

At the moment of stepping out of the array, the sun fell on them, and almost everyone gave birth to a feeling of rebirth.

Even many monks burst into tears at the corners of their eyes.

“Finally… Out!”

I don’t blame them for their poor mentality. It’s really weird in this ghost array.

At the beginning, people didn’t notice, but the deeper they went, the more they could feel the constant erosion of their hearts.

The lowest accomplishments are fairy kings. Even so, their minds gradually become fragile under this erosion.

This change made people panic, and even xianzun began to fear.

If Xu que hadn’t encouraged the people all the way and made them firm their mind, I’m afraid there would be at least half of the monks present.

They saw with their own eyes a fairy king who was dragged out and swallowed up by those ghosts after his mental breakdown.

“Thank you, master Tang.” Qing Suyi went to Xu Xu and said sincerely, “if it weren’t for you, I’m afraid we would all die in it.”

Seeing this, the monks around also gathered around and thanked Xu vacancy.

Xu que asked himself to look pale and weakly waved his hand: “it is said in Buddhism that saving people’s life is better than building a seven level floating slaughter. This is what poor monks should do. You don’t have to do so.”

Fahui was expressionless and said nothing.

Because he doesn’t know how to face Xu Ke’s pompous performance.

As the only Buddhist disciple along the way who followed Xu Kuang and knew the Dharma very well, he witnessed Xu Kuang’s performance in which he just released the light of the Buddha and shouted every once in a while.

What’s the use of the Buddha light?

When preaching Buddhist dharma, most Buddhist believers will take the initiative to release the Buddha light, which is estimated to consume about one thousandth of their accomplishments a year.

The main purpose is to show the strictness of Buddhism and create its own strength through light and shadow effect.

The consumption along the way is very little!

But if he didn’t use the Dharma, how did he dispel those ghosts?

Fa Hui didn’t understand, but now there were other monks on his side, and he couldn’t ask.

With the help of fahui, Xu que collected the moire stone in his hand into the storage ring.

Buddha’s Dharma can indeed dispel ghosts, but it takes too much power, so what really works is the moire stone given to him by Murong Yunhai, which was originally on ER Gouzi.

Later, he went to Tianmen to steal. Er Gouzi dropped the stone and was picked up by Murong Yunhai.

Er Gouzi was shocked when he learned that the moire stone was in Xu Wei’s hand.

The reason why he and Duan Jiude didn’t choose to enter the ghost valley with a map was that the moire stone was lost, and another way to enter the ghost valley was to pile human lives.

If Xu que didn’t show up and hold the moire stone, it’s estimated that one tenth of these people would be good now.

“What I earn here is hard money.” Xu que sighed.

It’s a conscientious merchant to collect some natural materials and earth treasures and protect their lives.

Seeing that Xu Xu wanted to get up, the monks quickly stopped him, and their eyes were full of gratitude.

“Master Tang can’t use it. Just leave it to us.”

“You have consumed a lot of energy. You should have a good rest now.”

A friar took out a gilded shuttle and handed it to Xu Wei: “Taoist friend Tang, this thing is called gilded shuttle, which can be driven by itself. You can have a good rest on it on the next road.”

Someone exclaimed, “is this the gilded shuttle that auctioned out thousands of spirit stones? Unexpectedly, it’s in the hands of Taoist friends! ”

The friar smiled modestly: “it’s nothing compared to Tang Daoyou saving my life.”

Xu Wei originally wanted to refuse. Hearing these words, he took the gilded shuttle with his backhand and folded his hands together: “thank you, Taoist friend.”

The gilded shuttle is very convenient to use. Just put a spirit stone at the position of the switch, it will automatically float and be controlled by the spirit.

The party walked in front, while Xu Ke lay on the gilded shuttle, enjoying the surrounding scenery leisurely.

Strictly speaking, after leaving the array at the entrance, the environment in the ghost Valley is not so bad, as if all ghosts were concentrated in the array.

With the deepening of the crowd, the mood gradually relaxed.

“According to the map, as long as we pass through this area, we can reach the entrance of Taigu secret place.” Murong Yunhai held the map and said excitedly.

Everyone was excited when they heard the speech.

Didn’t they try so hard to enter the ancient secret place?

At present, the Taigu secret place is ahead, and everyone can’t help but speed up their pace. Chen Mo followed the right side of the team and looked at Xu que with hatred from time to time. Xu que noticed this guy and sneered in his heart. I’ll kill you later! How dare you stare at me? Soon, the road came to an end. In front of us was a towering mountain. Everyone stood in front of the mountain and looked up at the mountain. For a moment, they were a little confused. Is this the end? Doesn’t it mean that there is an entrance to Taigu secret place? People subconsciously look back at Xu que. In their hearts, it seems that Xu que has a way to find the real entrance. Chen Mo sneered twice and said, “don’t think about it. You’ve all been cheated. There’s obviously no entrance to this ghost place.” Xu Weizheng was ready to speak. When he heard Chen Mo’s words, he was silent for a moment. He folded his hands and said, “Amitabha, I just looked at this picture and found that there is hidden information on this picture. There is a way to enter.” Chen Mo almost wanted to scold. You’re lying to ghosts! The map we all read together, how can you see the information we can’t see? But no one paid attention to Chen mo. everyone focused on Xu Ke. At this time, he was everyone’s hope to enter the Taigu secret place. Xu que raised his head and looked at the crowd: “according to the map, a monk who has not died after being invaded by evil spirits needs to kowtow here for seven or forty-nine times, be sincere and open the door to the ancient secret land.” When he said this, his eyes kept staring at Chen mo. They were still thinking about who was the monk who had not died after being invaded by evil spirits. They looked at him along Xu Que’s eyes and suddenly realized. Isn’t this a monk who hasn’t died after being invaded by evil spirits? Chen Mo was so angry that he could not speak You, you… You are taking revenge on me! ” Xu que was stunned and said, “Chen Daoyou, I’m a monk. I’m broad-minded. How can I retaliate?”

chapters.title: Chapter 1773
chapters.body:
Chapter 1773

Chapter 1773

C.1773

Chen Mo’s face was as heavy as ink and stared at Xu que with gnashing teeth.

“You want me to be a transit station and clear my hostility. Now you want me to kowtow. You’re not retaliating me. Who believes it?!” He roared angrily, pointing to the monks around him, “ask them and see if they believe it!”

Every monk who was pointed out turned his head and looked like nothing to do with himself.

Xu Duan put his hands together and asked with a smile, “really, ask your Taoist friends. Do they think I’m taking revenge on you?”

“How? Tang Daoyou is thinking for all of us! ” Murong Yunhai said without hesitation.

“Yes, Chen Daoyou. How can you say that? How hurtful it is. ”

“Tang Daoyou thought hard for everyone’s safety, but he just kowtowed. Don’t you want to?”

“Why are you so selfish? Only care about yourself, regardless of others? ”

They immediately condemned Chen Mo and said that he was a sinner of the century.

Chen Mo’s head was buzzing, and he was almost spewed out by a mouthful of old blood.

What do you mean I’m selfish?

Everyone is an immortal. Who is not selfish?

“You, you… Are you good people? Dare you say you haven’t hurt others for yourself? ” Chen Mo trembled his fingers and roared fiercely.

Where is this?

Xianyunzhou!

Who was there?

Friar, friar!

“Even if some people don’t kill the earth for themselves, not to mention the friars fighting with heaven! All the opportunities, treasures, miraculous herbs, which one is not won? ” Chen Mo was already mad.

Kill your wife and father, sell your friends and seek glory. Who can’t do it here?

Now one by one is dignified. Can you live with the condemnation of conscience by saying such words?!

Many people present heard the speech, lowered their heads and flashed a touch of guilt at the bottom of their eyes.

Indeed, one of the people present is counted as one, and none of them are qualified to be an honest man.

In order to cultivate immortality, they have given up many things.

Family affection, friendship, love… Those emotions that have long been left behind by them now float on my mind again.

Perhaps they are wrong to do so now?

“You, Immortal Emperor’s legacy…” Xu Ke said suddenly and leisurely, “if you get this heritage, you have a great chance to become the sixth Immortal Emperor… What’s more, what you do at this time is to put down the butcher’s knife and turn around. My Buddha appreciates this kind of person and will forgive you. What’s more, you get the Immortal Emperor’s legacy for the sake of xianyunzhou, Let the power development of xianyunzhou be more balanced. ”

Murong Yunhai suddenly looked up and said, “I think what master Tang said is very true. Let Chen Daoyou open the door for us.”

Qingsuyi also said without hesitation: “indeed, this matter is very important. I believe it’s harmless for all of you to endure a moment of conscience torture for the development of xianyunzhou.”

“Indeed, the so-called successful entrepreneurs are informal. Tang Daoyou is right.”

“That’s reasonable. Let’s hurry to let Chen Mo Dao you kowtow and open the door.”

Everyone looked calm and echoed.

The chance to become immortal emperor is right in front of you. Is conscience a fart?

What’s wrong? Everything I do now is just!

Chen Mo was stupid. He didn’t expect Xu Ke to be shameless!

Aren’t you a Buddhist disciple?

You’re lying with your eyes open!

“Tang Sanzang, you shameless thing, despicable! You are in vain as a Buddhist disciple… “Chen Mo immediately scolded.

Dong!

Murong Yunhai directly slapped Chen Mo’s head on the ground and made a startling noise.

At the same time, he raised his head and looked eagerly at Xu Ke: “master Tang, do you think this kowtow posture is right?”

Xu lacked a kind face, looked at Murong Yunhai with positive eyes, and nodded: “it’s quite right, just follow this posture.”

Murong Yunhai immediately started to pull Chen Mo’s head up.

“Cough… NIMA, Murong Yunhai, I remember…”

Dong!

“Grass! You really believe… ”

Dong!

“NIMA…”

Dong!

When Xu was absent, he said, “the sound is not loud enough, but it has to be louder!”

Murong Yunhai didn’t answer, “OK!”

Dong! Dong! Dong!

A series of earth shaking impacts sounded, and the ground was hit with spider web cracks.

After seven or forty-nine heads, Chen Mo looked up in embarrassment.

“Tang Sanzang!”

His face roared ferociously, his eyes were full of resentment, and a turbulent immortal yuan burst out all over him: “I want you to die today…”

Boom! The last voice had not yet been completely exported. I only saw Xu Ke’s figure falling from the sky and stepping on Chen Mo’s head, forcing him into the ground. The rubble splashed, the smoke and dust rose everywhere, and Chen Mo’s body twitched twice, and there was no movement at all I’m sorry, I’ve just made up a few. ” Xu que said with a smile, “Amitabha, Chen Daoyou’s contribution is worth it. Let’s thank him for his contribution.” Before leaving, Xu que also stepped on Chen devil’s head with force. The ground “roared” and cracked several gaps. Murong Yunhai saw his eyelids jump, waved his hand, and immediately two people went to carry out the Chen devil. At this time, he had completely fainted. The extreme anger and continuous humiliation stimulation made the strong man in the early days of xianzun unbearable and fell into a coma directly. Gulu… Rao Shiqiang was as strong as Murong Yunhai, and couldn’t help swallowing his saliva. The monk is not as kind-hearted as he looks. He is a typical good-looking monk with black hands. You can’t offend him in the future! This idea also came into being in the hearts of other monks. Everyone looked at Xu Wei with frightened eyes and crazy memories in their minds. Did they offend him The monk is not simple. ” Shangguan Ruiqian said in a voice that only two people could hear. Murong Yunhai nodded: “I know that a fairy King’s land can stun the fairy respect land with one kick. Is this something that a simple monk can do?” Er Gouzi, where are you now? ” Xu que contacted the two people with communication jade while walking We’re hiding in the back. Thanks to you, all the ghosts’ attention has been attracted away. ” Duan Jiude whispered OK, get ready to follow in. I’m about to open the door of Taigu secret place. ” Xu Xu asked anxiously, “you didn’t cheat on the way to open the door.” After getting a positive answer from Er Gouzi, Xu Ke was relieved and stood in front of the mountain. The legendary Taigu secret place, I’m coming! Xu que takes out the moire stone and holds it in the palm of his hand. The surging immortal yuan is poured into it

chapters.title: Chapter 1774
chapters.body:
Chapter 1774

Chapter 1774

C.1774

With the influx of Xu Weixian yuan, the moire stone showed bursts of light golden brilliance, suspended from the palm.

The radiance spread like ripples in the air and spread around.

Xu Ke frowned and kept inputting Xianyuan into it.

No one has ever entered the Taigu secret place, and few people even enter the ghost valley.

Even if they break in, most of them die in the array at the entrance.

Therefore, no one has ever known that moire stone is the key to the ancient secret place.

“Why does this thing need so many cents?” Xu que whispered.

One tenth of the immortal yuan in his body has been input, but at present, there is no sign of opening the door.

Mom sells a batch. Shouldn’t Er Gouzi lie to me again?

Just as I was about to stop, I suddenly felt that the moire stone in my hand was shocked and stopped absorbing.

Bang!

The next second, the moire stone exploded directly, turned into countless streamers, flew around, fell on the void, and turned into a golden cursor.

These cursors are derived from Taoist gold lines and connected together to form dense patterns.

Xu Ke was stunned. Before he could react to what had happened, there was a sudden exclamation behind him.

“Oh, my God… Is this the gate to Taigu’s secret place?”

“It’s spectacular…”

“Here is the power of the Immortal Emperor! Powerful power! ”

Listening to the exclamation of the crowd, Xu que quickly stepped back, stood beside the crowd, looked up again, and was immediately shocked.

Those light spots not only covered the position in front of him, but also filled the void in front of the mountain. The golden thread links to form a huge door.

At this time, the door is slowly opening, and the light shines through the crack of the door. Everyone feels an invisible sacred breath.

Even those who have never seen Xu Ke clearly feel that it is the sacred breath from the Immortal Emperor, or the power of the emperor.

“Great, the Taigu secret place is open, Taoist friends…”

Boom!

Before the words were finished, the heavy pressure suddenly came, which changed everyone’s face, and even several were directly pressed to lie on the ground.

“This is the power of the emperor’s power. Use the skill to resist!” Green Su Yi roared, and then he ran the skill. Powerful immortal yuan poured out of his body and forcibly supported his body.

People around him followed suit, and this area became a testing ground for monks.

In front of Diwei, no one can be spared. Only by doing his best can he not be overwhelmed.

At this time, someone suddenly exclaimed, “you, look… Look ahead…”

The people looked in the direction the man said and were stunned.

Xu que was standing in front of the gate. The golden light shone from around him. The halo shrouded around him, and the bald head looked brighter.

He turned slowly and looked behind him. The door of the divine world seemed to open behind him.

At this time, he was like a Buddha alive.

“Hey, what’s the matter with you?” Xu Wei looked at the people waiting in battle and said with doubts on his face.

A monk said with difficulty, “don’t you feel at all, Taoist friend Tang?”

“Yes, isn’t this Diwei?” Xu que said blankly, “it’s rare to feel it once. Don’t you understand it quickly?”

Everyone looked speechless directly.

Understanding?

Don’t you see how hard it is for us to stand up?

Murong Yunhai suddenly reacted and said in disbelief, “master Tang, haven’t you been suppressed by the emperor?”

Xu Wei looked at the performance of the crowd and suddenly realized that he was the only one who could stand well in the audience.

Everyone else was like collapse, lying down and sitting down. Only Murong Yunhai and qingsuyi, the monks with the highest accomplishments, were still standing, but their faces were difficult to see the extreme.

“Tang Daoyou, maybe it’s because you’re by the door, so Diwei avoided you.” Qingsuyi guessed, “you’d better avoid it quickly. In case there’s still the smell of the great emperor in it, I’m afraid you can’t hold on.”

Except for the twelve disciples of Tianmen, Qing Suyi is the one who knows the power of the Immortal Emperor best. He knows how much pressure he has to bear if he faces the Immortal Emperor directly.

At this time, only the remaining emperor Wei with doubts pressed the people down.

Master Sanzang of Tang Dynasty is the weakest among them. Others may just be overwhelmed. If Diwei really erupts at that time, he may be directly crushed and exploded.

So Qing Suyi asked him to be quiet and ready. In fact, he also wanted him to be closer to himself. If he really couldn’t hold on, at least other friars helped resist for a while.

“You don’t have to worry. This emperor’s power is just a remnant of the dead. I don’t pay attention to it.” However, at this time, Xu que smiled and said softly.

At that time, the people were surprised, and they popped up the spirit to check Xu’s lack. Then they waited for their eyes to be wide, full of unbelievable looks How is that possible? ” Master Tang, have you been completely unaffected by Emperor Wei? ” Tang Daoyou, how on earth did you do it? Why does this power work on you, but it has no effect at all? ” Several monks exclaimed on the spot, while Murong Yunhai and qingsuyi also looked at Xu Ke in surprise and looked very confused. A monk in fairyland who consumed most of his strength can resist the power of the Immortal Emperor? This is incredible Hehe, it’s the so-called “watching all the films in the world, there’s no code in your heart.” Xu que showed a quiet smile and put his hands together. The whole person was shrouded in golden light, which was extremely sacred. “As long as there is a Buddha in his heart, everything in the world is equal in your eyes, and naturally will not be suppressed by the emperor.” All things are equal? How is that possible? Everyone knows that there is no real equality in this world, and strength is the only condition for determining status. But the Tang Sanzang was not really influenced by the emperor’s power. Does it mean that he has stepped into the realm of ancient Buddha? It is said that only the ancient Buddha is such a realm. Even though the cultivation is vast and unpredictable, he still treats all things in the world equally and has never had any bias. For a time, Xu Que’s image as a Buddhist Saint became more and more great, deeply rooted in the hearts of the people and unshakable. This wisp of emperor’s power was just a remnant of Immortal Emperor, and soon dispersed. After they felt the powerful momentum around them dissipated, they stood up with lingering fear. They didn’t rush in, but adjusted their breath in situ. Just entering the door was almost killed. God knows what crisis there is, so everyone wants to adjust to the best state and go in again. Fa Hui approached Xu Xu and whispered, “elder martial brother… Are those you said true?” Xu Xu glanced at him, full of pity: “little light bulb, why don’t you follow me in the future? If your wisdom is sold, I’m afraid you have to help people pay.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1775
chapters.body:
Chapter 1775

Chapter 1775

C.1775

To Xu’s surprise, the little bulb nodded after thinking carefully for a moment.

“From benefactor Xu, I can learn many things I haven’t learned before.” Fa Hui said seriously.

Xu Wei praised this undisguised praise: “you have a good eye for a small light bulb.”

After a while, Diwei completely dissipated.

Murong Yunhai and qingsuyi took the lead in recovering. As for others, it took a little longer. About a quarter of an hour later, everyone gathered in front of the gate.

The unprecedented Taigu secret land is about to unfold, and everyone is excited.

The legacy of the Immortal Emperor, the prosperous future, the opportunity to stand at the top of Xianyun Island, everything is behind this door!

Boom!

The golden gate was pushed open, and dazzling brilliance poured in. It was extremely dazzling and stabbed everyone’s eyes.

Rao is such a calm person as Xu Kuang. He is also a little excited at this time.

That’s the Immortal Emperor’s legacy!

Taoist emperor, Taoist Zun has already become a legend. For countless years, let alone seeing real people, even the root hair has not been touched.

The Immortal Emperor is already the strongest man on the whole Xianyun island.

If you master the legacy of the Immortal Emperor, you will master the right and the road to the top of Xianyun island. Who can not be excited about it?

If Xu Ke can get this legacy, he may not need to find a way to update the system in the future.

Today, even the 11.0 version of the system can’t keep up with him. The installation force value required for updating is too huge. Now, even if he can install it, it will take a long time.

Boom!

The continuous roar echoed in the void. Vaguely, we could hear the fairy music playing and the cranes and luans flying together.

According to the instructions on the map, open the door to Taigu secret place, step into it, and you will come to a small world.

This small world was forged by the Immortal Emperor with his supreme strength before his death. It has a scenic spot that ordinary people can’t see. If you pass the test of the Immortal Emperor, you can get the legacy of the Immortal Emperor.

It’s just… Xu que frowns and feels confused.

It doesn’t seem to say on the map that there will be so many people in the Immortal Emperor’s Secret territory, right?

In front of him, there was a wilderness under the mountains. On the wilderness, there were a huge team of thousands of people, and more people gathered from all directions. With the immortal yuan surging in the air, Xu was very worried.

I feel that as soon as I entered the Taigu secret realm, things have begun to develop in an unpredictable direction.

Strictly speaking, this wilderness is just a small boundary at the foot of the mountain. Thousands of people are crowded here, which also seems a little crowded.

The arrival of Xu Ke and others immediately attracted everyone’s attention.

In fact, it’s not their fault. After all, the golden light suddenly appeared on the nearest mountain. Who wouldn’t take a more look?

“Why are people here again?”

“Shit, how many people got the key to come in!”

“Tell them to get out of here. This is not a place for waste.”

Several impatient voices sounded, which immediately changed the faces of Xu Ke and his group.

Murong Yunhai walked forward slowly with a black face. The cultivation of immortal Zun burst out: “who’s in charge here?”

Unfortunately, his outbreak not only did not deter people, but ushered in a stronger rebound.

“So many immortal peaks!”

Xu Wei was surprised. It didn’t seem like breaking in at all, but a group of organized and premeditated guys who came to excavate the Immortal Emperor’s heritage!

But the question is, where did they come in?

“Senior brother!” Suddenly, a surprised voice sounded.

Then, a green figure came from a distance and fell in front of qingsuyi.

It was a young face, half shorter than Xu, with an excited look on his face.

Green Su Yi was stunned and said in surprise, “Ziwen, why are you here?”

“Qingziwen? “The youngest genius of the green bamboo gate?” Murong Yunhai also called out the origin of the other party.

As a disciple of the Immortal Emperor, he knows all the geniuses on this continent. He knows himself and the enemy and is invincible in a hundred battles.

Under the narration of qingziwen, everyone finally figured out the context.

It turned out that since three days ago, gods have been appearing in feihaizhou, which is known as the key to the ancient secret land.

At first, no one believed it, but after the first friar who used the key and successfully entered the Taigu secret place appeared, everyone was crazy.

In just one day, there were thousands of fights in feihaizhou, because only 1000 entered the secret territory.

And only one person is allowed to enter each key.

One day later, the killing developed to a white hot stage. The temptation of the Immortal Emperor’s heritage made these friars completely crazy, and the whole feihaizhou almost turned into a smoke battlefield.

Finally, the first 100 zongmen of feihaizhou united to maintain the situation, and organized a meeting to enter the Taigu secret place. People who have mastered the key go to Taigu secret place, and others are not allowed to rob. The group in front of us is the 1000 people who have obtained the key. Xu Wei suddenly realized that they were preparing to kill Er Gouzi three days ago. The area had already been set up by his own people to prohibit external contact. Naturally, he didn’t receive any news. After listening to the cause and effect, everyone showed a happy look. Fortunately, they didn’t receive the news. Otherwise, if they participated in the killing, they didn’t know whether they could survive. Now Xu que led them through the ghost valley. Although it was dangerous, he didn’t lose any people and horses. It was a blessing in misfortune Fortunately, master Tang is with us. ” Yes, thank you, master Tang. ” People expressed their gratitude one after another, but Xu lacked an absent-minded look and wandered away Er Gouzi, the key you made? ” At this time, he is connecting two dogs with communication jade. “There are no one thousand people here waiting to rob the Immortal Emperor’s heritage.” At the other end, the two dogs made a fuss and said, “how is it possible? God’s key. Do you still need your son to open the way? I’ve already gone in and fished up the bottom! ” Whether Er Gouzi lied or not, Xu que could tell as soon as he heard it. This time, he was really telling the truth. Xu que touched his chin. Where did these so-called keys come from Can you show me the key? ” Xu que reaches out to qingziwen. Under the instruction of qingsuyi, qingziwen handed over the key to Xu deficient’s hand. It’s a stone with flowing clouds on it. It’s a cloud stone used by Xu Weifang to open the door

chapters.title: Chapter 1776
chapters.body:
Chapter 1776

Chapter 1776

C.1776

After looking down for a moment, Xu que returns the moire stone to qingziwen.

Although the moire stone and the moire stone in Xu Xu’s hand were very similar, Xu Xu keenly felt the difference.

The content of immortal yuan and magic Qi in moire stone is very low, almost undetected.

Combined with the current situation, he vaguely guessed the way to enter the Taigu secret place.

As a key, moire stone is actually just a carrier. What really opens the door should be the hidden Xianyuan and magic Qi.

In fact, this is obvious from the fact that they can enter together, while others can only enter alone.

It is only because the moire stone in his hand contains more immortal yuan and magic Qi, and the place of ghost valley should be regarded as the main gate, so he did this.

But with a lack of ability, I can only think of here.

As for who made these moire stones, he didn’t know what purpose they were distributed so wantonly.

After all, I’m not an immortal.

But the only thing he can be sure of is that this ancient secret place in front of him is definitely not a treasure house for people to take.

Among them, there is a huge crisis!

Since entering the ancient secret realm, the previous sense of crisis has become more and more serious. At this time, it is like a shadow pressing on his heart, making him a little out of breath.

“What forces are here? Can a Taoist friend explain it? ” Xu Ke said.

After hearing qingsuyi’s story, qingziwen has regarded Xu que as an eminent monk. At this time, he volunteered to explain to Xu que.

“Tang Daoyou, there are eight forces present, of which four Tianmen occupy four directions, while the other four forces are our green bamboo gate, desire demon sect, Lieyang Valley and Muxu mountain.” Maiziwen’s fingers passed one by one on the head not far away.

In addition to the four heavenly gates, the other four forces are the first under the heavenly gate, and the most monks come in.

Besides the friars of these forces, there are many lucky casual practitioners who got the moire stone and entered here.

When qingziwen explained, Xu que always focused on the forces of the four heavenly gates and wanted to find the figure he expected.

Qingziwen noticed Xu Ke’s eyes and said curiously, “master Tang, do you have any familiar friends in Tianmen?”

Xu que took back his eyes, pressed down his desire at the bottom of his heart, folded his hands and said, “Amitabha, I heard that a Yurou fairy came out of the four heavenly gates. He has unparalleled talent, so I want to see if the fairy has come.”

Qingziwen understood and said with a smile, “master, you’re going to be disappointed. It’s said that the feather and soft fairy is practicing in Tianmen recently. It’s estimated that she doesn’t have time to come.”

After a pause, he said with emotion: “if I say, these four immortal emperors really regard Yurou fairy as their own daughter. They not only have a steady stream of natural materials and earth treasures, but also give all their unique skills. I’m afraid we will call them Yurou Immortal Emperor in less than a hundred years.”

Qingsu Yi then said, “I’m afraid even her own daughter is not so good. There are not no offspring under the Immortal Emperor, but have you ever seen any offspring taken care of by the Immortal Emperor?”

“Yes, but fairy Yurou’s talent spans xianyunzhou. It’s also right to have this treatment…”

Xu Ke frowned slightly and then stretched out again.

Don’t worry, don’t worry. Now I haven’t recovered my cultivation. It’s unrealistic to break through the gate of heaven.

A little carelessness may also involve Jiang Hongyan and others. After all, everyone knows that their relationship with Jiang Hongyan and others is extraordinary.

Soon, with their own talents and systems, they will be able to break through to the emperor of heaven in the shortest time!

At that time, Tianmen can no longer stop me!

Yurou, wait for me

Fa Hui glanced over at Xu Ke and whispered, “elder martial brother, as a Buddha, you can’t move your mind.”

Xu que curled his lips and ignored him at all.

Shit Buddha!

Really think I want to be?

When I deceive these two deficiencies, I will leave office immediately!

He looked around and found that Murong Yunhai seemed unnatural and was slowly shrinking back.

The same was true of the younger martial brothers who came with him. They all looked embarrassed and seemed to want to hide from someone.

Xu Ke suddenly became curious.

As disciples of the Immortal Emperor, these disciples are rightfully overlords in this place. If God stops killing God and Buddha, they won’t be so embarrassed?

While he was wondering, he suddenly heard a powerful roar.

“Tianmen, Tianmen, unparalleled in the world! For generations, unify the Jianghu! Look to the future, bigger and stronger! ”

At the front, a group of people gathered together and shouted slogans.

It is majestic and magnificent, if you ignore the slogans they shout.

Where did you get this local product?

Looking around, I found that the monks around gathered their eyes on Murong Yunhai and others Which monk is this? ” Xu kuchong asked qingsuyi beside him. Qingsuyi smiled and said, “they are the friars of the four heavenly gates…” Xu que was even more surprised. Are the monks of the four heavenly gates special? Two fools Ladies and gentlemen, we’d better hurry to find the Immortal Emperor’s heritage. ” Xu Ke made a quick decision. I can’t wait. Xiaorou will be a fool if she stays in Tianmen again. The group of decorators who came in with Xu que were quite convinced of Xu que. At this time, when they heard his proposal, they almost didn’t hesitate and were ready to take action. As for Murong Yunhai and others, they expressed their deep shame on the people of Tianmen, so they also decided to follow Xu vacancy. According to the map, if you want to get the Immortal Emperor’s heritage, you have to go through at least four levels and one final level. Through these five checkpoints, you can enter the place where the Immortal Emperor’s heritage is located. Compared with the final legacy, these so-called checkpoints are insignificant. Just as they were about to leave, the trouble came to the door Yo, isn’t this Murong Yunhai? Why are you a follower now? ” A monk in white came over with disdain in his eyes, “I can’t get along in Tianmen, so I’m in the limelight in these wastes?” Who is this? ” Xu que asked curiously. The friar waved his hand and said with a smile, “Tianmen dragon boils the sky!” Xu que suddenly stared round his eyes and looked at each other up and down: “are you really called long Aotian?” Is this still false? ” The man was immediately angry. Bang! Without saying a word, Xu Ke waved his fist directly to the bridge of his nose. Long Aotian was caught off guard and was hit with nosebleed. Xu Wei glanced at his fist and murmured, “it’s a Xibei… I really thought it was long Aotian coming.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1777
chapters.body:
Chapter 1777

Chapter 1777

C.1777

WOW!

Xu’s lack of this fist immediately aroused everyone’s exclamation.

“My God! The monk beat the dragon to boil the sky! ”

“Well, long Aotian is the smallest in Tianmen. The monk will be unlucky.”

“Good fight! Long Aotian’s goods are not pleasing to the eye. It makes him drag like 250000 a day. ”

It can be seen that the popularity of long Aotian among monks is not good, and even Murong Yunhai cheered a little.

This name is too easy to be misunderstood. Xu Xu thought it was the rumored dragon Aotian. At this time, he felt a little guilty when he learned that he had dialed the wrong person.

“I’m really sorry. I thought it was a shameless man, so I subconsciously took action.” Xu que quickly changed into a kind smiling face and put his hands together, “Amitabha, please make atonement.”

Long Aotian was ready to do it. Seeing Xu Que’s attitude was good, he snorted coldly: “see Chu better next time! Today, Ben Shao won’t bother with you. The astrologer in Tianmen told Ben Shao that he rou’er shouldn’t see blood before marriage… ”

Xu que was stunned when he heard the speech: “benefactor, what did you just say?”

“I don’t care about you?”

“Before marrying rou’er?”

Xu que turned to Murong Yunhai and said, “is what he said true? He wants to marry fairy Yurou? ”

Murong Yunhai looked contemptuous: “you heard him fart. Master didn’t say he wanted to find a partner for fairy Yurou at all. This fool pretended to be fairy Yurou’s fiance outside all day and was killed sooner or later!”

Xu Kui took a deep breath and forced down the anger in his chest.

Shit, how dare you spread rumors outside!

If I let this girl go out alive today, I won’t be surnamed Xu!

Originally, he was ready to do it directly. If Murong Yunhai hadn’t said that there was no such thing at all, he was afraid that he would have fought now.

“Ladies and gentlemen, the map shows that the first gate of the Immortal Emperor’s heritage is the guardian of the ancient secret land.” Xu Wei didn’t want to see the fool again. He turned around and said to Murong Yunhai and others, “now what we have to do is find the guardian, defeat him, and we can enter the next level.”

Whether it is the map obtained by Xu que or the moire stone obtained by others, there is an introduction to the assessment of Taigu secret place.

So it was not just them, but more than a thousand monks who were present, moved together and began to look for guardians in this area.

Half an hour later, the scattered people gathered together, all of them bitter.

“What’s going on? This place doesn’t even have a bird. Where’s the guardian? ”

“Yes, I’ve been looking around here for three times just now. I didn’t even find a fart.”

“This level should not be false?”

They shared the information they got and found that none of them found the existence of the guardian.

The environment here is so big that you can’t find it at all!

“Er Gouzi, where have you been?” Xu que contacted Er Gouzi with communication jade.

“We’re on the outside. We don’t know where the guardian is.” Er Gouzi whispered, “by the way, there is a hint on the original map that the guardian is hidden in the most conspicuous place.”

The most conspicuous place?

Xu Wei looked around, except that the mountains are trees, or the wilderness under his feet. Where is the most conspicuous… Wait!

He glanced up and down again at the mountain in front of him, and suddenly he couldn’t close his mouth.

what the fuck!

It can’t be true!

“Everyone… I seem to know where the guardian is…” Xu Ke swallowed a mouthful of water and said slowly.

The rest of the friars were excited when they heard the speech and surrounded Xu vacancy to ask questions.

Xu que licked his lips and pointed to the mountain in front of him: “look… Does this mountain look like a sitting person?”

They were stunned, flew back, opened the distance and looked at the mountain from a distance.

“Lying trough!”

“NIMA! Are you kidding? ”

“Day! This is the guardian? ”

In an instant, one after another, shocked curses sounded, full of incredible emotions.

In their eyes, the mountain was like a giant sitting on his knees, and the top of the mountain was the head buried between his knees.

Murong Yunhai murmured, “don’t be kidding… This is not what normal people can beat at all?”

Although most mortals would describe them as monks by moving mountains and reclaiming the sea, they can do this.

But that’s only within the scope of ability, such as moving a hundred meters hill.

The mountain in front of us is at least fifty feet!

I’m not even as good as ants standing at the foot of the mountain!

Don’t talk about fighting. As long as the guardian wakes up and steps down casually, one of those present can’t run away.

“Why don’t we think about it and think about it in the long run?” Qing Suyi suggested carefully. The other leaders looked at each other and immediately agreed loudly It deserves to be the pillar of the green bamboo gate. It’s really safe. ” Careful thinking, clear logic and admiration. ” In the future, learn more from the young Taoist friends. Hey, by the way, which way is the way out? ” They have made up their mind that as soon as they go out, they will bring all the combat power in the sect immediately. As for whether you can come in… Aren’t there so many other people present? At that time, the admission tickets will be reshuffled! After all, only a thousand people were present. Isn’t it like tickling the guardian Whoosh! ” Just as they were preparing to evacuate, an empty sound sounded. Then there was a continuous “whoosh” and “whoosh” sound. I saw a streamer flying out of every Friar and flying towards the mountain It’s our moire stone! ” Someone exclaimed. When everyone didn’t react, a whole thousand moire stones flew into the mountains. The next second, a violent tremor came from the earth, and the whole mountain began to shake. Without saying a word, Xu que turned around and ran back. When others saw this, they didn’t react at all until they heard Xu Que’s roar Run! The guardian is coming back to life! ” Everyone turned pale and finally realized where the tremor on the ground came from. A giant who sits 50 feet, stands up at least 80 feet. Can such a giant stand up without shaking the ground? As they ran, they suddenly reacted and looked desperate. Moire stone was sucked away. These people are locked up here! What a fart!

chapters.title: Chapter 1778
chapters.body:
Chapter 1778

Chapter 1778

C.1778

As a gathering place of strong people, xianyunzhou has experienced countless ups and downs.

And the fairy kings and immortals present, all of them have excellent accomplishments and unique skills. What great storms and waves have you never seen?

Murong Yunhai thought that he would never have any fear, at least in the face of a mountain giant just 50 feet high.

“If you want to get the Immortal Emperor’s heritage, you must go through this level.” He looked at the crowd and encouraged, “Fifty foot mountain guards, can’t we defeat them? How is it possible that we are immortal Zun! ”

In addition to his slogan of the four sons of Tianmen, Murong Yunhai is actually a leader with great speech ability, which makes Xu Wei feel very strange.

Logically speaking, such a figure is not at the level of crane tail among the disciples of Immortal Emperor, is it?

I think so. This is a world of cultivating immortals. Charismatic leaders are better than killing millions of people here.

However, although Murong Yunhai said so, they still didn’t have much confidence.

The environment of Xianyun island is different from that of Tianzhou and Dizhou. Although the per capita cultivation has been improved, the rules are more firm because it is closer to the way of heaven.

Whether it is the hardness of stone or the strength of space, it is more than a piece stronger than Tianzhou and Dizhou.

In Tianzhou, Xu Ke can destroy hundreds of feet of high mountains with one palm, but not in xianyunzhou.

He tried on the surrounding rocks, and the hardness was at least ten times that of Tianzhou.

“With such an environment and such a strong aura of heaven and earth…” Xu que came to an emotional conclusion, “the friars in xianyunzhou are really a group of waste firewood.”

Such a good time and place, but because of the rule of the four immortal emperors, there is no strong sense of competition due to perennial peace, and the overall combat level is lower than that of Tianzhou.

I took a look at the Tianmen people who are still shouting slogans, um… Maybe I have IQ.

At the time of invading Tianzhou, if it was not because the overall cultivation level was much higher than Tianzhou, it was unknown who would win or lose.

“But it’s still thanks to the peerless force saint, otherwise Tianzhou will be doomed.” Xu que thought naturally.

After the moire stone was absorbed, a voice sounded in everyone’s mind, telling them that the mountain giant would start within an hour after someone entered here.

This hour is a preparation time for everyone.

“No, we shouldn’t have an hour.” Qingziwen said strangely, “in fact… They had been in for a long time before you came in.”

Then he pointed to the people of the four heavenly gates.

Xu Ke was stunned: “how much time do we have now?”

“About… A quarter of an hour.”

good heavens!

Xu Xu was surprised at that time. Tianmen guys really didn’t succeed enough, but failed more.

After staying here for almost an hour, NIMA patronized and shouted slogans?

At this time, with a pair of arrogant eyes, long Aotian proudly said: “no preparation, just a guardian, my fist is enough to break it!”

Murong Yunhai was worried: “this place is the heritage of the Immortal Emperor. This guardian must not be simple. It is absolutely impossible for any of us to pass through with our own strength.”

“That’s because you’re so useless.” Long Aotian’s thumb stood up firmly, “I am the first disciple of the Immortal Emperor. What can’t I do?”

Murong Yunhai was speechless.

Xu kuhao said strangely, “this guy is really a first disciple?”

“Don’t listen to his boasting. He’s in the top five at most.” Murong Yunhai disdained, “there are only four true Immortal Emperor’s first disciples. They meditate in the Tianmen gate on weekdays and won’t come out easily.”

Oh… I see. Feeling is also a waste wood.

Xu que suddenly knew it, turned to one side, sat cross legged and began to think about how to pass this level.

During his meditation, Chen Mo came to the gathering place of the desire demon sect and gathered with the people of the sect.

The people looked at their eldest martial brother with a disheartened face and were shocked.

“Elder martial brother, what’s the matter with you?”

“Elder martial brother, have you finally been humiliated and retaliated for your evil deeds?”

“Elder martial brother, this day will come sooner or later. It’s good for you to face it earlier.”

Chen Mo was distracted and slapped his backhand, which made the talking disciple dizzy.

“Shut up!” Chen Mo Yin wore a face and said in a cold voice, “I want the demon clan to have the inheritance of the Immortal Emperor. In addition, there is another task, that is, find a way to kill the bald head for me.”

When the disciples of the demon sect heard the speech, they looked at the only two bald heads in the field.

First, he stopped on Xu Ke for a moment, and then his eyes moved to Fa Hui.

After pondering for a moment, the people showed a suddenly enlightened expression So is it the big monk who insulted you, senior brother? ” Elder martial brother, you have a crush on the little monk, so do you want to kill the big monk? ” Elder martial brother, although we don’t prohibit adultery, it’s the first time we have had an indescribable affair with a Buddhist disciple. We deserve to be the leader of our school! ” Chen Mo: “……” NIMA’s, did I join the desire demon sect when my brain was broken? Seeing that the time for an hour was approaching, the people got up and were ready. Even though longaotianfang showed his confidence different from ordinary people, the big guys didn’t take his words seriously – after all, only fools would think that the guardian of the Immortal Emperor’s legacy was easy to deal with. You know, that’s the Immortal Emperor! It’s so easy for a strong man who covers the world and is invincible to get his heritage? Only this stupid fool with a bad brain can feel that he can fight the guardian. The dignified atmosphere began to spread, and everyone stared at the mountain. Rumble – the earth began to tremble, gravel splashed down from the mountain, and the whole mountain stood up with the naked eye. Fifty feet… Eighty feet… One hundred feet… Everyone stared at the giant rising in front of them. They were completely stupid, and there was only one idea left in their hearts. What’s so special? I saw that the mountain, which was only 50 feet high, stood up and directly turned into a mountain giant as high as 200 feet! After a long time, someone finally murmured, “this thing… There are more than 100 feet hidden underground?” Xu Xu is also stupid at this time. Do you still play like this? The feelings exposed outside at the beginning are just a head! Before everyone reacted, the giant seemed to have found their existence, and his huge palm suddenly pressed down on them

chapters.title: Chapter 1779
chapters.body:
Chapter 1779

Chapter 1779

C.1779

“Spread out!” Murong Yunhai reacted first and roared back towards the rear.

The rest of them were immediately inspired and hurried away.

Boom!

The giant palm fell and splashed countless smoke. When you could see it again, there was only a pit several feet deep in front of you, and several fairy kings who had not had time to respond were pressed below.

“This speed is too fast…” Murong Yunhai murmured.

Just now, if he hadn’t been vigilant and sent out a reminder in time, I’m afraid many people were pressed inside.

It’s huge. It shouldn’t be so fast

At this time, the monks around were also stunned. They looked up at the figure blocking out the sun in front of them, and a desperate beauty filled their hearts.

In front of this mountain giant, they are as small as ants.

“It’s too big…”

“What did the Immortal Emperor do… To make such a huge giant?”

“Can we really get through the first level?”

Everyone was stunned and didn’t know what to do.

“Don’t stare. If we don’t knock this guy down, we won’t even see the Immortal Emperor’s legacy!” Murong Yunhai roared when he saw that the giant was going to launch a second attack.

With that, he was full of immortal yuan and was the first to kill the giant.

Other monks also reacted and rushed up behind Murong Yunhai.

Bang!
