In an instant, the immortal Dharma was everywhere, and all kinds of attacks collided together, forming a bright streamer, completely drowning the giant in it.

After a round of attack, they stopped and stared at the rolling smoke.

There are a thousand immortal kings and statues. Unless the Immortal Emperor is alive, no matter how powerful you are, you won’t have a chance to survive?

A monk who wanted to demon sect bravely stepped forward and flew to the edge of the smoke to try to check.

Boom!

The huge palm suddenly popped out of the smoke, grabbed the friar directly and retracted into the smoke.

“Ah! Help me! I don’t want to die… ”

A shrill wail came out, but it disappeared a moment later, only a “quack quack” sound came out of the smoke.

When they heard the sound, they were thrilled.

“This… That guy won’t be eaten?”

“Are you kidding? A fairy king was eaten directly?”

“It’s terrible! How can this Guardian be so powerful? ”

If you were killed, it doesn’t matter to everyone present, but now this way of death is too bloody.

No friar can accept the end of being eaten by a mountain giant!

A moment later, the smoke dispersed and the mountain giant appeared intact in front of the people.

The attack was too hasty just now. Until this time, the people really saw the appearance of the guardian in front of them for the first time.

The guardian is two hundred feet high and stands on this wilderness, like a giant pillar connecting the sky and the earth.

So powerful!

This is not their opponent!

“He has a barrier.” Xu Ke, with sharp eyes, found something wrong and raised his hand to fight out with a Buddhist secret.

The Golden Buddha light fell on the giant, and a thin light mask appeared around the giant in an instant, which aroused ripples by the Buddha light.

A moment later, the Buddha light dispersed, and the giant was not affected.

Seeing this scene, the people finally woke up. Why did the joint attack of the people just now have no effect at all.

The giant is immune to magic!

It’s so far from the spectrum!

Murong Yunhai was the first to exclaim: “it’s impossible! How can immortal immunity exist in this world? ”

Immortal Dharma immunity itself is an impossible thing.

The immortal Dharma itself is the support of the monk’s battle. In a sense, the normal operation of the monk’s skill can be classified into the immortal Dharma.

If we say that immortal Dharma is immune, it means that we should be immune to the operation of all forces. Friars themselves have no way to exercise Dharma, or even practice.

“No, it’s possible.” Qing Su Yi said in a deep voice, “have you seen this giant attack us so far?”

“You mean, the guardian will not make any decisions. This level is to test whether we can pass this level with our flesh?” Murong Yunhai only felt absurd, “how is it possible? No friar can fight against a mountain giant of two hundred feet purely by his flesh! ”

Low level friars may cultivate the body, but after reaching a certain level of cultivation, they must inevitably begin to understand the great road.

From that moment on, all the growth in strength came from the understanding of the road, the mastery of the law, and even the growth in the flesh. It can be said that the physical strength of all the monks present is actually the same, but the difference is only in the mastery of Dharma and Avenue. While they were talking, the mountain giant began to move. Bang! The huge fist burst out and burst into the air. Several friars didn’t react at all and were directly beaten upside down. When he was still flying in mid air, his bones were broken and his tendons were broken, and he spewed blood in a big mouth Spread out! We can’t stop it! ” Murong Yunhai gave a loud drink and quickly withdrew. Immortal Dharma immunity, on behalf of their own body protection, will never have any effect. Two hundred feet of giant punch down, that is how terrible power, and even vaguely distorted the space! The eight forces were transformed into eight camps, each into an array, staring warily at the giant in front of them Master Tang, what can you do? ” Qingsuyi came to Xu Xu and asked sincerely. Xu missed the Buddha’s name: “Amitabha, I don’t have any good way to do this.” I’m kidding. It’s a giant of two hundred feet, not two feet! Even you guys can’t stop it. Can I stand it as a weak monk? At this moment, the voice of two dogs came: “can you hear me? Have you found the guardian now? ” Xu Ke was stunned and replied with his mind: “yes, a giant of two hundred feet! Let’s find a chance later and see if we can go directly to the second level. ” No! The mountain giant can be subdued! ” Er Gouzi said anxiously, “just now we found relevant records in the documents we got before. As long as the mountain giant is defeated, he can recognize the Lord!” Xu que took a step forward without saying a word and roared: “my blood is boiling! Let me fight! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1780
chapters.body:
Chapter 1780

Chapter 1780

C.1780

Qingsuyi was already a little discouraged. After all, the giant was not only huge and powerful, but also immune to immortals.

It’s impossible to fight!

Although it is said that there are some sects specialized in body refining in xianyunzhou, even if they come, they can’t defeat the giant.

After all, the disciples of the sect who refined their body were just photographed directly.

At this time, seeing Xu Wei suddenly look very warlike, qingsuyi was a little surprised: “master Tang… Didn’t you just say there was no way?”

Xu que looked solemn and solemn. Zhuang Zheng said seriously, “I can’t bear to see that all my Taoist friends are suffering so much. It’s the so-called saying that if I don’t go to hell, who goes to hell will save people’s lives. Saving people’s lives is better than building a seven level floating slaughter. As a Buddhist of our sect, I should have the obligation to save the world.”

His words were dignified, and the monks around him burst into tears.

What’s this called?

Eminent monk!

“But…”

“Nothing but! My blood is boiling. Let everyone back away. I’ll suppress the giant with the Buddhist Vajra secret method today! ” Xu que interrupted qingsuyi’s words, and his tone was firm and could not be refused.

“Ha ha…”

Chen Mo showed a cruel smile on his face and waved to the disciples of the fish demon sect to step back.

Long Aotian also sneered twice and motioned the disciples of Tianmen to stay away from the battlefield.

Two groups of people and Xu Wei have hatred. Naturally, it is impossible to come forward to help at this time.

As for the others, they could not help shaking their heads. They just felt that the monk didn’t force them to count.

Just a Buddhist disciple in fairyland, who even talks nonsense about suppressing the giant with Buddhist secret methods?

It’s wishful thinking!

Most Buddhist disciples are notoriously weak in physical cultivation.

As we all know, Buddhism is most concerned about one fate method, which focuses on understanding. It is impossible to practice hard in Buddhism, except for ascetic monks.

Therefore, most of their physical bodies do not practice. When fighting with Buddhist disciples, many monks adhere to the truth that close body is victory.

Of course, it doesn’t rule out that there are Buddhist disciples who specialize in practicing the Buddhist Vajra secret method, but the strength of the body is only slightly better than that of ordinary monks, and it is by no means the opponent of this giant.

What’s more, the physical strength of the great monk doesn’t seem so strong. After all, cultivation is there.

How strong can the flesh body be in the cultivation of fairyland?

Fa Hui didn’t agree with Xu Ke this time, but was worried and said, “senior brother, although you have the secret Dharma of Buddhism, but…”

He didn’t finish what he said later. He followed Xu Wei all the time. Naturally, he knew that Xu Wei had mastered the secret Dharma of Buddhism, but he didn’t master those body refining skills.

Even if it is mastered, the giant’s strength is unprecedented. I’m afraid only the recovery of the ancient Buddha in that year can match it.

“Stop it. I have made up my mind. Today I am fighting for my faith!” Xu que waved his big hand and went straight to the giant.

I’m kidding. I became a holy body and forced the king’s fist to be unparalleled in the world. In ancient times, there was no way to force the holy body.

A mere giant of two hundred feet is scum!

He flew all the way to the side of the giant. Just as he was about to tear off his clothes and reveal the big words of the holy body on his chest, he suddenly stopped and remembered a very key problem.

What’s special? Only you are the one who has the holy body on the whole Xianyun island!

Now there is another holy body, isn’t it revealing your identity?

Xu que suddenly made a mistake. There is no way to hide the physical strength of the holy body. Once the fight starts, someone will recognize it.

After all, this is not a rural place like Tianzhou and Dizhou. Although these two lack strength, they have a lot of knowledge.

But now that you’ve all come, you can’t go down in despair, can you?

What’s more, if you knock down the giant in public, it’s a big wave of forced value!

In Xu Ke’s eyes, the friars below are a bunch of leeks to be cut. It’s really hurting Tianhe if they don’t take them!

“We have to find a way…” Xu que touched his chin and thought.

The monks at the bottom have stopped moving when they see Xu vacancy coming forward, and quietly watched Xu vacancy’s performance.

Seeing that he suddenly stopped, everyone immediately talked about it.

“Why did the monk suddenly stop moving?”

Murong Yunhai frowned and stared at Xu que.

Although the Tang Sanzang master had shown amazing strength before, it was only because Buddhism had a restraining effect on ghosts. At present, the mountain giant, the Buddhist secret law can’t play a role at all.

Chen Mo sneered repeatedly and his eyes were full of happiness: “hum, this guy is beyond his ability. Do you think he is the reincarnation of the real Buddha? And want to fight this giant! ”

Long Aotian is watching Xu Ke faintly. He doesn’t know what he’s thinking. As an excellent disciple of Tianmen, long Aotian is extremely proud. In his eyes, Xu Ke is just an insignificant role. Even if the other party punched himself, long Aotian thought he didn’t have to be angry because of this little thing. On the road to Becoming Immortal Emperor, this little man couldn’t attract his attention at all. But now, this little character actually stood up and wanted to get rid of the giant who couldn’t even handle it in front of many excellent colleagues in xianyunzhou. It made him very uncomfortable Wait! ” Long Aotian suddenly opened his mouth, jumped and flew out. The rest of the monks, including Xu que, looked at long Aotian with puzzled eyes. What’s this guy doing here? I saw long Aotian fly to Xu Xu’s side and stand proudly: “step down, you can’t bear this great task at all.” Xu Wei was stunned and then became angry. Mom, sell a batch! It’s OK to spread rumors outside. Now you dare to pretend to be more powerful than Ben? I really won’t give you some color today. You don’t know how many eyes Lord Ma has Er Gouzi, guardian, what do you say here? ” Xu que contacted Er Gouzi with communication jade Under normal conditions, the guardian will only attack his attacker. ” The voice of turning the book came from the other end of Er Gouzi, “but if someone tries to pick him alone, he will enter a state of rage.” Without saying anything, Xu que slapped longaotian on the shoulder: “good brother, come on.” In the confused eyes of long Aotian, Xu que directly landed and looked at long Aotian. Lang said, “Taoist friend, be careful, he’s going to beat you soon.” Long Aotian sneered and said without looking back: “joke, will my disciple be afraid? Besides, do you really think you are the descendant of the Immortal Emperor and can command the giant? ” As soon as the voice fell, a scream came Elder martial brother, look ahead! ” Long Aotian turned back, and a huge shadow of boxing gradually magnified in front of him

chapters.title: Chapter 1781
chapters.body:
Chapter 1781

Chapter 1781

C.1781

Bang!

The deafening roar exploded. In the stunned gaze of the people, long Aotian drew a perfect arc and fell into the distance.

“Well done!” Murong Yunhai gave a happy low cry and waved his fist. “I see this guy is not pleasing to the eye!”

Go away, silly!

Murong Yunhai noticed Xu Ke’s action and vaguely felt something wrong.

“Master Tang, do you know that the guardian will attack him?” Murong Yunhai asked tentatively.

Xu Kuyi said righteously, “how possible! The poor monk is also the first time to come. He was just a kind reminder. ”

“Well…”

Murong Yunhai was skeptical. Chen Mo’s fate was ahead. He had no doubt that Xu Wei deliberately made the scene just now.

Although I don’t know how Xu Ke did it, it must have something to do with him.

“His ability is unfathomable… It’s better to offend less in the future.”

Murong Yunhai told his younger martial brothers not to offend Xu que.

Not only because of the Buddha’s identity, but also because of his incredible abilities.

There are records about Buddha in the books in Tianmen.

None of the previous Buddhas had such incredible abilities as Xu Kuang. Even the Buddha who was all powerful in Xianyun island could not do so.

What’s more, the Tang Sanzang master now has only fairyland.

What kind of ability should he have if he arrived at xianzun state in the future?

“Wait… Something’s wrong?” Murong Yunhai suddenly felt something different and looked up at Xu que.

After the episode of long Aotian, when everyone exclaimed, Xu Ke flew to the giant again.

“Why did he go again?”

“Hasn’t the Dragon boiled the sky taught him a lesson? The disciples of Tianmen have been beaten away. What can he do in a fairyland?”

“Who the hell is this guy? Will anyone tell me about it? ”

The friars who followed Xu que to break out of the ghost valley were suddenly refreshed.

Finally found a chance!

The experience on the way just now can be said to be ups and downs. Unfortunately, after arriving at the Taigu secret place, I still didn’t find a chance to tell. Now I can finally say it and pretend to be forced.

“You don’t know that. It’s a contemporary Buddha. I’ll tell you…”

Such words began to spread among the crowd.

Soon, everyone knew Xu Xu’s identity.

“Unexpectedly, it would be a contemporary Buddhist son of Buddhism.”

“The Buddha seems to have some strength.”

“Unfortunately, it’s just fairyland. If our cultivation is higher, we may still have hope.”

After knowing Xu Ke’s identity as a Buddha, people didn’t have much expectation.

Moreover, everyone has doubts about Xu Ke’s deeds. On the contrary, Chen Mo has been asked all the time.

The performance in the ghost valley was widely spread by others, repeatedly whipping corpses.

“Chen Mo, I heard you kowtowed at the entrance?”

“I heard you were abused by female ghosts? Sorry… ”

Listening to these rumors, Chen Mo was so angry that he turned red and trembled all over.

Tang Sanzang… I’ll kill you sooner or later!

The farce below was completely unnoticed by Xu que.

At this time, his mind was completely focused on the system.

After searching through the system just now, Xu que finally found a prop suitable for fighting against giants.

That’s what men dream of and want to have!

“Come out!”

Xu que gave a low roar, and the installed force value just accumulated fell like running water.

A handle appeared on his right hand with a big red button.

Xu que raised his hand, the button fell, and the illusory light flowed around him, emitting golden light, forming a huge illusory body.

At this time, the crowd had stopped moving and looked up at the scene in mid air, and their eyes were gradually filled with shock.

“Is this special… What is it?”

“Does Buddhism exist like this?”

“My mother…”

Everyone was stunned.

A loud roar echoed in the air.

“Diga!”

At this time, Xu Xu’s figure has disappeared, the surging light and shadow spread, and a huge figure is pouring out in the light.

A passionate BGM began to blow.

“Like the sun through the night, the dawn quietly across the horizon!”

“Whose figure shuttles between reincarnation, the future road is at your feet!”

“Don’t be sad, don’t be afraid, look forward to tomorrow with confidence!” A new storm has appeared. How can we stop! ” Through time and space, I will come to you! ” Smile in the face of danger, dreams come true will not be far away! ” Summon up courage and move forward firmly, and miracles will surely appear! ” The impassioned lyrics echoed in our ears, and a sense of pride poured out of everyone’s heart for no reason. A blue and white figure appeared in front of me. The curve of the body was smooth and natural, containing explosive power, and the light on the chest was shining blue. Diga Altman Guardian, let me defeat you with this Buddhist Vajra secret method! ” Xu Ke’s voice came out of Altman’s mouth. At the same time, a huge figure came forward and fought with the giants. Boom! For a time, the earth trembled and splashed at any time. The two giants were like a great * * war, which shocked everyone. Xu que punched the guardian in the face and directly blasted his head. Everyone was stunned. Is this special… Is it a Buddhist secret? Don’t fool us because we read less! Xu kuchang breathed, and the huge figure slowly disappeared Shit, it takes me so much to install force value, but I really only have three minutes to use. ” Xu lacked a dark scold, but looked at the crazy rising forced value, a burst of satisfaction in his heart. This wave is not bad Master Tang, did you just say that is the Vajra secret of Buddhism? ” Murong Yunhai was the first to greet him and said with a shocked face That’s right. ” Xu que said confidently Ah…… “Murong Yunhai was speechless for a moment. Rao had never seen it before and would not believe it at all. However, the guardian of the first level passed. Just when they thought that they could enter the second level right away, suddenly the world changed dramatically, and countless black gases poured out from the bottom of the earth and wrapped everyone. Caught off guard, everyone’s figure suddenly disappeared in place, and Xu que was no exception. When he woke up again, there was a kind old man in front of him Young man, you defeated the guardian? ” The old man asked with a smile, “now the emperor will give you the inheritance. Are you willing to accept it?” Xu Kuan was stunned and cut off the railway: “I don’t accept food from you! Not accepted

chapters.title: Chapter 1782
chapters.body:
Chapter 1782

Chapter 1782

C.1782

The old man was stunned by Xu’s answer. After a long time, he murmured, “do you know who I am…”

“You know, Immortal Emperor, the dead one.”

“Then why did you refuse me?”

Hum, do you think I’m stupid?

Where is such a legacy?

Xu que rolled his eyes at the bottom of his heart. He didn’t have to think about it at all. He knew there must be fraud.

The most important point is that the black gas just gushed out makes me feel very familiar.

Not long ago, I just felt that power in the exterminating desert.

The evil spirit of foreign demons!

Linking the events before and after entering the Taigu secret place, Xu Ke already had some speculation in his heart.

This speculation shocked him, and even began to doubt whether this situation also happened inside Tianmen.

“Don’t beat around the bush with me, old man. I know you’re not the dead Immortal Emperor.” There was no one around, and Xu lacked didn’t intend to hide. “What do you want to do with me alone? Just say it.”

The old man was stunned and his face became ferocious: “how did you see it?”

“If I say your IQ is really low, you have made so many moire stones as keys to attract a large number of monks. If I guess right, the guardian was not so strong at the beginning, right?” Xu que sneered, “you made the guardian like this in order to make the friar die in the first level. As for what to do… I think you want to get out of trouble?”

“Am I wrong? Foreign demons. ”

Xu que looked directly at each other and said word by word.

The old man’s face sank completely and stared at Xu Xu ruthlessly: “who are you? Why do you know my origin? ”

Xu que was happy at once: “I’ll just cheat you. Is it so easy to cheat? Don’t be a foreign devil. Go back and find a factory to work. ”

“Hum, now that you know, you can’t stay.”

Xu Xu knew that he was right.

The whole Taigu secret place was actually a conspiracy from the beginning.

So many moire stones, including the guardian, were all made by the old man.

The purpose is to attract a large number of monks to enter here and become blood food for him to get out of trouble. This is why there are both immortal yuan and magic Qi in the moire stone.

The old man is an extraterritorial demon.

As for why there were foreign demons in the Immortal Emperor’s heritage, Xu que didn’t know. The old man should have found that he had defeated the guardian, so he was in a hurry and tried to carry himself out.

If you promise to inherit the legacy of the Immortal Emperor, you may never get out.

“The devil has been locked here by the damn Immortal Emperor for thousands of years. It’s not easy to get out of trouble. How can you be a friar who doesn’t even master the avenue?” The old man said coldly, “this evil spirit is made by my sacrifice for many years. You can turn into dead bones in it.”

Then the old man turned and left.

There are so many monks to deal with. I tried my best to get rid of the oppression. As long as I can devour these monks, I can escape here.

Thinking of this, the old man’s face became more and more ferocious: “when I get out of trouble, I must have xianyunzhou corpses everywhere!”

“What are you talking about?” A voice suddenly sounded nearby.

The old man’s heart jumped, subconsciously looked aside and found Xu Weizheng smiling at himself.

“How did you escape?” The old man looked back and forth in disbelief and found that his evil spirit had disappeared at this time.

Xu chushun looked at him and said with a smile, “you say that magic gas? I ate it. ”

“Eat, eat?” The old man thought to himself that you boasted and didn’t draft!

That’s the evil spirit I’ve refined for many years. Even if the Immortal Emperor absorbs it, he can’t stand it.

You a fairyland guy, dare you say that?

“Bastard, I don’t know the height of heaven and earth…” the old man raised his hand and grabbed Xu Ke’s head.

Xu Wei just averted, grabbed the old man’s hand directly and said with a sneer: “old man, do you really think you are a fairy king?”

At the first time I met the old man, Xu Ke had asked the system to start parsing, and now the parsing results have come out.

The old man has no substance and is completely composed of evil Qi.

Since it’s evil gas, it’s easy to say. Swallow it!

The old man just wanted to take his hand out, then his face changed and said in horror, “what are you doing? My body… Ah… Stop! ”

A wisp of evil spirit surged up from the old man and was inhaled into his body by Xu lack.

“Ding, remind the host that if you absorb this magic Qi, the progress will be backward by 50% The sound of the system suddenly sounded.

Xu sighed: “continue to suck. Can you let him go?” In the old man’s frightened cry, the whole body completely turned into magic Qi and was inhaled by Xu que. Xu Weichang took a breath, felt the heavy feeling in his body, and shook his head helplessly. Well, I didn’t get the heritage this time, but the progress has regressed a bit. However, there must be benefits. The giant defeated by him has been placed in the system at this time. Although it is said that the Immortal Emperor’s legacy is a trap, the guardian’s rules are not outlined. As long as you defeat the other party, you can accept it. Foreign demons disappeared, and this space began to collapse. At the last second before the most disappeared, Xu Xu saw a golden light shining in the void System, take that thing! ” Xu que hurriedly said. The sixth sense told him that it would be the greatest harvest in this ancient secret place! The next moment, the space completely collapsed. Xu Ke only felt dizzy in his mind. With a flower in front of him, he appeared outside the ancient secret land. Besides him, there were other monks who entered the Taigu secret place, looking left and right with a confused face Strange, how did we get out? ” Haven’t you defeated the guardian? Did we fail? ” It’s impossible. This trip was in vain? ” Murong Yunhai stood with his younger martial brothers and vaguely felt a familiar breath passing by. He turned his head suddenly and saw only a familiar figure sweeping into the distance. From the perspective of the back, it seems to be… Master Tang Sanzang Well, let’s go. ” Murong Yunhai sighed and turned away with his younger martial brother. “I’m afraid the heritage of the ancient secret place has been taken away.” He had a hunch that he might meet Tang Sanzang in the near future… As soon as Xu Ke left the Taigu secret place, he ran all the way, ecstatic in his heart. This time I made a lot of money

chapters.title: Chapter 1783
chapters.body:
Chapter 1783

Chapter 1783

C.1783

The golden light in the Taigu secret place is the real heritage.

It’s just that the old man had been hiding before. If Xu vacancy hadn’t absorbed the old man and the space collapsed, even if they finally passed all the checkpoints, they couldn’t get the Immortal Emperor’s heritage.

After running hundreds of miles, Xu que finally stopped and began to investigate his harvest.

A large number of natural materials and earth treasures can make up for the cultivation lost by absorbing magic Qi just now, and even worse.

In addition, there is a sentiment in the heritage, which belongs to the sentiment of the Immortal Emperor.

After a long time, Xu que finally woke up, opened his eyes and sighed.

“I see… No wonder the human lightning of Yongzhen Immortal Emperor always had that strange feeling about the war.”

This feeling in the legacy is not a secret method, but a description of the realm of the Immortal Emperor.

But if this paragraph of description is circulated, I’m afraid it will cause countless competitions among immortal zuns.

Because this paragraph describes how to enter the realm of Immortal Emperor!

As we all know, there are many immortal kings like dogs in xianyunzhou, and immortal zuns walk all over the ground. The superior timing and geographical advantages make these friars’ accomplishments far beyond Tianzhou.

But so far, there are only four immortal emperors.

Countless immortal zuns have been extremely poor all their lives. They rack their brains to know how to step into the realm of Immortal Emperor.

“To become an Immortal Emperor, you need to explore.”

This sentence has been circulating in xianyunzhou for a long time, but few people can really do it.

This description tells Xu que that if he wants to really step into the realm of Immortal Emperor, he needs to completely master a road.

This mastery is not as simple as using the power of the Tao, but to completely replace the avenue and become the controller of the avenue.

Becoming an Immortal Emperor means that later generations can no longer practice this way.

If you want to completely kill the Immortal Emperor, unless you completely erase this avenue from the world, the Immortal Emperor will be immortal.

“Under the Immortal Emperor, all are mole ants.” Xu que sighed, “just as I didn’t master Tao Yun in those years, I couldn’t kill friars. If I didn’t master the ability to erase the avenue, I couldn’t really kill the Immortal Emperor.”

He thought that he could fight the Immortal Emperor with the combination of magic Qi, Xianyuan and Buddha light, but now it seems that he is not a little far from the Immortal Emperor.

“Master the main road…” Xu que felt the golden light gradually dissipated in his mind and fell into meditation.

The way of self-cultivation is to go against the sky, which is not in the way of heaven at all.

In other words, there is no ready-made avenue for you to master. If you practice in a normal way, you will never become an Immortal Emperor!

“So what?”

Xu que suddenly stood up, looked up at the sky and said in a deep voice: “there is no avenue in this world, I will create a Avenue myself. There is no way forward, I will come out a road!”

There is no road in this world, but with more people walking, there will be a road!

Why did he give in to God?

No one can stop him from moving forward!

“Boom!”

The clear sky was thundering, as if heaven and earth were shaking for his thoughts at this time.

“Sleeping trough! Why did it suddenly thunder? ” A fuss suddenly sounded.

Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude ran over from a distance and looked around from time to time for fear that the thunder would hit them.

Seeing Xu Kuang in front of him, two dogs jumped directly, and a slippery kneeling rushed to Xu Kuang. He said excitedly, “brother Kuang! It’s worthy of you to get the Immortal Emperor’s legacy from the army! Let me see what the Immortal Emperor’s legacy is! ”

“How did you know?” Xu que wondered.

After he got the Immortal Emperor’s legacy, he ran away. No one should see his trace.

“Harm, boy, you don’t know. It’s all spread outside.” Duan Jiude explained to Xu que what happened.

It turned out that after everyone came out of the Taigu secret place, they directly checked in place and found that only Xu que was missing.

Suddenly, the rumor that the current generation of Buddhist monk Tang Sanzang won the Immortal Emperor’s heritage in the ancient secret land spread all over Feihai Prefecture, and even vaguely spread to other states.

“Shit, these guys gossip too much. It can find me.” Xu Wei scolded and looked at them angrily, “what are you two doing here? The autumn wind divides property? ”

“Hey, brother Ke, you can’t say that. How to say the Immortal Emperor’s legacy is also the result of the efforts of Ben shenzun and teacher Duan.” Seeing that Xu que didn’t intend to divide up the Immortal Emperor’s legacy, er Gouzi was worried, “if you swallow the god statue alone, you will go all over the sky and announce that you are the leader of the fried heaven Gang!”

Seeing this, er Gouzi directly lay down on the spot and began to roll on the ground. He asked Xu que to divide up the Immortal Emperor’s legacy.

Xu Wei didn’t intend to pay attention to him at all. The dead dog never divided with himself because he didn’t know how much he had gained Stop talking nonsense. I’m going to Taiyi sect now. Set up a transmission array for me quickly. ” Xu que said unhappily. It’s been more than a month now. If it hadn’t been learned from Er Gouzi that Taiyi sect is not too dangerous, Xu Ke would have rushed all the way to Taiyi sect. Now that the Immortal Emperor’s legacy has been obtained and ER Gouzi and Duan Jiude have been found, we should go to Taiyi sect to solve the problem. After all, if you want to contact xiaorou, you still have to find a way from Su Yunlan and others. After all, they are the only ones who are finally related to xiaorou in xianyunzhou. After the two dogs had been rolling for half an hour, Xu que finally couldn’t help but tell him the description of the Immortal Emperor’s legacy. Knowing this, er Gouzi was overjoyed and immediately got up and began to build a transmission array Bang! ” A shining light surged up, Xu Ke and others stepped into the transmission array At this time, people gathered under the gate of Taiyi sect Have you thought about it? ” A friar with the symbol of desire demon Sect on his clothes is wantonly shouting, “our eldest martial brother will return from the ancient secret land soon, and you will have no chance of winning at that time!” Behind him, there was a dark sea of monks who wanted to demon sect, and they echoed one after another. The disciples of Taiyi sect stood inside the mountain gate, all looking indignant. Had it not been for the order of the patriarch not to have a direct conflict with the desire demon sect, they would have fought long ago. The friar of the demon sect wanted to say something, and suddenly a roaring wind came over his head. Bang! A violent impact came from the top of his head, caught off guard, and directly pressed him into the soil

chapters.title: Chapter 1784
chapters.body:
Chapter 1784

Chapter 1784

C.1784

“Shit, two dogs play with me, don’t they? Tell you to set up a transmission array. Do you want to set up the exit in mid air? ”

“I’m not to blame! All blame teacher Duan! ”

“It’s because you are too ugly, which affects the play of God!”

A voice of swearing came from the smoke. In the stunned eyes of the disciples of the demon sect, two people and a dog appeared in front of several people.

The first is a handsome young man, a handsome young man, followed by an old man and a dog.

The old man’s face is obscene and has a sharp mouth. He can tell at a glance that he is not a good man.

As for the dog

“Sleeping trough! Wicked dog! ” The demon sect disciple immediately exclaimed, “how did you come here?!”

Xu Kuan glanced and said with a smile, “Yo, who wants the demon sect? Come on, come and show you a big baby. ”

The disciples of the demon sect wanted to escape, but they felt a powerful force sweeping themselves up and throwing them at the man and dog.

Two dogs and Duan jiudeton showed a sinister smile and rubbed their hands to meet them.

“Ah! Don’t touch me! ”

“Go away, you dare to touch me. Our senior brother won’t let you go when he comes back!”

“Wu Wu… Please let me go. I know I’m wrong.”

A burst of shrill wailing came from the rear, and the faces of other lust demon sect disciples changed greatly.

Xu que took a step forward, and they all took a step back together, as if the God of plague had come for fear of being infected with bad luck.

“I heard that you are coming to buy Taiyi sect?” Xu que asked with great interest.

“No, no, no!” All said in one voice.

“Don’t be afraid. Be brave. Young people should be brave.” Xu que encouraged.

When a disciple of the demon sect heard the speech, he boldly stepped forward and said, “that’s right! The price we offered is already very sincere. Su Yunlan doesn’t know good or bad! ”

“You don’t know what’s good or bad, do you?” Xu nodded, his smile suddenly receded, and said darkly, “Er Gouzi, Lao Duan, drag this guy out for me, pick it up and hang it at the door!”

“Get it!”

Two dogs rushed over in high spirits, and one claw shouted on the disciple’s head.

The disciple didn’t even make a sound. He turned his eyes white and fainted to the ground.

The rest of the disciples of the demon sect changed their faces.

devil!

This man is a devil!

After cleaning up the disciples, Xu que straightened his clothes and walked into the gate of Taiyi sect.

The disciples of Taiyi sect gathered at the door and witnessed the whole process, so they were not too hostile to Xu Xu.

“Thank you for your help. I don’t know your name?” A disciple hugged his fist and arched his hand.

Xu Wei laughed twice: “tell your leader that her husband is back!”

The disciple of Taiyi sect turned pale when he heard the words. “Zheng” pulled out his long sword and pointed at Xu que.

“Elder, we respect your help. Why are you so rude?”

Xu Ke was stunned and said, “no, I’m really your leader’s husband. If you don’t believe it, ask Su Yunlan to come out…”

“Shut up, madman!”

Before he finished, several long swords came straight.

After obtaining the Immortal Emperor’s legacy, the balance progress of magic Qi in Xu Que’s body has reached 95%, and there is still a gap of 5%.

Even so, his cultivation has reached the peak of Xianwang. Once the balance is completely lowest, he can reach the middle of xianzun.

The average accomplishments of these disciples are less than that of the fairyland, which naturally does not threaten Xu que.

When he raised his hand and waved it, a strong wind swept through. The disciples of Taiyi sect saw a flower in front of them. They didn’t see what was happening. The long sword had reached Xu Wei’s hand.

“Alas, I really can’t tell you clearly. Let me do it myself.”

Xu Wei shook his head, took a deep breath and shouted, “Yun LAN, ya’er, ling’er, I’m back!”

The sound containing Xianyuan lasted for a long time and ran through the whole Taiyi sect. The disciples close to it were shocked and their heads were buzzing and painful.

The disciple of Taiyi sect clenched his teeth and took a difficult step forward: “madman, insult me, Taiyi sect, you should repay with your life!”

He was about to come forward, and suddenly a cold voice sounded behind him.

When the disciple looked back and saw the visitor, he immediately bowed in fear and said, “join the leader!”

I saw a young woman with pure and beautiful appearance and fair skin, as if she could be broken by blowing a bullet, standing behind several disciples and staring at Xu vacancy with complex eyes.

Xu Xu’s smile grew stronger and stronger. He opened his arms and greeted the woman: “Yunlan, I’m back.”

Su Yunlan’s face was like melting ice and snow, tears twinkled in her eyes, and her figure flashed like a young swallow returning to her nest and jumping into Xu Que’s arms.

“You’ve finally come back…” Su Yunlan’s head was deeply buried in Xu’s arms and said in a muffled voice. Xu Ke took a deep breath and felt the sound on Su Yunlan: “well… It’s hard for you. From now on, no one can bully you.” The disciples of Taiyi sect nearby have been stunned. Is that still their iceberg leader? The normally unsmiling leader, at this time, threw himself into the arms of a man like a little woman Xu que! ” Xu Lang! ” Dead monkey, do you know to come back? ” At the same time, several women came up from the mountain and rushed into Xu Kui’s arms Elder ya, elder su… “The disciples of Taiyi sect were shocked when they saw those cold elders in their sect one by one. The man said he was the leader’s husband… And the relationship between these elders and him is not simple. Therefore, the leader and the elders’ husbands… Are the same person! These disciples looked at each other. They just felt the thunder rolling and the world outlook was crumbling Well, don’t let these disciples see jokes. ” Su Yunlan got up first, recovered his cold expression and ordered, “you continue to watch the gate and send someone to pass me on.” Yes, master! ” Several disciples bowed and hugged fists, and a big cold sweat fell on their foreheads. With several beautiful women back to the main hall, Xu que appreciated the surrounding scenery and nodded all the way. This is obviously as like as two peas in the past, and even the overall layout is exactly the same as that of the previous school. On the way, Su Yunlan explained to him in detail the beginning and end of the desire demon sect. In short, the leader of the desire demon sect liked them, but he was afraid of Yurou’s power and didn’t dare to be strong, so he had to use this way to try to force several people to obey. After hearing this, Xu Wei sneered: “hum, dare you touch my woman? Today I’ll let the demon sect taste what it means to be immortal and die! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1785
chapters.body:
Chapter 1785

Chapter 1785

C.1785

After talking to each other, Xu que finally asked about business.

“What’s the matter with xiaorou? Why did she suddenly ignore you? ”

The women looked at each other and seemed to have guessed that Xu Ke would ask this. Finally, Su Yunlan took the initiative to make a sound.

“You know what happened when you came to xianyunzhou. I won’t go into detail. Let’s start with the establishment of Taiyi sect.” Su Yunlan said seriously, “at that time, rou’er had been valued by the four immortal emperors and trained together, and Xiao Rou often came and went with us, but…”

She paused, glanced at Xu Ke and continued: “but from one day on, rou’er will no longer come to Taiyi sect. I tried my best to go to Tianmen and find rou’er, but she didn’t remember me at that time… Later, Taiyi sect was excluded and forced to move here.”

In a few words, this rough and turbulent experience was described. Xu que looked at the women, but his eyes were full of love.

Even if Su Yunlan didn’t say, he knew how much suffering the girls had experienced in xianyunzhou.

Without the protection of Yurou, these girls are first-class even in xianyunzhou. I don’t know how many people will covet them.

But Su Yunlan just took Mrs. Ya and them all the way down and waited until Xu lacked arrived.

“It’s hard for you.” Xu que said seriously, “from now on, I swear that I will never let anyone bully you again!”

“Qiang Gemao, don’t they want to buy Taiyi pie? I’ll bankrupt them in these two days! ” Xu que waved his big hand and said in high spirits, “you have a good rest today and I’ll deal with them tomorrow.”

In the twinkling of an eye, night fell.

Xu Wei is thinking in the room about how to make the demon sect bankrupt.

Although the words said during the day are heroic and dry, after all, the leader of the demon sect is a strong man at the level of half Immortal Emperor. I have to deal with them in a fair way.

At least, we can’t get too easy involved.

While he was meditating, there was a sudden sound of footsteps outside the house.

“Officials…”

A bright face appeared at the door, impressively Mrs. ya.

“Why are you here?” Xu que wondered.

Mrs. Ya gave him a coquettish look, directly pushed him down and leaned down.

Big is rolled up by red waves. It is the so-called little farewell is better than newlyweds. It is full of affection for the moment.

The stars outside the house were brighter, and the sound of insects was lower. It seemed that they were afraid to disturb the two people inside the house.

About an hour later, Mrs. Ya walked out of Xu Ke’s room with a bright face. Her face seemed to be even better.

Xu que sat on the bed, moved his shoulders and said with emotion, “Mom… Women are so terrible that they almost want to eat me.”

Before he was ready to rest, a soft call came.

“Xu Xu…”

Su ling’er stepped into the door with a red face.

Another hour, Su linger left Xu’s room.

Xu que wiped the sweat on his forehead and was just about to lie down to rest when the door was suddenly pushed open again.

“Xu que.”

Su Yunlan’s eyes are like water, hiding countless feelings.

Xu Xu’s legs trembled and he felt that he was not very good.

You three did it on purpose!

One by one!

It was another hour when Su Yunlan quietly left Xu Que’s room.

Xu was lying in bed, staring at the ceiling with empty eyes.

What is the hardest thing to suffer from beauty?

Even with his far superior constitution, he felt a little unbearable when facing three people at one time.

The main thing is that these three people are fiercer than each other. They are like wolves. They want to eat themselves alive.

No one can stand it!

“Hoo… It’s finally over.”

Xu que trembled and tried to close the door. Suddenly, a thin palm protruded from the crack of the door and blocked the door.

Xu que opened the door and found that it was Mrs. Ya again.

“Ah… It’s getting late. I’d better have a rest earlier.” Xu que hurriedly held the door and said with a smile.

God knows, these women seem to be much stronger than before since their cultivation has been improved. They just sit on the ground and suck the earth!

Mrs. Ya smiled and opened her body. Behind her were Su linger and Su Yunlan.

“Officials… I want to serve you together.”

It was such a seemingly light word that suddenly aroused Xu Ke’s inner heat.

I’m kidding. Men can’t say they can’t!

It seems that the silver gun bully will return to the Jianghu seven times this evening Come on! Eat me! ” With his arms outstretched, Xu Ke directly embraced the three beauties into his arms and entered the room. This time, the ups and downs, until dawn Early in the morning, the sun fell from the clouds. Xu Kai opened his eyes with enjoyment and looked at the jade beside him. He felt a burst of satisfaction. Last night was a very chaotic night. Xu que never thought that Mrs. Ya would come to the room with Su Yunlan and Su linger. In the face of this situation, how many men can resist it? Of course, I got on my horse with a gun and galloped my horse! However, with a weak constitution, it is natural that several people are tired enough to wake up after sleeping until now. Of course, he would not disturb people’s dreams. He covered the quilt for the three women, gently stroked the delicate faces of several people, and Xu Wei got up and left the room. Men should not only say no, but also do what they say. Said that if you want to make the demon sect bankrupt today, you have to make it bankrupt! However, I still have to think about how to establish a bankruptcy law. The current address of Taiyi sect is located in the east of Wudu domain, and the west of Youming domain adjacent to demon sect. The two sects face each other across the domain. The lust demon sect disciple who was educated by Xu Ke yesterday has escaped. Now I can’t catch two to ask about the situation. So Xu que called two dogs and Duan Jiude. They took the transmission array directly and came to the netherworld. As soon as they landed, several fairy kings came face to face Several Taoist friends should come from other domains? ” One of the fairy kings smiled and said enthusiastically, “do you want to buy a local guide manual of the nether world, which records in detail the customs and power distribution of the nether world.” OK, let’s have one. How many spirit stones? ” One book only needs one fairy weapon. ” Xu Wei was surprised at that time: “lying in a trough, a fairy weapon? Why don’t you grab it? ” The fairy king and the two partners behind him took out their weapons and sneered, “yes, it’s robbery.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1786
chapters.body:
Chapter 1786

Chapter 1786

C.1786

Xu Wei didn’t even bother to move his hands and winked at Er Gouzi.

The second dog looked wary: “are you kidding? That’s the fairy king. Do you want God to beat them? ”

“Have you counselled?”

“How possible!” Two dogs said righteously, “the God is worried that he will beat them into slag accidentally. The scene is too bloody!”

Duan Jiude said contemptuously: “if you don’t dare to do it, you don’t dare to do it. Pretend to be a big garlic.”

“Fart! Ben shenzun is your ancestor. Kowtow and apologize quickly! ”

“Shit, I haven’t beaten you for a long time, haven’t I?”

A man and a dog fight together as they speak. The farther they fight, the farther they fight

Xu que couldn’t help but help his forehead. These two evils still didn’t grow. He wanted to run when he met someone stronger than them.

“Alas, I’d better do it myself.”

Seeing that Xu Wei wanted to go in person, several fairy kings seemed to hear something funny.

“Don’t be kidding. You are just a fairy king. What can you do to us?”

“I advise you not to be disrespectful and hand over your good things.”

Half an hour later, the three fairy kings knelt on the ground and wept bitterly.

Xu que sat on several people and said, “who doesn’t appreciate it?”

“It’s me, it’s me! It’s a small man who has eyes and doesn’t know Mount Tai. Sir, you have a lot. Let us have a horse! ”

“Yes, tell me about the netherworld.” Xu que flicked his fingers and said casually, “focus on the desire demon sect.”

Hearing the speech, the leading friar quickly poured beans out of a bamboo tube and told the situation of the netherworld.

Among the seven regions of Xianyun Island, the netherworld region is the most chaotic region. Most of the monks who wander here are extremely vicious.

Therefore, there are no rules in this area. It pursues a purpose – whoever has a big fist is the last word.

Desire demon sect is the sect with the hardest truth in the netherworld.

The sect leader asked the Immortal Emperor to cover the whole area with his cultivation. Most of the disciples in the sect are evil people. They are rampant in the nether world.

The reason why the demon sect has not ruled the nether world up to now is that although there is chaos in the nether world, there are not a few powerful people.

There are also a few people who are on the same level as seeking to be free from demons.

As for the second reason… It is because qiuwumo likes gambling.

He is keen on all gambling, and anyone who can beat him in gambling can ask for it.

To gamble with him, we must ban all cultivation accomplishments and gamble with him purely by mortal means.

“How is his technical level?” Xu que asked.

The monk of the demon sect carefully said, “well… As far as I know, the technical level of seeking to be free from magic is quite high. Under the condition of banning cultivation, you can bet with it in the nether world for only one palm. Seeking to be free from magic gives you the title of gambling saint.”

Gambler?

Xu que sneered: “it’s time for this guy to see the strength of the gambling God of the fried sky Gang!”

After learning that today is the beginning of the annual competition, Xu que directly took Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude to the competition site.

Netherworld, eternal dark city.

It was dark and dark, but the enthusiasm of the monks could not be concealed.

Countless monks gathered here, full of people, with excited brilliance in their eyes.

Today is the day of the annual competition in the netherworld. If you participate in the competition and become a champion, you can bet with qiuwumo.

If you defeat the devil, you can make a request.

No matter what this request is, you must agree to it.

At the entry point, there was a strange combination.

A handsome young man walked up to the Registrar and threw down a cheap fairy instrument: “I want to sign up.”

The registrant did not raise his head: “power, name.”

“Fried heaven help gambler!”

Hearing the name, the Registrar couldn’t help looking up and down at each other: “are you sure you want to use this name?”

“What’s the problem?” Xu que looked arrogant and looked like a heroic dry cloud. “I came here today to tell you that the real gambling God in the netherworld is me!”

The Registrar smashed his mouth twice and helped Xu que register. At the same time, he sent someone to report to Wumo.

Qiu Wumo learned that someone dared to come to the competition under the name of gambling God. He grinned and looked cruel: “today’s young people simply don’t know the greatness of heaven and earth…”

But he didn’t take it to heart, because every year, a few gamblers who are too arrogant to know the greatness of heaven and earth come here to try to win a place with their names.

But without exception, these people can’t even pass the preliminaries.

Just when he thought the gambling God was the same thing, the former demon sect disciple who came to report the news hurried again Tell the patriarch that another person came to the competition in the name of the gambling saint of the fried heaven gang. ” What? ” Begging Wumo’s face was cold, “snap” crushed the seat armrest in the palm of his hand, “what kind of gang is this fried heaven Gang? How dare you be so bold! ” In front of the gambler in the netherworld, he dared to compete in the name of gambler and gambler one after another, which is to despise him! The disciple didn’t dare to go out. He knelt down under the hall and trembled. Qiu Wumo took a deep breath and waved, “go down and stare at those two guys.” He had a hunch in his heart that these two guys certainly didn’t exist so simply. At this time, the personnel of the registration office were also a little flustered when they received the news reported by the background. Although he asks Wumo to abide by the rules in gambling, he is actually a moody guy. If he gets angry at himself at that time, he can’t even leave the whole body. At this time, another man came to the registry Hello, I’m the army of the fried sky gang. Sign up. ” As soon as the registrant heard the three words “fried tianbang”, his heart immediately mentioned his throat. But after hearing the other party’s name called Da Jun, I was relieved. Fortunately, this is a normal person, as long as you don’t call gambling. Just as he was about to register, the young man held out his hand to block his movement and said with a smile, “please help me change my name to register.” For what? ” Asked the Registrar casually Fried heaven Gang, gambler! ” The Registrar trembled and scared out the pen in his hand. A moment later, an angry roar echoed over the eternal dark city Asshole! This is provocation! Today I want you to die without a whole body! ” The monks of the eternal dark city looked at each other, and they naturally recognized that it was the voice of seeking no evil. It was the first time that they saw it. When Wumo was so angry! It’s just… Who provoked Wumo

chapters.title: Chapter 1787
chapters.body:
Chapter 1787

Chapter 1787

C.1787

“Strange, does anyone dare to provoke Wumo?”

“I heard that someone took part in the gambling game with the name of the gambling God. It is said that they came from what fried heaven gang.” Insiders began to share information.

People suddenly realized.

“No wonder, Qiu Wumo’s headstrong character can’t stand someone calling himself a gambling God in front of him.”

“Don’t say yet. The guy with this name is not timid. I’ll take good care of him.”

The insider shook his head: “I haven’t finished yet. In addition to the God of gamblers, this fried heaven Gang also has gamblers, bullies, kings, demons and immortals, all of whom have come to participate in this gambling match…”

what the fuck!

This time, everyone was shocked.

Where did the bombers come from? There are so many gangs in the name of gambling?

What’s more outrageous is that one or two of these people are so crazy!

The God of gamblers, the saint of gamblers, the immortal of gamblers… Any name raised in front of the devil will arouse his anger.

Let alone so many people come to this gambling game at one time.

For a time, the name of the fried sky Gang became a hot spot in yongdark city. Many people guessed the real origin of the fried sky gang.

And those private openings also added the names of the people of the fried heaven gang.

In one of the underground openings, a large number of friars gathered in front of the opening with spirit stones or fairy tools to make bets.

Every year, with the holding of gambling games, there will be a large number of openings in yongdark City, and every popular contestant will be on the list.

Many people win the pot full through these openings. Of course, more people lose and lose all their money.

An old man with a dog came to the mouth of the underground dish.

It’s Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi.

“Where is the gambling God of the fried heaven Gang?” As soon as Duan Jiude came, he went straight to the local mouth.

The friar in charge of cross betting was stunned and said with a smile: “elder, I suggest you don’t press him.”

Before Duan Jiude spoke, er Gouzi took the lead and said, “what do you mean? Can’t you see the God? God has a lot of good things to bet on! ”

Everyone around me was stunned.

Do you have to have thirty or fifty handles?

Where did this guy get so many inferior fairy weapons!

The person in charge of Pankou was also stunned. He was responsible for betting for so many years. He had seen no less than a thousand good things. It was the first time he saw someone betting with so many immortal tools!

“Ask the backstage to double the odds of the gambling God.” The person in charge of Pankou called a subordinate and whispered.

Then he turned and looked at Er Gouzi. The smile on his face became more and more enthusiastic: “you two, this gambler is a hot spot. It’s better to press more at one time. If you win, it’s a huge profit!”

Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi both looked like local tyrants and waved their big hands: “press, press all! Press all the people of the fried sky Gang! ”

The person in charge almost laughed to the back of his ear and replied: “OK, I’ll bet for you. This is your promissory note. If you bet successfully, you can exchange it directly with your promissory note.”

Watching both of them bet on the gambling gods, gambling saints, gambling bullies and gambling demons of the fried heaven Gang, the person in charge was happy.

Who doesn’t know that Qiu Wumo has released words. If the people of the fried heaven Gang enter the finals, they will bet on the friars’ accomplishments and lives.

Whoever loses will stay in eternal darkness forever.

It can be seen that the names of the fried heaven Gang have completely aroused the anger of Qiu Wumo.

The friars of the whole eternal dark city, no one doubts the strength of qiuwumo in gambling.

When he was not half a step Immortal Emperor, Yongzhen Immortal Emperor once came to gamble with him. Under the condition of suppressing cultivation, they even tied!

It was precisely because of this gambling fight that Qiu Wumo became famous. At the same time, his cultivation also improved by leaps and bounds, and soon mastered the eternal dark city.

Everyone thought that he got some secret from the Immortal Emperor.

But in fact, only Qiu Wumo knew that he didn’t get any secret, but because he saw the way to become an Immortal Emperor from his use.

Control the avenue, replace the avenue, Fang Chengxian emperor!

Therefore, he chose the gambling Road, the road of self-cultivation.

The purpose of holding this competition every year is also to make your Avenue more refined.

“Bang!”

A bright fireworks exploded in the sky, and the powerful and low voice echoed over the eternal dark city.

“The gambling contest begins!”

Shua!

A magnificent list appeared in the air of the eternal dark city, on which the names of all monks who signed up for the gambling competition were displayed.

As soon as these names appeared, they began to change, which means that someone has won in the gambling competition.

“Look! Now the first one is Chen Pai Gow! ” This guy was only one step away from the year before last. He can be the first. This time he is fierce and bad. ” Look! The last champion Li shisan Zhang also came! ” Why is he here again? But this guy is now the only gambling master in the eternal dark city. He is the favorite to win the championship this time. ” Dong Wuxu, the peak of xianzun, is also here! He has been promoted very fast recently. In just three months, he has been upgraded from six product gambler to one product gambler. This speed can be said to be unprecedented! ” Hum, what about high cultivation? Gambling is about gambling. ” In the eternal dark city, the judgment of strength is not only based on cultivation, but also on the strength of gambling fight. Gamblers are called gambling masters, and the order from low to high is from Jiupin gambling master to gambling fight master. The stronger the gambling skill is, the more respected it is here. Relying on gambling can have everything in this city. If it had been before, Xu Ke might not have understood it, but after knowing the rules for promoting Xiandi, he saw the truth of the city at a glance. Everyone is practicing gambling. It’s just that the road is three thousand. Everyone’s cognition is different, and the way of cultivation is also different. If there is conflict in the way of cultivation, it depends on who has the ability to master it first The rule this time is that whoever can win a thousand inferior immortals first can become the champion of this competition and obtain the qualification of gambling with seeking no magic. ” Xu Xu looked at Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude and said, “so the three of us should gamble separately and finally come together, so that we can maximize efficiency, okay?” Don’t worry, Ben shenzun said second on the one hand, and no one dared to say first! ” Er Gouzi said confidently. Duan Jiude also said that the old man is not strong in other aspects. In terms of gambling, he can be said to be talented. The Immortal Emperor can’t win him! Xu Ke’s eyelids jumped. I don’t know why, he always had an ominous premonition in his heart…….

chapters.title: Chapter 1788
chapters.body:
Chapter 1788

Chapter 1788

C.1788

The rules of the gambling and fighting competition in yongdark city are very simple. Within one day, whoever can take the lead in winning 1000 inferior immortals will be the first.

The final result shall be subject to the ranking on the list.

There is no limit to the way of gambling and fighting. There is only one rule – immortal yuan is not allowed.

You can fight, but you are also not allowed to use monk means.

On the one hand, this rule is to avoid the destruction of the city. On the other hand, it is also to test the gambling means of participating monks. If fairy yuan is used, gambling will be meaningless.

After all, it’s really a simple thing to change the result of a gambling fight by means of monks.

At the beginning of the competition, the whole city was completely boiling.

Friars engaged in gambling can be seen everywhere in the streets.

Everyone is involved in full swing and wants to be the ultimate winner.

“Come on, come on, sieve Pai Gow can do anything. Who is willing to come and gamble.”

“The draw is bigger than the size! Who will fight me! ”

“Race, race! Three inferior immortals are bets. I’ll take them if anyone can win! ”

For a time, all kinds of shouts sounded everywhere. Everyone took out their best projects and tried to win immortal weapons from other monks.

The ranking of the list is changing almost every second. From time to time, there are monks who leave dejectedly, and there are monks who roar with joy.

Of course, some monks will also be seen walking among the crowd, using excellent techniques to steal immortal tools from others. Naturally, some monks, like mortals, fight in the street.

People look at violence in this city, just like his name.

Eternal dark city, the light will not be revealed here.

Xu que wandered around the city for two times and found that most people belong to the stage of winning and losing. They often win at the last person and lose back at the next person.

This leads to the rise and fall of names on the ranking list, which is always maintained at a floating level.

But at this time, the first one has reached the level of hundreds of inferior immortals in just one hour.

If we calculate according to the degree of one immortal weapon in each hand, he has eliminated more than 100 people now.

As for the second place, it followed closely, with 70 inferior immortals.

“Not bad. These guys are quite capable.” Xu que smiled. “It seems that it’s time to show the strength of this powerful gambling fight. System, give me a lucky draw!”

First, there is a shortage of installed force value. Second, his ability is enough to deal with most scenes. There is no need to waste that installed force value.

However, recently, I installed several waves of big force. I earned a lot of money. I can be described as a big family.

In addition, after obtaining the Immortal Emperor’s heritage, the balance of magic Qi has reached an amazing 90%, and most functions of the system can be reused.

Now he uses one word to describe 90 – invincible!

Just at this time, two dogs ran back, looking a little unnatural.

“What’s the matter?” Xu que asked while drawing the lottery, “don’t you claim to be second and nobody claims to be first? Lost all? ”

“Well… Ben shenzun was just unlucky for a while.” The second dog scratched his head and said, “give me ten more inferior artifacts.”

“You really lost all your money?” Xu Wei was surprised, “I’ll just say it casually!”

“Ben shenzun will definitely win back. Those guys started while Ben shenzun was not ready for a long time, so Ben shenzun lost!” Er Gouzi looked unconvinced.

Xu que rolled his eyes, waved and said, “at your level, you’d better not gamble and stay well.”

“You don’t understand. Luck will change. Ben shenzun is unlucky now. He won’t be unlucky later.”

Whatever Er Gouzi said, Xu Ke ignored him.

Although there are so many immortal statues in the pit, now they are not inferior immortal tools, but there are only a few hundred, and there is still a big gap from a thousand.

According to ER Gouzi’s losing method, you will lose all in half a day.

“After all, we still have to look at this forced saint.” Xu que shook his head and opened the lottery.

“Ding, congratulations to the host for obtaining the force value of 10 points.”

“Ding, congratulations to the host for obtaining the force value of 10 points.”

“Ding, congratulations to the host for obtaining the force value of 10 points.”

what the fuck!

Pretending to force is worth 10 points. The lowest reward in the lottery is equivalent to the consolation prize!

Xu que turns to glare at Er Gouzi. Is this guy a special non chieftain?

It’s bad luck for me!

The second dog looked inexplicably: “what do you think of staring at me? Have you finally found the handsome of Ben shenzun? If you give Ben shenzun the name of the first handsome of the fried heaven Gang, Ben shenzun can consider giving full play to 10% of his strength to help you win back. ”

“Go away! You’d better roll as far as you can! ” Xu Ke pointed to the front and told the two dogs to go away. Shit, bad luck That inferior fairy weapon… “Here you are, here you are! Get out of here quickly. Don’t delay me in drawing the lottery! ” Xu que threw out some inferior immortal tools and sent the two dogs away. He rubbed his hands and was about to continue the lottery when Duan Jiude came again What are you doing? You won’t tell me you lost, will you? ” Xu que asked angrily. Duan Jiude smelled the speech and put on an air of immortality. He said, “I just saw several young people on the roadside. Because there were no inferior immortals to participate in the competition, I was very poor, so I gave them immortals.” Go away. Can you find something more reliable? ” Xu lacked a helping forehead and threw out several inferior immortal weapons again. “Get out of here and don’t bother me.” Well done! ” Duan Jiude picked up the inferior fairy weapon and ran away. Xu Kui took a deep breath and opened the lottery again Ding, congratulations to the host on getting the “master gambler experience card for one hour.” A hair into the soul! Xu Weizheng is preparing to celebrate when he suddenly sees Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude coming back Won’t you lose it all again? ” The two dogs looked at him with arrogant eyes and said, “the God respects the horse. There is no reason to be invincible!” Then he took out ten inferior immortals Yes! ” Xu Xu looked at Duan Jiude, “what about you?” Duan Jiude coughed twice and looked aside: “that…” “well, I understand. I lost it again, didn’t I?” Xu que is ready to take the immortal weapon and go to battle himself. What are you afraid of when there is gambling? Ben is now the best No… “Duan Jiude hesitated for a moment and said,” not only did he lose all, but also he owed others three inferior immortal weapons. ” Xu Wei: “…” his eyes wandered strangely between ER Gouzi and Duan Jiude, leaving only one idea in his heart. Is it true that… Luck can be transferred

chapters.title: Chapter 1789
chapters.body:
Chapter 1789

Chapter 1789

C.1789

As a strong Immortal Emperor in the future, Xu Weijian believes that my life is up to me and not from heaven.

What shit luck is not worth drying in front of strength.

There is a saint forced to come out. What opponent can’t be defeated?

How about the master of gambling?

The whole city of eternal darkness can’t find a second one!

So

“You stay away from me!” Xu que makes a quick decision and expels Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude.

Shit, I finally got a good card. How can you spoil this rare opportunity to pretend to be forced?

After getting rid of Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude, Xu que didn’t hurry to find a gambling fight. Instead, he found a quiet corner and turned the previously registered separation out.

“Brothers, get ready to let the name of the bombers ring through the whole eternal dark city!”

“I see!”

With a Shua, the separated people scattered like a stream like the sea and disappeared into the huge darkness.

Having done all this, Xu que left the corner and came to the crowded place in the center of the eternal dark city.

The pattern of the eternal dark city is very simple. With the landmark building in the center as the center, it forms the shape of a huge circular gambling table, and the bets from outside to inside are doubled.

The landmark building of the center is a huge dice. It is said that when the controller of the eternal dark city sought to be free of magic, he realized his own secret law from a dice and successfully stepped into the realm of half step Immortal Emperor.

Even if not during the gambling competition, monks often come to pay homage and try to find a way to promotion.

At this time, people were surrounded under the dice. In the middle of the crowd, there was a wooden table.

There were three bowls and a ball on the table. On the left was a man in black with pale face and sharp cheeks, and on the other side was a fierce and powerful man.

Xu que forced himself in from the last part of the crowd. The towering complaints behind him were not in his heart at all. His eyes fell straight on the table, and the surrounding voices poured into his ears.

“Dong Wuxu’s skill in guessing the ball can be said to be perfect.”

“Yes, his hand speed is too fast to see which holes he put the ball in.”

“That’s right. You can’t see the speed of moving the bowl clearly without using cultivation.”

Xu Wei looked at the three bowls on the table and felt familiar, but he was not sure that it was the existence in his memory.

He looked at the man beside him: “brother, who are you talking about Dong Wuxu?”

The friar gave him an impatient look: “don’t Dong Wuxu know? You come to… ”

Before he finished, Xu que had taken out a cheap fairy weapon and swayed in front of him.

“… it’s an honor for the gambling competition, brother. Let me tell you, Dong Wuxu is wearing black clothes.” The friar immediately smiled with joy and said, “what he is best at is this ball guessing trick. Let people guess which bowl the ball is buckled in. If he guesses correctly, he will win and lose. But this guy moves very fast. He can’t remember which bowl the ball is buckled in without using his accomplishments.”

“I see.” Xu nodded.

Yes, it’s the trick of three immortals returning to the hole, but this guy changed three balls into one ball.

Seeing this, the friar reached out and grabbed the inferior immortal weapon in Xu Que’s hand, but he grabbed it empty.

“Hey, what do you mean?” The friar was in a hurry.

Xu lacked a stare: “what do you mean? In broad daylight, you want to rob? ”

“No, you just…”

“Just now what just now? Can’t I take down the fairy ware and pick my nails? ”

Xu Wei looked at the other party’s face and sneered.

Say a few words of information and want me a inferior fairy weapon?

Eat shit, you!

Dong Wuxu buckled one of the balls under the bowl, opened his hands and motioned to the people, then pressed it on the bowl and made a sudden force!

“Brush!”

His hands immediately pulled out bursts of residual shadows, and the three bowls moved quickly on the table.

Everyone stared wide, trying to see where the spiking bowl had moved.

The strong man’s eyes were about to burst out. He clenched his fists and showed his green veins on his forehead, just like doing his best.

But Dong Wuxu’s speed was too fast. After watching it for less than ten seconds, someone shouted.

“It’s over. I can’t see clearly.”

“Mom… It’s impossible to see this speed without using cultivation.”

“That is, it is impossible for mortals to find the ball in which bowl.”

“It seems that Dong Wuxu is expected to become the champion of gambling this time.”

“That’s not necessarily true. Chen paijiu and Li shisan Zhang’s strength is only strong but not weak. In the end, most of them compete for the championship.”

“Oh, forget it. There must be no hope this year.” While everyone was talking, Dong Wuxu finally stopped his action Please guess. ” He loosened his hands, looked at the big man and said faintly. The big man wiped the sweat on his forehead. His eyes were nervous. After a long time, he trembled and pointed to the bowl in the middle. Dong Wuxu stretched out his hand without expression, and there was nothing in the bowl Grass! ” The big man was so angry that he smashed the table and looked unwilling, but he could only reluctantly hand over the inferior immortal weapon in his hand Great! ” Unexpectedly, Dong Wuxu’s hand speed has increased again. I just looked at it for ten seconds and lost my eyes. ” You watched it for ten seconds, but I couldn’t see it in five seconds. ” Tut Tut, I don’t know who can guess the bowl where he hid the ball. ” Dong Wuxu glanced at the crowd and said faintly, “who else wants to come up for gambling?” They all took a step back together. At this time, Dong Wuxu was full of edge. Naturally, he could not compete with him I’ll come! ” A hearty laugh sounded, Xu Xu stepped out of the crowd, with an uninhibited smile on his mouth: “I’m going to help the gambling God, and I want to bet with you.” Everyone’s eyes suddenly focused on Xu vacancy This man is too arrogant to call himself a gambler? ” I haven’t seen this young man before. Did you come to the competition for the first time? ” No wonder, most of them have never heard of Dong Wuxu’s reputation, so they have the courage to come. ” Dong Wuxu stared at Xu que for a moment, raised his hand and motioned Xu que to sit down opposite. Xu que picked his eyebrows and sat down in a seat Watch it. ” Dong Wuxu stretched out his hands and moved dazzlingly. A moment later, he stopped his hands and whispered, “please.” Everyone stared at Xu Que and wanted to see which bowl he would choose. Xu que stretched out a finger, put it on the leftmost bowl and said faintly, “this…” before he finished, he suddenly stretched out his hand and said, “no!” Everyone was shocked and looked at the bowl he had picked up. There is really nothing below

chapters.title: Chapter 1790
chapters.body:
Chapter 1790

Chapter 1790

C.1790

WOW!

The crowd immediately burst into flames.

“Sleeping trough! Who is this man? How dare you use this method! ”

“I didn’t even see how the bowl moved, and how could he see it clearly!”

“Don’t be kidding. Is it useful to cultivate high achievement in the eternal dark city? All gambling fights are not allowed, and there is no way to use cultivation, otherwise I would have entered the competition. ”

“Maybe he really has such a means of orgasm? If he can easily beat Dong Wuxu in gambling, he may have a chance to win the championship this time. ”

“You think too much. This guy is just a young girl who participates in the competition for the first time. It’s mostly luck. If you can catch any one with this means, will the competition be held?”

Everyone agreed that Xu Xu was just lucky to do all this.

After all, Dong Wuxu’s hand speed is here. Even Chen paijiu and Li shisan Zhang dare not say they can see through it.

Dong Wuxu was also a little surprised, his expression moved slightly, but he soon calmed down.

This boy… Look at his face, it’s not like he guessed.

He narrowed his eyes slightly to see whether it was true or false.

“Sir, please continue.” He raised his hand and motioned Xu que to continue guessing.

Xu que picked up the corners of his mouth, swam his fingers on the remaining two bowls, put them on the rightmost bowl, shook his head and said, “this is not.”

With that, he stretched out his hand and picked. The bowl was still empty.

“Lying trough, you guessed it again!”

“Great! I don’t think he was deceived! ”

“This is not nonsense. There are no two bowls, so there is only the middle bowl.”

“But it’s the first time someone has used this way. I don’t know if Dong Wuxu will feel unconvinced.”

Everyone was stunned and looked at Xu’s eyes full of surprise.

Guess the ball and gamble, select all incorrect answers, and the result is the same as that of selecting the correct answer, indicating that the person who selects knows which bowl the ball is under.

“Last one, do I need to guess?” Xu que said with a smile.

Dong Wuxu’s face was slightly heavy. A moment later, he arched his hands and said, “I lost. Your good skill.”

Even Dong Wuxu conceded defeat!

Everyone was very surprised. You know, Dong Wuxu is the most arrogant among the gambling experts in yongdark city. Even he conceded defeat, indicating that he recognized the other party’s gambling style.

It’s incredible!

When Dong Wuxu raised his hand, a full 20 inferior immortals appeared on the table, dazzling.

Hiss!

All the people present took a breath of air-conditioning. These are twenty inferior immortal weapons!

How many people can’t get so many fairy weapons even if they bet on the whole game!

But they also dare not rob openly. They are allowed to cheat and steal in the eternal dark city, but they are not allowed to compete in the open.

Any fighting behavior must be carried out in secret and cannot affect the order of the eternal dark city.

On the contrary, Xu Xu was stunned when he saw the 20 inferior immortal tools: “why did the man just give you only one inferior immortal tool?”

“Because he has only one inferior fairy weapon left.” Dong Wuxu glanced at him and suddenly said, “I wonder if you are willing to gamble with me again? I’m willing to bet on twenty inferior immortals. ”

The crowd suddenly became agitated, and they all looked at Dong Wuxu with surprised eyes.

“It seems that Dong Wuxu is very unconvinced.”

“If I win like this, of course I’m not convinced.”

“This boy is a little interesting. If he dares to win next, it shows that he has some skills. At least he can be famous on the list, but if he loses… It shows that his technology is like that.”

All kinds of eyes fell on Xu vacancy to see how he made a choice.

Xu que looked up and down at Dong Wuxu, and a unruly smile came up at the corners of his mouth: “OK, I’ll put it this time, you guess.”

Hum, still unconvinced?

Today, I will teach you what is the real Three immortals return to the cave!

With the master of gambling bucket in hand, Xu Ke has the top ability in any gambling bucket related ability within an hour.

At this moment, he is the real gambler!

Hearing Xu Que’s words, many monks on the scene leaned back directly and looked shocked.

“This boy is brave enough!”

“It’s too arrogant to dare to propose to gamble with Dong Wuxu by guessing the ball. It’s a slap in the face!”

“Where did this guy come from? It’s too confident! ”

Everyone looked at Xu Ke in horror.

Xu que waved his hand casually, and his eyes always fell on Dong Wuxu: “how about thinking about it? Do you want to bet with me? ”

Dong Wuxu frowned. Finally, he sat down and stretched out his hand and said, “in that case, please.” What the hell does this guy want? In front of everyone, Xu Wei put the ball into the middle bowl, moved it twice at will, and loosened his hands: “well, let’s guess.” This operation immediately made the monks present dumbfounded. Just move around and it’s over? What is this!
