Perfunctory people are not so perfunctory Sir, are you deliberately humiliating me? ” Dong Wuxu’s face turned blue and white for a while, and then slowly opened his mouth No, no, no, the God of gamblers of Ben tianbang is always kind and never does anything to bully others. ” Xu que said with a smile, “I really want to teach you what the real Three immortals return to the cave is.” “Three immortals return to the cave?” Dong Wuxu was stunned and murmured, “this is a good name… It seems that you have studied the art of gambling and fighting.” I don’t dare to study. Let’s start guessing. ” Xu Xu leaned back and stretched out his hand. Dong Wuxu got up, first picked up the leftmost bowl and said faintly, “there’s no such thing.” Then he picked up the middle bowl and said, “there’s no such thing.” In fact, as he said, there was no ball under both bowls. The friars at the scene also understood that Dong Wuxu was going to win back the twenty immortal weapons in a weak way Sir, do you want me to continue? ” Dong Wuxu looked at Xu Que and said in a deep voice. Xu que stretched out his hand and said, “go on, haven’t you guessed it yet?” This time, everyone was immediately confused. There are no balls in the two bowls. Isn’t the only ball in the remaining bowl? What else is there to guess? Procrastination is not such a way to procrastinate! Dong Wuxu was silent for a moment, put his hand on the bowl on the far right, and stretched out his hand to pick it Hiss! ” Everyone took a breath of air-conditioning and was shocked. They couldn’t believe what they saw. The bowl on the far right is also empty

chapters.title: Chapter 1791
chapters.body:
Chapter 1791

Chapter 1791

C.1791

Dong Wuxu’s complexion changed dramatically, his whole body trembled and said unbelievably, “this, how is this possible?”

He clearly saw the other party put the ball into the bowl, and all his actions were seen by himself. How could there be no ball in the three bowls?

Are you wrong?

No way!

This guy moves so slowly that he can’t read it wrong!

The people around were also stunned. Many people gathered at the table and stared at the bowls as if they were going to see through them.

Some people even picked up the bowl and checked it over and over, but they didn’t find out anything.

The ball seemed to disappear out of thin air!

Xu Kuang leaned back on the back of his chair, put the twenty immortal utensils that Dong Wuxu had just taken out into the storage ring, and said with a smile, “how about gambling?”

Seeing that Dong Wuxu didn’t speak, he shook his head, picked up the bowls again and buckled them on the opposite side.

After two random moves, the ball appeared in the leftmost bowl.

Then he took out a chopstick from nowhere, knocked it on the middle bowl and opened it. The ball appeared here again!

The bowl on the right knocked and the ball appeared again!!

Finally, Xu que opened all three bowls, and there was a ball in each bowl!

“God… How did he do it?”

“So this guessing and gambling fight has such a clever move?”

“I seem to understand, but I don’t fully understand…”

After Xu Que’s set of operations, everyone understands that Xu Que’s gambling skills, at least in ball guessing and gambling, are far better than Dong Wuxu.

For a long time, Dong Wuxu took a deep breath, hugged his fist and bowed: “your skill is superior. I admire you.”

Seeing that even Dong Wuxu had conceded defeat, these friars could only accept the result no matter how unbelievable they were.

Dong Wuxu, a strong competitor favored by all, lost in the hands of a nobody!

The news spread wildly in the eternal dark city like a virus.

In just a quarter of an hour, almost the whole friars of the eternal dark city knew about it.

Dong Wuxu’s best guessing trick was broken by a nobody!

The first reaction of every friar who heard this was that he couldn’t believe it.

How is this possible?

Dong Wuxu was a popular gambling genius. Almost everyone thought he could compete with Chen paijiu and Li shisan Zhang for the final championship.

Up to now, the two have maintained a record of total victory and won the first place on the list. On the contrary, Dong Wuxu lost one place in the ranking because he lost 40 inferior immortal weapons.

As for the name of the gambling God of the fried sky Gang, he began to sprint wildly on the list, making rapid progress all the way at an amazing speed, and became the fourth place on the list in less than half an hour.

In front of him, there are only Chen paijiu, Li shisan Zhang and Dong Wuxu, who has promoted himself again.

Just as everyone guessed who would win the first place, the shocking news spread all over the eternal dark city.

The God of gamblers of the fried heaven sect won the victory by gambling with Chen paijiu and Li shisan Zhang on his own!

Directly jumped to second place!

This news immediately detonated the whole eternal dark city!

No one has ever been on the list in this way!

This is incredible!

“Who is the gambling God of the fried heaven Gang?”

“It’s incredible. I’ve never seen such a powerful gambling technique!”

“This guy is the real gambler!”

There are countless voices about Xu que. Everyone is curious about who is the God of gambling of the fried heaven gang.

The most important thing is, who is this heaven bombing Gang?

Even Qiu Wumo felt a little frightened after learning Xu Xu’s victory method.

Qiu Wumo put himself into the perspective of Chen paijiu and Li shisan Zhang. After thinking carefully for a long time, he found that he couldn’t find a way to break the game.

“No, he can’t be the first.”

Thinking of this, Qiu Wumo quickly ordered some of his men to snipe Xu vacancy.

At the same time, put down words in private, so that everyone is no longer allowed to gamble with the gambling God of the fried sky gang.

As long as you don’t gamble, you can’t win the final victory with your superb skills.

“The contestants who are still competing in yongdark city are not allowed to gamble with the gambling God of the fried sky gang. The abidance will receive a compensation reward for the inferior immortal weapon.”

The news spread throughout the city at an amazing speed, and soon all the contestants began to deliberately stay away from Xu Ke.

“Brother, let’s bet two games.” Xu Wei found a contestant and said excitedly. The contestant looked at him up and down: “are you the God of gambling?” Yes, I am! But although I’m the gambling God of the fried heaven Gang, I’m not good at gambling. I used to look at luck… “No gambling!” Before Xu Kuang finished speaking, the contestant refused Xu Kuang. Xu que looked puzzled and turned to find the next contestant Brother, I’m the gambling God of the fried heaven gang. I want to bet with me… “Go away.” That handsome guy, bet with me… “Get out!” Fellow… “Climb away!” Almost every gambler found by Xu que rejected him without exception. Xu Wei was stunned. What happened? I refused me without even talking! Don’t give face, right! And Xu que also found that he never knew when to start. No matter where he went, those gamblers all retreated. They all have a look of bad luck when they get close to themselves, one or two shrink away Shit, hide from me. ” Xu Wei was so angry that he directly recalled a part and pretended to be a contestant. Walking around the landmark for two laps, Xu que controlled his body to stop the other side while one of the contestants didn’t pay attention Brother, it seems to me that you are all hiding from the gambling God of the fried sky gang. What’s the matter? ” The contestant looked around and said in a low voice, “you don’t know yet, brother. Beg Wumo to send out a message. As long as you refuse the guy’s invitation to gamble, you can get a reward for inferior immortal tools. Anyway, I’ve lost almost. It’s good to get a reward for inferior immortal tools.” I see. Thank you, brother. ” Xu Ke arched his hands in boxing. In my heart, I sneered. Shit, dog day’s begging for no magic, play this kind of Yin move, right? OK, I will compete with you. Who is more yin! Then Xu que went straight to the huge dice, jumped to the top of the dice, sat down cross legged and began to close his eyes

chapters.title: Chapter 1792
chapters.body:
Chapter 1792

Chapter 1792

C.1792

Everyone who saw this scene was stunned and began to call friends to watch this feat.

“Come and see! Fried sky helped the gambling God to sit on the dice! ”

“What dice? Wait… Are you talking about the dice for the Immortal Emperor who asks for a half step to prove the truth without magic? ”

“Nonsense, or can there be that dice?”

“Lying trough, cow WOW! Come on, let me go and have a look! ”

Xu que sits on the top of the dice, his eyes slightly closed, his black hair fluttering in the wind, just like an expert in the world.

No matter how much gossip outside, I stand still!

What is an expert?

Whatever you do, I don’t panic at all!

I’ll lose if I’m in a hurry, okay!

As time went by, Xu’s ranking dropped from second to third.

The gap between the top three is not big. There are only fluctuations in ten inferior immortal tools, but it also means that Xu Ke is a step away from the goal of ranking first.

Seeing that the time limit of twelve hours is coming, even if you try to gamble again, you can’t improve your ranking.

It’s better to watch the excitement here than to waste that effort.

“Twelve hours will arrive soon. Hey… Hasn’t he moved yet?”

“I don’t know what this guy is thinking. He just sat here for a few hours.”

“I don’t understand… Look who that is!” Suddenly someone exclaimed.

Everyone turned back and saw two men walking side by side, impressively Chen paijiu and Li shisan, who are now the first and second in the list!

Half an hour before the end of the gambling competition, even Li shisan Zhang has given up the last chance to compete and come to watch the gambling God of the fried sky Gang!

“What do you think he has to hide?” Chen paijiu looked at the young man who had sprung up and wondered.

Li Shizhang shook his head and said, “I don’t know. This guy’s technique is too strange. I also win less and lose more. You can see the previous failure.”

They have participated in the competition no less than dozens of times. They have won and lost each other. They both recognize each other’s strength and each other’s ideas.

The reason why they stopped fighting was that they wanted to see what new operations the young man, the God of gamblers, could do.

After all, if you stand high for too long, you will feel lonely

Soon, there was a quarter of an hour left before the end.

“It seems that there is nothing he can do.”

“Sitting here is nothing but sensationalism.”

“I think so. Even asking for Wumo to release words and not let people gamble with him. What can he do no matter how powerful he is?”

The monks around agreed that the gambling God of the bombers who shocked the whole city in a short time had no way to return to heaven.

At this time, Xu que suddenly opened his eyes, stood up and sighed: “the gambling God has been in the gambling world for thousands of years. Looking at the invincible hands in the world, it is very cold at high places… I heard that there is a gambling competition here today. I thought I could see the outstanding future generations, but I didn’t expect that they were all incompetent!”

WOW!

The monks present were stunned!

Too arrogant!

It’s so arrogant!

The people present may not seem like much among the contestants, but they are all experts in gambling on their own territory. They are absolutely first-class people!

This guy actually said that everyone is incompetent!

How good does he have to be at gambling?

“Hum, what if you have such a high gambling skill?” Someone said angrily, “I can’t just sit here and wait for failure.”

Xu que glanced at him and was angry. Lang said, “please don’t be evil. Dare to come out and fight with me!”

The sound was like thunder over the whole dark city.

Everyone was stunned!

They thought Xu Ke would refute, but unexpectedly, they directly challenged the king of yongdark city to beg Wumo!

At the same time, a more shocking scene appeared in front of us.

In the distant darkness, a burly middle-aged man appeared in front of the crowd, playing with a sieve cup in his hand.

“No evil! It’s asking for no magic! ”

“God, Qiu Wumo really appeared!”

“Can it be said that even Qiu Wumo recognized Xu’s lack of strength, so it appeared?!”

“It is said that it has been nearly 30 years. Qiu Wumo didn’t appear in front of everyone. He actually appeared today!”

Everyone around screamed and stared at him in amazement.

In the eternal dark city, seeking no magic is a legend. It is said that even Chen paijiu and Li shisan Zhang have not really won seeking no magic.

I saw that I asked for no magic to step in the air. With each step falling, there was a virtual shadow of a dice under my feet.

“Are you going to challenge me?” Qiu Wumo looked up and down at Xu Ke with interest, “what qualifications do you have?” He didn’t want to appear, but Xu’s actions made him curious. For many years, I haven’t seen such a manic person dare to provoke himself in public. As a half step Immortal Emperor level strong man, he disdains to use cultivation to crush him. Only relying on gambling to completely defeat the other party is the principle of a gambling master! Moreover, only by defeating the strong in gambling, can we hone our road Take a bet. I’m the first in this gambling competition. ” Xu que said with a faint smile, “do you accept it?” Qiu Wumo just wanted to hear what Xu Ke wanted to say, but he was not ready to really gamble. Hearing his words, he was slightly stunned and immediately laughed: “hahaha, can you become the first? It’s wishful thinking! ” After that, he waved his big hand and said, “now there is a quarter of an hour before the end of the gambling competition. What do you take?” You don’t care. You just need to answer me, bet or not. ” Xu Yanshen said. Begged Wumo to stare into his eyes and say, “OK, I’ll bet with you!” WOW! The crowd was stunned. They didn’t expect that Qiu Wumo actually agreed to this request! But everyone is not optimistic about Xu Ke. The last quarter of an hour will be over soon. What else can I do to get the inferior immortal weapon? The rules of the competition, however, must be the inferior immortal weapons obtained in Yongyin city. Now most of the inferior immortal weapons in the city are in the hands of Chen paijiu and Li shisan Zhang. What can he do? Xu Que’s mouth began to make a loud arc, and Lang said, “in that case, let’s see what the real gambling is!” After saying that, he pointed to the sky with one hand and shouted, “fried heaven Gang, show up!” Whoosh! Whoosh! Whoosh! One figure after another rushed out from all directions like a sharp arrow. Several ups and downs, dozens of people in black robes, gathered around the dice

chapters.title: Chapter 1793
chapters.body:
Chapter 1793

Chapter 1793

C.1793

A deafening and magnificent sound blew up in the sky of the eternal dark city.

“Fried heaven Gang gambler is here!”

“Fried heaven Gang gamblers are here!”

“Fried heaven Gang gambling devil is here!”

“Fried heaven Gang gambling monster is here!”

These people are dressed in black robes with three golden characters of “fried heaven Gang” on the back of the robes!

At this moment, the whole audience was silent.

Everyone was stunned. Even Chen Pai Gow and Li shisan Zhang were stunned and unbelievable.

How can there be so many people in yongdark city?

And listen to the name, it seems that they are all masters of gambling and fighting!

“My God…”

“Where on earth did the bombers come from? First there was a gambling God, and now there is a gambling saint, a gambling bully? ”

“Are they ready to challenge Wumo together?”

Everyone present was shocked. Even Qiu Wumo was frightened by the battle of the other party.

A moment later, he suddenly laughed and said, “even if you all go together, you can’t win me!”

When they heard the speech, they immediately reacted.

Even if there are so many gambling experts in the fried sky Gang, what they bet is whether they can win the first place in the gambling competition.

Even if you come here and don’t get the inferior immortal weapon in the eternal dark city, you won’t… Wait!

They suddenly remembered something. They all looked up and looked at the list suspended over the eternal dark city.

I saw that the names of fried heaven Gang, gambling saint, gambling bully and gambling king were all arranged on the list.

Although the ranking is not high, there are more than 100 inferior immortal weapons under the name!

So many people add up, let alone the first place, even if it is to create a first place!

“Oh, my God! They are already in Yongyin city. Look at the list! ”

“We used to pay attention to the people in front, but we didn’t expect them to be in several positions behind!”

“It’s terrible. These people have set the game from the beginning!”

Everyone was stunned. It turned out that from the beginning, the bombers had sneaked into the eternal dark city!

Xu Wei smiled confidently and raised his hand: “the fried heaven Gang belongs to. Give the inferior immortal weapon to Ben Jisheng!”

“Yes! Guild leader! ”

All the people bowed their hands and gave the storage ring to Xu que.

Miso!

In an instant, Xu Ke’s name suddenly surpassed Chen paijiu and Li shisan Zhang, and appeared in the first place in the list!

“Dang!”

“Dang!”

“Dang!”

At this time, a dull bell rang, representing the end of the gambling competition!

Xu Ke’s name floated from the list, filled with strong golden light, floating over the eternal dark city.

“Bastard!” Begged Wumo to roar and raise his hand to erase Xu Xu’s name, “you’re cheating!”

However, the power of the half step Immortal Emperor poured out and fell on Xu Ke’s name, but suddenly collapsed.

“How, how?”

Qiu Wumo immediately widened his eyes, unbelievable.

I’m a half step Immortal Emperor. Why can’t I even erase a name?

Xu que sneered, carried his hands and looked up at the sky.

A gust of breeze passed, black hair fluttered, and an invisible sense of force filled the audience.

“It’s cold. Let the demon sect go bankrupt.”

Hiss!

Everyone took a breath of air-conditioning and was shocked.

This guy is coming for the desire demon sect!

Qiu Wumo took a deep breath and said in a deep voice, “I want the demon sect to be the first in the nether world. Do you say you are bankrupt! Even if you get the first place, you don’t have the ability! ”

“Oh, really?” Xu que narrowed his eyes and sneered, “did you forget the bet between us?”

Bet?

Qiu Wumo was slightly stunned, and the pupil suddenly contracted into a needle tip shape.

That bet just now

Now Xu que has become the first. Don’t you say he has lost?!

Just thought for a moment and asked for no magic.

“You Yin me!”

You should have won the first place before you are qualified to fight for no magic gambling.

Xu que used his own way to skip the qualification level. Before he won the first place, he induced himself to gamble with him!

Now, this guy has won the first place, that is, he has lost his bet!

No matter what he says, he must promise each other on the basis of not violating his own Avenue!

“You are delusional… Huh!”

Begged Wumo to roar. As soon as he wanted to repent, he felt an invisible powerful force pouring out of the void and suddenly falling on his own road!

The road that had been halfway through suddenly appeared cracks Damn it… My Avenue is about to burst! ” Qiu Wumo was shocked. He didn’t realize until this time that if he repented, he would violate the gambling agreement. If you take gambling as your way and break the gambling agreement, you will be tantamount to abandoning your own way. Fortunately, he stopped talking quickly just now. Otherwise, at this time, the road will collapse, the cultivation will regress, or the road will be destroyed and people will die. There will be no rebirth forever! When you step into the avenue, your life is already closely related to the avenue. The road is your own body. If the road exists, you will live forever. If the road is destroyed, your soul will fly away! At this time, the people around him sighed and felt that Xu Que’s end must be terrible. Although Qiu Wumo once said that as long as someone can win himself, he can make a request. But the desire for evil is the foundation of seeking to be free from evil. Let alone dissolution, even if it is damaged, it can’t be accepted. Xu Kui first asked for no magic. Now he puts forward this excessive request. I’m afraid his death time is approaching Unfortunately, a good young man will die soon. ” Alas, he should never have made such a request. ” This young man is just a fairy king. Seeking no magic is half a step fairy emperor. With one shot at will, this guy will never be reborn on the spot! ” Wait and see. I’m sure I won’t agree to beg Wumo. ” Everyone talked about it one after another. They all thought Xu Ke would die this time. However, at this time, Qiu Wumo raised his head and looked at Xu que with complex eyes. After a moment of silence, he slowly opened his mouth and said, “I… Promise you.” After saying that, he turned and left directly. His figure gradually disappeared into the darkness, leaving only a bleak voice From today on, the demon sect will be completely dissolved and will never appear on Xianyun island! ” Between the avenue and the desire demon sect, Qiu Wumo almost didn’t hesitate for too long, so he chose the avenue. The desire demon sect is gone. As long as you become an Immortal Emperor, the avenue will have no weakness and can be rebuilt naturally. But if the avenue is gone, you may not have the opportunity to step into this realm again in your lifetime. Hearing the words of seeking no evil, everyone looked at the disappearing figure with disbelief. What happened? Begged Wumo to really agree

chapters.title: Chapter 1794
chapters.body:
Chapter 1794

Chapter 1794

C.1794

On this day, the news of the destruction of the demon sect spread all over the nether world.

Everyone who heard the news was shocked and filled with incredible emotions.

You know, that’s asking for no magic!

Legend of the netherworld!

Before him, no one could rule the netherworld!

It is true that there are reasons why he is half step ahead of the Immortal Emperor, but his means of command is even better!

Is it so broken?

“Have you heard that the demon sect has been dissolved!”

“Really? What’s going on? ”

“Well… It’s said to be bankrupt.”

“What the hell? Bankruptcy? Want the demon clan to have no money? ”

“Don’t you know? It’s said that it’s a guy of the gambling God of the fried sky gang. He gambled with Qiu Wumo, and finally won. Qiu Wumo dissolved the desire demon sect!”

“Cow wow, didn’t beg Wumo?”

“It seems not. I heard that Qiu Wumo didn’t say a word. He went back and dissolved the desire demon sect!”

“Sleeping trough! Don’t even dare to ask for no devil. Can you say that the gambling God of the fried heaven Gang is stronger than asking for no devil? ”

Someone boldly guessed: “as far as I can see, I’m afraid it’s not that the gambling God is more powerful than asking for no devil, but asking for no devil to be afraid of the people in the fried heaven gang. Think about it. How can the character of asking for no devil gamble with people who are more powerful than himself? The strength of the gambling God is certainly not as good as seeking no magic, but there must be people in the fried sky gang who are stronger than seeking no magic! ”

It is well known that the best way to seek no evil is to bully the soft and fear the hard. When you meet the powerful, you will close the door and disappear, and when you meet the weak, you will kill the four sides.

Combined with all the news, everyone suddenly seemed to open the door to a new world.

what the fuck!

This guess is very reasonable!

Soon, the news of the existence of a half step Immortal Emperor level strong man in the fried heaven sect spread among several large areas.

Among them, the Xiushui in Wudu area is the most exemplary.

Tianmen, South Tianmen City.

“I’ll tell you! At that time, I watched the half step Immortal Emperor of the tianbang Gang make such a move and screw off the immortal head of Tianmen! ”

In a tavern, a friar from Wudu district was describing vividly the members of the fried heaven Gang he had seen.

The monks around showed disdain and said that they could not believe it at all.

“Don’t be ridiculous. I haven’t even heard of the fried heaven gang. How can it be so awesome!”

“That is, how many people are there in banbu Immortal Emperor? They can count them by breaking their fingers. Where comes the one with more?”

“It must be bullshit. Don’t pretend to force here!”

Boasting forced the friar, he suddenly couldn’t hold his breath. He patted the table and quarreled loudly with the questioning friar.

Xu Ke, sitting in the corner, listened to these discussions, and his expression was a little subtle for a time.

Needless to say, the source of the rumor must have been spread by Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude!

After finishing the quest for Wumo, I planned to go directly to South Tianmen City.

It is said that xiaorou is now in the central Tianmen gate because she got the news in Yongyin city.

However, if you want to enter the central Tianmen gate, you must pass through the South Tianmen gate and then take the Tianzhou of the South Tianmen gate to cross the boundless Linyuan sea between the Tianmen gates.

Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude took a direct step ahead and said they were going to step on the spot in advance and run away directly.

Xu lacked because Su Yunlan and others had to stay in Taiyi school for a few more days and enjoy the joy of spring breeze at night.

It was not easy to appease the girls. He reorganized his clothes and came to the South Tianmen gate.

“These two dogs can spread these rumors… I don’t know what they did here, ready to let me carry the pot!”

Xu Xu doesn’t know these two guys anymore. Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude follow the same principles. They both make a lot of money in silence.

There is only one reason for this rumor.

They caused great trouble. In this way, they sent a message to Xu Que and asked him to come quickly to help.

As for whether it will be saved?

“Of course not.” Xu Xu is very calm about his failure to save his life. “The so-called good people don’t live long, and the scourge is left for thousands of years. There are two dogs, a great scourge that has lived for nearly ten thousand years. How can they die?”

Sure enough, when asked about Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude, all they got was scolding.

“Are you looking for them? Shit, I’m looking for them, too. These two goods are a lot! ”

“Don’t let me catch that dog, or I’ll definitely tear him to pieces!”

“Brother, let me know. I’ll come and help you clean them up.”

“It’s said that they appeared in the holy Moon Temple some time ago. Let’s go back and have a look.”

Holy Moon Temple?

Xu Xu felt very familiar when he heard the name. It’s strange that I haven’t been to xianyunzhou before. How can I feel familiar? After much thought, he finally came to his senses. Shit, the woman in white! When I was robbing in Tianzhou, I once saw a woman in white and a woman in black. The woman in white is called nishang fairy. It is said that she comes from the holy moon hall Unexpectedly, there are old acquaintances here. ” Xu que brings up a flamboyant radian. Since there are old acquaintances, everything is easy to do. He vaguely remembers that the fairy in neon clothes seemed to be ready to make trouble for herself, right? Hey, hey, let yourself surprise her Half a day later, in front of the gate of the holy moon hall. A dignified monk stood outside the gate and looked up at the door suspended on the rainbow. He was quite shocked. He never thought that the holy Moon Palace was built on the rainbow, just like a real heavenly palace! Countless monks walked through them, surrounded by white clouds, like real immortals. Around this huge hall, there are several heavenly rivers flowing on the rainbow and galloping into the distance. A disciple in charge of guarding noticed each other from the moment the monk appeared. Every friar close to the holy Moon Temple will be closely watched. After all, there is a demon temple nearby, so they can’t help but be vigilant. However, looking at the monk, the disciple could not doubt from the bottom of his heart. The other party’s appearance was really just! Just looking at that face, you can feel a sense of justice, like a righteous man ready to maintain world peace. The monk folded his hands and chanted a Buddhist name: “Amitabha, I’m here to visit the saint of the holy Moon Temple.” I don’t know who the master is? ” Seeing the Buddha light looming behind the monk’s head, the disciple respectfully said. You know, monks who can naturally produce Buddha light are not simple people. The monk smiled, like the Buddha twisting flowers: “Amitabha, I’m Tang Sanzang of the fried heaven gang.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1795
chapters.body:
Chapter 1795

Chapter 1795

C.1795

“So it’s Tang Sanzang… Wait, fried tianbang?” As soon as the disciple heard this, his face suddenly changed, “are you from the fried heaven sect? What’s your heart? ”

As he spoke, he directly pulled out his long sword and pointed at the monk.

The monk said calmly, “Amitabha, benefactor, don’t be so nervous. I have no malice.”

No malice?

Shit!

“Do you know what elder Duan did with us, the dog of your fried heaven Gang?” The disciple said angrily, “if I hadn’t run fast at that time, I would have become a pervert peeping at the nun’s bath!”

Um

A few cold sweats fell on Xu Que’s forehead, and a burst of dark scolding broke out in his heart.

“Amitabha, actually… I also have a grudge against them!” Xu Que’s face changed and put on a look of Buddha King Kong’s anger. “I heard that these two shameless guys once made a scene in the holy moon hall. I came here quickly and wanted to put them in the right place!”

This time, it was the turn of the disciples of the holy moon hall to be silly.

“Aren’t you and they both from the bombers? Why… Come and trouble them? ” The disciple said blankly.

“Hey, benefactor, you don’t know. In fact, our fried heaven Gang is an excellent gang with good Gang style and a long history. It helps everyone with intelligence, loves learning, is willing to help others, and often helps grandma cross the road. The purpose of our fried heaven Gang is to make the world more peaceful and beautiful.” Xu Kuyi was talking nonsense.

“Well, how…”

“Almsgiver, the so-called bird is big. There are all kinds of forests. We blow up millions of people of Tiangang. It is inevitable that there will be several scum.” Xu que said solemnly, “Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude are the scum of the fried sky gang. They not only harm the gang, but also go to the outside world to discredit the reputation of the fried sky gang. Our guild leader also specially sent me out this time to clean up the scum for the fried sky Gang, establish a new wind, raise righteousness, forge harmony, and bring a peaceful and beautiful future to xianyunzhou!”

The disciple was stunned by Xu Ke’s series of words. After a long time, he murmured: “if so… Then, then… I can also take you to see the nishang fairy. Wait here more…”

Hearing the speech, Xu que interrupted the other party without hesitation: “thank you, benefactor. I don’t know which way to go? It’s this way, isn’t it? ”

With that, he crossed the disciple directly and entered the holy moon hall.

The disciple was stunned and hurriedly followed his steps: “Hey, master, don’t walk around the holy moon hall. There are many forbidden areas…”

“Amitabha, I am the son of Buddha. I Buddha once said that auspicious people have their own appearance and will be fine.”

“Are you a Buddha? Did the real Buddha say that? How do I feel you’re killing me! ”

“Amitabha, monks don’t lie. Trust me.”

Holy moon hall, fairy wood forest.

A woman in a long white dress was sitting under a tree with her knees crossed. There were bursts of immortal Qi around her. She was full of immortal’s peak cultivation and fluctuated.

If others see it, they will be able to judge that this person is in an unstable state.

Further, there is a vast sea and sky.

Take a step back, that is forever!

If you don’t advance, you will retreat. There is no turning back.

I don’t know how long later, a light voice came from outside the forest: “nishang, are you there?”

As if she had broken some imprisonment, the woman frowned, her face suddenly changed and flushed.

“Poof!”

She suddenly opened her eyes and a stream of bright red blood gushed out of her eyes.

“What’s wrong? Am I going in the wrong direction? Why can’t I step on that road? ” Her eyes were blank and she murmured.

A moment later, the light gradually cleared up in her eyes. She got up, her breath was slow and steady, and looked out of the forest: “what’s the matter?”

A nun in a long pink dress floated slowly from outside the forest.

Before he spoke, he saw the bright red blood on the ground and was shocked: “nishang, are you hurt?”

The nishang fairy shook her head, waved her hand and said, “no, it’s just something wrong in cultivation. It’s not in the way. What’s the matter?”

The nun hesitated for a moment and whispered, “according to the reply of the external disciple… It is said that there is a clue to the tianbang gang…”

“What else?” Nishang immediately frowned.

Since Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude had a big fight in the holy moon hall, the nishang fairy issued a reward order.

As long as anyone can provide the clues of Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude, he can get a large number of natural materials and earth treasures.

During this time, many monks came to provide clues, but most of them were useless news.

However, most of those clues are gossip. Occasionally, one or two pieces of news are reliable, but when they rush over, they are empty, leaving only a mess.

At this time, nishang’s first reaction was that someone tried to cheat the reward from the holy moon hall Send several people to confirm the authenticity of the news, and send them away if it is false. ” The nishang fairy waved her hand and turned to leave. However, the nun looked strange and said softly, “this time… It should be true news.” The nishang fairy immediately frowned: “so sure?” HMM… because someone said he was a member of the fried heaven sect. What’s his name… Tang Sanzang. ” Fried heaven to help Tang Sanzang? ” The nishang fairy seemed to remember something. “Some time ago, the Buddha who became famous in the Buddhist domain, Tang Sanzang?” Yes, it’s him. ” The nun nodded again and again, “he also said that he came to the holy moon hall to help us. He caught the dog and Duan Jiude to help build a new wind, raise righteousness and create harmony.” The nishang fairy pondered for a moment, waved and said, “take me over and have a look.” They left the fairy wood forest and came to the main hall. Before I entered the door, I heard cheers coming from it Master, you are so accurate. Please help me calculate my marriage! ” Yes, yes, master, help me calculate! ” Go away, master is very busy… Master, help me see if ah Yu and I can be together? ” Entering the main hall, I saw a righteous monk standing in the crowd, smiling and nodding to the people around him. Seeing the arrival of nishang, the monk’s eyes lit up. He didn’t go to her and looked at her. Just when the nishang fairy felt a little impatient, the monk suddenly put his hands together and spoke slowly Almsgiver, I’m afraid there will be a bloody disaster in the near future because your blood is out of tune and your seal hall is black! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1796
chapters.body:
Chapter 1796

Chapter 1796

C.1796

“Bloody disaster?” The neon fairy frowned slightly and repeated softly.

Xu nodded and said with a smile, “yes, there will be a disaster of blood in the near future.”

“The master thought, how to crack it?” Her eyebrows slowly spread out and looked at Xu que with a smile.

Because of Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude, nishang fairy had little favor with the fried heaven gang. In addition, Xu Weidu had humiliated her like that before, which was even worse.

“Of course it’s in the future… No, I’ll crack it for you.” Xu Kuang’s hands were folded, and the Buddha’s light was shining behind him. “As a Buddhist, I studied Buddhism carefully, and I also had a lot of research on the theory of numerology.”

Nishang fairy looked around and said suspiciously, “he was telling your fortune just now?”

The monks nodded again and again, quite excited.

“Really! Master Tang’s calculation is accurate! ”

“Yes! He figured out that Xiao Hong and I will definitely be together and become a Taoist couple in the future! ”

“Fuck you, Xiao Hong is mine! Don’t be delusional! ”

“Dog thief, dare to rob me. I’m doomed. God has arranged the most, okay?”

“Fart, die!”

Although it caused a lot of riots, it also verified Xu Xu’s attainments in the theory of numerology.

The monks in the holy moon hall are not ordinary people. They can take advantage of them in a few words.

Although there are not many monks practicing numerology Avenue, there are still a few.

Nishang fairy decided to try the level of Tang Sanzang and asked a disciple to call someone: “call Qian Beidou.”

Qian Beidou is a strong immortal in the holy moon hall. He specializes in practicing numerology. He is a member of the holy moon hall.

The nun carefully pointed to the group of monks fighting together and whispered, “elder martial sister, Qian Beidou is fighting inside…”

“Where?” Nishang asked subconsciously.

“Look there… He was hit on the ground. That’s him.”

The nishang fairy saw the position mentioned by the younger martial sister at a glance. Her eyebrows were slightly broken, and her voice was a little cold: “then call Xu Sandao for me.”

Xu Sandao practiced astrology and was also very good at divination by stars. He had always been compared with Qian Beidou in the holy moon hall.

Compared with Qian Beidou, Xu Sandao is even stronger.

The younger martial sister swallowed a mouthful of saliva and said in fear: “… Elder martial sister, the man beaten by Qian Beidou is Xu Sandao.”

The nishang fairy was almost speechless: “what about the rest of her life? He can’t be fighting, too! ”

In the ordinary half of my life, I practice yundao. I don’t do it with people at all, because it is said that yundao attaches great importance to cause and effect, and it is easy to interfere with cause and effect with people.

Younger martial sister didn’t say she was fighting this time: “I haven’t done anything in my life.”

“That’s good. Call him quickly.” Nishang held her forehead and felt a headache. “Go and tell these guys not to fight again.”

The younger martial sister was about to cry. She raised her hand and said shakily, “elder martial sister… I’ve been shaking and shouting cheers for half my life.”

The nishang fairy looked in the direction of her younger martial sister’s fingers and found a thin young man standing outside the crowd. She waved solemnly: “come on, everyone, it depends on who can win!”

Inspired by the rest of his life, several monks immediately fought harder.

Nishang fairy is about to vomit blood!

Well, you can’t do it. It’s moving your mouth instead.

“Sorry to make Tang Daoyou laugh.” Nishang fairy decided not to pay attention to these shameful things, but to start from the monk himself. “I don’t know what kind of solution master Tang said there was a bloody disaster just now?”

Xu lacked a corner of his mouth.

Hey, woman, want to find out about me?

Then you’re wrong. It can be said that you can’t see the bottom!

“Wait for the poor monk to pinch his fingers.” Xu Wei then closed his eyes, stretched out his right hand and waved the Buddha’s gesture of picking flowers.

Nishang fairy stepped back and wanted to see what the monk did.

But the next second, she suddenly showed a look of surprise.

“This is…”

I saw a strong Buddha spirit emanating from Xu Ke, and I could vaguely feel the mysterious power flowing around him.

Vaguely, it seemed that there was a vision that poked out of nothingness and landed on himself.

As the eldest disciple of the holy moon hall, he was once the head of the Immortal Emperor’s gate. How could the nishang fairy not know the origin of this spell!

Buddhist magic power – fatalism!

Buddhism has the theory of five eyes and six supernatural powers. Apart from the five eyes, the six supernatural powers are as difficult as heaven.

In front of him, the monk who claimed to be from the fried heaven Gang actually made a move, which is more fatalistic than his heart!

It is said that those who master fatalism can know their past and present lives, and those who practice arhat can even see the past and present lives of all living beings! In history, no one has ever practiced this magic power except the ancient Buddha Is this guy really a descendant of the ancient Buddha? ” Nishang fairy holds the information of Tang Sanzang and knows that he is now preached as a Buddhist. He is the reincarnation of the real Buddha and has great power. Just because the other party came from the fried heaven sect, the nishang fairy always felt that this guy was just trying to build momentum for himself. Now, I’m afraid the reincarnation of the real Buddha is not nonsense. Even the monks who were still fighting in the crowd had stopped fighting at this time and looked at Xu vacancy blankly God, this is fatalism! ” The six divine powers of Buddhism. Unexpectedly, master Tang has become such a supreme divine power! ” It’s too awesome! In the future, I will learn more from master Tang! ” Those who know the situation are already screaming, and those who don’t know the situation are being popularized by the monks. Soon, everyone understood how incredible Xu Ke’s magic power was. Nishang fairy took a shallow breath and was ready to wait for the monk to finish and see what he could calculate Poof! ” Just then, a sound of blood spurting hit the dignified in the hall. I saw Xu suddenly spit out blood foam in the gap. The whole person looked that his breath was listless for a moment, and he was extremely weak. Seeing this, all the people present changed their faces What happened to master Tang? It feels like being seriously injured! ” The nishang fairy raised her hand to play a fairy yuan, held Xu que, and a look of sadness passed in her eyes. However, Xu que waved his hand, pulled out a smile and said, “don’t worry about the fairy. The poor monk has worked out a solution for the fairy.” Everyone was absorbed and wanted to hear Xu Ke’s way. I saw him solemnly say: “sleep together tonight, you can break the disaster of blood and light.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1797
chapters.body:
Chapter 1797

Chapter 1797

C.1797

Huh???

The monks present thought they had heard wrong, and even several monks stared at Xu que with the eyes of “is your skull broken?”.

Let the nishang fairy sleep with you?

You’re kidding!

You should know that nishang fairy is the saint of the holy moon hall. She was once a disciple of the Immortal Emperor. She is outstanding in all aspects, beautiful and refined.

It deserves to be called a fairy!

You whore monk dares to say that you should let the fairy sleep with you. It’s really treacherous!

“Bastard!” A monk shouted angrily, rolled up his sleeves and wanted to come forward.

The monk looked inexplicably: “fairy, this monk humiliated you so much. Why did you stop me?”

Nishang fairy didn’t pay attention to him at all, but stared at Xu Xu: “Tang Sanzang, since you say so, that is to say, you see my problem?”

“Monks don’t lie. They just know a little.” Xu que said with a smile, “recently, the fairy in neon clothes is always impetuous at night and can’t practice at ease, right?”

At this stage of cultivation, they don’t need to sleep and rest at all. Meditation and practice every day is the best rest.

Of course, Xu que has never experienced such a thing.

Lao Tzu’s plug-in body. Only mediocre people need to practice hard.

This forced Saint only needs to install the force, install the biggest force and repair the fastest state!

The friars around burst into laughter when they heard the speech.

“Master Tang, you’re wrong this time. Who doesn’t know that our elder martial sister practices Sanqing Taoism.”

“Yes, the Sanqing Taoism is famous for calming down, clearing the soul and nourishing the soul. It perfectly eliminates all the risks that may go crazy.”

“If the nishang fairy enters the cultivation state, even if someone is within three feet, as long as they don’t see it, they can’t feel her existence.”

Sanqing Taoism?

Xu Kuan was stunned. He suddenly remembered that Jiang Hongyan had changed her life against the sky and practiced one gasification and three clearing.

The names of the two are so similar. What do they have in common?

Naturally, he didn’t ask these words. What he is building now is an omniscient image of Bai Xiaosheng. Isn’t it a hip to ask such a question?

Anyway, as long as you can enter the holy moon hall smoothly, there will be opportunities to explore the details of the neon fairy in the future.

And he knew that what he had just said definitely appeared on the nishang fairy.

After all… I don’t spit blood for no reason.

Facing Xu Que’s deep gaze, the nishang fairy looked calm and said nothing.

A moment later, the nishang fairy blinked her eyes twice, her eyelashes trembled slightly, and said softly, “arrange Tang Daoyou to live in Ningqing Pavilion.”

Then he turned and left without stopping.

The friars around were shocked when they heard the speech.

Ningqing Pavilion is the place where nishang fairy lives. Is this monk going to live there?

Do you really want to sleep together at night!

The younger martial sister on one side seemed to be surprised. She didn’t react until Xu que gave a warning.

“That, that, master Tang, please follow me.”

Then, under the leadership of the female nun of the holy moon hall, Xu Weishi walked into the Ningqing Pavilion, which is difficult for others to get close to.

After he left, the whole hall burst into flames.

“Sleeping trough! Elder martial sister actually let master Tang enter Ningqing Pavilion! ”

“What’s going on? On weekdays, if we younger martial brothers want to go in, we need to pass it in advance! ”

“Are you stupid? Is it a question of whether to enter the Ningqing pavilion? You all forgot what master Tang said to elder martial sister just now? ”

“Oh, yes, master Tang said… You want elder martial sister to sleep with him at night?”

“Shit! Absolutely not! Nishang fairy is the eternal faith in my heart. Even if master Tang’s cultivation is thorough and his algorithm is ancient and modern, I will never let him touch nishang fairy! ”

“Do you know that your speech is quite unconvincing.”

“It’s none of your business. Do you want to fight?”

“Oh, I didn’t hurt you just now, did I? Come on!”

A word disagreed, and the hall was in a mess again.

Xu Wei listened to the noise of disturbance behind him and shook his head with emotion.

On this IQ, no wonder when the second day of junior high school, Gouzi and Duan Jiude can break into here unimpeded.

Fortunately, no hostile forces came, otherwise the holy moon hall might not last a day

“Why did master Tang sigh?” The nun walking in front looked back curiously and looked up and down at Xu Ke.

Xu Duan put his hands together and said with a smile, “Amitabha, I’m sighing. It seems that the girl will suffer a lot of blood soon. Why don’t I let the poor monk dissolve it for the girl in the future?”

“Er… Thank you for your kindness, but I think I’m still quite safe.” Tut, I didn’t hear it. Xu Xu is a little dissatisfied. The nuns here are too simple. It’s meaningless to flirt. After putting away the flirt’s mind, Xu que began to look at the surrounding environment. The holy moon hall is vast and boundless. Looking around, I can’t see the edge. Even in some places, I saw a small transmission array. This can’t help but make Xu lack secretly surprised. Sure enough, it’s a big family and cause. Even the inside of the sect needs to use the transmission array. Don’t I have to walk half a day to go to the bathroom? After thinking for a while, Xu que began to think about why Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude came to the holy moon hall. These two pit goods are unprofitable and can’t get up early. It’s impossible to do anything unprofitable. Since they will come to the holy moon hall, it shows that there must be something they want to get here, even at the risk of being killed by the Immortal Emperor. After so many things, these two ordinary treasures have long been despised. There must be a treasure here! Xu que rubbed his hands secretly, feeling a little excited. I don’t blame the poor monk for doing wrong, but my sister-in-law… No, the treasure is too charming. I just want to give better play to the light and heat of the treasure. I’m doing good! After walking for about a quarter of an hour, they stood in front of a different hospital. Compared with other magnificent places in the holy moon hall, this other courtyard looks a little light and has no too much decoration. But when you look carefully, you can feel a calm Master Tang, you live in the West Building tonight. ” The nun told, “don’t run around here after night. There are many places in our holy Moon Temple. If you accidentally break in, it’s possible to be injured or killed.” Xu que replied lightly, “Amitabha, I don’t like to go out.” After entering the quiet Pavilion, it was not long before night came. A figure walked out of the gate with a thief smile on his face. It’s Xu Ke Amitabha, Buddha once said that white lies can sometimes help others, not lie. ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1798
chapters.body:
Chapter 1798

Chapter 1798

C.1798

Under the shadow of the night, the holy moon hall appears more spacious and huge.

Walking in one of the corridors, Xu Weidu subconsciously slowed down his pace for fear of accidentally attracting other people’s attention.

After two rounds of walking along the road that came during the day, he found many things wrong.

The most obvious point is that the prohibitions in many places have just been added.

In other words, the nun lied to him.

Presumably, for the internal monks, the number of these prohibitions is too much.

It’s like who looks okay and puts so many prohibitions in his own house?

All the signs can only illustrate one point – there are some problems in the holy Moon Temple that do not want outsiders to know.

“It seems that you have many little Mimi… Cough, little secret.” Xu que rubbed his hands, and a surge of excitement filled his heart. “What I like most is to help people open their hearts. Let me uncover your fig leaf!”

In front of it is an open-air lake. Lotus flowers in full bloom are swaying on the lake surface, which is more white against the green lotus leaves.

However, everything is an illusion. Xu Ke can clearly feel that there is a force of prohibition here, which not only prohibits people from entering, but also defends the peeping of outsiders’ spirits.

“System, break the ban for me.”

After draining the stock of a group of immortal zuns, the balance of evil Qi in Xu Que’s body has reached an amazing 95%.

With only the last step, you can completely balance the magic Qi and become the existence of xianzun level.

Most of the functions of the system have been reopened. So far, only the retaliation system is still closed.

“Ding, it takes an hour to crack the ban.”

Xu was stunned and surprised: “why is it so slow?”

“Ding, the current system registration is too low. Upgrading to version 12.0 can greatly improve the cracking speed.”

“Well, when I didn’t say it, you start.”

Xu Ke directly gave up the idea of upgrading.

It’s so special that I can always force me to upgrade with clothes. Dog day capitalist!

It’s all upgraded. What do I use?

After staying with the system for so long, Xu que has found the law of these functions of the system.

When they are completely weak, the props that the system can exchange are real good goods, high quality and cheap, and easy to use.

When you can rely on your own strength to compete with the enemy, the dog day system will begin to work hard. You have to upgrade it with installed force value.

When I think about it, I’ve been working for the system!

“Shit, I’ll see if I can discuss with the system and give a discount for upgrading.” Xu que swears and goes to the other side, completely forgetting that he borrowed the equipment and didn’t return it. As a result, he was on the blacklist.

After wandering around the holy moon hall for several times and counting the time to go back, a strange and familiar wave suddenly came from afar.

Xu que looked up and saw that there was a small building ahead.

That breath came from the small building.

“Strange… Can I still have acquaintances in this place?” Xu Xu is a little puzzled.

There are only a few acquaintances, and most of the rest are enemies. Is it the friar who I have cheated before?

Thinking like this, Xu que restrained his breath and approached the small building.

“Strange… Why is there no prohibition here?”

Xu wei walked into the small building almost without any obstacles. He thought there would be any restrictions in such a place that he knew it was a private residence at a glance.

I passed by several small buildings just now. Under the prohibition, I had to call it a treasure Pavilion. I don’t know what it is.

What he didn’t know was that no one would come to this place on weekdays.

Even if you want to get close, you have to pass in advance and get permission before you can enter.

Who would sneak in like him in the middle of the night like an obscene thief.

The last one who did this is still sweeping the floor on the back mountain of the holy Moon Temple!

After looking around and making sure no one saw it, Xu que directly poked out the spirit and wanted to see what was going on inside.

The first floor is empty without any situation.

When his spirit reached the second floor, he was stunned.

“Sleeping trough! Nishang fairy? ”

Xu Ke subconsciously pressed down his breath again for fear that he would be found by the other party.

In the middle of the night, I ran to the nishang fairy’s building alone and peeped with the spirit.

It sounds like a pervert… It seems a little excited.

The room is not big and there is no special decoration. It seems a little deserted.

But all this, on the contrary, set off the scene on the bed, more fiery.

I saw the neon fairy like an iceberg and snow lotus during the day “hiss… I didn’t expect the neon fairy in the holy moon hall. It’s definitely big news!” Xu que wiped the tears from the corners of his mouth and said in righteous words, “as a three good boy who is willing to help others, I am a righteous little gentleman”, so he got up in the air and flew to the room. Xu que shouted at the door first, and then found something wrong It turned out that the nishang fairy didn’t see it during the day! ” I felt a twinkle in my eyes. Unexpectedly, Ben forced saint to look out of sight during the day However, the black smell on her looks familiar… “After a while, Xu Ke focused on what was really wrong. Nishang fairy cultivation to this level? Now this situation, it is obvious that something went wrong in the process of cultivation, resulting in the countercurrent of Xianyuan in the body, which can’t be controlled. As for the culprit… It’s mostly the black gas emerging from time to time behind her. After carefully distinguishing for a while, Xu que was shocked what the fuck! Evil spirit! ” No wonder I feel familiar. Is the feeling special? The evil spirit on foreign demons! How did it appear in the holy Moon Temple? And it seems that it is ready to take away the neon fairy? In the face of this situation, how can Xu que sit idly by Don’t worry, fairy. I’ll help you solve the fire in your heart now! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1799
chapters.body:
Chapter 1799

Chapter 1799

C.1799

Although nishang fairy felt quite uncomfortable at this time, she did not completely lose consciousness.

At the beginning, when Xu que peeped with the spirit, she only focused on fighting against the power in her body, but she didn’t notice it.

But now even people are breaking in. Even if she feels any worse, she should have a reaction.

Especially in Xu que, he shouted, “don’t worry, fairy. I’ll help you solve the fire of desire in your heart!” After that, my heart was even more flustered.

The monk really has a bad intention!

During the day, he still looks dignified. He wants to attack himself while it’s dark?

“You…”

Before the words were out, he saw that Xu Xu had reached the bedside and stretched out his hand to his collar.

Even though it was high and cold in the ordinary days, the nishang fairy was very flustered now.

I’m a big disciple of the holy moon hall. How can I be defiled!

However, I don’t have any strength now, and I can’t even focus my eyes.

The influence of that force on herself is too great. Now the immortal yuan in her body is in a mess and there is no way to mobilize it.

Xu que did not notice that the fairy was conscious at all, and took his own rescue action.

He reached out and grabbed the skirt of the nishang fairy, and whispered the Buddha’s name: “Amitabha, I didn’t mean to. Please forgive me, fairy.”

The nishang fairy was almost crying with anger.

Your hands are almost in your clothes!

And said he didn’t mean it?

Where is such a hypocritical monk like you!

“Even if jade and stone burn, I will never let you, a prostitute monk, succeed!”

Nishang fairy was cruel in her heart. As the eldest disciple of the holy moon hall, her arrogance will never make her like those fragile women who compromise.

If you dare to touch me, everyone will die together!

Just as she gritted her teeth and was ready to detonate the Dantian with all her strength, she suddenly felt a warm breath pouring into her body.

Then, the force that has been disturbing itself is beginning to disappear!

Although the nishang fairy still had no strength to control her body, she was already shocked!

This guy’s cultivation is less than xianzun. Can he control the power in his body?

That’s a strange force that even she can’t resist!

Xu Xu is using the system to absorb the evil Qi in the nishang fairy.

You know, the magic Qi absorbed by Xu lacked before is a complete amount of extraterritorial demons.

Even if it is only one percent, it is a quantity that can not be underestimated for a friar.

“Strange, how can there be so much evil Qi in the nishang fairy?” Xu que absorbed it and wondered, “and what is the special scene during the day?”

The reason why Xu lacked blood during the day is not the reason for the bullshit of excessive power consumption.

But because when he used fatalism to observe the fate of the nishang fairy, he saw an endless dark void.

In the depths of the void, there was a powerful force, which blew out of the land boundary.

Fortunately, he reacted quickly and made up a set of words to deceive the nishang fairy.

After all, if there is that kind of existence from nothingness in his body, even if Xu lacks himself, he will be anxious at night and can’t sleep.

Although his hands kept moving, his mind had already flown out of the sky.

Nishang fairy also found out that Xu que was completely helping her, regulating the chaotic power in her body, and recuperating the meridians in her body.

After all, the force just ran around, and even myself suffered a lot of damage.

As Xu lacked absorbed the magic Qi faster and faster, the nishang fairy only felt that her body became comfortable, as if all three souls were going to leave her body.

“Ding, the prohibition cracking is completed.”

I don’t know how long later, the voice of the system suddenly sounded in Xu Ke’s mind.

He suddenly recovered and loosened his skirt.

“Well…”

The comfortable feeling suddenly left her body, and the neon fairy subconsciously groaned with dissatisfaction.

what the fuck!

Xu que was so frightened that he stepped back on the spot and looked up and down at the people on the bed with vigilant eyes.

Isn’t this special going to wake up?

Look at the surrounding situation, lonely men and women, untidy clothes, wake up at this moment, even if you have eight mouths, you can’t explain clearly!

After careful observation for a while, I was relieved to find that the nishang fairy just breathed steadily and had no sign of waking up.

“Shit, I have one, two, three, four… I don’t know how many wives. If there is a scandal, I’m afraid I won’t be torn by my hands.”

Xu que patted his chest, stood by the bed, looked down at the exquisite and beautiful face, and suddenly had a bad heart. It’s a rare opportunity to be so close to the high nishang fairy. Isn’t it a good opportunity to do nothing? Lying in bed pretending to sleep, the fairy was still thinking about when Xu que would leave. Suddenly, she felt a big hand stretched out and squeezed it hard on her face! The man who did it also commented: “Amitabha, it feels very good.” A moment later, the fairy tentatively opened one eye and determined that Xu lacked had left before she sat up from the bed. Just now, the strength in her body has calmed down, but I felt that if she got up like this, the scene would be quite embarrassing, so I chose to pretend to sleep. But I never thought that Tang Sanzang was so bold that he dared to regulate his breath But… The people of the fried sky Gang don’t seem so bad? ” The fairy subconsciously thought. She knew her charm and how powerless she was just now. If someone else came in, even her younger martial brother couldn’t promise not to move her mind. It happened that the monk Tang Sanzang did nothing, although his words were a little presumptuous and even dared to pinch himself. Even took the initiative to help themselves solve this problem! The fairy sat by the bed and stared at the half open window. The moonlight outside the window is like water, falling into thousands of homes. Xu Wei left nishang fairy’s room and went straight to the lake he had just seen. At this time, the prohibition has been completely untied. It looks like the previous scene from the outside, but with one step, the scene in front of me suddenly changes Woge… Did anyone steal the lake water? ” Xu que stared blankly at the dried up lake in front of him, and muttered in his heart. Two dogs and Duan Jiude are short of moral goods. Did they implement the three lights in the holy moon hall

chapters.title: Chapter 1800
chapters.body:
Chapter 1800

Chapter 1800

C.1800

The originally calm lake has dried up at this time, and even the soil at the bottom of the lake has dried up, which is really beyond Xu’s imagination.

A leaf knows the autumn, and Xu que seems to have guessed what happened in those places that have been banned.

“In other words, there is something wrong with the interior of the holy Moon Temple.” Xu Wei sat down by the lake, frowned and thought, “there’s enough aura here. It shouldn’t be so easy to dry up.”

In essence, the environment of a region reflects the richness of aura.

For example, in places with poor aura, it is often the black mountain water, and you can’t even see a little green.

But if you have plenty of aura, it is naturally beautiful and pleasing to the eyes.

Where is the holy Moon Temple?

A major force in Yongzhen Xianyu’s jurisdiction, compared with the imperial dynasty, is equivalent to the first eunuch under the emperor.

That’s what you want. Even if you don’t need it, someone will rush to give gifts.

The holy moon hall is also a first-class place with strong aura in the South Tianmen gate. The air sucked in is full of aura.

Let alone the drying up of the lake, all flowers and grasses that move here and bathe in the air can become miraculous flowers.

This can only happen for one reason.

“Oh, fuck, er Gouzi didn’t just find the situation here, so he secretly touched it to come over.” Xu Ke scolded at that time, and the more he thought, the more likely he was.

Things that can absorb Reiki on such a large scale and have not yet been found are either top-quality goods or peerless murderers. These two things are not much different from Xu que.

If a peerless monster falls into your own hands, you can still play its role.

Not really. You can also find the system to recycle.

“No, we have to find it quickly. Now this large-scale phenomenon has appeared. It will be late when the people in the holy moon hall find it.”

Xu Ke thought of this floor because of Er Gouzi.

Other people would only think that there was a problem with the environment of the holy moon hall, but they didn’t expect that there would be a problem to absorb Reiki.

After all, the aura of heaven and earth is everywhere in xianyunzhou. There is no need to hide in a sect door to collect wool.

Xu Ke wanted to find out this existence at the first time, but he was foolish as soon as he stepped out of the scope of the lake.

There are prohibitions everywhere. You can find them next to each other. When will you go?

After thinking for a while, Xu que had an idea in his heart and turned back to the place where he lived.

Early the next morning, a nun came to look for him.

“Master Tang, elder martial sister, please go and tell me.”

Xu que recited the Buddha’s name and left after the nun’s self-cultivation.

When she came to the main hall, the neon fairy was as noble and cold as yesterday. Her white skirt made the whole person holy and frightening.

But Xu Wei just sneered in his heart and casually found a chair to sit down.

Sample, the day is so serious, and the night is not empty and lonely?

That is, Ben forced Sheng not to remember last night, otherwise he took the video stone and took it back for auction. A large number of male practitioners in the holy Moon Temple scrambled for it.

“Master Tang, since you said you were coming to correct the name of the fried heaven sect, I don’t know what we need to do in the holy moon hall?” Nishang fairy opened the door to the mountain road.

While nishang fairy was talking, Xu que kept staring at each other.

After he found that the other party’s sight fell on himself, he quickly took it back. He didn’t seem to show any difference. He was relieved.

It seems that I didn’t wake up last night

What he didn’t know was that although the nishang fairy’s eyes closed quickly, it was actually because as long as he saw the Tang Sanzang master, he would involuntarily go out first last night.

From the beginning of self-cultivation to now, I have kept my body like a jade and never showed an inappropriate side in front of any opposite sex.

In other words, Xu Ke was the first man to see her face.

If it were not for the noble morality to restrain the nishang fairy, I’m afraid I would have started to prepare to kill people and kill people.

“Amitabha.” Xu Kuan put his hands together and said sincerely, “with my help’s understanding of Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude, I think we should do a lot of things in your sect. Recently, there should be many difficult things in your sect?”

The nishang fairy was silent for a moment and nodded.

Xu que smiled and said, “I wonder if it’s convenient to take the poor monk to those places where there are problems? I’m willing to help the holy Moon Temple solve these troubles. I think it should be enough to prove my sincerity. ”

After a pause, he said again: “again, I want to reiterate that the fried tianbang is definitely an active gang with harmony, unity and friendship. The actions of Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude do not mean the fried tianbang.”

These words are naturally intended to pave the way for their own people and make them more convinced of their positive role.

Only at this time will Xu que sigh in his heart. Shit, it’s too tired to be a decent person. No wonder the magic gate is always popular. After all, it’s much easier to put down the butcher’s knife than to do good for a lifetime. For example, Xu Ke, if he suddenly doesn’t pit others one day, that person may be grateful. Human nature is so strange sometimes. The nishang fairy lowered her eyes. After a moment of silence, she whispered, “take master Tang to the holy water spring.” The nun seemed surprised and said in a hurry, “but the holy water spring has…” “it was because there was a problem that master Tang went to see it.” Unknowingly, the name of Xu Ke by nishang fairy has changed. Facing the nishang fairy, nun Xiu obviously didn’t insist so strongly, so she had to lower her head and take Xu que to the back of the hall. Seeing this scene, Xu que, who was originally going to use his three inch eloquence to persuade the other party, was a little confused. What happened? How do you feel that after one night, this woman seems to trust me more? Is it difficult that Ben forced Sheng’s handsome and finally moved her? After thinking about it, Xu que strengthened his idea. After following the nun, I walked through an ambulatory and suddenly saw the light in front of me. A low mountain wall appeared in front of me. Looking up, it was hidden in the clouds and could not see the end. On both sides of the mountain wall are covered with some withered and yellow vines, and in the shadow of the vines, a stone platform of about three feet is supported outside What is this? ” Xu que asked curiously. The nun whispered, “tell master Tang that this is the holy water spring mentioned by the eldest martial sister.” Xu Wei looked around and said, “where’s the holy water?” Upon hearing the speech, the nun looked a little bitter and said, “to tell you the truth, the holy water had dried up a few months ago…
